authors_text: Ruoting Wu,Yuxin Zhang,Qibiao Peng,Liang Chen,Zibin Zheng
title: A Survey of Deep Learning Models for Structural Code Understanding
title_zh: 用于结构代码理解的深度学习模型综述
abstract: In recent years, the rise of deep learning and automation requirements in the software industry has elevated Intelligent Software Engineering to new heights. The number of approaches and applications in code understanding is growing, with deep learning techniques being used in many of them to better capture the information in code data. In this survey, we present a comprehensive overview of the structures formed from code data. We categorize the models for understanding code in recent years into two groups: sequence-based and graph-based models, further make a summary and comparison of them. We also introduce metrics, datasets and the downstream tasks. Finally, we make some suggestions for future research in structural code understanding field.
summary: In recent years, the rise of deep learning and automation requirements in the software industry has elevated Intelligent Software Engineering to new heights. The number of approaches and applications in code understanding is growing, with deep learning techniques being used in many of them to better capture the information in code data. In this survey, we present a comprehensive overview of the structures formed from code data. We categorize the models for understanding code in recent years into two groups: sequence-based and graph-based models, further make a summary and comparison of them. We also introduce metrics, datasets and the downstream tasks. Finally, we make some suggestions for future research in structural code understanding field.
abstract_zh: 近年来，软件行业深度学习和自动化需求的兴起，将智能软件工程提升到了新的高度。代码理解的方法和应用程序的数量正在不断增加，其中许多方法和应用程序都使用深度学习技术来更好地捕获代码数据中的信息。在本次调查中，我们全面概述了由代码数据形成的结构。我们将近年来的代码理解模型分为两类：基于序列的模型和基于图的模型，并进一步对它们进行总结和比较。我们还介绍了指标、数据集和下游任务。最后，我们对结构代码理解领域的未来研究提出了一些建议。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习模型在结构化代码理解中的应用，分类比较了序列模型和图模型，并总结了相关数据集、评估指标及下游任务。
AI.motivation: 随着软件行业自动化需求增长，深度学习在代码理解中的应用迅速发展，但缺乏系统性综述以指导未来研究方向。
AI.method: 通过分类整理近年代码理解模型为序列模型和图模型两类，对比分析其特点，并汇总相关数据集、评估指标及下游任务。
AI.result: 明确了两类模型的适用场景与优劣势，梳理了主流数据集与评估体系，指出现有研究在模型泛化性、可解释性等方面存在不足。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究应关注模型融合、跨语言迁移学习及更高效的图神经网络架构设计，以提升代码理解的准确性和实用性。

authors_text: Mengzhe He,Yali Wang,Jiaxi Wu,Yiru Wang,Hanqing Li,Bo Li,Weihao Gan,Wei Wu,Yu Qiao
title: Cross Domain Object Detection by Target-Perceived Dual Branch Distillation
title_zh: 通过目标感知双分支蒸馏进行跨域目标检测
abstract: Cross domain object detection is a realistic and challenging task in the wild. It suffers from performance degradation due to large shift of data distributions and lack of instance-level annotations in the target domain. Existing approaches mainly focus on either of these two difficulties, even though they are closely coupled in cross domain object detection. To solve this problem, we propose a novel Target-perceived Dual-branch Distillation (TDD) framework. By integrating detection branches of both source and target domains in a unified teacher-student learning scheme, it can reduce domain shift and generate reliable supervision effectively. In particular, we first introduce a distinct Target Proposal Perceiver between two domains. It can adaptively enhance source detector to perceive objects in a target image, by leveraging target proposal contexts from iterative cross-attention. Afterwards, we design a concise Dual Branch Self Distillation strategy for model training, which can progressively integrate complementary object knowledge from different domains via self-distillation in two branches. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on a number of widely-used scenarios in cross domain object detection. The results show that our TDD significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on all the benchmarks. Our code and model will be available at https://github.com/Feobi1999/TDD.
summary: Cross domain object detection is a realistic and challenging task in the wild. It suffers from performance degradation due to large shift of data distributions and lack of instance-level annotations in the target domain. Existing approaches mainly focus on either of these two difficulties, even though they are closely coupled in cross domain object detection. To solve this problem, we propose a novel Target-perceived Dual-branch Distillation (TDD) framework. By integrating detection branches of both source and target domains in a unified teacher-student learning scheme, it can reduce domain shift and generate reliable supervision effectively. In particular, we first introduce a distinct Target Proposal Perceiver between two domains. It can adaptively enhance source detector to perceive objects in a target image, by leveraging target proposal contexts from iterative cross-attention. Afterwards, we design a concise Dual Branch Self Distillation strategy for model training, which can progressively integrate complementary object knowledge from different domains via self-distillation in two branches. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on a number of widely-used scenarios in cross domain object detection. The results show that our TDD significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on all the benchmarks. Our code and model will be available at https://github.com/Feobi1999/TDD.
abstract_zh: 跨域对象检测是一项现实且具有挑战性的任务。由于数据分布的大幅变化和目标域中缺乏实例级注释，它的性能下降。现有的方法主要集中在这两个困难中的任何一个，尽管它们在跨域对象检测中紧密耦合。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的目标感知双分支蒸馏（TDD）框架。通过将源域和目标域的检测分支集成在统一的师生学习方案中，可以减少域转移并有效生成可靠的监督。特别是，我们首先在两个域之间引入一个不同的目标提案感知器。它可以通过利用迭代交叉注意力的目标提议上下文，自适应地增强源检测器以感知目标图像中的对象。随后，我们设计了一种简洁的双分支自蒸馏策略用于模型训练，该策略可以通过两个分支的自蒸馏逐步集成来自不同领域的互补对象知识。最后，我们对跨域目标检测中的许多广泛使用的场景进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，我们的 TDD 在所有基准测试中都显着优于最先进的方法。我们的代码和模型将在 https://github.com/Feobi1999/TDD 上提供。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为TDD的框架，用于解决跨领域目标检测中的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 跨领域目标检测面临数据分布差异大和目标领域缺乏实例级标注的挑战，现有方法通常只解决其中一个难题，而未能兼顾两者。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为TDD的框架，结合了源域和目标域的检测分支，并通过统一的教师-学生学习机制减少领域差异，生成可靠的监督。具体包括引入目标提案感知器和双分支自蒸馏策略。
AI.result: 在多个跨领域目标检测场景中进行了广泛实验，结果表明TDD在所有基准测试中显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: TDD框架通过结合源域和目标域的知识，有效缓解了跨领域目标检测中的性能下降问题，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Jayetri Bardhan,Anthony Colas,Kirk Roberts,Daisy Zhe Wang
title: DrugEHRQA: A Question Answering Dataset on Structured and Unstructured Electronic Health Records For Medicine Related Queries
title_zh: DrugEHRQA：用于医学相关查询的结构化和非结构化电子健康记录问答数据集
abstract: This paper develops the first question answering dataset (DrugEHRQA) containing question-answer pairs from both structured tables and unstructured notes from a publicly available Electronic Health Record (EHR). EHRs contain patient records, stored in structured tables and unstructured clinical notes. The information in structured and unstructured EHRs is not strictly disjoint: information may be duplicated, contradictory, or provide additional context between these sources. Our dataset has medication-related queries, containing over 70,000 question-answer pairs. To provide a baseline model and help analyze the dataset, we have used a simple model (MultimodalEHRQA) which uses the predictions of a modality selection network to choose between EHR tables and clinical notes to answer the questions. This is used to direct the questions to the table-based or text-based state-of-the-art QA model. In order to address the problem arising from complex, nested queries, this is the first time Relation-Aware Schema Encoding and Linking for Text-to-SQL Parsers (RAT-SQL) has been used to test the structure of query templates in EHR data. Our goal is to provide a benchmark dataset for multi-modal QA systems, and to open up new avenues of research in improving question answering over EHR structured data by using context from unstructured clinical data.
summary: This paper develops the first question answering dataset (DrugEHRQA) containing question-answer pairs from both structured tables and unstructured notes from a publicly available Electronic Health Record (EHR). EHRs contain patient records, stored in structured tables and unstructured clinical notes. The information in structured and unstructured EHRs is not strictly disjoint: information may be duplicated, contradictory, or provide additional context between these sources. Our dataset has medication-related queries, containing over 70,000 question-answer pairs. To provide a baseline model and help analyze the dataset, we have used a simple model (MultimodalEHRQA) which uses the predictions of a modality selection network to choose between EHR tables and clinical notes to answer the questions. This is used to direct the questions to the table-based or text-based state-of-the-art QA model. In order to address the problem arising from complex, nested queries, this is the first time Relation-Aware Schema Encoding and Linking for Text-to-SQL Parsers (RAT-SQL) has been used to test the structure of query templates in EHR data. Our goal is to provide a benchmark dataset for multi-modal QA systems, and to open up new avenues of research in improving question answering over EHR structured data by using context from unstructured clinical data.
abstract_zh: 本文开发了第一个问答数据集 (DrugEHRQA)，其中包含来自公开电子健康记录 (EHR) 的结构化表格和非结构化注释的问答对。 EHR 包含存储在结构化表格和非结构化临床记录中的患者记录。结构化和非结构化电子病历中的信息并不是严格分离的：信息可能是重复的、矛盾的，或者在这些来源之间提供额外的上下文。我们的数据集包含与药物相关的查询，包含超过 70,000 个问答对。为了提供基线模型并帮助分析数据集，我们使用了一个简单的模型 (MultimodalEHRQA)，该模型使用模态选择网络的预测在 EHR 表和临床记录之间进行选择来回答问题。这用于将问题引导至基于表格或基于文本的最先进的 QA 模型。为了解决复杂嵌套查询带来的问题，这是第一次使用文本到 SQL 解析器的关系感知模式编码和链接 (RAT-SQL) 来测试 EHR 数据中查询模板的结构。我们的目标是为多模式 QA 系统提供基准数据集，并开辟新的研究途径，通过使用非结构化临床数据的上下文来改进 EHR 结构化数据的问答。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DrugEHRQA数据集，结合结构化电子病历表格和非结构化临床记录，用于医疗相关问答任务。
AI.motivation: 电子病历（EHR）包含结构化表格和非结构化文本，二者信息可能存在重复或矛盾，需构建多模态数据集以提升医疗问答系统的准确性。
AI.method: 设计多模态模型MultimodalEHRQA，通过模态选择网络决定使用表格或文本回答问题，并引入RAT-SQL处理复杂查询模板。
AI.result: 构建包含7万余个问答对的DrugEHRQA数据集，提供基线模型并验证多模态方法在医疗问答中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为多模态医疗问答系统提供基准，证明结合非结构化临床数据可提升对结构化EHR数据的问答性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出DrugEHRQA数据集，结合结构化电子病历表格和非结构化临床记录，用于医疗相关问答任务。
ai_content.motivation: 电子病历（EHR）包含结构化表格和非结构化文本，二者信息可能存在重复或矛盾，需构建多模态数据集以提升医疗问答系统的准确性。
ai_content.method: 设计多模态模型MultimodalEHRQA，通过模态选择网络决定使用表格或文本回答问题，并引入RAT-SQL处理复杂查询模板。
ai_content.result: 构建包含7万余个问答对的DrugEHRQA数据集，提供基线模型并验证多模态方法在医疗问答中的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该数据集为多模态医疗问答系统提供基准，证明结合非结构化临床数据可提升对结构化EHR数据的问答性能。

search_text: DrugEHRQA: A Question Answering Dataset on Structured and Unstructured Electronic Health Records For Medicine Related Queries DrugEHRQA：用于医学相关查询的结构化和非结构化电子健康记录问答数据集 This paper develops the first question answering dataset (DrugEHRQA) containing question-answer pairs from both structured tables and unstructured notes from a publicly available Electronic Health Record (EHR). EHRs contain patient records, stored in structured tables and unstructured clinical notes. The information in structured and unstructured EHRs is not strictly disjoint: information may be duplicated, contradictory, or provide additional context between these sources. Our dataset has medication-related queries, containing over 70,000 question-answer pairs. To provide a baseline model and help analyze the dataset, we have used a simple model (MultimodalEHRQA) which uses the predictions of a modality selection network to choose between EHR tables and clinical notes to answer the questions. This is used to direct the questions to the table-based or text-based state-of-the-art QA model. In order to address the problem arising from complex, nested queries, this is the first time Relation-Aware Schema Encoding and Linking for Text-to-SQL Parsers (RAT-SQL) has been used to test the structure of query templates in EHR data. Our goal is to provide a benchmark dataset for multi-modal QA systems, and to open up new avenues of research in improving question answering over EHR structured data by using context from unstructured clinical data. 本文开发了第一个问答数据集 (DrugEHRQA)，其中包含来自公开电子健康记录 (EHR) 的结构化表格和非结构化注释的问答对。 EHR 包含存储在结构化表格和非结构化临床记录中的患者记录。结构化和非结构化电子病历中的信息并不是严格分离的：信息可能是重复的、矛盾的，或者在这些来源之间提供额外的上下文。我们的数据集包含与药物相关的查询，包含超过 70,000 个问答对。为了提供基线模型并帮助分析数据集，我们使用了一个简单的模型 (MultimodalEHRQA)，该模型使用模态选择网络的预测在 EHR 表和临床记录之间进行选择来回答问题。这用于将问题引导至基于表格或基于文本的最先进的 QA 模型。为了解决复杂嵌套查询带来的问题，这是第一次使用文本到 SQL 解析器的关系感知模式编码和链接 (RAT-SQL) 来测试 EHR 数据中查询模板的结构。我们的目标是为多模式 QA 系统提供基准数据集，并开辟新的研究途径，通过使用非结构化临床数据的上下文来改进 EHR 结构化数据的问答。 本文提出DrugEHRQA数据集，结合结构化电子病历表格和非结构化临床记录，用于医疗相关问答任务。 Jayetri Bardhan,Anthony Colas,Kirk Roberts,Daisy Zhe Wang cs.AI

title: Extending the View Composition Algebra to Hierarchical Data
title_zh: 将视图组合代数扩展到分层数据
abstract: Comparison is a core task in visual analysis. Although there are numerous guidelines to help users design effective visualizations to aid known comparison tasks, there are few formalisms that define the semantics of comparison operations in a way that can serve as the basis for a grammar of comparison interactions. Recent work proposed a formalism called View Composition Algebra (VCA) that enables ad hoc comparisons between any combination of marks, trends, or charts in a visualization interface. However, VCA limits comparisons to visual representations of data that have an identical schema, or where the schemas form a strict subset relationship (e.g., comparing price per state with price, but not with price per county). In contrast, the majority of real-world data - temporal, geographical, organizational - are hierarchical. To bridge this gap, this paper presents an extension to VCA (called VCAH) that enables ad hoc comparisons between visualizations of hierarchical data. VCAH leverages known hierarchical relationships to enable ad hoc comparison of data at different hierarchical granularities. We illustrate applications to hierarchical and Tableau visualizations.
summary: Comparison is a core task in visual analysis. Although there are numerous guidelines to help users design effective visualizations to aid known comparison tasks, there are few formalisms that define the semantics of comparison operations in a way that can serve as the basis for a grammar of comparison interactions. Recent work proposed a formalism called View Composition Algebra (VCA) that enables ad hoc comparisons between any combination of marks, trends, or charts in a visualization interface. However, VCA limits comparisons to visual representations of data that have an identical schema, or where the schemas form a strict subset relationship (e.g., comparing price per state with price, but not with price per county). In contrast, the majority of real-world data - temporal, geographical, organizational - are hierarchical. To bridge this gap, this paper presents an extension to VCA (called VCAH) that enables ad hoc comparisons between visualizations of hierarchical data. VCAH leverages known hierarchical relationships to enable ad hoc comparison of data at different hierarchical granularities. We illustrate applications to hierarchical and Tableau visualizations.
abstract_zh: 比较是视觉分析的核心任务。尽管有许多指南可以帮助用户设计有效的可视化以帮助已知的比较任务，但很少有形式主义能够以可作为比较交互语法基础的方式定义比较操作的语义。最近的工作提出了一种称为视图组合代数（VCA）的形式主义，它可以在可视化界面中的标记、趋势或图表的任意组合之间进行临时比较。然而，VCA 限制了与具有相同模式或模式形成严格子集关系的数据的视觉表示的比较（例如，将每个州的价格与价格进行比较，但不与每个县的价格进行比较）。相比之下，大多数现实世界的数据——时间的、地理的、组织的——都是分层的。为了弥补这一差距，本文提出了 VCA 的扩展（称为 VCAH），可以在分层数据的可视化之间进行临时比较。 VCAH 利用已知的层次关系来对不同层次粒度的数据进行临时比较。我们举例说明了分层可视化和 Tableau 可视化的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展的视图组合代数（VCAH），以支持对分层数据进行任意粒度的可视化比较。
AI.motivation: 现有视图组合代数（VCA）无法处理具有不同分层结构的现实世界数据（如时间、地理、组织数据），限制了跨层级的灵活比较需求。
AI.method: 通过引入分层关系建模，扩展VCA的语义规则，使用户能基于已知层级结构对不同粒度的数据进行自定义比较操作。
AI.result: 成功将VCAH应用于分层数据可视化场景，并通过Tableau实例验证了其在跨层级比较中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: VCAH通过整合分层数据特性，解决了传统VCA在非同构数据比较中的局限性，为复杂数据的交互分析提供了新方法。

title: Improving Dual-Microphone Speech Enhancement by Learning Cross-Channel Features with Multi-Head Attention
title_zh: 通过学习多头注意力的跨通道特征来改进双麦克风语音增强
abstract: Hand-crafted spatial features, such as inter-channel intensity difference (IID) and inter-channel phase difference (IPD), play a fundamental role in recent deep learning based dual-microphone speech enhancement (DMSE) systems. However, learning the mutual relationship between artificially designed spatial and spectral features is hard in the end-to-end DMSE. In this work, a novel architecture for DMSE using a multi-head cross-attention based convolutional recurrent network (MHCA-CRN) is presented. The proposed MHCA-CRN model includes a channel-wise encoding structure for preserving intra-channel features and a multi-head cross-attention mechanism for fully exploiting cross-channel features. In addition, the proposed approach specifically formulates the decoder with an extra SNR estimator to estimate frame-level SNR under a multi-task learning framework, which is expected to avoid speech distortion led by end-to-end DMSE module. Finally, a spectral gain function is adopted to further suppress the unnatural residual noise. Experiment results demonstrated superior performance of the proposed model against several state-of-the-art models.
summary: Hand-crafted spatial features, such as inter-channel intensity difference (IID) and inter-channel phase difference (IPD), play a fundamental role in recent deep learning based dual-microphone speech enhancement (DMSE) systems. However, learning the mutual relationship between artificially designed spatial and spectral features is hard in the end-to-end DMSE. In this work, a novel architecture for DMSE using a multi-head cross-attention based convolutional recurrent network (MHCA-CRN) is presented. The proposed MHCA-CRN model includes a channel-wise encoding structure for preserving intra-channel features and a multi-head cross-attention mechanism for fully exploiting cross-channel features. In addition, the proposed approach specifically formulates the decoder with an extra SNR estimator to estimate frame-level SNR under a multi-task learning framework, which is expected to avoid speech distortion led by end-to-end DMSE module. Finally, a spectral gain function is adopted to further suppress the unnatural residual noise. Experiment results demonstrated superior performance of the proposed model against several state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 手工制作的空间特征，例如通道间强度差（IID）和通道间相位差（IPD），在最近基于深度学习的双麦克风语音增强（DMSE）系统中发挥着基础作用。然而，在端到端 DMSE 中，学习人工设计的空间和光谱特征之间的相互关系是很困难的。在这项工作中，提出了一种使用基于多头交叉注意的卷积循环网络（MHCA-CRN）的 DMSE 新颖架构。所提出的 MHCA-CRN 模型包括用于保留通道内特征的通道编码结构和用于充分利用跨通道特征的多头交叉注意机制。此外，所提出的方法专门制定了具有额外SNR估计器的解码器，以在多任务学习框架下估计帧级SNR，这有望避免端到端DMSE模块导致的语音失真。最后，采用频谱增益函数来进一步抑制不自然的残留噪声。实验结果表明，所提出的模型相对于几种最先进的模型具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多头交叉注意力机制的卷积循环网络（MHCA-CRN），用于改进双麦克风语音增强（DMSE）系统。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端DMSE系统难以有效学习人工设计的空间特征与频谱特征之间的关系，导致语音失真问题。
AI.method: 设计通道级编码结构保留单通道特征，结合多头交叉注意力机制挖掘跨通道特征，并引入SNR估计器进行多任务学习以抑制残余噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在多个指标上优于现有先进方法，有效提升了语音增强效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨通道特征学习与SNR估计结合，提出的MHCA-CRN架构能更准确捕捉空间信息并减少语音失真。

In addition, the proposed approach specifically formulates the decoder with an extra SNR estimator to estimate frame-level SNR under a multi-task learning framework, which is expected to avoid speech distortion led by end-to-end DMSE module. Finally, a spectral gain function is adopted to further suppress the unnatural residual noise. Experiment results demonstrated superior performance of the proposed model against several state-of-the-art models. 手工制作的空间特征，例如通道间强度差（IID）和通道间相位差（IPD），在最近基于深度学习的双麦克风语音增强（DMSE）系统中发挥着基础作用。然而，在端到端 DMSE 中，学习人工设计的空间和光谱特征之间的相互关系是很困难的。在这项工作中，提出了一种使用基于多头交叉注意的卷积循环网络（MHCA-CRN）的 DMSE 新颖架构。所提出的 MHCA-CRN 模型包括用于保留通道内特征的通道编码结构和用于充分利用跨通道特征的多头交叉注意机制。此外，所提出的方法专门制定了具有额外SNR估计器的解码器，以在多任务学习框架下估计帧级SNR，这有望避免端到端DMSE模块导致的语音失真。最后，采用频谱增益函数来进一步抑制不自然的残留噪声。实验结果表明，所提出的模型相对于几种最先进的模型具有优越的性能。 本文提出一种基于多头交叉注意力机制的卷积循环网络（MHCA-CRN），用于改进双麦克风语音增强（DMSE）系统。 Xinmeng Xu,Rongzhi Gu,Yuexian Zou eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Jiping Luo,Tingting Zhang,Rui Hao,Donglin Li,Chunsheng Chen,Zhenyu Na,Qinyu Zhang
title: Real-time Cooperative Vehicle Coordination at Unsignalized Road Intersections
title_zh: 无信号道路交叉口实时车辆协同协调
comment: in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
comments: in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
abstract: Cooperative coordination at unsignalized road intersections, which aims to improve the driving safety and traffic throughput for connected and automated vehicles, has attracted increasing interests in recent years. However, most existing investigations either suffer from computational complexity or cannot harness the full potential of the road infrastructure. To this end, we first present a dedicated intersection coordination framework, where the involved vehicles hand over their control authorities and follow instructions from a centralized coordinator. Then a unified cooperative trajectory optimization problem will be formulated to maximize the traffic throughput while ensuring the driving safety and long-term stability of the coordination system. To address the key computational challenges in the real-world deployment, we reformulate this non-convex sequential decision problem into a model-free Markov Decision Process (MDP) and tackle it by devising a Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3)-based strategy in the deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework. Simulation and practical experiments show that the proposed strategy could achieve near-optimal performance in sub-static coordination scenarios and significantly improve the traffic throughput in the realistic continuous traffic flow. The most remarkable advantage is that our strategy could reduce the time complexity of computation to milliseconds, and is shown scalable when the road lanes increase.
summary: Cooperative coordination at unsignalized road intersections, which aims to improve the driving safety and traffic throughput for connected and automated vehicles, has attracted increasing interests in recent years. However, most existing investigations either suffer from computational complexity or cannot harness the full potential of the road infrastructure. To this end, we first present a dedicated intersection coordination framework, where the involved vehicles hand over their control authorities and follow instructions from a centralized coordinator. Then a unified cooperative trajectory optimization problem will be formulated to maximize the traffic throughput while ensuring the driving safety and long-term stability of the coordination system. To address the key computational challenges in the real-world deployment, we reformulate this non-convex sequential decision problem into a model-free Markov Decision Process (MDP) and tackle it by devising a Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3)-based strategy in the deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework. Simulation and practical experiments show that the proposed strategy could achieve near-optimal performance in sub-static coordination scenarios and significantly improve the traffic throughput in the realistic continuous traffic flow. The most remarkable advantage is that our strategy could reduce the time complexity of computation to milliseconds, and is shown scalable when the road lanes increase.
abstract_zh: 近年来，无信号道路交叉口的协作协调旨在提高联网和自动驾驶车辆的驾驶安全性和交通吞吐量，引起了越来越多的兴趣。然而，大多数现有的研究要么受到计算复杂性的影响，要么无法充分利用道路基础设施的潜力。为此，我们首先提出一个专用的交叉口协调框架，其中涉及的车辆交出控制权并遵循集中协调员的指示。然后制定统一的协同轨迹优化问题，在保证行驶安全和协调系统长期稳定性的同时最大化交通吞吐量。为了解决现实世界部署中的关键计算挑战，我们将这个非凸顺序决策问题重新表述为无模型马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并通过在深度强化学习（DRL）框架中设计基于双延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）的策略来解决它。仿真和实际实验表明，所提出的策略可以在亚静态协调场景中实现接近最优的性能，并显着提高现实连续交通流中的交通吞吐量。最显着的优点是我们的策略可以将计算的时间复杂度降低到毫秒，并且当道路车道增加时显示出可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时协同车辆协调框架，通过集中协调器优化无信号交叉口的交通流，提升安全性和通行效率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究或存在计算复杂度高，或无法充分利用道路基础设施潜力，需设计高效且可扩展的协同策略。
AI.method: 构建集中式协调框架，将非凸决策问题转化为模型无关的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），采用双延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）算法求解。
AI.result: 策略在静态场景下接近最优性能，真实连续交通流中通行量显著提升，计算复杂度降至毫秒级且具有可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了实时协同中的计算瓶颈问题，为复杂道路场景下的自动驾驶协同提供了可行方案。

To this end, we first present a dedicated intersection coordination framework, where the involved vehicles hand over their control authorities and follow instructions from a centralized coordinator. authors_text: Yu Wang,Daniel Stoller,Rachel M. Bittner,Juan Pablo Bello
title: Few-Shot Musical Source Separation
title_zh: 少镜头音乐源分离
abstract: Deep learning-based approaches to musical source separation are often limited to the instrument classes that the models are trained on and do not generalize to separate unseen instruments. To address this, we propose a few-shot musical source separation paradigm. We condition a generic U-Net source separation model using few audio examples of the target instrument. We train a few-shot conditioning encoder jointly with the U-Net to encode the audio examples into a conditioning vector to configure the U-Net via feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM). We evaluate the trained models on real musical recordings in the MUSDB18 and MedleyDB datasets. We show that our proposed few-shot conditioning paradigm outperforms the baseline one-hot instrument-class conditioned model for both seen and unseen instruments. To extend the scope of our approach to a wider variety of real-world scenarios, we also experiment with different conditioning example characteristics, including examples from different recordings, with multiple sources, or negative conditioning examples.
summary: Deep learning-based approaches to musical source separation are often limited to the instrument classes that the models are trained on and do not generalize to separate unseen instruments. To address this, we propose a few-shot musical source separation paradigm. We condition a generic U-Net source separation model using few audio examples of the target instrument. We train a few-shot conditioning encoder jointly with the U-Net to encode the audio examples into a conditioning vector to configure the U-Net via feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM). We evaluate the trained models on real musical recordings in the MUSDB18 and MedleyDB datasets. We show that our proposed few-shot conditioning paradigm outperforms the baseline one-hot instrument-class conditioned model for both seen and unseen instruments. To extend the scope of our approach to a wider variety of real-world scenarios, we also experiment with different conditioning example characteristics, including examples from different recordings, with multiple sources, or negative conditioning examples.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的音乐源分离方法通常仅限于模型所训练的乐器类别，并且不能推广到分离看不见的乐器。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种少镜头音乐源分离范例。我们使用目标乐器的几个音频示例来调节通用 U-Net 源分离模型。我们与 U-Net 联合训练少数镜头调节编码器，将音频示例编码为调节向量，从而通过特征线性调制 (FiLM) 配置 U-Net。我们评估 MUSDB18 和 MedleyDB 数据集中真实音乐录音的训练模型。我们表明，对于可见和不可见的仪器，我们提出的少样本条件范例优于基线单热仪器类条件模型。为了将我们的方法的范围扩展到更广泛的现实世界场景，我们还尝试了不同的条件反射示例特征，包括来自不同录音、具有多个来源的示例或负条件反射示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于少量样本的音乐源分离方法，通过条件编码器和U-Net模型实现对未见过乐器的分离。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习音乐源分离模型仅能处理训练时接触过的乐器类别，无法泛化到新乐器的分离任务。
AI.method: 联合训练条件编码器与U-Net模型，利用少量目标乐器音频样本生成条件向量，通过特征级线性调制（FiLM）配置U-Net参数，并测试了多场景条件样本特性。
AI.result: 在MUSDB18和MedleyDB数据集上，该方法在已见和未见乐器分离任务中均优于基线的一热编码模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的少量样本条件框架有效提升了模型对新乐器的适应能力，为现实场景中的音乐源分离提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yihan Wang,Muyang Li,Han Cai,Wei-Ming Chen,Song Han
title: Lite Pose: Efficient Architecture Design for 2D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: Lite Pose：二维人体姿势估计的高效架构设计
abstract: Pose estimation plays a critical role in human-centered vision applications. However, it is difficult to deploy state-of-the-art HRNet-based pose estimation models on resource-constrained edge devices due to the high computational cost (more than 150 GMACs per frame). In this paper, we study efficient architecture design for real-time multi-person pose estimation on edge. We reveal that HRNet's high-resolution branches are redundant for models at the low-computation region via our gradual shrinking experiments. Removing them improves both efficiency and performance. Inspired by this finding, we design LitePose, an efficient single-branch architecture for pose estimation, and introduce two simple approaches to enhance the capacity of LitePose, including Fusion Deconv Head and Large Kernel Convs. Fusion Deconv Head removes the redundancy in high-resolution branches, allowing scale-aware feature fusion with low overhead. Large Kernel Convs significantly improve the model's capacity and receptive field while maintaining a low computational cost. With only 25% computation increment, 7x7 kernels achieve +14.0 mAP better than 3x3 kernels on the CrowdPose dataset. On mobile platforms, LitePose reduces the latency by up to 5.0x without sacrificing performance, compared with prior state-of-the-art efficient pose estimation models, pushing the frontier of real-time multi-person pose estimation on edge. Our code and pre-trained models are released at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/litepose.

However, it is difficult to deploy state-of-the-art HRNet-based pose estimation models on resource-constrained edge devices due to the high computational cost (more than 150 GMACs per frame). In this paper, we study efficient architecture design for real-time multi-person pose estimation on edge. Large Kernel Convs significantly improve the model's capacity and receptive field while maintaining a low computational cost. On mobile platforms, LitePose reduces the latency by up to 5.0x without sacrificing performance, compared with prior state-of-the-art efficient pose estimation models, pushing the frontier of real-time multi-person pose estimation on edge. Our code and pre-trained models are released at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/litepose.
abstract_zh: 姿势估计在以人为中心的视觉应用中起着至关重要的作用。然而，由于计算成本较高（每帧超过 150 个 GMAC），很难在资源受限的边缘设备上部署最先进的基于 HRNet 的姿态估计模型。在本文中，我们研究了边缘实时多人姿态估计的高效架构设计。通过逐渐缩小的实验，我们发现 HRNet 的高分辨率分支对于低计算区域的模型来说是多余的。删除它们可以提高效率和性能。受这一发现的启发，我们设计了LitePose，一种用于姿态估计的高效单分支架构，并引入了两种简单的方法来增强LitePose的能力，包括Fusion Deconv Head和Large Kernel Convs。 Fusion Deconv Head 消除了高分辨率分支中的冗余，从而以较低的开销实现了尺度感知特征融合。大型内核卷积显着提高了模型的容量和感受野，同时保持较低的计算成本。仅 25% 的计算增量，7x7 内核在 CrowdPose 数据集上就比 3x3 内核实现了 +14.0 mAP。在移动平台上，与之前最先进的高效姿态估计模型相比，LitePose 在不牺牲性能的情况下将延迟减少了高达 5.0 倍，推动了实时多人姿态估计的前沿发展。我们的代码和预训练模型发布于 https://github.com/mit-han-lab/litepose。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LitePose，一种高效的单分支架构设计，用于在边缘设备上实现低计算成本的实时多人2D姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有的HRNet-based姿态估计模型计算成本高（每帧超过150 GMACs），难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上，因此需要设计更高效的架构。
AI.method: 通过渐进式收缩实验发现HRNet的高分辨率分支在低计算区域冗余，移除后提升效率与性能。设计LitePose单分支架构，并引入Fusion Deconv Head（消除高分辨率分支冗余）和Large Kernel Convs（提升模型容量与感受野）两种增强方法。
AI.result: LitePose在CrowdPose数据集上相比3x3卷积，7x7卷积仅增加25%计算量即可提升14.0 mAP；在移动端相比先前最优模型延迟降低5.0倍且不损失性能。
AI.conclusion: LitePose通过高效架构设计推动了边缘设备实时多人姿态估计的前沿，代码与预训练模型已开源。

search_text: Lite Pose: Efficient Architecture Design for 2D Human Pose Estimation Lite Pose：二维人体姿势估计的高效架构设计 Pose estimation plays a critical role in human-centered vision applications. However, it is difficult to deploy state-of-the-art HRNet-based pose estimation models on resource-constrained edge devices due to the high computational cost (more than 150 GMACs per frame). In this paper, we study efficient architecture design for real-time multi-person pose estimation on edge. We reveal that HRNet's high-resolution branches are redundant for models at the low-computation region via our gradual shrinking experiments. Removing them improves both efficiency and performance. Inspired by this finding, we design LitePose, an efficient single-branch architecture for pose estimation, and introduce two simple approaches to enhance the capacity of LitePose, including Fusion Deconv Head and Large Kernel Convs. Fusion Deconv Head removes the redundancy in high-resolution branches, allowing scale-aware feature fusion with low overhead. Large Kernel Convs significantly improve the model's capacity and receptive field while maintaining a low computational cost. With only 25% computation increment, 7x7 kernels achieve +14.0 mAP better than 3x3 kernels on the CrowdPose dataset. On mobile platforms, LitePose reduces the latency by up to 5.0x without sacrificing performance, compared with prior state-of-the-art efficient pose estimation models, pushing the frontier of real-time multi-person pose estimation on edge. Our code and pre-trained models are released at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/litepose. 姿势估计在以人为中心的视觉应用中起着至关重要的作用。然而，由于计算成本较高（每帧超过 150 个 GMAC），很难在资源受限的边缘设备上部署最先进的基于 HRNet 的姿态估计模型。在本文中，我们研究了边缘实时多人姿态估计的高效架构设计。通过逐渐缩小的实验，我们发现 HRNet 的高分辨率分支对于低计算区域的模型来说是多余的。删除它们可以提高效率和性能。受这一发现的启发，我们设计了LitePose，一种用于姿态估计的高效单分支架构，并引入了两种简单的方法来增强LitePose的能力，包括Fusion Deconv Head和Large Kernel Convs。 Fusion Deconv Head 消除了高分辨率分支中的冗余，从而以较低的开销实现了尺度感知特征融合。大型内核卷积显着提高了模型的容量和感受野，同时保持较低的计算成本。仅 25% 的计算增量，7x7 内核在 CrowdPose 数据集上就比 3x3 内核实现了 +14.0 mAP。在移动平台上，与之前最先进的高效姿态估计模型相比，LitePose 在不牺牲性能的情况下将延迟减少了高达 5.0 倍，推动了实时多人姿态估计的前沿发展。我们的代码和预训练模型发布于 https://github.com/mit-han-lab/litepose。 本文提出LitePose，一种高效的单分支架构设计，用于在边缘设备上实现低计算成本的实时多人2D姿态估计。 Yihan Wang,Muyang Li,Han Cai,Wei-Ming Chen,Song Han cs.CV

title: MP and MT properties of fuzzy inference with aggregation function
title_zh: 具有聚合函数的模糊推理的 MP 和 MT 性质
abstract: As the two basic fuzzy inference models, fuzzy modus ponens (FMP) and fuzzy modus tollens (FMT) have the important application in artificial intelligence. In order to solve FMP and FMT problems, Zadeh proposed a compositional rule of inference (CRI) method. This paper aims mainly to investigate the validity of A-compositional rule of inference (ACRI) method, as a generalized CRI method based on aggregation functions, from a logical view and an interpolative view, respectively. Specifically, the modus ponens (MP) and modus tollens (MT) properties of ACRI method are discussed in detail. It is shown that the aggregation functions to implement FMP and FMT problems provide more generality than the t-norms, uninorms and overlap functions as well-known the laws of T-conditionality, U-conditionality and O-conditionality, respectively. Moreover, two examples are also given to illustrate our theoretical results. Especially, Example 6.2 shows that the output B' in FMP(FMT) problem is close to B(DC) with our proposed inference method when the fuzzy input and the antecedent of fuzzy rule are near (the fuzzy input near with the negation of the seccedent in fuzzy rule).
summary: As the two basic fuzzy inference models, fuzzy modus ponens (FMP) and fuzzy modus tollens (FMT) have the important application in artificial intelligence. In order to solve FMP and FMT problems, Zadeh proposed a compositional rule of inference (CRI) method. This paper aims mainly to investigate the validity of A-compositional rule of inference (ACRI) method, as a generalized CRI method based on aggregation functions, from a logical view and an interpolative view, respectively. Specifically, the modus ponens (MP) and modus tollens (MT) properties of ACRI method are discussed in detail. It is shown that the aggregation functions to implement FMP and FMT problems provide more generality than the t-norms, uninorms and overlap functions as well-known the laws of T-conditionality, U-conditionality and O-conditionality, respectively. Moreover, two examples are also given to illustrate our theoretical results. Especially, Example 6.2 shows that the output B' in FMP(FMT) problem is close to B(DC) with our proposed inference method when the fuzzy input and the antecedent of fuzzy rule are near (the fuzzy input near with the negation of the seccedent in fuzzy rule).
abstract_zh: 模糊推理前件(FMP)和模糊推理前件(FMT)作为两种基本的模糊推理模型在人工智能中有着重要的应用。为了解决FMP和FMT问题，Zadeh提出了组合推理规则（CRI）方法。本文主要旨在分别从逻辑角度和插值角度研究A组合推理规则（ACRI）方法作为基于聚合函数的广义CRI方法的有效性。具体来说，详细讨论了ACRI方法的前件（MP）和托伦斯（MT）性质。结果表明，实现 FMP 和 FMT 问题的聚合函数比分别众所周知的 T 条件性、U 条件性和 O 条件性定律的 t 范数、非范数和重叠函数提供了更多的通用性。此外，还给出了两个例子来说明我们的理论结果。特别是，例 6.2 表明，当模糊输入和模糊规则的前件接近时（模糊输入与模糊规则中后件的否定接近），FMP（FMT）问题中的输出 B' 与我们提出的推理方法接近 B（DC）。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究基于聚合函数的广义合成推理方法（ACRI）在模糊模态推理（FMP/FMT）中的有效性，从逻辑和插值角度分析其MP和MT性质。
AI.motivation: 传统t-范数、uninorms等条件性函数在处理模糊推理时存在局限性，需探索更通用的聚合函数以提升FMP/FMT问题的解决能力。
AI.method: 从逻辑视角分析ACRI的MP/MT性质，结合插值视角验证其有效性，并通过两个实例（尤其例6.2）展示理论结果。
AI.result: 聚合函数在实现FMP/FMT中比传统方法更具通用性，当模糊输入接近规则前件（或前件否定）时，输出结果更贴近预期值。
AI.conclusion: ACRI方法通过聚合函数扩展了传统推理框架，为模糊推理提供了更灵活的解决方案，理论分析与实例验证均支持其有效性。

authors_text: Lillian Clark,Jeffrey A. Edlund,Marc Sanchez Net,Tiago Stegun Vaquero,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi
title: PropEM-L: Radio Propagation Environment Modeling and Learning for Communication-Aware Multi-Robot Exploration
title_zh: PropEM-L：用于通信感知多机器人探索的无线电传播环境建模和学习
abstract: Multi-robot exploration of complex, unknown environments benefits from the collaboration and cooperation offered by inter-robot communication. Accurate radio signal strength prediction enables communication-aware exploration. Models which ignore the effect of the environment on signal propagation or rely on a priori maps suffer in unknown, communication-restricted (e.g. subterranean) environments. In this work, we present Propagation Environment Modeling and Learning (PropEM-L), a framework which leverages real-time sensor-derived 3D geometric representations of an environment to extract information about line of sight between radios and attenuating walls/obstacles in order to accurately predict received signal strength (RSS). Our data-driven approach combines the strengths of well-known models of signal propagation phenomena (e.g. shadowing, reflection, diffraction) and machine learning, and can adapt online to new environments. We demonstrate the performance of PropEM-L on a six-robot team in a communication-restricted environment with subway-like, mine-like, and cave-like characteristics, constructed for the 2021 DARPA Subterranean Challenge. Our findings indicate that PropEM-L can improve signal strength prediction accuracy by up to 44% over a log-distance path loss model.
summary: Multi-robot exploration of complex, unknown environments benefits from the collaboration and cooperation offered by inter-robot communication. Accurate radio signal strength prediction enables communication-aware exploration. Models which ignore the effect of the environment on signal propagation or rely on a priori maps suffer in unknown, communication-restricted (e.g. subterranean) environments. In this work, we present Propagation Environment Modeling and Learning (PropEM-L), a framework which leverages real-time sensor-derived 3D geometric representations of an environment to extract information about line of sight between radios and attenuating walls/obstacles in order to accurately predict received signal strength (RSS). Our data-driven approach combines the strengths of well-known models of signal propagation phenomena (e.g. shadowing, reflection, diffraction) and machine learning, and can adapt online to new environments. We demonstrate the performance of PropEM-L on a six-robot team in a communication-restricted environment with subway-like, mine-like, and cave-like characteristics, constructed for the 2021 DARPA Subterranean Challenge. Our findings indicate that PropEM-L can improve signal strength prediction accuracy by up to 44% over a log-distance path loss model.
abstract_zh: 多机器人对复杂、未知环境的探索受益于机器人间通信提供的协作与合作。准确的无线电信号强度预测可实现通信感知探索。忽略环境对信号传播的影响或依赖先验地图的模型会在未知的、通信受限的（例如地下）环境中受到影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了传播环境建模和学习 (PropEM-L)，该框架利用实时传感器衍生的环境 3D 几何表示来提取有关无线电和衰减墙壁/障碍物之间视线的信息，以便准确预测接收信号强度 (RSS)。我们的数据驱动方法结合了众所周知的信号传播现象模型（例如阴影、反射、衍射）和机器学习的优势，并且可以在线适应新环境。我们在一个六机器人团队中展示了 PropEM-L 的性能，该环境是为 2021 年 DARPA 地下挑战赛构建的，具有类似地铁、矿井和洞穴特征的通信受限环境。我们的研究结果表明，与对数距离路径损耗模型相比，PropEM-L 可以将信号强度预测精度提高高达 44%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PropEM-L框架，通过实时三维环境建模与机器学习结合，提升多机器人在通信受限环境中的信号强度预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统信号传播模型在忽略环境影响或依赖先验地图时，难以适应复杂未知的地下等通信受限场景，导致多机器人协作效率低下。
AI.method: 融合实时传感器生成的3D几何数据与物理传播模型（如阴影、反射），利用机器学习在线适应新环境，实现动态RSS预测。
AI.result: 在DARPA地下挑战赛模拟环境中，PropEM-L相较传统模型将信号预测准确率提升最高44%。
AI.conclusion: PropEM-L通过数据驱动方法有效解决了复杂环境下通信感知问题，为多机器人协作探索提供了可靠技术支撑。

search_text: PropEM-L: Radio Propagation Environment Modeling and Learning for Communication-Aware Multi-Robot Exploration PropEM-L：用于通信感知多机器人探索的无线电传播环境建模和学习 Multi-robot exploration of complex, unknown environments benefits from the collaboration and cooperation offered by inter-robot communication. Accurate radio signal strength prediction enables communication-aware exploration. Models which ignore the effect of the environment on signal propagation or rely on a priori maps suffer in unknown, communication-restricted (e.g. subterranean) environments. In this work, we present Propagation Environment Modeling and Learning (PropEM-L), a framework which leverages real-time sensor-derived 3D geometric representations of an environment to extract information about line of sight between radios and attenuating walls/obstacles in order to accurately predict received signal strength (RSS). Our data-driven approach combines the strengths of well-known models of signal propagation phenomena (e.g. shadowing, reflection, diffraction) and machine learning, and can adapt online to new environments. We demonstrate the performance of PropEM-L on a six-robot team in a communication-restricted environment with subway-like, mine-like, and cave-like characteristics, constructed for the 2021 DARPA Subterranean Challenge. Our findings indicate that PropEM-L can improve signal strength prediction accuracy by up to 44% over a log-distance path loss model. 多机器人对复杂、未知环境的探索受益于机器人间通信提供的协作与合作。准确的无线电信号强度预测可实现通信感知探索。忽略环境对信号传播的影响或依赖先验地图的模型会在未知的、通信受限的（例如地下）环境中受到影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了传播环境建模和学习 (PropEM-L)，该框架利用实时传感器衍生的环境 3D 几何表示来提取有关无线电和衰减墙壁/障碍物之间视线的信息，以便准确预测接收信号强度 (RSS)。我们的数据驱动方法结合了众所周知的信号传播现象模型（例如阴影、反射、衍射）和机器学习的优势，并且可以在线适应新环境。我们在一个六机器人团队中展示了 PropEM-L 的性能，该环境是为 2021 年 DARPA 地下挑战赛构建的，具有类似地铁、矿井和洞穴特征的通信受限环境。我们的研究结果表明，与对数距离路径损耗模型相比，PropEM-L 可以将信号强度预测精度提高高达 44%。 本文提出PropEM-L框架，通过实时三维环境建模与机器学习结合，提升多机器人在通信受限环境中的信号强度预测精度。 Lillian Clark,Jeffrey A. Edlund,Marc Sanchez Net,Tiago Stegun Vaquero,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi cs.RO

title: From {Solution Synthesis} to {Student Attempt Synthesis} for Block-Based Visual Programming Tasks
title_zh: 基于块的可视化编程任务从{解决方案综合}到{学生尝试综合}
abstract: Block-based visual programming environments are increasingly used to introduce computing concepts to beginners. Given that programming tasks are open-ended and conceptual, novice students often struggle when learning in these environments. AI-driven programming tutors hold great promise in automatically assisting struggling students, and need several components to realize this potential. We investigate the crucial component of student modeling, in particular, the ability to automatically infer students' misconceptions for predicting (synthesizing) their behavior. We introduce a novel benchmark, StudentSyn, centered around the following challenge: For a given student, synthesize the student's attempt on a new target task after observing the student's attempt on a fixed reference task. This challenge is akin to that of program synthesis; however, instead of synthesizing a {solution} (i.e., program an expert would write), the goal here is to synthesize a {student attempt} (i.e., program that a given student would write). We first show that human experts (TutorSS) can achieve high performance on the benchmark, whereas simple baselines perform poorly. Then, we develop two neuro/symbolic techniques (NeurSS and SymSS) in a quest to close this gap with TutorSS.
summary: Block-based visual programming environments are increasingly used to introduce computing concepts to beginners. Given that programming tasks are open-ended and conceptual, novice students often struggle when learning in these environments. AI-driven programming tutors hold great promise in automatically assisting struggling students, and need several components to realize this potential. We investigate the crucial component of student modeling, in particular, the ability to automatically infer students' misconceptions for predicting (synthesizing) their behavior. We introduce a novel benchmark, StudentSyn, centered around the following challenge: For a given student, synthesize the student's attempt on a new target task after observing the student's attempt on a fixed reference task. This challenge is akin to that of program synthesis; however, instead of synthesizing a {solution} (i.e., program an expert would write), the goal here is to synthesize a {student attempt} (i.e., program that a given student would write). We first show that human experts (TutorSS) can achieve high performance on the benchmark, whereas simple baselines perform poorly. Then, we develop two neuro/symbolic techniques (NeurSS and SymSS) in a quest to close this gap with TutorSS.
abstract_zh: 基于块的可视化编程环境越来越多地用于向初学者介绍计算概念。鉴于编程任务是开放式的和概念性的，新手在这些环境中学习时常常会遇到困难。人工智能驱动的编程导师在自动帮助有困难的学生方面前景广阔，并且需要多个组件来实现这一潜力。我们研究学生建模的关键组成部分，特别是自动推断学生的误解以预测（综合）他们的行为的能力。我们引入了一个新颖的基准，StudentSyn，围绕以下挑战：对于给定的学生，在观察学生对固定参考任务的尝试后，综合学生对新目标任务的尝试。这个挑战类似于程序综合的挑战。然而，这里的目标不是综合一个{解决方案}（即专家会编写的程序），而是综合一个{学生尝试}（即给定学生编写的程序）。我们首先证明人类专家（TutorSS）可以在基准测试中实现高性能，而简单的基准则表现不佳。然后，我们开发了两种神经/符号技术（NeurSS 和 SymSS），以缩小与 TutorSS 的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为StudentSyn的新基准，旨在通过分析学生在固定参考任务中的表现，自动合成其在新任务中的编程尝试，以改进基于块的可视化编程环境中的AI导师系统。
AI.motivation: 初学者在开放式的块状编程任务中常因概念理解困难而受阻，现有AI导师缺乏精准的学生建模能力，难以有效识别学生错误并提供针对性帮助。
AI.method: 构建StudentSyn基准，设计人类专家（TutorSS）与基线模型对比实验，并开发两种神经符号混合方法（NeurSS与SymSS）以模拟学生编程行为。
AI.result: 人类专家在基准中表现优异，简单基线效果差；NeurSS和SymSS显著缩小了与人类专家的性能差距，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 学生尝试合成是提升AI导师效果的关键，神经符号混合方法能有效建模学生认知过程，为个性化教学提供新方向。

title: How Do Captions Affect Visualization Reading?
title_zh: 字幕如何影响可视化阅读？
abstract: Captions help readers better understand visualizations. However, if the visualization is intended to communicate specific features, should the caption be statistical, and focus on specific values, or perceptual, and focus on general patterns? Prior work has shown that when captions mention visually salient features, readers tend to recall those features. Still, we lack explicit guidelines for how to compose the appropriate caption. Further, what if the author wishes to emphasize a less salient feature? In this paper, we study how the visual salience of the feature described in a caption, and the semantic level of the caption description, affect a reader's takeaways from line charts. For each single- or multi-line chart, we generate 4 captions that 1) describe either the primary or secondary salient feature in a chart, and 2) describe the feature either at the statistical or perceptual levels. We then show participants random chart-caption pairs and record their takeaways. We find that the primary salient feature is more memorable for single-line charts when the caption is expressed at the statistical level; for primary and secondary features in multi-line charts, the perceptual level is more memorable. We also find that many readers will tend to recall y-axis numerical values when a caption is present.
summary: Captions help readers better understand visualizations. However, if the visualization is intended to communicate specific features, should the caption be statistical, and focus on specific values, or perceptual, and focus on general patterns? Prior work has shown that when captions mention visually salient features, readers tend to recall those features. Still, we lack explicit guidelines for how to compose the appropriate caption. Further, what if the author wishes to emphasize a less salient feature? In this paper, we study how the visual salience of the feature described in a caption, and the semantic level of the caption description, affect a reader's takeaways from line charts. For each single- or multi-line chart, we generate 4 captions that 1) describe either the primary or secondary salient feature in a chart, and 2) describe the feature either at the statistical or perceptual levels. We then show participants random chart-caption pairs and record their takeaways. We find that the primary salient feature is more memorable for single-line charts when the caption is expressed at the statistical level; for primary and secondary features in multi-line charts, the perceptual level is more memorable. We also find that many readers will tend to recall y-axis numerical values when a caption is present.
abstract_zh: 字幕可以帮助读者更好地理解可视化。但是，如果可视化旨在传达特定特征，那么标题应该是统计性的，重点关注特定值，还是感知性的，重点关注一般模式？先前的研究表明，当标题提到视觉上显着的特征时，读者往往会回忆起这些特征。尽管如此，我们仍然缺乏关于如何撰写适当标题的明确指南。此外，如果作者希望强调一个不太显着的特征怎么办？在本文中，我们研究了标题中描述的特征的视觉显着性以及标题描述的语义级别如何影响读者从折线图中获得的收获。对于每个单线或多线图表，我们生成 4 个标题，1) 描述图表中的主要或次要显着特征，2) 在统计或感知层面描述该特征。然后，我们向参与者展示随机的图表标题对并记录他们的收获。我们发现，当标题以统计级别表达时，单线图表的主要显着特征更容易记住；对于多线图表中的主次特征，感知层面更容易记忆。我们还发现，当出现标题时，许多读者会倾向于回忆起 y 轴数值。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了图表标题的视觉显著性及语义层次如何影响读者对折线图的理解。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示标题提及显著特征会增强记忆，但缺乏明确的标题编写指南，且未探讨如何强调非显著特征。
AI.method: 对单/多折线图生成4类标题：描述主要或次要特征，并采用统计或感知描述层级，通过实验记录参与者对图表-标题配对的回忆结果。
AI.result: 单折线图中统计层级标题使主要特征更易被记住；多折线图中感知层级标题对主次特征均更有效；标题存在时读者更易回忆y轴数值。
AI.conclusion: 标题效果取决于图表类型与描述层级，作者应根据图表特征选择适配的标题策略以提升信息传递效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文研究了图表标题的视觉显著性及语义层次如何影响读者对折线图的理解。

search_text: How Do Captions Affect Visualization Reading? 字幕如何影响可视化阅读？ Captions help readers better understand visualizations. However, if the visualization is intended to communicate specific features, should the caption be statistical, and focus on specific values, or perceptual, and focus on general patterns? Prior work has shown that when captions mention visually salient features, readers tend to recall those features. Still, we lack explicit guidelines for how to compose the appropriate caption. Further, what if the author wishes to emphasize a less salient feature? In this paper, we study how the visual salience of the feature described in a caption, and the semantic level of the caption description, affect a reader's takeaways from line charts. For each single- or multi-line chart, we generate 4 captions that 1) describe either the primary or secondary salient feature in a chart, and 2) describe the feature either at the statistical or perceptual levels. We then show participants random chart-caption pairs and record their takeaways. We find that the primary salient feature is more memorable for single-line charts when the caption is expressed at the statistical level; for primary and secondary features in multi-line charts, the perceptual level is more memorable. We also find that many readers will tend to recall y-axis numerical values when a caption is present. 字幕可以帮助读者更好地理解可视化。但是，如果可视化旨在传达特定特征，那么标题应该是统计性的，重点关注特定值，还是感知性的，重点关注一般模式？先前的研究表明，当标题提到视觉上显着的特征时，读者往往会回忆起这些特征。尽管如此，我们仍然缺乏关于如何撰写适当标题的明确指南。此外，如果作者希望强调一个不太显着的特征怎么办？在本文中，我们研究了标题中描述的特征的视觉显着性以及标题描述的语义级别如何影响读者从折线图中获得的收获。对于每个单线或多线图表，我们生成 4 个标题，1) 描述图表中的主要或次要显着特征，2) 在统计或感知层面描述该特征。然后，我们向参与者展示随机的图表标题对并记录他们的收获。我们发现，当标题以统计级别表达时，单线图表的主要显着特征更容易记住；对于多线图表中的主次特征，感知层面更容易记忆。我们还发现，当出现标题时，许多读者会倾向于回忆起 y 轴数值。 本论文研究了图表标题的视觉显著性及语义层次如何影响读者对折线图的理解。 Hanxiu 'Hazel' Zhu,Shelly Shiying Cheng,Eugene Wu cs.HC

title: Norm-Agnostic Linear Bandits
title_zh: 与范数无关的线性强盗
abstract: Linear bandits have a wide variety of applications including recommendation systems yet they make one strong assumption: the algorithms must know an upper bound $S$ on the norm of the unknown parameter $θ^*$ that governs the reward generation. Such an assumption forces the practitioner to guess $S$ involved in the confidence bound, leaving no choice but to wish that $\|θ^*\|\le S$ is true to guarantee that the regret will be low. In this paper, we propose novel algorithms that do not require such knowledge for the first time. Specifically, we propose two algorithms and analyze their regret bounds: one for the changing arm set setting and the other for the fixed arm set setting. Our regret bound for the former shows that the price of not knowing $S$ does not affect the leading term in the regret bound and inflates only the lower order term. For the latter, we do not pay any price in the regret for now knowing $S$. Our numerical experiments show standard algorithms assuming knowledge of $S$ can fail catastrophically when $\|θ^*\|\le S$ is not true whereas our algorithms enjoy low regret.
summary: Linear bandits have a wide variety of applications including recommendation systems yet they make one strong assumption: the algorithms must know an upper bound $S$ on the norm of the unknown parameter $θ^*$ that governs the reward generation. Such an assumption forces the practitioner to guess $S$ involved in the confidence bound, leaving no choice but to wish that $\|θ^*\|\le S$ is true to guarantee that the regret will be low. In this paper, we propose novel algorithms that do not require such knowledge for the first time. Specifically, we propose two algorithms and analyze their regret bounds: one for the changing arm set setting and the other for the fixed arm set setting. Our regret bound for the former shows that the price of not knowing $S$ does not affect the leading term in the regret bound and inflates only the lower order term. For the latter, we do not pay any price in the regret for now knowing $S$. Our numerical experiments show standard algorithms assuming knowledge of $S$ can fail catastrophically when $\|θ^*\|\le S$ is not true whereas our algorithms enjoy low regret.
abstract_zh: 线性老虎机具有广泛的应用，包括推荐系统，但它们做出了一个强有力的假设：算法必须知道控制奖励生成的未知参数 $θ^*$ 范数的上限 $S$。这样的假设迫使从业者猜测$S$涉及置信界限，别无选择，只能希望$\|θ^*\|\le S$为真，以保证遗憾会很低。在本文中，我们首次提出不需要这些知识的新颖算法。具体来说，我们提出了两种算法并分析了它们的遗憾界限：一种用于改变臂集设置，另一种用于固定臂集设置。我们对前者的遗憾界限表明，不知道 $S$ 的价格不会影响遗憾界限中的主导项，而仅使低阶项膨胀。对于后者，我们不必为现在知道$S$而感到遗憾而付出任何代价。我们的数值实验表明，当 $\|θ^*\|\le S$ 不正确时，假设知道 $S$ 的标准算法可能会灾难性地失败，而我们的算法则享有较低的遗憾。

AI.tldr: 本文提出无需预先知道参数范数上界S的线性多臂老虎机算法，解决传统方法依赖S导致的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 传统线性多臂老虎机算法需假设已知参数范数上界S，但实际中S难以准确估计，导致算法性能受限。
AI.method: 设计两种新算法：一种适用于动态臂集，另一种适用于固定臂集，并分析其遗憾界，证明无需S时的性能影响。
AI.result: 实验表明传统方法在S估计错误时可能失效，而新算法在多种场景下均保持低遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出无需依赖范数上界S的线性多臂老虎机算法，提升了算法在实际应用中的鲁棒性。

title: Scheduling with Speed Predictions
title_zh: 通过速度预测进行调度
abstract: Algorithms with predictions is a recent framework that has been used to overcome pessimistic worst-case bounds in incomplete information settings. In the context of scheduling, very recent work has leveraged machine-learned predictions to design algorithms that achieve improved approximation ratios in settings where the processing times of the jobs are initially unknown. In this paper, we study the speed-robust scheduling problem where the speeds of the machines, instead of the processing times of the jobs, are unknown and augment this problem with predictions. Our main result is an algorithm that achieves a $\min\{η^2(1+α), (2 + 2/α)\}$ approximation, for any $α\in (0,1)$, where $η\geq 1$ is the prediction error. When the predictions are accurate, this approximation outperforms the best known approximation for speed-robust scheduling without predictions of $2-1/m$, where $m$ is the number of machines, while simultaneously maintaining a worst-case approximation of $2 + 2/α$ even when the predictions are arbitrarily wrong. In addition, we obtain improved approximations for three special cases: equal job sizes, infinitesimal job sizes, and binary machine speeds. We also complement our algorithmic results with lower bounds. Finally, we empirically evaluate our algorithm against existing algorithms for speed-robust scheduling.
summary: Algorithms with predictions is a recent framework that has been used to overcome pessimistic worst-case bounds in incomplete information settings. In the context of scheduling, very recent work has leveraged machine-learned predictions to design algorithms that achieve improved approximation ratios in settings where the processing times of the jobs are initially unknown. In this paper, we study the speed-robust scheduling problem where the speeds of the machines, instead of the processing times of the jobs, are unknown and augment this problem with predictions. Our main result is an algorithm that achieves a $\min\{η^2(1+α), (2 + 2/α)\}$ approximation, for any $α\in (0,1)$, where $η\geq 1$ is the prediction error. When the predictions are accurate, this approximation outperforms the best known approximation for speed-robust scheduling without predictions of $2-1/m$, where $m$ is the number of machines, while simultaneously maintaining a worst-case approximation of $2 + 2/α$ even when the predictions are arbitrarily wrong. In addition, we obtain improved approximations for three special cases: equal job sizes, infinitesimal job sizes, and binary machine speeds. We also complement our algorithmic results with lower bounds. Finally, we empirically evaluate our algorithm against existing algorithms for speed-robust scheduling.
abstract_zh: 预测算法是一种最新的框架，已用于克服不完整信息设置中的悲观最坏情况界限。在调度方面，最近的工作利用机器学习预测来设计算法，在作业处理时间最初未知的情况下实现改进的近似率。在本文中，我们研究了速度鲁棒的调度问题，其中机器的速度而不是作业的处理时间是未知的，并通过预测来增强这个问题。我们的主要结果是对于任何 $α\in (0,1)$ 实现 $\min\{η^2(1+α), (2 + 2/α)\}$ 近似的算法，其中 $η\geq 1$ 是预测误差。当预测准确时，该近似值优于最著名的速度鲁棒调度近似值，无需预测 $2-1/m$（其中 $m$ 是机器数量），同时即使预测任意错误，也能保持最坏情况近似值 $2 + 2/α$。此外，我们还获得了三种特殊情况的改进近似值：相等的作业大小、无穷小的作业大小和二进制机器速度。我们还用下限来补充我们的算法结果。最后，我们根据现有的速度鲁棒调度算法对我们的算法进行实证评估。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在机器速度未知的情况下，结合预测信息设计调度算法以提高近似比的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统调度算法在面对不完整信息时表现不佳，而利用机器学习预测可优化性能。现有研究多关注作业处理时间未知，本文转向机器速度未知场景。
AI.method: 提出一种结合速度预测的调度算法，通过参数α平衡预测误差η的影响，分析其在预测准确与错误情况下的近似比表现。
AI.result: 算法在预测准确时优于无预测的最优近似比2-1/m，最坏情况下保证2+2/α的近似比，并针对特殊场景（如等作业规模、二进制机器速度）改进结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在预测准确时性能更优且保持稳健性，理论下界与实验验证支持其有效性，为速度鲁棒调度提供新思路。

When the predictions are accurate, this approximation outperforms the best known approximation for speed-robust scheduling without predictions of $2-1/m$, where $m$ is the number of machines, while simultaneously maintaining a worst-case approximation of $2 + 2/α$ even when the predictions are arbitrarily wrong. In addition, we obtain improved approximations for three special cases: equal job sizes, infinitesimal job sizes, and binary machine speeds. We also complement our algorithmic results with lower bounds. Finally, we empirically evaluate our algorithm against existing algorithms for speed-robust scheduling. 预测算法是一种最新的框架，已用于克服不完整信息设置中的悲观最坏情况界限。在调度方面，最近的工作利用机器学习预测来设计算法，在作业处理时间最初未知的情况下实现改进的近似率。在本文中，我们研究了速度鲁棒的调度问题，其中机器的速度而不是作业的处理时间是未知的，并通过预测来增强这个问题。我们的主要结果是对于任何 $α\in (0,1)$ 实现 $\min\{η^2(1+α), (2 + 2/α)\}$ 近似的算法，其中 $η\geq 1$ 是预测误差。当预测准确时，该近似值优于最著名的速度鲁棒调度近似值，无需预测 $2-1/m$（其中 $m$ 是机器数量），同时即使预测任意错误，也能保持最坏情况近似值 $2 + 2/α$。此外，我们还获得了三种特殊情况的改进近似值：相等的作业大小、无穷小的作业大小和二进制机器速度。我们还用下限来补充我们的算法结果。最后，我们根据现有的速度鲁棒调度算法对我们的算法进行实证评估。 本文研究了在机器速度未知的情况下，结合预测信息设计调度算法以提高近似比的问题。 Eric Balkanski,Tingting Ou,Clifford Stein,Hao-Ting Wei cs.DS,cs.LG

title: Meaningful Context, a Red Flag, or Both? Users' Preferences for Enhanced Misinformation Warnings on Twitter
title_zh: 有意义的背景，危险信号，还是两者兼而有之？用户对 Twitter 上增强型错误信息警告的偏好
abstract: Warning users about misinformation on social media is not a simple usability task. Soft moderation has to balance between debunking falsehoods and avoiding moderation bias while preserving the social media consumption flow. Platforms thus employ minimally distinguishable warning tags with generic text under a suspected misinformation content. This approach resulted in an unfavorable outcome where the warnings "backfired" and users believed the misinformation more, not less. In response, we developed enhancements to the misinformation warnings where users are advised on the context of the information hazard and exposed to standard warning iconography. We ran an A/B evaluation with the Twitter's original warning tags in a 337 participant usability study. The majority of the participants preferred the enhancements as a nudge toward recognizing and avoiding misinformation. The enhanced warning tags were most favored by the politically left-leaning and to a lesser degree moderate participants, but they also appealed to roughly a third of the right-leaning participants. The education level was the only demographic factor shaping participants' preferences. We use our findings to propose user-tailored improvements in the soft moderation of misinformation on social media.
summary: Warning users about misinformation on social media is not a simple usability task. Soft moderation has to balance between debunking falsehoods and avoiding moderation bias while preserving the social media consumption flow. Platforms thus employ minimally distinguishable warning tags with generic text under a suspected misinformation content. This approach resulted in an unfavorable outcome where the warnings "backfired" and users believed the misinformation more, not less. In response, we developed enhancements to the misinformation warnings where users are advised on the context of the information hazard and exposed to standard warning iconography. We ran an A/B evaluation with the Twitter's original warning tags in a 337 participant usability study. The majority of the participants preferred the enhancements as a nudge toward recognizing and avoiding misinformation. The enhanced warning tags were most favored by the politically left-leaning and to a lesser degree moderate participants, but they also appealed to roughly a third of the right-leaning participants. The education level was the only demographic factor shaping participants' preferences. We use our findings to propose user-tailored improvements in the soft moderation of misinformation on social media.
abstract_zh: 警告用户有关社交媒体上的错误信息并不是一项简单的可用性任务。软审核必须在揭穿谎言和避免审核偏见之间取得平衡，同时保持社交媒体消费流。因此，平台在可疑的错误信息内容下使用带有通用文本的最小可区分警告标签。这种方法导致了不利的结果，警告“适得其反”，用户更加相信错误信息，而不是更少。作为回应，我们开发了错误信息警告的增强功能，向用户提供信息危害背景的建议，并让用户看到标准的警告图标。我们在一项 337 名参与者的可用性研究中使用 Twitter 的原始警告标签进行了 A/B 评估。大多数参与者更喜欢这些增强功能，作为识别和避免错误信息的推动力。增强的警告标签最受政治左倾参与者和较小程度的温和参与者的青睐，但它们也吸引了大约三分之一的右倾参与者。教育水平是影响参与者偏好的唯一人口因素。我们利用我们的发现来提出针对社交媒体上错误信息的软审核的用户定制改进。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了Twitter上增强型虚假信息警告标签的效果，探讨用户对包含上下文信息和标准警示图标的改进警告的偏好。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假信息警告标签因过于简单而可能适得其反，用户可能更相信被标记的内容，因此需改进警告设计以提升效果。
AI.method: 通过337名参与者的A/B测试，对比Twitter原有警告标签与新增上下文说明和标准警示图标的设计效果。
AI.result: 多数参与者更偏好增强型警告标签，左翼和中间派用户接受度更高，教育水平是影响偏好的关键人口统计因素。
AI.conclusion: 应根据用户人口统计特征（如教育水平）定制化改进软性内容审核策略，以更有效地减少虚假信息传播。

title: Using Constraint Programming and Graph Representation Learning for Generating Interpretable Cloud Security Policies
title_zh: 使用约束编程和图表示学习来生成可解释的云安全策略
abstract: Modern software systems rely on mining insights from business sensitive data stored in public clouds. A data breach usually incurs significant (monetary) loss for a commercial organization. Conceptually, cloud security heavily relies on Identity Access Management (IAM) policies that IT admins need to properly configure and periodically update. Security negligence and human errors often lead to misconfiguring IAM policies which may open a backdoor for attackers. To address these challenges, first, we develop a novel framework that encodes generating optimal IAM policies using constraint programming (CP). We identify reducing dark permissions of cloud users as an optimality criterion, which intuitively implies minimizing unnecessary datastore access permissions. Second, to make IAM policies interpretable, we use graph representation learning applied to historical access patterns of users to augment our CP model with similarity constraints: similar users should be grouped together and share common IAM policies. Third, we describe multiple attack models and show that our optimized IAM policies significantly reduce the impact of security attacks using real data from 8 commercial organizations, and synthetic instances.
summary: Modern software systems rely on mining insights from business sensitive data stored in public clouds. A data breach usually incurs significant (monetary) loss for a commercial organization. Conceptually, cloud security heavily relies on Identity Access Management (IAM) policies that IT admins need to properly configure and periodically update. Security negligence and human errors often lead to misconfiguring IAM policies which may open a backdoor for attackers. To address these challenges, first, we develop a novel framework that encodes generating optimal IAM policies using constraint programming (CP). We identify reducing dark permissions of cloud users as an optimality criterion, which intuitively implies minimizing unnecessary datastore access permissions. Second, to make IAM policies interpretable, we use graph representation learning applied to historical access patterns of users to augment our CP model with similarity constraints: similar users should be grouped together and share common IAM policies. Third, we describe multiple attack models and show that our optimized IAM policies significantly reduce the impact of security attacks using real data from 8 commercial organizations, and synthetic instances.
abstract_zh: 现代软件系统依赖于从存储在公共云中的业务敏感数据中挖掘洞察。数据泄露通常会给商业组织带来重大（金钱）损失。从概念上讲，云安全在很大程度上依赖于 IT 管理员需要正确配置并定期更新的身份访问管理 (IAM) 策略。安全疏忽和人为错误通常会导致 IAM 策略配置错误，从而可能为攻击者打开后门。为了应对这些挑战，首先，我们开发了一个新颖的框架，该框架使用约束编程（CP）编码生成最佳 IAM 策略。我们将减少云用户的暗权限视为最优标准，这直观地意味着最小化不必要的数据存储访问权限。其次，为了使 IAM 策略可解释，我们将图形表示学习应用于用户的历史访问模式，以通过相似性约束来增强我们的 CP 模型：相似的用户应分组在一起并共享通用的 IAM 策略。第三，我们描述了多种攻击模型，并表明我们优化的 IAM 策略使用来自 8 个商业组织的真实数据和合成实例显着降低了安全攻击的影响。

AI.tldr: 开发结合约束编程与图表示学习的框架，生成可解释的云安全策略以减少权限漏洞
AI.motivation: 解决云环境中因IAM配置错误导致的安全风险，提升策略可解释性以减少人为失误
AI.method: 结合约束编程优化策略生成，利用图表示学习分析历史访问模式，通过相似性约束实现用户分组与策略共享
AI.result: 通过真实数据和合成实例验证，优化后的策略显著降低安全攻击影响
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升策略生成质量与可解释性，为自动化配置提供新思路

title: A Performance-Consistent and Computation-Efficient CNN System for High-Quality Automated Brain Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: 用于高质量自动脑肿瘤分割的性能一致且计算高效的 CNN 系统
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, currently under review of IEEE transactions on medical imaging
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, currently under review of IEEE transactions on medical imaging
abstract: The research on developing CNN-based fully-automated Brain-Tumor-Segmentation systems has been progressed rapidly. For the systems to be applicable in practice, a good The research on developing CNN-based fully-automated Brain-Tumor-Segmentation systems has been progressed rapidly. For the systems to be applicable in practice, a good processing quality and reliability are the must. Moreover, for wide applications of such systems, a minimization of computation complexity is desirable, which can also result in a minimization of randomness in computation and, consequently, a better performance consistency. To this end, the CNN in the proposed system has a unique structure with 2 distinguished characters. Firstly, the three paths of its feature extraction block are designed to extract, from the multi-modality input, comprehensive feature information of mono-modality, paired-modality and cross-modality data, respectively. Also, it has a particular three-branch classification block to identify the pixels of 4 classes. Each branch is trained separately so that the parameters are updated specifically with the corresponding ground truth data of a target tumor areas. The convolution layers of the system are custom-designed with specific purposes, resulting in a very simple config of 61,843 parameters in total. The proposed system is tested extensively with BraTS2018 and BraTS2019 datasets. The mean Dice scores, obtained from the ten experiments on BraTS2018 validation samples, are 0.787+0.003, 0.886+0.002, 0.801+0.007, for enhancing tumor, whole tumor and tumor core, respectively, and 0.751+0.007, 0.885+0.002, 0.776+0.004 on BraTS2019. The test results demonstrate that the proposed system is able to perform high-quality segmentation in a consistent manner. Furthermore, its extremely low computation complexity will facilitate its implementation/application in various environments.

The test results demonstrate that the proposed system is able to perform high-quality segmentation in a consistent manner. Furthermore, its extremely low computation complexity will facilitate its implementation/application in various environments.
abstract_zh: 基于 CNN 的全自动脑肿瘤分割系统的研究进展迅速。为了使系统能够应用于实际，开发基于 CNN 的全自动脑肿瘤分割系统的研究进展迅速。为了使系统能够在实践中应用，良好的加工质量和可靠性是必须的。此外，对于此类系统的广泛应用，需要最小化计算复杂度，这也可以导致计算随机性最小化，从而获得更好的性能一致性。为此，所提出的系统中的 CNN 具有独特的结构，具有 2 个显着特征。首先，其特征提取模块的三个路径被设计为分别从多模态输入中提取单模态、成对模态和跨模态数据的综合特征信息。此外，它还有一个特定的三分支分类块来识别 4 个类别的像素。每个分支都单独训练，以便根据目标肿瘤区域的相应地面实况数据专门更新参数。系统的卷积层是根据特定目的定制设计的，总共 61,843 个参数的配置非常简单。所提出的系统使用 BraTS2018 和 BraTS2019 数据集进行了广泛测试。 BraTS2018验证样本的10个实验获得的平均Dice分数分别为：增强肿瘤、整个肿瘤和肿瘤核心的0.787+0.003、0.886+0.002、0.801+0.007；增强肿瘤、整个肿瘤和肿瘤核心的平均Dice分数分别为0.751+0.007、0.885+0.002、0.776+0.004。胸罩2019。测试结果表明，所提出的系统能够以一致的方式执行高质量的分割。此外，其极低的计算复杂度将有利于其在各种环境中的实现/应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种性能一致且计算高效的CNN系统，用于实现高质量的自动化脑肿瘤分割。
AI.motivation: 现有脑肿瘤分割系统需在保证分割质量与可靠性的同时，降低计算复杂度以提升性能一致性，满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 设计包含三路径特征提取块（单模态、配对模态、跨模态）和三分支分类块的CNN结构，各分支独立训练并采用定制化卷积层，总参数仅61,843个。
AI.result: 在BraTS2018和BraTS2019数据集上，Dice分数分别达到0.787/0.886/0.801和0.751/0.885/0.776，验证了高质且稳定的分割能力。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过结构优化实现低计算复杂度与高性能一致性，适用于多种应用场景。

search_text: A Performance-Consistent and Computation-Efficient CNN System for High-Quality Automated Brain Tumor Segmentation 用于高质量自动脑肿瘤分割的性能一致且计算高效的 CNN 系统 The research on developing CNN-based fully-automated Brain-Tumor-Segmentation systems has been progressed rapidly. For the systems to be applicable in practice, a good The research on developing CNN-based fully-automated Brain-Tumor-Segmentation systems has been progressed rapidly. For the systems to be applicable in practice, a good processing quality and reliability are the must. Moreover, for wide applications of such systems, a minimization of computation complexity is desirable, which can also result in a minimization of randomness in computation and, consequently, a better performance consistency. To this end, the CNN in the proposed system has a unique structure with 2 distinguished characters. Firstly, the three paths of its feature extraction block are designed to extract, from the multi-modality input, comprehensive feature information of mono-modality, paired-modality and cross-modality data, respectively. Also, it has a particular three-branch classification block to identify the pixels of 4 classes. Each branch is trained separately so that the parameters are updated specifically with the corresponding ground truth data of a target tumor areas. The convolution layers of the system are custom-designed with specific purposes, resulting in a very simple config of 61,843 parameters in total. The proposed system is tested extensively with BraTS2018 and BraTS2019 datasets. The mean Dice scores, obtained from the ten experiments on BraTS2018 validation samples, are 0.787+0.003, 0.886+0.002, 0.801+0.007, for enhancing tumor, whole tumor and tumor core, respectively, and 0.751+0.007, 0.885+0.002, 0.776+0.004 on BraTS2019. The test results demonstrate that the proposed system is able to perform high-quality segmentation in a consistent manner. Furthermore, its extremely low computation complexity will facilitate its implementation/application in various environments. 基于 CNN 的全自动脑肿瘤分割系统的研究进展迅速。为了使系统能够应用于实际，开发基于 CNN 的全自动脑肿瘤分割系统的研究进展迅速。为了使系统能够在实践中应用，良好的加工质量和可靠性是必须的。此外，对于此类系统的广泛应用，需要最小化计算复杂度，这也可以导致计算随机性最小化，从而获得更好的性能一致性。为此，所提出的系统中的 CNN 具有独特的结构，具有 2 个显着特征。首先，其特征提取模块的三个路径被设计为分别从多模态输入中提取单模态、成对模态和跨模态数据的综合特征信息。此外，它还有一个特定的三分支分类块来识别 4 个类别的像素。每个分支都单独训练，以便根据目标肿瘤区域的相应地面实况数据专门更新参数。系统的卷积层是根据特定目的定制设计的，总共 61,843 个参数的配置非常简单。所提出的系统使用 BraTS2018 和 BraTS2019 数据集进行了广泛测试。 BraTS2018验证样本的10个实验获得的平均Dice分数分别为：增强肿瘤、整个肿瘤和肿瘤核心的0.787+0.003、0.886+0.002、0.801+0.007；增强肿瘤、整个肿瘤和肿瘤核心的平均Dice分数分别为0.751+0.007、0.885+0.002、0.776+0.004。胸罩2019。测试结果表明，所提出的系统能够以一致的方式执行高质量的分割。此外，其极低的计算复杂度将有利于其在各种环境中的实现/应用。 本文提出一种性能一致且计算高效的CNN系统，用于实现高质量的自动化脑肿瘤分割。 Juncheng Tong,Chunyan Wang eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Triangular Dropout: Variable Network Width without Retraining
title_zh: 三角 Dropout：无需重新训练的可变网络宽度
abstract: One of the most fundamental design choices in neural networks is layer width: it affects the capacity of what a network can learn and determines the complexity of the solution. This latter property is often exploited when introducing information bottlenecks, forcing a network to learn compressed representations. However, such an architecture decision is typically immutable once training begins; switching to a more compressed architecture requires retraining. In this paper we present a new layer design, called Triangular Dropout, which does not have this limitation. After training, the layer can be arbitrarily reduced in width to exchange performance for narrowness. We demonstrate the construction and potential use cases of such a mechanism in three areas. Firstly, we describe the formulation of Triangular Dropout in autoencoders, creating models with selectable compression after training. Secondly, we add Triangular Dropout to VGG19 on ImageNet, creating a powerful network which, without retraining, can be significantly reduced in parameters. Lastly, we explore the application of Triangular Dropout to reinforcement learning (RL) policies on selected control problems.
summary: One of the most fundamental design choices in neural networks is layer width: it affects the capacity of what a network can learn and determines the complexity of the solution. This latter property is often exploited when introducing information bottlenecks, forcing a network to learn compressed representations. However, such an architecture decision is typically immutable once training begins; switching to a more compressed architecture requires retraining. In this paper we present a new layer design, called Triangular Dropout, which does not have this limitation. After training, the layer can be arbitrarily reduced in width to exchange performance for narrowness. We demonstrate the construction and potential use cases of such a mechanism in three areas. Firstly, we describe the formulation of Triangular Dropout in autoencoders, creating models with selectable compression after training. Secondly, we add Triangular Dropout to VGG19 on ImageNet, creating a powerful network which, without retraining, can be significantly reduced in parameters. Lastly, we explore the application of Triangular Dropout to reinforcement learning (RL) policies on selected control problems.
abstract_zh: 神经网络中最基本的设计选择之一是层宽度：它影响网络学习的能力并决定解决方案的复杂性。当引入信息瓶颈时，通常会利用后一个属性，迫使网络学习压缩表示。然而，一旦训练开始，这样的架构决策通常是不可变的；切换到更压缩的架构需要重新训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的层设计，称为 Triangle Dropout，它没有这个限制。训练结束后，该层可以任意减小宽度，以性能换取窄度。我们在三个领域展示了这种机制的构建和潜在用例。首先，我们描述了自动编码器中三角丢失的公式，在训练后创建具有可选压缩的模型。其次，我们在 ImageNet 上的 VGG19 中添加了 Triangle Dropout，创建了一个强大的网络，无需重新训练，就可以显着减少参数。最后，我们探讨了三角辍学在针对选定控制问题的强化学习（RL）策略中的应用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种称为Triangular Dropout的新层设计，使神经网络在训练后能够任意减少宽度而无需重新训练。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络架构在训练后无法灵活调整宽度，限制了模型的适应性和效率，因此需要一种无需重新训练即可调整网络宽度的方法。
AI.method: 设计Triangular Dropout层，通过动态调整神经元的激活比例，在训练后无需重新训练即可压缩网络宽度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在自编码器中可实现训练后压缩，在VGG19模型上显著减少参数且保持性能，并成功应用于强化学习策略。
AI.conclusion: Triangular Dropout提供了一种灵活的网络宽度调整方法，无需重新训练，适用于多种场景，提升了模型的适应性和效率。

authors_text: Wonho Bae,Junhyug Noh,Milad Jalali Asadabadi,Danica J. Sutherland
title: One Weird Trick to Improve Your Semi-Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation Model
title_zh: 改进半弱监督语义分割模型的一种奇怪技巧
abstract: Semi-weakly supervised semantic segmentation (SWSSS) aims to train a model to identify objects in images based on a small number of images with pixel-level labels, and many more images with only image-level labels. Most existing SWSSS algorithms extract pixel-level pseudo-labels from an image classifier - a very difficult task to do well, hence requiring complicated architectures and extensive hyperparameter tuning on fully-supervised validation sets. We propose a method called prediction filtering, which instead of extracting pseudo-labels, just uses the classifier as a classifier: it ignores any segmentation predictions from classes which the classifier is confident are not present. Adding this simple post-processing method to baselines gives results competitive with or better than prior SWSSS algorithms. Moreover, it is compatible with pseudo-label methods: adding prediction filtering to existing SWSSS algorithms further improves segmentation performance.
summary: Semi-weakly supervised semantic segmentation (SWSSS) aims to train a model to identify objects in images based on a small number of images with pixel-level labels, and many more images with only image-level labels. Most existing SWSSS algorithms extract pixel-level pseudo-labels from an image classifier - a very difficult task to do well, hence requiring complicated architectures and extensive hyperparameter tuning on fully-supervised validation sets. We propose a method called prediction filtering, which instead of extracting pseudo-labels, just uses the classifier as a classifier: it ignores any segmentation predictions from classes which the classifier is confident are not present. Adding this simple post-processing method to baselines gives results competitive with or better than prior SWSSS algorithms. Moreover, it is compatible with pseudo-label methods: adding prediction filtering to existing SWSSS algorithms further improves segmentation performance.
abstract_zh: 半弱监督语义分割（SWSSS）旨在训练一个模型，基于少量具有像素级标签的图像和更多仅具有图像级标签的图像来识别图像中的对象。大多数现有的 SWSSS 算法从图像分类器中提取像素级伪标签 - 这是一项非常困难的任务，因此需要复杂的架构和对完全监督的验证集进行广泛的超参数调整。我们提出了一种称为预测过滤的方法，它不提取伪标签，而是仅使用分类器作为分类器：它忽略分类器确信不存在的类中的任何分割预测。将这种简单的后处理方法添加到基线中可以得到与之前的 SWSSS 算法相媲美或更好的结果。此外，它与伪标签方法兼容：在现有SWSSS算法中添加预测过滤进一步提高了分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单的预测过滤方法，以提升半弱监督语义分割模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于生成像素级伪标签，这需要复杂的架构和大量调参，而预测过滤提供了一个更简单有效的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过利用分类器的置信度过滤掉不自信的类别预测，从而简化分割过程。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在基线模型和现有算法上均能提升分割性能，结果具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 预测过滤是一种简单有效的改进方法，可与现有伪标签方法结合使用，提升SWSSS模型效果。
