search_text: One Weird Trick to Improve Your Semi-Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation Model 改进半弱监督语义分割模型的一种奇怪技巧 Semi-weakly supervised semantic segmentation (SWSSS) aims to train a model to identify objects in images based on a small number of images with pixel-level labels, and many more images with only image-level labels. Most existing SWSSS algorithms extract pixel-level pseudo-labels from an image classifier - a very difficult task to do well, hence requiring complicated architectures and extensive hyperparameter tuning on fully-supervised validation sets. We propose a method called prediction filtering, which instead of extracting pseudo-labels, just uses the classifier as a classifier: it ignores any segmentation predictions from classes which the classifier is confident are not present. Adding this simple post-processing method to baselines gives results competitive with or better than prior SWSSS algorithms. Moreover, it is compatible with pseudo-label methods: adding prediction filtering to existing SWSSS algorithms further improves segmentation performance. 半弱监督语义分割（SWSSS）旨在训练一个模型，基于少量具有像素级标签的图像和更多仅具有图像级标签的图像来识别图像中的对象。大多数现有的 SWSSS 算法从图像分类器中提取像素级伪标签 - 这是一项非常困难的任务，因此需要复杂的架构和对完全监督的验证集进行广泛的超参数调整。我们提出了一种称为预测过滤的方法，它不提取伪标签，而是仅使用分类器作为分类器：它忽略分类器确信不存在的类中的任何分割预测。将这种简单的后处理方法添加到基线中可以得到与之前的 SWSSS 算法相媲美或更好的结果。此外，它与伪标签方法兼容：在现有SWSSS算法中添加预测过滤进一步提高了分割性能。 本文提出了一种简单的预测过滤方法，以提升半弱监督语义分割模型的性能。 Wonho Bae,Junhyug Noh,Milad Jalali Asadabadi,Danica J. Sutherland cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Maede Zolanvari,Zebo Yang,Khaled Khan,Raj Jain,Nader Meskin
title: TRUST XAI: Model-Agnostic Explanations for AI With a Case Study on IIoT Security
title_zh: TRUST XAI：人工智能的模型无关解释以及 IIoT 安全案例研究
abstract: Despite AI's significant growth, its "black box" nature creates challenges in generating adequate trust. Thus, it is seldom utilized as a standalone unit in IoT high-risk applications, such as critical industrial infrastructures, medical systems, and financial applications, etc. Explainable AI (XAI) has emerged to help with this problem. However, designing appropriately fast and accurate XAI is still challenging, especially in numerical applications. Here, we propose a universal XAI model named Transparency Relying Upon Statistical Theory (TRUST), which is model-agnostic, high-performing, and suitable for numerical applications. Simply put, TRUST XAI models the statistical behavior of the AI's outputs in an AI-based system. Factor analysis is used to transform the input features into a new set of latent variables. We use mutual information to rank these variables and pick only the most influential ones on the AI's outputs and call them "representatives" of the classes. Then we use multi-modal Gaussian distributions to determine the likelihood of any new sample belonging to each class. We demonstrate the effectiveness of TRUST in a case study on cybersecurity of the industrial Internet of things (IIoT) using three different cybersecurity datasets. As IIoT is a prominent application that deals with numerical data. The results show that TRUST XAI provides explanations for new random samples with an average success rate of 98%. Compared with LIME, a popular XAI model, TRUST is shown to be superior in the context of performance, speed, and the method of explainability. In the end, we also show how TRUST is explained to the user.
summary: Despite AI's significant growth, its "black box" nature creates challenges in generating adequate trust. Thus, it is seldom utilized as a standalone unit in IoT high-risk applications, such as critical industrial infrastructures, medical systems, and financial applications, etc. Explainable AI (XAI) has emerged to help with this problem. However, designing appropriately fast and accurate XAI is still challenging, especially in numerical applications. Here, we propose a universal XAI model named Transparency Relying Upon Statistical Theory (TRUST), which is model-agnostic, high-performing, and suitable for numerical applications. Simply put, TRUST XAI models the statistical behavior of the AI's outputs in an AI-based system. Factor analysis is used to transform the input features into a new set of latent variables. We use mutual information to rank these variables and pick only the most influential ones on the AI's outputs and call them "representatives" of the classes. Then we use multi-modal Gaussian distributions to determine the likelihood of any new sample belonging to each class. We demonstrate the effectiveness of TRUST in a case study on cybersecurity of the industrial Internet of things (IIoT) using three different cybersecurity datasets. As IIoT is a prominent application that deals with numerical data. The results show that TRUST XAI provides explanations for new random samples with an average success rate of 98%. Compared with LIME, a popular XAI model, TRUST is shown to be superior in the context of performance, speed, and the method of explainability. In the end, we also show how TRUST is explained to the user.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能显着增长，但其“黑匣子”性质给产生足够的信任带来了挑战。因此，它很少在物联网高风险应用中用作独立单元，例如关键工业基础设施、医疗系统和金融应用等。可解释人工智能（XAI）的出现就是为了帮助解决这个问题。然而，设计适当快速且准确的 XAI 仍然具有挑战性，特别是在数值应用中。在这里，我们提出了一种通用的 XAI 模型，名为依赖统计理论的透明度 (TRUST)，它与模型无关、高性能且适合数值应用。简而言之，TRUST XAI 对基于 AI 的系统中 AI 输出的统计行为进行建模。因子分析用于将输入特征转换为一组新的潜在变量。我们使用互信息对这些变量进行排名，并仅选择对人工智能输出最有影响力的变量，并将它们称为类别的“代表”。然后，我们使用多模态高斯分布来确定属于每个类别的任何新样本的可能性。我们使用三个不同的网络安全数据集在工业物联网 (IIoT) 网络安全案例研究中展示了 TRUST 的有效性。由于工业物联网是处理数字数据的重要应用程序。结果表明，TRUST XAI 为新的随机样本提供了解释，平均成功率为 98%。与流行的 XAI 模型 LIME 相比，TRUST 在性能、速度和可解释性方法方面表现出优越性。最后，我们还展示了如何向用户解释信任。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TRUST的模型无关可解释AI（XAI）方法，用于解决工业物联网（IIoT）等高风险场景中AI黑箱问题，通过统计理论对AI输出进行建模并提供解释。
AI.motivation: AI在物联网高风险应用（如工业基础设施、医疗系统）中因黑箱特性难以建立信任，现有XAI方法在数值型应用中存在效率和准确性不足的问题，需设计更高效的解释模型。
AI.method: TRUST通过因子分析将输入特征转化为潜在变量，利用互信息筛选关键变量作为类别代表，并采用多模态高斯分布计算新样本属于各类别的概率，实现模型无关的解释。
AI.result: 在三个IIoT安全数据集上的实验表明，TRUST对新样本的平均解释成功率达98%，在性能、速度和可解释性方面优于LIME等主流XAI方法。
AI.conclusion: TRUST XAI为数值型AI应用提供了高效、通用的解释框架，在工业物联网安全领域具有显著优势，可提升AI在高风险场景中的可信度。

title: ADDAI: Anomaly Detection using Distributed AI
title_zh: ADDAI：使用分布式人工智能进行异常检测
abstract: When dealing with the Internet of Things (IoT), especially industrial IoT (IIoT), two manifest challenges leap to mind. First is the massive amount of data streaming to and from IoT devices, and second is the fast pace at which these systems must operate. Distributed computing in the form of edge/cloud structure is a popular technique to overcome these two challenges. In this paper, we propose ADDAI (Anomaly Detection using Distributed AI) that can easily span out geographically to cover a large number of IoT sources. Due to its distributed nature, it guarantees critical IIoT requirements such as high speed, robustness against a single point of failure, low communication overhead, privacy, and scalability. Through empirical proof, we show the communication cost is minimized, and the performance improves significantly while maintaining the privacy of raw data at the local layer. ADDAI provides predictions for new random samples with an average success rate of 98.4% while reducing the communication overhead by half compared with the traditional technique of offloading all the raw sensor data to the cloud.
summary: When dealing with the Internet of Things (IoT), especially industrial IoT (IIoT), two manifest challenges leap to mind. First is the massive amount of data streaming to and from IoT devices, and second is the fast pace at which these systems must operate. Distributed computing in the form of edge/cloud structure is a popular technique to overcome these two challenges. In this paper, we propose ADDAI (Anomaly Detection using Distributed AI) that can easily span out geographically to cover a large number of IoT sources. Due to its distributed nature, it guarantees critical IIoT requirements such as high speed, robustness against a single point of failure, low communication overhead, privacy, and scalability. Through empirical proof, we show the communication cost is minimized, and the performance improves significantly while maintaining the privacy of raw data at the local layer. ADDAI provides predictions for new random samples with an average success rate of 98.4% while reducing the communication overhead by half compared with the traditional technique of offloading all the raw sensor data to the cloud.
abstract_zh: 在处理物联网 (IoT)，尤其是工业物联网 (IIoT) 时，两个明显的挑战跃入脑海。首先是物联网设备传入和传出的大量数据，其次是这些系统必须以快速的速度运行。边缘/云结构形式的分布式计算是克服这两个挑战的流行技术。在本文中，我们提出了 ADDAI（使用分布式人工智能的异常检测），它可以轻松地跨越地理范围以覆盖大量物联网源。由于其分布式特性，它可以保证关键的 IIoT 要求，例如高速、针对单点故障的鲁棒性、低通信开销、隐私和可扩展性。通过实证证明，我们表明通信成本最小化，并且性能显着提高，同时保持本地层原始数据的隐私。 ADDAI 为新的随机样本提供预测，平均成功率为 98.4%，同时与将所有原始传感器数据卸载到云端的传统技术相比，通信开销减少了一半。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADDAI（分布式AI异常检测）方法，用于解决工业物联网中大规模数据处理和高实时性需求的挑战。
AI.motivation: 工业物联网面临数据量巨大和系统响应速度要求高的问题，传统集中式云端处理存在通信开销大、隐私风险及单点故障风险。
AI.method: 基于边缘-云分布式架构，通过本地节点处理原始数据并仅传输关键信息，结合分布式AI模型实现异常检测，确保隐私性与低通信开销。
AI.result: 实验表明ADDAI通信开销降低50%，预测成功率高达98.4%，同时满足隐私保护、系统鲁棒性与可扩展性需求。
AI.conclusion: ADDAI通过分布式AI有效平衡了工业物联网的实时性、隐私性和系统可靠性，优于传统集中式处理方案。

search_text: ADDAI: Anomaly Detection using Distributed AI ADDAI：使用分布式人工智能进行异常检测 When dealing with the Internet of Things (IoT), especially industrial IoT (IIoT), two manifest challenges leap to mind. First is the massive amount of data streaming to and from IoT devices, and second is the fast pace at which these systems must operate. Distributed computing in the form of edge/cloud structure is a popular technique to overcome these two challenges. In this paper, we propose ADDAI (Anomaly Detection using Distributed AI) that can easily span out geographically to cover a large number of IoT sources. Due to its distributed nature, it guarantees critical IIoT requirements such as high speed, robustness against a single point of failure, low communication overhead, privacy, and scalability. Through empirical proof, we show the communication cost is minimized, and the performance improves significantly while maintaining the privacy of raw data at the local layer. ADDAI provides predictions for new random samples with an average success rate of 98.4% while reducing the communication overhead by half compared with the traditional technique of offloading all the raw sensor data to the cloud. 在处理物联网 (IoT)，尤其是工业物联网 (IIoT) 时，两个明显的挑战跃入脑海。首先是物联网设备传入和传出的大量数据，其次是这些系统必须以快速的速度运行。边缘/云结构形式的分布式计算是克服这两个挑战的流行技术。在本文中，我们提出了 ADDAI（使用分布式人工智能的异常检测），它可以轻松地跨越地理范围以覆盖大量物联网源。由于其分布式特性，它可以保证关键的 IIoT 要求，例如高速、针对单点故障的鲁棒性、低通信开销、隐私和可扩展性。通过实证证明，我们表明通信成本最小化，并且性能显着提高，同时保持本地层原始数据的隐私。 ADDAI 为新的随机样本提供预测，平均成功率为 98.4%，同时与将所有原始传感器数据卸载到云端的传统技术相比，通信开销减少了一半。 本文提出ADDAI（分布式AI异常检测）方法，用于解决工业物联网中大规模数据处理和高实时性需求的挑战。 Maede Zolanvari,Ali Ghubaish,Raj Jain cs.DC,cs.AI

title: Adversarial attacks on an optical neural network
title_zh: 对光神经网络的对抗性攻击
abstract: Adversarial attacks have been extensively investigated for machine learning systems including deep learning in the digital domain. However, the adversarial attacks on optical neural networks (ONN) have been seldom considered previously. In this work, we first construct an accurate image classifier with an ONN using a mesh of interconnected Mach-Zehnder interferometers (MZI). Then a corresponding adversarial attack scheme is proposed for the first time. The attacked images are visually very similar to the original ones but the ONN system becomes malfunctioned and generates wrong classification results in most time. The results indicate that adversarial attack is also a significant issue for optical machine learning systems.
summary: Adversarial attacks have been extensively investigated for machine learning systems including deep learning in the digital domain. However, the adversarial attacks on optical neural networks (ONN) have been seldom considered previously. In this work, we first construct an accurate image classifier with an ONN using a mesh of interconnected Mach-Zehnder interferometers (MZI). Then a corresponding adversarial attack scheme is proposed for the first time. The attacked images are visually very similar to the original ones but the ONN system becomes malfunctioned and generates wrong classification results in most time. The results indicate that adversarial attack is also a significant issue for optical machine learning systems.
abstract_zh: 机器学习系统（包括数字领域的深度学习）的对抗性攻击已得到广泛研究。然而，以前很少考虑对光学神经网络（ONN）的对抗性攻击。在这项工作中，我们首先使用互连的马赫-曾德尔干涉仪 (MZI) 网格构建一个具有 ONN 的精确图像分类器。然后首次提出了相应的对抗性攻击方案。被攻击的图像在视觉上与原始图像非常相似，但 ONN 系统出现故障并在大多数情况下生成错误的分类结果。结果表明，对抗性攻击也是光学机器学习系统的一个重要问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了光神经网络（ONN）的对抗攻击方法，提出了一种能导致ONN分类错误的攻击方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管对抗攻击在数字领域深度学习中已被广泛研究，但光神经网络的对抗攻击问题尚未被充分关注。
AI.method: 构建基于马赫-曾德干涉仪（MZI）网格的ONN图像分类器，并设计生成视觉相似但可导致分类错误的对抗样本。
AI.result: 攻击样本在视觉上与原始图像高度相似，但使ONN系统在多数情况下产生错误分类结果。
AI.conclusion: 对抗攻击同样威胁光学机器学习系统，需针对光子计算架构设计新的防御机制。

title: A Hybrid Defense Method against Adversarial Attacks on Traffic Sign Classifiers in Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 针对自动驾驶车辆中交通标志分类器的对抗性攻击的混合防御方法
abstract: Adversarial attacks can make deep neural network (DNN) models predict incorrect output labels, such as misclassified traffic signs, for autonomous vehicle (AV) perception modules. Resilience against adversarial attacks can help AVs navigate safely on the road by avoiding misclassication of signs or objects. This DNN-based study develops a resilient traffic sign classifier for AVs that uses a hybrid defense method. We use transfer learning to retrain the Inception-V3 and Resnet-152 models as traffic sign classifiers. This method also utilizes a combination of three different strategies: random filtering, ensembling, and local feature mapping. We use the random cropping and resizing technique for random filtering, plurality voting as ensembling strategy and an optical character recognition model as a local feature mapper. This DNN-based hybrid defense method has been tested for the no attack scenario and against well-known untargeted adversarial attacks (e.g., Projected Gradient Descent or PGD, Fast Gradient Sign Method or FGSM, Momentum Iterative Method or MIM attack, and Carlini and Wagner or C&W). We find that our hybrid defense method achieves 99% average traffic sign classification accuracy for the no attack scenario and 88% average traffic sign classification accuracy for all attack scenarios. Moreover, the hybrid defense method, presented in this study, improves the accuracy for traffic sign classification compared to the traditional defense methods (i.e., JPEG filtering, feature squeezing, binary filtering, and random filtering) up to 6%, 50%, and 55% for FGSM, MIM, and PGD attacks, respectively.
summary: Adversarial attacks can make deep neural network (DNN) models predict incorrect output labels, such as misclassified traffic signs, for autonomous vehicle (AV) perception modules. Resilience against adversarial attacks can help AVs navigate safely on the road by avoiding misclassication of signs or objects. This DNN-based study develops a resilient traffic sign classifier for AVs that uses a hybrid defense method. We use transfer learning to retrain the Inception-V3 and Resnet-152 models as traffic sign classifiers. This method also utilizes a combination of three different strategies: random filtering, ensembling, and local feature mapping. We use the random cropping and resizing technique for random filtering, plurality voting as ensembling strategy and an optical character recognition model as a local feature mapper. This DNN-based hybrid defense method has been tested for the no attack scenario and against well-known untargeted adversarial attacks (e.g., Projected Gradient Descent or PGD, Fast Gradient Sign Method or FGSM, Momentum Iterative Method or MIM attack, and Carlini and Wagner or C&W). We find that our hybrid defense method achieves 99% average traffic sign classification accuracy for the no attack scenario and 88% average traffic sign classification accuracy for all attack scenarios. Moreover, the hybrid defense method, presented in this study, improves the accuracy for traffic sign classification compared to the traditional defense methods (i.e., JPEG filtering, feature squeezing, binary filtering, and random filtering) up to 6%, 50%, and 55% for FGSM, MIM, and PGD attacks, respectively.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击可以使深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型预测自动车辆 (AV) 感知模块的错误输出标签，例如错误分类的交通标志。抵御对抗性攻击的能力可以帮助自动驾驶汽车在道路上安全行驶，避免对标志或物体进行错误分类。这项基于 DNN 的研究开发了一种使用混合防御方法的自动驾驶汽车弹性交通标志分类器。我们使用迁移学习来重新训练 Inception-V3 和 Resnet-152 模型作为交通标志分类器。该方法还结合了三种不同的策略：随机过滤、集成和局部特征映射。我们使用随机裁剪和调整大小技术进行随机过滤，使用多数投票作为集成策略，使用光学字符识别模型作为局部特征映射器。这种基于 DNN 的混合防御方法已经针对无攻击场景和众所周知的非针对性对抗攻击（例如，投影梯度下降或 PGD、快速梯度符号方法或 FGSM、动量迭代方法或 MIM 攻击以及 Carlini 和 Wagner 或 C&W）进行了测试。我们发现，我们的混合防御方法在无攻击场景下实现了 99% 的平均交通标志分类准确率，在所有攻击场景下实现了 88% 的平均交通标志分类准确率。此外，与传统的防御方法（即JPEG过滤、特征压缩、二值过滤和随机过滤）相比，本研究提出的混合防御方法针对FGSM、MIM和PGD攻击，交通标志分类的准确率分别提高了6%、50%和55%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合防御方法，用于提升自动驾驶车辆中交通标志分类器对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击可能导致自动驾驶车辆的深度神经网络误分类交通标志，威胁道路安全，需开发有效防御机制。
AI.method: 基于迁移学习微调Inception-V3和ResNet-152模型，并融合随机过滤（随机裁剪）、集成学习（多数投票）和局部特征映射（OCR模型）三重策略。
AI.result: 无攻击场景下分类准确率达99%，对抗攻击场景下平均保持88%；相较传统方法在FGSM/MIM/PGD攻击下分别提升6%/50%/55%。
AI.conclusion: 混合防御方法显著优于传统技术，为自动驾驶系统提供了更可靠的交通标志识别安全保障。

authors_text: Rylan Schaeffer,Gabrielle Kaili-May Liu,Yilun Du,Scott Linderman,Ila Rani Fiete
title: Streaming Inference for Infinite Non-Stationary Clustering
title_zh: 无限非平稳聚类的流式推理
comment: Published at the Workshop on Agent Learning in Open-Endedness (ALOE) at ICLR 2022
comments: Published at the Workshop on Agent Learning in Open-Endedness (ALOE) at ICLR 2022
abstract: Learning from a continuous stream of non-stationary data in an unsupervised manner is arguably one of the most common and most challenging settings facing intelligent agents. Here, we attack learning under all three conditions (unsupervised, streaming, non-stationary) in the context of clustering, also known as mixture modeling. We introduce a novel clustering algorithm that endows mixture models with the ability to create new clusters online, as demanded by the data, in a probabilistic, time-varying, and principled manner. To achieve this, we first define a novel stochastic process called the Dynamical Chinese Restaurant Process (Dynamical CRP), which is a non-exchangeable distribution over partitions of a set; next, we show that the Dynamical CRP provides a non-stationary prior over cluster assignments and yields an efficient streaming variational inference algorithm. We conclude with experiments showing that the Dynamical CRP can be applied on diverse synthetic and real data with Gaussian and non-Gaussian likelihoods.
summary: Learning from a continuous stream of non-stationary data in an unsupervised manner is arguably one of the most common and most challenging settings facing intelligent agents. Here, we attack learning under all three conditions (unsupervised, streaming, non-stationary) in the context of clustering, also known as mixture modeling. We introduce a novel clustering algorithm that endows mixture models with the ability to create new clusters online, as demanded by the data, in a probabilistic, time-varying, and principled manner. To achieve this, we first define a novel stochastic process called the Dynamical Chinese Restaurant Process (Dynamical CRP), which is a non-exchangeable distribution over partitions of a set; next, we show that the Dynamical CRP provides a non-stationary prior over cluster assignments and yields an efficient streaming variational inference algorithm. We conclude with experiments showing that the Dynamical CRP can be applied on diverse synthetic and real data with Gaussian and non-Gaussian likelihoods.
abstract_zh: 以无监督的方式从连续的非平稳数据流中学习可以说是智能代理面临的最常见和最具挑战性的设置之一。在这里，我们在聚类（也称为混合建模）的背景下攻击所有三种条件（无监督、流式、非平稳）下的学习。我们引入了一种新颖的聚类算法，该算法赋予混合模型根据数据的要求，以概率、时变和有原则的方式在线创建新聚类的能力。为了实现这一目标，我们首先定义一种新颖的随机过程，称为动态中餐馆过程（Dynamical CRP），它是集合分区上的不可交换分布；接下来，我们表明动态 CRP 提供了优于集群分配的非平稳先验，并产生高效的流变分推理算法。我们通过实验得出结论，表明动态 CRP 可以应用于具有高斯和非高斯似然的各种合成数据和真实数据。

AI.tldr: 提出一种处理非平稳数据流的无限聚类算法。
AI.motivation: 非平稳数据流的无监督学习是智能体面临的常见挑战，现有方法难以满足动态创建簇的需求。
AI.method: 引入动态中国餐厅过程（Dynamical CRP）作为非交换分布的分组模型，并结合流式变分推断算法。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在合成及真实数据（含高斯/非高斯分布）中均能有效聚类。
AI.conclusion: Dynamical CRP为非平稳流数据聚类提供了概率化、动态化的解决方案。

search_text: Streaming Inference for Infinite Non-Stationary Clustering 无限非平稳聚类的流式推理 Learning from a continuous stream of non-stationary data in an unsupervised manner is arguably one of the most common and most challenging settings facing intelligent agents. Here, we attack learning under all three conditions (unsupervised, streaming, non-stationary) in the context of clustering, also known as mixture modeling. We introduce a novel clustering algorithm that endows mixture models with the ability to create new clusters online, as demanded by the data, in a probabilistic, time-varying, and principled manner. To achieve this, we first define a novel stochastic process called the Dynamical Chinese Restaurant Process (Dynamical CRP), which is a non-exchangeable distribution over partitions of a set; next, we show that the Dynamical CRP provides a non-stationary prior over cluster assignments and yields an efficient streaming variational inference algorithm. We conclude with experiments showing that the Dynamical CRP can be applied on diverse synthetic and real data with Gaussian and non-Gaussian likelihoods. 以无监督的方式从连续的非平稳数据流中学习可以说是智能代理面临的最常见和最具挑战性的设置之一。在这里，我们在聚类（也称为混合建模）的背景下攻击所有三种条件（无监督、流式、非平稳）下的学习。我们引入了一种新颖的聚类算法，该算法赋予混合模型根据数据的要求，以概率、时变和有原则的方式在线创建新聚类的能力。为了实现这一目标，我们首先定义一种新颖的随机过程，称为动态中餐馆过程（Dynamical CRP），它是集合分区上的不可交换分布；接下来，我们表明动态 CRP 提供了优于集群分配的非平稳先验，并产生高效的流变分推理算法。我们通过实验得出结论，表明动态 CRP 可以应用于具有高斯和非高斯似然的各种合成数据和真实数据。 提出一种处理非平稳数据流的无限聚类算法。 Rylan Schaeffer,Gabrielle Kaili-May Liu,Yilun Du,Scott Linderman,Ila Rani Fiete cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mounika Marreddy,Subba Reddy Oota,Lakshmi Sireesha Vakada,Venkata Charan Chinni,Radhika Mamidi
title: Multi-Task Text Classification using Graph Convolutional Networks for Large-Scale Low Resource Language
title_zh: 使用图卷积网络对大规模低资源语言进行多任务文本分类
abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) have achieved state-of-art results on single text classification tasks like sentiment analysis, emotion detection, etc. However, the performance is achieved by testing and reporting on resource-rich languages like English. Applying GCN for multi-task text classification is an unexplored area. Moreover, training a GCN or adopting an English GCN for Indian languages is often limited by data availability, rich morphological variation, syntax, and semantic differences. In this paper, we study the use of GCN for the Telugu language in single and multi-task settings for four natural language processing (NLP) tasks, viz. sentiment analysis (SA), emotion identification (EI), hate-speech (HS), and sarcasm detection (SAR). In order to evaluate the performance of GCN with one of the Indian languages, Telugu, we analyze the GCN based models with extensive experiments on four downstream tasks. In addition, we created an annotated Telugu dataset, TEL-NLP, for the four NLP tasks. Further, we propose a supervised graph reconstruction method, Multi-Task Text GCN (MT-Text GCN) on the Telugu that leverages to simultaneously (i) learn the low-dimensional word and sentence graph embeddings from word-sentence graph reconstruction using graph autoencoder (GAE) and (ii) perform multi-task text classification using these latent sentence graph embeddings. We argue that our proposed MT-Text GCN achieves significant improvements on TEL-NLP over existing Telugu pretrained word embeddings, and multilingual pretrained Transformer models: mBERT, and XLM-R. On TEL-NLP, we achieve a high F1-score for four NLP tasks: SA (0.84), EI (0.55), HS (0.83) and SAR (0.66). Finally, we show our model's quantitative and qualitative analysis on the four NLP tasks in Telugu.
summary: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) have achieved state-of-art results on single text classification tasks like sentiment analysis, emotion detection, etc. However, the performance is achieved by testing and reporting on resource-rich languages like English. Applying GCN for multi-task text classification is an unexplored area. Moreover, training a GCN or adopting an English GCN for Indian languages is often limited by data availability, rich morphological variation, syntax, and semantic differences. In this paper, we study the use of GCN for the Telugu language in single and multi-task settings for four natural language processing (NLP) tasks, viz. sentiment analysis (SA), emotion identification (EI), hate-speech (HS), and sarcasm detection (SAR). In order to evaluate the performance of GCN with one of the Indian languages, Telugu, we analyze the GCN based models with extensive experiments on four downstream tasks. In addition, we created an annotated Telugu dataset, TEL-NLP, for the four NLP tasks. Further, we propose a supervised graph reconstruction method, Multi-Task Text GCN (MT-Text GCN) on the Telugu that leverages to simultaneously (i) learn the low-dimensional word and sentence graph embeddings from word-sentence graph reconstruction using graph autoencoder (GAE) and (ii) perform multi-task text classification using these latent sentence graph embeddings. We argue that our proposed MT-Text GCN achieves significant improvements on TEL-NLP over existing Telugu pretrained word embeddings, and multilingual pretrained Transformer models: mBERT, and XLM-R. On TEL-NLP, we achieve a high F1-score for four NLP tasks: SA (0.84), EI (0.55), HS (0.83) and SAR (0.66). Finally, we show our model's quantitative and qualitative analysis on the four NLP tasks in Telugu.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）在情感分析、情绪检测等单一文本分类任务上取得了最先进的结果。然而，该性能是通过对英语等资源丰富的语言进行测试和报告来实现的。应用 GCN 进行多任务文本分类是一个尚未探索的领域。此外，训练 GCN 或针对印度语言采用英语 GCN 通常受到数据可用性、丰富的形态变化、语法和语义差异的限制。在本文中，我们研究了 GCN 在泰卢固语中在单任务和多任务设置中的四个自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务的使用，即：情感分析 (SA)、情绪识别 (EI)、仇恨言论 (HS) 和讽刺检测 (SAR)。为了评估 GCN 在印度语言之一泰卢固语上的性能，我们通过对四个下游任务的大量实验来分析基于 GCN 的模型。此外，我们还为四个 NLP 任务创建了带注释的泰卢固语数据集 TEL-NLP。此外，我们提出了一种监督图重建方法，即泰卢固语上的多任务文本 GCN（MT-Text GCN），它利用图自动编码器（GAE）同时从词句图重建中学习低维词和句子图嵌入，以及（ii）使用这些潜在句子图嵌入执行多任务文本分类。我们认为，我们提出的 MT-Text GCN 相对于现有的泰卢固语预训练词嵌入和多语言预训练 Transformer 模型（mBERT 和 XLM-R），在 TEL-NLP 上取得了显着改进。在 TEL-NLP 上，我们在四个 NLP 任务上取得了很高的 F1 分数：SA (0.84)、EI (0.55)、HS (0.83) 和 SAR (0.66)。最后，我们展示了我们的模型对泰卢固语四个 NLP 任务的定量和定性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在资源匮乏语言（如泰卢固语）中使用图卷积网络（GCN）进行单任务和多任务文本分类的方法，并提出了多任务文本GCN模型（MT-Text GCN）。
AI.motivation: 现有GCN模型主要在资源丰富的语言（如英语）上测试，而针对低资源语言（如印度语言）的多任务文本分类研究不足，且面临数据稀缺、形态和语义差异等挑战。
AI.method: 提出MT-Text GCN模型，结合图自编码器（GAE）进行词句图重构，生成低维嵌入并用于多任务分类；构建泰卢固语标注数据集TEL-NLP，涵盖情感分析、情绪识别等四类任务。
AI.result: 在TEL-NLP数据集上，MT-Text GCN在四类任务中取得较高F1分数：情感分析（0.84）、情绪识别（0.55）、仇恨言论检测（0.83）、讽刺检测（0.66），优于现有预训练词向量及多语言Transformer模型（如mBERT、XLM-R）。
AI.conclusion: MT-Text GCN在低资源语言多任务文本分类中表现优异，验证了图重构与多任务学习结合的有效性，同时为泰卢固语NLP研究提供了重要数据支持。

authors_text: Jingxing Qian,Veronica Chatrath,Jun Yang,James Servos,Angela P. Schoellig,Steven L. Waslander
title: POCD: Probabilistic Object-Level Change Detection and Volumetric Mapping in Semi-Static Scenes
title_zh: POCD：半静态场景中的概率对象级变化检测和体积映射
comment: Published in Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2022
comments: Published in Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2022
abstract: Maintaining an up-to-date map to reflect recent changes in the scene is very important, particularly in situations involving repeated traversals by a robot operating in an environment over an extended period. Undetected changes may cause a deterioration in map quality, leading to poor localization, inefficient operations, and lost robots. Volumetric methods, such as truncated signed distance functions (TSDFs), have quickly gained traction due to their real-time production of a dense and detailed map, though map updating in scenes that change over time remains a challenge. We propose a framework that introduces a novel probabilistic object state representation to track object pose changes in semi-static scenes. The representation jointly models a stationarity score and a TSDF change measure for each object. A Bayesian update rule that incorporates both geometric and semantic information is derived to achieve consistent online map maintenance. To extensively evaluate our approach alongside the state-of-the-art, we release a novel real-world dataset in a warehouse environment. We also evaluate on the public ToyCar dataset. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the reconstruction quality of semi-static environments.
summary: Maintaining an up-to-date map to reflect recent changes in the scene is very important, particularly in situations involving repeated traversals by a robot operating in an environment over an extended period. Undetected changes may cause a deterioration in map quality, leading to poor localization, inefficient operations, and lost robots. Volumetric methods, such as truncated signed distance functions (TSDFs), have quickly gained traction due to their real-time production of a dense and detailed map, though map updating in scenes that change over time remains a challenge. We propose a framework that introduces a novel probabilistic object state representation to track object pose changes in semi-static scenes. The representation jointly models a stationarity score and a TSDF change measure for each object. A Bayesian update rule that incorporates both geometric and semantic information is derived to achieve consistent online map maintenance. To extensively evaluate our approach alongside the state-of-the-art, we release a novel real-world dataset in a warehouse environment. We also evaluate on the public ToyCar dataset. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the reconstruction quality of semi-static environments.
abstract_zh: 维护最新的地图以反映场景的最新变化非常重要，特别是在涉及机器人在较长时间内在环境中运行的重复遍历的情况下。未被检测到的变化可能会导致地图质量下降，从而导致定位不良、操作效率低下和机器人丢失。体积方法，例如截断符号距离函数（TSDF），由于能够实时生成密集且详细的地图而迅速获得关注，尽管随时间变化的场景中的地图更新仍然是一个挑战。我们提出了一个框架，引入了一种新颖的概率对象状态表示来跟踪半静态场景中的对象姿势变化。该表示联合对每个对象的平稳性得分和 TSDF 变化度量进行建模。推导了结合几何和语义信息的贝叶斯更新规则，以实现一致的在线地图维护。为了广泛评估我们的方法以及最先进的方法，我们在仓库环境中发布了一个新颖的现实世界数据集。我们还对公共 ToyCar 数据集进行评估。我们的方法在半静态环境的重建质量方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于半静态场景的概率对象级变化检测与体素映射框架POCD，以解决机器人长期运行中场景变化导致的地图更新难题。
AI.motivation: 现有体素映射方法（如TSDF）在动态场景中难以有效更新地图，未检测到的变化会导致定位偏差和机器人失效，亟需结合几何与语义信息的新型映射维护方案。
AI.method: 设计概率对象状态表示，联合建模对象静态性评分与TSDF变化量，通过融合几何与语义信息的贝叶斯更新规则实现在线地图维护，并发布仓储环境真实数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在仓储环境数据集和公开ToyCar数据集上，POCD方法在半静态场景的重建质量上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: POCD框架通过概率建模与贝叶斯更新有效解决了半静态场景的动态变化检测与地图维护问题，为长期机器人操作提供了更可靠的地图更新方案。

search_text: POCD: Probabilistic Object-Level Change Detection and Volumetric Mapping in Semi-Static Scenes POCD：半静态场景中的概率对象级变化检测和体积映射 Maintaining an up-to-date map to reflect recent changes in the scene is very important, particularly in situations involving repeated traversals by a robot operating in an environment over an extended period. Undetected changes may cause a deterioration in map quality, leading to poor localization, inefficient operations, and lost robots. Volumetric methods, such as truncated signed distance functions (TSDFs), have quickly gained traction due to their real-time production of a dense and detailed map, though map updating in scenes that change over time remains a challenge. We propose a framework that introduces a novel probabilistic object state representation to track object pose changes in semi-static scenes. The representation jointly models a stationarity score and a TSDF change measure for each object. A Bayesian update rule that incorporates both geometric and semantic information is derived to achieve consistent online map maintenance. To extensively evaluate our approach alongside the state-of-the-art, we release a novel real-world dataset in a warehouse environment. We also evaluate on the public ToyCar dataset. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the reconstruction quality of semi-static environments. 维护最新的地图以反映场景的最新变化非常重要，特别是在涉及机器人在较长时间内在环境中运行的重复遍历的情况下。未被检测到的变化可能会导致地图质量下降，从而导致定位不良、操作效率低下和机器人丢失。体积方法，例如截断符号距离函数（TSDF），由于能够实时生成密集且详细的地图而迅速获得关注，尽管随时间变化的场景中的地图更新仍然是一个挑战。我们提出了一个框架，引入了一种新颖的概率对象状态表示来跟踪半静态场景中的对象姿势变化。该表示联合对每个对象的平稳性得分和 TSDF 变化度量进行建模。推导了结合几何和语义信息的贝叶斯更新规则，以实现一致的在线地图维护。为了广泛评估我们的方法以及最先进的方法，我们在仓库环境中发布了一个新颖的现实世界数据集。我们还对公共 ToyCar 数据集进行评估。我们的方法在半静态环境的重建质量方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种用于半静态场景的概率对象级变化检测与体素映射框架POCD，以解决机器人长期运行中场景变化导致的地图更新难题。 Jingxing Qian,Veronica Chatrath,Jun Yang,James Servos,Angela P. Schoellig,Steven L. Waslander cs.RO

title: NHA12D: A New Pavement Crack Dataset and a Comparison Study Of Crack Detection Algorithms
title_zh: NHA12D：新的路面裂缝数据集及裂缝检测算法的比较研究
abstract: Crack detection plays a key role in automated pavement inspection. Although a large number of algorithms have been developed in recent years to further boost performance, there are still remaining challenges in practice, due to the complexity of pavement images. To further accelerate the development and identify the remaining challenges, this paper conducts a comparison study to evaluate the performance of the state of the art crack detection algorithms quantitatively and objectively. A more comprehensive annotated pavement crack dataset (NHA12D) that contains images with different viewpoints and pavements types is proposed. In the comparison study, crack detection algorithms were trained equally on the largest public crack dataset collected and evaluated on the proposed dataset (NHA12D). Overall, the U-Net model with VGG-16 as backbone has the best all-around performance, but models generally fail to distinguish cracks from concrete joints, leading to a high false-positive rate. It also found that detecting cracks from concrete pavement images still has huge room for improvement. Dataset for concrete pavement images is also missing in the literature. Future directions in this area include filling the gap for concrete pavement images and using domain adaptation techniques to enhance the detection results on unseen datasets.
summary: Crack detection plays a key role in automated pavement inspection. Although a large number of algorithms have been developed in recent years to further boost performance, there are still remaining challenges in practice, due to the complexity of pavement images. To further accelerate the development and identify the remaining challenges, this paper conducts a comparison study to evaluate the performance of the state of the art crack detection algorithms quantitatively and objectively. A more comprehensive annotated pavement crack dataset (NHA12D) that contains images with different viewpoints and pavements types is proposed. In the comparison study, crack detection algorithms were trained equally on the largest public crack dataset collected and evaluated on the proposed dataset (NHA12D). Overall, the U-Net model with VGG-16 as backbone has the best all-around performance, but models generally fail to distinguish cracks from concrete joints, leading to a high false-positive rate. It also found that detecting cracks from concrete pavement images still has huge room for improvement. Dataset for concrete pavement images is also missing in the literature. Future directions in this area include filling the gap for concrete pavement images and using domain adaptation techniques to enhance the detection results on unseen datasets.
abstract_zh: 裂缝检测在自动路面检查中起着关键作用。尽管近年来开发了大量算法来进一步提高性能，但由于路面图像的复杂性，在实践中仍然存在挑战。为了进一步加速发展并确定剩余的挑战，本文进行了比较研究，以定量、客观地评估最先进的裂纹检测算法的性能。提出了一个更全面的带注释的路面裂缝数据集（NHA12D），其中包含具有不同视点和路面类型的图像。在比较研究中，裂纹检测算法在最大的公共裂纹数据集上进行了同等的训练，并在建议的数据集（NHA12D）上进行了评估。总体而言，以VGG-16为骨干的U-Net模型具有最佳的综合性能，但模型通常无法区分裂缝和混凝土接缝，导致误报率较高。研究还发现，从混凝土路面图像中检测裂缝仍有巨大的改进空间。文献中也缺少混凝土路面图像的数据集。该领域的未来方向包括填补混凝土路面图像的空白，并使用域适应技术来增强对未见过的数据集的检测结果。

AI.tldr: 提出新的路面裂缝数据集NHA12D，并对现有裂缝检测算法进行比较研究
AI.motivation: 尽管已有许多算法，但路面图像复杂性导致实际应用中仍存在挑战，需通过比较研究推动发展并识别问题
AI.method: 构建包含多视角和路面类型的NHA12D数据集，使用最大公共数据集训练算法并在NHA12D上评估性能
AI.result: U-Net（VGG-16）综合性能最佳，但普遍无法区分裂缝与混凝土接缝，导致高误报率；混凝土路面检测仍有较大提升空间，相关数据集缺失
AI.conclusion: 需填补混凝土路面图像数据集空白，并利用领域自适应技术提升模型在未见数据集上的检测效果

title: Boosting Video Object Segmentation based on Scale Inconsistency
title_zh: 基于尺度不一致性的增强视频对象分割
abstract: We present a refinement framework to boost the performance of pre-trained semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) models. Our work is based on scale inconsistency, which is motivated by the observation that existing VOS models generate inconsistent predictions from input frames with different sizes. We use the scale inconsistency as a clue to devise a pixel-level attention module that aggregates the advantages of the predictions from different-size inputs. The scale inconsistency is also used to regularize the training based on a pixel-level variance measured by an uncertainty estimation. We further present a self-supervised online adaptation, tailored for test-time optimization, that bootstraps the predictions without ground-truth masks based on the scale inconsistency. Experiments on DAVIS 16 and DAVIS 17 datasets show that our framework can be generically applied to various VOS models and improve their performance.
summary: We present a refinement framework to boost the performance of pre-trained semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) models. Our work is based on scale inconsistency, which is motivated by the observation that existing VOS models generate inconsistent predictions from input frames with different sizes. We use the scale inconsistency as a clue to devise a pixel-level attention module that aggregates the advantages of the predictions from different-size inputs. The scale inconsistency is also used to regularize the training based on a pixel-level variance measured by an uncertainty estimation. We further present a self-supervised online adaptation, tailored for test-time optimization, that bootstraps the predictions without ground-truth masks based on the scale inconsistency. Experiments on DAVIS 16 and DAVIS 17 datasets show that our framework can be generically applied to various VOS models and improve their performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个细化框架来提高预训练的半监督视频对象分割（VOS）模型的性能。我们的工作基于尺度不一致，其动机是观察到现有的 VOS 模型从不同大小的输入帧生成不一致的预测。我们使用尺度不一致作为线索来设计一个像素级注意力模块，该模块聚合了不同大小输入的预测的优势。尺度不一致性还用于根据不确定性估计测量的像素级方差来规范训练。我们进一步提出了一种自我监督的在线适应，专为测试时间优化而定制，它可以根据规模不一致来引导预测，而无需地面真相掩码。在 DAVIS 16 和 DAVIS 17 数据集上的实验表明，我们的框架可以普遍应用于各种 VOS 模型并提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于尺度不一致性的精炼框架，以提升预训练半监督视频对象分割模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频对象分割模型在不同尺寸输入帧上生成预测结果不一致，这一现象被用作改进模型性能的线索。
AI.method: 设计像素级注意力模块聚合多尺度预测优势，并通过不确定性估计的像素方差正则化训练；提出自监督在线适应方法实现测试时优化。
AI.result: 在DAVIS 16和DAVIS 17数据集上验证，框架可通用适配多种VOS模型并提升分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用尺度不一致性改进模型预测一致性，所提框架有效且具有模型通用性。

ai_content_json.method: 设计像素级注意力模块聚合多尺度预测优势，并通过不确定性估计的像素方差正则化训练；提出自监督在线适应方法实现测试时优化。
ai_content_json.result: 在DAVIS 16和DAVIS 17数据集上验证，框架可通用适配多种VOS模型并提升分割性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 利用尺度不一致性改进模型预测一致性，所提框架有效且具有模型通用性。

search_text: Boosting Video Object Segmentation based on Scale Inconsistency 基于尺度不一致性的增强视频对象分割 We present a refinement framework to boost the performance of pre-trained semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) models. Our work is based on scale inconsistency, which is motivated by the observation that existing VOS models generate inconsistent predictions from input frames with different sizes. We use the scale inconsistency as a clue to devise a pixel-level attention module that aggregates the advantages of the predictions from different-size inputs. The scale inconsistency is also used to regularize the training based on a pixel-level variance measured by an uncertainty estimation. We further present a self-supervised online adaptation, tailored for test-time optimization, that bootstraps the predictions without ground-truth masks based on the scale inconsistency. Experiments on DAVIS 16 and DAVIS 17 datasets show that our framework can be generically applied to various VOS models and improve their performance. 我们提出了一个细化框架来提高预训练的半监督视频对象分割（VOS）模型的性能。我们的工作基于尺度不一致，其动机是观察到现有的 VOS 模型从不同大小的输入帧生成不一致的预测。我们使用尺度不一致作为线索来设计一个像素级注意力模块，该模块聚合了不同大小输入的预测的优势。尺度不一致性还用于根据不确定性估计测量的像素级方差来规范训练。我们进一步提出了一种自我监督的在线适应，专为测试时间优化而定制，它可以根据规模不一致来引导预测，而无需地面真相掩码。在 DAVIS 16 和 DAVIS 17 数据集上的实验表明，我们的框架可以普遍应用于各种 VOS 模型并提高其性能。 本文提出一种基于尺度不一致性的精炼框架，以提升预训练半监督视频对象分割模型的性能。 Hengyi Wang,Changjae Oh cs.CV

authors_text: Jakub Gajarský,Lars Jaffke,Paloma T. Lima,Jana Novotná,Marcin Pilipczuk,Paweł Rzążewski,Uéverton S. Souza
title: Taming graphs with no large creatures and skinny ladders
title_zh: 驯服图表，没有大型生物和细长的梯子
abstract: We confirm a conjecture of Gartland and Lokshtanov [arXiv:2007.08761]: if for a hereditary graph class $\mathcal{G}$ there exists a constant $k$ such that no member of $\mathcal{G}$ contains a $k$-creature as an induced subgraph or a $k$-skinny-ladder as an induced minor, then there exists a polynomial $p$ such that every $G \in \mathcal{G}$ contains at most $p(|V(G)|)$ minimal separators. By a result of Fomin, Todinca, and Villanger [SIAM J. Comput. 2015] the latter entails the existence of polynomial-time algorithms for Maximum Weight Independent Set, Feedback Vertex Set and many other problems, when restricted to an input graph from $\mathcal{G}$. Furthermore, as shown by Gartland and Lokshtanov, our result implies a full dichotomy of hereditary graph classes defined by a finite set of forbidden induced subgraphs into tame (admitting a polynomial bound of the number of minimal separators) and feral (containing infinitely many graphs with exponential number of minimal separators).
summary: We confirm a conjecture of Gartland and Lokshtanov [arXiv:2007.08761]: if for a hereditary graph class $\mathcal{G}$ there exists a constant $k$ such that no member of $\mathcal{G}$ contains a $k$-creature as an induced subgraph or a $k$-skinny-ladder as an induced minor, then there exists a polynomial $p$ such that every $G \in \mathcal{G}$ contains at most $p(|V(G)|)$ minimal separators. By a result of Fomin, Todinca, and Villanger [SIAM J. Comput. 2015] the latter entails the existence of polynomial-time algorithms for Maximum Weight Independent Set, Feedback Vertex Set and many other problems, when restricted to an input graph from $\mathcal{G}$. Furthermore, as shown by Gartland and Lokshtanov, our result implies a full dichotomy of hereditary graph classes defined by a finite set of forbidden induced subgraphs into tame (admitting a polynomial bound of the number of minimal separators) and feral (containing infinitely many graphs with exponential number of minimal separators).
abstract_zh: 我们证实了 Gartland 和 Lokshtanov 的猜想 [arXiv:2007.08761]：如果对于遗传图类 $\mathcal{G}$ 存在一个常量 $k$，使得 $\mathcal{G}$ 中没有成员包含 $k$-creature 作为诱导子图或 $k$-skinny-ladder 作为诱导子图，那么存在一个多项式 $p$，使得每个 $G \in \mathcal{G}$ 最多包含 $p(|V(G)|)$ 个最小分隔符。 Fomin、Todinca 和 Villanger 的结果 [SIAM J. Comput。 2015]当限制于$\mathcal{G}$的输入图时，后者需要存在最大权重独立集、反馈顶点集和许多其他问题的多项式时间算法。此外，正如 Gartland 和 Lokshtanov 所示，我们的结果意味着由一组有限的禁止诱导子图定义的遗传图类的完全二分法为驯服（承认最小分隔符数量的多项式界限）和野性（包含无限多个具有指数数量的最小分隔符的图）。

AI.tldr: 该论文证实了一个关于遗传图类的猜想，即若图类中不包含特定结构（k-creature和k-skinny-ladder），则其最小分隔符数量具有多项式上界。
AI.motivation: 研究遗传图类的结构特性，以确定其算法复杂性并建立多项式时间算法的适用范围。
AI.method: 结合图论中的分隔符理论与已知结果，通过分析禁止子图的结构特性证明猜想。
AI.result: 确认了Gartland和Lokshtanov的猜想，证明此类图类的最小分隔符数量满足多项式上界，并推导出多项式时间算法的存在性。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为遗传图类划分了'驯服'与'野性'的二分法，明确了禁止子图条件对算法效率的关键影响。

authors_text: Alexander L. Mitchell,Wolfgang Merkt,Mathieu Geisert,Siddhant Gangapurwala,Martin Engelcke,Oiwi Parker Jones,Ioannis Havoutis,Ingmar Posner
title: VAE-Loco: Versatile Quadruped Locomotion by Learning a Disentangled Gait Representation
title_zh: VAE-Loco：通过学习解缠结步态表示实现多功能四足运动
comment: 16 pages, 13 figures, 1 table, accepted by IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO) as an extended paper. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.04809
comments: 16 pages, 13 figures, 1 table, accepted by IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO) as an extended paper. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.04809
abstract: Quadruped locomotion is rapidly maturing to a degree where robots are able to realise highly dynamic manoeuvres. However, current planners are unable to vary key gait parameters of the in-swing feet midair. In this work we address this limitation and show that it is pivotal in increasing controller robustness by learning a latent space capturing the key stance phases constituting a particular gait. This is achieved via a generative model trained on a single trot style, which encourages disentanglement such that application of a drive signal to a single dimension of the latent state induces holistic plans synthesising a continuous variety of trot styles. We demonstrate that specific properties of the drive signal map directly to gait parameters such as cadence, footstep height and full stance duration. Due to the nature of our approach these synthesised gaits are continuously variable online during robot operation. The use of a generative model facilitates the detection and mitigation of disturbances to provide a versatile and robust planning framework. We evaluate our approach on two versions of the real ANYmal quadruped robots and demonstrate that our method achieves a continuous blend of dynamic trot styles whilst being robust and reactive to external perturbations.
summary: Quadruped locomotion is rapidly maturing to a degree where robots are able to realise highly dynamic manoeuvres. However, current planners are unable to vary key gait parameters of the in-swing feet midair. In this work we address this limitation and show that it is pivotal in increasing controller robustness by learning a latent space capturing the key stance phases constituting a particular gait. This is achieved via a generative model trained on a single trot style, which encourages disentanglement such that application of a drive signal to a single dimension of the latent state induces holistic plans synthesising a continuous variety of trot styles. We demonstrate that specific properties of the drive signal map directly to gait parameters such as cadence, footstep height and full stance duration. Due to the nature of our approach these synthesised gaits are continuously variable online during robot operation. The use of a generative model facilitates the detection and mitigation of disturbances to provide a versatile and robust planning framework. We evaluate our approach on two versions of the real ANYmal quadruped robots and demonstrate that our method achieves a continuous blend of dynamic trot styles whilst being robust and reactive to external perturbations.
abstract_zh: 四足运动正在迅速成熟，机器人能够实现高度动态的机动。然而，当前的规划者无法改变空中摆动脚的关键步态参数。在这项工作中，我们解决了这一限制，并表明通过学习捕获构成特定步态的关键站立阶段的潜在空间，这对于提高控制器鲁棒性至关重要。这是通过在单一小跑风格上训练的生成模型来实现的，该模型鼓励解开，从而将驱动信号应用于潜在状态的单一维度，从而诱导综合连续各种小跑风格的整体计划。我们证明了驱动信号的特定属性直接映射到步态参数，例如步频、脚步高度和全站立持续时间。由于我们方法的性质，这些合成步态在机器人操作期间在线连续变化。生成模型的使用有助于检测和减轻干扰，从而提供通用且稳健的规划框架。我们在两个版本的真实 ANYmal 四足机器人上评估了我们的方法，并证明我们的方法实现了动态小跑风格的连续混合，同时对外部扰动具有鲁棒性和反应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VAE-Loco方法，通过学习解耦的步态表示，实现四足机器人多样化动态步态的在线连续调整。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人步态规划器无法在空中调整摆动腿的关键步态参数，限制了控制器鲁棒性。需要一种能捕捉步态核心支撑阶段特征的学习框架。
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器（VAE）构建生成模型，通过单种对角步态训练实现潜在空间解耦，驱动信号作用于潜在空间单维度可生成连续步态变化，支持在线实时调整。
AI.result: 在真实ANYmal机器人上验证，方法实现了动态对角步态的连续混合，并在外部扰动下保持鲁棒性和反应能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习解耦的步态潜在表示，该方法为四足机器人提供了灵活的规划框架，显著提升了动态运动能力和环境适应性。

The use of a generative model facilitates the detection and mitigation of disturbances to provide a versatile and robust planning framework. Mitchell,Wolfgang Merkt,Mathieu Geisert,Siddhant Gangapurwala,Martin Engelcke,Oiwi Parker Jones,Ioannis Havoutis,Ingmar Posner cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Jim James,Nathan Pruyne,Tiberiu Stan,Marcus Schwarting,Jiwon Yeom,Seungbum Hong,Peter Voorhees,Ben Blaiszik,Ian Foster
title: 3D Convolutional Neural Networks for Dendrite Segmentation Using Fine-Tuning and Hyperparameter Optimization
title_zh: 使用微调和超参数优化进行树突分割的 3D 卷积神经网络
abstract: Dendritic microstructures are ubiquitous in nature and are the primary solidification morphologies in metallic materials. Techniques such as x-ray computed tomography (XCT) have provided new insights into dendritic phase transformation phenomena. However, manual identification of dendritic morphologies in microscopy data can be both labor intensive and potentially ambiguous. The analysis of 3D datasets is particularly challenging due to their large sizes (terabytes) and the presence of artifacts scattered within the imaged volumes. In this study, we trained 3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to segment 3D datasets. Three CNN architectures were investigated, including a new 3D version of FCDense. We show that using hyperparameter optimization (HPO) and fine-tuning techniques, both 2D and 3D CNN architectures can be trained to outperform the previous state of the art. The 3D U-Net architecture trained in this study produced the best segmentations according to quantitative metrics (pixel-wise accuracy of 99.84% and a boundary displacement error of 0.58 pixels), while 3D FCDense produced the smoothest boundaries and best segmentations according to visual inspection. The trained 3D CNNs are able to segment entire 852 x 852 x 250 voxel 3D volumes in only ~60 seconds, thus hastening the progress towards a deeper understanding of phase transformation phenomena such as dendritic solidification.
summary: Dendritic microstructures are ubiquitous in nature and are the primary solidification morphologies in metallic materials. Techniques such as x-ray computed tomography (XCT) have provided new insights into dendritic phase transformation phenomena. However, manual identification of dendritic morphologies in microscopy data can be both labor intensive and potentially ambiguous. The analysis of 3D datasets is particularly challenging due to their large sizes (terabytes) and the presence of artifacts scattered within the imaged volumes. In this study, we trained 3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to segment 3D datasets. Three CNN architectures were investigated, including a new 3D version of FCDense. We show that using hyperparameter optimization (HPO) and fine-tuning techniques, both 2D and 3D CNN architectures can be trained to outperform the previous state of the art. The 3D U-Net architecture trained in this study produced the best segmentations according to quantitative metrics (pixel-wise accuracy of 99.84% and a boundary displacement error of 0.58 pixels), while 3D FCDense produced the smoothest boundaries and best segmentations according to visual inspection. The trained 3D CNNs are able to segment entire 852 x 852 x 250 voxel 3D volumes in only ~60 seconds, thus hastening the progress towards a deeper understanding of phase transformation phenomena such as dendritic solidification.
abstract_zh: 枝晶微观结构在自然界中普遍存在，是金属材料的主要凝固形态。 X 射线计算机断层扫描 (XCT) 等技术为树枝状相变现象提供了新的见解。然而，手动识别显微镜数据中的树突形态既费力又可能不明确。 3D 数据集的分析特别具有挑战性，因为它们的尺寸很大（TB 级）并且存在散布在成像体积内的伪影。在本研究中，我们训练 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来分割 3D 数据集。研究了三种 CNN 架构，包括新的 3D 版本的 FCDense。我们证明，使用超参数优化 (HPO) 和微调技术，2D 和 3D CNN 架构都可以经过训练，以超越之前的最先进技术。本研究中训练的 3D U-Net 架构根据定量指标产生了最佳分割（像素精度为 99.84%，边界位移误差为 0.58 像素），而 3D FCDense 根据视觉检查产生了最平滑的边界和最佳分割。经过训练的 3D CNN 能够在大约 60 秒内分割整个 852 x 852 x 250 体素 3D 体积，从而加快对枝晶凝固等相变现象的深入理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用3D卷积神经网络（CNN）结合超参数优化和微调技术，对三维显微数据中的树突结构进行分割。
AI.motivation: 传统手动识别树突形态耗时且易产生歧义，而三维数据集因体积庞大和存在伪影导致分析困难，亟需自动化分割方法。
AI.method: 研究训练了三种3D CNN架构（包括新型3D FCDense），通过超参数优化和微调技术提升模型性能，并对比了2D和3D模型的分割效果。
AI.result: 3D U-Net在定量指标上表现最佳（像素级准确率99.84%，边界位移误差0.58像素），3D FCDense在视觉检验中边界最平滑；模型可处理852x852x250体素数据，仅需约60秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化和微调显著超越现有技术，为相变现象（如树突凝固）的深入研究提供了高效工具。

title: The Theory of Artificial Immutability: Protecting Algorithmic Groups Under Anti-Discrimination Law
title_zh: 人工不变性理论：在反歧视法下保护算法群体
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to make important decisions about people. While issues of AI bias and proxy discrimination are well explored, less focus has been paid to the harms created by profiling based on groups that do not map to or correlate with legally protected groups such as sex or ethnicity. This raises a question: are existing equality laws able to protect against emergent AI-driven inequality? This article examines the legal status of algorithmic groups in North American and European non-discrimination doctrine, law, and jurisprudence and will show that algorithmic groups are not comparable to traditional protected groups. Nonetheless, these new groups are worthy of protection. I propose a new theory of harm - "the theory of artificial immutability" - that aims to bring AI groups within the scope of the law. My theory describes how algorithmic groups act as de facto immutable characteristics in practice that limit people's autonomy and prevent them from achieving important goals.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to make important decisions about people. While issues of AI bias and proxy discrimination are well explored, less focus has been paid to the harms created by profiling based on groups that do not map to or correlate with legally protected groups such as sex or ethnicity. This raises a question: are existing equality laws able to protect against emergent AI-driven inequality? This article examines the legal status of algorithmic groups in North American and European non-discrimination doctrine, law, and jurisprudence and will show that algorithmic groups are not comparable to traditional protected groups. Nonetheless, these new groups are worthy of protection. I propose a new theory of harm - "the theory of artificial immutability" - that aims to bring AI groups within the scope of the law. My theory describes how algorithmic groups act as de facto immutable characteristics in practice that limit people's autonomy and prevent them from achieving important goals.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 越来越多地用于做出与人有关的重要决策。虽然人工智能偏见和代理歧视问题得到了很好的探讨，但很少有人关注基于与性别或种族等受法律保护的群体不映射或不相关的群体进行分析所造成的危害。这就提出了一个问题：现有的平等法是否能够防止人工智能驱动的不平等现象出现？本文探讨了算法群体在北美和欧洲非歧视原则、法律和判例中的法律地位，并将表明算法群体与传统的受保护群体没有可比性。尽管如此，这些新群体还是值得保护的。我提出了一种新的危害理论——“人工不变性理论”——旨在将人工智能团体纳入法律范围内。我的理论描述了算法群体如何在实践中充当事实上的不可变特征，限制人们的自主权并阻止他们实现重要目标。

AI.tldr: 探讨现有反歧视法律对算法群体的保护不足，并提出‘人工不可变性理论’以填补法律空白。
AI.motivation: 现有反歧视法律未充分应对AI算法分组导致的新型不平等，需新理论保护算法群体。
AI.method: 通过分析北美和欧洲的反歧视法律、学说及判例，比较算法群体与传统受保护群体的法律地位差异。
AI.result: 发现算法群体不同于传统受保护群体，但需保护，提出‘人工不可变性理论’作为法律依据。
AI.conclusion: 现有法律无法有效应对AI驱动的不平等，需通过‘人工不可变性理论’扩展反歧视法律保护范围。

title: Saliency map using features derived from spiking neural networks of primate visual cortex
title_zh: 使用源自灵长类视觉皮层尖峰神经网络的特征的显着性图
abstract: We propose a framework inspired by biological vision systems to produce saliency maps of digital images. Well-known computational models for receptive fields of areas in the visual cortex that are specialized for color and orientation perception are used. To model the connectivity between these areas we use the CARLsim library which is a spiking neural network(SNN) simulator. The spikes generated by CARLsim, then serve as extracted features and input to our saliency detection algorithm. This new method of saliency detection is described and applied to benchmark images.
summary: We propose a framework inspired by biological vision systems to produce saliency maps of digital images. Well-known computational models for receptive fields of areas in the visual cortex that are specialized for color and orientation perception are used. To model the connectivity between these areas we use the CARLsim library which is a spiking neural network(SNN) simulator. The spikes generated by CARLsim, then serve as extracted features and input to our saliency detection algorithm. This new method of saliency detection is described and applied to benchmark images.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个受生物视觉系统启发的框架，用于生成数字图像的显着性图。使用众所周知的计算模型来计算视觉皮层中专门用于颜色和方向感知的区域的感受野。为了对这些区域之间的连接进行建模，我们使用 CARLsim 库，它是一个尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 模拟器。 CARLsim 生成的尖峰随后用作提取的特征并输入到我们的显着性检测算法。描述了这种新的显着性检测方法并将其应用于基准图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受生物视觉系统启发的显著性图生成框架，利用脉冲神经网络模拟灵长类动物视觉皮层结构，提取特征用于数字图像显著性检测。
AI.motivation: 传统显著性检测方法难以准确模拟生物视觉机制，而生物启发的计算模型可能更符合人类视觉感知规律，从而提升检测效果。
AI.method: 采用CARLsim库构建脉冲神经网络，模拟视觉皮层中颜色与方向感知区域的连接关系，通过生成的脉冲信号提取图像特征并输入显著性检测算法。
AI.result: 新方法在基准图像测试中验证了有效性，表明基于生物机制的特征提取能提升显著性检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合生物视觉皮层结构与计算模型的显著性检测方法展现出潜力，为计算机视觉提供了新的研究方向。

search_text: Saliency map using features derived from spiking neural networks of primate visual cortex 使用源自灵长类视觉皮层尖峰神经网络的特征的显着性图 We propose a framework inspired by biological vision systems to produce saliency maps of digital images. Well-known computational models for receptive fields of areas in the visual cortex that are specialized for color and orientation perception are used. To model the connectivity between these areas we use the CARLsim library which is a spiking neural network(SNN) simulator. The spikes generated by CARLsim, then serve as extracted features and input to our saliency detection algorithm. This new method of saliency detection is described and applied to benchmark images. 我们提出了一个受生物视觉系统启发的框架，用于生成数字图像的显着性图。使用众所周知的计算模型来计算视觉皮层中专门用于颜色和方向感知的区域的感受野。为了对这些区域之间的连接进行建模，我们使用 CARLsim 库，它是一个尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 模拟器。 CARLsim 生成的尖峰随后用作提取的特征并输入到我们的显着性检测算法。描述了这种新的显着性检测方法并将其应用于基准图像。 本文提出一种受生物视觉系统启发的显著性图生成框架，利用脉冲神经网络模拟灵长类动物视觉皮层结构，提取特征用于数字图像显著性检测。 Reza Hojjaty Saeedy,Richard A. Messner cs.CV

authors_text: Monika Henzinger,Charlotte Peale,Omer Reingold,Judy Hanwen Shen
title: Leximax Approximations and Representative Cohort Selection
title_zh: Leximax 近似和代表性队列选择
comment: 27 pages. Shortened version to appear in FORC 2022
comments: 27 pages. Shortened version to appear in FORC 2022
abstract: Finding a representative cohort from a broad pool of candidates is a goal that arises in many contexts such as choosing governing committees and consumer panels. While there are many ways to define the degree to which a cohort represents a population, a very appealing solution concept is lexicographic maximality (leximax) which offers a natural (pareto-optimal like) interpretation that the utility of no population can be increased without decreasing the utility of a population that is already worse off. However, finding a leximax solution can be highly dependent on small variations in the utility of certain groups. In this work, we explore new notions of approximate leximax solutions with three distinct motivations: better algorithmic efficiency, exploiting significant utility improvements, and robustness to noise. Among other definitional contributions, we give a new notion of an approximate leximax that satisfies a similarly appealing semantic interpretation and relate it to algorithmically-feasible approximate leximax notions. When group utilities are linear over cohort candidates, we give an efficient polynomial-time algorithm for finding a leximax distribution over cohort candidates in the exact as well as in the approximate setting. Furthermore, we show that finding an integer solution to leximax cohort selection with linear utilities is NP-Hard.
summary: Finding a representative cohort from a broad pool of candidates is a goal that arises in many contexts such as choosing governing committees and consumer panels. While there are many ways to define the degree to which a cohort represents a population, a very appealing solution concept is lexicographic maximality (leximax) which offers a natural (pareto-optimal like) interpretation that the utility of no population can be increased without decreasing the utility of a population that is already worse off. However, finding a leximax solution can be highly dependent on small variations in the utility of certain groups. In this work, we explore new notions of approximate leximax solutions with three distinct motivations: better algorithmic efficiency, exploiting significant utility improvements, and robustness to noise. Among other definitional contributions, we give a new notion of an approximate leximax that satisfies a similarly appealing semantic interpretation and relate it to algorithmically-feasible approximate leximax notions. When group utilities are linear over cohort candidates, we give an efficient polynomial-time algorithm for finding a leximax distribution over cohort candidates in the exact as well as in the approximate setting. Furthermore, we show that finding an integer solution to leximax cohort selection with linear utilities is NP-Hard.
abstract_zh: 从广泛的候选人中找到具有代表性的群体是在许多情况下都会出现的目标，例如选择管理委员会和消费者小组。虽然有很多方法可以定义一个群体代表一个群体的程度，但一个非常有吸引力的解决方案概念是词典编纂最大化（leximax），它提供了一种自然的（类似帕累托最优的）解释，即在不降低已经状况不佳的群体的效用的情况下，任何群体的效用都无法增加。然而，找到最大词典解可能高度依赖于某些群体效用的微小变化。在这项工作中，我们探索近似词法最大解的新概念，具有三个不同的动机：更好的算法效率、利用显着的效用改进以及对噪声的鲁棒性。在其他定义贡献中，我们给出了近似词汇最大的新概念，它满足类似的吸引人的语义解释，并将其与算法上可行的近似词汇最大概念联系起来。当群组效用在队列候选者上呈线性时，我们给出了一种有效的多项式时间算法，用于在精确和近似设置中找到队列候选者上的词汇最大分布。此外，我们表明，使用线性效用找到 lexmax 队列选择的整数解是 NP 困难的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过近似字典序极大化（leximax）方法，从候选群体中选出具有代表性的小组，并探讨其算法效率与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 精确leximax解对群体效用的小幅波动敏感，需通过近似方法提升计算效率、利用显著效用改进并增强噪声鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出新的近似leximax定义，关联可计算近似概念；在群体效用线性时，设计多项式时间算法求解精确及近似leximax分布。
AI.result: 实现线性效用下leximax分布的高效算法，证明整数解的leximax群体选择问题为NP难。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在保持语义合理性的同时提升计算可行性，但整数解的计算复杂性表明需权衡近似与精确需求。

search_text: Leximax Approximations and Representative Cohort Selection Leximax 近似和代表性队列选择 Finding a representative cohort from a broad pool of candidates is a goal that arises in many contexts such as choosing governing committees and consumer panels. While there are many ways to define the degree to which a cohort represents a population, a very appealing solution concept is lexicographic maximality (leximax) which offers a natural (pareto-optimal like) interpretation that the utility of no population can be increased without decreasing the utility of a population that is already worse off. However, finding a leximax solution can be highly dependent on small variations in the utility of certain groups. In this work, we explore new notions of approximate leximax solutions with three distinct motivations: better algorithmic efficiency, exploiting significant utility improvements, and robustness to noise. Among other definitional contributions, we give a new notion of an approximate leximax that satisfies a similarly appealing semantic interpretation and relate it to algorithmically-feasible approximate leximax notions. When group utilities are linear over cohort candidates, we give an efficient polynomial-time algorithm for finding a leximax distribution over cohort candidates in the exact as well as in the approximate setting. title: SELC: Self-Ensemble Label Correction Improves Learning with Noisy Labels
title_zh: SELC：自集成标签校正改进了噪声标签的学习
abstract: Deep neural networks are prone to overfitting noisy labels, resulting in poor generalization performance. To overcome this problem, we present a simple and effective method self-ensemble label correction (SELC) to progressively correct noisy labels and refine the model. We look deeper into the memorization behavior in training with noisy labels and observe that the network outputs are reliable in the early stage. To retain this reliable knowledge, SELC uses ensemble predictions formed by an exponential moving average of network outputs to update the original noisy labels. We show that training with SELC refines the model by gradually reducing supervision from noisy labels and increasing supervision from ensemble predictions. Despite its simplicity, compared with many state-of-the-art methods, SELC obtains more promising and stable results in the presence of class-conditional, instance-dependent, and real-world label noise. The code is available at https://github.com/MacLLL/SELC.
summary: Deep neural networks are prone to overfitting noisy labels, resulting in poor generalization performance. To overcome this problem, we present a simple and effective method self-ensemble label correction (SELC) to progressively correct noisy labels and refine the model. We look deeper into the memorization behavior in training with noisy labels and observe that the network outputs are reliable in the early stage. To retain this reliable knowledge, SELC uses ensemble predictions formed by an exponential moving average of network outputs to update the original noisy labels. We show that training with SELC refines the model by gradually reducing supervision from noisy labels and increasing supervision from ensemble predictions. Despite its simplicity, compared with many state-of-the-art methods, SELC obtains more promising and stable results in the presence of class-conditional, instance-dependent, and real-world label noise. The code is available at https://github.com/MacLLL/SELC.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络容易过度拟合噪声标签，导致泛化性能较差。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种简单有效的方法自集成标签校正（SELC）来逐步校正噪声标签并细化模型。我们更深入地研究了带有噪声标签的训练中的记忆行为，并观察到网络输出在早期阶段是可靠的。为了保留这些可靠的知识，SELC 使用由网络输出的指数移动平均值形成的整体预测来更新原始的噪声标签。我们表明，SELC 训练通过逐渐减少噪声标签的监督并增加集成预测的监督来完善模型。尽管它很简单，但与许多最先进的方法相比，SELC 在存在类条件、实例相关和现实世界标签噪声的情况下获得了更有希望和稳定的结果。该代码可从 https://github.com/MacLLL/SELC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SELC的自集成标签校正方法，用于改进存在噪声标签的深度学习模型的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在存在噪声标签时容易过拟合，导致泛化性能下降，因此需要一种有效的方法来逐步校正噪声标签。
AI.method: SELC通过指数移动平均网络输出生成集成预测，利用训练早期阶段网络输出的可靠性逐步更新原始噪声标签，减少对噪声标签的依赖。
AI.result: 与许多最先进方法相比，SELC在类别条件噪声、实例相关噪声和现实世界噪声场景下均表现出更优且稳定的性能。
AI.conclusion: SELC是一种简单有效的标签校正方法，通过自集成策略显著提升了噪声标签下的模型学习效果。

search_text: SELC: Self-Ensemble Label Correction Improves Learning with Noisy Labels SELC：自集成标签校正改进了噪声标签的学习 Deep neural networks are prone to overfitting noisy labels, resulting in poor generalization performance. To overcome this problem, we present a simple and effective method self-ensemble label correction (SELC) to progressively correct noisy labels and refine the model. We look deeper into the memorization behavior in training with noisy labels and observe that the network outputs are reliable in the early stage. To retain this reliable knowledge, SELC uses ensemble predictions formed by an exponential moving average of network outputs to update the original noisy labels. We show that training with SELC refines the model by gradually reducing supervision from noisy labels and increasing supervision from ensemble predictions. Despite its simplicity, compared with many state-of-the-art methods, SELC obtains more promising and stable results in the presence of class-conditional, instance-dependent, and real-world label noise. The code is available at https://github.com/MacLLL/SELC. 深度神经网络容易过度拟合噪声标签，导致泛化性能较差。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种简单有效的方法自集成标签校正（SELC）来逐步校正噪声标签并细化模型。我们更深入地研究了带有噪声标签的训练中的记忆行为，并观察到网络输出在早期阶段是可靠的。为了保留这些可靠的知识，SELC 使用由网络输出的指数移动平均值形成的整体预测来更新原始的噪声标签。我们表明，SELC 训练通过逐渐减少噪声标签的监督并增加集成预测的监督来完善模型。尽管它很简单，但与许多最先进的方法相比，SELC 在存在类条件、实例相关和现实世界标签噪声的情况下获得了更有希望和稳定的结果。该代码可从 https://github.com/MacLLL/SELC 获取。 本文提出了一种名为SELC的自集成标签校正方法，用于改进存在噪声标签的深度学习模型的泛化性能。 Yangdi Lu,Wenbo He cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Emotion-Controllable Generalized Talking Face Generation
title_zh: 情绪可控的广义说话人脸生成
abstract: Despite the significant progress in recent years, very few of the AI-based talking face generation methods attempt to render natural emotions. Moreover, the scope of the methods is majorly limited to the characteristics of the training dataset, hence they fail to generalize to arbitrary unseen faces. In this paper, we propose a one-shot facial geometry-aware emotional talking face generation method that can generalize to arbitrary faces. We propose a graph convolutional neural network that uses speech content feature, along with an independent emotion input to generate emotion and speech-induced motion on facial geometry-aware landmark representation. This representation is further used in our optical flow-guided texture generation network for producing the texture. We propose a two-branch texture generation network, with motion and texture branches designed to consider the motion and texture content independently. Compared to the previous emotion talking face methods, our method can adapt to arbitrary faces captured in-the-wild by fine-tuning with only a single image of the target identity in neutral emotion.
summary: Despite the significant progress in recent years, very few of the AI-based talking face generation methods attempt to render natural emotions. Moreover, the scope of the methods is majorly limited to the characteristics of the training dataset, hence they fail to generalize to arbitrary unseen faces. In this paper, we propose a one-shot facial geometry-aware emotional talking face generation method that can generalize to arbitrary faces. We propose a graph convolutional neural network that uses speech content feature, along with an independent emotion input to generate emotion and speech-induced motion on facial geometry-aware landmark representation. This representation is further used in our optical flow-guided texture generation network for producing the texture. We propose a two-branch texture generation network, with motion and texture branches designed to consider the motion and texture content independently. Compared to the previous emotion talking face methods, our method can adapt to arbitrary faces captured in-the-wild by fine-tuning with only a single image of the target identity in neutral emotion.
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来取得了重大进展，但基于人工智能的说话脸部生成方法很少尝试呈现自然情绪。此外，这些方法的范围主要限于训练数据集的特征，因此它们无法泛化到任意未见过的面孔。在本文中，我们提出了一种一次性面部几何感知的情感说话面部生成方法，可以推广到任意面部。我们提出了一种图卷积神经网络，它使用语音内容特征以及独立的情感输入来在面部几何感知的地标表示上生成情感和语音引起的运动。这种表示形式进一步用于我们的光流引导纹理生成网络来生成纹理。我们提出了一个两分支纹理生成网络，其中运动和纹理分支被设计为独立考虑运动和纹理内容。与之前的情绪说话面部方法相比，我们的方法可以通过仅使用中性情绪中目标身份的单个图像进行微调来适应在野外捕获的任意面部。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可控制情感且能泛化到任意人脸的 talking face 生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的 talking face 缺乏自然情感表达，且难以泛化到训练数据外的任意人脸。
AI.method: 设计图卷积网络结合语音特征与独立情感输入，生成面部几何感知的地标表示，并通过光流引导的双分支网络生成纹理。
AI.result: 方法仅需目标人脸的单张中性表情图像即可微调，实现对任意野外人脸的情感可控 talking face 生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了情感表达与跨人脸泛化问题，优于传统 talking face 生成技术。

title: Cost-Aware Evaluation and Model Scaling for LiDAR-Based 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测的成本感知评估和模型扩展
abstract: Considerable research effort has been devoted to LiDAR-based 3D object detection and empirical performance has been significantly improved. While progress has been encouraging, we observe an overlooked issue: it is not yet common practice to compare different 3D detectors under the same cost, e.g., inference latency. This makes it difficult to quantify the true performance gain brought by recently proposed architecture designs. The goal of this work is to conduct a cost-aware evaluation of LiDAR-based 3D object detectors. Specifically, we focus on SECOND, a simple grid-based one-stage detector, and analyze its performance under different costs by scaling its original architecture. Then we compare the family of scaled SECOND with recent 3D detection methods, such as Voxel R-CNN and PV-RCNN++. The results are surprising. We find that, if allowed to use the same latency, SECOND can match the performance of PV-RCNN++, the current state-of-the-art method on the Waymo Open Dataset. Scaled SECOND also easily outperforms many recent 3D detection methods published during the past year. We recommend future research control the inference cost in their empirical comparison and include the family of scaled SECOND as a strong baseline when presenting novel 3D detection methods.
summary: Considerable research effort has been devoted to LiDAR-based 3D object detection and empirical performance has been significantly improved. While progress has been encouraging, we observe an overlooked issue: it is not yet common practice to compare different 3D detectors under the same cost, e.g., inference latency. This makes it difficult to quantify the true performance gain brought by recently proposed architecture designs. The goal of this work is to conduct a cost-aware evaluation of LiDAR-based 3D object detectors. Specifically, we focus on SECOND, a simple grid-based one-stage detector, and analyze its performance under different costs by scaling its original architecture. Then we compare the family of scaled SECOND with recent 3D detection methods, such as Voxel R-CNN and PV-RCNN++. The results are surprising. We find that, if allowed to use the same latency, SECOND can match the performance of PV-RCNN++, the current state-of-the-art method on the Waymo Open Dataset. Scaled SECOND also easily outperforms many recent 3D detection methods published during the past year. We recommend future research control the inference cost in their empirical comparison and include the family of scaled SECOND as a strong baseline when presenting novel 3D detection methods.
abstract_zh: 基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测投入了大量的研究工作，并且经验性能得到了显着提高。虽然进展令人鼓舞，但我们观察到一个被忽视的问题：在相同成本（例如推理延迟）下比较不同 3D 检测器尚不常见。这使得量化最近提出的架构设计带来的真实性能增益变得困难。这项工作的目标是对基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测器进行成本意识评估。具体来说，我们关注 SECOND，一种简单的基于网格的单级检测器，并通过扩展其原始架构来分析其在不同成本下的性能。然后我们将缩放的 SECOND 系列与最新的 3D 检测方法（例如 Voxel R-CNN 和 PV-RCNN++）进行比较。结果令人惊讶。我们发现，如果允许使用相同的延迟，SECOND 可以与 PV-RCNN++（Waymo 开放数据集上当前最先进的方法）的性能相匹配。 Scaled SECOND 的性能也轻松优于去年发布的许多最新 3D 检测方法。我们建议未来的研究在实证比较中控制推理成本，并在提出新颖的 3D 检测方法时将缩放的 SECOND 系列作为强有力的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在对基于LiDAR的3D目标检测器进行成本感知评估，并通过扩展SECOND检测器的架构进行比较。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于LiDAR的3D目标检测方法在性能上有了显著提升，但目前缺乏在相同成本（如推理延迟）下对不同检测器的比较，这使得难以量化新架构设计的实际性能提升。
AI.method: 本文聚焦于SECOND检测器，通过扩展其原始架构，在不同成本下评估其性能，并与Voxel R-CNN和PV-RCNN++等最新方法进行比较。
AI.result: 结果表明，在相同延迟下，扩展的SECOND检测器能够达到与当前最先进的PV-RCNN++方法相当的性能，且显著优于过去一年中许多其他3D检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文建议未来的研究应在实验对比中控制推理成本，并将扩展的SECOND检测器作为强基线纳入新型3D检测方法的展示中。

authors_text: Tingyu Fan,Linyao Gao,Yiling Xu,Zhu Li,Dong Wang
title: D-DPCC: Deep Dynamic Point Cloud Compression via 3D Motion Prediction
title_zh: D-DPCC：通过 3D 运动预测进行深度动态点云压缩
abstract: The non-uniformly distributed nature of the 3D dynamic point cloud (DPC) brings significant challenges to its high-efficient inter-frame compression. This paper proposes a novel 3D sparse convolution-based Deep Dynamic Point Cloud Compression (D-DPCC) network to compensate and compress the DPC geometry with 3D motion estimation and motion compensation in the feature space. In the proposed D-DPCC network, we design a {\it Multi-scale Motion Fusion} (MMF) module to accurately estimate the 3D optical flow between the feature representations of adjacent point cloud frames. Specifically, we utilize a 3D sparse convolution-based encoder to obtain the latent representation for motion estimation in the feature space and introduce the proposed MMF module for fused 3D motion embedding. Besides, for motion compensation, we propose a 3D {\it Adaptively Weighted Interpolation} (3DAWI) algorithm with a penalty coefficient to adaptively decrease the impact of distant neighbors. We compress the motion embedding and the residual with a lossy autoencoder-based network. To our knowledge, this paper is the first work proposing an end-to-end deep dynamic point cloud compression framework. The experimental result shows that the proposed D-DPCC framework achieves an average 76\% BD-Rate (Bjontegaard Delta Rate) gains against state-of-the-art Video-based Point Cloud Compression (V-PCC) v13 in inter mode.
summary: The non-uniformly distributed nature of the 3D dynamic point cloud (DPC) brings significant challenges to its high-efficient inter-frame compression. This paper proposes a novel 3D sparse convolution-based Deep Dynamic Point Cloud Compression (D-DPCC) network to compensate and compress the DPC geometry with 3D motion estimation and motion compensation in the feature space. In the proposed D-DPCC network, we design a {\it Multi-scale Motion Fusion} (MMF) module to accurately estimate the 3D optical flow between the feature representations of adjacent point cloud frames. Specifically, we utilize a 3D sparse convolution-based encoder to obtain the latent representation for motion estimation in the feature space and introduce the proposed MMF module for fused 3D motion embedding. Besides, for motion compensation, we propose a 3D {\it Adaptively Weighted Interpolation} (3DAWI) algorithm with a penalty coefficient to adaptively decrease the impact of distant neighbors. We compress the motion embedding and the residual with a lossy autoencoder-based network. To our knowledge, this paper is the first work proposing an end-to-end deep dynamic point cloud compression framework. The experimental result shows that the proposed D-DPCC framework achieves an average 76\% BD-Rate (Bjontegaard Delta Rate) gains against state-of-the-art Video-based Point Cloud Compression (V-PCC) v13 in inter mode.
abstract_zh: 3D动态点云（DPC）的非均匀分布特性对其高效帧间压缩带来了重大挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的基于 3D 稀疏卷积的深度动态点云压缩 (D-DPCC) 网络，通过特征空间中的 3D 运动估计和运动补偿来补偿和压缩 DPC 几何结构。在所提出的 D-DPCC 网络中，我们设计了一个多尺度运动融合（MMF）模块来准确估计相邻点云帧的特征表示之间的 3D 光流。具体来说，我们利用基于 3D 稀疏卷积的编码器来获取特征空间中运动估计的潜在表示，并引入所提出的用于融合 3D 运动嵌入的 MMF 模块。此外，对于运动补偿，我们提出了一种带有惩罚系数的 3D {\it 自适应加权插值} (3DAWI) 算法，可以自适应地减少远处邻居的影响。我们使用基于有损自动编码器的网络来压缩运动嵌入和残差。据我们所知，本文是第一篇提出端到端深度动态点云压缩框架的工作。实验结果表明，所提出的 D-DPCC 框架在帧间模式下相对于最先进的基于视频的点云压缩 (V-PCC) v13 实现了平均 76\% BD-Rate (Bjontegaard Delta Rate) 增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D运动预测的深度动态点云压缩框架D-DPCC，通过特征空间中的运动估计与补偿实现高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 动态点云的非均匀分布特性导致传统帧间压缩方法效率低下，亟需一种能适应几何变化并提升压缩性能的新方案。
AI.method: 设计了多尺度运动融合（MMF）模块估计3D光流，结合自适应加权插值（3DAWI）算法进行运动补偿，并通过有损自编码器压缩运动嵌入与残差信息。
AI.result: 在inter模式下，D-DPCC相比V-PCC v13实现了平均76%的BD-Rate增益，验证了其压缩效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出端到端深度动态点云压缩框架，通过3D运动预测与自适应补偿机制显著提升了压缩性能。
