search_text: Data Justice in Practice: A Guide for Developers 实践中的数据正义：开发人员指南 The Advancing Data Justice Research and Practice project aims to broaden understanding of the social, historical, cultural, political, and economic forces that contribute to discrimination and inequity in contemporary ecologies of data collection, governance, and use. This is the consultation draft of a guide for developers and organisations, which are producing, procuring, or using data-intensive technologies.In the first section, we introduce the field of data justice, from its early discussions to more recent proposals to relocate understandings of what data justice means. This section includes a description of the six pillars of data justice around which this guidance revolves. Next, to support developers in designing, developing, and deploying responsible and equitable data-intensive and AI/ML systems, we outline the AI/ML project lifecycle through a sociotechnical lens. To support the operationalisation data justice throughout the entirety of the AI/ML lifecycle and within data innovation ecosystems, we then present five overarching principles of responsible, equitable, and trustworthy data research and innovation practices, the SAFE-D principles-Safety, Accountability, Fairness, Explainability, and Data Quality, Integrity, Protection, and Privacy. The final section presents guiding questions that will help developers both address data justice issues throughout the AI/ML lifecycle and engage in reflective innovation practices that ensure the design, development, and deployment of responsible and equitable data-intensive and AI/ML systems. 推进数据正义研究和实践项目旨在扩大对社会、历史、文化、政治和经济力量的理解，这些力量导致了当代数据收集、治理和使用生态中的歧视和不平等。这是为生产、采购或使用数据密集型技术的开发人员和组织提供的指南的咨询草案。在第一部分中，我们介绍了数据正义领域，从早期的讨论到最近提出的重新理解数据正义含义的建议。本节描述了本指南所围绕的数据正义的六大支柱。接下来，为了支持开发人员设计、开发和部署负责任且公平的数据密集型和 AI/ML 系统，我们从社会技术角度概述了 AI/ML 项目生命周期。为了支持整个 AI/ML 生命周期和数据创新生态系统内的可操作数据正义，我们提出了负责任、公平和值得信赖的数据研究和创新实践的五项总体原则，即 SAFE-D 原则——安全、问责、公平、可解释性以及数据质量、完整性、保护和隐私。最后一部分提出了指导性问题，将帮助开发人员解决整个 AI/ML 生命周期中的数据正义问题，并参与反思性创新实践，以确保设计、开发和部署负责任且公平的数据密集型和 AI/ML 系统。 本文旨在为开发者和组织提供实践指南，帮助其在数据密集型技术的设计与应用中落实数据正义原则。 David Leslie,Michael Katell,Mhairi Aitken,Jatinder Singh,Morgan Briggs,Rosamund Powell,Cami Rincón,Antonella Perini,Smera Jayadeva,Christopher Burr cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.DB,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Yang Li,Ji Chen,Fu Li,Boxun Fu,Hao Wu,Youshuo Ji,Yijin Zhou,Yi Niu,Guangming Shi,Wenming Zheng
title: GMSS: Graph-Based Multi-Task Self-Supervised Learning for EEG Emotion Recognition
title_zh: GMSS：基于图的多任务自监督学习脑电情绪识别
abstract: Previous electroencephalogram (EEG) emotion recognition relies on single-task learning, which may lead to overfitting and learned emotion features lacking generalization. In this paper, a graph-based multi-task self-supervised learning model (GMSS) for EEG emotion recognition is proposed. GMSS has the ability to learn more general representations by integrating multiple self-supervised tasks, including spatial and frequency jigsaw puzzle tasks, and contrastive learning tasks. By learning from multiple tasks simultaneously, GMSS can find a representation that captures all of the tasks thereby decreasing the chance of overfitting on the original task, i.e., emotion recognition task. In particular, the spatial jigsaw puzzle task aims to capture the intrinsic spatial relationships of different brain regions. Considering the importance of frequency information in EEG emotional signals, the goal of the frequency jigsaw puzzle task is to explore the crucial frequency bands for EEG emotion recognition. To further regularize the learned features and encourage the network to learn inherent representations, contrastive learning task is adopted in this work by mapping the transformed data into a common feature space. The performance of the proposed GMSS is compared with several popular unsupervised and supervised methods. Experiments on SEED, SEED-IV, and MPED datasets show that the proposed model has remarkable advantages in learning more discriminative and general features for EEG emotional signals.
summary: Previous electroencephalogram (EEG) emotion recognition relies on single-task learning, which may lead to overfitting and learned emotion features lacking generalization. In this paper, a graph-based multi-task self-supervised learning model (GMSS) for EEG emotion recognition is proposed. GMSS has the ability to learn more general representations by integrating multiple self-supervised tasks, including spatial and frequency jigsaw puzzle tasks, and contrastive learning tasks. By learning from multiple tasks simultaneously, GMSS can find a representation that captures all of the tasks thereby decreasing the chance of overfitting on the original task, i.e., emotion recognition task. In particular, the spatial jigsaw puzzle task aims to capture the intrinsic spatial relationships of different brain regions. Considering the importance of frequency information in EEG emotional signals, the goal of the frequency jigsaw puzzle task is to explore the crucial frequency bands for EEG emotion recognition. To further regularize the learned features and encourage the network to learn inherent representations, contrastive learning task is adopted in this work by mapping the transformed data into a common feature space. The performance of the proposed GMSS is compared with several popular unsupervised and supervised methods. Experiments on SEED, SEED-IV, and MPED datasets show that the proposed model has remarkable advantages in learning more discriminative and general features for EEG emotional signals.
abstract_zh: 以往的脑电图（EEG）情感识别依赖于单任务学习，这可能会导致过度拟合和学习到的情感特征缺乏泛化性。本文提出了一种基于图的脑电情感识别多任务自监督学习模型（GMSS）。 GMSS 能够通过集成多个自监督任务来学习更通用的表示，包括空间和频率拼图任务以及对比学习任务。通过同时学习多个任务，GMSS 可以找到捕获所有任务的表示，从而减少对原始任务（即情感识别任务）过度拟合的机会。特别是，空间拼图任务旨在捕捉不同大脑区域的内在空间关系。考虑到频率信息在脑电情感信号中的重要性，频率拼图任务的目标是探索脑电情感识别的关键频段。为了进一步规范学习的特征并鼓励网络学习固有的表示，本工作通过将转换后的数据映射到公共特征空间中，采用对比学习任务。将所提出的 GMSS 的性能与几种流行的无监督和监督方法进行了比较。在 SEED、SEED-IV 和 MPED 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的模型在学习脑电情感信号更具辨别力和通用特征方面具有显着优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的多任务自监督学习模型（GMSS），用于改进EEG情绪识别中的特征学习。
AI.motivation: 传统单任务学习方法在EEG情绪识别中易导致过拟合且特征泛化能力不足，需通过多任务自监督学习提升特征的鲁棒性。
AI.method: GMSS整合了空间拼图任务、频率拼图任务和对比学习任务，通过图结构建模脑区关系，并在共享特征空间中正则化学习特征。
AI.result: 在SEED、SEED-IV和MPED数据集上的实验表明，GMSS在学习更具区分性和泛化性的EEG情绪特征方面优于多种无监督和监督方法。
AI.conclusion: GMSS通过多任务自监督学习有效提升了EEG情绪识别的特征表示能力，为情绪分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Andrew Singletary,William Guffey,Tamas G. Molnar,Ryan Sinnet,Aaron D. Ames
title: Safety-Critical Manipulation for Collision-Free Food Preparation
title_zh: 无碰撞食品制备的安全关键操作
abstract: Recent advances allow for the automation of food preparation in high-throughput environments, yet the successful deployment of these robots requires the planning and execution of quick, robust, and ultimately collision-free behaviors. In this work, we showcase a novel framework for modifying previously generated trajectories of robotic manipulators in highly detailed and dynamic collision environments using Control Barrier Functions (CBFs). This method dynamically re-plans previously validated behaviors in the presence of changing environments -- and does so in a computationally efficient manner. Moreover, the approach provides rigorous safety guarantees of the resulting trajectories, factoring in the true underlying dynamics of the manipulator. This methodology is extensively validated on a full-scale robotic manipulator in a real-world cooking environment, and has resulted in substantial improvements in computation time and robustness over re-planning.
summary: Recent advances allow for the automation of food preparation in high-throughput environments, yet the successful deployment of these robots requires the planning and execution of quick, robust, and ultimately collision-free behaviors. In this work, we showcase a novel framework for modifying previously generated trajectories of robotic manipulators in highly detailed and dynamic collision environments using Control Barrier Functions (CBFs). This method dynamically re-plans previously validated behaviors in the presence of changing environments -- and does so in a computationally efficient manner. Moreover, the approach provides rigorous safety guarantees of the resulting trajectories, factoring in the true underlying dynamics of the manipulator. This methodology is extensively validated on a full-scale robotic manipulator in a real-world cooking environment, and has resulted in substantial improvements in computation time and robustness over re-planning.
abstract_zh: 最近的进展允许在高通量环境中实现食物准备的自动化，但这些机器人的成功部署需要快速、稳健且最终无碰撞的行为的规划和执行。在这项工作中，我们展示了一种新颖的框架，用于使用控制屏障函数（CBF）在高度详细和动态的碰撞环境中修改先前生成的机器人操纵器的轨迹。该方法在环境变化的情况下动态地重新规划先前验证的行为，并且以计算有效的方式进行。此外，该方法为最终的轨迹提供了严格的安全保证，考虑了操纵器的真实潜在动力学。该方法在真实烹饪环境中的全尺寸机器人操纵器上得到了广泛验证，并且与重新规划相比，在计算时间和鲁棒性方面有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于控制屏障函数（CBFs）的框架，用于在动态环境中实时调整机械臂轨迹，实现安全无碰撞的食品制备自动化。
AI.motivation: 现有食品制备机器人需在复杂动态环境中快速执行无碰撞操作，传统方法存在计算效率低或安全性不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过控制屏障函数动态修正已验证轨迹，结合机械臂真实动力学模型，实现计算高效的安全轨迹重规划。
AI.result: 在真实烹饪环境中验证该方法，相较传统重规划方法，计算时间减少且系统鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为高动态场景下的安全机器人操作提供了理论保证和工程实现方案，适用于食品制备等安全敏感领域。

result: 在真实烹饪环境中验证该方法，相较传统重规划方法，计算时间减少且系统鲁棒性显著提升。
conclusion: 该框架为高动态场景下的安全机器人操作提供了理论保证和工程实现方案，适用于食品制备等安全敏感领域。
search_text: Safety-Critical Manipulation for Collision-Free Food Preparation 无碰撞食品制备的安全关键操作 Recent advances allow for the automation of food preparation in high-throughput environments, yet the successful deployment of these robots requires the planning and execution of quick, robust, and ultimately collision-free behaviors. In this work, we showcase a novel framework for modifying previously generated trajectories of robotic manipulators in highly detailed and dynamic collision environments using Control Barrier Functions (CBFs). This method dynamically re-plans previously validated behaviors in the presence of changing environments -- and does so in a computationally efficient manner. Moreover, the approach provides rigorous safety guarantees of the resulting trajectories, factoring in the true underlying dynamics of the manipulator. This methodology is extensively validated on a full-scale robotic manipulator in a real-world cooking environment, and has resulted in substantial improvements in computation time and robustness over re-planning. 最近的进展允许在高通量环境中实现食物准备的自动化，但这些机器人的成功部署需要快速、稳健且最终无碰撞的行为的规划和执行。在这项工作中，我们展示了一种新颖的框架，用于使用控制屏障函数（CBF）在高度详细和动态的碰撞环境中修改先前生成的机器人操纵器的轨迹。该方法在环境变化的情况下动态地重新规划先前验证的行为，并且以计算有效的方式进行。此外，该方法为最终的轨迹提供了严格的安全保证，考虑了操纵器的真实潜在动力学。该方法在真实烹饪环境中的全尺寸机器人操纵器上得到了广泛验证，并且与重新规划相比，在计算时间和鲁棒性方面有了显着的改进。 本文提出一种基于控制屏障函数（CBFs）的框架，用于在动态环境中实时调整机械臂轨迹，实现安全无碰撞的食品制备自动化。 Andrew Singletary,William Guffey,Tamas G. Molnar,Ryan Sinnet,Aaron D. Ames cs.RO,eess.SY

title: A Unified Approach to Discrepancy Minimization
title_zh: 最小化差异的统一方法
abstract: We study a unified approach and algorithm for constructive discrepancy minimization based on a stochastic process. By varying the parameters of the process, one can recover various state-of-the-art results. We demonstrate the flexibility of the method by deriving a discrepancy bound for smoothed instances, which interpolates between known bounds for worst-case and random instances.
summary: We study a unified approach and algorithm for constructive discrepancy minimization based on a stochastic process. By varying the parameters of the process, one can recover various state-of-the-art results. We demonstrate the flexibility of the method by deriving a discrepancy bound for smoothed instances, which interpolates between known bounds for worst-case and random instances.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种基于随机过程的建设性差异最小化的统一方法和算法。通过改变过程的参数，人们可以恢复各种最先进的结果。我们通过推导平滑实例的差异界限来证明该方法的灵活性，该差异界限在最坏情况和随机实例的已知界限之间进行插值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机过程的统一算法，用于构造性差异最小化，并通过调整参数适应不同实例类型。
AI.motivation: 差异最小化在理论计算机科学和数学中具有广泛应用，但现有方法分散且难以适应不同实例类型，需统一框架提升灵活性。
AI.method: 设计基于随机过程的算法，通过调整参数实现对最坏情况与随机实例的统一处理，并推导平滑实例的差异界。
AI.result: 得出平滑实例的差异界，该界在已知最坏情况与随机实例的界之间实现插值，验证了方法的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 提出统一算法填补了差异最小化理论的空白，为处理不同实例类型提供了新工具，未来可拓展至更复杂场景。

title: HarmoF0: Logarithmic Scale Dilated Convolution For Pitch Estimation
title_zh: HarmoF0：用于音调估计的对数尺度扩张卷积
comment: This paper is accepted by ICME2022
comments: This paper is accepted by ICME2022
abstract: Sounds, especially music, contain various harmonic components scattered in the frequency dimension. It is difficult for normal convolutional neural networks to observe these overtones. This paper introduces a multiple rates dilated causal convolution (MRDC-Conv) method to capture the harmonic structure in logarithmic scale spectrograms efficiently. The harmonic is helpful for pitch estimation, which is important for many sound processing applications. We propose HarmoF0, a fully convolutional network, to evaluate the MRDC-Conv and other dilated convolutions in pitch estimation. The results show that this model outperforms the DeepF0, yields state-of-the-art performance in three datasets, and simultaneously reduces more than 90% parameters. We also find that it has stronger noise resistance and fewer octave errors. The code and pre-trained model are available at https://github.com/WX-Wei/HarmoF0.
summary: Sounds, especially music, contain various harmonic components scattered in the frequency dimension. It is difficult for normal convolutional neural networks to observe these overtones. This paper introduces a multiple rates dilated causal convolution (MRDC-Conv) method to capture the harmonic structure in logarithmic scale spectrograms efficiently. The harmonic is helpful for pitch estimation, which is important for many sound processing applications. We propose HarmoF0, a fully convolutional network, to evaluate the MRDC-Conv and other dilated convolutions in pitch estimation. The results show that this model outperforms the DeepF0, yields state-of-the-art performance in three datasets, and simultaneously reduces more than 90% parameters. We also find that it has stronger noise resistance and fewer octave errors. The code and pre-trained model are available at https://github.com/WX-Wei/HarmoF0.
abstract_zh: 声音，尤其是音乐，包含分散在频率维度中的各种谐波分量。普通的卷积神经网络很难观察到这些泛音。本文介绍了一种多速率扩张因果卷积（MRDC-Conv）方法来有效捕获对数尺度频谱图中的谐波结构。谐波有助于音调估计，这对于许多声音处理应用很重要。我们提出 HarmoF0，一个全卷积网络，用于评估音高估计中的 MRDC-Conv 和其他扩张卷积。结果表明，该模型优于 DeepF0，在三个数据集中产生了最先进的性能，同时减少了 90% 以上的参数。我们还发现它具有更强的抗噪声能力和更少的倍频误差。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/WX-Wei/HarmoF0 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HarmoF0模型，通过改进的扩张卷积方法在对数尺度频谱图中高效捕捉谐波结构，以提升音高估计算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络难以有效捕捉音乐等声音中频域分布的谐波成分，而谐波信息对音高估计至关重要，需设计更适应频谱特性的网络结构。
AI.method: 引入多速率扩张因果卷积（MRDC-Conv），在对数尺度频谱图中建模谐波关系，并基于全卷积网络HarmoF0验证该方法与其它扩张卷积的性能差异。
AI.result: HarmoF0在三个数据集上达到最先进性能，参数量较DeepF0减少90%以上，且具有更强的抗噪能力和更少的八度误差。
AI.conclusion: 基于对数尺度的扩张卷积能有效建模谐波结构，HarmoF0通过轻量化设计实现了音高估计的高精度与高鲁棒性。

authors_text: Valentin Bartier,Nicolas Bousquet,Jihad Hanna,Amer E. Mouawad,Sebastian Siebertz
title: Token sliding on graphs of girth five
title_zh: 令牌在周长五的图上滑动
abstract: In the Token Sliding problem we are given a graph $G$ and two independent sets $I_s$ and $I_t$ in $G$ of size $k \geq 1$. The goal is to decide whether there exists a sequence $\langle I_1, I_2, \ldots, I_\ell \rangle$ of independent sets such that for all $i \in \{1,\ldots, \ell\}$ the set $I_i$ is an independent set of size $k$, $I_1 = I_s$, $I_\ell = I_t$ and $I_i \triangle I_{i + 1} = \{u, v\} \in E(G)$. Intuitively, we view each independent set as a collection of tokens placed on the vertices of the graph. Then, the problem asks whether there exists a sequence of independent sets that transforms $I_s$ into $I_t$ where at each step we are allowed to slide one token from a vertex to a neighboring vertex. In this paper, we focus on the parameterized complexity of Token Sliding parameterized by $k$. As shown by Bartier et al., the problem is W[1]-hard on graphs of girth four or less, and the authors posed the question of whether there exists a constant $p \geq 5$ such that the problem becomes fixed-parameter tractable on graphs of girth at least $p$. We answer their question positively and prove that the problem is indeed fixed-parameter tractable on graphs of girth five or more, which establishes a full classification of the tractability of Token Sliding parameterized by the number of tokens based on the girth of the input graph.
summary: In the Token Sliding problem we are given a graph $G$ and two independent sets $I_s$ and $I_t$ in $G$ of size $k \geq 1$. The goal is to decide whether there exists a sequence $\langle I_1, I_2, \ldots, I_\ell \rangle$ of independent sets such that for all $i \in \{1,\ldots, \ell\}$ the set $I_i$ is an independent set of size $k$, $I_1 = I_s$, $I_\ell = I_t$ and $I_i \triangle I_{i + 1} = \{u, v\} \in E(G)$. Intuitively, we view each independent set as a collection of tokens placed on the vertices of the graph. Then, the problem asks whether there exists a sequence of independent sets that transforms $I_s$ into $I_t$ where at each step we are allowed to slide one token from a vertex to a neighboring vertex. In this paper, we focus on the parameterized complexity of Token Sliding parameterized by $k$. As shown by Bartier et al., the problem is W[1]-hard on graphs of girth four or less, and the authors posed the question of whether there exists a constant $p \geq 5$ such that the problem becomes fixed-parameter tractable on graphs of girth at least $p$. We answer their question positively and prove that the problem is indeed fixed-parameter tractable on graphs of girth five or more, which establishes a full classification of the tractability of Token Sliding parameterized by the number of tokens based on the girth of the input graph.
abstract_zh: 在令牌滑动问题中，我们给出一个图 $G$ 以及 $G$ 中大小为 $k \geq 1$ 的两个独立集合 $I_s$ 和 $I_t$。目标是确定是否存在独立集合的序列$\langle I_1, I_2, \ldots, I_\ell \rangle$，使得对于所有$i \in \{1,\ldots, \ell\}$，集合$I_i$是大小为$k$的独立集合，$I_1 = I_s$，$I_\ell = I_t$和$I_i \triangle I_{i + 1} = \{u, v\} \in E(G)$。直观上，我们将每个独立集视为放置在图的顶点上的标记的集合。然后，问题询问是否存在一系列将 $I_s$ 转换为 $I_t$ 的独立集合，其中每一步都允许我们将一个标记从一个顶点滑动到相邻顶点。在本文中，我们重点关注由 $k$ 参数化的 Token Sliding 的参数化复杂度。正如 Bartier 等人所示，该问题在周长为 4 或更少的图上是 W[1]-困难的，作者提出了是否存在常数 $p \geq 5$ 的问题，使得该问题在周长至少为 $p$ 的图上变得固定参数可处理。我们积极地回答了他们的问题，并证明该问题在周长为 5 或以上的图上确实是固定参数可处理的，这建立了基于输入图周长的由令牌数量参数化的令牌滑动可处理性的完整分类。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在girth（环长）至少为五的图上，Token Sliding问题的参数化复杂性，证明了该问题在此类图上是固定参数可解的。
AI.motivation: 此前研究显示，当图的girth不超过四时，Token Sliding问题是W[1]-难的。作者旨在确定是否存在某个常数p≥5，使得当图的girth至少为p时，该问题变为固定参数可解，并完成基于图girth的可解性分类。
AI.method: 通过分析图的结构特性，结合参数化复杂性理论，设计适用于高girth图的算法，证明其固定参数可解性。
AI.result: 证明了当图的girth≥5时，Token Sliding问题在参数k下是固定参数可解的，解决了该问题的可解性分类问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文确认了当图的girth≥5时Token Sliding的固定参数可解性，为该问题在不同图结构下的复杂性分类提供了完整结论。

search_text: Token sliding on graphs of girth five 令牌在周长五的图上滑动 In the Token Sliding problem we are given a graph $G$ and two independent sets $I_s$ and $I_t$ in $G$ of size $k \geq 1$. The goal is to decide whether there exists a sequence $\langle I_1, I_2, \ldots, I_\ell \rangle$ of independent sets such that for all $i \in \{1,\ldots, \ell\}$ the set $I_i$ is an independent set of size $k$, $I_1 = I_s$, $I_\ell = I_t$ and $I_i \triangle I_{i + 1} = \{u, v\} \in E(G)$. Intuitively, we view each independent set as a collection of tokens placed on the vertices of the graph. Then, the problem asks whether there exists a sequence of independent sets that transforms $I_s$ into $I_t$ where at each step we are allowed to slide one token from a vertex to a neighboring vertex. In this paper, we focus on the parameterized complexity of Token Sliding parameterized by $k$. As shown by Bartier et al., the problem is W[1]-hard on graphs of girth four or less, and the authors posed the question of whether there exists a constant $p \geq 5$ such that the problem becomes fixed-parameter tractable on graphs of girth at least $p$. We answer their question positively and prove that the problem is indeed fixed-parameter tractable on graphs of girth five or more, which establishes a full classification of the tractability of Token Sliding parameterized by the number of tokens based on the girth of the input graph. 在令牌滑动问题中，我们给出一个图 $G$ 以及 $G$ 中大小为 $k \geq 1$ 的两个独立集合 $I_s$ 和 $I_t$。目标是确定是否存在独立集合的序列$\langle I_1, I_2, \ldots, I_\ell \rangle$，使得对于所有$i \in \{1,\ldots, \ell\}$，集合$I_i$是大小为$k$的独立集合，$I_1 = I_s$，$I_\ell = I_t$和$I_i \triangle I_{i + 1} = \{u, v\} \in E(G)$。直观上，我们将每个独立集视为放置在图的顶点上的标记的集合。然后，问题询问是否存在一系列将 $I_s$ 转换为 $I_t$ 的独立集合，其中每一步都允许我们将一个标记从一个顶点滑动到相邻顶点。在本文中，我们重点关注由 $k$ 参数化的 Token Sliding 的参数化复杂度。正如 Bartier 等人所示，该问题在周长为 4 或更少的图上是 W[1]-困难的，作者提出了是否存在常数 $p \geq 5$ 的问题，使得该问题在周长至少为 $p$ 的图上变得固定参数可处理。我们积极地回答了他们的问题，并证明该问题在周长为 5 或以上的图上确实是固定参数可处理的，这建立了基于输入图周长的由令牌数量参数化的令牌滑动可处理性的完整分类。 本文研究了在girth（环长）至少为五的图上，Token Sliding问题的参数化复杂性，证明了该问题在此类图上是固定参数可解的。 Valentin Bartier,Nicolas Bousquet,Jihad Hanna,Amer E. Mouawad,Sebastian Siebertz cs.CC,cs.DM,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Xian Shi,Xun Xu,Wanyue Zhang,Xiatian Zhu,Chuan Sheng Foo,Kui Jia
title: Open-Set Semi-Supervised Learning for 3D Point Cloud Understanding
title_zh: 用于 3D 点云理解的开放集半监督学习
abstract: Semantic understanding of 3D point cloud relies on learning models with massively annotated data, which, in many cases, are expensive or difficult to collect. This has led to an emerging research interest in semi-supervised learning (SSL) for 3D point cloud. It is commonly assumed in SSL that the unlabeled data are drawn from the same distribution as that of the labeled ones; This assumption, however, rarely holds true in realistic environments. Blindly using out-of-distribution (OOD) unlabeled data could harm SSL performance. In this work, we propose to selectively utilize unlabeled data through sample weighting, so that only conducive unlabeled data would be prioritized. To estimate the weights, we adopt a bi-level optimization framework which iteratively optimizes a metaobjective on a held-out validation set and a task-objective on a training set. Faced with the instability of efficient bi-level optimizers, we further propose three regularization techniques to enhance the training stability. Extensive experiments on 3D point cloud classification and segmentation tasks verify the effectiveness of our proposed method. We also demonstrate the feasibility of a more efficient training strategy.
summary: Semantic understanding of 3D point cloud relies on learning models with massively annotated data, which, in many cases, are expensive or difficult to collect. This has led to an emerging research interest in semi-supervised learning (SSL) for 3D point cloud. It is commonly assumed in SSL that the unlabeled data are drawn from the same distribution as that of the labeled ones; This assumption, however, rarely holds true in realistic environments. Blindly using out-of-distribution (OOD) unlabeled data could harm SSL performance. In this work, we propose to selectively utilize unlabeled data through sample weighting, so that only conducive unlabeled data would be prioritized. To estimate the weights, we adopt a bi-level optimization framework which iteratively optimizes a metaobjective on a held-out validation set and a task-objective on a training set. Faced with the instability of efficient bi-level optimizers, we further propose three regularization techniques to enhance the training stability. Extensive experiments on 3D point cloud classification and segmentation tasks verify the effectiveness of our proposed method. We also demonstrate the feasibility of a more efficient training strategy.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云的语义理解依赖于具有大量注释数据的学习模型，这些数据在许多情况下成本昂贵或难以收集。这引发了人们对 3D 点云半监督学习 (SSL) 的新兴研究兴趣。 SSL 中通常假设未标记数据与标记数据来自相同的分布；然而，这种假设在现实环境中很少成立。盲目使用分发外 (OOD) 未标记数据可能会损害 SSL 性能。在这项工作中，我们建议通过样本加权选择性地利用未标记数据，以便仅优先考虑有益的未标记数据。为了估计权重，我们采用双层优化框架，该框架迭代优化保留验证集上的元目标和训练集上的任务目标。面对高效双层优化器的不稳定性，我们进一步提出了三种正则化技术来增强训练稳定性。 3D 点云分类和分割任务的大量实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。我们还展示了更有效的培训策略的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种开放集半监督学习方法，用于改进3D点云的语义理解。
AI.motivation: 传统半监督学习假设未标记数据与标记数据来自相同分布，但在现实环境中这一假设不成立，直接使用分布外数据会损害性能。
AI.method: 采用双层优化框架通过样本加权选择性利用未标记数据，并提出三种正则化技术提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在3D点云分类和分割任务中验证了方法有效性，并展示了更高效的训练策略可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过选择性利用未标记数据和稳定性增强技术，提升了开放集场景下3D点云理解的半监督学习性能。

title: Multi-dimensional parameter-space partitioning of spatio-temporal simulation ensembles
title_zh: 时空模拟系综的多维参数空间划分
abstract: Numerical simulations are commonly used to understand the parameter dependence of given spatio-temporal phenomena. Sampling a multi-dimensional parameter space and running the respective simulations leads to an ensemble of a large number of spatio-temporal simulation runs. A main objective for analyzing the ensemble is to partition (or segment) the multi-dimensional parameter space into connected regions of simulation runs with similar behavior. To facilitate such an analysis, we propose a novel visualization method for multi-dimensional parameter-space partitions. Our visualization is based on the concept of a hyper-slicer, which allows for undistorted views of the parameter-space segments' extent and transitions. For navigation within the parameter space, interactions with a 2D embedding of the parameter-space samples, including their segment memberships, are supported. Parameter-space partitions are generated in a semi-automatic fashion by analyzing the similarity space of the ensemble's simulation runs. Clusters of similar simulation runs induce the segments of the parameter-space partition. We link the parameter-space partitioning visualizations to similarity-space visualizations of the ensemble's simulation runs and embed them into an interactive visual analysis tool that supports the analysis of all facets of the spatio-temporal simulation ensemble targeted at the overarching goal of analyzing the parameter-space partitioning. The partitioning can then be visually analyzed and interactively refined. We evaluated our approach with experts within case studies from three different domains.
summary: Numerical simulations are commonly used to understand the parameter dependence of given spatio-temporal phenomena. Sampling a multi-dimensional parameter space and running the respective simulations leads to an ensemble of a large number of spatio-temporal simulation runs. A main objective for analyzing the ensemble is to partition (or segment) the multi-dimensional parameter space into connected regions of simulation runs with similar behavior. To facilitate such an analysis, we propose a novel visualization method for multi-dimensional parameter-space partitions. Our visualization is based on the concept of a hyper-slicer, which allows for undistorted views of the parameter-space segments' extent and transitions. For navigation within the parameter space, interactions with a 2D embedding of the parameter-space samples, including their segment memberships, are supported. Parameter-space partitions are generated in a semi-automatic fashion by analyzing the similarity space of the ensemble's simulation runs. Clusters of similar simulation runs induce the segments of the parameter-space partition. We link the parameter-space partitioning visualizations to similarity-space visualizations of the ensemble's simulation runs and embed them into an interactive visual analysis tool that supports the analysis of all facets of the spatio-temporal simulation ensemble targeted at the overarching goal of analyzing the parameter-space partitioning. The partitioning can then be visually analyzed and interactively refined. We evaluated our approach with experts within case studies from three different domains.
abstract_zh: 数值模拟通常用于理解给定时空现象的参数依赖性。对多维参数空间进行采样并运行相应的模拟会产生大量时空模拟运行的集合。分析集成的主要目标是将多维参数空间划分（或分割）为具有相似行为的模拟运行的连接区域。为了促进这样的分析，我们提出了一种用于多维参数空间分区的新颖的可视化方法。我们的可视化基于超级切片器的概念，它允许参数空间段的范围和过渡的不失真视图。对于参数空间内的导航，支持与参数空间样本的 2D 嵌入交互，包括它们的分段成员资格。通过分析集成模拟运行的相似性空间，以半自动方式生成参数空间分区。类似模拟运行的集群会产生参数空间分区的分段。我们将参数空间分区可视化与集成模拟运行的相似空间可视化联系起来，并将它们嵌入到交互式可视化分析工具中，该工具支持对时空模拟集成的所有方面进行分析，以分析参数空间分区的总体目标为目标。然后可以对分区进行可视化分析和交互式细化。我们与来自三个不同领域的案例研究中的专家一起评估了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超切片概念的多维参数空间分割可视化方法，用于分析时空模拟集合的参数依赖性。
AI.motivation: 高维参数空间的时空模拟集合分析存在可视化困难，传统方法难以直观展示参数分割与模拟行为的关联性。
AI.method: 通过相似性空间聚类生成参数分割，结合超切片可视化技术与2D嵌入交互工具，实现参数空间分区的可视化与交互式优化。
AI.result: 在三个不同领域的案例研究中，专家验证了该方法对参数空间分割的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多维参数空间分割提供了直观的可视化分析框架，支持用户交互式调整以优化分割结果。

We evaluated our approach with experts within case studies from three different domains. 数值模拟通常用于理解给定时空现象的参数依赖性。对多维参数空间进行采样并运行相应的模拟会产生大量时空模拟运行的集合。分析集成的主要目标是将多维参数空间划分（或分割）为具有相似行为的模拟运行的连接区域。为了促进这样的分析，我们提出了一种用于多维参数空间分区的新颖的可视化方法。我们的可视化基于超级切片器的概念，它允许参数空间段的范围和过渡的不失真视图。对于参数空间内的导航，支持与参数空间样本的 2D 嵌入交互，包括它们的分段成员资格。通过分析集成模拟运行的相似性空间，以半自动方式生成参数空间分区。类似模拟运行的集群会产生参数空间分区的分段。我们将参数空间分区可视化与集成模拟运行的相似空间可视化联系起来，并将它们嵌入到交互式可视化分析工具中，该工具支持对时空模拟集成的所有方面进行分析，以分析参数空间分区的总体目标为目标。然后可以对分区进行可视化分析和交互式细化。我们与来自三个不同领域的案例研究中的专家一起评估了我们的方法。 本文提出一种基于超切片概念的多维参数空间分割可视化方法，用于分析时空模拟集合的参数依赖性。 Marina Evers,Lars Linsen cs.HC

title: Knowledge Graph Contrastive Learning for Recommendation
title_zh: 知识图谱对比学习推荐
comment: This paper has been published as a full paper at SIGIR 2022
comments: This paper has been published as a full paper at SIGIR 2022
abstract: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) have been utilized as useful side information to improve recommendation quality. In those recommender systems, knowledge graph information often contains fruitful facts and inherent semantic relatedness among items. However, the success of such methods relies on the high quality knowledge graphs, and may not learn quality representations with two challenges: i) The long-tail distribution of entities results in sparse supervision signals for KG-enhanced item representation; ii) Real-world knowledge graphs are often noisy and contain topic-irrelevant connections between items and entities. Such KG sparsity and noise make the item-entity dependent relations deviate from reflecting their true characteristics, which significantly amplifies the noise effect and hinders the accurate representation of user's preference. To fill this research gap, we design a general Knowledge Graph Contrastive Learning framework (KGCL) that alleviates the information noise for knowledge graph-enhanced recommender systems. Specifically, we propose a knowledge graph augmentation schema to suppress KG noise in information aggregation, and derive more robust knowledge-aware representations for items. In addition, we exploit additional supervision signals from the KG augmentation process to guide a cross-view contrastive learning paradigm, giving a greater role to unbiased user-item interactions in gradient descent and further suppressing the noise. Extensive experiments on three public datasets demonstrate the consistent superiority of our KGCL over state-of-the-art techniques. KGCL also achieves strong performance in recommendation scenarios with sparse user-item interactions, long-tail and noisy KG entities. Our implementation codes are available at https://github.com/yuh-yang/KGCL-SIGIR22

Such KG sparsity and noise make the item-entity dependent relations deviate from reflecting their true characteristics, which significantly amplifies the noise effect and hinders the accurate representation of user's preference. To fill this research gap, we design a general Knowledge Graph Contrastive Learning framework (KGCL) that alleviates the information noise for knowledge graph-enhanced recommender systems. KGCL also achieves strong performance in recommendation scenarios with sparse user-item interactions, long-tail and noisy KG entities. abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）已被用作有用的辅助信息来提高推荐质量。在这些推荐系统中，知识图信息通常包含丰富的事实和项目之间固有的语义相关性。然而，此类方法的成功依赖于高质量的知识图，并且可能无法学习质量表示，并面临两个挑战：i）实体的长尾分布导致 KG 增强项目表示的监督信号稀疏； ii）现实世界的知识图谱通常充满噪音，并且包含项目和实体之间与主题无关的连接。这种KG稀疏性和噪声使得项目-实体依赖关系偏离了反映其真实特征，从而显着放大了噪声效应并阻碍了用户偏好的准确表示。为了填补这一研究空白，我们设计了一个通用的知识图对比学习框架（KGCL），该框架可以减轻知识图增强推荐系统的信息噪声。具体来说，我们提出了一种知识图增强模式来抑制信息聚合中的 KG 噪声，并为项目导出更鲁棒的知识感知表示。此外，我们利用 KG 增强过程中的额外监督信号来指导跨视图对比学习范式，在梯度下降中为无偏见的用户-项目交互发挥更大的作用，并进一步抑制噪声。对三个公共数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的 KGCL 相对于最先进技术的一贯优越性。 KGCL 在具有稀疏用户-项目交互、长尾和噪声 KG 实体的推荐场景中也取得了强大的性能。我们的实现代码可在 https://github.com/yuh-yang/KGCL-SIGIR22 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种知识图谱对比学习框架（KGCL），用于解决推荐系统中知识图谱稀疏性和噪声问题，以提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于知识图谱的推荐方法受制于实体长尾分布导致的监督信号稀疏以及现实知识图谱中的噪声和无关连接，影响了表示学习的质量和推荐准确性。
AI.method: 设计KGCL框架，通过知识图谱增强方案抑制噪声，并利用对比学习范式结合无偏用户-物品交互信号，提升表示鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验表明，KGCL在稀疏交互、长尾和噪声知识图谱场景下均优于现有技术，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: KGCL有效缓解了知识图谱噪声和稀疏性问题，提升了推荐性能，方法具有通用性和可扩展性。

authors_text: Panpan Li,Shengbo Gong,Shaocong Xu,Jiajun Zhou,Yu Shanqing,Qi Xuan
title: Cross Cryptocurrency Relationship Mining for Bitcoin Price Prediction
title_zh: 用于比特币价格预测的跨加密货币关系挖掘
abstract: Blockchain finance has become a part of the world financial system, most typically manifested in the attention to the price of Bitcoin. However, a great deal of work is still limited to using technical indicators to capture Bitcoin price fluctuation, with little consideration of historical relationships and interactions between related cryptocurrencies. In this work, we propose a generic Cross-Cryptocurrency Relationship Mining module, named C2RM, which can effectively capture the synchronous and asynchronous impact factors between Bitcoin and related Altcoins. Specifically, we utilize the Dynamic Time Warping algorithm to extract the lead-lag relationship, yielding Lead-lag Variance Kernel, which will be used for aggregating the information of Altcoins to form relational impact factors. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that our C2RM can help existing price prediction methods achieve significant performance improvement, suggesting the effectiveness of Cross-Cryptocurrency interactions on benefitting Bitcoin price prediction.
summary: Blockchain finance has become a part of the world financial system, most typically manifested in the attention to the price of Bitcoin. However, a great deal of work is still limited to using technical indicators to capture Bitcoin price fluctuation, with little consideration of historical relationships and interactions between related cryptocurrencies. In this work, we propose a generic Cross-Cryptocurrency Relationship Mining module, named C2RM, which can effectively capture the synchronous and asynchronous impact factors between Bitcoin and related Altcoins. Specifically, we utilize the Dynamic Time Warping algorithm to extract the lead-lag relationship, yielding Lead-lag Variance Kernel, which will be used for aggregating the information of Altcoins to form relational impact factors. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that our C2RM can help existing price prediction methods achieve significant performance improvement, suggesting the effectiveness of Cross-Cryptocurrency interactions on benefitting Bitcoin price prediction.
abstract_zh: 区块链金融已经成为世界金融体系的一部分，最典型的体现就是对比特币价格的关注。然而，大量工作仍然仅限于使用技术指标来捕捉比特币价格波动，而很少考虑相关加密货币之间的历史关系和相互作用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通用的跨加密货币关系挖掘模块，名为C2RM，它可以有效捕获比特币和相关山寨币之间的同步和异步影响因素。具体来说，我们利用动态时间规整算法来提取超前-滞后关系，产生超前-滞后方差核，该核将用于聚合山寨币的信息以形成相关影响因子。综合实验结果表明，我们的 C2RM 可以帮助现有的价格预测方法实现显着的性能提升，这表明跨加密货币交互对于有利于比特币价格预测的有效性。

AI.tldr: 通过挖掘加密货币间的交叉关系来预测比特币价格
AI.motivation: 现有比特币价格预测方法多依赖技术指标，忽视了加密货币间的历史互动关系，限制了预测效果
AI.method: 提出C2RM模块，采用动态时间规整算法提取加密货币间的领先-滞后关系，构建Lead-lag Variance Kernel聚合信息形成影响因素
AI.result: 实验表明C2RM显著提升现有预测方法的性能，验证了加密货币交互关系对价格预测的有效性
AI.conclusion: 加密货币交叉关系分析能有效提升比特币价格预测准确性，C2RM模块为金融预测提供了新方法

title: Detection Recovery in Online Multi-Object Tracking with Sparse Graph Tracker
title_zh: 使用稀疏图跟踪器进行在线多目标跟踪中的检测恢复
abstract: In existing joint detection and tracking methods, pairwise relational features are used to match previous tracklets to current detections. However, the features may not be discriminative enough for a tracker to identify a target from a large number of detections. Selecting only high-scored detections for tracking may lead to missed detections whose confidence score is low. Consequently, in the online setting, this results in disconnections of tracklets which cannot be recovered. In this regard, we present Sparse Graph Tracker (SGT), a novel online graph tracker using higher-order relational features which are more discriminative by aggregating the features of neighboring detections and their relations. SGT converts video data into a graph where detections, their connections, and the relational features of two connected nodes are represented by nodes, edges, and edge features, respectively. The strong edge features allow SGT to track targets with tracking candidates selected by top-K scored detections with large K. As a result, even low-scored detections can be tracked, and the missed detections are also recovered. The robustness of K value is shown through the extensive experiments. In the MOT16/17/20 and HiEve Challenge, SGT outperforms the state-of-the-art trackers with real-time inference speed. Especially, a large improvement in MOTA is shown in the MOT20 and HiEve Challenge. Code is available at https://github.com/HYUNJS/SGT.
summary: In existing joint detection and tracking methods, pairwise relational features are used to match previous tracklets to current detections. However, the features may not be discriminative enough for a tracker to identify a target from a large number of detections. Selecting only high-scored detections for tracking may lead to missed detections whose confidence score is low. Consequently, in the online setting, this results in disconnections of tracklets which cannot be recovered. In this regard, we present Sparse Graph Tracker (SGT), a novel online graph tracker using higher-order relational features which are more discriminative by aggregating the features of neighboring detections and their relations. SGT converts video data into a graph where detections, their connections, and the relational features of two connected nodes are represented by nodes, edges, and edge features, respectively. The strong edge features allow SGT to track targets with tracking candidates selected by top-K scored detections with large K. As a result, even low-scored detections can be tracked, and the missed detections are also recovered. The robustness of K value is shown through the extensive experiments. In the MOT16/17/20 and HiEve Challenge, SGT outperforms the state-of-the-art trackers with real-time inference speed. Especially, a large improvement in MOTA is shown in the MOT20 and HiEve Challenge. Code is available at https://github.com/HYUNJS/SGT.
abstract_zh: 在现有的联合检测和跟踪方法中，成对关系特征用于将先前的轨迹与当前的检测进行匹配。然而，这些特征可能不足以让跟踪器从大量检测中识别目标。仅选择高分检测进行跟踪可能会导致漏检置信度分数较低的检测。因此，在在线设置中，这会导致无法恢复的 tracklet 断开连接。在这方面，我们提出了稀疏图跟踪器（SGT），这是一种新颖的在线图跟踪器，使用高阶关系特征，通过聚合相邻检测的特征及其关系来更具辨别力。 SGT 将视频数据转换为图形，其中检测、它们的连接以及两个连接节点的关系特征分别由节点、边和边特征表示。强大的边缘特征使SGT能够通过具有大K的top-K得分检测选择的跟踪候选来跟踪目标。因此，即使是低得分的检测也可以被跟踪，并且遗漏的检测也可以被恢复。通过大量的实验证明了K值的稳健性。在 MOT16/17/20 和 HiEve 挑战赛中，SGT 的实时推理速度超越了最先进的跟踪器。特别是 MOT20 和 HiEve 挑战赛中显示了 MOTA 的巨大改进。代码可在 https://github.com/HYUNJS/SGT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏图的在线多目标跟踪方法（SGT），通过高阶关系特征提升检测恢复能力，解决跟踪过程中因低置信度检测导致的轨迹断裂问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联合检测与跟踪方法依赖成对关系特征匹配，难以区分大量检测目标，且仅选择高置信度检测可能导致漏检，造成轨迹断开无法恢复。
AI.method: 将视频数据转化为图结构，以检测为节点、连接关系为边，并通过聚合相邻检测及其关系生成更具判别性的边特征，利用大K值的Top-K检测选择策略实现低置信度检测的跟踪与恢复。
AI.result: 在MOT16/17/20和HiEve挑战赛中，SGT在保持实时推理速度的同时显著优于现有跟踪器，尤其在MOTA指标上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SGT通过高阶关系特征和图结构有效解决了在线多目标跟踪中的检测恢复问题，验证了其鲁棒性和高效性。

Consequently, in the online setting, this results in disconnections of tracklets which cannot be recovered. In this regard, we present Sparse Graph Tracker (SGT), a novel online graph tracker using higher-order relational features which are more discriminative by aggregating the features of neighboring detections and their relations. SGT converts video data into a graph where detections, their connections, and the relational features of two connected nodes are represented by nodes, edges, and edge features, respectively. The strong edge features allow SGT to track targets with tracking candidates selected by top-K scored detections with large K. As a result, even low-scored detections can be tracked, and the missed detections are also recovered. The robustness of K value is shown through the extensive experiments. In the MOT16/17/20 and HiEve Challenge, SGT outperforms the state-of-the-art trackers with real-time inference speed. Especially, a large improvement in MOTA is shown in the MOT20 and HiEve Challenge. title: Monocular 3D Fingerprint Reconstruction and Unwarping
title_zh: 单目 3D 指纹重建和反扭曲
abstract: Compared with contact-based fingerprint acquisition techniques, contactless acquisition has the advantages of less skin distortion, larger fingerprint area, and hygienic acquisition. However, perspective distortion is a challenge in contactless fingerprint recognition, which changes ridge orientation, frequency, and minutiae location, and thus causes degraded recognition accuracy. We propose a learning based shape from texture algorithm to reconstruct a 3D finger shape from a single image and unwarp the raw image to suppress perspective distortion. Experimental results on contactless fingerprint databases show that the proposed method has high 3D reconstruction accuracy. Matching experiments on contactless-contact and contactless-contactless matching prove that the proposed method improves matching accuracy.
summary: Compared with contact-based fingerprint acquisition techniques, contactless acquisition has the advantages of less skin distortion, larger fingerprint area, and hygienic acquisition. However, perspective distortion is a challenge in contactless fingerprint recognition, which changes ridge orientation, frequency, and minutiae location, and thus causes degraded recognition accuracy. We propose a learning based shape from texture algorithm to reconstruct a 3D finger shape from a single image and unwarp the raw image to suppress perspective distortion. Experimental results on contactless fingerprint databases show that the proposed method has high 3D reconstruction accuracy. Matching experiments on contactless-contact and contactless-contactless matching prove that the proposed method improves matching accuracy.
abstract_zh: 与接触式指纹采集技术相比，非接触式采集具有皮肤变形较小、指纹面积更大、采集卫生等优点。然而，透视畸变是非接触式指纹识别中的一个挑战，它会改变脊线方向、频率和细节位置，从而导致识别精度下降。我们提出了一种基于纹理学习的形状算法，用于从单个图像重建 3D 手指形状，并对原始图像进行反扭曲以抑制透视失真。非接触式指纹数据库的实验结果表明，该方法具有较高的3D重建精度。非接触-接触和非接触-非接触匹配实验证明，该方法提高了匹配精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目图像的3D指纹重建与去畸变方法，以解决无接触指纹识别中的透视失真问题。
AI.motivation: 无接触指纹采集虽具有卫生、面积大等优势，但存在因透视失真导致的纹路方向、频率和细节位置变化，从而降低识别精度的问题。
AI.method: 采用基于学习的纹理生成形状算法，从单张图像重建3D指纹结构，并对原始图像进行去畸变处理以抑制透视影响。
AI.result: 在无接触指纹数据库上的实验表明，该方法具有高精度的3D重建能力，且在跨接触方式匹配中显著提升了识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了无接触指纹识别中的透视失真问题，为提升接触与无接触模式间的匹配性能提供了可行方案。

title: Coordination-free Multi-robot Path Planning for Congestion Reduction Using Topological Reasoning
title_zh: 使用拓扑推理减少拥塞的无协调多机器人路径规划
abstract: We consider the problem of multi-robot path planning in a complex, cluttered environment with the aim of reducing overall congestion in the environment, while avoiding any inter-robot communication or coordination. Such limitations may exist due to lack of communication or due to privacy restrictions (for example, autonomous vehicles may not want to share their locations or intents with other vehicles or even to a central server). The key insight that allows us to solve this problem is to stochastically distribute the robots across different routes in the environment by assigning them paths in different topologically distinct classes, so as to lower congestion and the overall travel time for all robots in the environment. We outline the computation of topologically distinct paths in a spatio-temporal configuration space and propose methods for the stochastic assignment of paths to the robots. A fast replanning algorithm and a potential field based controller allow robots to avoid collision with nearby agents while following the assigned path. Our simulation and experiment results show a significant advantage over shortest path following under such a coordination-free setup.
summary: We consider the problem of multi-robot path planning in a complex, cluttered environment with the aim of reducing overall congestion in the environment, while avoiding any inter-robot communication or coordination. Such limitations may exist due to lack of communication or due to privacy restrictions (for example, autonomous vehicles may not want to share their locations or intents with other vehicles or even to a central server). The key insight that allows us to solve this problem is to stochastically distribute the robots across different routes in the environment by assigning them paths in different topologically distinct classes, so as to lower congestion and the overall travel time for all robots in the environment. We outline the computation of topologically distinct paths in a spatio-temporal configuration space and propose methods for the stochastic assignment of paths to the robots. A fast replanning algorithm and a potential field based controller allow robots to avoid collision with nearby agents while following the assigned path. Our simulation and experiment results show a significant advantage over shortest path following under such a coordination-free setup.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在复杂、杂乱的环境中进行多机器人路径规划的问题，目的是减少环境中的整体拥堵，同时避免任何机器人间的通信或协调。此类限制可能由于缺乏通信或隐私限制而存在（例如，自动驾驶车辆可能不想与其他车辆甚至中央服务器共享其位置或意图）。使我们能够解决这个问题的关键见解是通过为机器人分配不同拓扑不同类别的路径，将机器人随机分布在环境中的不同路线上，从而降低拥堵和环境中所有机器人的总体行驶时间。我们概述了时空配置空间中拓扑不同路径的计算，并提出了随机分配机器人路径的方法。快速重新规划算法和基于势场的控制器使机器人能够在遵循指定路径时避免与附近的代理发生碰撞。我们的模拟和实验结果表明，在这种无协调设置下，比最短路径跟踪具有显着优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需机器人间通信或协调的多机器人路径规划方法，通过拓扑推理降低环境拥堵。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏通信或隐私限制的场景下（如自动驾驶车辆），传统依赖协调的路径规划方法无法应用，需寻找无需协调的拥堵缓解方案。
AI.method: 通过计算时空配置空间中拓扑不同的路径类，随机分配机器人路径；结合快速重规划算法与势场控制器实现避障。
AI.result: 仿真与实验表明，该方法在无协调设定下显著优于传统最短路径策略，有效降低拥堵并缩短整体行程时间。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑路径分类与随机分配策略为无协调多机器人系统提供了高效拥堵缓解方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Coordination-free Multi-robot Path Planning for Congestion Reduction Using Topological Reasoning 使用拓扑推理减少拥塞的无协调多机器人路径规划 We consider the problem of multi-robot path planning in a complex, cluttered environment with the aim of reducing overall congestion in the environment, while avoiding any inter-robot communication or coordination. Such limitations may exist due to lack of communication or due to privacy restrictions (for example, autonomous vehicles may not want to share their locations or intents with other vehicles or even to a central server). The key insight that allows us to solve this problem is to stochastically distribute the robots across different routes in the environment by assigning them paths in different topologically distinct classes, so as to lower congestion and the overall travel time for all robots in the environment. We outline the computation of topologically distinct paths in a spatio-temporal configuration space and propose methods for the stochastic assignment of paths to the robots. A fast replanning algorithm and a potential field based controller allow robots to avoid collision with nearby agents while following the assigned path. Our simulation and experiment results show a significant advantage over shortest path following under such a coordination-free setup. 我们考虑在复杂、杂乱的环境中进行多机器人路径规划的问题，目的是减少环境中的整体拥堵，同时避免任何机器人间的通信或协调。此类限制可能由于缺乏通信或隐私限制而存在（例如，自动驾驶车辆可能不想与其他车辆甚至中央服务器共享其位置或意图）。使我们能够解决这个问题的关键见解是通过为机器人分配不同拓扑不同类别的路径，将机器人随机分布在环境中的不同路线上，从而降低拥堵和环境中所有机器人的总体行驶时间。我们概述了时空配置空间中拓扑不同路径的计算，并提出了随机分配机器人路径的方法。快速重新规划算法和基于势场的控制器使机器人能够在遵循指定路径时避免与附近的代理发生碰撞。我们的模拟和实验结果表明，在这种无协调设置下，比最短路径跟踪具有显着优势。 本文提出了一种无需机器人间通信或协调的多机器人路径规划方法，通过拓扑推理降低环境拥堵。 Xiaolong Wang,Alp Sahin,Subhrajit Bhattacharya cs.RO

authors_text: Sriram Baireddy,Da-Young Lee,Carlos Gongora-Canul,Christian D. Cruz,Edward J. Delp
title: Leaf Tar Spot Detection Using RGB Images
title_zh: 使用 RGB 图像检测叶子焦油斑
abstract: Tar spot disease is a fungal disease that appears as a series of black circular spots containing spores on corn leaves. Tar spot has proven to be an impactful disease in terms of reducing crop yield. To quantify disease progression, experts usually have to visually phenotype leaves from the plant. This process is very time-consuming and is difficult to incorporate in any high-throughput phenotyping system. Deep neural networks could provide quick, automated tar spot detection with sufficient ground truth. However, manually labeling tar spots in images to serve as ground truth is also tedious and time-consuming. In this paper we first describe an approach that uses automated image analysis tools to generate ground truth images that are then used for training a Mask R-CNN. We show that a Mask R-CNN can be used effectively to detect tar spots in close-up images of leaf surfaces. We additionally show that the Mask R-CNN can also be used for in-field images of whole leaves to capture the number of tar spots and area of the leaf infected by the disease.
summary: Tar spot disease is a fungal disease that appears as a series of black circular spots containing spores on corn leaves. Tar spot has proven to be an impactful disease in terms of reducing crop yield. To quantify disease progression, experts usually have to visually phenotype leaves from the plant. This process is very time-consuming and is difficult to incorporate in any high-throughput phenotyping system. Deep neural networks could provide quick, automated tar spot detection with sufficient ground truth. However, manually labeling tar spots in images to serve as ground truth is also tedious and time-consuming. In this paper we first describe an approach that uses automated image analysis tools to generate ground truth images that are then used for training a Mask R-CNN. We show that a Mask R-CNN can be used effectively to detect tar spots in close-up images of leaf surfaces. We additionally show that the Mask R-CNN can also be used for in-field images of whole leaves to capture the number of tar spots and area of the leaf infected by the disease.
abstract_zh: 焦油斑病是一种真菌病害，在玉米叶子上表现为一系列含有孢子的黑色圆形斑点。焦油斑病已被证明是一种影响作物产量的疾病。为了量化疾病进展，专家通常必须对植物的叶子进行视觉表型分析。这个过程非常耗时，并且很难合并到任何高通量表型系统中。深度神经网络可以提供快速、自动化的焦油斑检测，并具有足够的地面事实。然而，手动标记图像中的焦油点以作为地面实况也是乏味且耗时的。在本文中，我们首先描述了一种使用自动图像分析工具生成地面实况图像的方法，然后将其用于训练 Mask R-CNN。我们证明 Mask R-CNN 可以有效地用于检测叶子表面特写图像中的焦油斑。我们还表明，Mask R-CNN 还可以用于整个叶子的现场图像，以捕获焦油斑的数量和受疾病感染的叶子的面积。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用RGB图像和Mask R-CNN模型实现玉米叶黑斑病的自动检测方法。
AI.motivation: 传统人工检测玉米叶黑斑病耗时且难以应用于高通量表型分析系统，需开发自动化检测方案。
AI.method: 利用自动化图像分析工具生成标注数据训练Mask R-CNN模型，并在特写图像和田间整叶图像中验证检测效果。
AI.result: Mask R-CNN可有效检测特写图像中的黑斑，并能统计田间整叶图像的黑斑数量及感染面积。
AI.conclusion: 自动化检测方法为病害量化分析提供了可行方案，有助于提升农业表型分析的效率和精度。

ai_content.conclusion: 自动化检测方法为病害量化分析提供了可行方案，有助于提升农业表型分析的效率和精度。

authors_text: AJ Piergiovanni,Wei Li,Weicheng Kuo,Mohammad Saffar,Fred Bertsch,Anelia Angelova
title: Answer-Me: Multi-Task Open-Vocabulary Visual Question Answering
title_zh: Answer-Me：多任务开放词汇视觉问答
abstract: We present Answer-Me, a task-aware multi-task framework which unifies a variety of question answering tasks, such as, visual question answering, visual entailment, visual reasoning. In contrast to previous works using contrastive or generative captioning training, we propose a novel and simple recipe to pre-train a vision-language joint model, which is multi-task as well. The pre-training uses only noisy image captioning data, and is formulated to use the entire architecture end-to-end with both a strong language encoder and decoder. Our results show state-of-the-art performance, zero-shot generalization, robustness to forgetting, and competitive single-task results across a variety of question answering tasks. Our multi-task mixture training learns from tasks of various question intents and thus generalizes better, including on zero-shot vision-language tasks. We conduct experiments in the challenging multi-task and open-vocabulary settings and across a variety of datasets and tasks, such as VQA2.0, SNLI-VE, NLVR2, GQA. We observe that the proposed approach is able to generalize to unseen tasks and that more diverse mixtures lead to higher accuracy in both known and novel tasks.
summary: We present Answer-Me, a task-aware multi-task framework which unifies a variety of question answering tasks, such as, visual question answering, visual entailment, visual reasoning. In contrast to previous works using contrastive or generative captioning training, we propose a novel and simple recipe to pre-train a vision-language joint model, which is multi-task as well. The pre-training uses only noisy image captioning data, and is formulated to use the entire architecture end-to-end with both a strong language encoder and decoder. Our results show state-of-the-art performance, zero-shot generalization, robustness to forgetting, and competitive single-task results across a variety of question answering tasks. Our multi-task mixture training learns from tasks of various question intents and thus generalizes better, including on zero-shot vision-language tasks. We conduct experiments in the challenging multi-task and open-vocabulary settings and across a variety of datasets and tasks, such as VQA2.0, SNLI-VE, NLVR2, GQA. We observe that the proposed approach is able to generalize to unseen tasks and that more diverse mixtures lead to higher accuracy in both known and novel tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Answer-Me，一个任务感知的多任务框架，它统一了各种问答任务，例如视觉问答、视觉蕴涵、视觉推理。与之前使用对比或生成字幕训练的作品相比，我们提出了一种新颖而简单的方法来预训练视觉语言联合模型，该模型也是多任务的。预训练仅使用噪声图像字幕数据，并且被制定为使用具有强大语言编码器和解码器的端到端的整个架构。我们的结果显示了最先进的性能、零样本泛化、遗忘鲁棒性以及在各种问答任务中具有竞争力的单任务结果。我们的多任务混合训练从各种问题意图的任务中学习，从而更好地概括，包括零样本视觉语言任务。我们在具有挑战性的多任务和开放词汇设置以及各种数据集和任务（例如 VQA2.0、SNLI-VE、NLVR2、GQA）中进行实验。我们观察到，所提出的方法能够推广到未见过的任务，并且更多样化的混合会导致已知任务和新任务的准确性更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Answer-Me，一种统一多种视觉问答任务的多任务框架，实现开放词汇的视觉问答。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖对比或生成式字幕训练，存在数据依赖性强、泛化能力不足的问题，需探索更高效的多任务预训练方法。
AI.method: 提出基于嘈杂图像字幕数据的多任务预训练方法，端到端训练联合视觉-语言模型，结合强语言编码器与解码器，并采用多任务混合训练策略。
AI.result: 在VQA2.0、SNLI-VE等数据集上达到SOTA性能，展现零样本泛化能力、抗遗忘性及多任务混合带来的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 多任务混合训练通过多样化任务学习提升模型泛化能力，尤其在开放词汇和零样本场景中表现优异。

authors_text: Tobias Gburrek,Christoph Boeddeker,Thilo von Neumann,Tobias Cord-Landwehr,Joerg Schmalenstroeer,Reinhold Haeb-Umbach
title: A Meeting Transcription System for an Ad-Hoc Acoustic Sensor Network
title_zh: 用于特设声学传感器网络的会议转录系统
abstract: We propose a system that transcribes the conversation of a typical meeting scenario that is captured by a set of initially unsynchronized microphone arrays at unknown positions. It consists of subsystems for signal synchronization, including both sampling rate and sampling time offset estimation, diarization based on speaker and microphone array position estimation, multi-channel speech enhancement, and automatic speech recognition. With the estimated diarization information, a spatial mixture model is initialized that is used to estimate beamformer coefficients for source separation. Simulations show that the speech recognition accuracy can be improved by synchronizing and combining multiple distributed microphone arrays compared to a single compact microphone array. Furthermore, the proposed informed initialization of the spatial mixture model delivers a clear performance advantage over random initialization.
summary: We propose a system that transcribes the conversation of a typical meeting scenario that is captured by a set of initially unsynchronized microphone arrays at unknown positions. It consists of subsystems for signal synchronization, including both sampling rate and sampling time offset estimation, diarization based on speaker and microphone array position estimation, multi-channel speech enhancement, and automatic speech recognition. With the estimated diarization information, a spatial mixture model is initialized that is used to estimate beamformer coefficients for source separation. Simulations show that the speech recognition accuracy can be improved by synchronizing and combining multiple distributed microphone arrays compared to a single compact microphone array. Furthermore, the proposed informed initialization of the spatial mixture model delivers a clear performance advantage over random initialization.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种系统，可以转录典型会议场景的对话，该对话是由一组最初不同步的麦克风阵列在未知位置捕获的。它由信号同步子系统组成，包括采样率和采样时间偏移估计、基于扬声器和麦克风阵列位置估计的二值化、多通道语音增强和自动语音识别。利用估计的二值化信息，初始化空间混合模型，该模型用于估计用于源分离的波束形成器系数。仿真表明，与单个紧凑型麦克风阵列相比，通过同步和组合多个分布式麦克风阵列可以提高语音识别精度。此外，所提出的空间混合模型的知情初始化比随机初始化具有明显的性能优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对自组网声学传感器网络的会议语音转录系统，通过多麦克风阵列的同步与协同处理提升语音识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统单麦克风或未同步的分布式麦克风系统难以有效处理多说话人场景下的语音混叠与定位问题，影响转录质量。
AI.method: 系统包含信号同步（采样率与时序校准）、基于说话人定位的语音分离、多通道语音增强及自动识别模块，并通过空间混合模型初始化波束成形系数实现源分离。
AI.result: 仿真表明，同步多麦克风阵列的语音识别准确率优于单麦克风系统，且有监督的模型初始化方法显著优于随机初始化。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过多麦克风协同与智能初始化有效提升了分布式场景下的语音转录性能，为复杂声学环境下的应用提供了可行方案。

title: CCLF: A Contrastive-Curiosity-Driven Learning Framework for Sample-Efficient Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: CCLF：用于样本高效强化学习的对比好奇心驱动学习框架
comment: Full paper with supplementary material, accepted by IJCAI 2022. Acknowledgements and affiliations are updated
comments: Full paper with supplementary material, accepted by IJCAI 2022. Acknowledgements and affiliations are updated
abstract: In reinforcement learning (RL), it is challenging to learn directly from high-dimensional observations, where data augmentation has recently been shown to remedy this via encoding invariances from raw pixels. Nevertheless, we empirically find that not all samples are equally important and hence simply injecting more augmented inputs may instead cause instability in Q-learning. In this paper, we approach this problem systematically by developing a model-agnostic Contrastive-Curiosity-Driven Learning Framework (CCLF), which can fully exploit sample importance and improve learning efficiency in a self-supervised manner. Facilitated by the proposed contrastive curiosity, CCLF is capable of prioritizing the experience replay, selecting the most informative augmented inputs, and more importantly regularizing the Q-function as well as the encoder to concentrate more on under-learned data. Moreover, it encourages the agent to explore with a curiosity-based reward. As a result, the agent can focus on more informative samples and learn representation invariances more efficiently, with significantly reduced augmented inputs. We apply CCLF to several base RL algorithms and evaluate on the DeepMind Control Suite, Atari, and MiniGrid benchmarks, where our approach demonstrates superior sample efficiency and learning performances compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In reinforcement learning (RL), it is challenging to learn directly from high-dimensional observations, where data augmentation has recently been shown to remedy this via encoding invariances from raw pixels. Nevertheless, we empirically find that not all samples are equally important and hence simply injecting more augmented inputs may instead cause instability in Q-learning. In this paper, we approach this problem systematically by developing a model-agnostic Contrastive-Curiosity-Driven Learning Framework (CCLF), which can fully exploit sample importance and improve learning efficiency in a self-supervised manner. Facilitated by the proposed contrastive curiosity, CCLF is capable of prioritizing the experience replay, selecting the most informative augmented inputs, and more importantly regularizing the Q-function as well as the encoder to concentrate more on under-learned data. Moreover, it encourages the agent to explore with a curiosity-based reward. As a result, the agent can focus on more informative samples and learn representation invariances more efficiently, with significantly reduced augmented inputs. We apply CCLF to several base RL algorithms and evaluate on the DeepMind Control Suite, Atari, and MiniGrid benchmarks, where our approach demonstrates superior sample efficiency and learning performances compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在强化学习（RL）中，直接从高维观察中学习具有挑战性，最近数据增强已被证明可以通过对原始像素的不变性进行编码来解决这个问题。然而，我们凭经验发现并非所有样本都同样重要，因此简单地注入更多增强输入可能反而会导致 Q 学习的不稳定。在本文中，我们通过开发一个与模型无关的对比好奇心驱动学习框架（CCLF）来系统地解决这个问题，该框架可以充分利用样本重要性并以自我监督的方式提高学习效率。在所提出的对比好奇心的促进下，CCLF 能够优先考虑经验回放、选择信息最丰富的增强输入，更重要的是规范 Q 函数和编码器，以更多地关注学习不足的数据。此外，它还鼓励智能体以基于好奇心的奖励进行探索。因此，代理可以专注于信息更丰富的样本，并更有效地学习表示不变性，同时显着减少增强输入。我们将 CCLF 应用于多种基本 RL 算法，并在 DeepMind Control Suite、Atari 和 MiniGrid 基准测试中进行评估，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的方法展示了卓越的样本效率和学习性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CCLF的对比好奇心驱动学习框架，旨在提高强化学习中的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 在高维观测的强化学习中，直接学习存在困难，而数据增强虽能缓解问题，但简单增加增强样本可能导致Q学习不稳定，因此需更高效利用样本重要性。
AI.method: CCLF通过对比好奇心机制，优先选择经验回放中的关键样本，筛选信息量大的增强输入，并正则化Q函数与编码器，同时引入好奇心奖励以引导探索。
AI.result: 在DeepMind Control Suite、Atari和MiniGrid基准测试中，CCLF相比现有方法表现出更优的样本效率和学习性能，且显著减少增强输入需求。
AI.conclusion: CCLF通过聚焦未充分学习的数据和优化表示不变性，有效提升了强化学习的样本效率与性能。

title: Music Interpretation Analysis. A Multimodal Approach To Score-Informed Resynthesis of Piano Recordings
title_zh: 音乐诠释分析。钢琴录音乐谱再合成的多模式方法
comment: PhD Thesis. Author: F. Simonetta; tutor: S. Ntalampiras; co-tutor: F. Avanzini; Università degli studi di Milano - Dipartimento di Informatica "Giovanni Degli Antoni", 2022 Apr 22
comments: PhD Thesis. Author: F. Simonetta; tutor: S. Ntalampiras; co-tutor: F. Avanzini; Università degli studi di Milano - Dipartimento di Informatica "Giovanni Degli Antoni", 2022 Apr 22
abstract: This Thesis discusses the development of technologies for the automatic resynthesis of music recordings using digital synthesizers. First, the main issue is identified in the understanding of how Music Information Processing (MIP) methods can take into consideration the influence of the acoustic context on the music performance. For this, a novel conceptual and mathematical framework named "Music Interpretation Analysis" (MIA) is presented. In the proposed framework, a distinction is made between the "performance" - the physical action of playing - and the "interpretation" - the action that the performer wishes to achieve. Second, the Thesis describes further works aiming at the democratization of music production tools via automatic resynthesis: 1) it elaborates software and file formats for historical music archiving and multimodal machine-learning datasets; 2) it explores and extends MIP technologies; 3) it presents the mathematical foundations of the MIA framework and shows preliminary evaluations to demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach
summary: This Thesis discusses the development of technologies for the automatic resynthesis of music recordings using digital synthesizers. First, the main issue is identified in the understanding of how Music Information Processing (MIP) methods can take into consideration the influence of the acoustic context on the music performance. For this, a novel conceptual and mathematical framework named "Music Interpretation Analysis" (MIA) is presented. In the proposed framework, a distinction is made between the "performance" - the physical action of playing - and the "interpretation" - the action that the performer wishes to achieve. Second, the Thesis describes further works aiming at the democratization of music production tools via automatic resynthesis: 1) it elaborates software and file formats for historical music archiving and multimodal machine-learning datasets; 2) it explores and extends MIP technologies; 3) it presents the mathematical foundations of the MIA framework and shows preliminary evaluations to demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach
abstract_zh: 本论文讨论了使用数字合成器自动重新合成音乐录音的技术的发展。首先，主要问题在于理解音乐信息处理（MIP）方法如何考虑声学背景对音乐表演的影响。为此，提出了一种名为“音乐解释分析”（MIA）的新颖的概念和数学框架。在提议的框架中，区分了“表演”（演奏的身体动作）和“解释”（表演者希望实现的动作）。其次，本文描述了旨在通过自动重新合成实现音乐制作工具民主化的进一步工作：1）详细阐述了历史音乐存档和多模式机器学习数据集的软件和文件格式； 2）探索和扩展MIP技术； 3) 介绍了 MIA 框架的数学基础，并进行了初步评估以证明该方法的有效性

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模态方法和乐谱信息的钢琴录音自动重合成技术，通过区分演奏与诠释，提升音乐处理的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有技术未能充分考虑声学环境对音乐演奏的影响，本文旨在通过MIA框架提升自动重合成的准确性，并推动音乐制作工具的普及。
AI.method: 提出Music Interpretation Analysis（MIA）框架，区分演奏与诠释，结合多模态数据与扩展的MIP技术，并建立数学模型进行初步验证。
AI.result: 初步评估验证了MIA框架的有效性，同时开发了历史音乐归档软件和多模态机器学习数据集。
AI.conclusion: MIA框架为音乐重合成提供了新思路，推动了音乐制作工具的普及，并为后续研究奠定了基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模态方法和乐谱信息的钢琴录音自动重合成技术，通过区分演奏与诠释，提升音乐处理的准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有技术未能充分考虑声学环境对音乐演奏的影响，本文旨在通过MIA框架提升自动重合成的准确性，并推动音乐制作工具的普及。
ai_content.method: 提出Music Interpretation Analysis（MIA）框架，区分演奏与诠释，结合多模态数据与扩展的MIP技术，并建立数学模型进行初步验证。
ai_content.result: 初步评估验证了MIA框架的有效性，同时开发了历史音乐归档软件和多模态机器学习数据集。
ai_content.conclusion: MIA框架为音乐重合成提供了新思路，推动了音乐制作工具的普及，并为后续研究奠定了基础。

search_text: Music Interpretation Analysis. A Multimodal Approach To Score-Informed Resynthesis of Piano Recordings 音乐诠释分析。钢琴录音乐谱再合成的多模式方法 This Thesis discusses the development of technologies for the automatic resynthesis of music recordings using digital synthesizers. First, the main issue is identified in the understanding of how Music Information Processing (MIP) methods can take into consideration the influence of the acoustic context on the music performance. For this, a novel conceptual and mathematical framework named "Music Interpretation Analysis" (MIA) is presented. In the proposed framework, a distinction is made between the "performance" - the physical action of playing - and the "interpretation" - the action that the performer wishes to achieve. Second, the Thesis describes further works aiming at the democratization of music production tools via automatic resynthesis: 1) it elaborates software and file formats for historical music archiving and multimodal machine-learning datasets; 2) it explores and extends MIP technologies; 3) it presents the mathematical foundations of the MIA framework and shows preliminary evaluations to demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach 本论文讨论了使用数字合成器自动重新合成音乐录音的技术的发展。首先，主要问题在于理解音乐信息处理（MIP）方法如何考虑声学背景对音乐表演的影响。为此，提出了一种名为“音乐解释分析”（MIA）的新颖的概念和数学框架。在提议的框架中，区分了“表演”（演奏的身体动作）和“解释”（表演者希望实现的动作）。其次，本文描述了旨在通过自动重新合成实现音乐制作工具民主化的进一步工作：1）详细阐述了历史音乐存档和多模式机器学习数据集的软件和文件格式； 2）探索和扩展MIP技术； 3) 介绍了 MIA 框架的数学基础，并进行了初步评估以证明该方法的有效性 本文提出了一种基于多模态方法和乐谱信息的钢琴录音自动重合成技术，通过区分演奏与诠释，提升音乐处理的准确性。 Federico Simonetta cs.SD,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Ilias Chrysovergis,Manos Kamarianakis,Mike Kentros,Dimitris Angelis,Antonis Protopsaltis,George Papagiannakis
title: Assessing unconstrained surgical cuttings in VR using CNNs
title_zh: 使用 CNN 评估 VR 中无约束的手术切割
comment: 2 pages, 2 figures, Submitted to the Siggraph '22 Poster Session (Vancouver, 8-11 Aug 2022)
comments: 2 pages, 2 figures, Submitted to the Siggraph '22 Poster Session (Vancouver, 8-11 Aug 2022)
abstract: We present a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) suitable to assess unconstrained surgical cuttings, trained on a dataset created with a data augmentation technique.
summary: We present a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) suitable to assess unconstrained surgical cuttings, trained on a dataset created with a data augmentation technique.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种适合评估无约束手术切口的卷积神经网络（CNN），并在使用数据增强技术创建的数据集上进行了训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法，用于在虚拟现实环境中评估无约束手术切割操作。
AI.motivation: 现有手术技能评估方法在无约束场景下存在局限性，需开发更适应虚拟现实环境的自动化评估工具。
AI.method: 构建包含数据增强技术的手术切割数据集，并训练专用CNN模型进行切割质量评估。
AI.result: 所提出方法在手术切割评估任务中展现出良好的性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该CNN方法为虚拟现实手术培训提供了有效的评估手段，数据增强技术显著提升了模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Zijian Ying,Qianmu Li,Zhichao Lian,Jun Hou,Tong Lin,Tao Wang
title: Understanding CNNs from excitations
title_zh: 从激励中理解 CNN
abstract: Saliency maps have proven to be a highly efficacious approach for explicating the decisions of Convolutional Neural Networks. However, extant methodologies predominantly rely on gradients, which constrain their ability to explicate complex models. Furthermore, such approaches are not fully adept at leveraging negative gradient information to improve interpretive veracity. In this study, we present a novel concept, termed positive and negative excitation, which enables the direct extraction of positive and negative excitation for each layer, thus enabling complete layer-by-layer information utilization sans gradients. To organize these excitations into final saliency maps, we introduce a double-chain backpropagation procedure. A comprehensive experimental evaluation, encompassing both binary classification and multi-classification tasks, was conducted to gauge the effectiveness of our proposed method. Encouragingly, the results evince that our approach offers a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art methods in terms of salient pixel removal, minor pixel removal, and inconspicuous adversarial perturbation generation guidance. Additionally, we verify the correlation between positive and negative excitations.
summary: Saliency maps have proven to be a highly efficacious approach for explicating the decisions of Convolutional Neural Networks. However, extant methodologies predominantly rely on gradients, which constrain their ability to explicate complex models. Furthermore, such approaches are not fully adept at leveraging negative gradient information to improve interpretive veracity. In this study, we present a novel concept, termed positive and negative excitation, which enables the direct extraction of positive and negative excitation for each layer, thus enabling complete layer-by-layer information utilization sans gradients. To organize these excitations into final saliency maps, we introduce a double-chain backpropagation procedure. A comprehensive experimental evaluation, encompassing both binary classification and multi-classification tasks, was conducted to gauge the effectiveness of our proposed method. Encouragingly, the results evince that our approach offers a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art methods in terms of salient pixel removal, minor pixel removal, and inconspicuous adversarial perturbation generation guidance. Additionally, we verify the correlation between positive and negative excitations.
abstract_zh: 显着图已被证明是解释卷积神经网络决策的一种非常有效的方法。然而，现有的方法主要依赖于梯度，这限制了它们解释复杂模型的能力。此外，此类方法并不完全擅长利用负梯度信息来提高解释的准确性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个新的概念，称为正负激励，它能够直接提取每一层的正负激励，从而实现无梯度的完整的逐层信息利用。为了将这些激励组织成最终的显着性图，我们引入了双链反向传播过程。进行了全面的实验评估，包括二元分类和多分类任务，以衡量我们提出的方法的有效性。令人鼓舞的是，结果表明，我们的方法在显着像素去除、次要像素去除和不显眼的对抗性扰动生成指导方面比最先进的方法有了显着的改进。此外，我们验证了正激励和负激励之间的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正负兴奋度的新型显著性图生成方法，用于更有效地解释卷积神经网络的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 现有显著性图方法过度依赖梯度信息，无法充分利用负梯度数据，导致对复杂模型的解释能力受限。
AI.method: 引入正负兴奋度概念，通过双链反向传播机制分别提取各层正负兴奋信息并生成显著性图。
AI.result: 在二分类和多分类任务中，该方法在显著像素移除、微小像素移除和对抗扰动生成指导方面优于现有方法，并验证了正负兴奋度的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过解耦正负兴奋度实现了更精准的CNN解释，为模型可解释性研究提供了新视角。

title: Creative Uses of AI Systems and their Explanations: A Case Study from Insurance
title_zh: 人工智能系统的创造性运用及其解释：保险业案例研究
comment: Accepted at the ACM CHI 2022 Workshop on Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI)
comments: Accepted at the ACM CHI 2022 Workshop on Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI)
abstract: Recent works have recognized the need for human-centered perspectives when designing and evaluating human-AI interactions and explainable AI methods. Yet, current approaches fall short at intercepting and managing unexpected user behavior resulting from the interaction with AI systems and explainability methods of different stake-holder groups. In this work, we explore the use of AI and explainability methods in the insurance domain. In an qualitative case study with participants with different roles and professional backgrounds, we show that AI and explainability methods are used in creative ways in daily workflows, resulting in a divergence between their intended and actual use. Finally, we discuss some recommendations for the design of human-AI interactions and explainable AI methods to manage the risks and harness the potential of unexpected user behavior.
summary: Recent works have recognized the need for human-centered perspectives when designing and evaluating human-AI interactions and explainable AI methods. Yet, current approaches fall short at intercepting and managing unexpected user behavior resulting from the interaction with AI systems and explainability methods of different stake-holder groups. In this work, we explore the use of AI and explainability methods in the insurance domain. In an qualitative case study with participants with different roles and professional backgrounds, we show that AI and explainability methods are used in creative ways in daily workflows, resulting in a divergence between their intended and actual use. Finally, we discuss some recommendations for the design of human-AI interactions and explainable AI methods to manage the risks and harness the potential of unexpected user behavior.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作已经认识到在设计和评估人机交互和可解释的人工智能方法时需要以人为本的视角。然而，当前的方法在拦截和管理因与人工智能系统交互和不同利益相关者群体的可解释性方法而产生的意外用户行为方面存在不足。在这项工作中，我们探索人工智能和可解释性方法在保险领域的使用。在对不同角色和专业背景的参与者进行的定性案例研究中，我们表明人工智能和可解释性方法在日常工作流程中以创造性的方式使用，导致其预期用途和实际用途之间存在差异。最后，我们讨论了一些关于人机交互设计的建议以及可解释的人工智能方法，以管理风险并利用意外用户行为的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文通过保险领域的定性案例研究，探讨AI系统及其可解释性方法在实际工作中的创造性使用方式，并分析其预期与实际应用之间的差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在设计和评估人机交互及可解释AI方法时，未能有效应对不同利益相关者群体与AI系统互动中产生的意外行为，需从以人为本的视角探索解决方案。
AI.method: 采用定性案例研究方法，邀请具有不同角色和专业背景的参与者，观察并分析AI及可解释性方法在保险领域的实际应用情况。
AI.result: 研究发现，AI及可解释性方法在日常工作中被创造性使用，导致其预期功能与实际应用之间出现显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 需优化人机交互与可解释AI方法的设计，以管理意外行为风险并充分发挥其潜力，同时需关注不同用户群体的多样化需求。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过保险领域的定性案例研究，探讨AI系统及其可解释性方法在实际工作中的创造性使用方式，并分析其预期与实际应用之间的差异。

search_text: Creative Uses of AI Systems and their Explanations: A Case Study from Insurance 人工智能系统的创造性运用及其解释：保险业案例研究 Recent works have recognized the need for human-centered perspectives when designing and evaluating human-AI interactions and explainable AI methods. Yet, current approaches fall short at intercepting and managing unexpected user behavior resulting from the interaction with AI systems and explainability methods of different stake-holder groups. In this work, we explore the use of AI and explainability methods in the insurance domain. In an qualitative case study with participants with different roles and professional backgrounds, we show that AI and explainability methods are used in creative ways in daily workflows, resulting in a divergence between their intended and actual use. Finally, we discuss some recommendations for the design of human-AI interactions and explainable AI methods to manage the risks and harness the potential of unexpected user behavior. 最近的工作已经认识到在设计和评估人机交互和可解释的人工智能方法时需要以人为本的视角。然而，当前的方法在拦截和管理因与人工智能系统交互和不同利益相关者群体的可解释性方法而产生的意外用户行为方面存在不足。在这项工作中，我们探索人工智能和可解释性方法在保险领域的使用。在对不同角色和专业背景的参与者进行的定性案例研究中，我们表明人工智能和可解释性方法在日常工作流程中以创造性的方式使用，导致其预期用途和实际用途之间存在差异。最后，我们讨论了一些关于人机交互设计的建议以及可解释的人工智能方法，以管理风险并利用意外用户行为的潜力。 本文通过保险领域的定性案例研究，探讨AI系统及其可解释性方法在实际工作中的创造性使用方式，并分析其预期与实际应用之间的差异。 Michaela Benk,Raphael Weibel,Andrea Ferrario cs.HC

title: Revisiting Gaussian Neurons for Online Clustering with Unknown Number of Clusters
title_zh: 重新审视高斯神经元以进行未知簇数的在线聚类
abstract: Despite the recent success of artificial neural networks, more biologically plausible learning methods may be needed to resolve the weaknesses of backpropagation trained models such as catastrophic forgetting and adversarial attacks. Although these weaknesses are not specifically addressed, a novel local learning rule is presented that performs online clustering with an upper limit on the number of clusters to be found rather than a fixed cluster count. Instead of using orthogonal weight or output activation constraints, activation sparsity is achieved by mutual repulsion of lateral Gaussian neurons ensuring that multiple neuron centers cannot occupy the same location in the input domain. An update method is also presented for adjusting the widths of the Gaussian neurons in cases where the data samples can be represented by means and variances. The algorithms were applied on the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets to create filters capturing the input patterns of pixel patches of various sizes. The experimental results demonstrate stability in the learned parameters across a large number of training samples.
summary: Despite the recent success of artificial neural networks, more biologically plausible learning methods may be needed to resolve the weaknesses of backpropagation trained models such as catastrophic forgetting and adversarial attacks. Although these weaknesses are not specifically addressed, a novel local learning rule is presented that performs online clustering with an upper limit on the number of clusters to be found rather than a fixed cluster count. Instead of using orthogonal weight or output activation constraints, activation sparsity is achieved by mutual repulsion of lateral Gaussian neurons ensuring that multiple neuron centers cannot occupy the same location in the input domain. An update method is also presented for adjusting the widths of the Gaussian neurons in cases where the data samples can be represented by means and variances. The algorithms were applied on the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets to create filters capturing the input patterns of pixel patches of various sizes. The experimental results demonstrate stability in the learned parameters across a large number of training samples.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工神经网络最近取得了成功，但可能需要更多生物学上合理的学习方法来解决反向传播训练模型的弱点，例如灾难性遗忘和对抗性攻击。尽管没有具体解决这些弱点，但提出了一种新颖的本地学习规则，该规则通过对要找到的聚类数量的上限而不是固定的聚类计数来执行在线聚类。激活稀疏性不是使用正交权重或输出激活约束，而是通过横向高斯神经元的相互排斥来实现，确保多个神经元中心不能占据输入域中的同一位置。还提出了一种更新方法，用于在数据样本可以用均值和方差表示的情况下调整高斯神经元的宽度。该算法应用于 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集，以创建捕获各种大小像素块的输入模式的过滤器。实验结果证明了大量训练样本中学习参数的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯神经元的在线聚类方法，用于处理未知数量的聚类问题。
AI.motivation: 为解决传统神经网络模型存在的灾难性遗忘和对抗攻击问题，需要更符合生物特性的学习方法。
AI.method: 通过高斯神经元的相互排斥实现激活稀疏性，并动态调整神经元宽度以适应数据分布，采用在线聚类算法处理未知数量的聚类。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上的实验显示，该方法在大量训练样本下保持参数稳定性，能有效捕捉输入模式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在线聚类任务提供了稳定的解决方案，验证了高斯神经元在处理未知数量聚类时的有效性。
