title: A Novel Speech-Driven Lip-Sync Model with CNN and LSTM
title_zh: 一种采用 CNN 和 LSTM 的新型语音驱动唇形同步模型
comment: This paper has been published on CISP-BMEI 2021. See https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9624360
comments: This paper has been published on CISP-BMEI 2021. See https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9624360
abstract: Generating synchronized and natural lip movement with speech is one of the most important tasks in creating realistic virtual characters. In this paper, we present a combined deep neural network of one-dimensional convolutions and LSTM to generate vertex displacement of a 3D template face model from variable-length speech input. The motion of the lower part of the face, which is represented by the vertex movement of 3D lip shapes, is consistent with the input speech. In order to enhance the robustness of the network to different sound signals, we adapt a trained speech recognition model to extract speech feature, and a velocity loss term is adopted to reduce the jitter of generated facial animation. We recorded a series of videos of a Chinese adult speaking Mandarin and created a new speech-animation dataset to compensate the lack of such public data. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations indicate that our model is able to generate smooth and natural lip movements synchronized with speech.
summary: Generating synchronized and natural lip movement with speech is one of the most important tasks in creating realistic virtual characters. In this paper, we present a combined deep neural network of one-dimensional convolutions and LSTM to generate vertex displacement of a 3D template face model from variable-length speech input. The motion of the lower part of the face, which is represented by the vertex movement of 3D lip shapes, is consistent with the input speech. In order to enhance the robustness of the network to different sound signals, we adapt a trained speech recognition model to extract speech feature, and a velocity loss term is adopted to reduce the jitter of generated facial animation. We recorded a series of videos of a Chinese adult speaking Mandarin and created a new speech-animation dataset to compensate the lack of such public data. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations indicate that our model is able to generate smooth and natural lip movements synchronized with speech.
abstract_zh: 通过语音生成同步且自然的嘴唇运动是创建逼真的虚拟角色的最重要任务之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种一维卷积和 LSTM 的组合深度神经网络，用于根据可变长度语音输入生成 3D 模板面部模型的顶点位移。脸部下部的运动（由 3D 嘴唇形状的顶点运动表示）与输入语音一致。为了增强网络对不同声音信号的鲁棒性，我们采用经过训练的语音识别模型来提取语音特征，并采用速度损失项来减少生成的面部动画的抖动。我们录制了一系列中国成年人说普通话的视频，并创建了一个新的语音动画数据集，以弥补此类公共数据的缺乏。定性和定量评估表明，我们的模型能够生成与语音同步的平滑自然的嘴唇运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CNN和LSTM的新型语音驱动唇形同步模型，生成与语音同步的3D面部顶点位移。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟角色唇形同步技术存在自然度不足、数据集匮乏的问题，需提升模型鲁棒性并补充中文语音动画数据。
AI.method: 融合一维卷积与LSTM网络结构，利用预训练语音识别模型提取声学特征，引入速度损失函数优化动画流畅性，并构建中文普通话语音-动画数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明模型可生成平滑自然的唇部运动，定量化评估指标优于基准方法，新数据集有效验证了模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合网络结构和速度损失函数显著提升唇形同步质量，构建的中文数据集为相关研究提供重要资源。

title: AI-Driven Contextual Advertising: A Technology Report and Implication Analysis
title_zh: 人工智能驱动的情境广告：技术报告及影响分析
abstract: Programmatic advertising consists in automated auctioning of digital ad space. Every time a user requests a web page, placeholders on the page are populated with ads from the highest-bidding advertisers. The bids are typically based on information about the user, and to an increasing extent, on information about the surrounding media context. The growing interest in contextual advertising is in part a counterreaction to the current dependency on personal data, which is problematic from legal and ethical standpoints. The transition is further accelerated by developments in Artificial Intelligence (AI), which allow for a deeper semantic understanding of context and, by extension, more effective ad placement. In this article, we begin by identifying context factors that have been shown in previous research to positively influence how ads are received. We then continue to discuss applications of AI in contextual advertising, where it adds value by, e.g., extracting high-level information about media context and optimising bidding strategies. However, left unchecked, these new practices can lead to unfair ad delivery and manipulative use of context. We summarize these and other concerns for consumers, publishers and advertisers in an implication analysis.
summary: Programmatic advertising consists in automated auctioning of digital ad space. Every time a user requests a web page, placeholders on the page are populated with ads from the highest-bidding advertisers. The bids are typically based on information about the user, and to an increasing extent, on information about the surrounding media context. The growing interest in contextual advertising is in part a counterreaction to the current dependency on personal data, which is problematic from legal and ethical standpoints. The transition is further accelerated by developments in Artificial Intelligence (AI), which allow for a deeper semantic understanding of context and, by extension, more effective ad placement. In this article, we begin by identifying context factors that have been shown in previous research to positively influence how ads are received. We then continue to discuss applications of AI in contextual advertising, where it adds value by, e.g., extracting high-level information about media context and optimising bidding strategies. However, left unchecked, these new practices can lead to unfair ad delivery and manipulative use of context. We summarize these and other concerns for consumers, publishers and advertisers in an implication analysis.
abstract_zh: 程序化广告包括数字广告空间的自动拍卖。每次用户请求网页时，页面上的占位符都会填充出价最高的广告商的广告。出价通常基于有关用户的信息，并且在越来越多的程度上基于有关周围媒体环境的信息。人们对上下文广告日益增长的兴趣在一定程度上是对当前对个人数据的依赖的反作用，从法律和道德的角度来看，个人数据是有问题的。人工智能 (AI) 的发展进一步加速了这一转变，人工智能可以对上下文进行更深入的语义理解，进而实现更有效的广告投放。在本文中，我们首先确定先前研究中显示的对广告接收方式产生积极影响的背景因素。然后，我们继续讨论人工智能在情境广告中的应用，它通过提取有关媒体情境的高级信息和优化出价策略等方式来增加价值。然而，如果不加以控制，这些新做法可能会导致不公平的广告投放和对上下文的操纵性使用。我们通过影响分析总结了消费者、出版商和广告商的这些问题和其他问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人工智能在情境广告中的应用，分析其技术优势及潜在影响。
AI.motivation: 因个人数据使用的法律与伦理问题，广告行业转向情境广告，AI技术进步进一步推动这一趋势。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有研究确定影响广告效果的情境因素，并分析AI在媒体情境理解及竞价策略优化中的应用。
AI.result: AI提升广告投放精准度，但可能引发广告分配不公与情境信息滥用等问题。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的情境广告需平衡技术创新与消费者权益保护，需多方共同规范实践。

search_text: AI-Driven Contextual Advertising: A Technology Report and Implication Analysis 人工智能驱动的情境广告：技术报告及影响分析 Programmatic advertising consists in automated auctioning of digital ad space. Every time a user requests a web page, placeholders on the page are populated with ads from the highest-bidding advertisers. The bids are typically based on information about the user, and to an increasing extent, on information about the surrounding media context. The growing interest in contextual advertising is in part a counterreaction to the current dependency on personal data, which is problematic from legal and ethical standpoints. The transition is further accelerated by developments in Artificial Intelligence (AI), which allow for a deeper semantic understanding of context and, by extension, more effective ad placement. In this article, we begin by identifying context factors that have been shown in previous research to positively influence how ads are received. We then continue to discuss applications of AI in contextual advertising, where it adds value by, e.g., extracting high-level information about media context and optimising bidding strategies. However, left unchecked, these new practices can lead to unfair ad delivery and manipulative use of context. We summarize these and other concerns for consumers, publishers and advertisers in an implication analysis. 程序化广告包括数字广告空间的自动拍卖。每次用户请求网页时，页面上的占位符都会填充出价最高的广告商的广告。出价通常基于有关用户的信息，并且在越来越多的程度上基于有关周围媒体环境的信息。人们对上下文广告日益增长的兴趣在一定程度上是对当前对个人数据的依赖的反作用，从法律和道德的角度来看，个人数据是有问题的。人工智能 (AI) 的发展进一步加速了这一转变，人工智能可以对上下文进行更深入的语义理解，进而实现更有效的广告投放。在本文中，我们首先确定先前研究中显示的对广告接收方式产生积极影响的背景因素。然后，我们继续讨论人工智能在情境广告中的应用，它通过提取有关媒体情境的高级信息和优化出价策略等方式来增加价值。然而，如果不加以控制，这些新做法可能会导致不公平的广告投放和对上下文的操纵性使用。我们通过影响分析总结了消费者、出版商和广告商的这些问题和其他问题。 本文探讨人工智能在情境广告中的应用，分析其技术优势及潜在影响。 Emil Häglund,Johanna Björklund cs.AI

title: MemSeg: A semi-supervised method for image surface defect detection using differences and commonalities
title_zh: MemSeg：一种利用差异和共性进行图像表面缺陷检测的半监督方法
abstract: Under the semi-supervised framework, we propose an end-to-end memory-based segmentation network (MemSeg) to detect surface defects on industrial products. Considering the small intra-class variance of products in the same production line, from the perspective of differences and commonalities, MemSeg introduces artificially simulated abnormal samples and memory samples to assist the learning of the network. In the training phase, MemSeg explicitly learns the potential differences between normal and simulated abnormal images to obtain a robust classification hyperplane. At the same time, inspired by the mechanism of human memory, MemSeg uses a memory pool to store the general patterns of normal samples. By comparing the similarities and differences between input samples and memory samples in the memory pool to give effective guesses about abnormal regions; In the inference phase, MemSeg directly determines the abnormal regions of the input image in an end-to-end manner. Through experimental validation, MemSeg achieves the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on MVTec AD datasets with AUC scores of 99.56% and 98.84% at the image-level and pixel-level, respectively. In addition, MemSeg also has a significant advantage in inference speed benefiting from the end-to-end and straightforward network structure, which better meets the real-time requirement in industrial scenarios.
summary: Under the semi-supervised framework, we propose an end-to-end memory-based segmentation network (MemSeg) to detect surface defects on industrial products. Considering the small intra-class variance of products in the same production line, from the perspective of differences and commonalities, MemSeg introduces artificially simulated abnormal samples and memory samples to assist the learning of the network. In the training phase, MemSeg explicitly learns the potential differences between normal and simulated abnormal images to obtain a robust classification hyperplane. At the same time, inspired by the mechanism of human memory, MemSeg uses a memory pool to store the general patterns of normal samples. By comparing the similarities and differences between input samples and memory samples in the memory pool to give effective guesses about abnormal regions; In the inference phase, MemSeg directly determines the abnormal regions of the input image in an end-to-end manner. Through experimental validation, MemSeg achieves the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on MVTec AD datasets with AUC scores of 99.56% and 98.84% at the image-level and pixel-level, respectively. In addition, MemSeg also has a significant advantage in inference speed benefiting from the end-to-end and straightforward network structure, which better meets the real-time requirement in industrial scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在半监督框架下，我们提出了一种端到端的基于内存的分割网络（MemSeg）来检测工业产品的表面缺陷。考虑到同一生产线的产品类内方差较小，从差异性和共性的角度出发，MemSeg引入了人工模拟的异常样本和记忆样本来辅助网络的学习。在训练阶段，MemSeg 明确学习正常图像和模拟异常图像之间的潜在差异，以获得鲁棒的分类超平面。同时，受到人类记忆机制的启发，MemSeg使用内存池来存储正常样本的一般模式。通过比较输入样本与内存池中内存样本的异同，对异常区域给出有效的猜测；在推理阶段，MemSeg以端到端的方式直接确定输入图像的异常区域。通过实验验证，MemSeg 在 MVTec AD 数据集上实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能，图像级别和像素级别的 AUC 分数分别为 99.56% 和 98.84%。此外，受益于端到端、简单的网络结构，MemSeg在推理速度上也具有显着优势，更好地满足工业场景的实时性要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemSeg，一种基于半监督学习的工业产品表面缺陷检测方法，通过利用正常样本与异常样本的差异及正常样本的共性实现高效检测。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中缺陷样本稀缺且标注成本高，传统方法依赖大量标注数据难以满足实际需求，需探索半监督学习框架以提升检测性能与效率。
AI.method: MemSeg构建记忆池存储正常样本的通用模式，通过显式学习正常与模拟异常样本的差异获得分类超平面，并利用记忆池样本与输入的相似性差异定位异常区域，实现端到端推理。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD数据集上达到图像级99.56%和像素级98.84%的AUC指标，且因网络结构简洁，在推理速度上具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: MemSeg通过结合差异学习与记忆机制，在有限标注条件下实现了工业表面缺陷检测的最先进性能，满足实时性需求。

authors_text: Yuansheng Wang,Wangbin Sun,Kun Xu,Zulun Zhu,Liang Chen,Zibin Zheng
title: FastGCL: Fast Self-Supervised Learning on Graphs via Contrastive Neighborhood Aggregation
title_zh: FastGCL：通过对比邻域聚合对图进行快速自监督学习
abstract: Graph contrastive learning (GCL), as a popular approach to graph self-supervised learning, has recently achieved a non-negligible effect. To achieve superior performance, the majority of existing GCL methods elaborate on graph data augmentation to construct appropriate contrastive pairs. However, existing methods place more emphasis on the complex graph data augmentation which requires extra time overhead, and pay less attention to developing contrastive schemes specific to encoder characteristics. We argue that a better contrastive scheme should be tailored to the characteristics of graph neural networks (e.g., neighborhood aggregation) and propose a simple yet effective method named FastGCL. Specifically, by constructing weighted-aggregated and non-aggregated neighborhood information as positive and negative samples respectively, FastGCL identifies the potential semantic information of data without disturbing the graph topology and node attributes, resulting in faster training and convergence speeds. Extensive experiments have been conducted on node classification and graph classification tasks, showing that FastGCL has competitive classification performance and significant training speedup compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Graph contrastive learning (GCL), as a popular approach to graph self-supervised learning, has recently achieved a non-negligible effect. To achieve superior performance, the majority of existing GCL methods elaborate on graph data augmentation to construct appropriate contrastive pairs. However, existing methods place more emphasis on the complex graph data augmentation which requires extra time overhead, and pay less attention to developing contrastive schemes specific to encoder characteristics. We argue that a better contrastive scheme should be tailored to the characteristics of graph neural networks (e.g., neighborhood aggregation) and propose a simple yet effective method named FastGCL. Specifically, by constructing weighted-aggregated and non-aggregated neighborhood information as positive and negative samples respectively, FastGCL identifies the potential semantic information of data without disturbing the graph topology and node attributes, resulting in faster training and convergence speeds. Extensive experiments have been conducted on node classification and graph classification tasks, showing that FastGCL has competitive classification performance and significant training speedup compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 图对比学习（GCL）作为一种流行的图自监督学习方法，最近取得了不可忽视的效果。为了实现卓越的性能，大多数现有的 GCL 方法都详细阐述了图数据增强以构建适当的对比对。然而，现有方法更注重复杂的图数据增强，这需要额外的时间开销，而较少关注开发特定于编码器特性的对比方案。我们认为，应该根据图神经网络的特征（例如邻域聚合）定制更好的对比方案，并提出一种简单而有效的方法，称为 FastGCL。具体来说，FastGCL通过分别构造加权聚合和非聚合邻域信息作为正样本和负样本，在不干扰图拓扑和节点属性的情况下识别数据的潜在语义信息，从而获得更快的训练和收敛速度。在节点分类和图分类任务上进行了大量的实验，表明与现有最先进的方法相比，FastGCL 具有有竞争力的分类性能和显着的训练加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FastGCL方法，通过对比邻域聚合实现快速图自监督学习。
AI.motivation: 现有图对比学习方法过度依赖复杂的数据增强，忽视了针对编码器特性的对比方案设计，导致训练效率低下。
AI.method: 构造加权聚合邻域信息作为正样本、非聚合邻域信息作为负样本，利用图神经网络的邻域聚合特性进行对比学习。
AI.result: 在节点分类和图分类任务中，FastGCL在保持竞争力的同时显著提升了训练速度。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性设计对比方案，FastGCL在不破坏图结构的前提下实现了高效且有效的自监督学习。

search_text: FastGCL: Fast Self-Supervised Learning on Graphs via Contrastive Neighborhood Aggregation FastGCL：通过对比邻域聚合对图进行快速自监督学习 Graph contrastive learning (GCL), as a popular approach to graph self-supervised learning, has recently achieved a non-negligible effect. To achieve superior performance, the majority of existing GCL methods elaborate on graph data augmentation to construct appropriate contrastive pairs. However, existing methods place more emphasis on the complex graph data augmentation which requires extra time overhead, and pay less attention to developing contrastive schemes specific to encoder characteristics. We argue that a better contrastive scheme should be tailored to the characteristics of graph neural networks (e.g., neighborhood aggregation) and propose a simple yet effective method named FastGCL. Specifically, by constructing weighted-aggregated and non-aggregated neighborhood information as positive and negative samples respectively, FastGCL identifies the potential semantic information of data without disturbing the graph topology and node attributes, resulting in faster training and convergence speeds. Extensive experiments have been conducted on node classification and graph classification tasks, showing that FastGCL has competitive classification performance and significant training speedup compared to existing state-of-the-art methods. 图对比学习（GCL）作为一种流行的图自监督学习方法，最近取得了不可忽视的效果。为了实现卓越的性能，大多数现有的 GCL 方法都详细阐述了图数据增强以构建适当的对比对。然而，现有方法更注重复杂的图数据增强，这需要额外的时间开销，而较少关注开发特定于编码器特性的对比方案。我们认为，应该根据图神经网络的特征（例如邻域聚合）定制更好的对比方案，并提出一种简单而有效的方法，称为 FastGCL。具体来说，FastGCL通过分别构造加权聚合和非聚合邻域信息作为正样本和负样本，在不干扰图拓扑和节点属性的情况下识别数据的潜在语义信息，从而获得更快的训练和收敛速度。在节点分类和图分类任务上进行了大量的实验，表明与现有最先进的方法相比，FastGCL 具有有竞争力的分类性能和显着的训练加速。 本文提出FastGCL方法，通过对比邻域聚合实现快速图自监督学习。 Yuansheng Wang,Wangbin Sun,Kun Xu,Zulun Zhu,Liang Chen,Zibin Zheng cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhenwei Tang,Shichao Pei,Zhao Zhang,Yongchun Zhu,Fuzhen Zhuang,Robert Hoehndorf,Xiangliang Zhang
title: Positive-Unlabeled Learning with Adversarial Data Augmentation for Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 通过对抗性数据增强进行正向无标记学习以完成知识图
abstract: Most real-world knowledge graphs (KG) are far from complete and comprehensive. This problem has motivated efforts in predicting the most plausible missing facts to complete a given KG, i.e., knowledge graph completion (KGC). However, existing KGC methods suffer from two main issues, 1) the false negative issue, i.e., the sampled negative training instances may include potential true facts; and 2) the data sparsity issue, i.e., true facts account for only a tiny part of all possible facts. To this end, we propose positive-unlabeled learning with adversarial data augmentation (PUDA) for KGC. In particular, PUDA tailors positive-unlabeled risk estimator for the KGC task to deal with the false negative issue. Furthermore, to address the data sparsity issue, PUDA achieves a data augmentation strategy by unifying adversarial training and positive-unlabeled learning under the positive-unlabeled minimax game. Extensive experimental results on real-world benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and compatibility of our proposed method.
summary: Most real-world knowledge graphs (KG) are far from complete and comprehensive. This problem has motivated efforts in predicting the most plausible missing facts to complete a given KG, i.e., knowledge graph completion (KGC). However, existing KGC methods suffer from two main issues, 1) the false negative issue, i.e., the sampled negative training instances may include potential true facts; and 2) the data sparsity issue, i.e., true facts account for only a tiny part of all possible facts. To this end, we propose positive-unlabeled learning with adversarial data augmentation (PUDA) for KGC. In particular, PUDA tailors positive-unlabeled risk estimator for the KGC task to deal with the false negative issue. Furthermore, to address the data sparsity issue, PUDA achieves a data augmentation strategy by unifying adversarial training and positive-unlabeled learning under the positive-unlabeled minimax game. Extensive experimental results on real-world benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and compatibility of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 大多数现实世界的知识图（KG）远非完整和全面。这个问题促使人们努力预测最可能缺失的事实来完成给定的知识图谱，即知识图补全（KGC）。然而，现有的KGC方法存在两个主要问题，1）假阴性问题，即采样的负训练实例可能包含潜在的真实事实； 2）数据稀疏问题，即真实事实只占所有可能事实的一小部分。为此，我们为 KGC 提出了带有对抗性数据增强（PUDA）的正向无标记学习。特别是，PUDA为KGC任务定制了正未标记风险估计器来处理假阴性问题。此外，为了解决数据稀疏问题，PUDA通过在正无标记极小极大博弈下统一对抗性训练和正无标记学习来实现数据增强策略。对现实世界基准数据集的大量实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性和兼容性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合正样本-未标记学习与对抗数据增强的PUDA方法，用于解决知识图谱补全中的假阴性与数据稀疏性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱补全方法存在两个核心问题：1) 负样本可能包含真实事实（假阴性问题）；2) 真实事实占比极低导致数据稀疏。
AI.method: 设计针对KGC任务的正样本-未标记风险估计器以缓解假阴性问题，并通过统一对抗训练与正样本-未标记学习的最小最大博弈框架实现数据增强策略。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界基准数据集上的实验验证了PUDA方法的有效性与兼容性。
AI.conclusion: PUDA方法通过创新性结合两种技术有效解决了知识图谱补全中的关键挑战，为该领域提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Mauricio Mendez-Ruiz,Francisco Lopez-Tiro,Jonathan El-Beze,Vincent Estrade,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz1,Jacques Hubert,Andres Mendez-Vazquez,Christian Daul
title: On the generalization capabilities of FSL methods through domain adaptation: a case study in endoscopic kidney stone image classification
title_zh: 通过领域适应实现 FSL 方法的泛化能力：内窥镜肾结石图像分类案例研究
abstract: Deep learning has shown great promise in diverse areas of computer vision, such as image classification, object detection and semantic segmentation, among many others. However, as it has been repeatedly demonstrated, deep learning methods trained on a dataset do not generalize well to datasets from other domains or even to similar datasets, due to data distribution shifts. In this work, we propose the use of a meta-learning based few-shot learning approach to alleviate these problems. In order to demonstrate its efficacy, we use two datasets of kidney stones samples acquired with different endoscopes and different acquisition conditions. The results show how such methods are indeed capable of handling domain-shifts by attaining an accuracy of 74.38% and 88.52% in the 5-way 5-shot and 5-way 20-shot settings respectively. Instead, in the same dataset, traditional Deep Learning (DL) methods attain only an accuracy of 45%.
summary: Deep learning has shown great promise in diverse areas of computer vision, such as image classification, object detection and semantic segmentation, among many others. However, as it has been repeatedly demonstrated, deep learning methods trained on a dataset do not generalize well to datasets from other domains or even to similar datasets, due to data distribution shifts. In this work, we propose the use of a meta-learning based few-shot learning approach to alleviate these problems. In order to demonstrate its efficacy, we use two datasets of kidney stones samples acquired with different endoscopes and different acquisition conditions. The results show how such methods are indeed capable of handling domain-shifts by attaining an accuracy of 74.38% and 88.52% in the 5-way 5-shot and 5-way 20-shot settings respectively. Instead, in the same dataset, traditional Deep Learning (DL) methods attain only an accuracy of 45%.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在计算机视觉的各个领域（例如图像分类、对象检测和语义分割等）显示出巨大的前景。然而，正如已经反复证明的那样，由于数据分布的变化，在数据集上训练的深度学习方法不能很好地推广到其他领域的数据集，甚至不能推广到类似的数据集。在这项工作中，我们建议使用基于元学习的小样本学习方法来缓解这些问题。为了证明其功效，我们使用了通过不同内窥镜和不同采集条件采集的肾结石样本的两个数据集。结果表明，这些方法确实能够处理域转移，在 5 路 5 次拍摄和 5 路 20 次拍摄设置中分别获得 74.38% 和 88.52% 的准确率。相反，在同一数据集中，传统深度学习 (DL) 方法的准确率仅为 45%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过领域适应提升少样本学习（FSL）方法在内窥镜肾结石图像分类中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在面对不同领域或数据分布变化时泛化能力不足，传统方法在跨领域肾结石图像分类任务中表现不佳（仅45%准确率）。
AI.method: 提出基于元学习的少样本学习框架，结合领域适应技术，利用两个不同内窥镜和采集条件下的肾结石数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在5-way 5-shot和5-way 20-shot设置下分别达到74.38%和88.52%的准确率，显著优于传统深度学习方法（45%）。
AI.conclusion: 元学习驱动的少样本学习方法能有效缓解领域偏移问题，提升跨领域医学图像分类的泛化性能。

authors_text: Jannis Blauth,Stephan Held,Dirk Müller,Niklas Schlomberg,Vera Traub,Thorben Tröbst,Jens Vygen
title: Vehicle Routing with Time-Dependent Travel Times: Theory, Practice, and Benchmarks
title_zh: 具有与时间相关的行程时间的车辆路线：理论、实践和基准
abstract: We develop theoretical foundations and practical algorithms for vehicle routing with time-dependent travel times. We also provide new benchmark instances and experimental results. First, we study basic operations on piecewise linear arrival time functions. In particular, we devise a faster algorithm to compute the pointwise minimum of a set of piecewise linear functions and a monotonicity-preserving variant of the Imai-Iri algorithm to approximate an arrival time function with fewer breakpoints. Next, we show how to evaluate insertion and deletion operations in tours efficiently and update the underlying data structure faster than previously known when a tour changes. Evaluating a tour also requires a scheduling step which is non-trivial in the presence of time windows and time-dependent travel times. We show how to perform this in linear time. Based on these results, we develop a local search heuristic to solve real-world vehicle routing problems with various constraints efficiently and report experimental results on classical benchmarks. Since most of these do not have time-dependent travel times, we generate and publish new benchmark instances that are based on real-world data. This data also demonstrates the importance of considering time-dependent travel times in instances with tight time windows.
summary: We develop theoretical foundations and practical algorithms for vehicle routing with time-dependent travel times. We also provide new benchmark instances and experimental results. First, we study basic operations on piecewise linear arrival time functions. In particular, we devise a faster algorithm to compute the pointwise minimum of a set of piecewise linear functions and a monotonicity-preserving variant of the Imai-Iri algorithm to approximate an arrival time function with fewer breakpoints. Next, we show how to evaluate insertion and deletion operations in tours efficiently and update the underlying data structure faster than previously known when a tour changes. Evaluating a tour also requires a scheduling step which is non-trivial in the presence of time windows and time-dependent travel times. We show how to perform this in linear time. Based on these results, we develop a local search heuristic to solve real-world vehicle routing problems with various constraints efficiently and report experimental results on classical benchmarks. Since most of these do not have time-dependent travel times, we generate and publish new benchmark instances that are based on real-world data. This data also demonstrates the importance of considering time-dependent travel times in instances with tight time windows.
abstract_zh: 我们为具有与时间相关的行程时间的车辆路线开发理论基础和实用算法。我们还提供了新的基准实例和实验结果。首先，我们研究分段线性到达时间函数的基本运算。特别是，我们设计了一种更快的算法来计算一组分段线性函数的逐点最小值，以及 Imai-Iri 算法的单调性保持变体，以用更少的断点来近似到达时间函数。接下来，我们展示如何有效地评估游览中的插入和删除操作，并在游览发生变化时比以前更快地更新底层数据结构。评估旅行还需要一个安排步骤，这在存在时间窗口和与时间相关的旅行时间的情况下并非易事。我们展示了如何在线性时间内执行此操作。基于这些结果，我们开发了一种本地搜索启发式方法，可以有效地解决具有各种约束的现实世界车辆路径问题，并报告经典基准的实验结果。由于其中大多数没有与时间相关的旅行时间，因此我们生成并发布基于真实数据的新基准实例。该数据还证明了在时间窗口紧张的情况下考虑与时间相关的旅行时间的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有时间依赖旅行时间的车辆路径问题，开发理论算法、高效操作方法及新基准测试实例。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆路径问题研究多忽略时间依赖旅行时间，而实际场景中时间窗口约束严格时，动态交通状况对路径规划影响显著。
AI.method: 提出分段线性函数的高效运算算法（如点最小值计算、单调性保持的Imai-Iri算法），设计支持动态调整的路径评估与更新机制，并开发基于局部搜索的求解启发式算法。
AI.result: 构建了包含真实数据的新基准实例，证明时间依赖因素对严格时间窗口场景下路径规划效果的显著影响，实验验证算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 时间依赖旅行时间建模对提升车辆路径规划质量至关重要，本文方法为相关研究提供了理论支持与实践工具。

search_text: Vehicle Routing with Time-Dependent Travel Times: Theory, Practice, and Benchmarks 具有与时间相关的行程时间的车辆路线：理论、实践和基准 We develop theoretical foundations and practical algorithms for vehicle routing with time-dependent travel times. We also provide new benchmark instances and experimental results. First, we study basic operations on piecewise linear arrival time functions. In particular, we devise a faster algorithm to compute the pointwise minimum of a set of piecewise linear functions and a monotonicity-preserving variant of the Imai-Iri algorithm to approximate an arrival time function with fewer breakpoints. Next, we show how to evaluate insertion and deletion operations in tours efficiently and update the underlying data structure faster than previously known when a tour changes. Evaluating a tour also requires a scheduling step which is non-trivial in the presence of time windows and time-dependent travel times. We show how to perform this in linear time. Based on these results, we develop a local search heuristic to solve real-world vehicle routing problems with various constraints efficiently and report experimental results on classical benchmarks. Since most of these do not have time-dependent travel times, we generate and publish new benchmark instances that are based on real-world data. This data also demonstrates the importance of considering time-dependent travel times in instances with tight time windows. 我们为具有与时间相关的行程时间的车辆路线开发理论基础和实用算法。我们还提供了新的基准实例和实验结果。首先，我们研究分段线性到达时间函数的基本运算。特别是，我们设计了一种更快的算法来计算一组分段线性函数的逐点最小值，以及 Imai-Iri 算法的单调性保持变体，以用更少的断点来近似到达时间函数。接下来，我们展示如何有效地评估游览中的插入和删除操作，并在游览发生变化时比以前更快地更新底层数据结构。评估旅行还需要一个安排步骤，这在存在时间窗口和与时间相关的旅行时间的情况下并非易事。我们展示了如何在线性时间内执行此操作。基于这些结果，我们开发了一种本地搜索启发式方法，可以有效地解决具有各种约束的现实世界车辆路径问题，并报告经典基准的实验结果。由于其中大多数没有与时间相关的旅行时间，因此我们生成并发布基于真实数据的新基准实例。该数据还证明了在时间窗口紧张的情况下考虑与时间相关的旅行时间的重要性。 本文研究具有时间依赖旅行时间的车辆路径问题，开发理论算法、高效操作方法及新基准测试实例。 Jannis Blauth,Stephan Held,Dirk Müller,Niklas Schlomberg,Vera Traub,Thorben Tröbst,Jens Vygen cs.DS

title: Let's Agree to Agree: Targeting Consensus for Incomplete Preferences through Majority Dynamics
title_zh: 让我们一致同意：通过多数动态达成不完整偏好的共识
comment: Extended version of forthcoming paper in Proceedings of the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-2022)
comments: Extended version of forthcoming paper in Proceedings of the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-2022)
abstract: We study settings in which agents with incomplete preferences need to make a collective decision. We focus on a process of majority dynamics where issues are addressed one at a time and undecided agents follow the opinion of the majority. We assess the effects of this process on various consensus notions -- such as the Condorcet winner -- and show that in the worst case, myopic adherence to the majority damages existing consensus; yet, simulation experiments indicate that the damage is often mild. We also examine scenarios where the chair of the decision process can control the existence (or the identity) of consensus, by determining the order in which the issues are discussed.
summary: We study settings in which agents with incomplete preferences need to make a collective decision. We focus on a process of majority dynamics where issues are addressed one at a time and undecided agents follow the opinion of the majority. We assess the effects of this process on various consensus notions -- such as the Condorcet winner -- and show that in the worst case, myopic adherence to the majority damages existing consensus; yet, simulation experiments indicate that the damage is often mild. We also examine scenarios where the chair of the decision process can control the existence (or the identity) of consensus, by determining the order in which the issues are discussed.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有不完整偏好的代理人需要做出集体决策的环境。我们关注的是多数人动态的过程，其中问题一次解决一个，犹豫不决的代理人遵循大多数人的意见。我们评估了这一过程对各种共识概念（例如孔多塞获胜者）的影响，并表明在最坏的情况下，短视地坚持多数会损害现有共识；然而，模拟实验表明，损坏通常是轻微的。我们还研究了决策过程主席可以通过确定问题讨论顺序来控制共识的存在（或身份）的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有不完全偏好的代理人在集体决策中通过多数动态达成共识的问题，分析该过程对共识概念的影响及主席控制议题顺序的作用。
AI.motivation: 集体决策中存在不完全偏好时，如何通过多数动态实现有效共识是核心挑战，需评估该过程对共识的潜在损害及控制策略。
AI.method: 通过多数动态模型逐个处理议题，未决代理遵循多数意见，结合理论分析与模拟实验，并研究主席控制议题顺序对共识的影响。
AI.result: 最坏情况下多数动态可能损害现有共识（如康多塞胜者），但模拟显示实际损害较轻；主席可通过议题顺序控制共识存在性或身份。
AI.conclusion: 多数动态在集体决策中风险可控，但需警惕潜在损害，主席的议题排序策略可有效引导共识形成。

title: The Application of Energy and Laplacian Energy of Hesitancy Fuzzy Graph Based on Similarity Measures in Decision Making Problems
title_zh: 基于相似测度的犹豫模糊图能量和拉普拉斯能量在决策问题中的应用
abstract: In this article, a new hesitancy fuzzy similarity measure is defined and then used to develop the matrix of hesitancy fuzzy similarity measures, which is subsequently used to classify hesitancy fuzzy graph using the working procedure. We build a working procedure (Algorithm) for estimating the eligible reputation scores values of experts by applying hesitancy fuzzy preference relationships (HFPRs) and the usual similarity degree of one distinct HFPRs to each other's. As the last step, we provide real time numerical examples to demonstrate and validate our working procedure.
summary: In this article, a new hesitancy fuzzy similarity measure is defined and then used to develop the matrix of hesitancy fuzzy similarity measures, which is subsequently used to classify hesitancy fuzzy graph using the working procedure. We build a working procedure (Algorithm) for estimating the eligible reputation scores values of experts by applying hesitancy fuzzy preference relationships (HFPRs) and the usual similarity degree of one distinct HFPRs to each other's. As the last step, we provide real time numerical examples to demonstrate and validate our working procedure.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，定义了一种新的犹豫模糊相似性度量，然后用于开发犹豫模糊相似性度量矩阵，随后使用该工作程序对犹豫模糊图进行分类。我们建立了一个工作程序（算法），通过应用犹豫模糊偏好关系（HFPR）和一个不同的 HFPR 彼此之间的通常相似度来估计专家的合格声誉评分值。作为最后一步，我们提供实时数值示例来演示和验证我们的工作程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于相似性度量的犹豫模糊图能量计算方法，并应用于决策问题求解。
AI.motivation: 现有决策方法难以有效处理复杂不确定性信息，而犹豫模糊集能更精准表达模糊性，需建立新模型提升决策可靠性。
AI.method: 定义新型犹豫模糊相似性度量，构建相似性矩阵并设计分类算法，结合HFPRs与相似度计算专家声誉值，通过数值实例验证有效性。
AI.result: 成功开发出基于犹豫模糊图能量的决策流程，实例验证表明该方法能有效处理不确定性信息并提升决策质量。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为复杂决策场景提供了新型数学工具，通过能量特征提取与相似性分析，显著增强了模糊环境下的决策鲁棒性。

conclusion: 所提方法为复杂决策场景提供了新型数学工具，通过能量特征提取与相似性分析，显著增强了模糊环境下的决策鲁棒性。
search_text: The Application of Energy and Laplacian Energy of Hesitancy Fuzzy Graph Based on Similarity Measures in Decision Making Problems 基于相似测度的犹豫模糊图能量和拉普拉斯能量在决策问题中的应用 In this article, a new hesitancy fuzzy similarity measure is defined and then used to develop the matrix of hesitancy fuzzy similarity measures, which is subsequently used to classify hesitancy fuzzy graph using the working procedure. We build a working procedure (Algorithm) for estimating the eligible reputation scores values of experts by applying hesitancy fuzzy preference relationships (HFPRs) and the usual similarity degree of one distinct HFPRs to each other's. As the last step, we provide real time numerical examples to demonstrate and validate our working procedure. 在本文中，定义了一种新的犹豫模糊相似性度量，然后用于开发犹豫模糊相似性度量矩阵，随后使用该工作程序对犹豫模糊图进行分类。我们建立了一个工作程序（算法），通过应用犹豫模糊偏好关系（HFPR）和一个不同的 HFPR 彼此之间的通常相似度来估计专家的合格声誉评分值。作为最后一步，我们提供实时数值示例来演示和验证我们的工作程序。 本文提出基于相似性度量的犹豫模糊图能量计算方法，并应用于决策问题求解。 Rajagopal Reddy N,Sharief Basha Shaik cs.AI

title: Power to the springs: Passive elements are sufficient to drive push-off in human walking
title_zh: 弹簧的动力：被动元件足以推动人类行走
abstract: For the impulsive ankle push-off (APO) observed in human walking two muscle-tendon-units (MTUs) spanning the ankle joint play an important role: Gastrocnemius (GAS) and Soleus (SOL). GAS and SOL load the Achilles tendon to store elastic energy during stance followed by a rapid energy release during APO. We use a neuromuscular simulation (NMS) and a bipedal robot to investigate the role of GAS and SOL on the APO. We optimize the simulation for a robust gait and then sequentially replace the MTUs of (1) GAS, (2) SOL and (3) GAS and SOL by linear springs. To validate the simulation, we implement NMS-3 on a bipedal robot. Simulation and robot walk steady for all trials showing an impulsive APO. Our results imply that the elastic MTU properties shape the impulsive APO. For prosthesis or robot design that is, no complex ankle actuation is needed to obtain an impulsive APO, if more mechanical intelligence is incorporated in the design.
summary: For the impulsive ankle push-off (APO) observed in human walking two muscle-tendon-units (MTUs) spanning the ankle joint play an important role: Gastrocnemius (GAS) and Soleus (SOL). GAS and SOL load the Achilles tendon to store elastic energy during stance followed by a rapid energy release during APO. We use a neuromuscular simulation (NMS) and a bipedal robot to investigate the role of GAS and SOL on the APO. We optimize the simulation for a robust gait and then sequentially replace the MTUs of (1) GAS, (2) SOL and (3) GAS and SOL by linear springs. To validate the simulation, we implement NMS-3 on a bipedal robot. Simulation and robot walk steady for all trials showing an impulsive APO. Our results imply that the elastic MTU properties shape the impulsive APO. For prosthesis or robot design that is, no complex ankle actuation is needed to obtain an impulsive APO, if more mechanical intelligence is incorporated in the design.
abstract_zh: 对于人类行走中观察到的踝关节脉冲推出 (APO)，跨越踝关节的两个肌肉肌腱单位 (MTU) 发挥着重要作用：腓肠肌 (GAS) 和比目鱼肌 (SOL)。 GAS 和 SOL 在站立期间加载跟腱以存储弹性能量，然后在 APO 期间快速释放能量。我们使用神经肌肉模拟 (NMS) 和双足机器人来研究 GAS 和 SOL 对 APO 的作用。我们优化了稳健步态的模拟，然后依次用线性弹簧替换 (1) GAS、(2) SOL 和 (3) GAS 和 SOL 的 MTU。为了验证模拟，我们在双足机器人上实现了 NMS-3。所有试验的模拟和机器人行走均稳定，显示出冲动的 APO。我们的结果表明弹性 MTU 特性塑造了脉冲 APO。也就是说，对于假肢或机器人设计，如果设计中融入了更多的机械智能，则不需要复杂的脚踝驱动即可获得脉冲 APO。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究人类行走时踝关节推离动作（APO）是否依赖肌肉活动，通过模拟和机器人实验验证被动弹性元件是否足以驱动APO。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为肌肉-肌腱单元（MTUs）是驱动APO的核心，但作者质疑是否可通过被动弹性结构实现类似效果，以简化假肢或机器人设计。
AI.method: 使用神经肌肉模拟（NMS）和双足机器人，依次用线性弹簧替代比目鱼肌（SOL）、腓肠肌（GAS）及两者，验证被动元件对APO的影响。
AI.result: 模拟与机器人实验均显示，替换为弹簧后仍能实现稳定的冲动式APO，表明弹性MTU特性是APO的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 设计假肢或机器人时无需复杂踝关节驱动装置，通过集成被动弹性元件即可实现类似人类的冲动式推离动作。

title: Cross-Domain Correlation Distillation for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation in Nighttime Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 夜间语义分割中无监督域适应的跨域相关蒸馏
abstract: The performance of nighttime semantic segmentation is restricted by the poor illumination and a lack of pixel-wise annotation, which severely limit its application in autonomous driving. Existing works, e.g., using the twilight as the intermediate target domain to perform the adaptation from daytime to nighttime, may fail to cope with the inherent difference between datasets caused by the camera equipment and the urban style. Faced with these two types of domain shifts, i.e., the illumination and the inherent difference of the datasets, we propose a novel domain adaptation framework via cross-domain correlation distillation, called CCDistill. The invariance of illumination or inherent difference between two images is fully explored so as to make up for the lack of labels for nighttime images. Specifically, we extract the content and style knowledge contained in features, calculate the degree of inherent or illumination difference between two images. The domain adaptation is achieved using the invariance of the same kind of difference. Extensive experiments on Dark Zurich and ACDC demonstrate that CCDistill achieves the state-of-the-art performance for nighttime semantic segmentation. Notably, our method is a one-stage domain adaptation network which can avoid affecting the inference time. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ghuan99/CCDistill.
summary: The performance of nighttime semantic segmentation is restricted by the poor illumination and a lack of pixel-wise annotation, which severely limit its application in autonomous driving. Existing works, e.g., using the twilight as the intermediate target domain to perform the adaptation from daytime to nighttime, may fail to cope with the inherent difference between datasets caused by the camera equipment and the urban style. Faced with these two types of domain shifts, i.e., the illumination and the inherent difference of the datasets, we propose a novel domain adaptation framework via cross-domain correlation distillation, called CCDistill. The invariance of illumination or inherent difference between two images is fully explored so as to make up for the lack of labels for nighttime images. Specifically, we extract the content and style knowledge contained in features, calculate the degree of inherent or illumination difference between two images. The domain adaptation is achieved using the invariance of the same kind of difference. Extensive experiments on Dark Zurich and ACDC demonstrate that CCDistill achieves the state-of-the-art performance for nighttime semantic segmentation. Notably, our method is a one-stage domain adaptation network which can avoid affecting the inference time. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ghuan99/CCDistill.
abstract_zh: 夜间语义分割的性能受到光照较差和缺乏像素级标注的限制，严重限制了其在自动驾驶中的应用。现有的工作，例如使用暮光作为中间目标域来进行从白天到夜间的适应，可能无法应对由摄像设备和城市风格引起的数据集之间的固有差异。面对这两种类型的域转移，即数据集的光照和固有差异，我们通过跨域相关性蒸馏提出了一种新颖的域适应框架，称为 CCDistill。充分挖掘两幅图像之间的光照不变性或固有差异，以弥补夜间图像标签的不足。具体来说，我们提取特征中包含的内容和风格知识，计算两幅图像之间的固有或光照差异程度。域自适应是利用同类差异的不变性来实现的。在 Dark Zurich 和 ACDC 上进行的大量实验表明 CCDistill 在夜间语义分割方面实现了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，我们的方法是一种单阶段域适应网络，可以避免影响推理时间。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/guan99/CCDistill 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督领域自适应框架CCDistill，解决夜间语义分割中因光照不足和数据集固有差异导致的性能限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过黄昏作为中间域进行昼夜迁移，但难以应对相机设备差异和城市风格差异引起的固有领域偏移，且夜间标注数据稀缺。
AI.method: 通过跨领域相关性蒸馏，提取特征中的内容与风格知识，计算图像间固有差异和光照差异程度，利用相同差异的不变性实现领域对齐。
AI.result: 在Dark Zurich和ACDC数据集上达到夜间语义分割的最先进性能，且作为一阶段网络不增加推理时间。
AI.conclusion: CCDistill有效解决了光照与固有领域偏移问题，在保持效率的同时显著提升夜间分割性能。

authors_text: Sangwook Baek,Yongsup Park,Youngo Park,Jungmin Lee,Kwangpyo Choi
title: Lightweight Image Enhancement Network for Mobile Devices Using Self-Feature Extraction and Dense Modulation
title_zh: 使用自特征提取和密集调制的移动设备轻量级图像增强网络
abstract: Convolutional neural network (CNN) based image enhancement methods such as super-resolution and detail enhancement have achieved remarkable performances. However, amounts of operations including convolution and parameters within the networks cost high computing power and need huge memory resource, which limits the applications with on-device requirements. Lightweight image enhancement network should restore details, texture, and structural information from low-resolution input images while keeping their fidelity. To address these issues, a lightweight image enhancement network is proposed. The proposed network include self-feature extraction module which produces modulation parameters from low-quality image itself, and provides them to modulate the features in the network. Also, dense modulation block is proposed for unit block of the proposed network, which uses dense connections of concatenated features applied in modulation layers. Experimental results demonstrate better performance over existing approaches in terms of both quantitative and qualitative evaluations.
summary: Convolutional neural network (CNN) based image enhancement methods such as super-resolution and detail enhancement have achieved remarkable performances. However, amounts of operations including convolution and parameters within the networks cost high computing power and need huge memory resource, which limits the applications with on-device requirements. Lightweight image enhancement network should restore details, texture, and structural information from low-resolution input images while keeping their fidelity. To address these issues, a lightweight image enhancement network is proposed. The proposed network include self-feature extraction module which produces modulation parameters from low-quality image itself, and provides them to modulate the features in the network. Also, dense modulation block is proposed for unit block of the proposed network, which uses dense connections of concatenated features applied in modulation layers. Experimental results demonstrate better performance over existing approaches in terms of both quantitative and qualitative evaluations.
abstract_zh: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的超分辨率和细节增强等图像增强方法取得了显着的性能。然而，网络中的卷积和参数等大量操作需要很高的计算能力，并且需要大量的内存资源，这限制了有设备端要求的应用。轻量级图像增强网络应该从低分辨率输入图像中恢复细节、纹理和结构信息，同时保持其保真度。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种轻量级图像增强网络。所提出的网络包括自特征提取模块，该模块从低质量图像本身产生调制参数，并提供它们来调制网络中的特征。此外，针对所提出的网络的单元块提出了密集调制块，它使用调制层中应用的级联特征的密集连接。实验结果表明，在定量和定性评估方面都优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于移动设备的轻量级图像增强网络，通过自特征提取和密集调制技术提升低分辨率图像的细节与结构信息。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的图像增强方法计算量大、参数多，难以满足移动设备对计算资源和内存的限制，需设计更轻量高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出包含自特征提取模块（从低质量图像生成调制参数）和密集调制块（通过密集连接的调制层处理特征）的轻量网络架构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定量指标和视觉效果上均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提网络在保持图像保真度的同时显著降低计算成本，适用于移动设备端的图像增强任务。

search_text: Lightweight Image Enhancement Network for Mobile Devices Using Self-Feature Extraction and Dense Modulation 使用自特征提取和密集调制的移动设备轻量级图像增强网络 Convolutional neural network (CNN) based image enhancement methods such as super-resolution and detail enhancement have achieved remarkable performances. However, amounts of operations including convolution and parameters within the networks cost high computing power and need huge memory resource, which limits the applications with on-device requirements. Lightweight image enhancement network should restore details, texture, and structural information from low-resolution input images while keeping their fidelity. To address these issues, a lightweight image enhancement network is proposed. The proposed network include self-feature extraction module which produces modulation parameters from low-quality image itself, and provides them to modulate the features in the network. Also, dense modulation block is proposed for unit block of the proposed network, which uses dense connections of concatenated features applied in modulation layers. Experimental results demonstrate better performance over existing approaches in terms of both quantitative and qualitative evaluations. 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的超分辨率和细节增强等图像增强方法取得了显着的性能。然而，网络中的卷积和参数等大量操作需要很高的计算能力，并且需要大量的内存资源，这限制了有设备端要求的应用。轻量级图像增强网络应该从低分辨率输入图像中恢复细节、纹理和结构信息，同时保持其保真度。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种轻量级图像增强网络。所提出的网络包括自特征提取模块，该模块从低质量图像本身产生调制参数，并提供它们来调制网络中的特征。此外，针对所提出的网络的单元块提出了密集调制块，它使用调制层中应用的级联特征的密集连接。实验结果表明，在定量和定性评估方面都优于现有方法。 本文提出一种适用于移动设备的轻量级图像增强网络，通过自特征提取和密集调制技术提升低分辨率图像的细节与结构信息。 Sangwook Baek,Yongsup Park,Youngo Park,Jungmin Lee,Kwangpyo Choi eess.IV,cs.LG

title: Stability-driven Contact Reconstruction From Monocular Color Images
title_zh: 从单目彩色图像稳定驱动的接触重建
abstract: Physical contact provides additional constraints for hand-object state reconstruction as well as a basis for further understanding of interaction affordances. Estimating these severely occluded regions from monocular images presents a considerable challenge. Existing methods optimize the hand-object contact driven by distance threshold or prior from contact-labeled datasets. However, due to the number of subjects and objects involved in these indoor datasets being limited, the learned contact patterns could not be generalized easily. Our key idea is to reconstruct the contact pattern directly from monocular images, and then utilize the physical stability criterion in the simulation to optimize it. This criterion is defined by the resultant forces and contact distribution computed by the physics engine.Compared to existing solutions, our framework can be adapted to more personalized hands and diverse object shapes. Furthermore, an interaction dataset with extra physical attributes is created to verify the sim-to-real consistency of our methods. Through comprehensive evaluations, hand-object contact can be reconstructed with both accuracy and stability by the proposed framework.
summary: Physical contact provides additional constraints for hand-object state reconstruction as well as a basis for further understanding of interaction affordances. Estimating these severely occluded regions from monocular images presents a considerable challenge. Existing methods optimize the hand-object contact driven by distance threshold or prior from contact-labeled datasets. However, due to the number of subjects and objects involved in these indoor datasets being limited, the learned contact patterns could not be generalized easily. Our key idea is to reconstruct the contact pattern directly from monocular images, and then utilize the physical stability criterion in the simulation to optimize it. This criterion is defined by the resultant forces and contact distribution computed by the physics engine.Compared to existing solutions, our framework can be adapted to more personalized hands and diverse object shapes. Furthermore, an interaction dataset with extra physical attributes is created to verify the sim-to-real consistency of our methods. Through comprehensive evaluations, hand-object contact can be reconstructed with both accuracy and stability by the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 物理接触为手部物体状态重建提供了额外的约束，并为进一步理解交互可供性奠定了基础。从单眼图像估计这些严重遮挡的区域提出了相当大的挑战。现有方法优化由距离阈值或先验的接触标记数据集驱动的手部物体接触。然而，由于这些室内数据集中涉及的主体和物体的数量有限，学习到的接触模式不能轻易推广。我们的核心思想是直接从单目图像重建接触模式，然后在模拟中利用物理稳定性标准对其进行优化。该标准由物理引擎计算的合力和接触分布定义。与现有解决方案相比，我们的框架可以适应更个性化的手和不同的物体形状。此外，创建具有额外物理属性的交互数据集来验证我们方法的模拟与真实的一致性。通过综合评估，所提出的框架可以准确且稳定地重建手-物体接触。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于单目图像和物理稳定性的手物接触重建方法，以提升接触区域的准确性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖有限的数据集，导致接触模式泛化性差，难以适应个性化手型和多样化物体形状，需提升重建准确性和稳定性。
AI.method: 直接从单目图像重建接触模式，并利用物理引擎计算的力和接触分布进行优化，同时构建包含物理属性的交互数据集验证方法。
AI.result: 通过综合评估，该框架在个性化手型和多样化物体形状上实现了高精度和稳定的接触重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法相比现有方案更具适应性，通过新数据集验证了仿真与现实的一致性，有效提升了接触重建的准确性和稳定性。

authors_text: Tao Lu,Chunxu Liu,Youxin Chen,Gangshan Wu,Limin Wang
title: APP-Net: Auxiliary-point-based Push and Pull Operations for Efficient Point Cloud Classification
title_zh: APP-Net：基于辅助点的推拉操作，实现高效点云分类
abstract: Aggregating neighbor features is essential for point cloud classification. In the existing work, each point in the cloud may inevitably be selected as the neighbors of multiple aggregation centers, as all centers will gather neighbor features from the whole point cloud independently. Thus each point has to participate in the calculation repeatedly and generates redundant duplicates in the memory, leading to intensive computation costs and memory consumption. Meanwhile, to pursue higher accuracy, previous methods often rely on a complex local aggregator to extract fine geometric representation, which further slows down the classification pipeline. To address these issues, we propose a new local aggregator of linear complexity for point cloud classification, coined as APP. Specifically, we introduce an auxiliary container as an anchor to exchange features between the source point and the aggregating center. Each source point pushes its feature to only one auxiliary container, and each center point pulls features from only one auxiliary container. This avoids the re-computation issue of each source point. To facilitate the learning of the local structure of cloud point, we use an online normal estimation module to provide the explainable geometric information to enhance our APP modeling capability. Our built network is more efficient than all the previous baselines with a clear margin while still consuming a lower memory. Experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that APP-Net reaches comparable accuracies to other networks. It can process more than 10,000 samples per second with less than 10GB of memory on a single GPU. We will release the code in https://github.com/MCG-NJU/APP-Net.
summary: Aggregating neighbor features is essential for point cloud classification. In the existing work, each point in the cloud may inevitably be selected as the neighbors of multiple aggregation centers, as all centers will gather neighbor features from the whole point cloud independently. Thus each point has to participate in the calculation repeatedly and generates redundant duplicates in the memory, leading to intensive computation costs and memory consumption. Meanwhile, to pursue higher accuracy, previous methods often rely on a complex local aggregator to extract fine geometric representation, which further slows down the classification pipeline. To address these issues, we propose a new local aggregator of linear complexity for point cloud classification, coined as APP. Specifically, we introduce an auxiliary container as an anchor to exchange features between the source point and the aggregating center. Each source point pushes its feature to only one auxiliary container, and each center point pulls features from only one auxiliary container. This avoids the re-computation issue of each source point. To facilitate the learning of the local structure of cloud point, we use an online normal estimation module to provide the explainable geometric information to enhance our APP modeling capability. Our built network is more efficient than all the previous baselines with a clear margin while still consuming a lower memory. Experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that APP-Net reaches comparable accuracies to other networks. It can process more than 10,000 samples per second with less than 10GB of memory on a single GPU. We will release the code in https://github.com/MCG-NJU/APP-Net.
abstract_zh: 聚合邻居特征对于点云分类至关重要。在现有的工作中，云中的每个点可能不可避免地被选择为多个聚合中心的邻居，因为所有中心都会独立地从整个点云中收集邻居特征。因此每个点都必须重复参与计算并在内存中产生冗余的重复项，导致计算成本和内存消耗极大。同时，为了追求更高的准确性，以前的方法通常依赖于复杂的本地聚合器来提取精细的几何表示，这进一步减慢了分类流程。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于点云分类的线性复杂度的新本地聚合器，称为 APP。具体来说，我们引入一个辅助容器作为锚点，在源点和聚合中心之间交换特征。每个源点仅将其特征推送到一个辅助容器，每个中心点仅从一个辅助容器中提取特征。这避免了每个源点的重新计算问题。为了便于学习浊点的局部结构，我们使用在线法线估计模块来提供可解释的几何信息，以增强我们的APP建模能力。我们构建的网络比以前的所有基线都更高效，并且具有明显的余量，同时仍然消耗较低的内存。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验表明，APP-Net 达到了与其他网络相当的精度。它可以在单个 GPU 上使用不到 10GB 的内存每秒处理超过 10,000 个样本。我们将在https://github.com/MCG-NJU/APP-Net 中发布代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为APP-Net的点云分类方法，通过引入辅助点机制优化特征聚合过程。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在点云分类中存在计算冗余和内存消耗大的问题，且复杂局部聚合器导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计线性复杂度的APP聚合器，通过辅助容器实现特征的单向推送与拉取，结合在线法线估计模块增强几何表征能力。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上达到与现有方法相当的精度，单GPU下每秒处理超10,000样本且内存消耗低于10GB。
AI.conclusion: APP-Net通过减少冗余计算和简化聚合流程，在保持精度的同时显著提升点云分类效率。

search_text: APP-Net: Auxiliary-point-based Push and Pull Operations for Efficient Point Cloud Classification APP-Net：基于辅助点的推拉操作，实现高效点云分类 Aggregating neighbor features is essential for point cloud classification. In the existing work, each point in the cloud may inevitably be selected as the neighbors of multiple aggregation centers, as all centers will gather neighbor features from the whole point cloud independently. Thus each point has to participate in the calculation repeatedly and generates redundant duplicates in the memory, leading to intensive computation costs and memory consumption. Meanwhile, to pursue higher accuracy, previous methods often rely on a complex local aggregator to extract fine geometric representation, which further slows down the classification pipeline. To address these issues, we propose a new local aggregator of linear complexity for point cloud classification, coined as APP. Specifically, we introduce an auxiliary container as an anchor to exchange features between the source point and the aggregating center. Each source point pushes its feature to only one auxiliary container, and each center point pulls features from only one auxiliary container. This avoids the re-computation issue of each source point. To facilitate the learning of the local structure of cloud point, we use an online normal estimation module to provide the explainable geometric information to enhance our APP modeling capability. Our built network is more efficient than all the previous baselines with a clear margin while still consuming a lower memory. Experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that APP-Net reaches comparable accuracies to other networks. It can process more than 10,000 samples per second with less than 10GB of memory on a single GPU. We will release the code in https://github.com/MCG-NJU/APP-Net. 聚合邻居特征对于点云分类至关重要。在现有的工作中，云中的每个点可能不可避免地被选择为多个聚合中心的邻居，因为所有中心都会独立地从整个点云中收集邻居特征。因此每个点都必须重复参与计算并在内存中产生冗余的重复项，导致计算成本和内存消耗极大。同时，为了追求更高的准确性，以前的方法通常依赖于复杂的本地聚合器来提取精细的几何表示，这进一步减慢了分类流程。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于点云分类的线性复杂度的新本地聚合器，称为 APP。具体来说，我们引入一个辅助容器作为锚点，在源点和聚合中心之间交换特征。每个源点仅将其特征推送到一个辅助容器，每个中心点仅从一个辅助容器中提取特征。这避免了每个源点的重新计算问题。为了便于学习浊点的局部结构，我们使用在线法线估计模块来提供可解释的几何信息，以增强我们的APP建模能力。我们构建的网络比以前的所有基线都更高效，并且具有明显的余量，同时仍然消耗较低的内存。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验表明，APP-Net 达到了与其他网络相当的精度。它可以在单个 GPU 上使用不到 10GB 的内存每秒处理超过 10,000 个样本。我们将在https://github.com/MCG-NJU/APP-Net 中发布代码。 本文提出一种名为APP-Net的点云分类方法，通过引入辅助点机制优化特征聚合过程。 Tao Lu,Chunxu Liu,Youxin Chen,Gangshan Wu,Limin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Linnan Wang,Chenhan Yu,Satish Salian,Slawomir Kierat,Szymon Migacz,Alex Fit Florea
title: GPUNet: Searching the Deployable Convolution Neural Networks for GPUs
title_zh: GPUNet：搜索 GPU 的可部署卷积神经网络
abstract: Customizing Convolution Neural Networks (CNN) for production use has been a challenging task for DL practitioners. This paper intends to expedite the model customization with a model hub that contains the optimized models tiered by their inference latency using Neural Architecture Search (NAS). To achieve this goal, we build a distributed NAS system to search on a novel search space that consists of prominent factors to impact latency and accuracy. Since we target GPU, we name the NAS optimized models as GPUNet, which establishes a new SOTA Pareto frontier in inference latency and accuracy. Within 1$ms$, GPUNet is 2x faster than EfficientNet-X and FBNetV3 with even better accuracy. We also validate GPUNet on detection tasks, and GPUNet consistently outperforms EfficientNet-X and FBNetV3 on COCO detection tasks in both latency and accuracy. All of these data validate that our NAS system is effective and generic to handle different design tasks. With this NAS system, we expand GPUNet to cover a wide range of latency targets such that DL practitioners can deploy our models directly in different scenarios.
summary: Customizing Convolution Neural Networks (CNN) for production use has been a challenging task for DL practitioners. This paper intends to expedite the model customization with a model hub that contains the optimized models tiered by their inference latency using Neural Architecture Search (NAS). To achieve this goal, we build a distributed NAS system to search on a novel search space that consists of prominent factors to impact latency and accuracy. Since we target GPU, we name the NAS optimized models as GPUNet, which establishes a new SOTA Pareto frontier in inference latency and accuracy. Within 1$ms$, GPUNet is 2x faster than EfficientNet-X and FBNetV3 with even better accuracy. We also validate GPUNet on detection tasks, and GPUNet consistently outperforms EfficientNet-X and FBNetV3 on COCO detection tasks in both latency and accuracy. All of these data validate that our NAS system is effective and generic to handle different design tasks. With this NAS system, we expand GPUNet to cover a wide range of latency targets such that DL practitioners can deploy our models directly in different scenarios.
abstract_zh: 对于 DL 从业者来说，定制用于生产用途的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 一直是一项具有挑战性的任务。本文旨在通过模型中心加速模型定制，该模型中心包含使用神经架构搜索（NAS）按推理延迟分层的优化模型。为了实现这一目标，我们构建了一个分布式 NAS 系统来搜索一个新颖的搜索空间，该空间由影响延迟和准确性的重要因素组成。由于我们的目标是 GPU，因此我们将 NAS 优化模型命名为 GPUNet，它在推理延迟和准确性方面建立了新的 SOTA Pareto 前沿。在 1$ms$ 内，GPUNet 比 EfficientNet-X 和 FBNetV3 快 2 倍，并且精度更高。我们还在检测任务上验证了 GPUNet，GPUNet 在 COCO 检测任务上的延迟和准确性始终优于 EfficientNet-X 和 FBNetV3。所有这些数据都证明我们的 NAS 系统能够有效且通用地处理不同的设计任务。通过这个NAS系统，我们扩展了GPUNet以覆盖广泛的延迟目标，以便深度学习从业者可以直接在不同的场景中部署我们的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GPUNet，通过神经架构搜索（NAS）构建可部署的卷积神经网络模型，优化GPU推理延迟与精度的平衡。
AI.motivation: 定制化卷积神经网络（CNN）用于生产环境具有挑战性，现有模型在延迟与精度的权衡上存在不足，需更高效的自动化方案。
AI.method: 构建分布式NAS系统，在包含影响延迟与精度关键因素的新型搜索空间中进行优化，生成针对GPU的GPUNet模型。
AI.result: GPUNet在1ms内推理速度较EfficientNet-X和FBNetV3提升2倍且精度更优，在COCO检测任务中全面超越对比模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的NAS系统有效且通用，可覆盖多种延迟需求，为深度学习从业者提供直接部署的优化模型解决方案。

title: Traction of Interlocking Spikes on a Granular Material
title_zh: 互锁尖刺对颗粒材料的牵引力
comment: ef:Earth and Space 2022, 18th Biennial International Conference on Engineering, Science, Construction, and Operations in Challenging Environments
comments: ef:Earth and Space 2022, 18th Biennial International Conference on Engineering, Science, Construction, and Operations in Challenging Environments
abstract: The interlock drive system generates traction by inserting narrow articulated spikes into the ground and by leveraging the soil's strength to resist horizontal draft forces. The system promises high tractive performance in low gravity environments where tires have little traction for lack of weight. At Earth and Space 2021 we reported the performance of such spikes on a silty clay loam, a cohesive soil. We found that in such soil, traction below a critical depth is provided by a zone of lateral soil failure. We also found that the articulation translates a horizontal draft force into a vertical penetration force strong enough to penetrate a narrow spike to a depth where the soil can sustain the draft force, in a self-regulating way. It is conceivable that a granular material like regolith or sand with little to no cohesive strength provides less vertical penetration resistance and less resistance to a horizontal draft force than a cohesive soil, which leads to the question of whether and how much tractive force an interlocking spike can generate on a granular material. Here we report on field trials that study different spike designs in dry and unsaturated moist sand. The results demonstrate that a loose granular material requires larger spikes than a cohesive soil, that these larger spikes penetrate dry and moist sand reliably, and that they promise good tractive efficiency. The trials indicate that on sand, a larger spike diameter can improve the pull/weight ratio without a loss of tractive performance.
summary: The interlock drive system generates traction by inserting narrow articulated spikes into the ground and by leveraging the soil's strength to resist horizontal draft forces. The system promises high tractive performance in low gravity environments where tires have little traction for lack of weight. At Earth and Space 2021 we reported the performance of such spikes on a silty clay loam, a cohesive soil. We found that in such soil, traction below a critical depth is provided by a zone of lateral soil failure. We also found that the articulation translates a horizontal draft force into a vertical penetration force strong enough to penetrate a narrow spike to a depth where the soil can sustain the draft force, in a self-regulating way. It is conceivable that a granular material like regolith or sand with little to no cohesive strength provides less vertical penetration resistance and less resistance to a horizontal draft force than a cohesive soil, which leads to the question of whether and how much tractive force an interlocking spike can generate on a granular material. Here we report on field trials that study different spike designs in dry and unsaturated moist sand. The results demonstrate that a loose granular material requires larger spikes than a cohesive soil, that these larger spikes penetrate dry and moist sand reliably, and that they promise good tractive efficiency. The trials indicate that on sand, a larger spike diameter can improve the pull/weight ratio without a loss of tractive performance.
abstract_zh: 联锁驱动系统通过将狭窄的铰接钉插入地面并利用土壤的强度来抵抗水平牵引力来产生牵引力。该系统保证了在低重力环境下的高牵引性能，在低重力环境中，轮胎因重量不足而几乎没有牵引力。在 Earth and Space 2021 上，我们报告了此类钉在粉质粘土（一种粘性土壤）上的性能。我们发现，在这种土壤中，低于临界深度的牵引力是由横向土壤破坏区域提供的。我们还发现，铰接装置将水平牵引力转化为垂直穿透力，其强度足以将细钉穿透到土壤能够以自我调节方式承受牵引力的深度。可以想象，与粘性土壤相比，像风化层或沙子这样具有很少或没有粘结强度的颗粒材料提供的垂直穿透阻力较小，对水平牵引力的阻力也较小，这导致了互锁钉是否可以在颗粒材料上产生牵引力以及产生多大牵引力的问题。在这里，我们报告了研究干燥和不饱和潮湿沙子中不同钉子设计的现场试验。结果表明，松散的颗粒材料比粘性土壤需要更大的钉子，这些较大的钉子能够可靠地穿透干燥和潮湿的沙子，并且它们具有良好的牵引效率。试验表明，在沙地上，较大的鞋钉直径可以提高拉力/重量比，而不会损失牵引性能。

AI.tldr: 研究互锁棘爪在颗粒材料（如沙子）上的牵引性能，对比其在粘性土壤中的表现。
AI.motivation: 此前研究显示棘爪系统在粘性土壤中有效，但颗粒材料因缺乏内聚力可能表现不同，需验证其在沙质材料中的适用性。
AI.method: 通过现场试验测试不同棘爪设计在干沙和未饱和湿沙中的牵引性能，分析其穿透深度与牵引效率。
AI.result: 松散颗粒材料需更大尺寸棘爪，但试验表明其能可靠穿透沙子并实现较高牵引效率，增大直径可提升拉重比。
AI.conclusion: 互锁棘爪系统适用于颗粒材料，通过优化棘爪尺寸可有效提升低重力环境下的牵引性能。

Here we report on field trials that study different spike designs in dry and unsaturated moist sand. The results demonstrate that a loose granular material requires larger spikes than a cohesive soil, that these larger spikes penetrate dry and moist sand reliably, and that they promise good tractive efficiency. The trials indicate that on sand, a larger spike diameter can improve the pull/weight ratio without a loss of tractive performance. 联锁驱动系统通过将狭窄的铰接钉插入地面并利用土壤的强度来抵抗水平牵引力来产生牵引力。该系统保证了在低重力环境下的高牵引性能，在低重力环境中，轮胎因重量不足而几乎没有牵引力。在 Earth and Space 2021 上，我们报告了此类钉在粉质粘土（一种粘性土壤）上的性能。我们发现，在这种土壤中，低于临界深度的牵引力是由横向土壤破坏区域提供的。我们还发现，铰接装置将水平牵引力转化为垂直穿透力，其强度足以将细钉穿透到土壤能够以自我调节方式承受牵引力的深度。可以想象，与粘性土壤相比，像风化层或沙子这样具有很少或没有粘结强度的颗粒材料提供的垂直穿透阻力较小，对水平牵引力的阻力也较小，这导致了互锁钉是否可以在颗粒材料上产生牵引力以及产生多大牵引力的问题。在这里，我们报告了研究干燥和不饱和潮湿沙子中不同钉子设计的现场试验。结果表明，松散的颗粒材料比粘性土壤需要更大的钉子，这些较大的钉子能够可靠地穿透干燥和潮湿的沙子，并且它们具有良好的牵引效率。试验表明，在沙地上，较大的鞋钉直径可以提高拉力/重量比，而不会损失牵引性能。 研究互锁棘爪在颗粒材料（如沙子）上的牵引性能，对比其在粘性土壤中的表现。 Volker Nannen,Damian Bover cs.RO,cond-mat.soft

title: Lateral Stability of Vehicle with Interlocking Spikes
title_zh: 带互锁钉的车辆横向稳定性
comment: ef:Earth and Space 2022, 18th Biennial International Conference on Engineering, Science, Construction, and Operations in Challenging Environments
comments: ef:Earth and Space 2022, 18th Biennial International Conference on Engineering, Science, Construction, and Operations in Challenging Environments
abstract: The interlock drive system generates traction by penetrating narrow articulated spikes into the ground and by using the strength of the deeper soil layers to resist horizontal draft forces. The system promises good tractive performance in low gravity environments where tires generate little traction due to low vehicle weight. Possible applications include heavy-duty vehicles for civil engineering tasks like earthmoving or mining excavation. Safe vehicle operation in complex terrain geometry requires lateral vehicle stability to prevent vehicle rollover. Good lateral stability is a particular requirement for excavation and piling operations where the margins of safety define the terrain geometry that can be worked in, and it is a major constraint in operational planning. An earthmoving vehicle that can operate at a high roll angle reduces the need to maintain ramps in pits and on piles and can shorten and simplify the paths for individual maneuvers. Here we report on several field trials on the lateral stability of an earthmoving vehicle that uses the interlock drive systems. We find that the vehicle can work well at roll angles of up to 20°, but that it needs further improvement if work at roll angles of 30° or more is required.
summary: The interlock drive system generates traction by penetrating narrow articulated spikes into the ground and by using the strength of the deeper soil layers to resist horizontal draft forces. The system promises good tractive performance in low gravity environments where tires generate little traction due to low vehicle weight. Possible applications include heavy-duty vehicles for civil engineering tasks like earthmoving or mining excavation. An earthmoving vehicle that can operate at a high roll angle reduces the need to maintain ramps in pits and on piles and can shorten and simplify the paths for individual maneuvers. Here we report on several field trials on the lateral stability of an earthmoving vehicle that uses the interlock drive systems. We find that the vehicle can work well at roll angles of up to 20°, but that it needs further improvement if work at roll angles of 30° or more is required.
abstract_zh: 联锁驱动系统通过将狭窄的铰接钉刺入地面并利用较深层土壤的强度来抵抗水平牵引力来产生牵引力。该系统保证在低重力环境下具有良好的牵引性能，在低重力环境中，由于车辆重量轻，轮胎产生的牵引力很小。可能的应用包括用于土木工程任务（如土方移动或采矿挖掘）的重型车辆。车辆在复杂地形几何条件下的安全运行需要车辆横向稳定性以防止车辆侧翻。良好的横向稳定性是挖掘和打桩作业的特殊要求，其中安全边际定义了可以作业的地形几何形状，并且它是作业规划的主要约束。能够以高侧倾角运行的土方车辆减少了在基坑和桩上维护坡道的需要，并且可以缩短和简化单独操作的路径。在此，我们报告了关于使用联锁驱动系统的土方车辆横向稳定性的多项现场试验。我们发现车辆可以在高达20°的侧倾角下良好工作，但如果需要在30°或更大的侧倾角下工作，则需要进一步改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用啮合尖钉驱动系统的工程车辆在复杂地形中的横向稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统轮胎在低重力环境下抓地力不足，需开发新型驱动系统以提升重型工程车辆（如土方机械、采矿设备）在复杂地形中的作业安全性和效率。
AI.method: 通过实地试验测试配备啮合尖钉驱动系统的土方机械在不同侧倾角度下的横向稳定性表现。
AI.result: 试验表明车辆可在最大20°侧倾角下稳定作业，但若需30°以上侧倾角则需进一步改进。
AI.conclusion: 啮合尖钉驱动系统能有效提升车辆横向稳定性，但需优化设计以满足更极端工况需求。

title: The Rise and Fall of Robotic World (A case study of WALL-E)
title_zh: 机器人世界的兴衰（以《瓦力》为例）
abstract: The current trend in technology shows that the robots will soon be seen interacting with humans and handling different tasks more efficiently in future. With advancement in artificial intelligence it can be foreseen that robots will definitely take over all of the major and minor jobs, will socially interact with humans and will minimize the burden of human significantly. With the passage of time humans will forget about their reality and the labour work they currently do by themselves. That age will be exactly the peak age of robots and we can call it age of the rise of the robots. With the rise of robots, they will start taking decision by themselves regarding the human life and the planet. Human will again start to minimize the influence of robots and take control of their life with the help of some robots. The WALL-E narrates such a story of human life dependency on robots in spaceship when earth is destroyed because of some catastrophe. The clash between human and robots occurs when humans find the earth is survivable and should go back but robots do not allow them. With the help of some social robots humans again take control and take the ship back to earth. The major part of the movie is about the a lonely robot living on planet earth, the love of two robots, their interaction. Those two robots help humans to move back to earth.
summary: The current trend in technology shows that the robots will soon be seen interacting with humans and handling different tasks more efficiently in future. With advancement in artificial intelligence it can be foreseen that robots will definitely take over all of the major and minor jobs, will socially interact with humans and will minimize the burden of human significantly. With the passage of time humans will forget about their reality and the labour work they currently do by themselves. That age will be exactly the peak age of robots and we can call it age of the rise of the robots. With the rise of robots, they will start taking decision by themselves regarding the human life and the planet. Human will again start to minimize the influence of robots and take control of their life with the help of some robots. The WALL-E narrates such a story of human life dependency on robots in spaceship when earth is destroyed because of some catastrophe. The clash between human and robots occurs when humans find the earth is survivable and should go back but robots do not allow them. With the help of some social robots humans again take control and take the ship back to earth. The major part of the movie is about the a lonely robot living on planet earth, the love of two robots, their interaction. Those two robots help humans to move back to earth.
abstract_zh: 当前的技术趋势表明，机器人在未来很快就会与人类互动并更有效地处理不同的任务。随着人工智能的进步，可以预见，机器人一定会接手所有的主次工作，与人类进行社交互动，大大减轻人类的负担。随着时间的流逝，人类会忘记他们的现实和他们目前自己所做的劳动。那个时代正是机器人的巅峰时代，我们可以称之为机器人的崛起时代。随着机器人的兴起，他们将开始自己为人类生活和地球做出决定。人类将再次开始最小化机器人的影响，并在一些机器人的帮助下掌控自己的生活。 《瓦力》讲述了这样一个故事，当地球因一场灾难而毁灭时，人类的生命依赖于宇宙飞船中的机器人。当人类发现地球可以生存并且应该回去但机器人不允许他们时，人类和机器人之间的冲突就会发生。在一些社交机器人的帮助下，人类再次控制了飞船并将其带回地球。电影的主要部分是关于一个生活在地球上的孤独机器人，两个机器人的爱情，他们的互动。这两个机器人帮助人类返回地球。

AI.tldr: 本文通过电影《机器人总动员》（WALL-E）作为案例，分析了机器人技术发展带来的社会影响及人类与机器人之间的权力博弈。
AI.motivation: 探讨人工智能和机器人技术迅速发展背景下，人类可能面临的依赖性问题及社会结构变化，通过电影叙事揭示技术与人性的冲突与平衡。
AI.method: 采用电影案例分析法，结合剧情发展与主题解读，解析机器人主导社会的潜在风险及人类重新掌控技术的路径。
AI.result: 研究发现，过度依赖机器人可能导致人类丧失自主性，但通过社会型机器人协助，人类可重新建立与技术的健康关系并恢复对生活的主导权。
AI.conclusion: 技术进步需与人文关怀并重，机器人应作为辅助工具而非主宰，人类需保持对技术发展的主动权以避免异化风险。

authors_text: Shai Revzen,Dan Zhao,Glenna Clifton,Brian Bittner,Nick Gravish
title: Bridging Walking and Slithering -- Stokesian Locomotion
title_zh: 桥接步行和滑行——斯托克斯运动
abstract: Both legged locomotion and slithering motions typically utilize periodic gaits -- repeating cycles of body shape change that produce a net motion through the world. Legged locomotion can be viewed from the perspective of piece-wise contact constraint formation and removal. Slithering and low Reynolds number swimming operate under continuous constraints of force balance, wherein dissipation removes the ability to accumulate momentum. Here we discuss how to bridge the gap between these domains of motion, thereby, among other benefits, producing models for the space of legged locomotion with slipping. The connective fabric is the use of a "Stokesian", or "local connection" model.
summary: Both legged locomotion and slithering motions typically utilize periodic gaits -- repeating cycles of body shape change that produce a net motion through the world. Legged locomotion can be viewed from the perspective of piece-wise contact constraint formation and removal. Slithering and low Reynolds number swimming operate under continuous constraints of force balance, wherein dissipation removes the ability to accumulate momentum. Here we discuss how to bridge the gap between these domains of motion, thereby, among other benefits, producing models for the space of legged locomotion with slipping. The connective fabric is the use of a "Stokesian", or "local connection" model.
abstract_zh: 腿部运动和滑行运动通常都利用周期性步态——重复身体形状变化的循环，从而在世界范围内产生净运动。腿式运动可以从分段接触约束形成和去除的角度来看待。滑行和低雷诺数游泳是在力平衡的连续约束下进行的，其中耗散消除了积累动量的能力。在这里，我们讨论如何弥合这些运动领域之间的差距，从而除其他好处外，为滑动的腿部运动空间生成模型。连接结构使用“Stokesian”或“本地连接”模型。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入'Stokesian'模型，将步行与蠕动运动两种不同类型的运动机制进行连接，构建统一的运动模型。
AI.motivation: 传统步行依赖间断接触约束，而蠕动和低雷诺数游动依赖连续力平衡，两者在力学特性上存在显著差异，需建立统一框架以处理滑动等复杂情况。
AI.method: 采用'Stokesian'局部连接模型，通过连续力平衡与接触约束的结合，构建描述步行与蠕动运动的统一数学框架。
AI.result: 成功建立能够描述带滑动的步行运动模型，并揭示了两种运动模式在低雷诺数条件下的过渡机制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解复杂地形下的运动控制提供了新视角，尤其在处理滑动与接触交互的建模中具有重要应用价值。

search_text: Bridging Walking and Slithering -- Stokesian Locomotion 桥接步行和滑行——斯托克斯运动 Both legged locomotion and slithering motions typically utilize periodic gaits -- repeating cycles of body shape change that produce a net motion through the world. Legged locomotion can be viewed from the perspective of piece-wise contact constraint formation and removal. Slithering and low Reynolds number swimming operate under continuous constraints of force balance, wherein dissipation removes the ability to accumulate momentum. Here we discuss how to bridge the gap between these domains of motion, thereby, among other benefits, producing models for the space of legged locomotion with slipping. The connective fabric is the use of a "Stokesian", or "local connection" model. 腿部运动和滑行运动通常都利用周期性步态——重复身体形状变化的循环，从而在世界范围内产生净运动。腿式运动可以从分段接触约束形成和去除的角度来看待。滑行和低雷诺数游泳是在力平衡的连续约束下进行的，其中耗散消除了积累动量的能力。在这里，我们讨论如何弥合这些运动领域之间的差距，从而除其他好处外，为滑动的腿部运动空间生成模型。连接结构使用“Stokesian”或“本地连接”模型。 本文旨在通过引入'Stokesian'模型，将步行与蠕动运动两种不同类型的运动机制进行连接，构建统一的运动模型。 Shai Revzen,Dan Zhao,Glenna Clifton,Brian Bittner,Nick Gravish cs.RO

title: Convex Augmentation for Total Variation Based Phase Retrieval
title_zh: 基于总变差的相位检索的凸增强
abstract: Phase retrieval is an important problem with significant physical and industrial applications. In this paper, we consider the case where the magnitude of the measurement of an underlying signal is corrupted by Gaussian noise. We introduce a convex augmentation approach for phase retrieval based on total variation regularization. In contrast to popular convex relaxation models like PhaseLift, our model can be efficiently solved by a modified semi-proximal alternating direction method of multipliers (sPADMM). The modified sPADMM is more general and flexible than the standard one, and its convergence is also established in this paper. Extensive numerical experiments are conducted to showcase the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Phase retrieval is an important problem with significant physical and industrial applications. In this paper, we consider the case where the magnitude of the measurement of an underlying signal is corrupted by Gaussian noise. We introduce a convex augmentation approach for phase retrieval based on total variation regularization. In contrast to popular convex relaxation models like PhaseLift, our model can be efficiently solved by a modified semi-proximal alternating direction method of multipliers (sPADMM). The modified sPADMM is more general and flexible than the standard one, and its convergence is also established in this paper. Extensive numerical experiments are conducted to showcase the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 相位恢复是具有重要物理和工业应用的重要问题。在本文中，我们考虑了基础信号的测量幅度被高斯噪声破坏的情况。我们引入了一种基于全变分正则化的相位检索凸增强方法。与 PhaseLift 等流行的凸松弛模型相比，我们的模型可以通过改进的乘法器半邻近交替方向法 (sPADMM) 有效求解。改进的sPADMM比标准的sPADMM更加通用和灵活，并且本文也建立了它的收敛性。进行了大量的数值实验来展示所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于总变分正则化的凸增强方法，用于解决高斯噪声环境下的相位恢复问题。
AI.motivation: 传统凸松弛模型（如PhaseLift）在处理噪声相位恢复时存在计算效率低或收敛性不足的问题，需开发更高效且鲁棒的算法。
AI.method: 引入总变分正则化的凸增强模型，并设计改进的半近端交替方向乘子法（sPADMM）进行求解，证明其收敛性。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在噪声环境下相比现有方法具有更高的恢复精度和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过总变分正则化与改进优化算法的结合，有效解决了噪声相位恢复问题，且理论收敛性得到保障。

title: Predicting and Optimizing for Energy Efficient ACMV Systems: Computational Intelligence Approaches
title_zh: 预测和优化节能 ACMV 系统：计算智能方法
abstract: In this study, a novel application of neural networks that predict thermal comfort states of occupants is proposed with accuracy over 95%, and two optimization algorithms are proposed and evaluated under two real cases (general offices and lecture theatres/conference rooms scenarios) in Singapore. The two optimization algorithms are Bayesian Gaussian process optimization (BGPO) and augmented firefly algorithm (AFA). Based on our earlier studies, the models of energy consumption were developed and well-trained through neural networks. This study focuses on using novel active approaches to evaluate thermal comfort of occupants and so as to solves a multiple-objective problem that aims to balance energy-efficiency of centralized air-conditioning systems and thermal comfort of occupants. The study results show that both BGPO and AFA are feasible to resolve this no prior knowledge-based optimization problem effectively. However, the optimal solutions of AFA are more consistent than those of BGPO at given sample sizes. The best energy saving rates (ESR) of BGPO and AFA are around -21% and -10% respectively at energy-efficient user preference for both Case 1 and Case 2. As a result, an potential benefit of S$1219.1 can be achieved annually for this experimental laboratory level in Singapore.
summary: In this study, a novel application of neural networks that predict thermal comfort states of occupants is proposed with accuracy over 95%, and two optimization algorithms are proposed and evaluated under two real cases (general offices and lecture theatres/conference rooms scenarios) in Singapore. The two optimization algorithms are Bayesian Gaussian process optimization (BGPO) and augmented firefly algorithm (AFA). Based on our earlier studies, the models of energy consumption were developed and well-trained through neural networks. This study focuses on using novel active approaches to evaluate thermal comfort of occupants and so as to solves a multiple-objective problem that aims to balance energy-efficiency of centralized air-conditioning systems and thermal comfort of occupants. The study results show that both BGPO and AFA are feasible to resolve this no prior knowledge-based optimization problem effectively. However, the optimal solutions of AFA are more consistent than those of BGPO at given sample sizes. The best energy saving rates (ESR) of BGPO and AFA are around -21% and -10% respectively at energy-efficient user preference for both Case 1 and Case 2. As a result, an potential benefit of S$1219.1 can be achieved annually for this experimental laboratory level in Singapore.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，提出了一种预测乘员热舒适状态的神经网络的新应用，准确率超过 95%，并提出了两种优化算法，并在新加坡的两个真实案例（普通办公室和演讲厅/会议室场景）下进行了评估。这两种优化算法是贝叶斯高斯过程优化（BGPO）和增强萤火虫算法（AFA）。根据我们早期的研究，能源消耗模型是通过神经网络开发和训练的。本研究的重点是使用新颖的主动方法来评估居住者的热舒适度，从而解决旨在平衡集中空调系统的能源效率和居住者的热舒适度的多目标问题。研究结果表明，BGPO和AFA都可以有效解决这种无先验知识的优化问题。然而，在给定的样本量下，AFA 的最优解比 BGPO 的最优解更加一致。对于案例 1 和案例 2，在节能用户偏好下，BGPO 和 AFA 的最佳节能率 (ESR) 分别约为 -21% 和 -10%。因此，新加坡这一实验实验室水平每年可实现 1219.1 新元的潜在效益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于计算智能的预测和优化方法，以提高中央空调系统的能源效率并平衡热舒适性。
AI.motivation: 为了解决中央空调系统在能源效率与热舒适性之间的平衡问题，减少能源消耗并提升用户舒适度。
AI.method: 采用神经网络预测热舒适状态，并应用贝叶斯高斯过程优化（BGPO）和改进的萤火虫算法（AFA）进行多目标优化。
AI.result: BGPO和AFA在两种场景下均有效，其中AFA的解更一致，节能率分别达到-21%和-10%，预计每年节省约1219.1新元。
AI.conclusion: 两种算法均适用于无先验知识的优化问题，AFA表现更优，证明了计算智能方法在提升空调系统能效中的潜力。

However, the optimal solutions of AFA are more consistent than those of BGPO at given sample sizes.
