As a result, an potential benefit of S$1219.1 can be achieved annually for this experimental laboratory level in Singapore. 在这项研究中，提出了一种预测乘员热舒适状态的神经网络的新应用，准确率超过 95%，并提出了两种优化算法，并在新加坡的两个真实案例（普通办公室和演讲厅/会议室场景）下进行了评估。这两种优化算法是贝叶斯高斯过程优化（BGPO）和增强萤火虫算法（AFA）。根据我们早期的研究，能源消耗模型是通过神经网络开发和训练的。本研究的重点是使用新颖的主动方法来评估居住者的热舒适度，从而解决旨在平衡集中空调系统的能源效率和居住者的热舒适度的多目标问题。研究结果表明，BGPO和AFA都可以有效解决这种无先验知识的优化问题。然而，在给定的样本量下，AFA 的最优解比 BGPO 的最优解更加一致。对于案例 1 和案例 2，在节能用户偏好下，BGPO 和 AFA 的最佳节能率 (ESR) 分别约为 -21% 和 -10%。因此，新加坡这一实验实验室水平每年可实现 1219.1 新元的潜在效益。 本文提出基于计算智能的预测和优化方法，以提高中央空调系统的能源效率并平衡热舒适性。 Deqing Zhai,Yeng Chai Soh eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

title: Gradient Descent, Stochastic Optimization, and Other Tales
title_zh: 梯度下降、随机优化和其他故事
abstract: The goal of this paper is to debunk and dispel the magic behind black-box optimizers and stochastic optimizers. It aims to build a solid foundation on how and why the techniques work. This manuscript crystallizes this knowledge by deriving from simple intuitions, the mathematics behind the strategies. This tutorial doesn't shy away from addressing both the formal and informal aspects of gradient descent and stochastic optimization methods. By doing so, it hopes to provide readers with a deeper understanding of these techniques as well as the when, the how and the why of applying these algorithms. Gradient descent is one of the most popular algorithms to perform optimization and by far the most common way to optimize machine learning tasks. Its stochastic version receives attention in recent years, and this is particularly true for optimizing deep neural networks. In deep neural networks, the gradient followed by a single sample or a batch of samples is employed to save computational resources and escape from saddle points. In 1951, Robbins and Monro published \textit{A stochastic approximation method}, one of the first modern treatments on stochastic optimization that estimates local gradients with a new batch of samples. And now, stochastic optimization has become a core technology in machine learning, largely due to the development of the back propagation algorithm in fitting a neural network. The sole aim of this article is to give a self-contained introduction to concepts and mathematical tools in gradient descent and stochastic optimization.
summary: The goal of this paper is to debunk and dispel the magic behind black-box optimizers and stochastic optimizers. It aims to build a solid foundation on how and why the techniques work. This manuscript crystallizes this knowledge by deriving from simple intuitions, the mathematics behind the strategies. This tutorial doesn't shy away from addressing both the formal and informal aspects of gradient descent and stochastic optimization methods. By doing so, it hopes to provide readers with a deeper understanding of these techniques as well as the when, the how and the why of applying these algorithms. Gradient descent is one of the most popular algorithms to perform optimization and by far the most common way to optimize machine learning tasks. Its stochastic version receives attention in recent years, and this is particularly true for optimizing deep neural networks. In deep neural networks, the gradient followed by a single sample or a batch of samples is employed to save computational resources and escape from saddle points. In 1951, Robbins and Monro published \textit{A stochastic approximation method}, one of the first modern treatments on stochastic optimization that estimates local gradients with a new batch of samples. And now, stochastic optimization has become a core technology in machine learning, largely due to the development of the back propagation algorithm in fitting a neural network. The sole aim of this article is to give a self-contained introduction to concepts and mathematical tools in gradient descent and stochastic optimization.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是揭穿并消除黑盒优化器和随机优化器背后的魔力。它旨在为这些技术如何以及为何发挥作用奠定坚实的基础。这份手稿通过简单的直觉和策略背后的数学来结晶这些知识。本教程并不回避解决梯度下降和随机优化方法的正式和非正式方面。通过这样做，它希望让读者更深入地了解这些技术以及应用这些算法的时间、方式和原因。梯度下降是最流行的优化算法之一，也是迄今为止优化机器学习任务的最常见方法。它的随机版本近年来受到关注，对于优化深度神经网络尤其如此。在深度神经网络中，采用单个样本或一批样本遵循的梯度来节省计算资源并逃离鞍点。 1951 年，Robbins 和 Monro 发表了 \textit{随机近似方法}，这是随机优化的第一个现代处理方法之一，它用一批新样本估计局部梯度。现在，随机优化已经成为机器学习的核心技术，这很大程度上得益于拟合神经网络的反向传播算法的发展。本文的唯一目的是对梯度下降和随机优化中的概念和数学工具进行独立的介绍。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在揭示梯度下降和随机优化等优化技术背后的原理，消除其黑箱特性，建立其工作原理的理论基础。
AI.motivation: 尽管梯度下降和随机优化方法在机器学习中广泛应用，但其内部机制常被视为黑箱，缺乏系统性解释。
AI.method: 通过从简单直观出发推导数学原理，结合形式化与非形式化分析，解析梯度下降及随机优化方法的历史发展与技术细节。
AI.result: 提供了对梯度下降和随机优化方法的深入理解，阐明其在深度神经网络等场景中的应用逻辑与优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文为读者构建了优化算法的理论框架，帮助其掌握算法选择、应用时机及实现方式的核心要点。

authors_text: Dingyuan Shi,Yongxin Tong,Zimu Zhou,Ke Xu,Wenzhe Tan,Hongbo Li
title: Adaptive Task Planning for Large-Scale Robotized Warehouses
title_zh: 大型机器人仓库的自适应任务规划
abstract: Robotized warehouses are deployed to automatically distribute millions of items brought by the massive logistic orders from e-commerce. A key to automated item distribution is to plan paths for robots, also known as task planning, where each task is to deliver racks with items to pickers for processing and then return the rack back. Prior solutions are unfit for large-scale robotized warehouses due to the inflexibility to time-varying item arrivals and the low efficiency for high throughput. In this paper, we propose a new task planning problem called TPRW, which aims to minimize the end-to-end makespan that incorporates the entire item distribution pipeline, known as a fulfilment cycle. Direct extensions from state-of-the-art path finding methods are ineffective to solve the TPRW problem because they fail to adapt to the bottleneck variations of fulfillment cycles. In response, we propose Efficient Adaptive Task Planning, a framework for large-scale robotized warehouses with time-varying item arrivals. It adaptively selects racks to fulfill at each timestamp via reinforcement learning, accounting for the time-varying bottleneck of the fulfillment cycles. Then it finds paths for robots to transport the selected racks. The framework adopts a series of efficient optimizations on both time and memory to handle large-scale item throughput. Evaluations on both synthesized and real data show an improvement of $37.1\%$ in effectiveness and $75.5\%$ in efficiency over the state-of-the-arts.
summary: Robotized warehouses are deployed to automatically distribute millions of items brought by the massive logistic orders from e-commerce. A key to automated item distribution is to plan paths for robots, also known as task planning, where each task is to deliver racks with items to pickers for processing and then return the rack back. Prior solutions are unfit for large-scale robotized warehouses due to the inflexibility to time-varying item arrivals and the low efficiency for high throughput. In this paper, we propose a new task planning problem called TPRW, which aims to minimize the end-to-end makespan that incorporates the entire item distribution pipeline, known as a fulfilment cycle. Direct extensions from state-of-the-art path finding methods are ineffective to solve the TPRW problem because they fail to adapt to the bottleneck variations of fulfillment cycles. In response, we propose Efficient Adaptive Task Planning, a framework for large-scale robotized warehouses with time-varying item arrivals. It adaptively selects racks to fulfill at each timestamp via reinforcement learning, accounting for the time-varying bottleneck of the fulfillment cycles. Then it finds paths for robots to transport the selected racks. The framework adopts a series of efficient optimizations on both time and memory to handle large-scale item throughput. Evaluations on both synthesized and real data show an improvement of $37.1\%$ in effectiveness and $75.5\%$ in efficiency over the state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 部署机器人仓库，自动配送电商海量物流订单带来的数百万件商品。自动化物品分配的关键是规划机器人的路径，也称为任务规划，其中每项任务是将装有物品的货架交付给拣选员进行处理，然后将货架返回。由于对时变物品到达的不灵活性以及高吞吐量的低效率，先前的解决方案不适合大型机器人化仓库。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 TPRW 的新任务规划问题，旨在最小化包含整个项目分发管道（称为履行周期）的端到端完工时间。最先进的路径查找方法的直接扩展无法有效解决 TPRW 问题，因为它们无法适应履行周期的瓶颈变化。作为回应，我们提出了高效自适应任务规划，这是一个针对具有随时间变化的物品到达情况的大型机器人化仓库的框架。它通过强化学习自适应地选择每个时间戳要履行的机架，从而解决履行周期中随时间变化的瓶颈。然后它会找到机器人运输选定机架的路径。该框架在时间和内存上采用了一系列有效的优化来处理大规模的项目吞吐量。对合成数据和真实数据的评估表明，与最先进的技术相比，有效性提高了 37.1\%$，效率提高了 75.5\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Efficient Adaptive Task Planning的框架，用于解决大规模机器人仓库中动态物品到达和高吞吐量下的任务规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有解决方案无法适应大规模仓库中时间变化的物品到达和高吞吐量需求，导致整体配送周期（fulfilment cycle）效率低下。
AI.method: 通过强化学习动态选择需执行的任务架，并结合路径规划算法优化机器人运输路径，同时采用时间与内存优化策略处理大规模数据。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上，相比现有方法在有效性提升37.1%，效率提升75.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过自适应任务选择和优化路径规划，有效解决了大规模机器人仓库中动态环境下的任务规划难题。

title: Function Decomposition Tree with Causality-First Perspective and Systematic Description of Problems in Materials Informatics
title_zh: 因果第一视角的函数分解树及材料信息学问题的系统描述
abstract: As interdisciplinary science is flourishing because of materials informatics and additional factors; a systematic way is required for expressing knowledge and facilitating communication between scientists in various fields. A function decomposition tree is such a representation, but domain scientists face difficulty in constructing it. Thus, this study cites the general problems encountered by beginners in generating function decomposition trees and proposes a new function decomposition representation method based on a causality-first perspective for resolution of these problems. The causality-first decomposition tree was obtained from a workflow expressed according to the processing sequence. Moreover, we developed a program that performed automatic conversion using the features of the causality-first decomposition trees. The proposed method was applied to materials informatics to demonstrate the systematic representation of expert knowledge and its usefullness.
summary: As interdisciplinary science is flourishing because of materials informatics and additional factors; a systematic way is required for expressing knowledge and facilitating communication between scientists in various fields. A function decomposition tree is such a representation, but domain scientists face difficulty in constructing it. Thus, this study cites the general problems encountered by beginners in generating function decomposition trees and proposes a new function decomposition representation method based on a causality-first perspective for resolution of these problems. The causality-first decomposition tree was obtained from a workflow expressed according to the processing sequence. Moreover, we developed a program that performed automatic conversion using the features of the causality-first decomposition trees. The proposed method was applied to materials informatics to demonstrate the systematic representation of expert knowledge and its usefullness.
abstract_zh: 由于材料信息学和其他因素，跨学科科学正在蓬勃发展；需要一种系统的方式来表达知识并促进各领域科学家之间的交流。函数分解树就是这样的一种表示形式，但领域科学家在构建它时面临着困难。因此，本研究引用了初学者在生成函数分解树时遇到的普遍问题，并提出了一种基于因果关系优先视角的新函数分解表示方法来解决这些问题。根据处理顺序表达的工作流程获得因果优先分解树。此外，我们开发了一个程序，利用因果优先分解树的特征执行自动转换。所提出的方法应用于材料信息学，以证明专家知识的系统表示及其有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于因果优先视角的函数分解树方法，解决材料信息学中知识表达与跨领域交流的系统性问题。
AI.motivation: 跨学科科学（如材料信息学）发展需要系统化知识表达工具，但现有函数分解树构建难度高，限制了科学家间的有效沟通。
AI.method: 提出因果优先分解树表示法，通过处理流程的因果关系构建分解树，并开发自动转换程序实现方法落地。
AI.result: 该方法在材料信息学场景中验证了专家知识的系统化表达有效性，提升了知识共享与跨学科协作效率。
AI.conclusion: 因果优先分解树方法解决了传统函数分解树构建难题，为跨学科知识体系构建提供了可复用的技术框架。

title: Discrete models of continuous behavior of collective adaptive systems
title_zh: 集体适应系统连续行为的离散模型
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, author prepared version of final manuscript accepted at ISoLA 2022
comments: 16 pages, 14 figures, author prepared version of final manuscript accepted at ISoLA 2022
abstract: Artificial ants are "small" units, moving autonomously on a shared, dynamically changing "space", directly or indirectly exchanging some kind of information. Artificial ants are frequently conceived as a paradigm for collective adaptive systems. In this paper, we discuss means to represent continuous moves of "ants" in discrete models. More generally, we challenge the role of the notion of "time" in artificial ant systems and models. We suggest a modeling framework that structures behavior along causal dependencies, and not along temporal relations. We present all arguments by help of a simple example. As a modeling framework we employ Heraklit; an emerging framework that already has proven its worth in many contexts.
summary: Artificial ants are "small" units, moving autonomously on a shared, dynamically changing "space", directly or indirectly exchanging some kind of information. Artificial ants are frequently conceived as a paradigm for collective adaptive systems. In this paper, we discuss means to represent continuous moves of "ants" in discrete models. More generally, we challenge the role of the notion of "time" in artificial ant systems and models. We suggest a modeling framework that structures behavior along causal dependencies, and not along temporal relations. We present all arguments by help of a simple example. As a modeling framework we employ Heraklit; an emerging framework that already has proven its worth in many contexts.
abstract_zh: 人造蚂蚁是“小”单位，在共享的、动态变化的“空间”上自主移动，直接或间接地交换某种信息。人造蚂蚁经常被认为是集体适应系统的范例。在本文中，我们讨论了在离散模型中表示“蚂蚁”连续移动的方法。更一般地说，我们挑战“时间”概念在人工蚂蚁系统和模型中的作用。我们建议建立一个建模框架，该框架可以根据因果依赖性而不是时​​间关系来构建行为。我们通过一个简单的例子来展示所有的论点。我们采用 Heraklit 作为建模框架；一个新兴框架已经在许多情况下证明了其价值。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何在离散模型中表示集体自适应系统的连续行为，并挑战传统时间概念，提出基于因果依赖的建模框架。
AI.motivation: 现有模型过度依赖时间概念，难以准确描述人工蚂蚁等集体自适应系统的连续动态行为，需寻找更合适的建模方法。
AI.method: 采用Heraklit框架，通过因果依赖而非时间关系结构化行为，并借助简单示例验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 成功构建了离散模型以描述连续行为，证明因果依赖框架可替代传统时间模型，且Heraklit框架在多场景中已验证其价值。
AI.conclusion: 因果依赖建模方法为集体自适应系统提供新视角，Heraklit框架的有效性得到进一步验证。

title: CenterCLIP: Token Clustering for Efficient Text-Video Retrieval
title_zh: CenterCLIP：用于高效文本视频检索的令牌聚类
comment: accepted by SIGIR 2022, code is at https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP
comments: accepted by SIGIR 2022, code is at https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP
abstract: Recently, large-scale pre-training methods like CLIP have made great progress in multi-modal research such as text-video retrieval. In CLIP, transformers are vital for modeling complex multi-modal relations. However, in the vision transformer of CLIP, the essential visual tokenization process, which produces discrete visual token sequences, generates many homogeneous tokens due to the redundancy nature of consecutive and similar frames in videos. This significantly increases computation costs and hinders the deployment of video retrieval models in web applications. In this paper, to reduce the number of redundant video tokens, we design a multi-segment token clustering algorithm to find the most representative tokens and drop the non-essential ones. As the frame redundancy occurs mostly in consecutive frames, we divide videos into multiple segments and conduct segment-level clustering. Center tokens from each segment are later concatenated into a new sequence, while their original spatial-temporal relations are well maintained. We instantiate two clustering algorithms to efficiently find deterministic medoids and iteratively partition groups in high dimensional space. Through this token clustering and center selection procedure, we successfully reduce computation costs by removing redundant visual tokens. This method further enhances segment-level semantic alignment between video and text representations, enforcing the spatio-temporal interactions of tokens from within-segment frames. Our method, coined as CenterCLIP, surpasses existing state-of-the-art by a large margin on typical text-video benchmarks, while reducing the training memory cost by 35\% and accelerating the inference speed by 14\% at the best case. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP}{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP}.

In CLIP, transformers are vital for modeling complex multi-modal relations. However, in the vision transformer of CLIP, the essential visual tokenization process, which produces discrete visual token sequences, generates many homogeneous tokens due to the redundancy nature of consecutive and similar frames in videos. This significantly increases computation costs and hinders the deployment of video retrieval models in web applications. In this paper, to reduce the number of redundant video tokens, we design a multi-segment token clustering algorithm to find the most representative tokens and drop the non-essential ones. As the frame redundancy occurs mostly in consecutive frames, we divide videos into multiple segments and conduct segment-level clustering. Center tokens from each segment are later concatenated into a new sequence, while their original spatial-temporal relations are well maintained. We instantiate two clustering algorithms to efficiently find deterministic medoids and iteratively partition groups in high dimensional space. Through this token clustering and center selection procedure, we successfully reduce computation costs by removing redundant visual tokens. This method further enhances segment-level semantic alignment between video and text representations, enforcing the spatio-temporal interactions of tokens from within-segment frames. Our method, coined as CenterCLIP, surpasses existing state-of-the-art by a large margin on typical text-video benchmarks, while reducing the training memory cost by 35\% and accelerating the inference speed by 14\% at the best case. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP}{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP}.
abstract_zh: 最近，像CLIP这样的大规模预训练方法在文本视频检索等多模态研究中取得了很大进展。在 CLIP 中，变压器对于复杂的多模态关系建模至关重要。然而，在 CLIP 的视觉转换器中，由于视频中连续和相似帧的冗余性质，产生离散视觉标记序列的基本视觉标记化过程会生成许多同质标记。这显着增加了计算成本并阻碍了视频检索模型在 Web 应用程序中的部署。在本文中，为了减少冗余视频令牌的数量，我们设计了一种多段令牌聚类算法来找到最具代表性的令牌并丢弃非必要的令牌。由于帧冗余主要发生在连续帧中，因此我们将视频分为多个片段并进行片段级聚类。每个片段的中心标记随后被连接成一个新的序列，同时它们原始的时空关系得到了很好的维护。我们实例化了两种聚类算法，以有效地找到确定性中心点并在高维空间中迭代划分组。通过这种标记聚类和中心选择过程，我们通过删除冗余的视觉标记成功地降低了计算成本。该方法进一步增强了视频和文本表示之间的片段级语义对齐，强制来自片段内帧的标记的时空交互。我们的方法被称为 CenterCLIP，在典型的文本视频基准测试中大幅超越了现有的最先进技术，同时在最佳情况下将训练内存成本降低了 35%，并将推理速度加快了 14%。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP}{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CenterCLIP的方法，通过多段标记聚类算法减少视频检索中的冗余视觉标记，从而提高计算效率。
AI.motivation: CLIP等大规模预训练方法在多模态研究中取得了显著进展，但在视频检索中，视觉标记的冗余性显著增加了计算成本，阻碍了其在实际应用中的部署。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种多段标记聚类算法，将视频划分为多个段并进行段级聚类，选取每个段的中心标记，从而减少冗余视觉标记并保持时空关系。
AI.result: CenterCLIP在典型的文本-视频基准测试中显著优于现有最先进方法，同时减少了35%的训练内存成本，并在最佳情况下加速了14%的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: CenterCLIP通过减少冗余视觉标记，提高了视频检索的计算效率和性能，为实际应用提供了更高效的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CenterCLIP的方法，通过多段标记聚类算法减少视频检索中的冗余视觉标记，从而提高计算效率。
motivation: CLIP等大规模预训练方法在多模态研究中取得了显著进展，但在视频检索中，视觉标记的冗余性显著增加了计算成本，阻碍了其在实际应用中的部署。
method: 本文设计了一种多段标记聚类算法，将视频划分为多个段并进行段级聚类，选取每个段的中心标记，从而减少冗余视觉标记并保持时空关系。
result: CenterCLIP在典型的文本-视频基准测试中显著优于现有最先进方法，同时减少了35%的训练内存成本，并在最佳情况下加速了14%的推理速度。
conclusion: CenterCLIP通过减少冗余视觉标记，提高了视频检索的计算效率和性能，为实际应用提供了更高效的解决方案。
search_text: CenterCLIP: Token Clustering for Efficient Text-Video Retrieval CenterCLIP：用于高效文本视频检索的令牌聚类 Recently, large-scale pre-training methods like CLIP have made great progress in multi-modal research such as text-video retrieval. In CLIP, transformers are vital for modeling complex multi-modal relations. However, in the vision transformer of CLIP, the essential visual tokenization process, which produces discrete visual token sequences, generates many homogeneous tokens due to the redundancy nature of consecutive and similar frames in videos. This significantly increases computation costs and hinders the deployment of video retrieval models in web applications. In this paper, to reduce the number of redundant video tokens, we design a multi-segment token clustering algorithm to find the most representative tokens and drop the non-essential ones. As the frame redundancy occurs mostly in consecutive frames, we divide videos into multiple segments and conduct segment-level clustering. Center tokens from each segment are later concatenated into a new sequence, while their original spatial-temporal relations are well maintained. We instantiate two clustering algorithms to efficiently find deterministic medoids and iteratively partition groups in high dimensional space. Through this token clustering and center selection procedure, we successfully reduce computation costs by removing redundant visual tokens. This method further enhances segment-level semantic alignment between video and text representations, enforcing the spatio-temporal interactions of tokens from within-segment frames. Our method, coined as CenterCLIP, surpasses existing state-of-the-art by a large margin on typical text-video benchmarks, while reducing the training memory cost by 35\% and accelerating the inference speed by 14\% at the best case. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP}{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP}. 最近，像CLIP这样的大规模预训练方法在文本视频检索等多模态研究中取得了很大进展。在 CLIP 中，变压器对于复杂的多模态关系建模至关重要。然而，在 CLIP 的视觉转换器中，由于视频中连续和相似帧的冗余性质，产生离散视觉标记序列的基本视觉标记化过程会生成许多同质标记。这显着增加了计算成本并阻碍了视频检索模型在 Web 应用程序中的部署。在本文中，为了减少冗余视频令牌的数量，我们设计了一种多段令牌聚类算法来找到最具代表性的令牌并丢弃非必要的令牌。由于帧冗余主要发生在连续帧中，因此我们将视频分为多个片段并进行片段级聚类。每个片段的中心标记随后被连接成一个新的序列，同时它们原始的时空关系得到了很好的维护。我们实例化了两种聚类算法，以有效地找到确定性中心点并在高维空间中迭代划分组。通过这种标记聚类和中心选择过程，我们通过删除冗余的视觉标记成功地降低了计算成本。该方法进一步增强了视频和文本表示之间的片段级语义对齐，强制来自片段内帧的标记的时空交互。我们的方法被称为 CenterCLIP，在典型的文本视频基准测试中大幅超越了现有的最先进技术，同时在最佳情况下将训练内存成本降低了 35%，并将推理速度加快了 14%。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP}{https://github.com/mzhaoshuai/CenterCLIP} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为CenterCLIP的方法，通过多段标记聚类算法减少视频检索中的冗余视觉标记，从而提高计算效率。 Shuai Zhao,Linchao Zhu,Xiaohan Wang,Yi Yang cs.CV,cs.IR

title: A Novel Approach to Fairness in Automated Decision-Making using Affective Normalization
title_zh: 使用情感标准化实现自动决策公平性的新方法
abstract: Any decision, such as one about who to hire, involves two components. First, a rational component, i.e., they have a good education, they speak clearly. Second, an affective component, based on observables such as visual features of race and gender, and possibly biased by stereotypes. Here we propose a method for measuring the affective, socially biased, component, thus enabling its removal. That is, given a decision-making process, these affective measurements remove the affective bias in the decision, rendering it fair across a set of categories defined by the method itself. We thus propose that this may solve three key problems in intersectional fairness: (1) the definition of categories over which fairness is a consideration; (2) an infinite regress into smaller and smaller groups; and (3) ensuring a fair distribution based on basic human rights or other prior information. The primary idea in this paper is that fairness biases can be measured using affective coherence, and that this can be used to normalize outcome mappings. We aim for this conceptual work to expose a novel method for handling fairness problems that uses emotional coherence as an independent measure of bias that goes beyond statistical parity.
summary: Any decision, such as one about who to hire, involves two components. First, a rational component, i.e., they have a good education, they speak clearly. Second, an affective component, based on observables such as visual features of race and gender, and possibly biased by stereotypes. Here we propose a method for measuring the affective, socially biased, component, thus enabling its removal. That is, given a decision-making process, these affective measurements remove the affective bias in the decision, rendering it fair across a set of categories defined by the method itself. We thus propose that this may solve three key problems in intersectional fairness: (1) the definition of categories over which fairness is a consideration; (2) an infinite regress into smaller and smaller groups; and (3) ensuring a fair distribution based on basic human rights or other prior information. The primary idea in this paper is that fairness biases can be measured using affective coherence, and that this can be used to normalize outcome mappings. We aim for this conceptual work to expose a novel method for handling fairness problems that uses emotional coherence as an independent measure of bias that goes beyond statistical parity.
abstract_zh: 任何决定，例如关于雇用谁的决定，都涉及两个组成部分。首先，理性的成分，即他们受过良好的教育，他们说话清晰。其次，情感成分，基于种族和性别的视觉特征等可观察因素，并且可能受到刻板印象的偏见。在这里，我们提出了一种测量情感、社会偏见成分的方法，从而能够将其消除。也就是说，在给定决策过程的情况下，这些情感测量消除了决策中的情感偏差，使其在方法本身定义的一组类别中保持公平。因此，我们认为这可以解决交叉公平中的三个关键问题：（1）考虑公平的类别的定义； (2) 无限回归到越来越小的群体； (3) 确保基于基本人权或其他先验信息的公平分配。本文的主要思想是可以使用情感连贯性来衡量公平偏差，并且这可以用于标准化结果映射。我们的目标是通过这项概念性工作揭示一种处理公平问题的新方法，该方法使用情感连贯性作为超越统计均等的偏见的独立衡量标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过情感归一化消除自动化决策中情感偏差的新方法，以解决交叉公平性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性方法在定义类别、避免无限细分及确保人权公平分配方面存在局限，需新的情感偏差测量方式。
AI.method: 通过情感一致性测量偏差，利用归一化调整结果映射，消除社会偏见影响。
AI.result: 提出概念性方法，解决交叉公平性的三个核心问题，但未提供具体实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 情感一致性可作为独立偏差度量，为公平决策提供超越统计公平性的新思路。

authors_text: Huan Yin,Zhiyi Lin,Justin K. W. Yeoh
title: Semantic localization on BIM-generated maps using a 3D LiDAR sensor
title_zh: 使用 3D LiDAR 传感器在 BIM 生成的地图上进行语义定位
comment: Accepted by Automation in Construction. Please refer to the published version online. A video demonstration is at https://youtu.be/6jscy2Y5mj4
comments: Accepted by Automation in Construction. Please refer to the published version online. A video demonstration is at https://youtu.be/6jscy2Y5mj4
abstract: Conventional sensor-based localization relies on high-precision maps, which are generally built using specialized mapping techniques involving high labor and computational costs. In the architectural, engineering and construction industry, Building Information Models (BIM) are available and can provide informative descriptions of environments. This paper explores an effective way to localize a mobile 3D LiDAR sensor on BIM-generated maps considering both geometric and semantic properties. First, original BIM elements are converted to semantically augmented point cloud maps using categories and locations. After that, a coarse-to-fine semantic localization is performed to align laser points to the map based on iterative closest point registration. The experimental results show that the semantic localization can track the pose successfully with only one LiDAR sensor, thus demonstrating the feasibility of the proposed mapping-free localization framework. The results also show that using semantic information can help reduce localization errors on BIM-generated maps.
summary: Conventional sensor-based localization relies on high-precision maps, which are generally built using specialized mapping techniques involving high labor and computational costs. In the architectural, engineering and construction industry, Building Information Models (BIM) are available and can provide informative descriptions of environments. This paper explores an effective way to localize a mobile 3D LiDAR sensor on BIM-generated maps considering both geometric and semantic properties. First, original BIM elements are converted to semantically augmented point cloud maps using categories and locations. After that, a coarse-to-fine semantic localization is performed to align laser points to the map based on iterative closest point registration. The experimental results show that the semantic localization can track the pose successfully with only one LiDAR sensor, thus demonstrating the feasibility of the proposed mapping-free localization framework. The results also show that using semantic information can help reduce localization errors on BIM-generated maps.
abstract_zh: 传统的基于传感器的定位依赖于高精度地图，而高精度地图通常是使用专门的地图技术构建的，涉及较高的劳动力和计算成本。在建筑、工程和施工行业，建筑信息模型 (BIM) 可用，可以提供环境的信息描述。本文探索了一种在 BIM 生成的地图上定位移动 3D LiDAR 传感器的有效方法，同时考虑了几何和语义属性。首先，使用类别和位置将原始 BIM 元素转换为语义增强的点云地图。之后，执行从粗到细的语义定位，以基于迭代最近点配准将激光点与地图对齐。实验结果表明，语义定位仅用一个激光雷达传感器就可以成功跟踪姿态，从而证明了所提出的无映射定位框架的可行性。结果还表明，使用语义信息有助于减少 BIM 生成的地图上的定位错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于BIM生成地图和3D激光雷达传感器的语义定位方法，无需高精度地图即可实现移动传感器的定位。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器定位依赖高精度地图，但其构建成本高且耗时；建筑行业已有的BIM模型可提供环境信息，因此需探索利用BIM生成地图进行语义定位的可行性。
AI.method: 将BIM元素转换为带语义信息的点云地图，通过粗到细的语义定位策略结合迭代最近点（ICP）算法，实现激光雷达点与地图的对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅使用单个激光雷达即可成功跟踪姿态，语义信息有助于减少BIM生成地图上的定位误差。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无地图定位框架可行，语义信息能有效提升BIM生成地图上的定位精度。

authors_text: Walter Morales-Alvarez,Novel Certad,Hadj. Hamma Tadjine,Cristina Olaverri-Monreal
title: Automated Driving Systems: Impact of Haptic Guidance on Driving Performance after a Take Over Request
title_zh: 自动驾驶系统：接管请求后触觉引导对驾驶性能的影响
abstract: In conditional automation, a response from the driver is expected when a take over request is issued due to unexpected events, emergencies, or reaching the operational design domain boundaries. Cooperation between the automated driving system and the driver can help to guarantee a safe and pleasant transfer if the driver is guided through a haptic guidance system that applies a slight counter-steering force to the steering wheel. We examine in this work the impact of haptic guidance systems on driving performance after a take over request was triggered to avoid sudden obstacles on the road. We studied different driver conditions that involved Non-Driving Related Tasks (NRDT). Results showed that haptic guidance systems increased road safety by reducing the lateral error, the distance and reaction time to a sudden obstacle and the number of collisions.
summary: In conditional automation, a response from the driver is expected when a take over request is issued due to unexpected events, emergencies, or reaching the operational design domain boundaries. Cooperation between the automated driving system and the driver can help to guarantee a safe and pleasant transfer if the driver is guided through a haptic guidance system that applies a slight counter-steering force to the steering wheel. We examine in this work the impact of haptic guidance systems on driving performance after a take over request was triggered to avoid sudden obstacles on the road. We studied different driver conditions that involved Non-Driving Related Tasks (NRDT). Results showed that haptic guidance systems increased road safety by reducing the lateral error, the distance and reaction time to a sudden obstacle and the number of collisions.
abstract_zh: 在条件自动化中，当由于意外事件、紧急情况或到达操作设计域边界而发出接管请求时，预计驾驶员会做出响应。如果通过触觉引导系统向方向盘施加轻微的反转向力来引导驾驶员，自动驾驶系统和驾驶员之间的合作可以帮助保证安全和愉快的换乘。我们在这项工作中研究了触发接管请求以避免道路上突然出现障碍物后触觉引导系统对驾驶性能的影响。我们研究了涉及非驾驶相关任务 (NRDT) 的不同驾驶员条件。结果表明，触觉引导系统通过减少横向误差、对突然障碍物的距离和反应时间以及碰撞次数来提高道路安全性。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了触觉引导系统在自动驾驶接管请求后对驾驶性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 在条件自动化驾驶中，驾驶员需响应接管请求以确保安全，而触觉引导可能有助于提升交接效率与安全性，但其效果需验证。
AI.method: 通过实验测试不同驾驶员状态（包含非驾驶相关任务）下，触觉引导系统对突发障碍物应对性能的影响。
AI.result: 触觉引导系统显著减少横向误差、障碍物距离与反应时间，降低碰撞次数，提升道路安全性。
AI.conclusion: 触觉引导系统能有效增强接管后的驾驶表现，建议在自动驾驶系统中集成此类辅助技术。

title: Deep-Attack over the Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 对深度强化学习的深度攻击
abstract: Recent adversarial attack developments have made reinforcement learning more vulnerable, and different approaches exist to deploy attacks against it, where the key is how to choose the right timing of the attack. Some work tries to design an attack evaluation function to select critical points that will be attacked if the value is greater than a certain threshold. This approach makes it difficult to find the right place to deploy an attack without considering the long-term impact. In addition, there is a lack of appropriate indicators of assessment during attacks. To make the attacks more intelligent as well as to remedy the existing problems, we propose the reinforcement learning-based attacking framework by considering the effectiveness and stealthy spontaneously, while we also propose a new metric to evaluate the performance of the attack model in these two aspects. Experimental results show the effectiveness of our proposed model and the goodness of our proposed evaluation metric. Furthermore, we validate the transferability of the model, and also its robustness under the adversarial training.
summary: Recent adversarial attack developments have made reinforcement learning more vulnerable, and different approaches exist to deploy attacks against it, where the key is how to choose the right timing of the attack. Some work tries to design an attack evaluation function to select critical points that will be attacked if the value is greater than a certain threshold. This approach makes it difficult to find the right place to deploy an attack without considering the long-term impact. In addition, there is a lack of appropriate indicators of assessment during attacks. To make the attacks more intelligent as well as to remedy the existing problems, we propose the reinforcement learning-based attacking framework by considering the effectiveness and stealthy spontaneously, while we also propose a new metric to evaluate the performance of the attack model in these two aspects. Experimental results show the effectiveness of our proposed model and the goodness of our proposed evaluation metric. Furthermore, we validate the transferability of the model, and also its robustness under the adversarial training.
abstract_zh: 最近对抗性攻击的发展使得强化学习变得更加脆弱，并且存在不同的方法来针对它部署攻击，其中关键是如何选择正确的攻击时机。一些工作尝试设计一个攻击评估函数来选择当该值大于某个阈值时将受到攻击的临界点。这种方法使得在不考虑长期影响的情况下很难找到部署攻击的正确位置。此外，缺乏适当的攻击期间评估指标。为了使攻击更加智能并弥补现有的问题，我们自发地考虑了有效性和隐秘性，提出了基于强化学习的攻击框架，同时我们还提出了一种新的指标来评估攻击模型在这两方面的性能。实验结果表明了我们提出的模型的有效性和我们提出的评估指标的优点。此外，我们验证了模型的可迁移性以及其在对抗性训练下的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的对抗攻击框架，并设计新的评估指标以提升攻击效果与隐蔽性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法在选择攻击时机时未考虑长期影响，且缺乏有效的攻击性能评估指标。
AI.method: 构建强化学习驱动的攻击框架，结合效果与隐蔽性双重目标，并提出量化评估指标。
AI.result: 实验验证了攻击模型的有效性及指标合理性，同时证明模型具有可迁移性和对抗训练鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过智能决策机制改进攻击策略，为深度强化学习安全研究提供了新评估标准。

title: Seeding Diversity into AI Art
title_zh: 为人工智能艺术注入多样性
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, to be published in the Proceedings of the 13th International Conference on Computational Creativity (ICCC 2022)
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, to be published in the Proceedings of the 13th International Conference on Computational Creativity (ICCC 2022)
abstract: This paper argues that generative art driven by conformance to a visual and/or semantic corpus lacks the necessary criteria to be considered creative. Among several issues identified in the literature, we focus on the fact that generative adversarial networks (GANs) that create a single image, in a vacuum, lack a concept of novelty regarding how their product differs from previously created ones. We envision that an algorithm that combines the novelty preservation mechanisms in evolutionary algorithms with the power of GANs can deliberately guide its creative process towards output that is both good and novel. In this paper, we use recent advances in image generation based on semantic prompts using OpenAI's CLIP model, interrupting the GAN's iterative process with short cycles of evolutionary divergent search. The results of evolution are then used to continue the GAN's iterative process; we hypothesise that this intervention will lead to more novel outputs. Testing our hypothesis using novelty search with local competition, a quality-diversity evolutionary algorithm that can increase visual diversity while maintaining quality in the form of adherence to the semantic prompt, we explore how different notions of visual diversity can affect both the process and the product of the algorithm. Results show that even a simplistic measure of visual diversity can help counter a drift towards similar images caused by the GAN. This first experiment opens a new direction for introducing higher intentionality and a more nuanced drive for GANs.
summary: This paper argues that generative art driven by conformance to a visual and/or semantic corpus lacks the necessary criteria to be considered creative. Among several issues identified in the literature, we focus on the fact that generative adversarial networks (GANs) that create a single image, in a vacuum, lack a concept of novelty regarding how their product differs from previously created ones. We envision that an algorithm that combines the novelty preservation mechanisms in evolutionary algorithms with the power of GANs can deliberately guide its creative process towards output that is both good and novel. In this paper, we use recent advances in image generation based on semantic prompts using OpenAI's CLIP model, interrupting the GAN's iterative process with short cycles of evolutionary divergent search. The results of evolution are then used to continue the GAN's iterative process; we hypothesise that this intervention will lead to more novel outputs. Testing our hypothesis using novelty search with local competition, a quality-diversity evolutionary algorithm that can increase visual diversity while maintaining quality in the form of adherence to the semantic prompt, we explore how different notions of visual diversity can affect both the process and the product of the algorithm. Results show that even a simplistic measure of visual diversity can help counter a drift towards similar images caused by the GAN. This first experiment opens a new direction for introducing higher intentionality and a more nuanced drive for GANs.
abstract_zh: 本文认为，由符合视觉和/或语义语料库驱动的生成艺术缺乏被认为具有创造性的必要标准。在文献中发现的几个问题中，我们关注的事实是，在真空中创建单个图像的生成对抗网络（GAN）缺乏关于其产品与以前创建的产品有何不同的新颖性概念。我们设想，一种将进化算法中的新颖性保存机制与 GAN 的强大功能相结合的算法，可以有意识地引导其创作过程走向既好的又新颖的输出。在本文中，我们利用 OpenAI 的 CLIP 模型基于语义提示的图像生成方面的最新进展，通过进化发散搜索的短周期中断 GAN 的迭代过程。然后进化的结果被用来继续GAN的迭代过程；我们假设这种干预将带来更多新颖的产出。使用带有局部竞争的新颖性搜索来测试我们的假设，这是一种质量多样性进化算法，可以增加视觉多样性，同时以遵守语义提示的形式保持质量，我们探讨了视觉多样性的不同概念如何影响算法的过程和产品。结果表明，即使是简单的视觉多样性测量也可以帮助抵消 GAN 引起的向相似图像的漂移。第一个实验为 GAN 引入更高的意向性和更细致的驱动开辟了新的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过结合生成对抗网络（GAN）与进化算法，解决AI艺术生成中缺乏新颖性的问题，以提升生成作品的多样性和创造性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的生成艺术因仅依赖语义或视觉语料库，无法有效衡量输出的新颖性，导致生成结果趋同，缺乏真正的创造力。
AI.method: 利用OpenAI的CLIP模型进行语义提示的图像生成，通过中断GAN迭代过程并插入进化算法的多样性搜索周期，结合新颖性搜索与局部竞争机制优化结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使采用简单的视觉多样性度量，也能有效抑制GAN生成相似图像的倾向，提升输出多样性与语义符合度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为GAN引入更高层次的意图性控制，为AI艺术创作提供了兼顾质量与新颖性的新方向。

result: 实验表明，即使采用简单的视觉多样性度量，也能有效抑制GAN生成相似图像的倾向，提升输出多样性与语义符合度。
conclusion: 该方法为GAN引入更高层次的意图性控制，为AI艺术创作提供了兼顾质量与新颖性的新方向。
search_text: Seeding Diversity into AI Art 为人工智能艺术注入多样性 This paper argues that generative art driven by conformance to a visual and/or semantic corpus lacks the necessary criteria to be considered creative. Among several issues identified in the literature, we focus on the fact that generative adversarial networks (GANs) that create a single image, in a vacuum, lack a concept of novelty regarding how their product differs from previously created ones. We envision that an algorithm that combines the novelty preservation mechanisms in evolutionary algorithms with the power of GANs can deliberately guide its creative process towards output that is both good and novel. In this paper, we use recent advances in image generation based on semantic prompts using OpenAI's CLIP model, interrupting the GAN's iterative process with short cycles of evolutionary divergent search. The results of evolution are then used to continue the GAN's iterative process; we hypothesise that this intervention will lead to more novel outputs. Testing our hypothesis using novelty search with local competition, a quality-diversity evolutionary algorithm that can increase visual diversity while maintaining quality in the form of adherence to the semantic prompt, we explore how different notions of visual diversity can affect both the process and the product of the algorithm. Results show that even a simplistic measure of visual diversity can help counter a drift towards similar images caused by the GAN. This first experiment opens a new direction for introducing higher intentionality and a more nuanced drive for GANs. 本文认为，由符合视觉和/或语义语料库驱动的生成艺术缺乏被认为具有创造性的必要标准。在文献中发现的几个问题中，我们关注的事实是，在真空中创建单个图像的生成对抗网络（GAN）缺乏关于其产品与以前创建的产品有何不同的新颖性概念。我们设想，一种将进化算法中的新颖性保存机制与 GAN 的强大功能相结合的算法，可以有意识地引导其创作过程走向既好的又新颖的输出。在本文中，我们利用 OpenAI 的 CLIP 模型基于语义提示的图像生成方面的最新进展，通过进化发散搜索的短周期中断 GAN 的迭代过程。然后进化的结果被用来继续GAN的迭代过程；我们假设这种干预将带来更多新颖的产出。使用带有局部竞争的新颖性搜索来测试我们的假设，这是一种质量多样性进化算法，可以增加视觉多样性，同时以遵守语义提示的形式保持质量，我们探讨了视觉多样性的不同概念如何影响算法的过程和产品。结果表明，即使是简单的视觉多样性测量也可以帮助抵消 GAN 引起的向相似图像的漂移。第一个实验为 GAN 引入更高的意向性和更细致的驱动开辟了新的方向。 本文提出通过结合生成对抗网络（GAN）与进化算法，解决AI艺术生成中缺乏新颖性的问题，以提升生成作品的多样性和创造性。 Marvin Zammit,Antonios Liapis,Georgios N. Yannakakis cs.AI,cs.GR

title: On verifying expectations and observations of intelligent agents
title_zh: 关于验证智能代理的期望和观察
abstract: Public observation logic (POL) is a variant of dynamic epistemic logic to reason about agent expectations and agent observations. Agents have certain expectations, regarding the situation at hand, that are actuated by the relevant protocols, and they eliminate possible worlds in which their expectations do not match with their observations. In this work, we investigate the computational complexity of the model checking problem for POL and prove its PSPACE-completeness. We also study various syntactic fragments of POL. We exemplify the applicability of POL model checking in verifying different characteristics and features of an interactive system with respect to the distinct expectations and (matching) observations of the system. Finally, we provide a discussion on the implementation of the model checking algorithms.
summary: Public observation logic (POL) is a variant of dynamic epistemic logic to reason about agent expectations and agent observations. Agents have certain expectations, regarding the situation at hand, that are actuated by the relevant protocols, and they eliminate possible worlds in which their expectations do not match with their observations. In this work, we investigate the computational complexity of the model checking problem for POL and prove its PSPACE-completeness. We also study various syntactic fragments of POL. We exemplify the applicability of POL model checking in verifying different characteristics and features of an interactive system with respect to the distinct expectations and (matching) observations of the system. Finally, we provide a discussion on the implementation of the model checking algorithms.
abstract_zh: 公共观察逻辑（POL）是动态认知逻辑的一种变体，用于推理主体期望和主体观察。代理人对当前的情况有一定的期望，这些期望是由相关协议驱动的，并且他们消除了他们的期望与他们的观察不符的可能世界。在这项工作中，我们研究了 POL 模型检查问题的计算复杂性并证明了其 PSPACE 完整性。我们还研究了 POL 的各种句法片段。我们举例说明了 POL 模型检查在验证交互系统的不同特征和特性方面对于系统的不同期望和（匹配）观察的适用性。最后，我们讨论了模型检查算法的实现。

AI.tldr: 研究公共观察逻辑（POL）的模型检测问题，分析其计算复杂性，并探讨其在验证智能代理期望与观察中的应用。
AI.motivation: 智能代理需要根据观察结果消除不符合的可能世界，但现有方法难以有效验证系统的正确性，因此需要研究POL的模型检测以确保期望与观察的一致性。
AI.method: 通过分析计算复杂性证明PSPACE完备性，研究不同语法片段，并通过实例验证POL模型检测在交互系统中的适用性，最后讨论算法实现。
AI.result: 证明了POL模型检测的PSPACE完备性，并展示了其在验证交互系统特性中的实际应用案例。
AI.conclusion: POL模型检测在验证智能代理系统中具有重要价值，但需进一步优化算法以提升实际应用效率。

authors_text: Zhiwei Hu,Víctor Gutiérrez-Basulto,Zhiliang Xiang,Xiaoli Li,Ru Li,Jeff Z. Pan
title: Type-aware Embeddings for Multi-Hop Reasoning over Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 用于知识图多跳推理的类型感知嵌入
abstract: Multi-hop reasoning over real-life knowledge graphs (KGs) is a highly challenging problem as traditional subgraph matching methods are not capable to deal with noise and missing information. To address this problem, it has been recently introduced a promising approach based on jointly embedding logical queries and KGs into a low-dimensional space to identify answer entities. However, existing proposals ignore critical semantic knowledge inherently available in KGs, such as type information. To leverage type information, we propose a novel TypE-aware Message Passing (TEMP) model, which enhances the entity and relation representations in queries, and simultaneously improves generalization, deductive and inductive reasoning. Remarkably, TEMP is a plug-and-play model that can be easily incorporated into existing embedding-based models to improve their performance. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate TEMP's effectiveness.
summary: Multi-hop reasoning over real-life knowledge graphs (KGs) is a highly challenging problem as traditional subgraph matching methods are not capable to deal with noise and missing information. To address this problem, it has been recently introduced a promising approach based on jointly embedding logical queries and KGs into a low-dimensional space to identify answer entities. However, existing proposals ignore critical semantic knowledge inherently available in KGs, such as type information. To leverage type information, we propose a novel TypE-aware Message Passing (TEMP) model, which enhances the entity and relation representations in queries, and simultaneously improves generalization, deductive and inductive reasoning. Remarkably, TEMP is a plug-and-play model that can be easily incorporated into existing embedding-based models to improve their performance. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate TEMP's effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 现实生活知识图（KG）上的多跳推理是一个极具挑战性的问题，因为传统的子图匹配方法无法处理噪声和丢失信息。为了解决这个问题，最近引入了一种有前途的方法，该方法基于将逻辑查询和知识图谱联合嵌入到低维空间中来识别答案实体。然而，现有的提案忽略了知识图谱中固有的关键语义知识，例如类型信息。为了利用类型信息，我们提出了一种新颖的 TypE 感知消息传递（TEMP）模型，该模型增强了查询中的实体和关系表示，并同时改进了泛化、演绎和归纳推理。值得注意的是，TEMP 是一种即插即用模型，可以轻松合并到现有的基于嵌入的模型中，以提高其性能。对三个真实世界数据集的大量实验证明了 TEMP 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类型感知嵌入的多跳推理模型TEMP，用于改进知识图谱中的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多跳推理方法难以处理知识图谱中的噪声和缺失信息，且现有嵌入方法未充分利用类型信息这一关键语义知识。
AI.method: 设计TypE-aware Message Passing（TEMP）模型，通过类型感知的消息传递机制增强实体和关系表示，同时具备插件式兼容性以提升现有模型性能。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的实验验证了TEMP在多跳推理任务中的有效性，显著提升推理准确率。
AI.conclusion: TEMP通过整合类型信息有效增强了知识图谱的多跳推理能力，且具有良好的模型兼容性和实际应用价值。

Pan cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Zebra: Memory Bandwidth Reduction for CNN Accelerators With Zero Block Regularization of Activation Maps
title_zh: Zebra：通过激活图的零块正则化减少 CNN 加速器的内存带宽
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, published in IEEE ISCAS 2021
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, published in IEEE ISCAS 2021
abstract: The large amount of memory bandwidth between local buffer and external DRAM has become the speedup bottleneck of CNN hardware accelerators, especially for activation maps. To reduce memory bandwidth, we propose to learn pruning unimportant blocks dynamically with zero block regularization of activation maps (Zebra). This strategy has low computational overhead and could easily integrate with other pruning methods for better performance. The experimental results show that the proposed method can reduce 70\% of memory bandwidth for Resnet-18 on Tiny-Imagenet within 1\% accuracy drops and 2\% accuracy gain with the combination of Network Slimming.
summary: The large amount of memory bandwidth between local buffer and external DRAM has become the speedup bottleneck of CNN hardware accelerators, especially for activation maps. To reduce memory bandwidth, we propose to learn pruning unimportant blocks dynamically with zero block regularization of activation maps (Zebra). This strategy has low computational overhead and could easily integrate with other pruning methods for better performance. The experimental results show that the proposed method can reduce 70\% of memory bandwidth for Resnet-18 on Tiny-Imagenet within 1\% accuracy drops and 2\% accuracy gain with the combination of Network Slimming.
abstract_zh: 本地缓冲区和外部 DRAM 之间的大量内存带宽已成为 CNN 硬件加速器的加速瓶颈，特别是对于激活图。为了减少内存带宽，我们建议通过激活图（Zebra）的零块正则化来学习动态修剪不重要的块。该策略的计算开销较低，并且可以轻松与其他修剪方法集成以获得更好的性能。实验结果表明，结合网络瘦身，该方法可以在Tiny-Imagenet上的Resnet-18上减少70%的内存带宽，精度下降1%，精度增益2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Zebra的方法，通过动态剪枝激活图中的不重要块以减少CNN加速器的内存带宽需求。
AI.motivation: CNN加速器中局部缓冲区与外部DRAM之间的内存带宽成为性能瓶颈，尤其在处理激活图时需要大量数据传输。
AI.method: 采用零块正则化（Zero Block Regularization）策略，动态学习并剪枝激活图中不重要的块，该方法计算开销低且可与其他剪枝技术结合。
AI.result: 在Resnet-18模型上，Tiny-Imagenet数据集下内存带宽减少70%且准确率仅下降1%，结合Network Slimming后准确率还提升2%。
AI.conclusion: Zebra方法有效降低内存带宽需求且保持较高精度，为CNN加速器优化提供了高效且兼容性强的解决方案。

search_text: Zebra: Memory Bandwidth Reduction for CNN Accelerators With Zero Block Regularization of Activation Maps Zebra：通过激活图的零块正则化减少 CNN 加速器的内存带宽 The large amount of memory bandwidth between local buffer and external DRAM has become the speedup bottleneck of CNN hardware accelerators, especially for activation maps. To reduce memory bandwidth, we propose to learn pruning unimportant blocks dynamically with zero block regularization of activation maps (Zebra). This strategy has low computational overhead and could easily integrate with other pruning methods for better performance. The experimental results show that the proposed method can reduce 70\% of memory bandwidth for Resnet-18 on Tiny-Imagenet within 1\% accuracy drops and 2\% accuracy gain with the combination of Network Slimming. 本地缓冲区和外部 DRAM 之间的大量内存带宽已成为 CNN 硬件加速器的加速瓶颈，特别是对于激活图。为了减少内存带宽，我们建议通过激活图（Zebra）的零块正则化来学习动态修剪不重要的块。该策略的计算开销较低，并且可以轻松与其他修剪方法集成以获得更好的性能。实验结果表明，结合网络瘦身，该方法可以在Tiny-Imagenet上的Resnet-18上减少70%的内存带宽，精度下降1%，精度增益2%。 本文提出一种名为Zebra的方法，通过动态剪枝激活图中的不重要块以减少CNN加速器的内存带宽需求。 Hsu-Tung Shih,Tian-Sheuan Chang cs.AR,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Sparse Compressed Spiking Neural Network Accelerator for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于物体检测的稀疏压缩尖峰神经网络加速器
comment: 11 pages, 18 figures, to be published in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems--I: Regular Papers
comments: 11 pages, 18 figures, to be published in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems--I: Regular Papers
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are inspired by the human brain, have recently gained popularity due to their relatively simple and low-power hardware for transmitting binary spikes and highly sparse activation maps. However, because SNNs contain extra time dimension information, the SNN accelerator will require more buffers and take longer to infer, especially for the more difficult high-resolution object detection task. As a result, this paper proposes a sparse compressed spiking neural network accelerator that takes advantage of the high sparsity of activation maps and weights by utilizing the proposed gated one-to-all product for low power and highly parallel model execution. The experimental result of the neural network shows 71.5$\%$ mAP with mixed (1,3) time steps on the IVS 3cls dataset. The accelerator with the TSMC 28nm CMOS process can achieve 1024$\times$576@29 frames per second processing when running at 500MHz with 35.88TOPS/W energy efficiency and 1.05mJ energy consumption per frame.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are inspired by the human brain, have recently gained popularity due to their relatively simple and low-power hardware for transmitting binary spikes and highly sparse activation maps. However, because SNNs contain extra time dimension information, the SNN accelerator will require more buffers and take longer to infer, especially for the more difficult high-resolution object detection task. As a result, this paper proposes a sparse compressed spiking neural network accelerator that takes advantage of the high sparsity of activation maps and weights by utilizing the proposed gated one-to-all product for low power and highly parallel model execution. The experimental result of the neural network shows 71.5$\%$ mAP with mixed (1,3) time steps on the IVS 3cls dataset. The accelerator with the TSMC 28nm CMOS process can achieve 1024$\times$576@29 frames per second processing when running at 500MHz with 35.88TOPS/W energy efficiency and 1.05mJ energy consumption per frame.
abstract_zh: 受人脑启发的尖峰神经网络（SNN）最近因其相对简单且低功耗的硬件来传输二进制尖峰和高度稀疏的激活图而受到欢迎。然而，由于 SNN 包含额外的时间维度信息，SNN 加速器将需要更多的缓冲区并需要更长的时间来推理，特别是对于更困难的高分辨率目标检测任务。因此，本文提出了一种稀疏压缩尖峰神经网络加速器，它利用所提出的门控一对多乘积来实现低功耗和高度并行的模型执行，从而利用激活图和权重的高度稀疏性。神经网络的实验结果显示，在 IVS 3cls 数据集上混合 (1,3) 时间步长的 mAP 为 71.5$\%$。采用台积电28nm CMOS工艺的加速器在500MHz运行时可实现每秒1024$\times$576@29帧处理，能源效率为35.88TOPS/W，每帧能耗为1.05mJ。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于目标检测的稀疏压缩脉冲神经网络加速器，旨在解决传统脉冲神经网络（SNN）在高分辨率任务中缓冲区需求大和推理速度慢的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管脉冲神经网络（SNN）具有低功耗和二进制脉冲传输的优势，但其额外的时间维度信息导致加速器需要更多缓冲区且推理时间长，尤其在高分辨率目标检测任务中效率不足。
AI.method: 通过利用激活图和权重的高稀疏性，提出了一种基于门控一对全乘积的稀疏压缩方法，实现低功耗和高度并行的模型执行。
AI.result: 在IVS 3cls数据集上，混合(1,3)时间步长下达到71.5%的mAP；基于TSMC 28nm工艺的加速器在500MHz下实现1024×576@29帧/秒，能效为35.88TOPS/W，每帧能耗1.05mJ。
AI.conclusion: 该加速器通过稀疏压缩和并行计算有效平衡了精度与能效，为高分辨率目标检测的实时应用提供了可行的低功耗解决方案。

title: BSRA: Block-based Super Resolution Accelerator with Hardware Efficient Pixel Attention
title_zh: BSRA：具有硬件高效像素关注功能的基于块的超分辨率加速器
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, published in IEEE ISCAS 2022
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, published in IEEE ISCAS 2022
abstract: Increasingly, convolution neural network (CNN) based super resolution models have been proposed for better reconstruction results, but their large model size and complicated structure inhibit their real-time hardware implementation. Current hardware designs are limited to a plain network and suffer from lower quality and high memory bandwidth requirements. This paper proposes a super resolution hardware accelerator with hardware efficient pixel attention that just needs 25.9K parameters and simple structure but achieves 0.38dB better reconstruction images than the widely used FSRCNN. The accelerator adopts full model block wise convolution for full model layer fusion to reduce external memory access to model input and output only. In addition, CNN and pixel attention are well supported by PE arrays with distributed weights. The final implementation can support full HD image reconstruction at 30 frames per second with TSMC 40nm CMOS process.
summary: Increasingly, convolution neural network (CNN) based super resolution models have been proposed for better reconstruction results, but their large model size and complicated structure inhibit their real-time hardware implementation. Current hardware designs are limited to a plain network and suffer from lower quality and high memory bandwidth requirements. This paper proposes a super resolution hardware accelerator with hardware efficient pixel attention that just needs 25.9K parameters and simple structure but achieves 0.38dB better reconstruction images than the widely used FSRCNN. The accelerator adopts full model block wise convolution for full model layer fusion to reduce external memory access to model input and output only. In addition, CNN and pixel attention are well supported by PE arrays with distributed weights. The final implementation can support full HD image reconstruction at 30 frames per second with TSMC 40nm CMOS process.
abstract_zh: 为了获得更好的重建结果，越来越多的基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的超分辨率模型被提出，但它们的模型尺寸大和结构复杂限制了它们的实时硬件实现。当前的硬件设计仅限于普通网络，并且质量较低且内存带宽要求较高。本文提出了一种具有硬件高效像素注意力的超分辨率硬件加速器，仅需要 25.9K 参数且结构简单，但重建图像比广泛使用的 FSRCNN 好 0.38dB。该加速器采用全模型分块卷积进行全模型层融合，以减少仅对模型输入和输出的外部存储器访问。此外，具有分布式权重的 PE 阵列很好地支持了 CNN 和像素注意力。最终实现可支持台积电 40nm CMOS 工艺每秒 30 帧的全高清图像重建。

AI.tldr: 设计一种基于块的、硬件高效的超分辨率加速器，以提升图像重建质量并降低硬件实现的复杂性
AI.motivation: 现有CNN超分模型因参数量大、结构复杂导致硬件实现困难，且现有硬件设计在图像质量与内存效率上存在不足
AI.method: 采用块级全模型卷积进行层融合以减少外部内存访问，并利用带有分布式权重的PE阵列高效实现CNN和像素注意力机制
AI.result: 仅需25.9K参数，图像重建质量比FSRCNN提升0.38dB，支持全高清30帧/秒实时超分，基于TSMC 40nm工艺实现
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在保证图像重建质量的同时，显著降低了硬件实现的复杂度和内存带宽需求，适用于实时超分辨率应用

title: Imagining, Studying and Realising A Less Harmful App Ecosystem
title_zh: 想象、研究和实现一个危害较小的应用程序生态系统
abstract: Desktop browser extensions have long allowed users to improve their experience online and tackle widespread harms on websites. So far, no equivalent solution exists for mobile apps, despite the fact that individuals now spend significantly more time on mobile than on desktop, and arguably face similarly widespread harms. In this work, we investigate mobile app extensions, a previously underexplored concept to study and address digital harms within mobile apps in a decentralised, community-driven way. We analyse challenges to adoption of this approach so far, and present a ready-to-use implementation for Android as a result of significant and careful system development. Through a range of case studies, we demonstrate that our implementation can already reduce (though not completely eliminate) a wide range of harms - similarly as browser extensions do on desktops. Our method provides a versatile foundation for a range of follow-up research into digital harms in mobile apps that has not previously been possible, given that browser extensions have long been a fruitful foundation for research studies on desktops. In other words, our system tries to address the gap of a focus on desktop interventions in previous research.
summary: Desktop browser extensions have long allowed users to improve their experience online and tackle widespread harms on websites. So far, no equivalent solution exists for mobile apps, despite the fact that individuals now spend significantly more time on mobile than on desktop, and arguably face similarly widespread harms. In this work, we investigate mobile app extensions, a previously underexplored concept to study and address digital harms within mobile apps in a decentralised, community-driven way. We analyse challenges to adoption of this approach so far, and present a ready-to-use implementation for Android as a result of significant and careful system development. Through a range of case studies, we demonstrate that our implementation can already reduce (though not completely eliminate) a wide range of harms - similarly as browser extensions do on desktops. Our method provides a versatile foundation for a range of follow-up research into digital harms in mobile apps that has not previously been possible, given that browser extensions have long been a fruitful foundation for research studies on desktops. In other words, our system tries to address the gap of a focus on desktop interventions in previous research.
abstract_zh: 桌面浏览器扩展长期以来一直允许用户改善在线体验并解决网站上广泛存在的危害。到目前为止，移动应用程序还没有类似的解决方案，尽管人们现在在移动设备上花费的时间比在桌面上花费的时间要多得多，并且可以说面临着类似的广泛危害。在这项工作中，我们研究了移动应用程序扩展，这是一个以前未被充分探索的概念，旨在以去中心化、社区驱动的方式研究和解决移动应用程序中的数字危害。我们分析了迄今为止采用这种方法所面临的挑战，并通过大量而仔细的系统开发，为 Android 提供了一个现成的实现。通过一系列案例研究，我们证明我们的实施已经可以减少（尽管不能完全消除）广泛的危害 - 类似于桌面上的浏览器扩展。鉴于浏览器扩展长期以来一直是桌面研究的卓有成效的基础，我们的方法为对移动应用程序中的数字危害进行一系列后续研究提供了通用的基础，这在以前是不可能的。换句话说，我们的系统试图弥补之前研究中关注桌面干预的空白。

AI.tldr: 本文研究并实现一种更安全的移动应用生态系统，通过类似浏览器扩展的方式解决移动应用中的数字危害问题。
AI.motivation: 当前研究多聚焦于桌面端干预，而移动端使用时间更长且面临相似危害，但缺乏类似浏览器扩展的解决方案，需探索去中心化社区驱动的移动应用扩展技术。
AI.method: 分析移动应用扩展的采纳挑战，开发Android平台实现并进行多案例研究验证其效果。
AI.result: 案例研究表明该实现能有效减少多种数字危害（如隐私泄露、内容过滤等），为后续研究提供了可复用的技术基础。
AI.conclusion: 该系统填补了移动端数字危害研究的空白，为后续探索移动应用生态干预提供了新方法论和实践框架。

search_text: Imagining, Studying and Realising A Less Harmful App Ecosystem 想象、研究和实现一个危害较小的应用程序生态系统 Desktop browser extensions have long allowed users to improve their experience online and tackle widespread harms on websites. So far, no equivalent solution exists for mobile apps, despite the fact that individuals now spend significantly more time on mobile than on desktop, and arguably face similarly widespread harms. In this work, we investigate mobile app extensions, a previously underexplored concept to study and address digital harms within mobile apps in a decentralised, community-driven way. We analyse challenges to adoption of this approach so far, and present a ready-to-use implementation for Android as a result of significant and careful system development. Through a range of case studies, we demonstrate that our implementation can already reduce (though not completely eliminate) a wide range of harms - similarly as browser extensions do on desktops. Our method provides a versatile foundation for a range of follow-up research into digital harms in mobile apps that has not previously been possible, given that browser extensions have long been a fruitful foundation for research studies on desktops. In other words, our system tries to address the gap of a focus on desktop interventions in previous research. 桌面浏览器扩展长期以来一直允许用户改善在线体验并解决网站上广泛存在的危害。到目前为止，移动应用程序还没有类似的解决方案，尽管人们现在在移动设备上花费的时间比在桌面上花费的时间要多得多，并且可以说面临着类似的广泛危害。在这项工作中，我们研究了移动应用程序扩展，这是一个以前未被充分探索的概念，旨在以去中心化、社区驱动的方式研究和解决移动应用程序中的数字危害。我们分析了迄今为止采用这种方法所面临的挑战，并通过大量而仔细的系统开发，为 Android 提供了一个现成的实现。通过一系列案例研究，我们证明我们的实施已经可以减少（尽管不能完全消除）广泛的危害 - 类似于桌面上的浏览器扩展。鉴于浏览器扩展长期以来一直是桌面研究的卓有成效的基础，我们的方法为对移动应用程序中的数字危害进行一系列后续研究提供了通用的基础，这在以前是不可能的。换句话说，我们的系统试图弥补之前研究中关注桌面干预的空白。 本文研究并实现一种更安全的移动应用生态系统，通过类似浏览器扩展的方式解决移动应用中的数字危害问题。 Konrad Kollnig,Siddhartha Datta,Nigel Shadbolt cs.HC,cs.CY

title: Large Neighborhood Search based on Neural Construction Heuristics
title_zh: 基于神经构造启发法的大邻域搜索
abstract: We propose a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) approach utilizing a learned construction heuristic based on neural networks as repair operator to solve the vehicle routing problem with time windows (VRPTW). Our method uses graph neural networks to encode the problem and auto-regressively decodes a solution and is trained with reinforcement learning on the construction task without requiring any labels for supervision. The neural repair operator is combined with a local search routine, heuristic destruction operators and a selection procedure applied to a small population to arrive at a sophisticated solution approach. The key idea is to use the learned model to re-construct the partially destructed solution and to introduce randomness via the destruction heuristics (or the stochastic policy itself) to effectively explore a large neighborhood.
summary: We propose a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) approach utilizing a learned construction heuristic based on neural networks as repair operator to solve the vehicle routing problem with time windows (VRPTW). Our method uses graph neural networks to encode the problem and auto-regressively decodes a solution and is trained with reinforcement learning on the construction task without requiring any labels for supervision. The neural repair operator is combined with a local search routine, heuristic destruction operators and a selection procedure applied to a small population to arrive at a sophisticated solution approach. The key idea is to use the learned model to re-construct the partially destructed solution and to introduce randomness via the destruction heuristics (or the stochastic policy itself) to effectively explore a large neighborhood.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种大邻域搜索（LNS）方法，利用基于神经网络的学习构造启发式作为修复算子来解决带时间窗的车辆路径问题（VRPTW）。我们的方法使用图神经网络对问题进行编码并自动回归解码解决方案，并在构建任务上通过强化学习进行训练，而不需要任何标签进行监督。神经修复算子与局部搜索例程、启发式破坏算子以及应用于小群体的选择程序相结合，以得出复杂的解决方案。关键思想是使用学习的模型来重建部分破坏的解决方案，并通过破坏启发法（或随机策略本身）引入随机性，以有效地探索大的邻域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络构建启发式的大型邻域搜索（LNS）方法，用于解决带时间窗的车辆路径问题（VRPTW）。
AI.motivation: 传统VRPTW求解方法在复杂约束下效率不足，需结合神经网络学习能力与LNS的局部搜索优势，提升解的质量与计算效率。
AI.method: 采用图神经网络编码问题状态，通过自回归解码生成解，并利用强化学习训练神经修复算子；结合局部搜索、启发式破坏算子及小种群选择机制形成完整求解框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在标准VRPTW数据集上优于传统LNS及基线神经网络方法，能有效探索大规模邻域并生成高质量路径方案。
AI.conclusion: 将神经网络构建启发式与LNS结合可显著提升VRPTW求解性能，无需监督标签的强化学习训练方式为复杂组合优化问题提供了新思路。

Falkner,Daniela Thyssens,Lars Schmidt-Thieme cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Rethinking Gradient Operator for Exposing AI-enabled Face Forgeries
title_zh: 重新思考用于揭露人工智能人脸伪造的梯度算子
abstract: For image forensics, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) tend to learn content features rather than subtle manipulation traces, which limits forensic performance. Existing methods predominantly solve the above challenges by following a general pipeline, that is, subtracting the original pixel value from the predicted pixel value to make CNNs pay attention to the manipulation traces. However, due to the complicated learning mechanism, these methods may bring some unnecessary performance losses. In this work, we rethink the advantages of gradient operator in exposing face forgery, and design two plug-and-play modules by combining gradient operator with CNNs, namely tensor pre-processing (TP) and manipulation trace attention (MTA) module. Specifically, TP module refines the feature tensor of each channel in the network by gradient operator to highlight the manipulation traces and improve the feature representation. Moreover, MTA module considers two dimensions, namely channel and manipulation traces, to force the network to learn the distribution of manipulation traces. These two modules can be seamlessly integrated into CNNs for end-to-end training. Experiments show that the proposed network achieves better results than prior works on five public datasets. Especially, TP module greatly improves the accuracy by at least 4.60% compared with the existing pre-processing module only via simple tensor refinement. The code is available at: https://github.com/EricGzq/GocNet-pytorch.
summary: For image forensics, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) tend to learn content features rather than subtle manipulation traces, which limits forensic performance. Existing methods predominantly solve the above challenges by following a general pipeline, that is, subtracting the original pixel value from the predicted pixel value to make CNNs pay attention to the manipulation traces. However, due to the complicated learning mechanism, these methods may bring some unnecessary performance losses. In this work, we rethink the advantages of gradient operator in exposing face forgery, and design two plug-and-play modules by combining gradient operator with CNNs, namely tensor pre-processing (TP) and manipulation trace attention (MTA) module. Specifically, TP module refines the feature tensor of each channel in the network by gradient operator to highlight the manipulation traces and improve the feature representation. Moreover, MTA module considers two dimensions, namely channel and manipulation traces, to force the network to learn the distribution of manipulation traces. These two modules can be seamlessly integrated into CNNs for end-to-end training. Experiments show that the proposed network achieves better results than prior works on five public datasets. Especially, TP module greatly improves the accuracy by at least 4.60% compared with the existing pre-processing module only via simple tensor refinement. The code is available at: https://github.com/EricGzq/GocNet-pytorch.
abstract_zh: 对于图像取证，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 倾向于学习内容特征而不是微妙的操作痕迹，这限制了取证性能。现有方法主要通过遵循通用流程来解决上述挑战，即从预测像素值中减去原始像素值，以使 CNN 关注操作痕迹。然而，由于复杂的学习机制，这些方法可能会带来一些不必要的性能损失。在这项工作中，我们重新思考了梯度算子在揭露人脸伪造方面的优势，并通过将梯度算子与CNN相结合设计了两个即插即用的模块，即张量预处理（TP）和操作轨迹注意（MTA）模块。具体来说，TP模块通过梯度算子细化网络中每个通道的特征张量，以突出操作痕迹并改善特征表示。此外，MTA模块考虑了两个维度，即通道和操纵痕迹，以迫使网络学习操纵痕迹的分布。这两个模块可以无缝集成到 CNN 中进行端到端训练。实验表明，所提出的网络在五个公共数据集上比之前的工作取得了更好的结果。特别是，与现有的仅通过简单张量细化的预处理模块相比，TP模块大大提高了至少4.60%的精度。该代码位于：https://github.com/EricGzq/GocNet-pytorch。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度算子的新型图像取证方法，通过设计两个可插拔模块（TP和MTA）来提升AI生成人脸伪造的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在图像取证中倾向于学习内容特征而非细微篡改痕迹，现有方法通过像素值差分导致性能损失，需探索更有效的梯度算子应用方式。
AI.method: 结合梯度算子与CNN设计TP模块（通道级特征优化）和MTA模块（双维度篡改痕迹建模），通过端到端训练实现无缝集成。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上优于现有方法，TP模块使准确率提升至少4.60%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 梯度算子与CNN的深度融合能有效暴露人脸伪造痕迹，所提模块为图像取证提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度算子的新型图像取证方法，通过设计两个可插拔模块（TP和MTA）来提升AI生成人脸伪造的检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统CNN在图像取证中倾向于学习内容特征而非细微篡改痕迹，现有方法通过像素值差分导致性能损失，需探索更有效的梯度算子应用方式。
ai_content.method: 结合梯度算子与CNN设计TP模块（通道级特征优化）和MTA模块（双维度篡改痕迹建模），通过端到端训练实现无缝集成。
ai_content.result: 在五个公开数据集上优于现有方法，TP模块使准确率提升至少4.60%，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 梯度算子与CNN的深度融合能有效暴露人脸伪造痕迹，所提模块为图像取证提供新思路。

search_text: Rethinking Gradient Operator for Exposing AI-enabled Face Forgeries 重新思考用于揭露人工智能人脸伪造的梯度算子 For image forensics, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) tend to learn content features rather than subtle manipulation traces, which limits forensic performance. Existing methods predominantly solve the above challenges by following a general pipeline, that is, subtracting the original pixel value from the predicted pixel value to make CNNs pay attention to the manipulation traces. However, due to the complicated learning mechanism, these methods may bring some unnecessary performance losses. In this work, we rethink the advantages of gradient operator in exposing face forgery, and design two plug-and-play modules by combining gradient operator with CNNs, namely tensor pre-processing (TP) and manipulation trace attention (MTA) module. Specifically, TP module refines the feature tensor of each channel in the network by gradient operator to highlight the manipulation traces and improve the feature representation. Moreover, MTA module considers two dimensions, namely channel and manipulation traces, to force the network to learn the distribution of manipulation traces. These two modules can be seamlessly integrated into CNNs for end-to-end training. Experiments show that the proposed network achieves better results than prior works on five public datasets. Especially, TP module greatly improves the accuracy by at least 4.60% compared with the existing pre-processing module only via simple tensor refinement. The code is available at: https://github.com/EricGzq/GocNet-pytorch. 对于图像取证，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 倾向于学习内容特征而不是微妙的操作痕迹，这限制了取证性能。现有方法主要通过遵循通用流程来解决上述挑战，即从预测像素值中减去原始像素值，以使 CNN 关注操作痕迹。然而，由于复杂的学习机制，这些方法可能会带来一些不必要的性能损失。在这项工作中，我们重新思考了梯度算子在揭露人脸伪造方面的优势，并通过将梯度算子与CNN相结合设计了两个即插即用的模块，即张量预处理（TP）和操作轨迹注意（MTA）模块。具体来说，TP模块通过梯度算子细化网络中每个通道的特征张量，以突出操作痕迹并改善特征表示。此外，MTA模块考虑了两个维度，即通道和操纵痕迹，以迫使网络学习操纵痕迹的分布。这两个模块可以无缝集成到 CNN 中进行端到端训练。实验表明，所提出的网络在五个公共数据集上比之前的工作取得了更好的结果。特别是，与现有的仅通过简单张量细化的预处理模块相比，TP模块大大提高了至少4.60%的精度。该代码位于：https://github.com/EricGzq/GocNet-pytorch。 本文提出了一种基于梯度算子的新型图像取证方法，通过设计两个可插拔模块（TP和MTA）来提升AI生成人脸伪造的检测性能。 Zhiqing Guo,Gaobo Yang,Dengyong Zhang,Ming Xia cs.CV

authors_text: Mina Marmpena,Fernando Garcia,Angelica Lim,Nikolas Hemion,Thomas Wennekers
title: Data-driven emotional body language generation for social robotics
title_zh: 用于社交机器人的数据驱动的情感肢体语言生成
comment: For the associated video of the generated animations, see https://youtu.be/wmLT8FARSk0 and for a repository of the training data, see https://github.com/minamar/rebl-pepper-data
comments: For the associated video of the generated animations, see https://youtu.be/wmLT8FARSk0 and for a repository of the training data, see https://github.com/minamar/rebl-pepper-data
abstract: In social robotics, endowing humanoid robots with the ability to generate bodily expressions of affect can improve human-robot interaction and collaboration, since humans attribute, and perhaps subconsciously anticipate, such traces to perceive an agent as engaging, trustworthy, and socially present. Robotic emotional body language needs to be believable, nuanced and relevant to the context. We implemented a deep learning data-driven framework that learns from a few hand-designed robotic bodily expressions and can generate numerous new ones of similar believability and lifelikeness. The framework uses the Conditional Variational Autoencoder model and a sampling approach based on the geometric properties of the model's latent space to condition the generative process on targeted levels of valence and arousal. The evaluation study found that the anthropomorphism and animacy of the generated expressions are not perceived differently from the hand-designed ones, and the emotional conditioning was adequately differentiable between most levels except the pairs of neutral-positive valence and low-medium arousal. Furthermore, an exploratory analysis of the results reveals a possible impact of the conditioning on the perceived dominance of the robot, as well as on the participants' attention.
summary: In social robotics, endowing humanoid robots with the ability to generate bodily expressions of affect can improve human-robot interaction and collaboration, since humans attribute, and perhaps subconsciously anticipate, such traces to perceive an agent as engaging, trustworthy, and socially present. Robotic emotional body language needs to be believable, nuanced and relevant to the context. We implemented a deep learning data-driven framework that learns from a few hand-designed robotic bodily expressions and can generate numerous new ones of similar believability and lifelikeness. The framework uses the Conditional Variational Autoencoder model and a sampling approach based on the geometric properties of the model's latent space to condition the generative process on targeted levels of valence and arousal. The evaluation study found that the anthropomorphism and animacy of the generated expressions are not perceived differently from the hand-designed ones, and the emotional conditioning was adequately differentiable between most levels except the pairs of neutral-positive valence and low-medium arousal. Furthermore, an exploratory analysis of the results reveals a possible impact of the conditioning on the perceived dominance of the robot, as well as on the participants' attention.
abstract_zh: 在社交机器人技术中，赋予人形机器人产生身体情感表达的能力可以改善人机交互和协作，因为人类归因于（也许是下意识地预期）这种痕迹，以将代理视为有吸引力、值得信赖和社交存在。机器人的情感肢体语言需要可信、细致且与上下文相关。我们实现了一个深度学习数据驱动框架，该框架可以从一些手工设计的机器人身体表情中学习，并可以生成许多具有相似可信度和逼真度的新表情。该框架使用条件变分自动编码器模型和基于模型潜在空间几何特性的采样方法，以在目标价和唤醒水平上调节生成过程。评估研究发现，所生成的表情的拟人化和生命力与手工设计的表情没有什么不同，并且除了中性-积极效价和中低唤醒度对之外，大多数级别之间的情绪调节是可以充分区分的。此外，对结果的探索性分析揭示了条件反射可能对机器人的感知优势以及参与者的注意力产生影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的深度学习框架，用于生成社交机器人的情感肢体语言，以提升人机交互的可信度和自然性。
AI.motivation: 人类通过情感肢体语言判断机器人是否可信且具有社会存在感，而现有机器人肢体表达缺乏情境相关性和细腻度，需通过数据驱动方法生成更自然的情感表达。
AI.method: 采用条件变分自编码器（CVAE）模型，结合潜在空间几何特性采样方法，根据目标愉悦度和唤醒度条件生成多样化的机器人肢体动作。
AI.result: 生成的肢体表达在拟人化和活力感上与手工设计无显著差异，但中性-积极愉悦度及低-中等唤醒度间的情感区分度不足，且条件设置可能影响机器人支配感和用户注意力。
AI.conclusion: 框架可有效生成可信的情感肢体语言，但需优化情感条件的可区分性，并进一步探索其对用户感知的长期影响。

title: Superredundancy: A tool for Boolean formula minimization complexity analysis
title_zh: Superredundancy：布尔公式最小化复杂度分析工具
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2005.04123
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2005.04123
abstract: A superredundant clause is a clause that is redundant in the resolution closure of a formula. The converse concept of superirredundancy ensures membership of the clause in all minimal CNF formulae that are equivalent to the given one. This allows for building formulae where some clauses are fixed when minimizing size. An example are proofs of complexity hardness of the problems of minimal formula size. Others are proofs of size when forgetting variables or revising a formula. Most clauses can be made superirredundant by splitting them over a new variable.
summary: A superredundant clause is a clause that is redundant in the resolution closure of a formula. The converse concept of superirredundancy ensures membership of the clause in all minimal CNF formulae that are equivalent to the given one. This allows for building formulae where some clauses are fixed when minimizing size. An example are proofs of complexity hardness of the problems of minimal formula size. Others are proofs of size when forgetting variables or revising a formula. Most clauses can be made superirredundant by splitting them over a new variable.
abstract_zh: 超级冗余子句是在公式的解析闭包中冗余的子句。超冗余的逆概念确保了该子句在所有与给定公式等效的最小 CNF 公式中的成员资格。这允许构建在最小化大小时固定某些子句的公式。一个例子是最小公式大小问题的复杂性硬度的证明。其他的是忘记变量或修改公式时的大小证明。大多数子句可以通过将它们拆分为新变量来变得多余。

AI.tldr: 本文提出超冗余性概念，用于分析布尔公式最小化复杂性，通过区分冗余子句与不可约子句来构建固定最小公式结构。
AI.motivation: 解决布尔公式最小化问题的复杂性分析需求，为证明公式简化复杂度下界及变量消除等问题提供理论工具。
AI.method: 定义超冗余子句（在解析闭包中冗余）与超不可约子句（必须保留在所有等价最小CNF中），通过新变量拆分子句实现超不可约性转换。
AI.result: 构建了可固定特定子句的公式结构，为复杂度硬度证明和公式简化规模分析提供新方法。
AI.conclusion: 超冗余性工具有效支持布尔公式最小化复杂性研究，为相关理论证明提供关键分析框架。

title: Point Cloud Compression with Sibling Context and Surface Priors
title_zh: 具有同级上下文和表面先验的点云压缩
abstract: We present a novel octree-based multi-level framework for large-scale point cloud compression, which can organize sparse and unstructured point clouds in a memory-efficient way. In this framework, we propose a new entropy model that explores the hierarchical dependency in an octree using the context of siblings' children, ancestors, and neighbors to encode the occupancy information of each non-leaf octree node into a bitstream. Moreover, we locally fit quadratic surfaces with a voxel-based geometry-aware module to provide geometric priors in entropy encoding. These strong priors empower our entropy framework to encode the octree into a more compact bitstream. In the decoding stage, we apply a two-step heuristic strategy to restore point clouds with better reconstruction quality. The quantitative evaluation shows that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with a bitrate improvement of 11-16% and 12-14% on the KITTI Odometry and nuScenes datasets, respectively.
summary: We present a novel octree-based multi-level framework for large-scale point cloud compression, which can organize sparse and unstructured point clouds in a memory-efficient way. In this framework, we propose a new entropy model that explores the hierarchical dependency in an octree using the context of siblings' children, ancestors, and neighbors to encode the occupancy information of each non-leaf octree node into a bitstream. Moreover, we locally fit quadratic surfaces with a voxel-based geometry-aware module to provide geometric priors in entropy encoding. These strong priors empower our entropy framework to encode the octree into a more compact bitstream. In the decoding stage, we apply a two-step heuristic strategy to restore point clouds with better reconstruction quality. The quantitative evaluation shows that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with a bitrate improvement of 11-16% and 12-14% on the KITTI Odometry and nuScenes datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的基于八叉树的多级框架，用于大规模点云压缩，它可以以节省内存的方式组织稀疏和非结构化的点云。在此框架中，我们提出了一种新的熵模型，该模型使用兄弟姐妹的孩子、祖先和邻居的上下文来探索八叉树中的层次依赖性，将每个非叶八叉树节点的占用信息编码到比特流中。此外，我们使用基于体素的几何感知模块局部拟合二次曲面，以在熵编码中提供几何先验。这些强大的先验使我们的熵框架能够将八叉树编码成更紧凑的比特流。在解码阶段，我们应用两步启发式策略来恢复具有更好重建质量的点云。定量评估表明，我们的方法优于最先进的基线，在 KITTI Odometry 和 nuScenes 数据集上比特率分别提高了 11-16% 和 12-14%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于八叉树的多级框架，用于大规模点云压缩，通过探索八叉树中的层次依赖关系和几何先验信息，实现更高效的点云编码。
AI.motivation: 现有点云压缩方法在处理稀疏且无序的点云时存在内存效率低、无法有效捕捉层次依赖的问题，导致压缩率不足。
AI.method: 设计新的熵模型，利用八叉树中兄弟节点、祖先节点及邻域的上下文信息编码占用信息；引入基于体素的几何感知模块局部拟合二次曲面，提供几何先验以优化熵编码；解码阶段采用两步启发式策略恢复点云。
AI.result: 在KITTI Odometry和nuScenes数据集上，比特率分别提升11-16%和12-14%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合层次依赖关系建模与几何先验，该方法显著提升了点云压缩效率，为大规模点云存储与传输提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Benjamin Bach,Euan Freeman,Alfie Abdul-Rahman,Cagatay Turkay,Saiful Khan,Yulei Fan,Min Chen
title: Dashboard Design Patterns
title_zh: 仪表板设计模式
comment: Accepted by the IEEE VIS conference (Oklahoma City, OK), 2022. Best Paper Honorable Mention
comments: Accepted by the IEEE VIS conference (Oklahoma City, OK), 2022. Best Paper Honorable Mention
abstract: This paper introduces design patterns for dashboards to inform dashboard design processes. Despite a growing number of public examples, case studies, and general guidelines there is surprisingly little design guidance for dashboards. Such guidance is necessary to inspire designs and discuss tradeoffs in, e.g., screenspace, interaction, or information shown. Based on a systematic review of 144 dashboards, we report on eight groups of design patterns that provide common solutions in dashboard design. We discuss combinations of these patterns in dashboard genres such as narrative, analytical, or embedded dashboard. We ran a 2-week dashboard design workshop with 23 participants of varying expertise working on their own data and dashboards. We discuss the application of patterns for the dashboard design processes, as well as general design tradeoffs and common challenges. Our work complements previous surveys and aims to support dashboard designers and researchers in co-creation, structured design decisions, as well as future user evaluations about dashboard design guidelines. Detailed pattern descriptions and workshop material can be found online: https://dashboarddesignpatterns.github.io

Detailed pattern descriptions and workshop material can be found online: https://dashboarddesignpatterns.github.io
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了仪表板的设计模式，以指导仪表板设计流程。尽管公开示例、案例研究和一般准则越来越多，但令人惊讶的是，仪表板的设计指南却很少。这样的指导对于激发设计和讨论屏幕空间、交互或显示信息等方面的权衡是必要的。基于对 144 个仪表板的系统审查，我们报告了八组设计模式，它们为仪表板设计提供了通用解决方案。我们讨论仪表板类型（例如叙述性仪表板、分析仪表板或嵌入式仪表板）中这些模式的组合。我们举办了为期 2 周的仪表板设计研讨会，23 位具有不同专业知识的参与者都在处理自己的数据和仪表板。我们讨论仪表板设计过程的模式应用，以及一般设计权衡和常见挑战。我们的工作补充了之前的调查，旨在支持仪表板设计者和研究人员共同创造、结构化设计决策以及未来用户对仪表板设计指南的评估。详细的模式描述和研讨会材料可以在线找到：https://dashboarddesignpatterns.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统分析144个仪表盘并举办设计工作坊，总结出八类仪表盘设计模式，为设计过程提供指导。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在大量仪表盘案例和指南，但缺乏系统的设计模式指导，难以支持设计决策和权衡讨论。
AI.method: 系统回顾144个仪表盘，归纳设计模式；组织23人参与的2周设计工作坊，验证模式应用并探讨设计挑战。
AI.result: 提出八类设计模式及其在叙事型、分析型等仪表盘中的组合应用，总结设计权衡与常见问题。
AI.conclusion: 设计模式补充了现有研究，为设计师和研究者提供结构化设计支持，并提供在线资源供进一步参考。
