title: How does a spontaneously speaking conversational agent affect user behavior?
title_zh: 自发说话的对话代理如何影响用户行为？
comment: Updated: Added the ethics statement. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: Updated: Added the ethics statement. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: This study investigated the effect of synthetic voice of conversational agent trained with spontaneous speech on human interactants. Specifically, we hypothesized that humans will exhibit more social responses when interacting with conversational agent that has a synthetic voice built on spontaneous speech. Typically, speech synthesizers are built on a speech corpus where voice professionals read a set of written sentences. The synthesized speech is clear as if a newscaster were reading a news or a voice actor were playing an anime character. However, this is quite different from spontaneous speech we speak in everyday conversation. Recent advances in speech synthesis enabled us to build a speech synthesizer on a spontaneous speech corpus, and to obtain a near conversational synthesized speech with reasonable quality. By making use of these technology, we examined whether humans produce more social responses to a spontaneously speaking conversational agent. We conducted a large-scale conversation experiment with a conversational agent whose utterances were synthesized with the model trained either with spontaneous speech or read speech. The result showed that the subjects who interacted with the agent whose utterances were synthesized from spontaneous speech tended to show shorter response time and a larger number of backchannels. The result of a questionnaire showed that subjects who interacted with the agent whose utterances were synthesized from spontaneous speech tended to rate their conversation with the agent as closer to a human conversation. These results suggest that speech synthesis built on spontaneous speech is essential to realize a conversational agent as a social actor.

The result of a questionnaire showed that subjects who interacted with the agent whose utterances were synthesized from spontaneous speech tended to rate their conversation with the agent as closer to a human conversation. These results suggest that speech synthesis built on spontaneous speech is essential to realize a conversational agent as a social actor.
abstract_zh: 本研究调查了经过自发语音训练的会话代理的合成语音对人类交互者的影响。具体来说，我们假设人类在与具有基于自发语音的合成语音的会话代理交互时会表现出更多的社交反应。通常，语音合成器建立在语音语料库上，语音专业人员可以在语音语料库中阅读一组书面句子。合成的语音清晰，就像新闻播音员正在阅读新闻或配音演员正在扮演动漫角色一样。然而，这与我们在日常对话中所说的自发言语有很大不同。语音合成的最新进展使我们能够在自发语音语料库上构建语音合成器，并获得具有合理质量的接近会话的合成语音。通过利用这些技术，我们研究了人类是否会对自发说话的对话代理产生更多的社交反应。我们对对话代理进行了大规模的对话实验，该代理的话语是通过用自发语音或朗读语音训练的模型来合成的。结果表明，与由自发语音合成的代理进行交互的受试者往往表现出更短的响应时间和更多的反向渠道。调查结果显示，与由自发语音合成的代理人互动的受试者倾向于认为他们与代理人的对话更接近人类对话。这些结果表明，基于自发语音的语音合成对于将对话代理实现为社会参与者至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了基于自发性语音合成的对话代理对人类互动行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统语音合成依赖朗读语料，与日常对话的自发性语音存在差异，可能影响用户的社会互动表现。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验对比两种语音合成模型：基于自发性语音和基于朗读语音的对话代理，分析用户响应时间和互动行为差异。
AI.result: 使用自发性语音合成的代理使用户响应时间缩短、反馈通道数量增加，且用户认为对话更接近人类交流。
AI.conclusion: 基于自发性语音的合成技术对实现具有社会属性的对话代理至关重要。

search_text: How does a spontaneously speaking conversational agent affect user behavior? 自发说话的对话代理如何影响用户行为？ This study investigated the effect of synthetic voice of conversational agent trained with spontaneous speech on human interactants. Specifically, we hypothesized that humans will exhibit more social responses when interacting with conversational agent that has a synthetic voice built on spontaneous speech. Typically, speech synthesizers are built on a speech corpus where voice professionals read a set of written sentences. The synthesized speech is clear as if a newscaster were reading a news or a voice actor were playing an anime character. However, this is quite different from spontaneous speech we speak in everyday conversation. Recent advances in speech synthesis enabled us to build a speech synthesizer on a spontaneous speech corpus, and to obtain a near conversational synthesized speech with reasonable quality. By making use of these technology, we examined whether humans produce more social responses to a spontaneously speaking conversational agent. We conducted a large-scale conversation experiment with a conversational agent whose utterances were synthesized with the model trained either with spontaneous speech or read speech. The result showed that the subjects who interacted with the agent whose utterances were synthesized from spontaneous speech tended to show shorter response time and a larger number of backchannels. The result of a questionnaire showed that subjects who interacted with the agent whose utterances were synthesized from spontaneous speech tended to rate their conversation with the agent as closer to a human conversation. These results suggest that speech synthesis built on spontaneous speech is essential to realize a conversational agent as a social actor. 本研究调查了经过自发语音训练的会话代理的合成语音对人类交互者的影响。具体来说，我们假设人类在与具有基于自发语音的合成语音的会话代理交互时会表现出更多的社交反应。通常，语音合成器建立在语音语料库上，语音专业人员可以在语音语料库中阅读一组书面句子。合成的语音清晰，就像新闻播音员正在阅读新闻或配音演员正在扮演动漫角色一样。然而，这与我们在日常对话中所说的自发言语有很大不同。语音合成的最新进展使我们能够在自发语音语料库上构建语音合成器，并获得具有合理质量的接近会话的合成语音。通过利用这些技术，我们研究了人类是否会对自发说话的对话代理产生更多的社交反应。我们对对话代理进行了大规模的对话实验，该代理的话语是通过用自发语音或朗读语音训练的模型来合成的。结果表明，与由自发语音合成的代理进行交互的受试者往往表现出更短的响应时间和更多的反向渠道。调查结果显示，与由自发语音合成的代理人互动的受试者倾向于认为他们与代理人的对话更接近人类对话。这些结果表明，基于自发语音的语音合成对于将对话代理实现为社会参与者至关重要。 本研究探讨了基于自发性语音合成的对话代理对人类互动行为的影响。 Takahisa Iizuka,Hiroki Mori cs.HC

title: Exposing Deepfake Face Forgeries with Guided Residuals
title_zh: 利用引导残差揭露 Deepfake 人脸伪造
abstract: Residual-domain feature is very useful for Deepfake detection because it suppresses irrelevant content features and preserves key manipulation traces. However, inappropriate residual prediction will bring side effects on detection accuracy. In addition, residual-domain features are easily affected by image operations such as compression. Most existing works exploit either spatial-domain features or residual-domain features, while neglecting that two types of features are mutually correlated. In this paper, we propose a guided residuals network, namely GRnet, which fuses spatial-domain and residual-domain features in a mutually reinforcing way, to expose face images generated by Deepfake. Different from existing prediction based residual extraction methods, we propose a manipulation trace extractor (MTE) to directly remove the content features and preserve manipulation traces. MTE is a fine-grained method that can avoid the potential bias caused by inappropriate prediction. Moreover, an attention fusion mechanism (AFM) is designed to selectively emphasize feature channel maps and adaptively allocate the weights for two streams. The experimental results show that the proposed GRnet achieves better performances than the state-of-the-art works on four public fake face datasets including HFF, FaceForensics++, DFDC and Celeb-DF. Especially, GRnet achieves an average accuracy of 97.72% on the HFF dataset, which is at least 5.25% higher than the existing works.
summary: Residual-domain feature is very useful for Deepfake detection because it suppresses irrelevant content features and preserves key manipulation traces. However, inappropriate residual prediction will bring side effects on detection accuracy. In addition, residual-domain features are easily affected by image operations such as compression. Most existing works exploit either spatial-domain features or residual-domain features, while neglecting that two types of features are mutually correlated. In this paper, we propose a guided residuals network, namely GRnet, which fuses spatial-domain and residual-domain features in a mutually reinforcing way, to expose face images generated by Deepfake. Different from existing prediction based residual extraction methods, we propose a manipulation trace extractor (MTE) to directly remove the content features and preserve manipulation traces. MTE is a fine-grained method that can avoid the potential bias caused by inappropriate prediction. Moreover, an attention fusion mechanism (AFM) is designed to selectively emphasize feature channel maps and adaptively allocate the weights for two streams. The experimental results show that the proposed GRnet achieves better performances than the state-of-the-art works on four public fake face datasets including HFF, FaceForensics++, DFDC and Celeb-DF. Especially, GRnet achieves an average accuracy of 97.72% on the HFF dataset, which is at least 5.25% higher than the existing works.
abstract_zh: 残差域特征对于 Deepfake 检测非常有用，因为它可以抑制不相关的内容特征并保留关键操作痕迹。然而，不恰当的残差预测会给检测精度带来副作用。此外，残差域特征很容易受到压缩等图像操作的影响。大多数现有的工作要么利用空间域特征，要么利用残差域特征，而忽略了两种类型的特征是相互关联的。在本文中，我们提出了一种引导残差网络，即 GRnet，它以相互增强的方式融合空间域和残差域特征，以暴露 Deepfake 生成的人脸图像。与现有的基于预测的残差提取方法不同，我们提出了一种操作痕迹提取器（MTE）来直接删除内容特征并保留操作痕迹。 MTE是一种细粒度的方法，可以避免不恰当的预测带来的潜在偏差。此外，注意力融合机制（AFM）被设计为有选择地强调特征通道图并自适应地分配两个流的权重。实验结果表明，所提出的 GRnet 在 HFF、FaceForensics++、DFDC 和 Celeb-DF 等四个公共假人脸数据集上取得了比现有技术更好的性能。特别是，GRnet在HFF数据集上达到了97.72%的平均准确率，比现有工作至少高出5.25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GRnet的指导残差网络，通过融合空间域和残差域特征来检测深度伪造的面部图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅单独利用空间域或残差域特征，忽视了两者间的关联性，且残差域特征易受图像压缩等操作影响，导致检测精度下降。
AI.method: 提出操纵痕迹提取器（MTE）直接去除内容特征并保留伪造痕迹，结合注意力融合机制（AFM）自适应分配双流特征权重，实现空间域与残差域特征的协同增强。
AI.result: 在HFF、FaceForensics++等四个公开数据集上，GRnet平均准确率达97.72%（HFF数据集），较现有方法提升至少5.25%。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合空间域与残差域特征的协同机制，GRnet有效提升了深度伪造面部图像的检测性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

title: Dual networks based 3D Multi-Person Pose Estimation from Monocular Video
title_zh: 基于双网络的单目视频 3D 多人姿势估计
comment: Accepted by TPAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.01797
comments: Accepted by TPAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.01797
abstract: Monocular 3D human pose estimation has made progress in recent years. Most of the methods focus on single persons, which estimate the poses in the person-centric coordinates, i.e., the coordinates based on the center of the target person. Hence, these methods are inapplicable for multi-person 3D pose estimation, where the absolute coordinates (e.g., the camera coordinates) are required. Moreover, multi-person pose estimation is more challenging than single pose estimation, due to inter-person occlusion and close human interactions. Existing top-down multi-person methods rely on human detection (i.e., top-down approach), and thus suffer from the detection errors and cannot produce reliable pose estimation in multi-person scenes. Meanwhile, existing bottom-up methods that do not use human detection are not affected by detection errors, but since they process all persons in a scene at once, they are prone to errors, particularly for persons in small scales. To address all these challenges, we propose the integration of top-down and bottom-up approaches to exploit their strengths. Our top-down network estimates human joints from all persons instead of one in an image patch, making it robust to possible erroneous bounding boxes. Our bottom-up network incorporates human-detection based normalized heatmaps, allowing the network to be more robust in handling scale variations. Finally, the estimated 3D poses from the top-down and bottom-up networks are fed into our integration network for final 3D poses. To address the common gaps between training and testing data, we do optimization during the test time, by refining the estimated 3D human poses using high-order temporal constraint, re-projection loss, and bone length regularizations. Our evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Code and models are available: https://github.com/3dpose/3D-Multi-Person-Pose.

Meanwhile, existing bottom-up methods that do not use human detection are not affected by detection errors, but since they process all persons in a scene at once, they are prone to errors, particularly for persons in small scales. To address all these challenges, we propose the integration of top-down and bottom-up approaches to exploit their strengths. To address the common gaps between training and testing data, we do optimization during the test time, by refining the estimated 3D human poses using high-order temporal constraint, re-projection loss, and bone length regularizations. Our evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Code and models are available: https://github.com/3dpose/3D-Multi-Person-Pose.
abstract_zh: 单目 3D 人体姿态估计近年来取得了进展。大多数方法都针对单个人，它们估计以人为中心的坐标（即基于目标人的中心的坐标）中的姿势。因此，这些方法不适用于需要绝对坐标（例如相机坐标）的多人 3D 姿态估计。此外，由于人际遮挡和密切的人类交互，多人姿势估计比单人姿势估计更具挑战性。现有的自上而下的多人方法依赖于人体检测（即自上而下的方法），因此会出现检测错误，并且无法在多人场景中产生可靠的姿态估计。同时，现有的不使用人体检测的自下而上的方法不会受到检测错误的影响，但由于它们同时处理场景中的所有人，因此很容易出错，特别是对于小尺度的人。为了应对所有这些挑战，我们建议整合自上而下和自下而上的方法来发挥各自的优势。我们的自上而下的网络估计所有人的人体关节，而不是图像块中的一个，使其对可能的错误边界框具有鲁棒性。我们的自下而上网络结合了基于人体检测的归一化热图，使网络在处理规模变化方面更加稳健。最后，将自上而下和自下而上网络估计的 3D 姿势输入到我们的集成网络中以获得最终 3D 姿势。为了解决训练和测试数据之间的常见差距，我们在测试期间进行优化，通过使用高阶时间约束、重投影损失和骨骼长度正则化来细化估计的 3D 人体姿势。我们的评估证明了所提出方法的有效性。代码和模型可用：https://github.com/3dpose/3D-Multi-Person-Pose。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双网络的单目视频多人3D姿态估计方法，通过结合自上而下和自下而上的优势，解决多人场景下的遮挡和尺度变化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单人3D姿态估计方法依赖局部坐标系，无法满足多人场景的绝对坐标需求；自上而下方法受检测误差影响，自下而上方法在小尺度人体上表现不佳，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计双网络架构：自上而下网络估计全图多人关节以避免检测框误差，自下而上网络利用归一化热图增强尺度鲁棒性；通过集成网络融合结果，并采用时序约束、重投影损失和骨骼长度正则化进行测试时优化。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在多人3D姿态估计任务中的有效性，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 双网络集成框架结合了自上而下和自下而上的优势，通过测试时优化提升了多人3D姿态估计的准确性和鲁棒性。

search_text: Dual networks based 3D Multi-Person Pose Estimation from Monocular Video 基于双网络的单目视频 3D 多人姿势估计 Monocular 3D human pose estimation has made progress in recent years. Most of the methods focus on single persons, which estimate the poses in the person-centric coordinates, i.e., the coordinates based on the center of the target person. Hence, these methods are inapplicable for multi-person 3D pose estimation, where the absolute coordinates (e.g., the camera coordinates) are required. Moreover, multi-person pose estimation is more challenging than single pose estimation, due to inter-person occlusion and close human interactions. Existing top-down multi-person methods rely on human detection (i.e., top-down approach), and thus suffer from the detection errors and cannot produce reliable pose estimation in multi-person scenes. Meanwhile, existing bottom-up methods that do not use human detection are not affected by detection errors, but since they process all persons in a scene at once, they are prone to errors, particularly for persons in small scales. To address all these challenges, we propose the integration of top-down and bottom-up approaches to exploit their strengths. Our top-down network estimates human joints from all persons instead of one in an image patch, making it robust to possible erroneous bounding boxes. Our bottom-up network incorporates human-detection based normalized heatmaps, allowing the network to be more robust in handling scale variations. Finally, the estimated 3D poses from the top-down and bottom-up networks are fed into our integration network for final 3D poses. To address the common gaps between training and testing data, we do optimization during the test time, by refining the estimated 3D human poses using high-order temporal constraint, re-projection loss, and bone length regularizations. Our evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Code and models are available: https://github.com/3dpose/3D-Multi-Person-Pose. 单目 3D 人体姿态估计近年来取得了进展。大多数方法都针对单个人，它们估计以人为中心的坐标（即基于目标人的中心的坐标）中的姿势。因此，这些方法不适用于需要绝对坐标（例如相机坐标）的多人 3D 姿态估计。此外，由于人际遮挡和密切的人类交互，多人姿势估计比单人姿势估计更具挑战性。现有的自上而下的多人方法依赖于人体检测（即自上而下的方法），因此会出现检测错误，并且无法在多人场景中产生可靠的姿态估计。同时，现有的不使用人体检测的自下而上的方法不会受到检测错误的影响，但由于它们同时处理场景中的所有人，因此很容易出错，特别是对于小尺度的人。为了应对所有这些挑战，我们建议整合自上而下和自下而上的方法来发挥各自的优势。我们的自上而下的网络估计所有人的人体关节，而不是图像块中的一个，使其对可能的错误边界框具有鲁棒性。我们的自下而上网络结合了基于人体检测的归一化热图，使网络在处理规模变化方面更加稳健。最后，将自上而下和自下而上网络估计的 3D 姿势输入到我们的集成网络中以获得最终 3D 姿势。为了解决训练和测试数据之间的常见差距，我们在测试期间进行优化，通过使用高阶时间约束、重投影损失和骨骼长度正则化来细化估计的 3D 人体姿势。我们的评估证明了所提出方法的有效性。代码和模型可用：https://github.com/3dpose/3D-Multi-Person-Pose。 本文提出了一种基于双网络的单目视频多人3D姿态估计方法，通过结合自上而下和自下而上的优势，解决多人场景下的遮挡和尺度变化问题。 Yu Cheng,Bo Wang,Robby T. Tan cs.CV

title: Smaller Progress Measures and Separating Automata for Parity Games
title_zh: 平价游戏的较小进度度量和分离自动机
abstract: Calude et al. have recently shown that parity games can be solved in quasi-polynomial time, a landmark result that has led to a number of approaches with quasi-polynomial complexity. Jurdinski and Lasic have further improved the precise complexity of parity games, especially when the number of priorities is low (logarithmic in the number of positions). Both of these algorithms belong to a class of game solving techniques now often called separating automata: deterministic automata that can be used as witness automata to decide the winner in parity games up to a given number of states and colours. We suggest a number of adjustments to the approach of Calude et al. that lead to smaller statespaces. These include and improve over those earlier introduced by Fearnley et al. We identify two of them that, together, lead to a statespace of exactly the same size Jurdzinski and Lasic's concise progress measures, which currently hold the crown as smallest statespace. The remaining improvements, hence, lead to a further reduction in the size of the statespace, making our approach the most succinct progress measures available for parity games.
summary: Calude et al. have recently shown that parity games can be solved in quasi-polynomial time, a landmark result that has led to a number of approaches with quasi-polynomial complexity. Jurdinski and Lasic have further improved the precise complexity of parity games, especially when the number of priorities is low (logarithmic in the number of positions). Both of these algorithms belong to a class of game solving techniques now often called separating automata: deterministic automata that can be used as witness automata to decide the winner in parity games up to a given number of states and colours. We suggest a number of adjustments to the approach of Calude et al. that lead to smaller statespaces. These include and improve over those earlier introduced by Fearnley et al. We identify two of them that, together, lead to a statespace of exactly the same size Jurdzinski and Lasic's concise progress measures, which currently hold the crown as smallest statespace. The remaining improvements, hence, lead to a further reduction in the size of the statespace, making our approach the most succinct progress measures available for parity games.
abstract_zh: 卡鲁德等人。最近表明奇偶博弈可以在拟多项式时间内解决，这是一个具有里程碑意义的结果，导致了许多具有拟多项式复杂性的方法。 Jurdinski 和 Lasic 进一步提高了奇偶游戏的精确复杂度，特别是当优先级数量较低（位置数量为对数）时。这两种算法都属于一类游戏解决技术，现在通常称为分离自动机：确定性自动机，可以用作见证自动机，在给定数量的状态和颜色下决定奇偶游戏中的获胜者。我们建议对 Calude 等人的方法进行一些调整。这导致更小的状态空间。这些包括并改进了 Fearnley 等人之前介绍的那些。我们确定了其中的两个，它们共同导致了与 Jurdzinski 和 Lasic 的简洁进度度量完全相同大小的状态空间，目前它们是最小状态空间。因此，剩下的改进导致状态空间大小的进一步减小，使我们的方法成为平价游戏可用的最简洁的进度度量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的分离自动机方法，用于解决奇偶游戏问题，以减少状态空间的大小。
AI.motivation: 奇偶游戏的求解复杂度是理论计算机科学中的重要问题，现有的方法虽然具有准多项式时间复杂度，但状态空间较大，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 本文在Calude等人的方法基础上进行了改进，提出了一些调整以减少状态空间，并结合Fearnley等人的方法进一步优化。
AI.result: 改进后的方法实现了与Jurdzinski和Lasic的简洁进展度量相同的状态空间大小，并进一步减少了状态空间，成为目前最简洁的进展度量方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的改进方法为奇偶游戏的求解提供了更高效的状态空间表示，有助于提升相关算法的性能。

title: FedDKD: Federated Learning with Decentralized Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: FedDKD：具有去中心化知识蒸馏的联邦学习
abstract: The performance of federated learning in neural networks is generally influenced by the heterogeneity of the data distribution. For a well-performing global model, taking a weighted average of the local models, as done by most existing federated learning algorithms, may not guarantee consistency with local models in the space of neural network maps. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of federated learning equipped with the process of decentralized knowledge distillation (FedDKD) (i.e., without data on the server). The FedDKD introduces a module of decentralized knowledge distillation (DKD) to distill the knowledge of the local models to train the global model by approaching the neural network map average based on the metric of divergence defined in the loss function, other than only averaging parameters as done in literature. Numeric experiments on various heterogeneous datasets reveal that FedDKD outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with more efficient communication and training in a few DKD steps, especially on some extremely heterogeneous datasets.
summary: The performance of federated learning in neural networks is generally influenced by the heterogeneity of the data distribution. For a well-performing global model, taking a weighted average of the local models, as done by most existing federated learning algorithms, may not guarantee consistency with local models in the space of neural network maps. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of federated learning equipped with the process of decentralized knowledge distillation (FedDKD) (i.e., without data on the server). The FedDKD introduces a module of decentralized knowledge distillation (DKD) to distill the knowledge of the local models to train the global model by approaching the neural network map average based on the metric of divergence defined in the loss function, other than only averaging parameters as done in literature. Numeric experiments on various heterogeneous datasets reveal that FedDKD outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with more efficient communication and training in a few DKD steps, especially on some extremely heterogeneous datasets.
abstract_zh: 神经网络中联邦学习的性能通常受到数据分布异质性的影响。对于性能良好的全局模型，采用大多数现有联邦学习算法所做的局部模型的加权平均值，可能无法保证与神经网络映射空间中的局部模型的一致性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的联邦学习框架，配备了去中心化知识蒸馏（FedDKD）的过程（即服务器上没有数据）。 FedDKD 引入了去中心化知识蒸馏 (DKD) 模块，通过基于损失函数中定义的散度度量接近神经网络图平均值来蒸馏局部模型的知识来训练全局模型，而不是像文献中那样仅平均参数。对各种异构数据集的数值实验表明，FedDKD 在几个 DKD 步骤中通过更高效的通信和训练，优于最先进的方法，特别是在一些极其异构的数据集上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FedDKD的联邦学习框架，通过去中心化知识蒸馏解决数据异构性问题，提升全局模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法通过加权平均本地模型参数训练全局模型，但可能无法保证与本地模型在神经网络映射空间的一致性，尤其在数据高度异构时效果不佳。
AI.method: 引入去中心化知识蒸馏模块（DKD），通过损失函数中定义的散度度量，在神经网络映射空间中逼近本地模型的平均表示，而非直接参数平均。
AI.result: 在多个异构数据集上的实验表明，FedDKD在少量DKD步骤内实现更高效通信与训练，尤其在极端异构数据集上优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FedDKD通过知识蒸馏对齐全局模型与本地模型的神经网络映射，有效缓解数据异构性影响，为联邦学习提供新思路。

search_text: FedDKD: Federated Learning with Decentralized Knowledge Distillation FedDKD：具有去中心化知识蒸馏的联邦学习 The performance of federated learning in neural networks is generally influenced by the heterogeneity of the data distribution. For a well-performing global model, taking a weighted average of the local models, as done by most existing federated learning algorithms, may not guarantee consistency with local models in the space of neural network maps. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of federated learning equipped with the process of decentralized knowledge distillation (FedDKD) (i.e., without data on the server). The FedDKD introduces a module of decentralized knowledge distillation (DKD) to distill the knowledge of the local models to train the global model by approaching the neural network map average based on the metric of divergence defined in the loss function, other than only averaging parameters as done in literature. Numeric experiments on various heterogeneous datasets reveal that FedDKD outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with more efficient communication and training in a few DKD steps, especially on some extremely heterogeneous datasets. 神经网络中联邦学习的性能通常受到数据分布异质性的影响。对于性能良好的全局模型，采用大多数现有联邦学习算法所做的局部模型的加权平均值，可能无法保证与神经网络映射空间中的局部模型的一致性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的联邦学习框架，配备了去中心化知识蒸馏（FedDKD）的过程（即服务器上没有数据）。 FedDKD 引入了去中心化知识蒸馏 (DKD) 模块，通过基于损失函数中定义的散度度量接近神经网络图平均值来蒸馏局部模型的知识来训练全局模型，而不是像文献中那样仅平均参数。对各种异构数据集的数值实验表明，FedDKD 在几个 DKD 步骤中通过更高效的通信和训练，优于最先进的方法，特别是在一些极其异构的数据集上。 本文提出一种名为FedDKD的联邦学习框架，通过去中心化知识蒸馏解决数据异构性问题，提升全局模型性能。 Xinjia Li,Boyu Chen,Wenlian Lu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Ekim Yurtsever,Emeç Erçelik,Mingyu Liu,Zhijie Yang,Hanzhen Zhang,Pınar Topçam,Maximilian Listl,Yılmaz Kaan Çaylı,Alois Knoll
title: 3D Object Detection with a Self-supervised Lidar Scene Flow Backbone
title_zh: 使用自监督激光雷达场景流主干进行 3D 物体检测
abstract: State-of-the-art lidar-based 3D object detection methods rely on supervised learning and large labeled datasets. However, annotating lidar data is resource-consuming, and depending only on supervised learning limits the applicability of trained models. Self-supervised training strategies can alleviate these issues by learning a general point cloud backbone model for downstream 3D vision tasks. Against this backdrop, we show the relationship between self-supervised multi-frame flow representations and single-frame 3D detection hypotheses. Our main contribution leverages learned flow and motion representations and combines a self-supervised backbone with a supervised 3D detection head. First, a self-supervised scene flow estimation model is trained with cycle consistency. Then, the point cloud encoder of this model is used as the backbone of a single-frame 3D object detection head model. This second 3D object detection model learns to utilize motion representations to distinguish dynamic objects exhibiting different movement patterns. Experiments on KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks show that the proposed self-supervised pre-training increases 3D detection performance significantly. https://github.com/emecercelik/ssl-3d-detection.git
summary: State-of-the-art lidar-based 3D object detection methods rely on supervised learning and large labeled datasets. However, annotating lidar data is resource-consuming, and depending only on supervised learning limits the applicability of trained models. Self-supervised training strategies can alleviate these issues by learning a general point cloud backbone model for downstream 3D vision tasks. Against this backdrop, we show the relationship between self-supervised multi-frame flow representations and single-frame 3D detection hypotheses. Our main contribution leverages learned flow and motion representations and combines a self-supervised backbone with a supervised 3D detection head. First, a self-supervised scene flow estimation model is trained with cycle consistency. Then, the point cloud encoder of this model is used as the backbone of a single-frame 3D object detection head model. This second 3D object detection model learns to utilize motion representations to distinguish dynamic objects exhibiting different movement patterns. Experiments on KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks show that the proposed self-supervised pre-training increases 3D detection performance significantly. https://github.com/emecercelik/ssl-3d-detection.git
abstract_zh: 最先进的基于激光雷达的 3D 物体检测方法依赖于监督学习和大型标记数据集。然而，注释激光雷达数据非常消耗资源，并且仅依赖监督学习限制了训练模型的适用性。自监督训练策略可以通过学习下游 3D 视觉任务的通用点云主干模型来缓解这些问题。在此背景下，我们展示了自监督多帧流表示与单帧 3D 检测假设之间的关系。我们的主要贡献是利用学习到的流和运动表示，并将自监督骨干网与受监督的 3D 检测头相结合。首先，训练具有循环一致性的自监督场景流估计模型。然后，该模型的点云编码器被用作单帧3D物体检测头部模型的主干。第二个 3D 对象检测模型学习利用运动表示来区分表现出不同运动模式的动态对象。 KITTI 和 nuScenes 基准测试表明，所提出的自监督预训练显着提高了 3D 检测性能。 https://github.com/emecercelik/ssl-3d-detection.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的LiDAR场景流骨干网络，用于提升3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-based 3D检测方法依赖监督学习和大量标注数据，而标注成本高且限制模型适用性。自监督学习可缓解此问题。
AI.method: 通过循环一致性训练自监督场景流估计模型，提取点云编码器作为单帧3D检测头的骨干网络，结合运动特征区分动态目标。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes基准测试中，自监督预训练显著提升3D检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练有效提升LiDAR 3D检测性能，降低对标注数据的依赖，增强模型实用性。

title: DeepGraviLens: a Multi-Modal Architecture for Classifying Gravitational Lensing Data
title_zh: DeepGraviLens：用于对引力透镜数据进行分类的多模态架构
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Neural Computing and Applications, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s00521-023-08766-9
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Neural Computing and Applications, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s00521-023-08766-9
abstract: Gravitational lensing is the relativistic effect generated by massive bodies, which bend the space-time surrounding them. It is a deeply investigated topic in astrophysics and allows validating theoretical relativistic results and studying faint astrophysical objects that would not be visible otherwise. In recent years Machine Learning methods have been applied to support the analysis of the gravitational lensing phenomena by detecting lensing effects in data sets consisting of images associated with brightness variation time series. However, the state-of-art approaches either consider only images and neglect time-series data or achieve relatively low accuracy on the most difficult data sets. This paper introduces DeepGraviLens, a novel multi-modal network that classifies spatio-temporal data belonging to one non-lensed system type and three lensed system types. It surpasses the current state of the art accuracy results by $\approx 3\%$ to $\approx 11\%$, depending on the considered data set. Such an improvement will enable the acceleration of the analysis of lensed objects in upcoming astrophysical surveys, which will exploit the petabytes of data collected, e.g., from the Vera C. Rubin Observatory.
summary: Gravitational lensing is the relativistic effect generated by massive bodies, which bend the space-time surrounding them. It is a deeply investigated topic in astrophysics and allows validating theoretical relativistic results and studying faint astrophysical objects that would not be visible otherwise. In recent years Machine Learning methods have been applied to support the analysis of the gravitational lensing phenomena by detecting lensing effects in data sets consisting of images associated with brightness variation time series. However, the state-of-art approaches either consider only images and neglect time-series data or achieve relatively low accuracy on the most difficult data sets. This paper introduces DeepGraviLens, a novel multi-modal network that classifies spatio-temporal data belonging to one non-lensed system type and three lensed system types. It surpasses the current state of the art accuracy results by $\approx 3\%$ to $\approx 11\%$, depending on the considered data set. Such an improvement will enable the acceleration of the analysis of lensed objects in upcoming astrophysical surveys, which will exploit the petabytes of data collected, e.g., from the Vera C. Rubin Observatory.
abstract_zh: 引力透镜是由大质量物体产生的相对论效应，它会弯曲它们周围的时空。这是天体物理学中一个深入研究的课题，可以验证理论相对论结果并研究原本不可见的微弱天体物理物体。近年来，机器学习方法已被应用于通过检测由与亮度变化时间序列相关的图像组成的数据集中的透镜效应来支持引力透镜现象的分析。然而，最先进的方法要么只考虑图像而忽略时间序列数据，要么在最困难的数据集上实现相对较低的精度。本文介绍了 DeepGraviLens，这是一种新颖的多模态网络，可对属于一种非透镜系统类型和三种透镜系统类型的时空数据进行分类。它比当前最先进的准确度结果高 $\约 3\%$ 到 $\约 11\%$，具体取决于所考虑的数据集。这样的改进将能够加速即将到来的天体物理调查中对透镜物体的分析，这将利用从 Vera C. Rubin 天文台等收集的 PB 级数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DeepGraviLens的多模态深度学习架构，用于分类引力透镜数据，结合图像和时间序列信息以提高分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么仅使用图像数据而忽略时间序列信息，要么在复杂数据集上准确率较低，无法有效处理引力透镜现象的多模态特性。
AI.method: 设计了一种多模态神经网络，同时处理图像数据和亮度变化时间序列数据，融合两种模态的信息以提升分类性能。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，DeepGraviLens的准确率较现有方法提升了约3%至11%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提高了引力透镜分类的准确性，有助于加速未来天文调查中海量数据的分析。

In recent years Machine Learning methods have been applied to support the analysis of the gravitational lensing phenomena by detecting lensing effects in data sets consisting of images associated with brightness variation time series. However, the state-of-art approaches either consider only images and neglect time-series data or achieve relatively low accuracy on the most difficult data sets. This paper introduces DeepGraviLens, a novel multi-modal network that classifies spatio-temporal data belonging to one non-lensed system type and three lensed system types. It surpasses the current state of the art accuracy results by $\approx 3\%$ to $\approx 11\%$, depending on the considered data set. Such an improvement will enable the acceleration of the analysis of lensed objects in upcoming astrophysical surveys, which will exploit the petabytes of data collected, e.g., from the Vera C. Rubin Observatory. 引力透镜是由大质量物体产生的相对论效应，它会弯曲它们周围的时空。这是天体物理学中一个深入研究的课题，可以验证理论相对论结果并研究原本不可见的微弱天体物理物体。近年来，机器学习方法已被应用于通过检测由与亮度变化时间序列相关的图像组成的数据集中的透镜效应来支持引力透镜现象的分析。然而，最先进的方法要么只考虑图像而忽略时间序列数据，要么在最困难的数据集上实现相对较低的精度。本文介绍了 DeepGraviLens，这是一种新颖的多模态网络，可对属于一种非透镜系统类型和三种透镜系统类型的时空数据进行分类。它比当前最先进的准确度结果高 $\约 3\%$ 到 $\约 11\%$，具体取决于所考虑的数据集。这样的改进将能够加速即将到来的天体物理调查中对透镜物体的分析，这将利用从 Vera C. Rubin 天文台等收集的 PB 级数据。 本文提出了一种名为DeepGraviLens的多模态深度学习架构，用于分类引力透镜数据，结合图像和时间序列信息以提高分类准确性。 Nicolò Oreste Pinciroli Vago,Piero Fraternali astro-ph.IM,astro-ph.CO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,gr-qc

authors_text: Jie Du,Xujian Yang,Kecheng Jin,Xuanzheng Qi,Hu Chen
title: Unsupervised Denoising of Optical Coherence Tomography Images with Dual_Merged CycleWGAN
title_zh: 使用 Dual_Merged CycleWGAN 对光学相干断层扫描图像进行无监督去噪
comment: Mr. Hu Chen is our corresponding author
comments: Mr. Hu Chen is our corresponding author
abstract: Nosie is an important cause of low quality Optical coherence tomography (OCT) image. The neural network model based on Convolutional neural networks(CNNs) has demonstrated its excellent performance in image denoising. However, OCT image denoising still faces great challenges because many previous neural network algorithms required a large number of labeled data, which might cost much time or is expensive. Besides, these CNN-based algorithms need numerous parameters and good tuning techniques, which is hardware resources consuming. To solved above problems, We proposed a new Cycle-Consistent Generative Adversarial Nets called Dual-Merged Cycle-WGAN for retinal OCT image denoiseing, which has remarkable performance with less unlabeled traning data. Our model consists of two Cycle-GAN networks with imporved generator, descriminator and wasserstein loss to achieve good training stability and better performance. Using image merge technique between two Cycle-GAN networks, our model could obtain more detailed information and hence better training effect. The effectiveness and generality of our proposed network has been proved via ablation experiments and comparative experiments. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, our unsupervised method obtains best subjective visual effect and higher evaluation objective indicators.

To solved above problems, We proposed a new Cycle-Consistent Generative Adversarial Nets called Dual-Merged Cycle-WGAN for retinal OCT image denoiseing, which has remarkable performance with less unlabeled traning data. Our model consists of two Cycle-GAN networks with imporved generator, descriminator and wasserstein loss to achieve good training stability and better performance. Using image merge technique between two Cycle-GAN networks, our model could obtain more detailed information and hence better training effect. The effectiveness and generality of our proposed network has been proved via ablation experiments and comparative experiments. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, our unsupervised method obtains best subjective visual effect and higher evaluation objective indicators.
abstract_zh: Nosie是导致光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像质量低的重要原因。基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的神经网络模型在图像去噪方面表现出了优异的性能。然而，OCT图像去噪仍然面临着巨大的挑战，因为之前的许多神经网络算法需要大量的标记数据，这可能会花费大量时间或成本高昂。此外，这些基于CNN的算法需要大量的参数和良好的调优技术，这会消耗硬件资源。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的循环一致生成对抗网络，称为双合并循环-WGAN，用于视网膜 OCT 图像去噪，其在未标记训练数据较少的情况下具有出色的性能。我们的模型由两个 Cycle-GAN 网络组成，具有改进的生成器、判别器和 wasserstein 损失，以实现良好的训练稳定性和更好的性能。使用两个 Cycle-GAN 网络之间的图像合并技术，我们的模型可以获得更详细的信息，从而获得更好的训练效果。我们提出的网络的有效性和通用性已通过消融实验和比较实验得到证明。与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的无监督方法获得了最好的主观视觉效果和更高的评估客观指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督去噪方法Dual-Merged Cycle-WGAN，用于提高光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像质量。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN去噪算法依赖大量标注数据且计算资源消耗大，而OCT图像获取标注数据成本高且困难。
AI.method: 设计双网络融合的Cycle-WGAN架构，包含改进的生成器/判别器及Wasserstein损失函数，通过图像合并技术增强特征表达能力。
AI.result: 在主观视觉效果和客观评价指标上均优于现有先进方法，且通过消融实验验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督方法在减少标注数据依赖的同时实现了更优的OCT图像去噪性能，解决了传统方法的资源消耗问题。

title: A Multi-stage deep architecture for summary generation of soccer videos
title_zh: 用于足球视频摘要生成的多级深度架构
abstract: Video content is present in an ever-increasing number of fields, both scientific and commercial. Sports, particularly soccer, is one of the industries that has invested the most in the field of video analytics, due to the massive popularity of the game and the emergence of new markets. Previous state-of-the-art methods on soccer matches video summarization rely on handcrafted heuristics to generate summaries which are poorly generalizable, but these works have yet proven that multiple modalities help detect the best actions of the game. On the other hand, machine learning models with higher generalization potential have entered the field of summarization of general-purpose videos, offering several deep learning approaches. However, most of them exploit content specificities that are not appropriate for sport whole-match videos. Although video content has been for many years the main source for automatizing knowledge extraction in soccer, the data that records all the events happening on the field has become lately very important in sports analytics, since this event data provides richer context information and requires less processing. We propose a method to generate the summary of a soccer match exploiting both the audio and the event metadata. The results show that our method can detect the actions of the match, identify which of these actions should belong to the summary and then propose multiple candidate summaries which are similar enough but with relevant variability to provide different options to the final editor. Furthermore, we show the generalization capability of our work since it can transfer knowledge between datasets from different broadcasting companies, different competitions, acquired in different conditions, and corresponding to summaries of different lengths

abstract_zh: 视频内容出现在越来越多的领域，包括科学领域和商业领域。由于体育运动的广泛普及和新市场的出现，体育运动，特别是足球，是在视频分析领域投资最多的行业之一。以前最先进的足球比赛视频摘要方法依赖于手工启发式方法来生成概括性较差的摘要，但这些工作尚未证明多种模式有助于检测比赛的最佳动作。另一方面，具有较高泛化潜力的机器学习模型已进入通用视频摘要领域，提供了多种深度学习方法。然而，它们中的大多数都利用了不适合体育整场比赛视频的内容特性。尽管视频内容多年来一直是足球领域自动化知识提取的主要来源，但记录球场上发生的所有事件的数据最近在体育分析中变得非常重要，因为这些事件数据提供了更丰富的上下文信息并且需要更少的处理。我们提出了一种利用音频和事件元数据来生成足球比赛摘要的方法。结果表明，我们的方法可以检测匹配的操作，识别这些操作中的哪些应该属于摘要，然后提出多个足够相似但具有相关可变性的候选摘要，以便为最终编辑提供不同的选项。此外，我们展示了我们工作的泛化能力，因为它可以在来自不同广播公司、不同比赛、在不同条件下获得的数据集之间转移知识，并对应于不同长度的摘要

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段深度架构，利用足球比赛的音频和事件元数据生成视频摘要。
AI.motivation: 传统足球视频摘要方法依赖手工启发式规则，泛化能力差；通用视频摘要的深度学习方法未能适配体育赛事视频的特殊性。
AI.method: 融合音频特征与事件元数据的多阶段深度网络，通过检测关键动作并生成多候选摘要实现泛化能力。
AI.result: 方法能准确识别比赛关键动作，生成具有差异性的多候选摘要，并在不同赛事数据集间实现知识迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多模态数据融合提升了足球视频摘要的泛化性与多样性，为体育视频分析提供新思路。

title: Contrastive Learning for Improving ASR Robustness in Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 提高口语理解中 ASR 鲁棒性的对比学习
abstract: Spoken language understanding (SLU) is an essential task for machines to understand human speech for better interactions. However, errors from the automatic speech recognizer (ASR) usually hurt the understanding performance. In reality, ASR systems may not be easy to adjust for the target scenarios. Therefore, this paper focuses on learning utterance representations that are robust to ASR errors using a contrastive objective, and further strengthens the generalization ability by combining supervised contrastive learning and self-distillation in model fine-tuning. Experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.

Experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 口语理解（SLU）是机器理解人类语音以实现更好交互的一项基本任务。然而，自动语音识别器 (ASR) 的错误通常会损害理解性能。实际上，ASR 系统可能不容易针对目标场景进行调整。因此，本文重点关注使用对比目标来学习对 ASR 错误具有鲁棒性的话语表示，并通过在模型微调中结合监督对比学习和自蒸馏来进一步增强泛化能力。对三个基准数据集的实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过对比学习提升语音识别（ASR）在口语语言理解（SLU）中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: ASR误差会显著影响SLU性能，而实际场景中调整ASR系统较为困难，需直接增强模型对ASR误差的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用对比学习目标学习鲁棒的语音表示，并结合监督对比学习与自蒸馏技术进行模型微调。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效提升SLU任务中模型对ASR误差的鲁棒性及泛化能力。

authors_text: HeeSun Bae,Seungjae Shin,Byeonghu Na,JoonHo Jang,Kyungwoo Song,Il-Chul Moon
title: From Noisy Prediction to True Label: Noisy Prediction Calibration via Generative Model
title_zh: 从噪声预测到真实标签：通过生成模型进行噪声预测校准
comment: 21 pages, 9 figures. International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022), Baltimore, Jul 17, 2022
comments: 21 pages, 9 figures. International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022), Baltimore, Jul 17, 2022
abstract: Noisy labels are inevitable yet problematic in machine learning society. It ruins the generalization of a classifier by making the classifier over-fitted to noisy labels. Existing methods on noisy label have focused on modifying the classifier during the training procedure. It has two potential problems. First, these methods are not applicable to a pre-trained classifier without further access to training. Second, it is not easy to train a classifier and regularize all negative effects from noisy labels, simultaneously. We suggest a new branch of method, Noisy Prediction Calibration (NPC) in learning with noisy labels. Through the introduction and estimation of a new type of transition matrix via generative model, NPC corrects the noisy prediction from the pre-trained classifier to the true label as a post-processing scheme. We prove that NPC theoretically aligns with the transition matrix based methods. Yet, NPC empirically provides more accurate pathway to estimate true label, even without involvement in classifier learning. Also, NPC is applicable to any classifier trained with noisy label methods, if training instances and its predictions are available. Our method, NPC, boosts the classification performances of all baseline models on both synthetic and real-world datasets. The implemented code is available at https://github.com/BaeHeeSun/NPC.
summary: Noisy labels are inevitable yet problematic in machine learning society. It ruins the generalization of a classifier by making the classifier over-fitted to noisy labels. Existing methods on noisy label have focused on modifying the classifier during the training procedure. It has two potential problems. First, these methods are not applicable to a pre-trained classifier without further access to training. Second, it is not easy to train a classifier and regularize all negative effects from noisy labels, simultaneously. We suggest a new branch of method, Noisy Prediction Calibration (NPC) in learning with noisy labels. Through the introduction and estimation of a new type of transition matrix via generative model, NPC corrects the noisy prediction from the pre-trained classifier to the true label as a post-processing scheme. We prove that NPC theoretically aligns with the transition matrix based methods. Yet, NPC empirically provides more accurate pathway to estimate true label, even without involvement in classifier learning. Also, NPC is applicable to any classifier trained with noisy label methods, if training instances and its predictions are available. Our method, NPC, boosts the classification performances of all baseline models on both synthetic and real-world datasets. The implemented code is available at https://github.com/BaeHeeSun/NPC.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习社会中，嘈杂的标签是不可避免的，但也是有问题的。它使分类器过度拟合噪声标签，从而破坏了分类器的泛化能力。现有的噪声标签方法主要集中在训练过程中修改分类器。它有两个潜在的问题。首先，这些方法不适用于未经进一步训练的预训练分类器。其次，同时训练分类器并规范噪声标签的所有负面影响并不容易。我们提出了一种新的方法分支，即噪声预测校准（NPC），用于使用噪声标签进行学习。通过生成模型引入和估计新型转换矩阵，NPC 将预训练分类器的噪声预测纠正为真实标签作为后处理方案。我们证明 NPC 理论上与基于转移矩阵的方法一致。然而，NPC 根据经验提供了更准确的途径来估计真实标签，即使不参与分类器学习。此外，如果训练实例及其预测可用，NPC 适用于任何使用噪声标签方法训练的分类器。我们的方法 NPC 提高了所有基线模型在合成数据集和真实数据集上的分类性能。实现的代码可在 https://github.com/BaeHeeSun/NPC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过生成模型进行噪声预测校准的新方法NPC，用于解决机器学习中噪声标签导致的分类器泛化性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有噪声标签处理方法需在训练过程中修改分类器，存在无法应用于预训练模型及难以同时训练与正则化的局限性。
AI.method: 通过生成模型引入并估计新的转移矩阵，以后处理方式校准预训练分类器的噪声预测结果，理论与现有转移矩阵方法一致但估计路径更优。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均提升基线模型分类性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: NPC方法无需参与分类器学习即可校准噪声预测，适用于任何有训练实例和预测结果的噪声标签模型。

authors_text: Xinyuan Lu,Shengyuan Huang,Li Niu,Wenyan Cong,Liqing Zhang
title: Deep Video Harmonization with Color Mapping Consistency
title_zh: 具有颜色映射一致性的深度视频协调
abstract: Video harmonization aims to adjust the foreground of a composite video to make it compatible with the background. So far, video harmonization has only received limited attention and there is no public dataset for video harmonization. In this work, we construct a new video harmonization dataset HYouTube by adjusting the foreground of real videos to create synthetic composite videos. Moreover, we consider the temporal consistency in video harmonization task. Unlike previous works which establish the spatial correspondence, we design a novel framework based on the assumption of color mapping consistency, which leverages the color mapping of neighboring frames to refine the current frame. Extensive experiments on our HYouTube dataset prove the effectiveness of our proposed framework. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/bcmi/Video-Harmonization-Dataset-HYouTube.
summary: Video harmonization aims to adjust the foreground of a composite video to make it compatible with the background. So far, video harmonization has only received limited attention and there is no public dataset for video harmonization. In this work, we construct a new video harmonization dataset HYouTube by adjusting the foreground of real videos to create synthetic composite videos. Moreover, we consider the temporal consistency in video harmonization task. Unlike previous works which establish the spatial correspondence, we design a novel framework based on the assumption of color mapping consistency, which leverages the color mapping of neighboring frames to refine the current frame. Extensive experiments on our HYouTube dataset prove the effectiveness of our proposed framework. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/bcmi/Video-Harmonization-Dataset-HYouTube.
abstract_zh: 视频协调旨在调整合成视频的前景，使其与背景兼容。到目前为止，视频协调仅受到有限的关注，并且没有视频协调的公共数据集。在这项工作中，我们通过调整真实视频的前景来创建合成复合视频，构建了一个新的视频协调数据集 HYouTube。此外，我们考虑视频协调任务中的时间一致性。与之前建立空间对应关系的工作不同，我们基于颜色映射一致性的假设设计了一个新颖的框架，它利用相邻帧的颜色映射来细化当前帧。对我们的 HYouTube 数据集进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的框架的有效性。我们的数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/bcmi/Video-Harmonization-Dataset-HYouTube 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于颜色映射一致性的视频谐波化框架，并构建了新的HYouTube数据集以推动视频谐波化研究。
AI.motivation: 现有视频谐波化方法缺乏对时间一致性的关注，且无公开数据集限制了该领域的发展。
AI.method: 通过调整真实视频前景生成合成数据集HYouTube，设计基于相邻帧颜色映射一致性的新型框架，替代传统空间对应关系方法。
AI.result: 在HYouTube数据集上的实验验证了框架有效性，且公开了数据集和代码资源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过颜色映射一致性提升了视频谐波化的时间连贯性，为该领域提供了重要基准和研究基础。

Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/bcmi/Video-Harmonization-Dataset-HYouTube. 视频协调旨在调整合成视频的前景，使其与背景兼容。到目前为止，视频协调仅受到有限的关注，并且没有视频协调的公共数据集。在这项工作中，我们通过调整真实视频的前景来创建合成复合视频，构建了一个新的视频协调数据集 HYouTube。此外，我们考虑视频协调任务中的时间一致性。与之前建立空间对应关系的工作不同，我们基于颜色映射一致性的假设设计了一个新颖的框架，它利用相邻帧的颜色映射来细化当前帧。对我们的 HYouTube 数据集进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的框架的有效性。我们的数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/bcmi/Video-Harmonization-Dataset-HYouTube 上获取。 本文提出了一种基于颜色映射一致性的视频谐波化框架，并构建了新的HYouTube数据集以推动视频谐波化研究。 Xinyuan Lu,Shengyuan Huang,Li Niu,Wenyan Cong,Liqing Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Han Xiang Choong,Yew-Soon Ong,Abhishek Gupta,Caishun Chen,Ray Lim
title: Jack and Masters of all Trades: One-Pass Learning Sets of Model Sets From Large Pre-Trained Models
title_zh: 杰克和万事通：从大型预训练模型中一次性学习模型集
comment: This article has been published in the IEEE Computational Intelligence Magazine. We have updated the article's Title, Authors, and Abstract in the latest version
comments: This article has been published in the IEEE Computational Intelligence Magazine. We have updated the article's Title, Authors, and Abstract in the latest version
abstract: For deep learning, size is power. Massive neural nets trained on broad data for a spectrum of tasks are at the forefront of artificial intelligence. These large pre-trained models or Jacks of All Trades (JATs), when fine-tuned for downstream tasks, are gaining importance in driving deep learning advancements. However, environments with tight resource constraints, changing objectives and intentions, or varied task requirements, could limit the real-world utility of a singular JAT. Hence, in tandem with current trends towards building increasingly large JATs, this paper conducts an initial exploration into concepts underlying the creation of a diverse set of compact machine learning model sets. Composed of many smaller and specialized models, the Set of Sets is formulated to simultaneously fulfil many task settings and environmental conditions. A means to arrive at such a set tractably in one pass of a neuroevolutionary multitasking algorithm is presented for the first time, bringing us closer to models that are collectively Masters of All Trades.

These large pre-trained models or Jacks of All Trades (JATs), when fine-tuned for downstream tasks, are gaining importance in driving deep learning advancements. However, environments with tight resource constraints, changing objectives and intentions, or varied task requirements, could limit the real-world utility of a singular JAT. Hence, in tandem with current trends towards building increasingly large JATs, this paper conducts an initial exploration into concepts underlying the creation of a diverse set of compact machine learning model sets. Composed of many smaller and specialized models, the Set of Sets is formulated to simultaneously fulfil many task settings and environmental conditions. A means to arrive at such a set tractably in one pass of a neuroevolutionary multitasking algorithm is presented for the first time, bringing us closer to models that are collectively Masters of All Trades.
abstract_zh: 对于深度学习来说，规模就是力量。利用广泛数据训练的大规模神经网络可以完成一系列任务，处于人工智能的最前沿。这些大型预训练模型或万事通 (JAT) 在针对下游任务进行微调后，在推动深度学习进步方面变得越来越重要。然而，资源限制严格、目标和意图不断变化或任务要求不同的环境可能会限制单一 JAT 的实际效用。因此，为了配合当前构建越来越大的 JAT 的趋势，本文对创建一组多样化的紧凑机器学习模型集的基础概念进行了初步探索。套装由许多较小且专门的模型组成，旨在同时满足许多任务设置和环境条件。首次提出了一种在神经进化多任务算法的一次传递中轻松达到这样一个集合的方法，使我们更接近全能大师的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过一次性神经进化多任务算法生成多个小型专业化模型集合的方法，以应对资源受限和多变任务需求的场景。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型预训练模型在多数任务中表现优异，但在资源受限、目标动态变化或任务需求多样的实际环境中，单一模型的实用性受到限制。
AI.method: 首次提出基于神经进化多任务算法的单次训练框架，生成由多个小型专业化模型组成的‘模型集合’（Set of Sets），以适应不同任务和环境条件。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在生成多样化模型集合上的可行性，展示了其在资源效率和任务适应性方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过模型集合的协同工作，可实现比单一大型模型更广泛的任务覆盖能力，为未来模型设计提供了新思路。

title: Revisiting Classical Multiclass Linear Discriminant Analysis with a Novel Prototype-based Interpretable Solution
title_zh: 使用基于新颖原型的可解释解决方案重新审视经典多类线性判别分析
abstract: Linear discriminant analysis (LDA) is a fundamental method for feature extraction and dimensionality reduction. Despite having many variants, classical LDA has its own importance, as it is a keystone in human knowledge about statistical pattern recognition. For a dataset containing C clusters, the classical solution to LDA extracts at most C-1 features. Here, we introduce a novel solution to classical LDA, called LDA++, that yields C features, each interpretable as measuring similarity to one cluster. This novel solution bridges dimensionality reduction and multiclass classification. Specifically, we prove that, for homoscedastic Gaussian data and under some mild conditions, the optimal weights of a linear multiclass classifier also make an optimal solution to LDA. In addition, we show that LDA++ reveals some important new facts about LDA that remarkably changes our understanding of classical multiclass LDA after 75 years of its introduction. We provide a complete numerical solution for LDA++ for the cases 1) when the scatter matrices can be constructed explicitly, 2) when constructing the scatter matrices is infeasible, and 3) the kernel extension.
summary: Linear discriminant analysis (LDA) is a fundamental method for feature extraction and dimensionality reduction. Despite having many variants, classical LDA has its own importance, as it is a keystone in human knowledge about statistical pattern recognition. For a dataset containing C clusters, the classical solution to LDA extracts at most C-1 features. Here, we introduce a novel solution to classical LDA, called LDA++, that yields C features, each interpretable as measuring similarity to one cluster. This novel solution bridges dimensionality reduction and multiclass classification. Specifically, we prove that, for homoscedastic Gaussian data and under some mild conditions, the optimal weights of a linear multiclass classifier also make an optimal solution to LDA. In addition, we show that LDA++ reveals some important new facts about LDA that remarkably changes our understanding of classical multiclass LDA after 75 years of its introduction. We provide a complete numerical solution for LDA++ for the cases 1) when the scatter matrices can be constructed explicitly, 2) when constructing the scatter matrices is infeasible, and 3) the kernel extension.
abstract_zh: 线性判别分析（LDA）是特征提取和降维的基本方法。尽管有许多变体，经典 LDA 有其自身的重要性，因为它是人类统计模式识别知识的基石。对于包含 C 个簇的数据集，LDA 的经典解决方案最多提取 C-1 个特征。在这里，我们引入了一种经典 LDA 的新颖解决方案，称为 LDA++，它产生 C 特征，每个特征都可以解释为测量与一个簇的相似性。这种新颖的解决方案将降维和多类分类联系起来。具体来说，我们证明，对于同方差高斯数据，在一些温和的条件下，线性多类分类器的最优权重也可以得到 LDA 的最优解。此外，我们还表明，LDA++ 揭示了有关 LDA 的一些重要的新事实，在经典多类 LDA 推出 75 年后，这些事实显着改变了我们对经典多类 LDA 的理解。我们为 LDA++ 提供了针对以下情况的完整数值解决方案：1）当可以显式构造散布矩阵时，2）当构造散布矩阵不可行时，以及 3）内核扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型可解释的多类线性判别分析方法LDA++，通过原型基特征提取解决传统LDA特征数限制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统LDA在C类数据中仅能提取C-1特征，且缺乏可解释性，难以满足现代多类分类对特征可解释性和维度的需求。
AI.method: 构建原型基特征框架，提出LDA++算法，在显式散度矩阵、隐式散度矩阵和核方法三种场景下提供完整数值解方案。
AI.result: 证明在同方差高斯数据下，多类线性分类器的最优权重等价于LDA最优解，揭示了经典LDA的全新理论特性。
AI.conclusion: LDA++突破了传统LDA的维度限制，建立了特征提取与分类器设计的理论关联，为多类分类提供了新的可解释解决方案。

title: Simple Techniques Work Surprisingly Well for Neural Network Test Prioritization and Active Learning (Replicability Study)
title_zh: 简单的技术对于神经网络测试优先级和主动学习效果出奇地好（可复制性研究）
abstract: Test Input Prioritizers (TIP) for Deep Neural Networks (DNN) are an important technique to handle the typically very large test datasets efficiently, saving computation and labeling costs. This is particularly true for large-scale, deployed systems, where inputs observed in production are recorded to serve as potential test or training data for the next versions of the system. Feng et. al. propose DeepGini, a very fast and simple TIP, and show that it outperforms more elaborate techniques such as neuron- and surprise coverage. In a large-scale study (4 case studies, 8 test datasets, 32'200 trained models) we verify their findings. However, we also find that other comparable or even simpler baselines from the field of uncertainty quantification, such as the predicted softmax likelihood or the entropy of the predicted softmax likelihoods perform equally well as DeepGini.
summary: Test Input Prioritizers (TIP) for Deep Neural Networks (DNN) are an important technique to handle the typically very large test datasets efficiently, saving computation and labeling costs. This is particularly true for large-scale, deployed systems, where inputs observed in production are recorded to serve as potential test or training data for the next versions of the system. Feng et. al. propose DeepGini, a very fast and simple TIP, and show that it outperforms more elaborate techniques such as neuron- and surprise coverage. In a large-scale study (4 case studies, 8 test datasets, 32'200 trained models) we verify their findings. However, we also find that other comparable or even simpler baselines from the field of uncertainty quantification, such as the predicted softmax likelihood or the entropy of the predicted softmax likelihoods perform equally well as DeepGini.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的测试输入优先级排序器 (TIP) 是一种重要技术，可以有效地处理通常非常大的测试数据集，从而节省计算和标记成本。对于大规模部署的系统尤其如此，在生产中观察到的输入被记录下来，作为系统下一版本的潜在测试或培训数据。冯等。等人。提出 DeepGini，一个非常快速且简单的 TIP，并表明它优于更复杂的技术，例如神经元覆盖和惊喜覆盖。在一项大规模研究（4 个案例研究、8 个测试数据集、32'200 个经过训练的模型）中，我们验证了他们的发现。然而，我们还发现来自不确定性量化领域的其他类似甚至更简单的基线，例如预测的 softmax 似然或预测的 softmax 似然的熵，与 DeepGini 的表现同样好。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了简单技术在深度神经网络测试优先级排序和主动学习中的效果。
AI.motivation: 处理大规模测试数据集时需要高效的方法以降低计算和标注成本，特别是在部署系统中。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验（4个案例研究、8个测试数据集、32,200个训练模型）验证DeepGini及其他不确定性量化基线方法的性能。
AI.result: DeepGini表现优异，但其他更简单的方法（如softmax似然或熵）同样有效。
AI.conclusion: 简单技术在测试优先级排序和主动学习任务中可能与复杂方法表现相当。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文评估了简单技术在深度神经网络测试优先级排序和主动学习中的效果。
ai_content.motivation: 处理大规模测试数据集时需要高效的方法以降低计算和标注成本，特别是在部署系统中。
ai_content.method: 通过大规模实验（4个案例研究、8个测试数据集、32,200个训练模型）验证DeepGini及其他不确定性量化基线方法的性能。
ai_content.result: DeepGini表现优异，但其他更简单的方法（如softmax似然或熵）同样有效。
ai_content.conclusion: 简单技术在测试优先级排序和主动学习任务中可能与复杂方法表现相当。

search_text: Simple Techniques Work Surprisingly Well for Neural Network Test Prioritization and Active Learning (Replicability Study) 简单的技术对于神经网络测试优先级和主动学习效果出奇地好（可复制性研究） Test Input Prioritizers (TIP) for Deep Neural Networks (DNN) are an important technique to handle the typically very large test datasets efficiently, saving computation and labeling costs. This is particularly true for large-scale, deployed systems, where inputs observed in production are recorded to serve as potential test or training data for the next versions of the system. Feng et. al. propose DeepGini, a very fast and simple TIP, and show that it outperforms more elaborate techniques such as neuron- and surprise coverage. In a large-scale study (4 case studies, 8 test datasets, 32'200 trained models) we verify their findings. However, we also find that other comparable or even simpler baselines from the field of uncertainty quantification, such as the predicted softmax likelihood or the entropy of the predicted softmax likelihoods perform equally well as DeepGini. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的测试输入优先级排序器 (TIP) 是一种重要技术，可以有效地处理通常非常大的测试数据集，从而节省计算和标记成本。对于大规模部署的系统尤其如此，在生产中观察到的输入被记录下来，作为系统下一版本的潜在测试或培训数据。冯等。等人。提出 DeepGini，一个非常快速且简单的 TIP，并表明它优于更复杂的技术，例如神经元覆盖和惊喜覆盖。在一项大规模研究（4 个案例研究、8 个测试数据集、32'200 个经过训练的模型）中，我们验证了他们的发现。然而，我们还发现来自不确定性量化领域的其他类似甚至更简单的基线，例如预测的 softmax 似然或预测的 softmax 似然的熵，与 DeepGini 的表现同样好。 该论文评估了简单技术在深度神经网络测试优先级排序和主动学习中的效果。 Michael Weiss,Paolo Tonella cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SE

authors_text: Debopriyo Banerjee,Harsh Maheshwari,Lucky Dhakad1,Arnab Bhattacharya1,Niloy Ganguly,Muthusamy Chelliah,Suyash Agarwal1
title: An Application to Generate Style Guided Compatible Outfit
title_zh: 生成风格引导兼容服装的应用程序
abstract: Fashion recommendation has witnessed a phenomenal growth of research, particularly in the domains of shop-the-look, contextaware outfit creation, personalizing outfit creation etc. Majority of the work in this area focuses on better understanding of the notion of complimentary relationship between lifestyle items. Quite recently, some works have realised that style plays a vital role in fashion, especially in the understanding of compatibility learning and outfit creation. In this paper, we would like to present the end-to-end design of a methodology in which we aim to generate outfits guided by styles or themes using a novel style encoder network. We present an extensive analysis of different aspects of our method through various experiments. We also provide a demonstration api to showcase the ability of our work in generating outfits based on an anchor item and styles.
summary: Fashion recommendation has witnessed a phenomenal growth of research, particularly in the domains of shop-the-look, contextaware outfit creation, personalizing outfit creation etc. Majority of the work in this area focuses on better understanding of the notion of complimentary relationship between lifestyle items. Quite recently, some works have realised that style plays a vital role in fashion, especially in the understanding of compatibility learning and outfit creation. In this paper, we would like to present the end-to-end design of a methodology in which we aim to generate outfits guided by styles or themes using a novel style encoder network. We present an extensive analysis of different aspects of our method through various experiments. We also provide a demonstration api to showcase the ability of our work in generating outfits based on an anchor item and styles.
abstract_zh: 时尚推荐见证了研究的显着增长，特别是在购物外观、情境感知服装创作、个性化服装创作等领域。该领域的大部分工作侧重于更好地理解生活方式项目之间互补关系的概念。最近，一些作品意识到风格在时尚中起着至关重要的作用，尤其是在理解兼容性学习和服装创作方面。在本文中，我们希望提出一种方法的端到端设计，我们的目标是使用新颖的风格编码器网络生成以风格或主题为指导的服装。我们通过各种实验对我们的方法的不同方面进行了广泛的分析。我们还提供了一个演示 API 来展示我们根据锚定项目和样式生成服装的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端方法，通过新颖的风格编码器网络生成由风格或主题引导的兼容服装。
AI.motivation: 现有服装推荐研究多关注物品互补关系，但近期研究发现风格在时尚兼容性学习中起关键作用，需探索基于风格的生成方法。
AI.method: 设计包含风格编码器网络的端到端框架，通过实验分析方法不同方面，并提供基于锚定物品与风格的生成演示API。
AI.result: 实验验证了风格引导生成方法的有效性，API成功展示了根据输入物品和风格生成兼容服装的能力。
AI.conclusion: 风格编码器能有效指导服装生成，未来可优化风格表示或扩展至更多应用场景。

title: Skeptical binary inferences in multi-label problems with sets of probabilities
title_zh: 具有概率集的多标签问题中的怀疑二元推理
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of making distributionally robust, skeptical inferences for the multi-label problem, or more generally for Boolean vectors. By distributionally robust, we mean that we consider a set of possible probability distributions, and by skeptical we understand that we consider as valid only those inferences that are true for every distribution within this set. Such inferences will provide partial predictions whenever the considered set is sufficiently big. We study in particular the Hamming loss case, a common loss function in multi-label problems, showing how skeptical inferences can be made in this setting. Our experimental results are organised in three sections; (1) the first one indicates the gain computational obtained from our theoretical results by using synthetical data sets, (2) the second one indicates that our approaches produce relevant cautiousness on those hard-to-predict instances where its precise counterpart fails, and (3) the last one demonstrates experimentally how our approach copes with imperfect information (generated by a downsampling procedure) better than the partial abstention [31] and the rejection rules.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of making distributionally robust, skeptical inferences for the multi-label problem, or more generally for Boolean vectors. By distributionally robust, we mean that we consider a set of possible probability distributions, and by skeptical we understand that we consider as valid only those inferences that are true for every distribution within this set. Such inferences will provide partial predictions whenever the considered set is sufficiently big. We study in particular the Hamming loss case, a common loss function in multi-label problems, showing how skeptical inferences can be made in this setting. Our experimental results are organised in three sections; (1) the first one indicates the gain computational obtained from our theoretical results by using synthetical data sets, (2) the second one indicates that our approaches produce relevant cautiousness on those hard-to-predict instances where its precise counterpart fails, and (3) the last one demonstrates experimentally how our approach copes with imperfect information (generated by a downsampling procedure) better than the partial abstention [31] and the rejection rules.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑对多标签问题或更一般地对布尔向量进行分布鲁棒、怀疑性推断的问题。通过分布稳健，我们的意思是我们考虑一组可能的概率分布，而通过怀疑，我们理解我们只认为对于该集合中的每个分布都正确的那些推论是有效的。当考虑的集合足够大时，此类推论将提供部分预测。我们特别研究了汉明损失案例，这是多标签问题中的常见损失函数，展示了如何在这种情况下做出怀疑性推论。我们的实验结果分为三个部分； （1）第一个表示通过使用综合数据集从我们的理论结果中获得的增益计算，（2）第二个表示我们的方法对那些难以预测的情况产生了相关的谨慎，而其精确对应物失败了，（3）最后一个通过实验证明了我们的方法如何比部分弃权[31]和拒绝规则更好地处理不完美信息（由下采样过程生成）。

AI.tldr: 研究多标签问题中基于概率集的分布稳健怀疑推理方法，以提高预测的鲁棒性和谨慎性。
AI.motivation: 传统预测方法在不确定或不完美信息下可能失效，需要更稳健的怀疑推理方法来保证预测的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出基于概率集的分布稳健推理框架，结合汉明损失函数，通过理论分析和实验验证方法的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在计算效率、困难实例的谨慎预测及处理不完美信息方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了多标签预测的鲁棒性和谨慎性，为处理不确定信息提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Yeqi Gao,Zhao Song,Baocheng Sun,Omri Weinstein,Ruizhe Zhang
title: Improved Reconstruction for Fourier-Sparse Signals
title_zh: 傅里叶稀疏信号的改进重建
abstract: We revisit the classical problem of Fourier-sparse signal reconstruction -- a variant of the \emph{Set Query} problem -- which asks to efficiently reconstruct (a subset of) a $d$-dimensional Fourier-sparse signal ($\|\hat{x}(t)\|_0 \leq k$), from minimum \emph{noisy} samples of $x(t)$ in the time domain. We present a unified framework for this problem by developing a theory of sparse Fourier transforms (SFT) for frequencies lying on a \emph{lattice}, which can be viewed as a ``semi-continuous'' version of SFT in between discrete and continuous domains. Using this framework, we obtain the following results: $\bullet$ **Dimension-free Fourier sparse recovery** We present a sample-optimal discrete Fourier Set-Query algorithm with $O(k^{ω+1})$ reconstruction time in one dimension, \emph{independent} of the signal's length ($n$) and $\ell_\infty$-norm. This complements the state-of-art algorithm of [Kapralov, STOC 2017], whose reconstruction time is $\tilde{O}(k \log^2 n \log R^*)$, where $R^* \approx \|\hat{x}\|_\infty$ is a signal-dependent parameter, and the algorithm is limited to low dimensions. By contrast, our algorithm works for arbitrary $d$ dimensions, mitigating the $\exp(d)$ blowup in decoding time to merely linear in $d$. A key component in our algorithm is fast spectral sparsification of the Fourier basis. $\bullet$ **High-accuracy Fourier interpolation** In one dimension, we design a poly-time $(3+ \sqrt{2} +ε)$-approximation algorithm for continuous Fourier interpolation. This bypasses a barrier of all previous algorithms [Price and Song, FOCS 2015, Chen, Kane, Price and Song, FOCS 2016], which only achieve $c>100$ approximation for this basic problem. Our main contribution is a new analytic tool for hierarchical frequency decomposition based on \emph{noise cancellation}.

We present a unified framework for this problem by developing a theory of sparse Fourier transforms (SFT) for frequencies lying on a \emph{lattice}, which can be viewed as a ``semi-continuous'' version of SFT in between discrete and continuous domains. Using this framework, we obtain the following results: $\bullet$ **Dimension-free Fourier sparse recovery** We present a sample-optimal discrete Fourier Set-Query algorithm with $O(k^{ω+1})$ reconstruction time in one dimension, \emph{independent} of the signal's length ($n$) and $\ell_\infty$-norm. This complements the state-of-art algorithm of [Kapralov, STOC 2017], whose reconstruction time is $\tilde{O}(k \log^2 n \log R^*)$, where $R^* \approx \|\hat{x}\|_\infty$ is a signal-dependent parameter, and the algorithm is limited to low dimensions. By contrast, our algorithm works for arbitrary $d$ dimensions, mitigating the $\exp(d)$ blowup in decoding time to merely linear in $d$. A key component in our algorithm is fast spectral sparsification of the Fourier basis. $\bullet$ **High-accuracy Fourier interpolation** In one dimension, we design a poly-time $(3+ \sqrt{2} +ε)$-approximation algorithm for continuous Fourier interpolation. This bypasses a barrier of all previous algorithms [Price and Song, FOCS 2015, Chen, Kane, Price and Song, FOCS 2016], which only achieve $c>100$ approximation for this basic problem. Our main contribution is a new analytic tool for hierarchical frequency decomposition based on \emph{noise cancellation}.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视傅里叶稀疏信号重建的经典问题——\emph{Set Query}问题的一个变体——它要求从时域中$x(t)$的最小\emph{noisy}样本有效地重建$d$维傅里叶稀疏信号($\|\hat{x}(t)\|_0 \leq k$)。我们通过针对位于 \emph{格} 上的频率开发稀疏傅里叶变换 (SFT) 理论，为该问题提出了一个统一的框架，该理论可以被视为介于离散域和连续域之间的 SFT 的“半连续”版本。使用该框架，我们获得以下结果： $\bullet$ **无维傅里叶稀疏恢复** 我们提出了一种样本最优离散傅里叶集查询算法，在一维中具有 $O(k^{ω+1})$ 重建时间，\emph{独立}于信号长度 ($n$) 和 $\ell_\infty$-范数。这补充了 [Kapralov, STOC 2017] 的最先进算法，其重建时间为 $\tilde{O}(k \log^2 n \log R^*)$，其中 $R^* \approx \|\hat{x}\|_\infty$ 是信号相关参数，并且该算法仅限于低维度。相比之下，我们的算法适用于任意 $d$ 维度，将解码时间中的 $\exp(d)$ 膨胀减轻为 $d$ 中的线性。我们算法的一个关键组成部分是傅立叶基的快速谱稀疏化。 $\bullet$ **高精度傅里叶插值** 在一维中，我们设计了一种用于连续傅里叶插值的多时间$(3+ \sqrt{2} +ε)$近似算法。这绕过了所有先前算法的障碍 [Price and Song, FOCS 2015, Chen, Kane, Price and Song, FOCS 2016]，这些算法对于这个基本问题只能实现 $c>100$ 近似。我们的主要贡献是基于\emph{噪声消除}的分层频率分解的新分析工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的傅里叶稀疏信号重建框架，能够在高维空间和噪声环境下更高效地恢复信号。
AI.motivation: 现有傅里叶稀疏重建算法在高维场景下存在时间复杂度指数级增长、依赖信号长度及近似比低等问题，需设计更高效的通用方法。
AI.method: 构建基于晶格的半连续傅里叶稀疏变换理论，结合快速谱稀疏化与噪声消除的层次化频率分解技术。
AI.result: 实现与信号长度无关的高维稀疏恢复算法，时间复杂度降至O(k^{ω+1})；一维情况下连续傅里叶插值近似比突破至(3+√2+ε)。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在理论层面解决了高维傅里叶稀疏重建的效率瓶颈，为噪声环境下的信号处理提供了更优的算法基础。

search_text: Improved Reconstruction for Fourier-Sparse Signals 傅里叶稀疏信号的改进重建 We revisit the classical problem of Fourier-sparse signal reconstruction -- a variant of the \emph{Set Query} problem -- which asks to efficiently reconstruct (a subset of) a $d$-dimensional Fourier-sparse signal ($\|\hat{x}(t)\|_0 \leq k$), from minimum \emph{noisy} samples of $x(t)$ in the time domain. We present a unified framework for this problem by developing a theory of sparse Fourier transforms (SFT) for frequencies lying on a \emph{lattice}, which can be viewed as a ``semi-continuous'' version of SFT in between discrete and continuous domains. Using this framework, we obtain the following results: $\bullet$ **Dimension-free Fourier sparse recovery** We present a sample-optimal discrete Fourier Set-Query algorithm with $O(k^{ω+1})$ reconstruction time in one dimension, \emph{independent} of the signal's length ($n$) and $\ell_\infty$-norm. This complements the state-of-art algorithm of [Kapralov, STOC 2017], whose reconstruction time is $\tilde{O}(k \log^2 n \log R^*)$, where $R^* \approx \|\hat{x}\|_\infty$ is a signal-dependent parameter, and the algorithm is limited to low dimensions. By contrast, our algorithm works for arbitrary $d$ dimensions, mitigating the $\exp(d)$ blowup in decoding time to merely linear in $d$. A key component in our algorithm is fast spectral sparsification of the Fourier basis. $\bullet$ **High-accuracy Fourier interpolation** In one dimension, we design a poly-time $(3+ \sqrt{2} +ε)$-approximation algorithm for continuous Fourier interpolation. This bypasses a barrier of all previous algorithms [Price and Song, FOCS 2015, Chen, Kane, Price and Song, FOCS 2016], which only achieve $c>100$ approximation for this basic problem. Our main contribution is a new analytic tool for hierarchical frequency decomposition based on \emph{noise cancellation}. 我们重新审视傅里叶稀疏信号重建的经典问题——\emph{Set Query}问题的一个变体——它要求从时域中$x(t)$的最小\emph{noisy}样本有效地重建$d$维傅里叶稀疏信号($\|\hat{x}(t)\|_0 \leq k$)。我们通过针对位于 \emph{格} 上的频率开发稀疏傅里叶变换 (SFT) 理论，为该问题提出了一个统一的框架，该理论可以被视为介于离散域和连续域之间的 SFT 的“半连续”版本。使用该框架，我们获得以下结果： $\bullet$ **无维傅里叶稀疏恢复** 我们提出了一种样本最优离散傅里叶集查询算法，在一维中具有 $O(k^{ω+1})$ 重建时间，\emph{独立}于信号长度 ($n$) 和 $\ell_\infty$-范数。这补充了 [Kapralov, STOC 2017] 的最先进算法，其重建时间为 $\tilde{O}(k \log^2 n \log R^*)$，其中 $R^* \approx \|\hat{x}\|_\infty$ 是信号相关参数，并且该算法仅限于低维度。相比之下，我们的算法适用于任意 $d$ 维度，将解码时间中的 $\exp(d)$ 膨胀减轻为 $d$ 中的线性。我们算法的一个关键组成部分是傅立叶基的快速谱稀疏化。 $\bullet$ **高精度傅里叶插值** 在一维中，我们设计了一种用于连续傅里叶插值的多时间$(3+ \sqrt{2} +ε)$近似算法。这绕过了所有先前算法的障碍 [Price and Song, FOCS 2015, Chen, Kane, Price and Song, FOCS 2016]，这些算法对于这个基本问题只能实现 $c>100$ 近似。我们的主要贡献是基于\emph{噪声消除}的分层频率分解的新分析工具。 本文提出了一种改进的傅里叶稀疏信号重建框架，能够在高维空间和噪声环境下更高效地恢复信号。 Yeqi Gao,Zhao Song,Baocheng Sun,Omri Weinstein,Ruizhe Zhang cs.DS

title: Sequence Learning and Consolidation on Loihi using On-chip Plasticity
title_zh: 使用片上可塑性对 Loihi 进行序列学习和巩固
abstract: In this work we develop a model of predictive learning on neuromorphic hardware. Our model uses the on-chip plasticity capabilities of the Loihi chip to remember observed sequences of events and use this memory to generate predictions of future events in real time. Given the locality constraints of on-chip plasticity rules, generating predictions without interfering with the ongoing learning process is nontrivial. We address this challenge with a memory consolidation approach inspired by hippocampal replay. Sequence memory is stored in an initial memory module using spike-timing dependent plasticity. Later, during an offline period, memories are consolidated into a distinct prediction module. This second module is then able to represent predicted future events without interfering with the activity, and plasticity, in the first module, enabling online comparison between predictions and ground-truth observations. Our model serves as a proof-of-concept that online predictive learning models can be deployed on neuromorphic hardware with on-chip plasticity.
summary: In this work we develop a model of predictive learning on neuromorphic hardware. Our model uses the on-chip plasticity capabilities of the Loihi chip to remember observed sequences of events and use this memory to generate predictions of future events in real time. Given the locality constraints of on-chip plasticity rules, generating predictions without interfering with the ongoing learning process is nontrivial. We address this challenge with a memory consolidation approach inspired by hippocampal replay. Sequence memory is stored in an initial memory module using spike-timing dependent plasticity. Later, during an offline period, memories are consolidated into a distinct prediction module. This second module is then able to represent predicted future events without interfering with the activity, and plasticity, in the first module, enabling online comparison between predictions and ground-truth observations. Our model serves as a proof-of-concept that online predictive learning models can be deployed on neuromorphic hardware with on-chip plasticity.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们开发了一种神经形态硬件上的预测学习模型。我们的模型使用 Loihi 芯片的片上可塑性功能来记住观察到的事件序列，并使用该内存实时生成对未来事件的预测。考虑到片上可塑性规则的局部性限制，在不干扰正在进行的学习过程的情况下生成预测是很重要的。我们通过受海马体重放启发的记忆巩固方法来应对这一挑战。使用尖峰时序相关可塑性将序列存储器存储在初始存储器模块中。随后，在离线期间，记忆被整合到一个不同的预测模块中。然后，第二个模块能够表示预测的未来事件，而不干扰第一个模块中的活动和可塑性，从而实现预测与地面实况观察之间的在线比较。我们的模型作为概念验证，证明在线预测学习模型可以部署在具有片上可塑性的神经形态硬件上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Loihi芯片的在线预测学习模型，利用片上可塑性实现事件序列记忆与未来事件预测。
AI.motivation: 解决片上可塑性规则下生成预测时避免干扰持续学习过程的挑战，借鉴海马体回放机制实现记忆巩固。
AI.method: 采用尖峰时间依赖可塑性（STDP）在初始记忆模块存储序列，通过离线期将记忆巩固至独立预测模块，实现预测与学习的非干扰并行。
AI.result: 验证了在线预测学习模型可部署于具备片上可塑性的神经形态硬件，实现了预测与真实观测的实时对比。
AI.conclusion: 该模型证明了神经形态硬件支持在线预测学习的可行性，为类脑计算系统提供了新的实现范式。

authors_text: Yaxin Li,Xiaorui Liu,Han Xu,Wentao Wang,Jiliang Tang
title: Enhancing Adversarial Training with Feature Separability
title_zh: 通过特征可分离性增强对抗训练
abstract: Deep Neural Network (DNN) are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. As a countermeasure, adversarial training aims to achieve robustness based on the min-max optimization problem and it has shown to be one of the most effective defense strategies. However, in this work, we found that compared with natural training, adversarial training fails to learn better feature representations for either clean or adversarial samples, which can be one reason why adversarial training tends to have severe overfitting issues and less satisfied generalize performance. Specifically, we observe two major shortcomings of the features learned by existing adversarial training methods:(1) low intra-class feature similarity; and (2) conservative inter-classes feature variance. To overcome these shortcomings, we introduce a new concept of adversarial training graph (ATG) with which the proposed adversarial training with feature separability (ATFS) enables to coherently boost the intra-class feature similarity and increase inter-class feature variance. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that the proposed ATFS framework significantly improves both clean and robust performance.
summary: Deep Neural Network (DNN) are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. As a countermeasure, adversarial training aims to achieve robustness based on the min-max optimization problem and it has shown to be one of the most effective defense strategies. However, in this work, we found that compared with natural training, adversarial training fails to learn better feature representations for either clean or adversarial samples, which can be one reason why adversarial training tends to have severe overfitting issues and less satisfied generalize performance. Specifically, we observe two major shortcomings of the features learned by existing adversarial training methods:(1) low intra-class feature similarity; and (2) conservative inter-classes feature variance. To overcome these shortcomings, we introduce a new concept of adversarial training graph (ATG) with which the proposed adversarial training with feature separability (ATFS) enables to coherently boost the intra-class feature similarity and increase inter-class feature variance. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that the proposed ATFS framework significantly improves both clean and robust performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性攻击。作为一种对策，对抗性训练旨在实现基于最小-最大优化问题的鲁棒性，并且它已被证明是最有效的防御策略之一。然而，在这项工作中，我们发现与自然训练相比，对抗训练无法为干净样本或对抗样本学习更好的特征表示，这可能是对抗训练往往存在严重过拟合问题和不太令人满意的泛化性能的原因之一。具体来说，我们观察到现有对抗训练方法学习到的特征有两个主要缺点：（1）类内特征相似度低； (2)保守的类间特征方差。为了克服这些缺点，我们引入了对抗训练图（ATG）的新概念，提出的具有特征可分离性的对抗训练（ATFS）能够连贯地提高类内特征相似性并增加类间特征方差。通过全面的实验，我们证明了所提出的 ATFS 框架显着提高了干净和鲁棒的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强对抗训练的方法，通过提高特征可分离性来提升模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的对抗训练方法在学习特征表示时存在两个主要问题：类内特征相似度低和类间特征方差保守，导致模型容易过拟合且泛化性能不足。
AI.method: 本文引入了对抗训练图（ATG）的概念，并提出了基于特征可分离性的对抗训练框架（ATFS），以增强类内特征相似性和类间特征方差。
AI.result: 通过全面的实验验证，ATFS框架显著提升了模型在干净样本和对抗样本上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的ATFS方法有效解决了现有对抗训练方法在特征学习上的不足，显著提升了模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
