search_text: Enhancing Adversarial Training with Feature Separability 通过特征可分离性增强对抗训练 Deep Neural Network (DNN) are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. As a countermeasure, adversarial training aims to achieve robustness based on the min-max optimization problem and it has shown to be one of the most effective defense strategies. However, in this work, we found that compared with natural training, adversarial training fails to learn better feature representations for either clean or adversarial samples, which can be one reason why adversarial training tends to have severe overfitting issues and less satisfied generalize performance. Specifically, we observe two major shortcomings of the features learned by existing adversarial training methods:(1) low intra-class feature similarity; and (2) conservative inter-classes feature variance. To overcome these shortcomings, we introduce a new concept of adversarial training graph (ATG) with which the proposed adversarial training with feature separability (ATFS) enables to coherently boost the intra-class feature similarity and increase inter-class feature variance. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that the proposed ATFS framework significantly improves both clean and robust performance. 深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性攻击。作为一种对策，对抗性训练旨在实现基于最小-最大优化问题的鲁棒性，并且它已被证明是最有效的防御策略之一。然而，在这项工作中，我们发现与自然训练相比，对抗训练无法为干净样本或对抗样本学习更好的特征表示，这可能是对抗训练往往存在严重过拟合问题和不太令人满意的泛化性能的原因之一。具体来说，我们观察到现有对抗训练方法学习到的特征有两个主要缺点：（1）类内特征相似度低； (2)保守的类间特征方差。为了克服这些缺点，我们引入了对抗训练图（ATG）的新概念，提出的具有特征可分离性的对抗训练（ATFS）能够连贯地提高类内特征相似性并增加类间特征方差。通过全面的实验，我们证明了所提出的 ATFS 框架显着提高了干净和鲁棒的性能。 本文提出了一种增强对抗训练的方法，通过提高特征可分离性来提升模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。 Yaxin Li,Xiaorui Liu,Han Xu,Wentao Wang,Jiliang Tang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Thuan N. A. Trang,Thieu N. Vo,Khuong D. Nguyen
title: Design equivariant neural networks for 3D point cloud
title_zh: 设计 3D 点云的等变神经网络
abstract: This work seeks to improve the generalization and robustness of existing neural networks for 3D point clouds by inducing group equivariance under general group transformations. The main challenge when designing equivariant models for point clouds is how to trade-off the performance of the model and the complexity. Existing equivariant models are either too complicate to implement or very high complexity. The main aim of this study is to build a general procedure to introduce group equivariant property to SOTA models for 3D point clouds. The group equivariant models built form our procedure are simple to implement, less complexity in comparison with the existing ones, and they preserve the strengths of the original SOTA backbone. From the results of the experiments on object classification, it is shown that our methods are superior to other group equivariant models in performance and complexity. Moreover, our method also helps to improve the mIoU of semantic segmentation models. Overall, by using a combination of only-finite-rotation equivariance and augmentation, our models can outperform existing full $SO(3)$-equivariance models with much cheaper complexity and GPU memory. The proposed procedure is general and forms a fundamental approach to group equivariant neural networks. We believe that it can be easily adapted to other SOTA models in the future.
summary: This work seeks to improve the generalization and robustness of existing neural networks for 3D point clouds by inducing group equivariance under general group transformations. The main challenge when designing equivariant models for point clouds is how to trade-off the performance of the model and the complexity. Existing equivariant models are either too complicate to implement or very high complexity. The main aim of this study is to build a general procedure to introduce group equivariant property to SOTA models for 3D point clouds. The group equivariant models built form our procedure are simple to implement, less complexity in comparison with the existing ones, and they preserve the strengths of the original SOTA backbone. From the results of the experiments on object classification, it is shown that our methods are superior to other group equivariant models in performance and complexity. Moreover, our method also helps to improve the mIoU of semantic segmentation models. Overall, by using a combination of only-finite-rotation equivariance and augmentation, our models can outperform existing full $SO(3)$-equivariance models with much cheaper complexity and GPU memory. The proposed procedure is general and forms a fundamental approach to group equivariant neural networks. We believe that it can be easily adapted to other SOTA models in the future.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在通过在一般组变换下引入组等方差来提高现有 3D 点云神经网络的泛化性和鲁棒性。设计点云等变模型时的主要挑战是如何权衡模型的性能和复杂性。现有的等变模型要么太复杂而难以实现，要么非常复杂。本研究的主要目的是建立一个通用程序，将群等变属性引入 3D 点云的 SOTA 模型。根据我们的程序构建的组等变模型易于实现，与现有模型相比复杂性较低，并且保留了原始 SOTA 主干的优势。从对象分类的实验结果来看，我们的方法在性能和复杂性上优于其他组等变模型。此外，我们的方法还有助于提高语义分割模型的 mIoU。总体而言，通过使用有限旋转等方差和增强的组合，我们的模型可以优于现有的完整 $SO(3)$ 等方差模型，并且复杂性和 GPU 内存要便宜得多。所提出的过程是通用的，形成了组等变神经网络的基本方法。我们相信它将来可以轻松适应其他 SOTA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过引入群等变性提升3D点云神经网络的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有等变模型要么实现复杂度高，要么计算复杂度大，难以平衡性能与效率。
AI.method: 提出一种通用方法，在保持SOTA模型优势的基础上，通过有限旋转等变性与数据增强降低复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在目标分类任务中优于现有等变模型，同时提升语义分割的mIoU指标，且复杂度和显存占用更低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建高效等变神经网络提供了基础框架，可扩展至其他SOTA模型。

title: Re-defining Radiology Quality Assurance (QA) -- Artificial Intelligence (AI)-Based QA by Restricted Investigation of Unequal Scores (AQUARIUS)
title_zh: 重新定义放射学质量保证 (QA)——通过不等分限制调查进行基于人工智能 (AI) 的 QA (AQUARIUS)
abstract: There is an urgent need for streamlining radiology Quality Assurance (QA) programs to make them better and faster. Here, we present a novel approach, Artificial Intelligence (AI)-Based QUality Assurance by Restricted Investigation of Unequal Scores (AQUARIUS), for re-defining radiology QA, which reduces human effort by up to several orders of magnitude over existing approaches. AQUARIUS typically includes automatic comparison of AI-based image analysis with natural language processing (NLP) on radiology reports. Only the usually small subset of cases with discordant reads is subsequently reviewed by human experts. To demonstrate the clinical applicability of AQUARIUS, we performed a clinical QA study on Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) detection in 1936 head CT scans from a large academic hospital. Immediately following image acquisition, scans were automatically analyzed for ICH using a commercially available software (Aidoc, Tel Aviv, Israel). Cases rated positive for ICH by AI (ICH-AI+) were automatically flagged in radiologists' reading worklists, where flagging was randomly switched off with probability 50%. Using AQUARIUS with NLP on final radiology reports and targeted expert neuroradiology review of only 29 discordantly classified cases reduced the human QA effort by 98.5%, where we found a total of six non-reported true ICH+ cases, with radiologists' missed ICH detection rates of 0.52% and 2.5% for flagged and non-flagged cases, respectively. We conclude that AQUARIUS, by combining AI-based image analysis with NLP-based pre-selection of cases for targeted human expert review, can efficiently identify missed findings in radiology studies and significantly expedite radiology QA programs in a hybrid human-machine interoperability approach.
summary: There is an urgent need for streamlining radiology Quality Assurance (QA) programs to make them better and faster. Here, we present a novel approach, Artificial Intelligence (AI)-Based QUality Assurance by Restricted Investigation of Unequal Scores (AQUARIUS), for re-defining radiology QA, which reduces human effort by up to several orders of magnitude over existing approaches. AQUARIUS typically includes automatic comparison of AI-based image analysis with natural language processing (NLP) on radiology reports. Only the usually small subset of cases with discordant reads is subsequently reviewed by human experts. To demonstrate the clinical applicability of AQUARIUS, we performed a clinical QA study on Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) detection in 1936 head CT scans from a large academic hospital. Immediately following image acquisition, scans were automatically analyzed for ICH using a commercially available software (Aidoc, Tel Aviv, Israel). Cases rated positive for ICH by AI (ICH-AI+) were automatically flagged in radiologists' reading worklists, where flagging was randomly switched off with probability 50%. Using AQUARIUS with NLP on final radiology reports and targeted expert neuroradiology review of only 29 discordantly classified cases reduced the human QA effort by 98.5%, where we found a total of six non-reported true ICH+ cases, with radiologists' missed ICH detection rates of 0.52% and 2.5% for flagged and non-flagged cases, respectively. We conclude that AQUARIUS, by combining AI-based image analysis with NLP-based pre-selection of cases for targeted human expert review, can efficiently identify missed findings in radiology studies and significantly expedite radiology QA programs in a hybrid human-machine interoperability approach.
abstract_zh: 迫切需要简化放射学质量保证 (QA) 计划，使其更好、更快。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，即通过不等分限制调查进行基于人工智能 (AI) 的质量保证 (AQUARIUS)，用于重新定义放射学 QA，与现有方法相比，该方法可减少人类工作量达几个数量级。 AQUARIUS 通常包括基于人工智能的图像分析与放射学报告上的自然语言处理 (NLP) 的自动比较。随后，只有一小部分具有不一致读数的案例才会由人类专家进行审查。为了证明 AQUARIUS 的临床适用性，我们对一家大型学术医院 1936 年头部 CT 扫描中的颅内出血 (ICH) 检测进行了临床 QA 研究。图像采集后，立即使用市售软件（Aidoc，特拉维夫，以色列）自动分析扫描结果的 ICH。被 AI (ICH-AI+) 评为 ICH 阳性的病例会在放射科医生的阅读工作列表中自动标记，其中标记以 50% 的概率随机关闭。在最终放射学报告中使用 AQUARIUS 和 NLP 以及仅对 29 个分类不一致的病例进行有针对性的专家神经放射学审查，将人类 QA 工作减少了 98.5%，其中我们发现总共有 6 个未报告的真实 ICH+ 病例，对于标记病例和未标记病例，放射科医生的 ICH 漏检率分别为 0.52% 和 2.5%。我们得出的结论是，AQUARIUS 通过将基于 AI 的图像分析与基于 NLP 的病例预选相结合以进行有针对性的人类专家审查，可以有效地识别放射学研究中遗漏的发现，并以混合人机互操作性方法显着加快放射学 QA 程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合人工智能（AI）与自然语言处理（NLP）的放射学质量保证新方法AQUARIUS，通过自动筛选争议案例大幅减少人工审核工作量。
AI.motivation: 传统放射学质量保证流程耗时且效率低下，需开发更高效的人机协作方法以提升诊断准确性并降低人力成本。
AI.method: 利用AI分析头颅CT影像检测颅内出血（ICH），结合NLP解析报告并自动标记可疑病例；仅对AI与人工判断不一致的少量案例进行专家复核。
AI.result: 在1936例CT扫描中，AQUARIUS使人工审核工作量减少98.5%，发现6例未报告的ICH病例，AI标记组漏诊率0.52%，未标记组为2.5%。
AI.conclusion: AQUARIUS通过AI与NLP的协同筛选，能高效识别漏诊病例，显著加速放射学质量保证流程，实现人机协作的优化诊断。

conclusion: AQUARIUS通过AI与NLP的协同筛选，能高效识别漏诊病例，显著加速放射学质量保证流程，实现人机协作的优化诊断。
search_text: Re-defining Radiology Quality Assurance (QA) -- Artificial Intelligence (AI)-Based QA by Restricted Investigation of Unequal Scores (AQUARIUS) 重新定义放射学质量保证 (QA)——通过不等分限制调查进行基于人工智能 (AI) 的 QA (AQUARIUS) There is an urgent need for streamlining radiology Quality Assurance (QA) programs to make them better and faster. Here, we present a novel approach, Artificial Intelligence (AI)-Based QUality Assurance by Restricted Investigation of Unequal Scores (AQUARIUS), for re-defining radiology QA, which reduces human effort by up to several orders of magnitude over existing approaches. AQUARIUS typically includes automatic comparison of AI-based image analysis with natural language processing (NLP) on radiology reports. Only the usually small subset of cases with discordant reads is subsequently reviewed by human experts. To demonstrate the clinical applicability of AQUARIUS, we performed a clinical QA study on Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) detection in 1936 head CT scans from a large academic hospital. Immediately following image acquisition, scans were automatically analyzed for ICH using a commercially available software (Aidoc, Tel Aviv, Israel). Cases rated positive for ICH by AI (ICH-AI+) were automatically flagged in radiologists' reading worklists, where flagging was randomly switched off with probability 50%. Using AQUARIUS with NLP on final radiology reports and targeted expert neuroradiology review of only 29 discordantly classified cases reduced the human QA effort by 98.5%, where we found a total of six non-reported true ICH+ cases, with radiologists' missed ICH detection rates of 0.52% and 2.5% for flagged and non-flagged cases, respectively. We conclude that AQUARIUS, by combining AI-based image analysis with NLP-based pre-selection of cases for targeted human expert review, can efficiently identify missed findings in radiology studies and significantly expedite radiology QA programs in a hybrid human-machine interoperability approach. 迫切需要简化放射学质量保证 (QA) 计划，使其更好、更快。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，即通过不等分限制调查进行基于人工智能 (AI) 的质量保证 (AQUARIUS)，用于重新定义放射学 QA，与现有方法相比，该方法可减少人类工作量达几个数量级。 AQUARIUS 通常包括基于人工智能的图像分析与放射学报告上的自然语言处理 (NLP) 的自动比较。随后，只有一小部分具有不一致读数的案例才会由人类专家进行审查。为了证明 AQUARIUS 的临床适用性，我们对一家大型学术医院 1936 年头部 CT 扫描中的颅内出血 (ICH) 检测进行了临床 QA 研究。图像采集后，立即使用市售软件（Aidoc，特拉维夫，以色列）自动分析扫描结果的 ICH。被 AI (ICH-AI+) 评为 ICH 阳性的病例会在放射科医生的阅读工作列表中自动标记，其中标记以 50% 的概率随机关闭。在最终放射学报告中使用 AQUARIUS 和 NLP 以及仅对 29 个分类不一致的病例进行有针对性的专家神经放射学审查，将人类 QA 工作减少了 98.5%，其中我们发现总共有 6 个未报告的真实 ICH+ 病例，对于标记病例和未标记病例，放射科医生的 ICH 漏检率分别为 0.52% 和 2.5%。我们得出的结论是，AQUARIUS 通过将基于 AI 的图像分析与基于 NLP 的病例预选相结合以进行有针对性的人类专家审查，可以有效地识别放射学研究中遗漏的发现，并以混合人机互操作性方法显着加快放射学 QA 程序。 本文提出一种结合人工智能（AI）与自然语言处理（NLP）的放射学质量保证新方法AQUARIUS，通过自动筛选争议案例大幅减少人工审核工作量。 Axel Wismueller,Larry Stockmaster,Ali Vosoughi cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Apurva Patil,Alfredo Duarte,Aislinn Smith,Takashi Tanaka,Fabrizio Bisetti
title: Chance-Constrained Stochastic Optimal Control via Path Integral and Finite Difference Methods
title_zh: 通过路径积分和有限差分方法的机会约束随机最优控制
abstract: This paper addresses a continuous-time continuous-space chance-constrained stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem via a Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) partial differential equation (PDE). Through Lagrangian relaxation, we convert the chance-constrained (risk-constrained) SOC problem to a risk-minimizing SOC problem, the cost function of which possesses the time-additive Bellman structure. We show that the risk-minimizing control synthesis is equivalent to solving an HJB PDE whose boundary condition can be tuned appropriately to achieve a desired level of safety. Furthermore, it is shown that the proposed risk-minimizing control problem can be viewed as a generalization of the problem of estimating the risk associated with a given control policy. Two numerical techniques are explored, namely the path integral and the finite difference method (FDM), to solve a class of risk-minimizing SOC problems whose associated HJB equation is linearizable via the Cole-Hopf transformation. Using a 2D robot navigation example, we validate the proposed control synthesis framework and compare the solutions obtained using path integral and FDM.
summary: This paper addresses a continuous-time continuous-space chance-constrained stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem via a Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) partial differential equation (PDE). Through Lagrangian relaxation, we convert the chance-constrained (risk-constrained) SOC problem to a risk-minimizing SOC problem, the cost function of which possesses the time-additive Bellman structure. We show that the risk-minimizing control synthesis is equivalent to solving an HJB PDE whose boundary condition can be tuned appropriately to achieve a desired level of safety. Furthermore, it is shown that the proposed risk-minimizing control problem can be viewed as a generalization of the problem of estimating the risk associated with a given control policy. Two numerical techniques are explored, namely the path integral and the finite difference method (FDM), to solve a class of risk-minimizing SOC problems whose associated HJB equation is linearizable via the Cole-Hopf transformation. Using a 2D robot navigation example, we validate the proposed control synthesis framework and compare the solutions obtained using path integral and FDM.
abstract_zh: 本文通过 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) 偏微分方程 (PDE) 解决连续时间连续空间机会约束随机最优控制 (SOC) 问题。通过拉格朗日松弛，我们将机会约束（风险约束）的SOC问题转化为风险最小化的SOC问题，其成本函数具有时间可加的Bellman结构。我们证明，风险最小化控制综合相当于求解 HJB 偏微分方程，其边界条件可以适当调整以达到所需的安全水平。此外，结果表明，所提出的风险最小化控制问题可以被视为估计与给定控制策略相关的风险问题的概括。探索了两种数值技术，即路径积分和有限差分法 (FDM)，来解决一类风险最小化 SOC 问题，其相关的 HJB 方程可通过 Cole-Hopf 变换线性化。使用 2D 机器人导航示例，我们验证了所提出的控制综合框架，并比较了使用路径积分和 FDM 获得的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文通过哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼方程解决连续时间连续空间的随机最优控制问题，提出基于路径积分和有限差分法的数值求解方法。
AI.motivation: 传统随机最优控制方法难以直接处理机会约束（风险约束），需将其转化为风险最小化问题以实现安全控制目标。
AI.method: 采用拉格朗日松弛法将机会约束问题转化为风险最小化问题，通过Cole-Hopf变换线性化HJB方程，结合路径积分和有限差分法进行数值求解。
AI.result: 在二维机器人导航案例中验证了控制框架的有效性，比较了路径积分与有限差分法的求解效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制合成框架能够有效处理机会约束问题，数值方法为解决相关HJB方程提供了可行途径。

authors_text: Yuqian Chen,Chaoyi Zhang,Tengfei Xue,Yang Song,Nikos Makris,Yogesh Rathi,Weidong Cai,Fan Zhang,Lauren J. O'Donnell
title: Deep fiber clustering: Anatomically informed fiber clustering with self-supervised deep learning for fast and effective tractography parcellation
title_zh: 深度纤维聚类：具有自监督深度学习的解剖学纤维聚类，可实现快速有效的纤维束成像分割
abstract: White matter fiber clustering is an important strategy for white matter parcellation, which enables quantitative analysis of brain connections in health and disease. In combination with expert neuroanatomical labeling, data-driven white matter fiber clustering is a powerful tool for creating atlases that can model white matter anatomy across individuals. While widely used fiber clustering approaches have shown good performance using classical unsupervised machine learning techniques, recent advances in deep learning reveal a promising direction toward fast and effective fiber clustering. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning framework for white matter fiber clustering, Deep Fiber Clustering (DFC), which solves the unsupervised clustering problem as a self-supervised learning task with a domain-specific pretext task to predict pairwise fiber distances. This process learns a high-dimensional embedding feature representation for each fiber, regardless of the order of fiber points reconstructed during tractography. We design a novel network architecture that represents input fibers as point clouds and allows the incorporation of additional sources of input information from gray matter parcellation to improve anatomical coherence of clusters. In addition, DFC conducts outlier removal naturally by rejecting fibers with low cluster assignment probability. We evaluate DFC on three independently acquired cohorts, including data from 220 individuals across genders, ages (young and elderly adults), and different health conditions (healthy control and multiple neuropsychiatric disorders). We compare DFC to several state-of-the-art white matter fiber clustering algorithms. Experimental results demonstrate superior performance of DFC in terms of cluster compactness, generalization ability, anatomical coherence, and computational efficiency.
summary: White matter fiber clustering is an important strategy for white matter parcellation, which enables quantitative analysis of brain connections in health and disease. In combination with expert neuroanatomical labeling, data-driven white matter fiber clustering is a powerful tool for creating atlases that can model white matter anatomy across individuals. While widely used fiber clustering approaches have shown good performance using classical unsupervised machine learning techniques, recent advances in deep learning reveal a promising direction toward fast and effective fiber clustering. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning framework for white matter fiber clustering, Deep Fiber Clustering (DFC), which solves the unsupervised clustering problem as a self-supervised learning task with a domain-specific pretext task to predict pairwise fiber distances. This process learns a high-dimensional embedding feature representation for each fiber, regardless of the order of fiber points reconstructed during tractography. We design a novel network architecture that represents input fibers as point clouds and allows the incorporation of additional sources of input information from gray matter parcellation to improve anatomical coherence of clusters. In addition, DFC conducts outlier removal naturally by rejecting fibers with low cluster assignment probability. We evaluate DFC on three independently acquired cohorts, including data from 220 individuals across genders, ages (young and elderly adults), and different health conditions (healthy control and multiple neuropsychiatric disorders). We compare DFC to several state-of-the-art white matter fiber clustering algorithms. Experimental results demonstrate superior performance of DFC in terms of cluster compactness, generalization ability, anatomical coherence, and computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: 白质纤维聚类是白质分割的重要策略，可以定量分析健康和疾病中的大脑连接。与专家神经解剖学标记相结合，数据驱动的白质纤维聚类是创建可以模拟个体白质解剖结构的图谱的强大工具。虽然广泛使用的纤维聚类方法在使用经典的无监督机器学习技术时表现出了良好的性能，但深度学习的最新进展揭示了快​​速有效的纤维聚类的有希望的方向。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于白质纤维聚类的新型深度学习框架，即深度纤维聚类（DFC），它将无监督聚类问题作为自监督学习任务来解决，并通过特定领域的借口任务来预测成对纤维距离。该过程学习每个纤维的高维嵌入特征表示，无论纤维束成像期间重建的纤维点的顺序如何。我们设计了一种新颖的网络架构，将输入纤维表示为点云，并允许合并来自灰质分割的额外输入信息源，以提高簇的解剖一致性。此外，DFC 通过拒绝具有低聚类分配概率的纤维来自然地进行离群值去除。我们在三个独立获得的队列中评估了 DFC，包括来自 220 名不同性别、年龄（年轻人和老年人）和不同健康状况（健康控制和多种神经精神疾病）的个体的数据。我们将 DFC 与几种最先进的白质纤维聚类算法进行比较。实验结果表明，DFC 在簇紧凑性、泛化能力、解剖一致性和计算效率方面具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督深度学习的白质纤维聚类框架Deep Fiber Clustering (DFC)，用于快速有效的白质束分割。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督机器学习方法在白质纤维聚类中存在效率和解剖学一致性不足的问题，需结合专家神经解剖学标签与数据驱动方法提升白质图谱构建能力。
AI.method: DFC将无监督聚类转化为自监督学习任务，通过预测纤维对距离的领域特定预训练任务学习高维嵌入特征，采用点云表示纤维并整合灰质分割信息，同时通过低概率纤维剔除实现异常值处理。
AI.result: 在包含220名不同性别、年龄和健康状态个体的三组独立数据集上，DFC在聚类紧致性、泛化能力、解剖一致性及计算效率方面均优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: DFC为白质纤维聚类提供了新颖高效的解决方案，通过自监督深度学习与解剖学信息融合，显著提升了脑连接量化分析的准确性与可解释性。

method: DFC将无监督聚类转化为自监督学习任务，通过预测纤维对距离的领域特定预训练任务学习高维嵌入特征，采用点云表示纤维并整合灰质分割信息，同时通过低概率纤维剔除实现异常值处理。
result: 在包含220名不同性别、年龄和健康状态个体的三组独立数据集上，DFC在聚类紧致性、泛化能力、解剖一致性及计算效率方面均优于现有先进算法。
conclusion: DFC为白质纤维聚类提供了新颖高效的解决方案，通过自监督深度学习与解剖学信息融合，显著提升了脑连接量化分析的准确性与可解释性。
search_text: Deep fiber clustering: Anatomically informed fiber clustering with self-supervised deep learning for fast and effective tractography parcellation 深度纤维聚类：具有自监督深度学习的解剖学纤维聚类，可实现快速有效的纤维束成像分割 White matter fiber clustering is an important strategy for white matter parcellation, which enables quantitative analysis of brain connections in health and disease. In combination with expert neuroanatomical labeling, data-driven white matter fiber clustering is a powerful tool for creating atlases that can model white matter anatomy across individuals. While widely used fiber clustering approaches have shown good performance using classical unsupervised machine learning techniques, recent advances in deep learning reveal a promising direction toward fast and effective fiber clustering. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning framework for white matter fiber clustering, Deep Fiber Clustering (DFC), which solves the unsupervised clustering problem as a self-supervised learning task with a domain-specific pretext task to predict pairwise fiber distances. This process learns a high-dimensional embedding feature representation for each fiber, regardless of the order of fiber points reconstructed during tractography. We design a novel network architecture that represents input fibers as point clouds and allows the incorporation of additional sources of input information from gray matter parcellation to improve anatomical coherence of clusters. In addition, DFC conducts outlier removal naturally by rejecting fibers with low cluster assignment probability. We evaluate DFC on three independently acquired cohorts, including data from 220 individuals across genders, ages (young and elderly adults), and different health conditions (healthy control and multiple neuropsychiatric disorders). We compare DFC to several state-of-the-art white matter fiber clustering algorithms. Experimental results demonstrate superior performance of DFC in terms of cluster compactness, generalization ability, anatomical coherence, and computational efficiency. 白质纤维聚类是白质分割的重要策略，可以定量分析健康和疾病中的大脑连接。与专家神经解剖学标记相结合，数据驱动的白质纤维聚类是创建可以模拟个体白质解剖结构的图谱的强大工具。虽然广泛使用的纤维聚类方法在使用经典的无监督机器学习技术时表现出了良好的性能，但深度学习的最新进展揭示了快​​速有效的纤维聚类的有希望的方向。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于白质纤维聚类的新型深度学习框架，即深度纤维聚类（DFC），它将无监督聚类问题作为自监督学习任务来解决，并通过特定领域的借口任务来预测成对纤维距离。该过程学习每个纤维的高维嵌入特征表示，无论纤维束成像期间重建的纤维点的顺序如何。我们设计了一种新颖的网络架构，将输入纤维表示为点云，并允许合并来自灰质分割的额外输入信息源，以提高簇的解剖一致性。此外，DFC 通过拒绝具有低聚类分配概率的纤维来自然地进行离群值去除。我们在三个独立获得的队列中评估了 DFC，包括来自 220 名不同性别、年龄（年轻人和老年人）和不同健康状况（健康控制和多种神经精神疾病）的个体的数据。我们将 DFC 与几种最先进的白质纤维聚类算法进行比较。实验结果表明，DFC 在簇紧凑性、泛化能力、解剖一致性和计算效率方面具有优越的性能。 本文提出了一种基于自监督深度学习的白质纤维聚类框架Deep Fiber Clustering (DFC)，用于快速有效的白质束分割。 Yuqian Chen,Chaoyi Zhang,Tengfei Xue,Yang Song,Nikos Makris,Yogesh Rathi,Weidong Cai,Fan Zhang,Lauren J. O'Donnell cs.CV

title: Semantically Informed Slang Interpretation
title_zh: 语义俚语解释
comment: Accepted as a long paper at NAACL 2022
comments: Accepted as a long paper at NAACL 2022
abstract: Slang is a predominant form of informal language making flexible and extended use of words that is notoriously hard for natural language processing systems to interpret. Existing approaches to slang interpretation tend to rely on context but ignore semantic extensions common in slang word usage. We propose a semantically informed slang interpretation (SSI) framework that considers jointly the contextual and semantic appropriateness of a candidate interpretation for a query slang. We perform rigorous evaluation on two large-scale online slang dictionaries and show that our approach not only achieves state-of-the-art accuracy for slang interpretation in English, but also does so in zero-shot and few-shot scenarios where training data is sparse. Furthermore, we show how the same framework can be applied to enhancing machine translation of slang from English to other languages. Our work creates opportunities for the automated interpretation and translation of informal language.
summary: Slang is a predominant form of informal language making flexible and extended use of words that is notoriously hard for natural language processing systems to interpret. Existing approaches to slang interpretation tend to rely on context but ignore semantic extensions common in slang word usage. We propose a semantically informed slang interpretation (SSI) framework that considers jointly the contextual and semantic appropriateness of a candidate interpretation for a query slang. We perform rigorous evaluation on two large-scale online slang dictionaries and show that our approach not only achieves state-of-the-art accuracy for slang interpretation in English, but also does so in zero-shot and few-shot scenarios where training data is sparse. Furthermore, we show how the same framework can be applied to enhancing machine translation of slang from English to other languages. Our work creates opportunities for the automated interpretation and translation of informal language.
abstract_zh: 俚语是非正式语言的主要形式，它灵活且广泛地使用自然语言处理系统难以解释的单词。现有的俚语解释方法往往依赖于上下文，但忽略了俚语使用中常见的语义扩展。我们提出了一种语义知情俚语解释（SSI）框架，该框架联合考虑查询俚语候选解释的上下文和语义适当性。我们对两个大型在线俚语词典进行了严格的评估，结果表明，我们的方法不仅在英语俚语解释方面实现了最先进的准确性，而且在训练数据稀疏的零样本和少样本场景中也能实现这一点。此外，我们还展示了如何应用相同的框架来增强俚语从英语到其他语言的机器翻译。我们的工作为非正式语言的自动口译和翻译创造了机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语义信息的俚语解释框架（SSI），以提升自然语言处理系统对俚语的解释和翻译能力。
AI.motivation: 现有俚语解释方法过度依赖上下文，忽视了俚语中常见的语义扩展现象，导致在数据稀疏场景下效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计SSI框架，联合建模候选解释的上下文适配性与语义合理性，通过大规模在线俚语词典进行多场景评估。
AI.result: 在零样本和少样本条件下达到SOTA性能，且成功扩展至英语到其他语言的俚语翻译任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自动化处理非正式语言的解释与翻译提供了新思路和有效技术路径。

title: Extracting Symbolic Models of Collective Behaviors with Graph Neural Networks and Macro-Micro Evolution
title_zh: 用图神经网络和宏观微观演化提取集体行为的符号模型
abstract: Collective behaviors are typically hard to model. The scale of the swarm, the large number of interactions, and the richness and complexity of the behaviors are factors that make it difficult to distill a collective behavior into simple symbolic expressions. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to symbolic regression designed to facilitate such modeling. Using raw and post-processed data as an input, our approach produces viable symbolic expressions that closely model the target behavior. Our approach is composed of two phases. In the first, a graph neural network (GNN) is trained to extract an approximation of the target behavior. In the second phase, the GNN is used to produce data for a nested evolutionary algorithm called macro-micro evolution (MME). The macro layer of this algorithm selects candidate symbolic expressions, while the micro layer tunes its parameters. Experimental evaluation shows that our approach outperforms competing solutions for symbolic regression, making it possible to extract compact expressions for complex swarm behaviors.
summary: Collective behaviors are typically hard to model. The scale of the swarm, the large number of interactions, and the richness and complexity of the behaviors are factors that make it difficult to distill a collective behavior into simple symbolic expressions. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to symbolic regression designed to facilitate such modeling. Using raw and post-processed data as an input, our approach produces viable symbolic expressions that closely model the target behavior. Our approach is composed of two phases. In the first, a graph neural network (GNN) is trained to extract an approximation of the target behavior. In the second phase, the GNN is used to produce data for a nested evolutionary algorithm called macro-micro evolution (MME). The macro layer of this algorithm selects candidate symbolic expressions, while the micro layer tunes its parameters. Experimental evaluation shows that our approach outperforms competing solutions for symbolic regression, making it possible to extract compact expressions for complex swarm behaviors.
abstract_zh: 集体行为通常很难建模。群体的规模、大量的相互作用以及行为的丰富性和复杂性是导致集体行为难以提炼为简单符号表达的因素。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的符号回归方法，旨在促进这种建模。我们的方法使用原始数据和后处理数据作为输入，生成可行的符号表达式，对目标行为进行密切建模。我们的方法由两个阶段组成。首先，训练图神经网络（GNN）来提取目标行为的近似值。在第二阶段，GNN 用于为称为宏微观进化（MME）的嵌套进化算法生成数据。该算法的宏观层选择候选符号表达式，而微观层调整其参数。实验评估表明，我们的方法优于符号回归的竞争解决方案，使得提取复杂群体行为的紧凑表达式成为可能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合图神经网络和宏-微观进化的符号回归方法，用于提取复杂群体行为的简洁符号模型。
AI.motivation: 集体行为因规模大、互动复杂而难以用简单符号表达，传统方法难以有效建模，需新方法。
AI.method: 分两阶段：首先训练GNN近似目标行为，然后利用GNN生成的数据输入宏-微观进化算法（MME），宏层选择符号表达式，微层优化参数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在符号回归任务中优于现有方法，能有效提取复杂群体行为的紧凑符号表达式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了复杂群体行为符号建模难题，为相关领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Tianyuan Zhang,Xuanyao Chen,Yue Wang,Yilun Wang,Hang Zhao
title: MUTR3D: A Multi-camera Tracking Framework via 3D-to-2D Queries
title_zh: MUTR3D：通过 3D 到 2D 查询的多摄像机跟踪框架
comment: Appear on CVPR 2022 Workshop on Autonomous Driving
comments: Appear on CVPR 2022 Workshop on Autonomous Driving
abstract: Accurate and consistent 3D tracking from multiple cameras is a key component in a vision-based autonomous driving system. It involves modeling 3D dynamic objects in complex scenes across multiple cameras. This problem is inherently challenging due to depth estimation, visual occlusions, appearance ambiguity, etc. Moreover, objects are not consistently associated across time and cameras. To address that, we propose an end-to-end \textbf{MU}lti-camera \textbf{TR}acking framework called MUTR3D. In contrast to prior works, MUTR3D does not explicitly rely on the spatial and appearance similarity of objects. Instead, our method introduces \textit{3D track query} to model spatial and appearance coherent track for each object that appears in multiple cameras and multiple frames. We use camera transformations to link 3D trackers with their observations in 2D images. Each tracker is further refined according to the features that are obtained from camera images. MUTR3D uses a set-to-set loss to measure the difference between the predicted tracking results and the ground truths. Therefore, it does not require any post-processing such as non-maximum suppression and/or bounding box association. MUTR3D outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 5.3 AMOTA on the nuScenes dataset. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/a1600012888/MUTR3D}.
summary: Accurate and consistent 3D tracking from multiple cameras is a key component in a vision-based autonomous driving system. It involves modeling 3D dynamic objects in complex scenes across multiple cameras. This problem is inherently challenging due to depth estimation, visual occlusions, appearance ambiguity, etc. Moreover, objects are not consistently associated across time and cameras. To address that, we propose an end-to-end \textbf{MU}lti-camera \textbf{TR}acking framework called MUTR3D. In contrast to prior works, MUTR3D does not explicitly rely on the spatial and appearance similarity of objects. Instead, our method introduces \textit{3D track query} to model spatial and appearance coherent track for each object that appears in multiple cameras and multiple frames. We use camera transformations to link 3D trackers with their observations in 2D images. Each tracker is further refined according to the features that are obtained from camera images. MUTR3D uses a set-to-set loss to measure the difference between the predicted tracking results and the ground truths. Therefore, it does not require any post-processing such as non-maximum suppression and/or bounding box association. MUTR3D outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 5.3 AMOTA on the nuScenes dataset. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/a1600012888/MUTR3D}.
abstract_zh: 来自多个摄像头的准确且一致的 3D 跟踪是基于视觉的自动驾驶系统的关键组成部分。它涉及跨多个摄像机对复杂场景中的 3D 动态对象进行建模。由于深度估计、视觉遮挡、外观模糊等原因，这个问题本质上是具有挑战性的。此外，对象在不同时间和摄像机之间的关联并不一致。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 MUTR3D 的端到端 \textbf{MU}lti-camera \textbf{TR}acking 框架。与之前的工作相比，MUTR3D 并不明确依赖于对象的空间和外观相似性。相反，我们的方法引入 \textit{3D 轨迹查询} 来为出现在多个摄像机和多个帧中的每个对象建模空间和外观连贯轨迹。我们使用相机转换将 3D 跟踪器与其在 2D 图像中的观察结果联系起来。每个跟踪器根据从摄像机图像获得的特征进一步细化。 MUTR3D 使用集合到集合的损失来衡量预测跟踪结果与地面实况之间的差异。因此，它不需要任何后处理，例如非极大值抑制和/或边界框关联。 MUTR3D 在 nuScenes 数据集上的性能比最先进的方法高出 5.3 AMOTA。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/a1600012888/MUTR3D}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多摄像头的3D目标跟踪框架MUTR3D，通过3D到2D的查询实现跨摄像头和跨帧的物体跟踪。
AI.motivation: 多摄像头3D跟踪面临深度估计、视觉遮挡和外观模糊等挑战，传统方法依赖空间和外观相似性，难以处理复杂场景中的跨摄像头关联问题。
AI.method: 引入3D跟踪查询建模物体的空间和外观一致性，利用摄像头变换将3D跟踪器与2D图像观测关联，并通过图像特征优化跟踪器。采用集到集损失函数，无需后处理步骤。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，MUTR3D相比现有方法提升5.3 AMOTA指标，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MUTR3D通过3D-2D查询机制有效解决了多摄像头3D跟踪难题，实现了无需后处理的端到端跟踪，达到当前最优性能。

search_text: MUTR3D: A Multi-camera Tracking Framework via 3D-to-2D Queries MUTR3D：通过 3D 到 2D 查询的多摄像机跟踪框架 Accurate and consistent 3D tracking from multiple cameras is a key component in a vision-based autonomous driving system. It involves modeling 3D dynamic objects in complex scenes across multiple cameras. This problem is inherently challenging due to depth estimation, visual occlusions, appearance ambiguity, etc. Moreover, objects are not consistently associated across time and cameras. To address that, we propose an end-to-end \textbf{MU}lti-camera \textbf{TR}acking framework called MUTR3D. In contrast to prior works, MUTR3D does not explicitly rely on the spatial and appearance similarity of objects. Instead, our method introduces \textit{3D track query} to model spatial and appearance coherent track for each object that appears in multiple cameras and multiple frames. We use camera transformations to link 3D trackers with their observations in 2D images. Each tracker is further refined according to the features that are obtained from camera images. MUTR3D uses a set-to-set loss to measure the difference between the predicted tracking results and the ground truths. Therefore, it does not require any post-processing such as non-maximum suppression and/or bounding box association. MUTR3D outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 5.3 AMOTA on the nuScenes dataset. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/a1600012888/MUTR3D}. 来自多个摄像头的准确且一致的 3D 跟踪是基于视觉的自动驾驶系统的关键组成部分。它涉及跨多个摄像机对复杂场景中的 3D 动态对象进行建模。由于深度估计、视觉遮挡、外观模糊等原因，这个问题本质上是具有挑战性的。此外，对象在不同时间和摄像机之间的关联并不一致。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 MUTR3D 的端到端 \textbf{MU}lti-camera \textbf{TR}acking 框架。与之前的工作相比，MUTR3D 并不明确依赖于对象的空间和外观相似性。相反，我们的方法引入 \textit{3D 轨迹查询} 来为出现在多个摄像机和多个帧中的每个对象建模空间和外观连贯轨迹。我们使用相机转换将 3D 跟踪器与其在 2D 图像中的观察结果联系起来。每个跟踪器根据从摄像机图像获得的特征进一步细化。 MUTR3D 使用集合到集合的损失来衡量预测跟踪结果与地面实况之间的差异。因此，它不需要任何后处理，例如非极大值抑制和/或边界框关联。 MUTR3D 在 nuScenes 数据集上的性能比最先进的方法高出 5.3 AMOTA。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/a1600012888/MUTR3D}。 本文提出一种基于多摄像头的3D目标跟踪框架MUTR3D，通过3D到2D的查询实现跨摄像头和跨帧的物体跟踪。 Tianyuan Zhang,Xuanyao Chen,Yue Wang,Yilun Wang,Hang Zhao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Mundher Mohammed Taresh,Ningbo Zhu,Talal Ahmed Ali Ali,Mohammed Alghaili,Weihua Guo
title: Using a novel fractional-order gradient method for CNN back-propagation
title_zh: 使用新颖的分数阶梯度方法进行 CNN 反向传播
abstract: Computer-aided diagnosis tools have experienced rapid growth and development in recent years. Among all, deep learning is the most sophisticated and popular tool. In this paper, researchers propose a novel deep learning model and apply it to COVID-19 diagnosis. Our model uses the tool of fractional calculus, which has the potential to improve the performance of gradient methods. To this end, the researcher proposes a fractional-order gradient method for the back-propagation of convolutional neural networks based on the Caputo definition. However, if only the first term of the infinite series of the Caputo definition is used to approximate the fractional-order derivative, the length of the memory is truncated. Therefore, the fractional-order gradient (FGD) method with a fixed memory step and an adjustable number of terms is used to update the weights of the layers. Experiments were performed on the COVIDx dataset to demonstrate fast convergence, good accuracy, and the ability to bypass the local optimal point. We also compared the performance of the developed fractional-order neural networks and Integer-order neural networks. The results confirmed the effectiveness of our proposed model in the diagnosis of COVID-19.
summary: Computer-aided diagnosis tools have experienced rapid growth and development in recent years. Among all, deep learning is the most sophisticated and popular tool. In this paper, researchers propose a novel deep learning model and apply it to COVID-19 diagnosis. Our model uses the tool of fractional calculus, which has the potential to improve the performance of gradient methods. To this end, the researcher proposes a fractional-order gradient method for the back-propagation of convolutional neural networks based on the Caputo definition. However, if only the first term of the infinite series of the Caputo definition is used to approximate the fractional-order derivative, the length of the memory is truncated. Therefore, the fractional-order gradient (FGD) method with a fixed memory step and an adjustable number of terms is used to update the weights of the layers. Experiments were performed on the COVIDx dataset to demonstrate fast convergence, good accuracy, and the ability to bypass the local optimal point. We also compared the performance of the developed fractional-order neural networks and Integer-order neural networks. The results confirmed the effectiveness of our proposed model in the diagnosis of COVID-19.
abstract_zh: 近年来，计算机辅助诊断工具经历了快速的增长和发展。其中，深度学习是最复杂、最流行的工具。在本文中，研究人员提出了一种新颖的深度学习模型，并将其应用于 COVID-19 诊断。我们的模型使用分数阶微积分工具，它有可能提高梯度方法的性能。为此，研究人员基于Caputo定义提出了一种用于卷积神经网络反向传播的分数阶梯度方法。然而，如果仅使用Caputo定义的无穷级数的第一项来近似分数阶导数，则存储器的长度被截断。因此，使用具有固定存储步长和可调整项数的分数阶梯度（FGD）方法来更新层的权重。在 COVIDx 数据集上进行了实验，以证明快速收敛、良好的准确性以及绕过局部最优点的能力。我们还比较了所开发的分数阶神经网络和整数阶神经网络的性能。结果证实了我们提出的模型在诊断 COVID-19 方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分数阶微积分的新型梯度方法，用于改进卷积神经网络（CNN）的反向传播算法，并应用于COVID-19诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统整数阶梯度方法在深度学习中存在收敛速度慢、易陷入局部最优等问题，而分数阶微积分在记忆特性方面具有优势，可能提升模型性能。
AI.method: 基于Caputo分数阶导数定义，提出固定记忆步长和可调项数的分数阶梯度（FGD）方法，用于CNN反向传播中的权重更新。
AI.result: 在COVIDx数据集上实验表明，该方法收敛更快、准确率更高，且能有效避开局部最优，优于传统整数阶神经网络。
AI.conclusion: 分数阶梯度方法在COVID-19诊断中表现出优越性，验证了分数阶微积分在深度学习中的应用潜力。

title: Budgeted Classification with Rejection: An Evolutionary Method with Multiple Objectives
title_zh: 带有拒绝的预算分类：一种具有多目标的进化方法
comment: IEEE WCCI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.13067
comments: IEEE WCCI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.13067
abstract: Classification systems are often deployed in resource-constrained settings where labels must be assigned to inputs on a budget of time, memory, etc. Budgeted, sequential classifiers (BSCs) address these scenarios by processing inputs through a sequence of partial feature acquisition and evaluation steps with early-exit options. This allows for an efficient evaluation of inputs that prevents unneeded feature acquisition. To approximate an intractable combinatorial problem, current approaches to budgeted classification rely on well-behaved loss functions that account for two primary objectives (processing cost and error). These approaches offer improved efficiency over traditional classifiers but are limited by analytic constraints in formulation and do not manage additional performance objectives. Notably, such methods do not explicitly account for an important aspect of real-time detection systems -- the fraction of "accepted" predictions satisfying a confidence criterion imposed by a risk-averse monitor. We propose a problem-specific genetic algorithm to build budgeted, sequential classifiers with confidence-based reject options. Three objectives -- accuracy, processing time/cost, and coverage -- are considered. The algorithm emphasizes Pareto efficiency while accounting for a notion of aggregate performance via a unique scalarization. Experiments show our method can quickly find globally Pareto optimal solutions in very large search spaces and is competitive with existing approaches while offering advantages for selective, budgeted deployment scenarios.
summary: Classification systems are often deployed in resource-constrained settings where labels must be assigned to inputs on a budget of time, memory, etc. Budgeted, sequential classifiers (BSCs) address these scenarios by processing inputs through a sequence of partial feature acquisition and evaluation steps with early-exit options. This allows for an efficient evaluation of inputs that prevents unneeded feature acquisition. To approximate an intractable combinatorial problem, current approaches to budgeted classification rely on well-behaved loss functions that account for two primary objectives (processing cost and error). These approaches offer improved efficiency over traditional classifiers but are limited by analytic constraints in formulation and do not manage additional performance objectives. Notably, such methods do not explicitly account for an important aspect of real-time detection systems -- the fraction of "accepted" predictions satisfying a confidence criterion imposed by a risk-averse monitor. We propose a problem-specific genetic algorithm to build budgeted, sequential classifiers with confidence-based reject options. Three objectives -- accuracy, processing time/cost, and coverage -- are considered. The algorithm emphasizes Pareto efficiency while accounting for a notion of aggregate performance via a unique scalarization. Experiments show our method can quickly find globally Pareto optimal solutions in very large search spaces and is competitive with existing approaches while offering advantages for selective, budgeted deployment scenarios.
abstract_zh: 分类系统通常部署在资源受限的环境中，其中标签必须根据时间、内存等预算分配给输入。预算顺序分类器 (BSC) 通过一系列部分特征获取和评估步骤以及提前退出选项来处理输入，从而解决这些场景。这样可以对输入进行有效评估，从而防止获取不需要的特征。为了近似解决棘手的组合问题，当前的预算分类方法依赖于表现良好的损失函数，该函数考虑了两个主要目标（处理成本和错误）。这些方法比传统分类器提供了更高的效率，但受到公式化分析约束的限制，并且无法管理额外的性能目标。值得注意的是，此类方法没有明确考虑实时检测系统的一个重要方面——“接受”预测中满足风险规避监控器施加的置信标准的比例。我们提出了一种针对特定问题的遗传算法来构建具有基于置信度的拒绝选项的预算序列分类器。考虑三个目标——准确性、处理时间/成本和覆盖范围。该算法强调帕累托效率，同时通过独特的标量化考虑总体性能的概念。实验表明，我们的方法可以在非常大的搜索空间中快速找到全局帕累托最优解决方案，并且与现有方法具有竞争力，同时为选择性、预算部署场景提供优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于遗传算法的多目标进化方法，用于构建具有置信度拒绝选项的预算分类器，以优化准确率、处理成本和覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 现有预算分类方法在资源受限场景下无法同时优化多个性能目标，且未考虑风险规避监控器对预测置信度的要求，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: 设计问题特定的遗传算法，通过帕累托效率优化和聚合性能标量化，同时考虑准确率、处理时间/成本及覆盖率三个目标。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能在超大规模搜索空间中快速找到全局帕累托最优解，在选择性部署场景中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多目标进化方法有效解决了预算分类中的复合优化问题，为实时检测系统的可靠部署提供了新思路。

search_text: Budgeted Classification with Rejection: An Evolutionary Method with Multiple Objectives 带有拒绝的预算分类：一种具有多目标的进化方法 Classification systems are often deployed in resource-constrained settings where labels must be assigned to inputs on a budget of time, memory, etc. Budgeted, sequential classifiers (BSCs) address these scenarios by processing inputs through a sequence of partial feature acquisition and evaluation steps with early-exit options. This allows for an efficient evaluation of inputs that prevents unneeded feature acquisition. To approximate an intractable combinatorial problem, current approaches to budgeted classification rely on well-behaved loss functions that account for two primary objectives (processing cost and error). These approaches offer improved efficiency over traditional classifiers but are limited by analytic constraints in formulation and do not manage additional performance objectives. Notably, such methods do not explicitly account for an important aspect of real-time detection systems -- the fraction of "accepted" predictions satisfying a confidence criterion imposed by a risk-averse monitor. We propose a problem-specific genetic algorithm to build budgeted, sequential classifiers with confidence-based reject options. Three objectives -- accuracy, processing time/cost, and coverage -- are considered. The algorithm emphasizes Pareto efficiency while accounting for a notion of aggregate performance via a unique scalarization. Experiments show our method can quickly find globally Pareto optimal solutions in very large search spaces and is competitive with existing approaches while offering advantages for selective, budgeted deployment scenarios. 分类系统通常部署在资源受限的环境中，其中标签必须根据时间、内存等预算分配给输入。预算顺序分类器 (BSC) 通过一系列部分特征获取和评估步骤以及提前退出选项来处理输入，从而解决这些场景。这样可以对输入进行有效评估，从而防止获取不需要的特征。为了近似解决棘手的组合问题，当前的预算分类方法依赖于表现良好的损失函数，该函数考虑了两个主要目标（处理成本和错误）。这些方法比传统分类器提供了更高的效率，但受到公式化分析约束的限制，并且无法管理额外的性能目标。值得注意的是，此类方法没有明确考虑实时检测系统的一个重要方面——“接受”预测中满足风险规避监控器施加的置信标准的比例。我们提出了一种针对特定问题的遗传算法来构建具有基于置信度的拒绝选项的预算序列分类器。考虑三个目标——准确性、处理时间/成本和覆盖范围。该算法强调帕累托效率，同时通过独特的标量化考虑总体性能的概念。实验表明，我们的方法可以在非常大的搜索空间中快速找到全局帕累托最优解决方案，并且与现有方法具有竞争力，同时为选择性、预算部署场景提供优势。 本文提出一种基于遗传算法的多目标进化方法，用于构建具有置信度拒绝选项的预算分类器，以优化准确率、处理成本和覆盖率。 Nolan H. Hamilton,Errin Fulp cs.NE

authors_text: Valentin Vie,Ryan Sheatsley,Sophia Beyda,Sushrut Shringarputale,Kevin Chan,Trent Jaeger,Patrick McDaniel
title: Adversarial Plannning
title_zh: 对抗性规划
abstract: Planning algorithms are used in computational systems to direct autonomous behavior. In a canonical application, for example, planning for autonomous vehicles is used to automate the static or continuous planning towards performance, resource management, or functional goals (e.g., arriving at the destination, managing fuel fuel consumption). Existing planning algorithms assume non-adversarial settings; a least-cost plan is developed based on available environmental information (i.e., the input instance). Yet, it is unclear how such algorithms will perform in the face of adversaries attempting to thwart the planner. In this paper, we explore the security of planning algorithms used in cyber- and cyber-physical systems. We present two $\textit{adversarial planning}$ algorithms-one static and one adaptive-that perturb input planning instances to maximize cost (often substantially so). We evaluate the performance of the algorithms against two dominant planning algorithms used in commercial applications (D* Lite and Fast Downward) and show both are vulnerable to extremely limited adversarial action. Here, experiments show that an adversary is able to increase plan costs in 66.9% of instances by only removing a single action from the actions space (D* Lite) and render 70% of instances from an international planning competition unsolvable by removing only three actions (Fast Forward). Finally, we show that finding an optimal perturbation in any search-based planning system is NP-hard.
summary: Planning algorithms are used in computational systems to direct autonomous behavior. In a canonical application, for example, planning for autonomous vehicles is used to automate the static or continuous planning towards performance, resource management, or functional goals (e.g., arriving at the destination, managing fuel fuel consumption). Existing planning algorithms assume non-adversarial settings; a least-cost plan is developed based on available environmental information (i.e., the input instance). Yet, it is unclear how such algorithms will perform in the face of adversaries attempting to thwart the planner. In this paper, we explore the security of planning algorithms used in cyber- and cyber-physical systems. We present two $\textit{adversarial planning}$ algorithms-one static and one adaptive-that perturb input planning instances to maximize cost (often substantially so). We evaluate the performance of the algorithms against two dominant planning algorithms used in commercial applications (D* Lite and Fast Downward) and show both are vulnerable to extremely limited adversarial action. Here, experiments show that an adversary is able to increase plan costs in 66.9% of instances by only removing a single action from the actions space (D* Lite) and render 70% of instances from an international planning competition unsolvable by removing only three actions (Fast Forward). Finally, we show that finding an optimal perturbation in any search-based planning system is NP-hard.
abstract_zh: 计算系统中使用规划算法来指导自主行为。例如，在规范应用中，自动驾驶车辆的规划用于自动执行性能、资源管理或功能目标（例如，到达目的地、管理燃油消耗）的静态或连续规划。现有的规划算法假设非对抗性设置；根据可用的环境信息（即输入实例）制定最低成本计划。然而，目前还不清楚这些算法在面对试图阻止规划者的对手时将如何执行。在本文中，我们探讨了网络和网络物理系统中使用的规划算法的安全性。我们提出了两种 $\textit{对抗性规划}$ 算法 - 一种是静态的，一种是自适应的 - 扰乱输入规划实例以最大化成本（通常实质上是这样）。我们针对商业应用中使用的两种主要规划算法（D* Lite 和 Fast Downward）评估了算法的性能，并表明这两种算法都容易受到极其有限的对抗行为的影响。实验表明，对手仅通过从动作空间中删除单个动作 (D* Lite) 即可增加 66.9% 的实例的计划成本，并且仅通过删除三个动作 (Fast Forward) 即可使国际规划竞赛中 70% 的实例无法解决。最后，我们证明在任何基于搜索的规划系统中找到最佳扰动都是 NP 困难的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种对抗规划算法，通过扰动输入实例来最大化规划成本，评估现有规划算法在面对对抗性攻击时的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有规划算法假设非对抗环境，但其在面对试图破坏规划器的对手时的安全性尚未明确，需探索其在对抗场景下的表现。
AI.method: 设计静态和自适应对抗规划算法，通过移除动作或修改输入实例来增加规划成本，并在D* Lite和Fast Downward等主流算法上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅移除单个动作即可使66.9%的实例成本显著增加，移除三个动作使70%的竞赛实例不可解，且寻找最优扰动为NP难问题。
AI.conclusion: 现有规划算法对微小对抗性干扰高度敏感，需重新设计更安全的规划框架以应对对抗性攻击带来的风险。

title: Game-Theoretic Planning for Autonomous Driving among Risk-Aware Human Drivers
title_zh: 具有风险意识的人类驾驶员自动驾驶的博弈论规划
abstract: We present a novel approach for risk-aware planning with human agents in multi-agent traffic scenarios. Our approach takes into account the wide range of human driver behaviors on the road, from aggressive maneuvers like speeding and overtaking, to conservative traits like driving slowly and conforming to the right-most lane. In our approach, we learn a mapping from a data-driven human driver behavior model called the CMetric to a driver's entropic risk preference. We then use the derived risk preference within a game-theoretic risk-sensitive planner to model risk-aware interactions among human drivers and an autonomous vehicle in various traffic scenarios. We demonstrate our method in a merging scenario, where our results show that the final trajectories obtained from the risk-aware planner generate desirable emergent behaviors. Particularly, our planner recognizes aggressive human drivers and yields to them while maintaining a greater distance from them. In a user study, participants were able to distinguish between aggressive and conservative simulated drivers based on trajectories generated from our risk-sensitive planner. We also observe that aggressive human driving results in more frequent lane-changing in the planner. Finally, we compare the performance of our modified risk-aware planner with existing methods and show that modeling human driver behavior leads to safer navigation.
summary: We present a novel approach for risk-aware planning with human agents in multi-agent traffic scenarios. Our approach takes into account the wide range of human driver behaviors on the road, from aggressive maneuvers like speeding and overtaking, to conservative traits like driving slowly and conforming to the right-most lane. In our approach, we learn a mapping from a data-driven human driver behavior model called the CMetric to a driver's entropic risk preference. We then use the derived risk preference within a game-theoretic risk-sensitive planner to model risk-aware interactions among human drivers and an autonomous vehicle in various traffic scenarios. We demonstrate our method in a merging scenario, where our results show that the final trajectories obtained from the risk-aware planner generate desirable emergent behaviors. Particularly, our planner recognizes aggressive human drivers and yields to them while maintaining a greater distance from them. In a user study, participants were able to distinguish between aggressive and conservative simulated drivers based on trajectories generated from our risk-sensitive planner. We also observe that aggressive human driving results in more frequent lane-changing in the planner. Finally, we compare the performance of our modified risk-aware planner with existing methods and show that modeling human driver behavior leads to safer navigation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在多智能体流量场景中利用人类智能体进行风险意识规划的新方法。我们的方法考虑了人类驾驶员在道路上的广泛行为，从超速和超车等激进的操作，到缓慢驾驶和遵守最右侧车道等保守特征。在我们的方法中，我们学习了从数据驱动的人类驾驶员行为模型（称为 CMetric）到驾驶员熵风险偏好的映射。然后，我们使用博弈论风险敏感规划器中导出的风险偏好来模拟各种交通场景中人类驾驶员和自动驾驶车辆之间的风险意识交互。我们在合并场景中展示了我们的方法，我们的结果表明，从风险意识规划者获得的最终轨迹会产生理想的紧急行为。特别是，我们的规划器会识别出攻击性强的人类驾驶员，并向他们让路，同时与他们保持更大的距离。在一项用户研究中，参与者能够根据我们的风险敏感规划器生成的轨迹来区分激进和保守的模拟驾驶员。我们还观察到，激进的人类驾驶会导致规划器更频繁地变换车道。最后，我们将修改后的风险意识规划器的性能与现有方法进行比较，并表明对人类驾驶员行为进行建模可以实现更安全的导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论的自动驾驶规划方法，通过建模人类驾驶员的风险偏好，实现与人类驾驶员的安全交互。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶规划未能充分考虑人类驾驶员多样化风险偏好，导致交互场景中存在安全隐患与行为不自然问题。
AI.method: 通过CMetric数据驱动模型学习人类驾驶员风险偏好，结合博弈论构建风险敏感规划器，模拟自动驾驶与人类驾驶员在合并场景中的交互行为。
AI.result: 实验表明规划器能识别激进/保守驾驶员并调整避让策略，用户可区分不同驾驶风格，激进驾驶导致更多变道，该方法相较传统方法提升导航安全性。
AI.conclusion: 建模人类风险偏好可增强自动驾驶交互安全性与自然性，为复杂交通场景下的智能决策提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论的自动驾驶规划方法，通过建模人类驾驶员的风险偏好，实现与人类驾驶员的安全交互。

search_text: Game-Theoretic Planning for Autonomous Driving among Risk-Aware Human Drivers 具有风险意识的人类驾驶员自动驾驶的博弈论规划 We present a novel approach for risk-aware planning with human agents in multi-agent traffic scenarios. Our approach takes into account the wide range of human driver behaviors on the road, from aggressive maneuvers like speeding and overtaking, to conservative traits like driving slowly and conforming to the right-most lane. In our approach, we learn a mapping from a data-driven human driver behavior model called the CMetric to a driver's entropic risk preference. We then use the derived risk preference within a game-theoretic risk-sensitive planner to model risk-aware interactions among human drivers and an autonomous vehicle in various traffic scenarios. We demonstrate our method in a merging scenario, where our results show that the final trajectories obtained from the risk-aware planner generate desirable emergent behaviors. Particularly, our planner recognizes aggressive human drivers and yields to them while maintaining a greater distance from them. In a user study, participants were able to distinguish between aggressive and conservative simulated drivers based on trajectories generated from our risk-sensitive planner. We also observe that aggressive human driving results in more frequent lane-changing in the planner. Finally, we compare the performance of our modified risk-aware planner with existing methods and show that modeling human driver behavior leads to safer navigation. 我们提出了一种在多智能体流量场景中利用人类智能体进行风险意识规划的新方法。我们的方法考虑了人类驾驶员在道路上的广泛行为，从超速和超车等激进的操作，到缓慢驾驶和遵守最右侧车道等保守特征。在我们的方法中，我们学习了从数据驱动的人类驾驶员行为模型（称为 CMetric）到驾驶员熵风险偏好的映射。然后，我们使用博弈论风险敏感规划器中导出的风险偏好来模拟各种交通场景中人类驾驶员和自动驾驶车辆之间的风险意识交互。我们在合并场景中展示了我们的方法，我们的结果表明，从风险意识规划者获得的最终轨迹会产生理想的紧急行为。特别是，我们的规划器会识别出攻击性强的人类驾驶员，并向他们让路，同时与他们保持更大的距离。在一项用户研究中，参与者能够根据我们的风险敏感规划器生成的轨迹来区分激进和保守的模拟驾驶员。我们还观察到，激进的人类驾驶会导致规划器更频繁地变换车道。最后，我们将修改后的风险意识规划器的性能与现有方法进行比较，并表明对人类驾驶员行为进行建模可以实现更安全的导航。 本文提出一种基于博弈论的自动驾驶规划方法，通过建模人类驾驶员的风险偏好，实现与人类驾驶员的安全交互。 Rohan Chandra,Mingyu Wang,Mac Schwager,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

authors_text: Sreetama Das,Jingfu Zhang,Stefano Martina,Dieter Suter,Filippo Caruso
title: Experimental quantum pattern recognition in IBMQ and diamond NVs
title_zh: IBMQ 和 Diamond NV 中的实验量子模式识别
abstract: One of the most promising applications of quantum computing is the processing of graphical data like images. Here, we investigate the possibility of realizing a quantum pattern recognition protocol based on swap test, and use the IBMQ noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices to verify the idea. We find that with a two-qubit protocol, swap test can efficiently detect the similarity between two patterns with good fidelity, though for three or more qubits the noise in the real devices becomes detrimental. To mitigate this noise effect, we resort to destructive swap test, which shows an improved performance for three-qubit states. Due to limited cloud access to larger IBMQ processors, we take a segment-wise approach to apply the destructive swap test on higher dimensional images. In this case, we define an average overlap measure which shows faithfulness to distinguish between two very different or very similar patterns when simulated on real IBMQ processors. As test images, we use binary images with simple patterns, greyscale MNIST numbers and MNIST fashion images, as well as binary images of human blood vessel obtained from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). We also present an experimental set up for applying destructive swap test using the nitrogen vacancy centre (NVs) in diamond. Our experimental data show high fidelity for single qubit states. Lastly, we propose a protocol inspired from quantum associative memory, which works in an analogous way to supervised learning for performing quantum pattern recognition using destructive swap test.
summary: One of the most promising applications of quantum computing is the processing of graphical data like images. Here, we investigate the possibility of realizing a quantum pattern recognition protocol based on swap test, and use the IBMQ noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices to verify the idea. We find that with a two-qubit protocol, swap test can efficiently detect the similarity between two patterns with good fidelity, though for three or more qubits the noise in the real devices becomes detrimental. To mitigate this noise effect, we resort to destructive swap test, which shows an improved performance for three-qubit states. Due to limited cloud access to larger IBMQ processors, we take a segment-wise approach to apply the destructive swap test on higher dimensional images. In this case, we define an average overlap measure which shows faithfulness to distinguish between two very different or very similar patterns when simulated on real IBMQ processors. As test images, we use binary images with simple patterns, greyscale MNIST numbers and MNIST fashion images, as well as binary images of human blood vessel obtained from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). We also present an experimental set up for applying destructive swap test using the nitrogen vacancy centre (NVs) in diamond. Our experimental data show high fidelity for single qubit states. Lastly, we propose a protocol inspired from quantum associative memory, which works in an analogous way to supervised learning for performing quantum pattern recognition using destructive swap test.
abstract_zh: 量子计算最有前途的应用之一是图像等图形数据的处理。在这里，我们研究了实现基于交换测试的量子模式识别协议的可能性，并使用IBMQ噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）设备来验证这个想法。我们发现，使用两个量子位协议，交换测试可以有效地以良好的保真度检测两个模式之间的相似性，尽管对于三个或更多量子位，实际设备中的噪声变得有害。为了减轻这种噪声影响，我们采用破坏性交换测试，这表明三量子位状态的性能得到了改善。由于对较大 IBMQ 处理器的云访问有限，我们采用分段方法对更高维度的图像应用破坏性交换测试。在本例中，我们定义了一个平均重叠度量，该度量在真实 IBMQ 处理器上进行模拟时能够忠实地区分两个非常不同或非常相似的模式。作为测试图像，我们使用简单图案的二值图像、灰度 MNIST 数字和 MNIST 时尚图像，以及从磁共振成像 (MRI) 获得的人体血管二值图像。我们还提出了一种利用金刚石中的氮空位中心 (NV) 进行破坏性交换测试的实验装置。我们的实验数据显示单量子位状态的高保真度。最后，我们提出了一种受量子联想记忆启发的协议，其工作方式与监督学习类似，使用破坏性交换测试执行量子模式识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于交换测试的量子模式识别协议，并在IBM量子设备和金刚石氮空位中心上进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 量子计算在图像等图形数据处理中具有潜力，但需解决噪声对多量子比特系统的影响问题。
AI.method: 采用两量子比特交换测试检测模式相似性，通过破坏性交换测试降低噪声影响，并在IBM量子处理器和金刚石NV中心进行实验验证。
AI.result: 单量子比特状态实验显示高保真度，破坏性交换测试在三量子比特系统中表现更优，平均重叠度量能有效区分相似或差异模式。
AI.conclusion: 基于交换测试的量子模式识别协议在当前NISQ设备上可行，为未来量子机器学习提供实验基础。

title: Topology and morphology design of spherically reconfigurable homogeneous Modular Soft Robots (MSoRos)
title_zh: 球形可重构同质模块化软机器人（MSoRos）的拓扑和形态设计
abstract: Imagine a swarm of terrestrial robots that can explore an environment, and, upon completion of this task, reconfigure into a spherical ball and roll out. This dimensional change alters the dynamics of locomotion and can assist them to maneuver variable terrains. The sphere-plane reconfiguration is equivalent to projecting a spherical shell onto a plane, an operation which is not possible without distortions. Fortunately, soft materials have potential to adapt to this disparity of the Gaussian curvatures. Modular Soft Robots (MSoRos) have promise of achieving dimensional change by exploiting their continuum and deformable nature. We present topology and morphology design of MSoRos capable of reconfiguring between spherical and planar configurations. Our approach is based in geometry, where a platonic solid determines the number of modules required for plane-to-sphere reconfiguration and the radius of the resulting sphere, e.g., four `tetrahedron-based' or six `cube-based' MSoRos are required for spherical reconfiguration. The methodology involves: (1)inverse orthographic projection of a `module-topology curve' onto the circumscribing sphere to generate the spherical topology,(2)azimuthal projection of the spherical topology onto a tangent plane at the center of the module resulting in the planar topology, and (3)adjusting the limb stiffness and curling ability by manipulating the geometry of cavities to realize a physical finite-width, Motor-Tendon Actuated MSoRo. The topology design is shown to be scale invariant, i.e., scaling of base platonic solid is reflected linearly in spherical and planar topologies. The module-topology curve is optimized for the reconfiguration and locomotion ability using a metric that quantifies sphere-to-plane distortion. The geometry of the cavity optimizes for the limb stiffness and curling ability without compromising the actuator's structural integrity.
summary: Imagine a swarm of terrestrial robots that can explore an environment, and, upon completion of this task, reconfigure into a spherical ball and roll out. This dimensional change alters the dynamics of locomotion and can assist them to maneuver variable terrains. The sphere-plane reconfiguration is equivalent to projecting a spherical shell onto a plane, an operation which is not possible without distortions. Fortunately, soft materials have potential to adapt to this disparity of the Gaussian curvatures. Modular Soft Robots (MSoRos) have promise of achieving dimensional change by exploiting their continuum and deformable nature. We present topology and morphology design of MSoRos capable of reconfiguring between spherical and planar configurations. Our approach is based in geometry, where a platonic solid determines the number of modules required for plane-to-sphere reconfiguration and the radius of the resulting sphere, e.g., four `tetrahedron-based' or six `cube-based' MSoRos are required for spherical reconfiguration. The methodology involves: (1)inverse orthographic projection of a `module-topology curve' onto the circumscribing sphere to generate the spherical topology,(2)azimuthal projection of the spherical topology onto a tangent plane at the center of the module resulting in the planar topology, and (3)adjusting the limb stiffness and curling ability by manipulating the geometry of cavities to realize a physical finite-width, Motor-Tendon Actuated MSoRo. The topology design is shown to be scale invariant, i.e., scaling of base platonic solid is reflected linearly in spherical and planar topologies. The module-topology curve is optimized for the reconfiguration and locomotion ability using a metric that quantifies sphere-to-plane distortion. The geometry of the cavity optimizes for the limb stiffness and curling ability without compromising the actuator's structural integrity.
abstract_zh: 想象一下一群陆地机器人可以探索环境，并在完成此任务后重新配置成球形并滚出。这种尺寸的变化改变了运动的动力学，可以帮助它们操纵多变的地形。球面重构相当于将球壳投影到平面上，这种操作在没有扭曲的情况下是不可能的。幸运的是，软材料有潜力适应高斯曲率的这种差异。模块化软机器人（MSoRos）有望通过利用其连续体和可变形性质来实现尺寸变化。我们提出了能够在球形和平面配置之间重新配置的 MSoRos 的拓扑和形态设计。我们的方法基于几何学，其中柏拉图实体决定了平面到球体重新配置所需的模块数量以及所得球体的半径，例如，球体重新配置需要四个“基于四面体”或六个“基于立方体”的 MSoRo。该方法包括：(1) 将“模块拓扑曲线”逆投影到外接球体上以生成球形拓扑结构，(2) 将球形拓扑结构方位角投影到模块中心的切平面上，从而生成平面拓扑结构，以及 (3) 通过操纵空腔的几何形状来调整肢体刚度和卷曲能力，以实现物理有限宽度、电机腱驱动的 MSoRo。拓扑设计被证明是比例不变的，即基本柏拉图固体的比例在球形和平面拓扑中线性反映。使用量化球体到平面变形的度量，对模块拓扑曲线进行了重新配置和运动能力的优化。腔体的几何形状优化了肢体刚度和卷曲能力，而不影响致动器的结构完整性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化软体机器人（MSoRos）的拓扑和形态设计方法，使其能够实现从平面到球体的重构。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人难以适应复杂地形，而通过形状重构（如平面到球体）可提升移动灵活性，但需解决高斯曲率差异导致的几何畸变问题。
AI.method: 基于几何学原理，以柏拉图立体为基准确定模块数量及球体半径；通过逆正投影生成球面拓扑，再经方位角投影得到平面拓扑；通过调节腔体几何优化肢体刚度与弯曲能力。
AI.result: 实现了尺度不变的拓扑设计，优化了重构过程中的畸变指标，验证了模块化软体机器人平面-球体重构的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可重构软体机器人的形态设计提供了理论框架，平衡了结构完整性与运动性能，适用于多地形探索任务。

search_text: Topology and morphology design of spherically reconfigurable homogeneous Modular Soft Robots (MSoRos) 球形可重构同质模块化软机器人（MSoRos）的拓扑和形态设计 Imagine a swarm of terrestrial robots that can explore an environment, and, upon completion of this task, reconfigure into a spherical ball and roll out. This dimensional change alters the dynamics of locomotion and can assist them to maneuver variable terrains. The sphere-plane reconfiguration is equivalent to projecting a spherical shell onto a plane, an operation which is not possible without distortions. Fortunately, soft materials have potential to adapt to this disparity of the Gaussian curvatures. Modular Soft Robots (MSoRos) have promise of achieving dimensional change by exploiting their continuum and deformable nature. We present topology and morphology design of MSoRos capable of reconfiguring between spherical and planar configurations. Our approach is based in geometry, where a platonic solid determines the number of modules required for plane-to-sphere reconfiguration and the radius of the resulting sphere, e.g., four `tetrahedron-based' or six `cube-based' MSoRos are required for spherical reconfiguration. The methodology involves: (1)inverse orthographic projection of a `module-topology curve' onto the circumscribing sphere to generate the spherical topology,(2)azimuthal projection of the spherical topology onto a tangent plane at the center of the module resulting in the planar topology, and (3)adjusting the limb stiffness and curling ability by manipulating the geometry of cavities to realize a physical finite-width, Motor-Tendon Actuated MSoRo. The topology design is shown to be scale invariant, i.e., scaling of base platonic solid is reflected linearly in spherical and planar topologies. The module-topology curve is optimized for the reconfiguration and locomotion ability using a metric that quantifies sphere-to-plane distortion. The geometry of the cavity optimizes for the limb stiffness and curling ability without compromising the actuator's structural integrity. 想象一下一群陆地机器人可以探索环境，并在完成此任务后重新配置成球形并滚出。这种尺寸的变化改变了运动的动力学，可以帮助它们操纵多变的地形。球面重构相当于将球壳投影到平面上，这种操作在没有扭曲的情况下是不可能的。幸运的是，软材料有潜力适应高斯曲率的这种差异。模块化软机器人（MSoRos）有望通过利用其连续体和可变形性质来实现尺寸变化。我们提出了能够在球形和平面配置之间重新配置的 MSoRos 的拓扑和形态设计。我们的方法基于几何学，其中柏拉图实体决定了平面到球体重新配置所需的模块数量以及所得球体的半径，例如，球体重新配置需要四个“基于四面体”或六个“基于立方体”的 MSoRo。该方法包括：(1) 将“模块拓扑曲线”逆投影到外接球体上以生成球形拓扑结构，(2) 将球形拓扑结构方位角投影到模块中心的切平面上，从而生成平面拓扑结构，以及 (3) 通过操纵空腔的几何形状来调整肢体刚度和卷曲能力，以实现物理有限宽度、电机腱驱动的 MSoRo。拓扑设计被证明是比例不变的，即基本柏拉图固体的比例在球形和平面拓扑中线性反映。使用量化球体到平面变形的度量，对模块拓扑曲线进行了重新配置和运动能力的优化。腔体的几何形状优化了肢体刚度和卷曲能力，而不影响致动器的结构完整性。 本文提出了一种模块化软体机器人（MSoRos）的拓扑和形态设计方法，使其能够实现从平面到球体的重构。 Caitlin Freeman,Michael Maynard,Vishesh Vikas cs.RO

authors_text: Xiaohan Zhang,Bharat Lal Bhatnagar,Vladimir Guzov,Sebastian Starke,Gerard Pons-Moll
title: COUCH: Towards Controllable Human-Chair Interactions
title_zh: COUCH：迈向可控的人椅交互
abstract: Humans interact with an object in many different ways by making contact at different locations, creating a highly complex motion space that can be difficult to learn, particularly when synthesizing such human interactions in a controllable manner. Existing works on synthesizing human scene interaction focus on the high-level control of action but do not consider the fine-grained control of motion. In this work, we study the problem of synthesizing scene interactions conditioned on different contact positions on the object. As a testbed to investigate this new problem, we focus on human-chair interaction as one of the most common actions which exhibit large variability in terms of contacts. We propose a novel synthesis framework COUCH that plans ahead the motion by predicting contact-aware control signals of the hands, which are then used to synthesize contact-conditioned interactions. Furthermore, we contribute a large human-chair interaction dataset with clean annotations, the COUCH Dataset. Our method shows significant quantitative and qualitative improvements over existing methods for human-object interactions. More importantly, our method enables control of the motion through user-specified or automatically predicted contacts.
summary: Humans interact with an object in many different ways by making contact at different locations, creating a highly complex motion space that can be difficult to learn, particularly when synthesizing such human interactions in a controllable manner. Existing works on synthesizing human scene interaction focus on the high-level control of action but do not consider the fine-grained control of motion. In this work, we study the problem of synthesizing scene interactions conditioned on different contact positions on the object. As a testbed to investigate this new problem, we focus on human-chair interaction as one of the most common actions which exhibit large variability in terms of contacts. We propose a novel synthesis framework COUCH that plans ahead the motion by predicting contact-aware control signals of the hands, which are then used to synthesize contact-conditioned interactions. Furthermore, we contribute a large human-chair interaction dataset with clean annotations, the COUCH Dataset. Our method shows significant quantitative and qualitative improvements over existing methods for human-object interactions. More importantly, our method enables control of the motion through user-specified or automatically predicted contacts.
abstract_zh: 人类通过在不同位置进行接触，以多种不同的方式与物体进行交互，从而创建了一个难以学习的高度复杂的运动空间，特别是在以可控方式合成此类人类交互时。现有的合成人类场景交互的工作侧重于动作的高级控制，但没有考虑运动的细粒度控制。在这项工作中，我们研究了根据对象上不同接触位置合成场景交互的问题。作为研究这个新问题的测试平台，我们重点关注人与椅子的互动，这是最常见的行为之一，在接触方面表现出很大的可变性。我们提出了一种新颖的合成框架 COUCH，它通过预测手部的接触感知控制信号来提前规划运动，然后将其用于合成接触条件交互。此外，我们还贡献了一个带有清晰注释的大型人椅交互数据集，即 COUCH 数据集。我们的方法比现有的人机交互方法显示出显着的定量和定性改进。更重要的是，我们的方法可以通过用户指定或自动预测的接触来控制运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COUCH框架，通过预测接触感知的控制信号来实现基于接触位置的人椅交互合成，并构建了COUCH数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在合成人类场景交互时仅关注高层动作控制，未考虑细粒度运动控制，难以实现精确的可控交互。
AI.method: 提出COUCH框架，通过预测手部接触感知的控制信号，结合接触位置条件生成交互动作，并构建包含清洁标注的COUCH数据集。
AI.result: 在定量和定性评估中均优于现有方法，实现了通过用户指定或自动预测接触点控制运动的目标。
AI.conclusion: COUCH方法有效解决了接触条件下的可控交互合成问题，数据集为相关研究提供了重要资源。

title: Enumeration Classes Defined by Circuits
title_zh: 电路定义的枚举类
abstract: We refine the complexity landscape for enumeration problems by introducing very low classes defined by using Boolean circuits as enumerators. We locate well-known enumeration problems, e.g., from graph theory, Gray code enumeration, and propositional satisfiability in our classes. In this way we obtain a framework to distinguish between the complexity of different problems known to be in $\mathbf{DelayP}$, for which a formal way of comparison was not possible to this day.
summary: We refine the complexity landscape for enumeration problems by introducing very low classes defined by using Boolean circuits as enumerators. We locate well-known enumeration problems, e.g., from graph theory, Gray code enumeration, and propositional satisfiability in our classes. In this way we obtain a framework to distinguish between the complexity of different problems known to be in $\mathbf{DelayP}$, for which a formal way of comparison was not possible to this day.
abstract_zh: 我们通过引入使用布尔电路作为枚举器定义的非常低的类来完善枚举问题的复杂性。我们在我们的类中找到了众所周知的枚举问题，例如图论、格雷码枚举和命题可满足性。通过这种方式，我们获得了一个框架来区分 $\mathbf{DelayP}$ 中已知的不同问题的复杂性，迄今为止还无法进行正式的比较。

AI.tldr: 通过布尔电路定义新的枚举复杂性类，以更精细地区分不同枚举问题的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有理论无法有效比较DelayP类中不同枚举问题的复杂性，需建立新的分类框架。
AI.method: 引入布尔电路作为枚举器，定义低复杂性类并归类经典枚举问题（如图论、Gray码、SAT）。
AI.result: 明确经典问题在新类中的位置，建立DelayP内问题复杂性比较的理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 电路定义的枚举类为分析问题复杂性差异提供了新工具，推动了枚举计算理论的发展。

title: Can Information Behaviour Inform Machine Learning?
title_zh: 信息行为可以为机器学习提供信息吗？
abstract: The objective of this paper is to explore the opportunities for human information behaviour research to inform and influence the field of machine learning and the resulting machine information behaviour. Using the development of foundation models in machine learning as an example, the paper illustrates how human information behaviour research can bring to machine learning a more nuanced view of information and informing, a better understanding of information need and how that affects the communication among people and systems, guidance on the nature of context and how to operationalize that in models and systems, and insights into bias, misinformation, and marginalization. Despite their clear differences, the fields of information behaviour and machine learning share many common objectives, paradigms, and key research questions. The example of foundation models illustrates that human information behaviour research has much to offer in addressing some of the challenges emerging in the nascent area of machine information behaviour.
summary: The objective of this paper is to explore the opportunities for human information behaviour research to inform and influence the field of machine learning and the resulting machine information behaviour. Using the development of foundation models in machine learning as an example, the paper illustrates how human information behaviour research can bring to machine learning a more nuanced view of information and informing, a better understanding of information need and how that affects the communication among people and systems, guidance on the nature of context and how to operationalize that in models and systems, and insights into bias, misinformation, and marginalization. Despite their clear differences, the fields of information behaviour and machine learning share many common objectives, paradigms, and key research questions. The example of foundation models illustrates that human information behaviour research has much to offer in addressing some of the challenges emerging in the nascent area of machine information behaviour.
abstract_zh: 本文的目的是探索人类信息行为研究为机器学习领域以及由此产生的机器信息行为提供信息和影响的机会。本文以机器学习中基础模型的发展为例，阐述了人类信息行为研究如何为机器学习带来对信息和告知的更细致的看法，更好地理解信息需求及其如何影响人与系统之间的沟通，指导环境的性质以及如何在模型和系统中操作它，以及对偏见、错误信息和边缘化的洞察。尽管存在明显的差异，但信息行为和机器学习领域有许多共同的目标、范式和关键研究问题。基础模型的例子表明，人类信息行为研究在解决机器信息行为新兴领域中出现的一些挑战方面大有可为。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人类信息行为研究如何为机器学习领域提供启示，并影响机器信息行为的发展。
AI.motivation: 信息行为与机器学习在目标、范式和研究问题上存在共性，但机器信息行为面临上下文理解、偏见和误信息等挑战，需借鉴人类信息行为研究的成果。
AI.method: 以机器学习中的基础模型发展为例，分析人类信息行为研究如何为机器学习提供信息需求理解、上下文建模及偏见处理等方面的指导。
AI.result: 人类信息行为研究可为机器学习提供更细致的信息视角、信息需求分析框架、上下文建模方法以及对偏见和误信息的洞察。
AI.conclusion: 信息行为与机器学习需加强跨学科合作，人类信息行为研究能有效应对机器信息行为中的新兴挑战，推动两领域协同发展。
