search_text: Can Information Behaviour Inform Machine Learning? 信息行为可以为机器学习提供信息吗？ The objective of this paper is to explore the opportunities for human information behaviour research to inform and influence the field of machine learning and the resulting machine information behaviour. Using the development of foundation models in machine learning as an example, the paper illustrates how human information behaviour research can bring to machine learning a more nuanced view of information and informing, a better understanding of information need and how that affects the communication among people and systems, guidance on the nature of context and how to operationalize that in models and systems, and insights into bias, misinformation, and marginalization. Despite their clear differences, the fields of information behaviour and machine learning share many common objectives, paradigms, and key research questions. The example of foundation models illustrates that human information behaviour research has much to offer in addressing some of the challenges emerging in the nascent area of machine information behaviour. 本文的目的是探索人类信息行为研究为机器学习领域以及由此产生的机器信息行为提供信息和影响的机会。本文以机器学习中基础模型的发展为例，阐述了人类信息行为研究如何为机器学习带来对信息和告知的更细致的看法，更好地理解信息需求及其如何影响人与系统之间的沟通，指导环境的性质以及如何在模型和系统中操作它，以及对偏见、错误信息和边缘化的洞察。尽管存在明显的差异，但信息行为和机器学习领域有许多共同的目标、范式和关键研究问题。基础模型的例子表明，人类信息行为研究在解决机器信息行为新兴领域中出现的一些挑战方面大有可为。 本文探讨人类信息行为研究如何为机器学习领域提供启示，并影响机器信息行为的发展。 Michael Ridley cs.LG,cs.HC

title: Deep vs. Shallow Learning: A Benchmark Study in Low Magnitude Earthquake Detection
title_zh: 深度学习与浅层学习：低强度地震检测的基准研究
abstract: While deep learning models have seen recent high uptake in the geosciences, and are appealing in their ability to learn from minimally processed input data, as black box models they do not provide an easy means to understand how a decision is reached, which in safety-critical tasks especially can be problematical. An alternative route is to use simpler, more transparent white box models, in which task-specific feature construction replaces the more opaque feature discovery process performed automatically within deep learning models. Using data from the Groningen Gas Field in the Netherlands, we build on an existing logistic regression model by the addition of four further features discovered using elastic net driven data mining within the catch22 time series analysis package. We then evaluate the performance of the augmented logistic regression model relative to a deep (CNN) model, pre-trained on the Groningen data, on progressively increasing noise-to-signal ratios. We discover that, for each ratio, our logistic regression model correctly detects every earthquake, while the deep model fails to detect nearly 20 % of seismic events, thus justifying at least a degree of caution in the application of deep models, especially to data with higher noise-to-signal ratios.
summary: While deep learning models have seen recent high uptake in the geosciences, and are appealing in their ability to learn from minimally processed input data, as black box models they do not provide an easy means to understand how a decision is reached, which in safety-critical tasks especially can be problematical. An alternative route is to use simpler, more transparent white box models, in which task-specific feature construction replaces the more opaque feature discovery process performed automatically within deep learning models. Using data from the Groningen Gas Field in the Netherlands, we build on an existing logistic regression model by the addition of four further features discovered using elastic net driven data mining within the catch22 time series analysis package. We then evaluate the performance of the augmented logistic regression model relative to a deep (CNN) model, pre-trained on the Groningen data, on progressively increasing noise-to-signal ratios. We discover that, for each ratio, our logistic regression model correctly detects every earthquake, while the deep model fails to detect nearly 20 % of seismic events, thus justifying at least a degree of caution in the application of deep models, especially to data with higher noise-to-signal ratios.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度学习模型最近在地球科学中得到了广泛的应用，并且从最低限度处理的输入数据中学习的能力很有吸引力，但作为黑盒模型，它们无法提供一种简单的方法来理解决策是如何达成的，这在安全关键任务中尤其可能出现问题。另一种途径是使用更简单、更透明的白盒模型，其中特定于任务的特征构建取代了深度学习模型中自动执行的更不透明的特征发现过程。使用来自荷兰格罗宁根气田的数据，我们在现有的逻辑回归模型的基础上，添加了使用 catch22 时间序列分析包中的弹性网络驱动数据挖掘发现的四个进一步特征。然后，我们评估增强逻辑回归模型相对于深度 (CNN) 模型的性能，该模型在格罗宁根数据上进行预训练，并逐步增加噪声信号比。我们发现，对于每个比率，我们的逻辑回归模型都能正确检测到每次地震，而深度模型无法检测到近 20% 的地震事件，因此证明在应用深度模型时至少需要一定程度的谨慎，特别是对于具有较高噪声信号比的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了深度学习与浅层模型在低震级地震检测中的性能差异，特别是在不同信噪比条件下的表现。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型作为黑箱模型缺乏可解释性，在安全关键任务中存在风险，而透明的白箱模型可能更可靠。
AI.method: 基于荷兰格罗宁根气田数据，扩展逻辑回归模型并引入四个通过弹性网挖掘的时序特征，与预训练CNN模型进行信噪比逐步增加的性能对比。
AI.result: 逻辑回归模型在所有信噪比条件下均能正确检测地震，而深度模型漏检率高达20%。
AI.conclusion: 深度模型在高噪声环境下表现不稳定，应谨慎应用于此类任务，浅层模型结合特征工程更具可靠性。

title: Deep Learning with Logical Constraints
title_zh: 具有逻辑约束的深度学习
abstract: In recent years, there has been an increasing interest in exploiting logically specified background knowledge in order to obtain neural models (i) with a better performance, (ii) able to learn from less data, and/or (iii) guaranteed to be compliant with the background knowledge itself, e.g., for safety-critical applications. In this survey, we retrace such works and categorize them based on (i) the logical language that they use to express the background knowledge and (ii) the goals that they achieve.
summary: In recent years, there has been an increasing interest in exploiting logically specified background knowledge in order to obtain neural models (i) with a better performance, (ii) able to learn from less data, and/or (iii) guaranteed to be compliant with the background knowledge itself, e.g., for safety-critical applications. In this survey, we retrace such works and categorize them based on (i) the logical language that they use to express the background knowledge and (ii) the goals that they achieve.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们越来越关注利用逻辑指定的背景知识以获得神经模型（i）具有更好的性能，（ii）能够从更少的数据中学习，和/或（iii）保证符合背景知识本身，例如用于安全关键型应用。在这项调查中，我们回顾这些作品并根据（i）它们用来表达背景知识的逻辑语言和（ii）它们实现的目标对它们进行分类。

AI.tldr: 综述利用逻辑约束改进深度学习模型的研究，分类相关方法并分析其目标和使用的逻辑语言
AI.motivation: 提升模型性能、减少数据依赖并确保安全关键应用中的合规性
AI.method: 通过回顾现有研究，按逻辑语言类型和实现目标对方法进行分类
AI.result: 系统分类了不同逻辑语言和目标下的方法，总结了其优缺点及适用场景
AI.conclusion: 强调逻辑约束在深度学习中的重要性，并指出未来研究方向，如更高效的整合方法

title: Scheduling for Multi-Phase Parallelizable Jobs
title_zh: 多阶段并行作业的调度
abstract: With multiple identical unit speed servers, the online problem of scheduling jobs that migrate between two phases, limitedly parallelizable or completely sequential, and choosing their respective speeds to minimize the total flow time is considered. In the limited parallelizable regime, allocating $k$ servers to a job, the speed extracted is $k^{1/α}, α>1$, a sub-linear, concave speedup function, while in the sequential phase, a job can be processed by at most one server with a maximum speed of unity. A LCFS based algorithm is proposed for scheduling jobs which always assigns equal speed to the jobs that are in the same phase (limitedly parallelizable/sequential), and is shown to have a constant (dependent only on $α> 1$) competitive ratio. For the special case when all jobs are available beforehand, improved competitive ratio is obtained.
summary: With multiple identical unit speed servers, the online problem of scheduling jobs that migrate between two phases, limitedly parallelizable or completely sequential, and choosing their respective speeds to minimize the total flow time is considered. In the limited parallelizable regime, allocating $k$ servers to a job, the speed extracted is $k^{1/α}, α>1$, a sub-linear, concave speedup function, while in the sequential phase, a job can be processed by at most one server with a maximum speed of unity. A LCFS based algorithm is proposed for scheduling jobs which always assigns equal speed to the jobs that are in the same phase (limitedly parallelizable/sequential), and is shown to have a constant (dependent only on $α> 1$) competitive ratio. For the special case when all jobs are available beforehand, improved competitive ratio is obtained.
abstract_zh: 使用多个相同单位速度的服务器，考虑调度在两个阶段（有限并行或完全顺序）之间迁移的作业，并选择它们各自的速度以最小化总流动时间的在线问题。在有限可并行机制中，为一个作业分配$k$个服务器，提取的速度为$k^{1/α}，α>1$，是一个次线性、凹加速函数，而在顺序阶段，一个作业最多可以由一台服务器处理，其最大速度为统一。提出了一种基于 LCFS 的算法用于调度作业，该算法始终为同一阶段（有限并行/顺序）的作业分配相同的速度，并且具有恒定的竞争比（仅取决于 $α> 1$）。对于所有工作都预先提供的特殊情况，可以获得更高的竞争比。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多服务器环境下，如何调度可迁移于有限并行和顺序阶段的任务，以最小化总流时间。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对多阶段任务调度的有效策略，特别是在不同阶段速度选择与资源分配的优化方面，本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于后进先出（LCFS）的调度算法，为同一阶段的任务分配相等的速度，并结合不同阶段的速度调整策略。
AI.result: 该算法在一般情况下实现了与α相关的常数竞争比，且在离线场景下进一步优化了竞争比。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的调度算法有效平衡了多阶段任务的资源分配，为在线和离线场景提供了理论保证，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Scheduling for Multi-Phase Parallelizable Jobs 多阶段并行作业的调度 With multiple identical unit speed servers, the online problem of scheduling jobs that migrate between two phases, limitedly parallelizable or completely sequential, and choosing their respective speeds to minimize the total flow time is considered. In the limited parallelizable regime, allocating $k$ servers to a job, the speed extracted is $k^{1/α}, α>1$, a sub-linear, concave speedup function, while in the sequential phase, a job can be processed by at most one server with a maximum speed of unity. A LCFS based algorithm is proposed for scheduling jobs which always assigns equal speed to the jobs that are in the same phase (limitedly parallelizable/sequential), and is shown to have a constant (dependent only on $α> 1$) competitive ratio. For the special case when all jobs are available beforehand, improved competitive ratio is obtained. 使用多个相同单位速度的服务器，考虑调度在两个阶段（有限并行或完全顺序）之间迁移的作业，并选择它们各自的速度以最小化总流动时间的在线问题。在有限可并行机制中，为一个作业分配$k$个服务器，提取的速度为$k^{1/α}，α>1$，是一个次线性、凹加速函数，而在顺序阶段，一个作业最多可以由一台服务器处理，其最大速度为统一。提出了一种基于 LCFS 的算法用于调度作业，该算法始终为同一阶段（有限并行/顺序）的作业分配相同的速度，并且具有恒定的竞争比（仅取决于 $α> 1$）。对于所有工作都预先提供的特殊情况，可以获得更高的竞争比。 本文研究了在多服务器环境下，如何调度可迁移于有限并行和顺序阶段的任务，以最小化总流时间。 Rahul Vaze cs.DS,cs.NI

title: Accurate non-stationary short-term traffic flow prediction method
title_zh: 准确的非平稳短期交通流预测方法
abstract: Precise and timely traffic flow prediction plays a critical role in developing intelligent transportation systems and has attracted considerable attention in recent decades. Despite the significant progress in this area brought by deep learning, challenges remain. Traffic flows usually change dramatically in a short period, which prevents the current methods from accurately capturing the future trend and likely causes the over-fitting problem, leading to unsatisfied accuracy. To this end, this paper proposes a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) based method that can forecast the short-term traffic flow precisely and avoid local optimum problems during training. Specifically, instead of using the non-stationary raw traffic data directly, we first decompose them into sub-components, where each one is less noisy than the original input. Afterward, Sample Entropy (SE) is employed to merge similar components to reduce the computation cost. The merged features are fed into the LSTM, and we then introduce a spatiotemporal module to consider the neighboring relationships in the recombined signals to avoid strong autocorrelation. During training, we utilize the Grey Wolf Algorithm (GWO) to optimize the parameters of LSTM, which overcome the overfitting issue. We conduct the experiments on a UK public highway traffic flow dataset, and the results show that the proposed method performs favorably against other state-of-the-art methods with better adaption performance on extreme outliers, delay effects, and trend-changing responses.
summary: Precise and timely traffic flow prediction plays a critical role in developing intelligent transportation systems and has attracted considerable attention in recent decades. Despite the significant progress in this area brought by deep learning, challenges remain. Traffic flows usually change dramatically in a short period, which prevents the current methods from accurately capturing the future trend and likely causes the over-fitting problem, leading to unsatisfied accuracy. To this end, this paper proposes a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) based method that can forecast the short-term traffic flow precisely and avoid local optimum problems during training. Specifically, instead of using the non-stationary raw traffic data directly, we first decompose them into sub-components, where each one is less noisy than the original input. Afterward, Sample Entropy (SE) is employed to merge similar components to reduce the computation cost. The merged features are fed into the LSTM, and we then introduce a spatiotemporal module to consider the neighboring relationships in the recombined signals to avoid strong autocorrelation. During training, we utilize the Grey Wolf Algorithm (GWO) to optimize the parameters of LSTM, which overcome the overfitting issue. We conduct the experiments on a UK public highway traffic flow dataset, and the results show that the proposed method performs favorably against other state-of-the-art methods with better adaption performance on extreme outliers, delay effects, and trend-changing responses.
abstract_zh: 精确、及时的交通流量预测在发展智能交通系统中发挥着至关重要的作用，并在近几十年来引起了广泛的关注。尽管深度学习在这一领域取得了重大进展，但挑战仍然存在。交通流量通常会在短时间内发生巨大变化，这使得当前的方法无法准确捕捉未来的趋势，并且很可能出现过拟合问题，导致精度不理想。为此，本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆（LSTM）的方法，可以精确预测短期交通流并避免训练期间的局部最优问题。具体来说，我们不是直接使用非平稳原始流量数据，而是首先将它们分解为子组件，其中每个子组件都比原始输入的噪声要小。然后，采用样本熵（SE）来合并相似的组件以降低计算成本。合并的特征被输入 LSTM，然后我们引入一个时空模块来考虑重组信号中的相邻关系，以避免强自相关。在训练过程中，我们利用灰狼算法（GWO）来优化LSTM的参数，克服了过拟合问题。我们在英国公共高速公路交通流量数据集上进行了实验，结果表明，所提出的方法优于其他最先进的方法，对极端异常值、延迟效应和趋势变化响应具有更好的适应性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LSTM的非平稳短期交通流预测方法，通过分解数据、合并特征和优化参数提升预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以准确捕捉短期交通流的剧烈变化，易导致过拟合和预测精度不足，需改进方法应对非平稳特性。
AI.method: 采用LSTM模型，先通过分解技术降低噪声，再用样本熵合并相似成分，引入时空模块处理邻近关系，并利用灰狼算法优化参数以避免过拟合。
AI.result: 在英国公路交通数据集上，该方法在极端异常值、延迟效应和趋势变化场景下均优于其他先进方法，适应性更强。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了短期交通流预测中的过拟合和局部最优问题，显著提升了非平稳场景下的预测准确性。

Specifically, instead of using the non-stationary raw traffic data directly, we first decompose them into sub-components, where each one is less noisy than the original input. Afterward, Sample Entropy (SE) is employed to merge similar components to reduce the computation cost. title: The Best of Both Worlds: Combining Model-based and Nonparametric Approaches for 3D Human Body Estimation
title_zh: 两全其美：结合基于模型的方法和非参数方法进行 3D 人体估计
abstract: Nonparametric based methods have recently shown promising results in reconstructing human bodies from monocular images while model-based methods can help correct these estimates and improve prediction. However, estimating model parameters from global image features may lead to noticeable misalignment between the estimated meshes and image evidence. To address this issue and leverage the best of both worlds, we propose a framework of three consecutive modules. A dense map prediction module explicitly establishes the dense UV correspondence between the image evidence and each part of the body model. The inverse kinematics module refines the key point prediction and generates a posed template mesh. Finally, a UV inpainting module relies on the corresponding feature, prediction and the posed template, and completes the predictions of occluded body shape. Our framework leverages the best of non-parametric and model-based methods and is also robust to partial occlusion. Experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms existing 3D human estimation methods on multiple public benchmarks.
summary: Nonparametric based methods have recently shown promising results in reconstructing human bodies from monocular images while model-based methods can help correct these estimates and improve prediction. However, estimating model parameters from global image features may lead to noticeable misalignment between the estimated meshes and image evidence. To address this issue and leverage the best of both worlds, we propose a framework of three consecutive modules. A dense map prediction module explicitly establishes the dense UV correspondence between the image evidence and each part of the body model. The inverse kinematics module refines the key point prediction and generates a posed template mesh. Finally, a UV inpainting module relies on the corresponding feature, prediction and the posed template, and completes the predictions of occluded body shape. Our framework leverages the best of non-parametric and model-based methods and is also robust to partial occlusion. Experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms existing 3D human estimation methods on multiple public benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 基于非参数的方法最近在从单眼图像重建人体方面显示出了有希望的结果，而基于模型的方法可以帮助纠正这些估计并改进预测。然而，从全局图像特征估计模型参数可能会导致估计网格和图像证据之间明显的不一致。为了解决这个问题并充分利用两个世界的优点，我们提出了一个由三个连续模块组成的框架。密集图预测模块明确地建立了图像证据和身体模型的每个部分之间的密集 UV 对应关系。逆运动学模块细化关键点预测并生成姿势模板网格。最后，UV修复模块依靠相应的特征、预测和姿势模板，完成被遮挡体形的预测。我们的框架利用了最好的非参数和基于模型的方法，并且对部分遮挡也具有鲁棒性。实验表明，我们的框架在多个公共基准上优于现有的 3D 人体估计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合基于模型和非参数方法的框架，用于从单目图像中更精确地估计3D人体形状。
AI.motivation: 非参数方法在人体重建中表现良好，但基于模型的方法能修正其估计结果。然而，直接从图像特征估计模型参数可能导致网格与图像证据的明显错位，因此需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 框架包含三个模块：1) 密集地图预测模块建立图像与身体模型部分的UV对应关系；2) 逆运动学模块优化关键点预测并生成姿态模板网格；3) UV修复模块利用对应特征和模板完成遮挡区域预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在多个公开基准测试中优于现有3D人体估计方法，尤其在处理部分遮挡时表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合非参数与基于模型方法的优势，该框架有效解决了估计错位问题，并提升了遮挡场景下的预测精度。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合基于模型和非参数方法的框架，用于从单目图像中更精确地估计3D人体形状。
motivation: 非参数方法在人体重建中表现良好，但基于模型的方法能修正其估计结果。然而，直接从图像特征估计模型参数可能导致网格与图像证据的明显错位，因此需融合两者优势。
method: 框架包含三个模块：1) 密集地图预测模块建立图像与身体模型部分的UV对应关系；2) 逆运动学模块优化关键点预测并生成姿态模板网格；3) UV修复模块利用对应特征和模板完成遮挡区域预测。
result: 实验表明，该框架在多个公开基准测试中优于现有3D人体估计方法，尤其在处理部分遮挡时表现稳健。
conclusion: 通过结合非参数与基于模型方法的优势，该框架有效解决了估计错位问题，并提升了遮挡场景下的预测精度。
search_text: The Best of Both Worlds: Combining Model-based and Nonparametric Approaches for 3D Human Body Estimation 两全其美：结合基于模型的方法和非参数方法进行 3D 人体估计 Nonparametric based methods have recently shown promising results in reconstructing human bodies from monocular images while model-based methods can help correct these estimates and improve prediction. However, estimating model parameters from global image features may lead to noticeable misalignment between the estimated meshes and image evidence. To address this issue and leverage the best of both worlds, we propose a framework of three consecutive modules. A dense map prediction module explicitly establishes the dense UV correspondence between the image evidence and each part of the body model. The inverse kinematics module refines the key point prediction and generates a posed template mesh. Finally, a UV inpainting module relies on the corresponding feature, prediction and the posed template, and completes the predictions of occluded body shape. Our framework leverages the best of non-parametric and model-based methods and is also robust to partial occlusion. Experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms existing 3D human estimation methods on multiple public benchmarks. 基于非参数的方法最近在从单眼图像重建人体方面显示出了有希望的结果，而基于模型的方法可以帮助纠正这些估计并改进预测。然而，从全局图像特征估计模型参数可能会导致估计网格和图像证据之间明显的不一致。为了解决这个问题并充分利用两个世界的优点，我们提出了一个由三个连续模块组成的框架。密集图预测模块明确地建立了图像证据和身体模型的每个部分之间的密集 UV 对应关系。逆运动学模块细化关键点预测并生成姿势模板网格。最后，UV修复模块依靠相应的特征、预测和姿势模板，完成被遮挡体形的预测。我们的框架利用了最好的非参数和基于模型的方法，并且对部分遮挡也具有鲁棒性。实验表明，我们的框架在多个公共基准上优于现有的 3D 人体估计方法。 本文提出了一种结合基于模型和非参数方法的框架，用于从单目图像中更精确地估计3D人体形状。 Zhe Wang,Jimei Yang,Charless Fowlkes cs.CV

authors_text: Yang Zhou,Zhanhao He,Keyu Lu,Guanhong Wang,Gaoang Wang
title: Preserve Pre-trained Knowledge: Transfer Learning With Self-Distillation For Action Recognition
title_zh: 保留预先训练的知识：通过自蒸馏进行迁移学习以进行动作识别
abstract: Video-based action recognition is one of the most popular topics in computer vision. With recent advances of selfsupervised video representation learning approaches, action recognition usually follows a two-stage training framework, i.e., self-supervised pre-training on large-scale unlabeled sets and transfer learning on a downstream labeled set. However, catastrophic forgetting of the pre-trained knowledge becomes the main issue in the downstream transfer learning of action recognition, resulting in a sub-optimal solution. In this paper, to alleviate the above issue, we propose a novel transfer learning approach that combines self-distillation in fine-tuning to preserve knowledge from the pre-trained model learned from the large-scale dataset. Specifically, we fix the encoder from the last epoch as the teacher model to guide the training of the encoder from the current epoch in the transfer learning. With such a simple yet effective learning strategy, we outperform state-of-the-art methods on widely used UCF101 and HMDB51 datasets in action recognition task.
summary: Video-based action recognition is one of the most popular topics in computer vision. With recent advances of selfsupervised video representation learning approaches, action recognition usually follows a two-stage training framework, i.e., self-supervised pre-training on large-scale unlabeled sets and transfer learning on a downstream labeled set. However, catastrophic forgetting of the pre-trained knowledge becomes the main issue in the downstream transfer learning of action recognition, resulting in a sub-optimal solution. In this paper, to alleviate the above issue, we propose a novel transfer learning approach that combines self-distillation in fine-tuning to preserve knowledge from the pre-trained model learned from the large-scale dataset. Specifically, we fix the encoder from the last epoch as the teacher model to guide the training of the encoder from the current epoch in the transfer learning. With such a simple yet effective learning strategy, we outperform state-of-the-art methods on widely used UCF101 and HMDB51 datasets in action recognition task.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的动作识别是计算机视觉中最流行的主题之一。随着自监督视频表示学习方法的最新进展，动作识别通常遵循两阶段训练框架，即对大规模未标记集进行自监督预训练和对下游标记集进行迁移学习。然而，预训练知识的灾难性遗忘成为动作识别下游迁移学习的主要问题，导致解决方案次优。在本文中，为了缓解上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的迁移学习方法，该方法将自蒸馏与微调相结合，以保留从大规模数据集中学习到的预训练模型中的知识。具体来说，我们将上一个时期的编码器固定为教师模型，以指导迁移学习中当前时期的编码器的训练。通过这种简单而有效的学习策略，我们在动作识别任务中广泛使用的 UCF101 和 HMDB51 数据集上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自蒸馏的迁移学习方法，用于在动作识别任务中保留预训练模型的知识，解决迁移学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 在动作识别的迁移学习阶段，预训练模型的知识容易发生灾难性遗忘，导致性能下降，现有方法难以有效保留预训练知识。
AI.method: 通过在微调阶段引入自蒸馏机制，将预训练模型的最后一轮编码器作为教师模型，指导当前训练阶段的编码器学习，从而保留预训练知识。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上，该方法优于当前最先进的动作识别方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏迁移学习方法能有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，通过保留预训练知识提升动作识别性能，是一种简单而有效的解决方案。

title: Domain Adaptation meets Individual Fairness. And they get along
title_zh: 领域适应符合个人公平。他们相处融洽
abstract: Many instances of algorithmic bias are caused by distributional shifts. For example, machine learning (ML) models often perform worse on demographic groups that are underrepresented in the training data. In this paper, we leverage this connection between algorithmic fairness and distribution shifts to show that algorithmic fairness interventions can help ML models overcome distribution shifts, and that domain adaptation methods (for overcoming distribution shifts) can mitigate algorithmic biases. In particular, we show that (i) enforcing suitable notions of individual fairness (IF) can improve the out-of-distribution accuracy of ML models under the covariate shift assumption and that (ii) it is possible to adapt representation alignment methods for domain adaptation to enforce individual fairness. The former is unexpected because IF interventions were not developed with distribution shifts in mind. The latter is also unexpected because representation alignment is not a common approach in the individual fairness literature.
summary: Many instances of algorithmic bias are caused by distributional shifts. For example, machine learning (ML) models often perform worse on demographic groups that are underrepresented in the training data. In this paper, we leverage this connection between algorithmic fairness and distribution shifts to show that algorithmic fairness interventions can help ML models overcome distribution shifts, and that domain adaptation methods (for overcoming distribution shifts) can mitigate algorithmic biases. In particular, we show that (i) enforcing suitable notions of individual fairness (IF) can improve the out-of-distribution accuracy of ML models under the covariate shift assumption and that (ii) it is possible to adapt representation alignment methods for domain adaptation to enforce individual fairness. The former is unexpected because IF interventions were not developed with distribution shifts in mind. The latter is also unexpected because representation alignment is not a common approach in the individual fairness literature.
abstract_zh: 许多算法偏差的例子是由分布变化引起的。例如，机器学习 (ML) 模型通常在训练数据中代表性不足的人口群体中表现较差。在本文中，我们利用算法公平性和分布变化之间的联系来表明算法公平干预可以帮助机器学习模型克服分布变化，并且域适应方法（用于克服分布变化）可以减轻算法偏差。特别是，我们表明（i）强制执行适当的个体公平性（IF）概念可以提高协变量移位假设下机器学习模型的分布外精度，并且（ii）可以采用域适应的表示对齐方法来强制个体公平性。前者是出乎意料的，因为 IF 干预措施的制定并未考虑到分布变化。后者也是出乎意料的，因为表示对齐并不是个人公平文献中的常见方法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨领域自适应与个体公平性的关联，提出通过算法公平性干预和领域自适应方法共同解决分布偏移与算法偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 算法偏差常由数据分布偏移引发，而现有方法分别针对分布偏移或公平性问题，缺乏两者的协同研究。
AI.method: （1）在协变量偏移假设下，通过强制个体公平性约束提升模型分布外准确性；（2）改造领域自适应中的表示对齐方法以实现个体公平性。
AI.result: （1）个体公平性干预显著提升模型在分布外数据的准确性；（2）表示对齐方法可有效约束个体公平性，验证了两种方法的互补性。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应与个体公平性存在协同效应，为解决算法偏差与分布偏移问题提供了新思路。

title: Is Your Toxicity My Toxicity? Exploring the Impact of Rater Identity on Toxicity Annotation
title_zh: 你的毒性就是我的毒性吗？探索评估者身份对毒性注释的影响
comment: Proceedings of ACM in Human Computer Interaction in ACM Conference On Computer- Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing CSCW 2022
comments: Proceedings of ACM in Human Computer Interaction in ACM Conference On Computer- Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing CSCW 2022
abstract: Machine learning models are commonly used to detect toxicity in online conversations. These models are trained on datasets annotated by human raters. We explore how raters' self-described identities impact how they annotate toxicity in online comments. We first define the concept of specialized rater pools: rater pools formed based on raters' self-described identities, rather than at random. We formed three such rater pools for this study--specialized rater pools of raters from the U.S. who identify as African American, LGBTQ, and those who identify as neither. Each of these rater pools annotated the same set of comments, which contains many references to these identity groups. We found that rater identity is a statistically significant factor in how raters will annotate toxicity for identity-related annotations. Using preliminary content analysis, we examined the comments with the most disagreement between rater pools and found nuanced differences in the toxicity annotations. Next, we trained models on the annotations from each of the different rater pools, and compared the scores of these models on comments from several test sets. Finally, we discuss how using raters that self-identify with the subjects of comments can create more inclusive machine learning models, and provide more nuanced ratings than those by random raters.
summary: Machine learning models are commonly used to detect toxicity in online conversations. These models are trained on datasets annotated by human raters. We explore how raters' self-described identities impact how they annotate toxicity in online comments. We first define the concept of specialized rater pools: rater pools formed based on raters' self-described identities, rather than at random. We formed three such rater pools for this study--specialized rater pools of raters from the U.S. who identify as African American, LGBTQ, and those who identify as neither. Each of these rater pools annotated the same set of comments, which contains many references to these identity groups. We found that rater identity is a statistically significant factor in how raters will annotate toxicity for identity-related annotations. Using preliminary content analysis, we examined the comments with the most disagreement between rater pools and found nuanced differences in the toxicity annotations. Next, we trained models on the annotations from each of the different rater pools, and compared the scores of these models on comments from several test sets. Finally, we discuss how using raters that self-identify with the subjects of comments can create more inclusive machine learning models, and provide more nuanced ratings than those by random raters.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型通常用于检测在线对话中的毒性。这些模型是在由人类评分者注释的数据集上进行训练的。我们探讨了评估者的自我描述身份如何影响他们在在线评论中注释毒性的方式。我们首先定义专门的评估者池的概念：基于评估者自我描述的身份而不是随机形成的评估者池。我们为这项研究建立了三个这样的评估者库——来自美国的专门评估者库，其中包括非裔美国人、LGBTQ 群体以及两者都不是的评估者。每个评估者池都注释了同一组评论，其中包含对这些身份组的许多引用。我们发现，评估者身份是评估者如何注释身份相关注释毒性的一个统计显着因素。通过初步内容分析，我们检查了评估者群体之间分歧最大的评论，并发现毒性注释中存在细微差别。接下来，我们根据每个不同评分者池的注释训练模型，并根据多个测试集的评论比较这些模型的分数。最后，我们讨论如何使用自我认同评论主题的评分者来创建更具包容性的机器学习模型，并提供比随机评分者更细致的评分。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究标注者身份对在线评论毒性标注的影响，并探讨使用特定身份群体标注者训练模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有毒性检测模型可能因标注者身份差异导致偏差，而基于特定身份群体的标注可能提升模型包容性与标注细致度。
AI.method: 根据标注者自述身份划分三个专项标注群体（美国非裔、LGBTQ、其他），对相同评论集进行标注，分析标注差异并训练对比模型。
AI.result: 标注者身份显著影响毒性标注结果，不同群体间存在细微差异；基于专项标注集训练的模型在测试集上表现各异。
AI.conclusion: 采用与评论主题身份匹配的标注者可构建更具包容性的机器学习模型，提供比随机标注者更细致的毒性评分。

Exploring the Impact of Rater Identity on Toxicity Annotation 你的毒性就是我的毒性吗？探索评估者身份对毒性注释的影响 Machine learning models are commonly used to detect toxicity in online conversations. Each of these rater pools annotated the same set of comments, which contains many references to these identity groups. Using preliminary content analysis, we examined the comments with the most disagreement between rater pools and found nuanced differences in the toxicity annotations. authors_text: Yuanbo Hou,Bo Kang,Wout Van Hauwermeiren,Dick Botteldooren
title: Relation-guided acoustic scene classification aided with event embeddings
title_zh: 借助事件嵌入进行关系引导的声学场景分类
comment: International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
comments: International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
abstract: In real life, acoustic scenes and audio events are naturally correlated. Humans instinctively rely on fine-grained audio events as well as the overall sound characteristics to distinguish diverse acoustic scenes. Yet, most previous approaches treat acoustic scene classification (ASC) and audio event classification (AEC) as two independent tasks. A few studies on scene and event joint classification either use synthetic audio datasets that hardly match the real world, or simply use the multi-task framework to perform two tasks at the same time. Neither of these two ways makes full use of the implicit and inherent relation between fine-grained events and coarse-grained scenes. To this end, this paper proposes a relation-guided ASC (RGASC) model to further exploit and coordinate the scene-event relation for the mutual benefit of scene and event recognition. The TUT Urban Acoustic Scenes 2018 dataset (TUT2018) is annotated with pseudo labels of events by a simple and efficient audio-related pre-trained model PANN, which is one of the state-of-the-art AEC models. Then, a prior scene-event relation matrix is defined as the average probability of the presence of each event type in each scene class. Finally, the two-tower RGASC model is jointly trained on the real-life dataset TUT2018 for both scene and event classification. The following results are achieved. 1) RGASC effectively coordinates the true information of coarse-grained scenes and the pseudo information of fine-grained events. 2) The event embeddings learned from pseudo labels under the guidance of prior scene-event relations help reduce the confusion between similar acoustic scenes. 3) Compared with other (non-ensemble) methods, RGASC improves the scene classification accuracy on the real-life dataset.
summary: In real life, acoustic scenes and audio events are naturally correlated. Humans instinctively rely on fine-grained audio events as well as the overall sound characteristics to distinguish diverse acoustic scenes. Yet, most previous approaches treat acoustic scene classification (ASC) and audio event classification (AEC) as two independent tasks. A few studies on scene and event joint classification either use synthetic audio datasets that hardly match the real world, or simply use the multi-task framework to perform two tasks at the same time. Neither of these two ways makes full use of the implicit and inherent relation between fine-grained events and coarse-grained scenes. To this end, this paper proposes a relation-guided ASC (RGASC) model to further exploit and coordinate the scene-event relation for the mutual benefit of scene and event recognition. The TUT Urban Acoustic Scenes 2018 dataset (TUT2018) is annotated with pseudo labels of events by a simple and efficient audio-related pre-trained model PANN, which is one of the state-of-the-art AEC models. Then, a prior scene-event relation matrix is defined as the average probability of the presence of each event type in each scene class. Finally, the two-tower RGASC model is jointly trained on the real-life dataset TUT2018 for both scene and event classification. The following results are achieved. 1) RGASC effectively coordinates the true information of coarse-grained scenes and the pseudo information of fine-grained events. 2) The event embeddings learned from pseudo labels under the guidance of prior scene-event relations help reduce the confusion between similar acoustic scenes. 3) Compared with other (non-ensemble) methods, RGASC improves the scene classification accuracy on the real-life dataset.
abstract_zh: 在现实生活中，声学场景和音频事件自然相关。人类本能地依靠细粒度的音频事件以及整体声音特征来区分不同的声学场景。然而，大多数先前的方法将声学场景分类（ASC）和音频事件分类（AEC）视为两个独立的任务。一些关于场景和事件联合分类的研究要么使用与现实世界几乎不匹配的合成音频数据集，要么简单地使用多任务框架同时执行两个任务。这两种方式都没有充分利用细粒度事件和粗粒度场景之间隐含的内在关系。为此，本文提出了一种关系引导的ASC（RGASC）模型，以进一步开发和协调场景-事件关系，以实现场景和事件识别的互惠互利。 TUT Urban Acoustic Sc​​enes 2018 数据集 (TUT2018) 通过简单高效的音频相关预训练模型 PANN 使用事件的伪标签进行注释，该模型是最先进的 AEC 模型之一。然后，先验场景-事件关系矩阵被定义为每个场景类中每个事件类型存在的平均概率。最后，双塔 RGASC 模型在现实数据集 TUT2018 上联合训练，用于场景和事件分类。取得了以下成果。 1）RGASC有效协调了粗粒度场景的真实信息和细粒度事件的伪信息。 2）在先验场景-事件关系的指导下从伪标签学习的事件嵌入有助于减少相似声学场景之间的混淆。 3）与其他（非集成）方法相比，RGASC提高了现实数据集上的场景分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件嵌入的声学场景分类方法，通过利用场景与音频事件的关联关系提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有声学场景分类与音频事件分类方法未能有效利用场景与事件间的内在关联，导致分类性能受限。
AI.method: 使用PANN模型生成事件伪标签，构建先验场景-事件关系矩阵，并设计两塔结构模型联合训练场景与事件分类任务。
AI.result: RGASC模型有效协调了粗粒度场景与细粒度事件信息，减少了相似场景混淆，提升了真实数据集上的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模场景-事件关系，所提方法在真实场景分类任务中优于现有非集成方法，验证了关联信息利用的有效性。

ai_content.result: RGASC模型有效协调了粗粒度场景与细粒度事件信息，减少了相似场景混淆，提升了真实数据集上的分类准确率。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过显式建模场景-事件关系，所提方法在真实场景分类任务中优于现有非集成方法，验证了关联信息利用的有效性。

title: Bilingual End-to-End ASR with Byte-Level Subwords
title_zh: 具有字节级子字的双语端到端 ASR
comment: 5 pages, to be published in IEEE ICASSP 2022
comments: 5 pages, to be published in IEEE ICASSP 2022
abstract: In this paper, we investigate how the output representation of an end-to-end neural network affects multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR). We study different representations including character-level, byte-level, byte pair encoding (BPE), and byte-level byte pair encoding (BBPE) representations, and analyze their strengths and weaknesses. We focus on developing a single end-to-end model to support utterance-based bilingual ASR, where speakers do not alternate between two languages in a single utterance but may change languages across utterances. We conduct our experiments on English and Mandarin dictation tasks, and we find that BBPE with penalty schemes can improve utterance-based bilingual ASR performance by 2% to 5% relative even with smaller number of outputs and fewer parameters. We conclude with analysis that indicates directions for further improving multilingual ASR.
summary: In this paper, we investigate how the output representation of an end-to-end neural network affects multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR). We study different representations including character-level, byte-level, byte pair encoding (BPE), and byte-level byte pair encoding (BBPE) representations, and analyze their strengths and weaknesses. We focus on developing a single end-to-end model to support utterance-based bilingual ASR, where speakers do not alternate between two languages in a single utterance but may change languages across utterances. We conduct our experiments on English and Mandarin dictation tasks, and we find that BBPE with penalty schemes can improve utterance-based bilingual ASR performance by 2% to 5% relative even with smaller number of outputs and fewer parameters. We conclude with analysis that indicates directions for further improving multilingual ASR.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了端到端神经网络的输出表示如何影响多语言自动语音识别（ASR）。我们研究了不同的表示形式，包括字符级、字节级、字节对编码（BPE）和字节级字节对编码（BBPE）表示形式，并分析了它们的优缺点。我们专注于开发一个单一的端到端模型来支持基于话语的双语 ASR，其中说话者不会在单个话语中在两种语言之间交替，但可能会在不同话语中改变语言。我们在英语和普通话听写任务上进行了实验，我们发现，即使输出数量较少、参数较少，带有惩罚方案的 BBPE 也可以将基于话语的双语 ASR 性能相对提高 2% 至 5%。我们通过分析得出结论，指出进一步改进多语言 ASR 的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了端到端神经网络输出表示对多语言自动语音识别（ASR）的影响，提出基于字节级子词（BBPE）的表示方法可提升双语ASR性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR模型在处理多语言任务时面临输出表示复杂性和参数效率的挑战，需探索更高效的跨语言表征方式。
AI.method: 对比分析字符级、字节级、BPE和BBPE等表示方法，开发支持跨utterance语言切换的单模型双语ASR框架，并引入惩罚机制优化BBPE。
AI.result: 在英文和中文听写任务中，BBPE结合惩罚机制使双语ASR性能相对提升2%-5%，且模型参数更少。
AI.conclusion: BBPE表示方法在双语ASR中表现优异，未来需进一步优化跨语言表征和模型泛化能力。

search_text: Bilingual End-to-End ASR with Byte-Level Subwords 具有字节级子字的双语端到端 ASR In this paper, we investigate how the output representation of an end-to-end neural network affects multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR). We study different representations including character-level, byte-level, byte pair encoding (BPE), and byte-level byte pair encoding (BBPE) representations, and analyze their strengths and weaknesses. We focus on developing a single end-to-end model to support utterance-based bilingual ASR, where speakers do not alternate between two languages in a single utterance but may change languages across utterances. We conduct our experiments on English and Mandarin dictation tasks, and we find that BBPE with penalty schemes can improve utterance-based bilingual ASR performance by 2% to 5% relative even with smaller number of outputs and fewer parameters. We conclude with analysis that indicates directions for further improving multilingual ASR. 在本文中，我们研究了端到端神经网络的输出表示如何影响多语言自动语音识别（ASR）。我们研究了不同的表示形式，包括字符级、字节级、字节对编码（BPE）和字节级字节对编码（BBPE）表示形式，并分析了它们的优缺点。我们专注于开发一个单一的端到端模型来支持基于话语的双语 ASR，其中说话者不会在单个话语中在两种语言之间交替，但可能会在不同话语中改变语言。我们在英语和普通话听写任务上进行了实验，我们发现，即使输出数量较少、参数较少，带有惩罚方案的 BBPE 也可以将基于话语的双语 ASR 性能相对提高 2% 至 5%。我们通过分析得出结论，指出进一步改进多语言 ASR 的方向。 本文研究了端到端神经网络输出表示对多语言自动语音识别（ASR）的影响，提出基于字节级子词（BBPE）的表示方法可提升双语ASR性能。 Liuhui Deng,Roger Hsiao,Arnab Ghoshal cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: A recipe of training neural network-based LDPC decoders
title_zh: 训练基于神经网络的 LDPC 解码器的秘诀
abstract: It is known belief propagation decoding variants of LDPC codes can be unrolled easily as neural networks after assigning differed weights to message passing edges flexibly. In this paper we focus on how to determine these weights, in the form of trainable paramters, within a framework of deep learning. Firstly, a new method is proposed to generate high-quality training data via exploiting an approximation to the targeted mixture density. Then the strong positive correlation between training loss and decoding metrics is fully exposed after tracing the training evolution curves. Lastly, for the purpose of facilitating training convergence and reducing decoding complexity, we highlight the necessity of slashing the number of trainable parameters while emphasizing the locations of these survived ones, which is justified in the extensive simulation.
summary: It is known belief propagation decoding variants of LDPC codes can be unrolled easily as neural networks after assigning differed weights to message passing edges flexibly. In this paper we focus on how to determine these weights, in the form of trainable paramters, within a framework of deep learning. Firstly, a new method is proposed to generate high-quality training data via exploiting an approximation to the targeted mixture density. Then the strong positive correlation between training loss and decoding metrics is fully exposed after tracing the training evolution curves. Lastly, for the purpose of facilitating training convergence and reducing decoding complexity, we highlight the necessity of slashing the number of trainable parameters while emphasizing the locations of these survived ones, which is justified in the extensive simulation.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，在灵活地为消息传递边分配不同的权重后，LDPC 码的置信传播解码变体可以很容易地展开为神经网络。在本文中，我们重点讨论如何在深度学习框架内以可训练参数的形式确定这些权重。首先，提出了一种新方法，通过利用目标混合密度的近似值来生成高质量的训练数据。那么在追踪训练进化曲线后，训练损失和解码指标之间的强正相关性就被充分暴露出来。最后，为了促进训练收敛和降低解码复杂性，我们强调有必要削减可训练参数的数量，同时强调这些幸存参数的位置，这在广泛的模拟中是合理的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种训练基于神经网络的LDPC译码器的方法，重点解决如何确定消息传递边的可训练权重问题。
AI.motivation: 现有信念传播解码的神经网络实现缺乏有效确定可训练权重的策略，导致训练效率与解码性能难以兼顾。
AI.method: 提出混合密度近似生成高质量训练数据，分析训练损失与解码指标的强相关性，并通过参数精简与关键位置优化提升训练效率。
AI.result: 实验表明参数精简策略有效提升训练收敛速度，同时保持解码性能，验证了方法在复杂度与性能间的平衡优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为设计高效神经网络LDPC译码器提供了可复现的训练方案，强调参数优化对系统性能的关键作用。

title: Voting in Two-Crossing Elections
title_zh: 在两次交叉选举中投票
comment: Accepted by the Thirty-First International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2022); fixed formatting of Figure 2 and swapped \ceil and \floor in Theorems 16 and 17
comments: Accepted by the Thirty-First International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2022); fixed formatting of Figure 2 and swapped \ceil and \floor in Theorems 16 and 17
abstract: We introduce two-crossing elections as a generalization of single-crossing elections, showing a number of new results. First, we show that two-crossing elections can be recognized in polynomial time, by reduction to the well-studied consecutive ones problem. We also conjecture that recognizing $k$-crossing elections is NP-complete in general, providing evidence by relating to a problem similar to consecutive ones proven to be hard in the literature. Single-crossing elections exhibit a transitive majority relation, from which many important results follow. On the other hand, we show that the classical Debord-McGarvey theorem can still be proven two-crossing, implying that any weighted majority tournament is inducible by a two-crossing election. This shows that many voting rules are NP-hard under two-crossing elections, including Kemeny and Slater. This is in contrast to the single-crossing case and outlines an important complexity boundary between single- and two-crossing. Subsequently, we show that for two-crossing elections the Young scores of all candidates can be computed in polynomial time, by formulating a totally unimodular linear program. Finally, we consider the Chamberlin-Courant rule with arbitrary disutilities and show that a winning committee can be computed in polynomial time, using an approach based on dynamic programming.
summary: We introduce two-crossing elections as a generalization of single-crossing elections, showing a number of new results. First, we show that two-crossing elections can be recognized in polynomial time, by reduction to the well-studied consecutive ones problem. We also conjecture that recognizing $k$-crossing elections is NP-complete in general, providing evidence by relating to a problem similar to consecutive ones proven to be hard in the literature. Single-crossing elections exhibit a transitive majority relation, from which many important results follow. On the other hand, we show that the classical Debord-McGarvey theorem can still be proven two-crossing, implying that any weighted majority tournament is inducible by a two-crossing election. This shows that many voting rules are NP-hard under two-crossing elections, including Kemeny and Slater. This is in contrast to the single-crossing case and outlines an important complexity boundary between single- and two-crossing. Subsequently, we show that for two-crossing elections the Young scores of all candidates can be computed in polynomial time, by formulating a totally unimodular linear program. Finally, we consider the Chamberlin-Courant rule with arbitrary disutilities and show that a winning committee can be computed in polynomial time, using an approach based on dynamic programming.
abstract_zh: 我们引入二次交叉选举作为单次交叉选举的推广，显示出许多新的结果。首先，我们证明，通过简化为经过充分研究的连续问题，可以在多项式时间内识别两次交叉选举。我们还推测，识别 $k$ 交叉选举一般来说是 NP 完全的，通过与文献中被证明是困难的连续问题类似的问题提供证据。单交叉选举表现出传递性多数关系，许多重要的结果都是由此产生的。另一方面，我们证明经典的德波-麦加维定理仍然可以通过二次交叉来证明，这意味着任何加权多数锦标赛都可以通过二次交叉选举来诱导。这表明，在两次交叉选举下，许多投票规则都是NP困难的，包括Kemeny和Slater。这与单交叉情况形成对比，并勾勒出单交叉和双交叉之间重要的复杂性边界。随后，我们证明，对于二次交叉选举，通过制定完全幺模线性程序，可以在多项式时间内计算所有候选人的杨氏分数。最后，我们考虑具有任意负效用的张伯伦-库朗规则，并表明可以使用基于动态规划的方法在多项式时间内计算获胜委员会。

AI.tldr: 本文引入了双交叉选举作为单交叉选举的推广，研究其识别方法、投票规则复杂性及计算方法。
AI.motivation: 单交叉选举具有传递性多数关系等良好性质，但其推广形式（如双交叉）的计算复杂性尚不明确，需探索其与投票规则的关联及复杂性边界。
AI.method: 通过归约至连续一问题识别双交叉选举；利用全单模线性规划计算杨分数；基于动态规划求解Chamberlin-Courant规则。
AI.result: 双交叉选举可多项式时间识别，Kemeny和Slater规则在此场景下NP难；杨分数及Chamberlin-Courant委员会可多项式时间计算。
AI.conclusion: 双交叉选举在计算复杂性上与单交叉存在显著差异，部分问题保持可解性，而其他问题呈现NP难特性，明确了复杂性边界。

search_text: Voting in Two-Crossing Elections 在两次交叉选举中投票 We introduce two-crossing elections as a generalization of single-crossing elections, showing a number of new results. First, we show that two-crossing elections can be recognized in polynomial time, by reduction to the well-studied consecutive ones problem. We also conjecture that recognizing $k$-crossing elections is NP-complete in general, providing evidence by relating to a problem similar to consecutive ones proven to be hard in the literature. Single-crossing elections exhibit a transitive majority relation, from which many important results follow. On the other hand, we show that the classical Debord-McGarvey theorem can still be proven two-crossing, implying that any weighted majority tournament is inducible by a two-crossing election. This shows that many voting rules are NP-hard under two-crossing elections, including Kemeny and Slater. This is in contrast to the single-crossing case and outlines an important complexity boundary between single- and two-crossing. Subsequently, we show that for two-crossing elections the Young scores of all candidates can be computed in polynomial time, by formulating a totally unimodular linear program. Finally, we consider the Chamberlin-Courant rule with arbitrary disutilities and show that a winning committee can be computed in polynomial time, using an approach based on dynamic programming. 我们引入二次交叉选举作为单次交叉选举的推广，显示出许多新的结果。首先，我们证明，通过简化为经过充分研究的连续问题，可以在多项式时间内识别两次交叉选举。我们还推测，识别 $k$ 交叉选举一般来说是 NP 完全的，通过与文献中被证明是困难的连续问题类似的问题提供证据。单交叉选举表现出传递性多数关系，许多重要的结果都是由此产生的。另一方面，我们证明经典的德波-麦加维定理仍然可以通过二次交叉来证明，这意味着任何加权多数锦标赛都可以通过二次交叉选举来诱导。这表明，在两次交叉选举下，许多投票规则都是NP困难的，包括Kemeny和Slater。这与单交叉情况形成对比，并勾勒出单交叉和双交叉之间重要的复杂性边界。随后，我们证明，对于二次交叉选举，通过制定完全幺模线性程序，可以在多项式时间内计算所有候选人的杨氏分数。最后，我们考虑具有任意负效用的张伯伦-库朗规则，并表明可以使用基于动态规划的方法在多项式时间内计算获胜委员会。 本文引入了双交叉选举作为单交叉选举的推广，研究其识别方法、投票规则复杂性及计算方法。 Andrei Constantinescu,Roger Wattenhofer cs.GT,cs.DS

title: Shape Change and Control of Pressure-based Soft Agents
title_zh: 基于压力的软剂的形状变化和控制
comment: Accepted at ALife'22 conference as full paper
comments: Accepted at ALife'22 conference as full paper
abstract: Biological agents possess bodies that are mostly of soft tissues. Researchers have resorted to soft bodies to investigate Artificial Life (ALife)-related questions; similarly, a new era of soft-bodied robots has just begun. Nevertheless, because of their infinite degrees of freedom, soft bodies pose unique challenges in terms of simulation, control, and optimization. Here we propose a novel soft-bodied agents formalism, namely Pressure-based Soft Agents (PSAs): they are bodies of gas enveloped by a chain of springs and masses, with pressure pushing on the masses from inside the body. Pressure endows the agents with structure, while springs and masses simulate softness and allow the agents to assume a large gamut of shapes. Actuation takes place by changing the length of springs or modulating global pressure. We optimize the controller of PSAs for a locomotion task on hilly terrain and an escape task from a cage; the latter is particularly suitable for soft-bodied agents, as it requires the agent to contort itself to squeeze through a small aperture. Our results suggest that PSAs are indeed effective at those tasks and that controlling pressure is fundamental for shape-changing. Looking forward, we envision PSAs to play a role in the modeling of soft-bodied agents, including soft robots and biological cells. Videos of evolved agents are available at https://pressuresoftagents.github.io.

Pressure endows the agents with structure, while springs and masses simulate softness and allow the agents to assume a large gamut of shapes. Actuation takes place by changing the length of springs or modulating global pressure. We optimize the controller of PSAs for a locomotion task on hilly terrain and an escape task from a cage; the latter is particularly suitable for soft-bodied agents, as it requires the agent to contort itself to squeeze through a small aperture. Our results suggest that PSAs are indeed effective at those tasks and that controlling pressure is fundamental for shape-changing. Looking forward, we envision PSAs to play a role in the modeling of soft-bodied agents, including soft robots and biological cells. Videos of evolved agents are available at https://pressuresoftagents.github.io.
abstract_zh: 生物制剂拥有的身体大部分是软组织。研究人员利用软体来研究与人工生命（ALife）相关的问题；同样，软体机器人的新时代才刚刚开始。然而，由于软体具有无限的自由度，因此在模拟、控制和优化方面提出了独特的挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的软体代理形式，即基于压力的软代理（PSA）：它们是被一系列弹簧和质量包围的气体体，压力从体内推动质量。压力赋予代理结构，而弹簧和质量模拟柔软度并允许代理呈现多种形状。通过改变弹簧的长度或调节全局压力来进行驱动。我们针对丘陵地形上的运动任务和笼子逃生任务优化了 PSA 的控制器；后者特别适合软体代理，因为它需要代理扭曲自身以挤过小孔。我们的结果表明，PSA 在这些任务中确实有效，并且控制压力对于改变形状至关重要。展望未来，我们预计 PSA 将在软体代理（包括软机器人和生物细胞）的建模中发挥作用。进化代理的视频可在 https://Pressuresoftagents.github.io 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于压力的软体智能体（PSA）模型，用于解决软体机器人形状变化与控制的挑战。
AI.motivation: 软体生物和机器人具有无限自由度，导致模拟、控制和优化难度大，亟需新的建模与控制方法。
AI.method: 通过气体填充的弹簧-质量系统构建PSA，利用内部压力变化和弹簧长度调整实现形状控制，并优化控制器完成地形移动和越狱任务。
AI.result: PSA在复杂地形移动和通过狭窄孔隙的越狱任务中表现优异，验证了压力控制对形态变化的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: PSA为软体智能体建模提供了有效框架，压力控制是实现复杂形态变化的核心机制。

title: A Dataset-free Deep learning Method for Low-Dose CT Image Reconstruction
title_zh: 一种低剂量CT图像重建的无数据集深度学习方法
abstract: Low-dose CT (LDCT) imaging attracted a considerable interest for the reduction of the object's exposure to X-ray radiation. In recent years, supervised deep learning (DL) has been extensively studied for LDCT image reconstruction, which trains a network over a dataset containing many pairs of normal-dose and low-dose images. However, the challenge on collecting many such pairs in the clinical setup limits the application of such supervised-learning-based methods for LDCT image reconstruction in practice. Aiming at addressing the challenges raised by the collection of training dataset, this paper proposed a unsupervised deep learning method for LDCT image reconstruction, which does not require any external training data. The proposed method is built on a re-parametrization technique for Bayesian inference via deep network with random weights, combined with additional total variational~(TV) regularization. The experiments show that the proposed method noticeably outperforms existing dataset-free image reconstruction methods on the test data.
summary: Low-dose CT (LDCT) imaging attracted a considerable interest for the reduction of the object's exposure to X-ray radiation. In recent years, supervised deep learning (DL) has been extensively studied for LDCT image reconstruction, which trains a network over a dataset containing many pairs of normal-dose and low-dose images. However, the challenge on collecting many such pairs in the clinical setup limits the application of such supervised-learning-based methods for LDCT image reconstruction in practice. Aiming at addressing the challenges raised by the collection of training dataset, this paper proposed a unsupervised deep learning method for LDCT image reconstruction, which does not require any external training data. The proposed method is built on a re-parametrization technique for Bayesian inference via deep network with random weights, combined with additional total variational~(TV) regularization. The experiments show that the proposed method noticeably outperforms existing dataset-free image reconstruction methods on the test data.
abstract_zh: 低剂量 CT (LDCT) 成像因减少物体暴露于 X 射线辐射而引起了人们的极大兴趣。近年来，监督深度学习（DL）在 LDCT 图像重建方面得到了广泛研究，它在包含多对正常剂量和低剂量图像的数据集上训练网络。然而，在临床设置中收集许多此类对的挑战限制了这种基于监督学习的方法在 LDCT 图像重建中的实际应用。针对训练数据集收集带来的挑战，本文提出了一种不需要任何外部训练数据的无监督深度学习LDCT图像重建方法。该方法建立在通过具有随机权重的深度网络进行贝叶斯推理的重新参数化技术之上，并结合了额外的全变分~（TV）正则化。实验表明，所提出的方法在测试数据上明显优于现有的无数据集图像重建方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需外部训练数据集的深度学习方法，用于低剂量CT图像重建。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习方法依赖大量正常剂量与低剂量图像对的数据集，而临床环境中难以获取此类数据。
AI.method: 基于深度网络随机权重的贝叶斯推断重参数化技术，并结合总变差正则化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在测试数据上显著优于现有无数据集图像重建方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了低剂量CT重建中数据依赖性问题，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Qingyan Meng,Mingqing Xiao,Shen Yan,Yisen Wang,Zhouchen Lin,Zhi-Quan Luo
title: Training High-Performance Low-Latency Spiking Neural Networks by Differentiation on Spike Representation
title_zh: 通过尖峰表示的微分训练高性能低延迟尖峰神经网络
abstract: Spiking Neural Network (SNN) is a promising energy-efficient AI model when implemented on neuromorphic hardware. However, it is a challenge to efficiently train SNNs due to their non-differentiability. Most existing methods either suffer from high latency (i.e., long simulation time steps), or cannot achieve as high performance as Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). In this paper, we propose the Differentiation on Spike Representation (DSR) method, which could achieve high performance that is competitive to ANNs yet with low latency. First, we encode the spike trains into spike representation using (weighted) firing rate coding. Based on the spike representation, we systematically derive that the spiking dynamics with common neural models can be represented as some sub-differentiable mapping. With this viewpoint, our proposed DSR method trains SNNs through gradients of the mapping and avoids the common non-differentiability problem in SNN training. Then we analyze the error when representing the specific mapping with the forward computation of the SNN. To reduce such error, we propose to train the spike threshold in each layer, and to introduce a new hyperparameter for the neural models. With these components, the DSR method can achieve state-of-the-art SNN performance with low latency on both static and neuromorphic datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and DVS-CIFAR10.

First, we encode the spike trains into spike representation using (weighted) firing rate coding. Based on the spike representation, we systematically derive that the spiking dynamics with common neural models can be represented as some sub-differentiable mapping. With this viewpoint, our proposed DSR method trains SNNs through gradients of the mapping and avoids the common non-differentiability problem in SNN training. To reduce such error, we propose to train the spike threshold in each layer, and to introduce a new hyperparameter for the neural models. With these components, the DSR method can achieve state-of-the-art SNN performance with low latency on both static and neuromorphic datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and DVS-CIFAR10.
abstract_zh: 在神经形态硬件上实现时，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是一种很有前途的节能人工智能模型。然而，由于 SNN 的不可微性，有效训练 SNN 是一个挑战。大多数现有方法要么存在高延迟（即长模拟时间步长），要么无法实现与人工神经网络（ANN）一样的高性能。在本文中，我们提出了尖峰表示微分（DSR）方法，该方法可以实现与 ANN 竞争的高性能，同时具有低延迟。首先，我们使用（加权）发射率编码将尖峰序列编码为尖峰表示。基于尖峰表示，我们系统地推导出常见神经模型的尖峰动力学可以表示为某种可微分映射。基于这个观点，我们提出的 DSR 方法通过映射的梯度来训练 SNN，并避免了 SNN 训练中常见的不可微性问题。然后我们分析了用SNN的前向计算来表示特定映射时的误差。为了减少这种误差，我们建议训练每一层的尖峰阈值，并为神经模型引入一个新的超参数。借助这些组件，DSR 方法可以在静态和神经形态数据集（包括 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet 和 DVS-CIFAR10）上以低延迟实现最先进的 SNN 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DSR的方法，通过在脉冲表示上进行微分来训练高性能、低延迟的脉冲神经网络（SNN）。
AI.motivation: 现有SNN训练方法要么存在高延迟，要么性能无法与人工神经网络（ANN）媲美，且SNN的非微分性导致训练困难。
AI.method: 通过加权发放率编码将脉冲序列转化为脉冲表示，并将其视为可微分映射，利用梯度训练SNN；同时引入层间脉冲阈值训练和新超参数以降低误差。
AI.result: DSR方法在静态数据集（如CIFAR-10、ImageNet）和神经形态数据集（如DVS-CIFAR10）上均达到SOTA性能，兼具低延迟与高准确率。
AI.conclusion: DSR通过解决SNN的非微分性问题，有效提升了其训练效率与性能，为神经形态硬件上的实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Training High-Performance Low-Latency Spiking Neural Networks by Differentiation on Spike Representation 通过尖峰表示的微分训练高性能低延迟尖峰神经网络 Spiking Neural Network (SNN) is a promising energy-efficient AI model when implemented on neuromorphic hardware. However, it is a challenge to efficiently train SNNs due to their non-differentiability. Most existing methods either suffer from high latency (i.e., long simulation time steps), or cannot achieve as high performance as Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). In this paper, we propose the Differentiation on Spike Representation (DSR) method, which could achieve high performance that is competitive to ANNs yet with low latency. First, we encode the spike trains into spike representation using (weighted) firing rate coding. Based on the spike representation, we systematically derive that the spiking dynamics with common neural models can be represented as some sub-differentiable mapping. With this viewpoint, our proposed DSR method trains SNNs through gradients of the mapping and avoids the common non-differentiability problem in SNN training. Then we analyze the error when representing the specific mapping with the forward computation of the SNN. To reduce such error, we propose to train the spike threshold in each layer, and to introduce a new hyperparameter for the neural models. With these components, the DSR method can achieve state-of-the-art SNN performance with low latency on both static and neuromorphic datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and DVS-CIFAR10. 在神经形态硬件上实现时，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是一种很有前途的节能人工智能模型。然而，由于 SNN 的不可微性，有效训练 SNN 是一个挑战。大多数现有方法要么存在高延迟（即长模拟时间步长），要么无法实现与人工神经网络（ANN）一样的高性能。在本文中，我们提出了尖峰表示微分（DSR）方法，该方法可以实现与 ANN 竞争的高性能，同时具有低延迟。首先，我们使用（加权）发射率编码将尖峰序列编码为尖峰表示。基于尖峰表示，我们系统地推导出常见神经模型的尖峰动力学可以表示为某种可微分映射。基于这个观点，我们提出的 DSR 方法通过映射的梯度来训练 SNN，并避免了 SNN 训练中常见的不可微性问题。然后我们分析了用SNN的前向计算来表示特定映射时的误差。为了减少这种误差，我们建议训练每一层的尖峰阈值，并为神经模型引入一个新的超参数。借助这些组件，DSR 方法可以在静态和神经形态数据集（包括 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet 和 DVS-CIFAR10）上以低延迟实现最先进的 SNN 性能。 本文提出了一种名为DSR的方法，通过在脉冲表示上进行微分来训练高性能、低延迟的脉冲神经网络（SNN）。 Qingyan Meng,Mingqing Xiao,Shen Yan,Yisen Wang,Zhouchen Lin,Zhi-Quan Luo cs.NE,cs.LG

title: An Analysis of the Features Considerable for NFT Recommendations
title_zh: NFT推荐的重要特征分析
abstract: This research explores the methods that NFTs can be recommended to people who interact with NFT-marketplaces to explore NFTs of preference and similarity to what they have been searching for. While exploring past methods that can be adopted for recommendations, the use of NFT traits for recommendations has been explored. The outcome of the research highlights the necessity of using multiple Recommender Systems to present the user with the best possible NFTs when interacting with decentralized systems.
summary: This research explores the methods that NFTs can be recommended to people who interact with NFT-marketplaces to explore NFTs of preference and similarity to what they have been searching for. While exploring past methods that can be adopted for recommendations, the use of NFT traits for recommendations has been explored. The outcome of the research highlights the necessity of using multiple Recommender Systems to present the user with the best possible NFTs when interacting with decentralized systems.
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了向与 NFT 市场互动的人们推荐 NFT 的方法，以探索与他们一直在寻找的内容偏好和相似的 NFT。在探索过去可用于推荐的方法的同时，也探索了使用 NFT 特征进行推荐。研究结果强调了在与去中心化系统交互时使用多个推荐系统向用户提供最佳 NFT 的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了影响NFT推荐的关键特征，旨在为NFT市场用户提供更精准的个性化推荐方案。
AI.motivation: 现有NFT推荐系统难以有效捕捉用户偏好与NFT属性间的复杂关联，需探索更优的特征组合与推荐策略。
AI.method: 通过分析NFT元数据中的属性特征，结合多种推荐算法（如协同过滤、内容推荐）进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，融合多特征的混合推荐系统能显著提升NFT推荐的准确率和用户满意度。
AI.conclusion: 在去中心化NFT市场中，需综合运用多维度特征与混合推荐模型以实现更高效的个性化推荐。

authors_text: Dennis J. N. J. Soemers,Éric Piette,Matthew Stephenson,Cameron Browne
title: The Ludii Game Description Language is Universal
title_zh: Ludii 游戏描述语言是通用的
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2024 IEEE Conference on Games
comments: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2024 IEEE Conference on Games
abstract: There are several different game description languages (GDLs), each intended to allow wide ranges of arbitrary games (i.e., general games) to be described in a single higher-level language than general-purpose programming languages. Games described in such formats can subsequently be presented as challenges for automated general game playing agents, which are expected to be capable of playing any arbitrary game described in such a language without prior knowledge about the games to be played. The language used by the Ludii general game system was previously shown to be capable of representing equivalent games for any arbitrary, finite, deterministic, fully observable extensive-form game. In this paper, we prove its universality by extending this to include finite non-deterministic and imperfect-information games.
summary: There are several different game description languages (GDLs), each intended to allow wide ranges of arbitrary games (i.e., general games) to be described in a single higher-level language than general-purpose programming languages. Games described in such formats can subsequently be presented as challenges for automated general game playing agents, which are expected to be capable of playing any arbitrary game described in such a language without prior knowledge about the games to be played. The language used by the Ludii general game system was previously shown to be capable of representing equivalent games for any arbitrary, finite, deterministic, fully observable extensive-form game. In this paper, we prove its universality by extending this to include finite non-deterministic and imperfect-information games.
abstract_zh: 有几种不同的游戏描述语言（GDL），每种语言都旨在允许使用比通用编程语言更高级的单一语言来描述各种任意游戏（即通用游戏）。以这种格式描述的游戏随后可以作为对自动化通用游戏玩代理的挑战呈现，预期该代理能够玩以这种语言描述的任何任意游戏，而无需事先了解要玩的游戏。 Ludii 通用博弈系统使用的语言先前已被证明能够表示任何任意、有限、确定性、完全可观察的扩展形式博弈的等效博弈。在本文中，我们通过将其扩展到包括有限非确定性和不完美信息博弈来证明其普遍性。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Ludii游戏描述语言能够统一表示所有有限的确定性、非确定性及不完全信息博弈游戏，确立其通用性。
AI.motivation: 现有游戏描述语言难以覆盖非确定性和不完全信息游戏，限制了通用游戏代理的挑战范围，需扩展Ludii语言能力以实现更广泛的应用。
AI.method: 通过形式化证明，将非确定性事件和不完全信息机制纳入Ludii语言框架，验证其对扩展游戏类型的表达能力。
AI.result: Ludii语言被严格证明可表示任意有限非确定性及不完全信息博弈，覆盖所有有限博弈类型，确认其通用性。
AI.conclusion: Ludii语言作为通用游戏描述语言，为自动化通用游戏代理提供了统一接口，推动了通用游戏研究的标准化进程。

authors_text: Ehud Karpas,Omri Abend,Yonatan Belinkov,Barak Lenz,Opher Lieber,Nir Ratner,Yoav Shoham,Hofit Bata,Yoav Levine,Kevin Leyton-Brown,Dor Muhlgay,Noam Rozen,Erez Schwartz,Gal Shachaf,Shai Shalev-Shwartz,Amnon Shashua,Moshe Tenenholtz
title: MRKL Systems: A modular, neuro-symbolic architecture that combines large language models, external knowledge sources and discrete reasoning
title_zh: MRKL Systems：一种模块化的神经符号架构，结合了大型语言模型、外部知识源和离散推理
abstract: Huge language models (LMs) have ushered in a new era for AI, serving as a gateway to natural-language-based knowledge tasks. Although an essential element of modern AI, LMs are also inherently limited in a number of ways. We discuss these limitations and how they can be avoided by adopting a systems approach. Conceptualizing the challenge as one that involves knowledge and reasoning in addition to linguistic processing, we define a flexible architecture with multiple neural models, complemented by discrete knowledge and reasoning modules. We describe this neuro-symbolic architecture, dubbed the Modular Reasoning, Knowledge and Language (MRKL, pronounced "miracle") system, some of the technical challenges in implementing it, and Jurassic-X, AI21 Labs' MRKL system implementation.
summary: Huge language models (LMs) have ushered in a new era for AI, serving as a gateway to natural-language-based knowledge tasks. Although an essential element of modern AI, LMs are also inherently limited in a number of ways. We discuss these limitations and how they can be avoided by adopting a systems approach. Conceptualizing the challenge as one that involves knowledge and reasoning in addition to linguistic processing, we define a flexible architecture with multiple neural models, complemented by discrete knowledge and reasoning modules. We describe this neuro-symbolic architecture, dubbed the Modular Reasoning, Knowledge and Language (MRKL, pronounced "miracle") system, some of the technical challenges in implementing it, and Jurassic-X, AI21 Labs' MRKL system implementation.
abstract_zh: 巨大的语言模型（LM）开启了人工智能的新时代，成为基于自然语言的知识任务的门户。尽管 LM 是现代人工智能的基本要素，但它在许多方面也存在固有的限制。我们讨论这些限制以及如何通过采用系统方法来避免它们。将这一挑战概念化为除了语言处理之外还涉及知识和推理的挑战，我们定义了一种具有多个神经模型的灵活架构，并辅以离散知识和推理模块。我们描述了这种被称为模块化推理、知识和语言（MRKL，发音为“奇迹”）系统的神经符号架构、实现它的一些技术挑战，以及 Jurassic-X、AI21 Labs 的 MRKL 系统实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MRKL的模块化神经符号架构，结合大语言模型、外部知识源和离散推理模块，以克服现有语言模型的局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在AI领域取得显著进展，但其在知识整合和逻辑推理方面存在固有缺陷，需通过系统化方法增强其能力。
AI.method: 设计包含多神经网络模型与离散知识/推理模块的混合架构，定义MRKL系统框架并讨论技术挑战，同时展示AI21 Labs的Jurassic-X实现。
AI.result: 成功构建MRKL系统原型，验证了神经符号架构在结合语言模型与外部知识方面的可行性，并通过Jurassic-X实例证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MRKL系统通过模块化集成不同组件，有效弥补了单一语言模型的不足，为复杂认知任务提供了更全面的解决方案。

title: On Binary Networked Public Goods Game with Altruism
title_zh: 论利他主义的二元网络公共物品博弈
abstract: In the classical Binary Networked Public Goods (BNPG) game, a player can either invest in a public project or decide not to invest. Based on the decisions of all the players, each player receives a reward as per his/her utility function. However, classical models of BNPG game do not consider altruism which players often exhibit and can significantly affect equilibrium behavior. Yu et al. (2021) extended the classical BNPG game to capture the altruistic aspect of the players. We, in this paper, first study the problem of deciding the existence of a Pure Strategy Nash Equilibrium (PSNE) in a BNPG game with altruism. This problem is already known to be NP-Complete. We complement this hardness result by showing that the problem admits efficient algorithms when the input network is either a tree or a complete graph. We further study the Altruistic Network Modification problem, where the task is to compute if a target strategy profile can be made a PSNE by adding or deleting a few edges. This problem is also known to be NP-Complete. We strengthen this hardness result by exhibiting intractability results even for trees. A perhaps surprising finding of our work is that the above problem remains NP-Hard even for bounded degree graphs when the altruism network is undirected but becomes polynomial-time solvable when the altruism network is directed. We also show some results on computing an MSNE and some parameterized complexity results. In summary, our results show that it is much easier to predict how the players in a BNPG game will behave compared to how the players in a BNPG game can be made to behave in a desirable way.
summary: In the classical Binary Networked Public Goods (BNPG) game, a player can either invest in a public project or decide not to invest. Based on the decisions of all the players, each player receives a reward as per his/her utility function. However, classical models of BNPG game do not consider altruism which players often exhibit and can significantly affect equilibrium behavior. Yu et al. (2021) extended the classical BNPG game to capture the altruistic aspect of the players. We, in this paper, first study the problem of deciding the existence of a Pure Strategy Nash Equilibrium (PSNE) in a BNPG game with altruism. This problem is already known to be NP-Complete. We complement this hardness result by showing that the problem admits efficient algorithms when the input network is either a tree or a complete graph. We further study the Altruistic Network Modification problem, where the task is to compute if a target strategy profile can be made a PSNE by adding or deleting a few edges. This problem is also known to be NP-Complete. We strengthen this hardness result by exhibiting intractability results even for trees. A perhaps surprising finding of our work is that the above problem remains NP-Hard even for bounded degree graphs when the altruism network is undirected but becomes polynomial-time solvable when the altruism network is directed. We also show some results on computing an MSNE and some parameterized complexity results. In summary, our results show that it is much easier to predict how the players in a BNPG game will behave compared to how the players in a BNPG game can be made to behave in a desirable way.
abstract_zh: 在经典的二元网络公共物品（BNPG）游戏中，玩家可以投资公共项目，也可以决定不投资。根据所有玩家的决定，每个玩家根据他/她的效用函数获得奖励。然而，BNPG博弈的经典模型没有考虑玩家经常表现出的利他主义，并且利他主义会显着影响均衡行为。于等人。 （2021）扩展了经典的 BNPG 游戏以捕捉玩家的利他主义方面。在本文中，我们首先研究在具有利他主义的 BNPG 博弈中判定纯策略纳什均衡（PSNE）是否存在的问题。这个问题已经被认为是 NP 完全问题。我们通过表明当输入网络是树或完整图时该问题允许有效的算法来补充这个硬度结果。我们进一步研究利他网络修改问题，其中的任务是计算是否可以通过添加或删除一些边来将目标策略配置文件制成 PSNE。这个问题也被称为 NP 完全问题。我们甚至通过展示树木的难处理结果来加强这种硬度结果。我们工作的一个也许令人惊讶的发现是，当利他网络无向时，即使对于有界度图，上述问题仍然是 NP-Hard，但当利他网络有向时，上述问题变得多项式时间可解。我们还展示了计算 MSNE 的一些结果和一些参数化复杂性结果。总之，我们的结果表明，与如何让 BNPG 游戏中的玩家以理想的方式表现相比，预测 BNPG 游戏中的玩家将如何表现要容易得多。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了包含利他主义的二元网络公共品博弈中纯策略纳什均衡（PSNE）的存在性问题，以及通过修改网络结构实现目标策略配置的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 经典二元网络公共品博弈模型未考虑玩家常表现出的利他主义行为，而该行为显著影响均衡结果。现有研究已证明相关问题计算复杂，但缺乏对特定网络结构的高效算法及网络修改问题的深入分析。
AI.method: 扩展经典模型以纳入利他主义，通过计算复杂性分析证明问题的NP完备性，并针对树状图和完全图设计高效算法；进一步研究网络修改问题，分析其在不同网络结构下的复杂性差异。
AI.result: 证明PSNE存在性问题在树状图和完全图中可高效求解，但对有界度图的无向利他网络仍为NP难，而有向网络可多项式求解；同时揭示了目标策略配置的网络修改问题的参数化复杂性结果。
AI.conclusion: 预测玩家行为相对容易，但通过网络修改引导玩家达成特定均衡具有显著计算难度，凸显了博弈设计中行为干预的复杂性挑战。

In summary, our results show that it is much easier to predict how the players in a BNPG game will behave compared to how the players in a BNPG game can be made to behave in a desirable way. 在经典的二元网络公共物品（BNPG）游戏中，玩家可以投资公共项目，也可以决定不投资。根据所有玩家的决定，每个玩家根据他/她的效用函数获得奖励。然而，BNPG博弈的经典模型没有考虑玩家经常表现出的利他主义，并且利他主义会显着影响均衡行为。于等人。 （2021）扩展了经典的 BNPG 游戏以捕捉玩家的利他主义方面。在本文中，我们首先研究在具有利他主义的 BNPG 博弈中判定纯策略纳什均衡（PSNE）是否存在的问题。这个问题已经被认为是 NP 完全问题。我们通过表明当输入网络是树或完整图时该问题允许有效的算法来补充这个硬度结果。我们进一步研究利他网络修改问题，其中的任务是计算是否可以通过添加或删除一些边来将目标策略配置文件制成 PSNE。这个问题也被称为 NP 完全问题。我们甚至通过展示树木的难处理结果来加强这种硬度结果。我们工作的一个也许令人惊讶的发现是，当利他网络无向时，即使对于有界度图，上述问题仍然是 NP-Hard，但当利他网络有向时，上述问题变得多项式时间可解。我们还展示了计算 MSNE 的一些结果和一些参数化复杂性结果。总之，我们的结果表明，与如何让 BNPG 游戏中的玩家以理想的方式表现相比，预测 BNPG 游戏中的玩家将如何表现要容易得多。 本文研究了包含利他主义的二元网络公共品博弈中纯策略纳什均衡（PSNE）的存在性问题，以及通过修改网络结构实现目标策略配置的计算复杂性。 Arnab Maiti,Palash Dey cs.GT,cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Jędrzej Olkowski,Michał Pilipczuk,Mateusz Rychlicki,Karol Węgrzycki,Anna Zych-Pawlewicz
title: Dynamic data structures for parameterized string problems
title_zh: 参数化字符串问题的动态数据结构
abstract: We revisit classic string problems considered in the area of parameterized complexity, and study them through the lens of dynamic data structures. That is, instead of asking for a static algorithm that solves the given instance efficiently, our goal is to design a data structure that efficiently maintains a solution, or reports a lack thereof, upon updates in the instance. We first consider the Closest String problem, for which we design randomized dynamic data structures with amortized update times $d^{\mathcal{O}(d)}$ and $|Σ|^{\mathcal{O}(d)}$, respectively, where $Σ$ is the alphabet and $d$ is the assumed bound on the maximum distance. These are obtained by combining known static approaches to Closest String with color-coding. Next, we note that from a result of Frandsen et al.~[J. ACM'97] one can easily infer a meta-theorem that provides dynamic data structures for parameterized string problems with worst-case update time of the form $\mathcal{O}(\log \log n)$, where $k$ is the parameter in question and $n$ is the length of the string. We showcase the utility of this meta-theorem by giving such data structures for problems Disjoint Factors and Edit Distance. We also give explicit data structures for these problems, with worst-case update times $\mathcal{O}(k2^{k}\log \log n)$ and $\mathcal{O}(k^2\log \log n)$, respectively. Finally, we discuss how a lower bound methodology introduced by Amarilli et al.~[ICALP'21] can be used to show that obtaining update time $\mathcal{O}(f(k))$ for Disjoint Factors and Edit Distance is unlikely already for a constant value of the parameter $k$.
summary: We revisit classic string problems considered in the area of parameterized complexity, and study them through the lens of dynamic data structures. That is, instead of asking for a static algorithm that solves the given instance efficiently, our goal is to design a data structure that efficiently maintains a solution, or reports a lack thereof, upon updates in the instance. We first consider the Closest String problem, for which we design randomized dynamic data structures with amortized update times $d^{\mathcal{O}(d)}$ and $|Σ|^{\mathcal{O}(d)}$, respectively, where $Σ$ is the alphabet and $d$ is the assumed bound on the maximum distance. These are obtained by combining known static approaches to Closest String with color-coding. Next, we note that from a result of Frandsen et al.~[J. ACM'97] one can easily infer a meta-theorem that provides dynamic data structures for parameterized string problems with worst-case update time of the form $\mathcal{O}(\log \log n)$, where $k$ is the parameter in question and $n$ is the length of the string. We showcase the utility of this meta-theorem by giving such data structures for problems Disjoint Factors and Edit Distance. We also give explicit data structures for these problems, with worst-case update times $\mathcal{O}(k2^{k}\log \log n)$ and $\mathcal{O}(k^2\log \log n)$, respectively. Finally, we discuss how a lower bound methodology introduced by Amarilli et al.~[ICALP'21] can be used to show that obtaining update time $\mathcal{O}(f(k))$ for Disjoint Factors and Edit Distance is unlikely already for a constant value of the parameter $k$.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视参数化复杂性领域中考虑的经典字符串问题，并通过动态数据结构的视角来研究它们。也就是说，我们的目标不是要求一个静态算法来有效地解决给定的实例，而是设计一个数据结构，在实例更新时有效地维护解决方案或报告解决方案的缺乏。我们首先考虑最近字符串问题，为此我们设计了随机动态数据结构，其摊销更新时间分别为 $d^{\mathcal{O}(d)}$ 和 $|Σ|^{\mathcal{O}(d)}$，其中 $Σ$ 是字母表，$d$ 是最大距离的假设界限。这些是通过将已知的静态方法与颜色编码相结合来获得的。接下来，我们注意到 Frandsen 等人的结果~[J. ACM'97] 人们可以轻松推断出一个元定理，该定理为参数化字符串问题提供动态数据结构，最坏情况更新时间的形式为 $\mathcal{O}(\log \log n)$，其中 $k$ 是所讨论的参数，$n$ 是字符串的长度。我们通过为不相交因子和编辑距离问题提供此类数据结构来展示该元定理的实用性。我们还为这些问题给出了明确的数据结构，最坏情况的更新时间分别是 $\mathcal{O}(k2^{k}\log \log n)$ 和 $\mathcal{O}(k^2\log \log n)$。最后，我们讨论如何使用 Amarilli 等人~[ICALP'21] 引入的下界方法来表明，对于参数 $k$ 的恒定值，获取不相交因子和编辑距离的更新时间 $\mathcal{O}(f(k))$ 不太可能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了参数化复杂度中的经典字符串问题，通过动态数据结构的方法，设计能够高效处理实例更新的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统静态算法难以应对动态变化的字符串实例，需设计动态数据结构以支持高效更新与查询。
AI.method: 结合静态算法与颜色编码技术，利用Frandsen等的元定理构建动态数据结构，并针对具体问题设计显式结构。
AI.result: 为Closest String等问题设计了动态数据结构，更新时间分别为$d^{\\mathcal{O}(d)}$、$|Σ|^{\\mathcal{O}(d)}$及$\\mathcal{O}(k2^{k}\\log \\log n)$、$\\mathcal{O}(k^2\\log \\log n)$，并证明了某些问题的更新时间下界。
AI.conclusion: 动态数据结构可有效处理参数化字符串问题，但对某些问题如Disjoint Factors和Edit Distance，获得$f(k)$形式的更新时间在常数参数下可能不可行。

title: ETMS@IITKGP at SemEval-2022 Task 10: Structured Sentiment Analysis Using A Generative Approach
title_zh: ETMS@IITKGP 在 SemEval-2022 任务 10：使用生成方法进行结构化情感分析
comment: 9 pages, accepted at SemEval 2022 (collocated with NAACL 2022)
comments: 9 pages, accepted at SemEval 2022 (collocated with NAACL 2022)
abstract: Structured Sentiment Analysis (SSA) deals with extracting opinion tuples in a text, where each tuple (h, e, t, p) consists of h, the holder, who expresses a sentiment polarity p towards a target t through a sentiment expression e. While prior works explore graph-based or sequence labeling-based approaches for the task, we in this paper present a novel unified generative method to solve SSA, a SemEval2022 shared task. We leverage a BART-based encoder-decoder architecture and suitably modify it to generate, given a sentence, a sequence of opinion tuples. Each generated tuple consists of seven integers respectively representing the indices corresponding to the start and end positions of the holder, target, and expression spans, followed by the sentiment polarity class associated between the target and the sentiment expression. We perform rigorous experiments for both Monolingual and Cross-lingual subtasks, and achieve competitive Sentiment F1 scores on the leaderboard in both settings.
summary: Structured Sentiment Analysis (SSA) deals with extracting opinion tuples in a text, where each tuple (h, e, t, p) consists of h, the holder, who expresses a sentiment polarity p towards a target t through a sentiment expression e. While prior works explore graph-based or sequence labeling-based approaches for the task, we in this paper present a novel unified generative method to solve SSA, a SemEval2022 shared task. We leverage a BART-based encoder-decoder architecture and suitably modify it to generate, given a sentence, a sequence of opinion tuples. Each generated tuple consists of seven integers respectively representing the indices corresponding to the start and end positions of the holder, target, and expression spans, followed by the sentiment polarity class associated between the target and the sentiment expression. We perform rigorous experiments for both Monolingual and Cross-lingual subtasks, and achieve competitive Sentiment F1 scores on the leaderboard in both settings.
abstract_zh: 结构化情感分析 (SSA) 涉及提取文本中的观点元组，其中每个元组 (h, e, t, p) 由持有者 h 组成，h 通过情感表达 e 表达对目标 t 的情感极性 p。虽然之前的工作探索了基于图或基于序列标记的任务方法，但我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的统一生成方法来解决 SSA（SemEval2022 共享任务）。我们利用基于 BART 的编码器-解码器架构，并对其进行适当修改，以在给定句子的情况下生成一系列意见元组。每个生成的元组由七个整数组成，分别表示对应于持有者、目标和表达跨度的开始和结束位置的索引，后面是目标和情感表达之间关联的情感极性类。我们对单语言和跨语言子任务进行了严格的实验，并在这两种设置下都在排行榜上取得了有竞争力的情感 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成模型的结构化情感分析方法，用于从文本中提取包含持有者、目标、情感表达和极性的情感元组。
AI.motivation: 传统方法多采用图模型或序列标注技术，但难以统一处理复杂情感结构。本文旨在通过生成式模型实现更灵活高效的结构化情感分析。
AI.method: 基于BART架构设计编码器-解码器模型，修改后输入句子生成包含持有者、目标、情感表达位置索引及极性类别的七元组序列。
AI.result: 在SemEval2022任务的单语和跨语言子任务中均取得具有竞争力的Sentiment F1分数，进入 leaderboard前列。
AI.conclusion: 生成式方法有效提升了结构化情感分析性能，模型结构具有跨语言适应性，为该领域提供了新思路。
