authors_text: Tingdi Ren,Haiyong Xu,Gangyi Jiang,Mei Yu,Ting Luo
title: Reinforced Swin-Convs Transformer for Underwater Image Enhancement
title_zh: 用于水下图像增强的增强型 Swin-Convs 变压器
abstract: Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) technology aims to tackle the challenge of restoring the degraded underwater images due to light absorption and scattering. To address problems, a novel U-Net based Reinforced Swin-Convs Transformer for the Underwater Image Enhancement method (URSCT-UIE) is proposed. Specifically, with the deficiency of U-Net based on pure convolutions, we embedded the Swin Transformer into U-Net for improving the ability to capture the global dependency. Then, given the inadequacy of the Swin Transformer capturing the local attention, the reintroduction of convolutions may capture more local attention. Thus, we provide an ingenious manner for the fusion of convolutions and the core attention mechanism to build a Reinforced Swin-Convs Transformer Block (RSCTB) for capturing more local attention, which is reinforced in the channel and the spatial attention of the Swin Transformer. Finally, the experimental results on available datasets demonstrate that the proposed URSCT-UIE achieves state-of-the-art performance compared with other methods in terms of both subjective and objective evaluations. The code will be released on GitHub after acceptance.
summary: Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) technology aims to tackle the challenge of restoring the degraded underwater images due to light absorption and scattering. To address problems, a novel U-Net based Reinforced Swin-Convs Transformer for the Underwater Image Enhancement method (URSCT-UIE) is proposed. Specifically, with the deficiency of U-Net based on pure convolutions, we embedded the Swin Transformer into U-Net for improving the ability to capture the global dependency. Then, given the inadequacy of the Swin Transformer capturing the local attention, the reintroduction of convolutions may capture more local attention. Thus, we provide an ingenious manner for the fusion of convolutions and the core attention mechanism to build a Reinforced Swin-Convs Transformer Block (RSCTB) for capturing more local attention, which is reinforced in the channel and the spatial attention of the Swin Transformer. Finally, the experimental results on available datasets demonstrate that the proposed URSCT-UIE achieves state-of-the-art performance compared with other methods in terms of both subjective and objective evaluations. The code will be released on GitHub after acceptance.
abstract_zh: 水下图像增强（UIE）技术旨在解决恢复由于光吸收和散射而退化的水下图像的挑战。为了解决问题，提出了一种基于 U-Net 的新型强化 Swin-Convs 变换器，用于水下图像增强方法（URSCT-UIE）。具体来说，针对基于纯卷积的U-Net的不足，我们将Swin Transformer嵌入到U-Net中以提高捕获全局依赖关系的能力。然后，考虑到 Swin Transformer 不足以捕获局部注意力，重新引入卷积可能会捕获更多的局部注意力。因此，我们提供了一种巧妙的方式来融合卷积和核心注意力机制，构建增强型Swin-Convs Transformer Block（RSCTB）来捕获更多的局部注意力，这在Swin Transformer的通道和空间注意力上得到了加强。最后，可用数据集上的实验结果表明，与其他方法相比，所提出的 URSCT-UIE 在主观和客观评估方面均实现了最先进的性能。代码被接受后将在GitHub上发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进U-Net架构的强化Swin-Convs Transformer模型（URSCT-UIE），用于解决水下图像增强中的全局依赖捕捉与局部细节保留问题。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net纯卷积结构难以建模全局依赖，而Swin Transformer在局部注意力捕捉上存在不足，需融合两者优势以提升水下图像增强效果。
AI.method: 设计Reinforced Swin-Convs Transformer Block（RSCTB），通过通道与空间注意力机制融合Swin Transformer的全局建模能力与卷积的局部特征提取能力，嵌入改进的U-Net框架中。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实验表明，URSCT-UIE在主客观评价指标上均达到SOTA性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新性融合Transformer与卷积机制，提出的URSCT-UIE有效解决了水下图像增强中的全局-局部特征协同建模难题。

authors_text: Jagdish Chand Bansal,Nikhil Sethi,Ogbonnaya Anicho,Atulya Nagar
title: Drone Flocking Optimization using NSGA-II and Principal Component Analysis
title_zh: 使用 NSGA-II 和主成分分析进行无人机集群优化
abstract: Individual agents in natural systems like flocks of birds or schools of fish display a remarkable ability to coordinate and communicate in local groups and execute a variety of tasks efficiently. Emulating such natural systems into drone swarms to solve problems in defence, agriculture, industry automation and humanitarian relief is an emerging technology. However, flocking of aerial robots while maintaining multiple objectives, like collision avoidance, high speed etc. is still a challenge. In this paper, optimized flocking of drones in a confined environment with multiple conflicting objectives is proposed. The considered objectives are collision avoidance (with each other and the wall), speed, correlation, and communication (connected and disconnected agents). Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is applied for dimensionality reduction, and understanding the collective dynamics of the swarm. The control model is characterised by 12 parameters which are then optimized using a multi-objective solver (NSGA-II). The obtained results are reported and compared with that of the CMA-ES algorithm. The study is particularly useful as the proposed optimizer outputs a Pareto Front representing different types of swarms which can applied to different scenarios in the real world.
summary: Individual agents in natural systems like flocks of birds or schools of fish display a remarkable ability to coordinate and communicate in local groups and execute a variety of tasks efficiently. Emulating such natural systems into drone swarms to solve problems in defence, agriculture, industry automation and humanitarian relief is an emerging technology. However, flocking of aerial robots while maintaining multiple objectives, like collision avoidance, high speed etc. is still a challenge. In this paper, optimized flocking of drones in a confined environment with multiple conflicting objectives is proposed. The considered objectives are collision avoidance (with each other and the wall), speed, correlation, and communication (connected and disconnected agents). Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is applied for dimensionality reduction, and understanding the collective dynamics of the swarm. The control model is characterised by 12 parameters which are then optimized using a multi-objective solver (NSGA-II). The obtained results are reported and compared with that of the CMA-ES algorithm. The study is particularly useful as the proposed optimizer outputs a Pareto Front representing different types of swarms which can applied to different scenarios in the real world.
abstract_zh: 鸟群或鱼群等自然系统中的个体表现出非凡的能力，能够在当地群体中进行协调和沟通，并有效地执行各种任务。将此类自然系统模拟成无人机群，以解决国防、农业、工业自动化和人道主义救援方面的问题是一项新兴技术。然而，在保持空中机器人集群的同时保持避免碰撞、高速等多个目标仍然是一个挑战。本文提出了在具有多个相互冲突目标的有限环境中优化无人机集群的方案。考虑的目标是避免碰撞（彼此之间以及与墙壁之间）、速度、相关性和通信（连接和断开连接的代理）。主成分分析 (PCA) 用于降维，并了解群体的集体动态。控制模型由 12 个参数表征，然后使用多目标求解器 (NSGA-II) 对其进行优化。报告所获得的结果并与 CMA-ES 算法的结果进行比较。这项研究特别有用，因为所提出的优化器输出代表不同类型群体的帕累托前沿，可以应用于现实世界中的不同场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于NSGA-II和主成分分析（PCA）的无人机群优化方法，解决多目标冲突下的无人机编队问题。
AI.motivation: 无人机群在防御、农业等领域的应用需要兼顾避障、速度、通信等多目标，但现有方法难以平衡这些冲突目标。
AI.method: 构建包含12个参数的控制模型，采用NSGA-II多目标优化算法，并结合PCA进行降维分析，对比CMA-ES算法验证效果。
AI.result: 优化方法生成帕累托前沿，提供不同场景的无人机群策略，性能优于CMA-ES算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决多目标无人机编队问题，为实际应用提供灵活的优化方案。

title: Analysis of Diffractive Neural Networks for Seeing Through Random Diffusers
title_zh: 用于透视随机漫射器的衍射神经网络分析
abstract: Imaging through diffusive media is a challenging problem, where the existing solutions heavily rely on digital computers to reconstruct distorted images. We provide a detailed analysis of a computer-free, all-optical imaging method for seeing through random, unknown phase diffusers using diffractive neural networks, covering different deep learning-based training strategies. By analyzing various diffractive networks designed to image through random diffusers with different correlation lengths, a trade-off between the image reconstruction fidelity and distortion reduction capability of the diffractive network was observed. During its training, random diffusers with a range of correlation lengths were used to improve the diffractive network's generalization performance. Increasing the number of random diffusers used in each epoch reduced the overfitting of the diffractive network's imaging performance to known diffusers. We also demonstrated that the use of additional diffractive layers improved the generalization capability to see through new, random diffusers. Finally, we introduced deliberate misalignments in training to 'vaccinate' the network against random layer-to-layer shifts that might arise due to the imperfect assembly of the diffractive networks. These analyses provide a comprehensive guide in designing diffractive networks to see through random diffusers, which might profoundly impact many fields, such as biomedical imaging, atmospheric physics, and autonomous driving.
summary: Imaging through diffusive media is a challenging problem, where the existing solutions heavily rely on digital computers to reconstruct distorted images. We provide a detailed analysis of a computer-free, all-optical imaging method for seeing through random, unknown phase diffusers using diffractive neural networks, covering different deep learning-based training strategies. By analyzing various diffractive networks designed to image through random diffusers with different correlation lengths, a trade-off between the image reconstruction fidelity and distortion reduction capability of the diffractive network was observed. During its training, random diffusers with a range of correlation lengths were used to improve the diffractive network's generalization performance. Increasing the number of random diffusers used in each epoch reduced the overfitting of the diffractive network's imaging performance to known diffusers. We also demonstrated that the use of additional diffractive layers improved the generalization capability to see through new, random diffusers. Finally, we introduced deliberate misalignments in training to 'vaccinate' the network against random layer-to-layer shifts that might arise due to the imperfect assembly of the diffractive networks. These analyses provide a comprehensive guide in designing diffractive networks to see through random diffusers, which might profoundly impact many fields, such as biomedical imaging, atmospheric physics, and autonomous driving.
abstract_zh: 通过扩散介质成像是一个具有挑战性的问题，现有的解决方案严重依赖数字计算机来重建扭曲的图像。我们提供了对使用衍射神经网络观察随机、未知相位扩散器的无计算机全光学成像方法的详细分析，涵盖了不同的基于深度学习的训练策略。通过分析设计用于通过具有不同相关长度的随机漫射器成像的各种衍射网络，观察到衍射网络的图像重建保真度和失真减少能力之间的权衡。在训练过程中，使用具有一定相关长度的随机扩散器来提高衍射网络的泛化性能。增加每个时期使用的随机漫射器的数量可以减少衍射网络成像性能对已知漫射器的过度拟合。我们还证明，使用额外的衍射层可以提高透视新的随机漫射器的泛化能力。最后，我们在训练中引入了故意的错位，以便为网络“接种疫苗”，以防止由于衍射网络的不完美组装而可能出现的随机层间移动。这些分析为设计衍射网络以透视随机漫射器提供了全面的指导，这可能会对许多领域产生深远的影响，例如生物医学成像、大气物理和自动驾驶。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用衍射神经网络实现无需计算机的全光学成像方法，以穿透随机相位扩散器。
AI.motivation: 传统穿透扩散介质的成像方法依赖数字计算，而本文旨在开发一种无需计算机的光学方法，提升对未知扩散器的成像泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过分析不同深度学习训练策略，使用多种相关长度的随机扩散器训练网络，增加扩散器数量以减少过拟合，并引入额外衍射层和训练错位增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 发现图像保真度与失真抑制能力的权衡，多扩散器训练和更多衍射层显著提升泛化能力，故意错位训练有效应对装配误差。
AI.conclusion: 提供了设计衍射网络的系统指南，可能推动生物医学、大气物理和自动驾驶等领域的技术革新。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了利用衍射神经网络实现无需计算机的全光学成像方法，以穿透随机相位扩散器。

search_text: Analysis of Diffractive Neural Networks for Seeing Through Random Diffusers 用于透视随机漫射器的衍射神经网络分析 Imaging through diffusive media is a challenging problem, where the existing solutions heavily rely on digital computers to reconstruct distorted images. We provide a detailed analysis of a computer-free, all-optical imaging method for seeing through random, unknown phase diffusers using diffractive neural networks, covering different deep learning-based training strategies. By analyzing various diffractive networks designed to image through random diffusers with different correlation lengths, a trade-off between the image reconstruction fidelity and distortion reduction capability of the diffractive network was observed. During its training, random diffusers with a range of correlation lengths were used to improve the diffractive network's generalization performance. Increasing the number of random diffusers used in each epoch reduced the overfitting of the diffractive network's imaging performance to known diffusers. We also demonstrated that the use of additional diffractive layers improved the generalization capability to see through new, random diffusers. Finally, we introduced deliberate misalignments in training to 'vaccinate' the network against random layer-to-layer shifts that might arise due to the imperfect assembly of the diffractive networks. These analyses provide a comprehensive guide in designing diffractive networks to see through random diffusers, which might profoundly impact many fields, such as biomedical imaging, atmospheric physics, and autonomous driving. 通过扩散介质成像是一个具有挑战性的问题，现有的解决方案严重依赖数字计算机来重建扭曲的图像。我们提供了对使用衍射神经网络观察随机、未知相位扩散器的无计算机全光学成像方法的详细分析，涵盖了不同的基于深度学习的训练策略。通过分析设计用于通过具有不同相关长度的随机漫射器成像的各种衍射网络，观察到衍射网络的图像重建保真度和失真减少能力之间的权衡。在训练过程中，使用具有一定相关长度的随机扩散器来提高衍射网络的泛化性能。增加每个时期使用的随机漫射器的数量可以减少衍射网络成像性能对已知漫射器的过度拟合。我们还证明，使用额外的衍射层可以提高透视新的随机漫射器的泛化能力。最后，我们在训练中引入了故意的错位，以便为网络“接种疫苗”，以防止由于衍射网络的不完美组装而可能出现的随机层间移动。这些分析为设计衍射网络以透视随机漫射器提供了全面的指导，这可能会对许多领域产生深远的影响，例如生物医学成像、大气物理和自动驾驶。 本文研究了利用衍射神经网络实现无需计算机的全光学成像方法，以穿透随机相位扩散器。 Yuhang Li,Yi Luo,Bijie Bai,Aydogan Ozcan physics.optics,cs.CV,cs.NE

title: TinyLight: Adaptive Traffic Signal Control on Devices with Extremely Limited Resources
title_zh: TinyLight：资源极其有限的设备上的自适应交通信号控制
abstract: Recent advances in deep reinforcement learning (DRL) have largely promoted the performance of adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC). Nevertheless, regarding the implementation, most works are cumbersome in terms of storage and computation. This hinders their deployment on scenarios where resources are limited. In this work, we propose TinyLight, the first DRL-based ATSC model that is designed for devices with extremely limited resources. TinyLight first constructs a super-graph to associate a rich set of candidate features with a group of light-weighted network blocks. Then, to diminish the model's resource consumption, we ablate edges in the super-graph automatically with a novel entropy-minimized objective function. This enables TinyLight to work on a standalone microcontroller with merely 2KB RAM and 32KB ROM. We evaluate TinyLight on multiple road networks with real-world traffic demands. Experiments show that even with extremely limited resources, TinyLight still achieves competitive performance. The source code and appendix of this work can be found at \url{https://bit.ly/38hH8t8}.
summary: Recent advances in deep reinforcement learning (DRL) have largely promoted the performance of adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC). Nevertheless, regarding the implementation, most works are cumbersome in terms of storage and computation. This hinders their deployment on scenarios where resources are limited. In this work, we propose TinyLight, the first DRL-based ATSC model that is designed for devices with extremely limited resources. TinyLight first constructs a super-graph to associate a rich set of candidate features with a group of light-weighted network blocks. Then, to diminish the model's resource consumption, we ablate edges in the super-graph automatically with a novel entropy-minimized objective function. This enables TinyLight to work on a standalone microcontroller with merely 2KB RAM and 32KB ROM. We evaluate TinyLight on multiple road networks with real-world traffic demands. Experiments show that even with extremely limited resources, TinyLight still achieves competitive performance. The source code and appendix of this work can be found at \url{https://bit.ly/38hH8t8}.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）的最新进展极大地提升了自适应交通信号控制（ATSC）的性能。然而，就实现而言，大多数工作在存储和计算方面都很麻烦。这阻碍了它们在资源有限的场景中的部署。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TinyLight，这是第一个基于 DRL 的 ATSC 模型，专为资源极其有限的设备而设计。 TinyLight 首先构建一个超级图，将一组丰富的候选特征与一组轻量级网络块相关联。然后，为了减少模型的资源消耗，我们使用新颖的熵最小化目标函数自动消除超级图中的边缘。这使得 TinyLight 能够在仅具有 2KB RAM 和 32KB ROM 的独立微控制器上工作。我们在具有真实交通需求的多个道路网络上评估 TinyLight。实验表明，即使资源极其有限，TinyLight 仍然能够实现具有竞争力的性能。这项工作的源代码和附录可以在 \url{https://bit.ly/38hH8t8} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TinyLight，一种专为极端资源受限设备设计的基于深度强化学习的自适应交通信号控制模型。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法在存储和计算需求较高，难以部署于资源受限场景，亟需轻量化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建超图关联特征与轻量网络模块，通过熵最小化目标函数自动剪枝超图边，实现模型资源消耗的最小化。
AI.result: 在真实交通需求的多路网环境下，TinyLight在仅2KB RAM和32KB ROM的微控制器上实现了具有竞争力的控制性能。
AI.conclusion: TinyLight验证了深度强化学习在极端资源受限设备上的可行性，为低功耗边缘计算场景提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Cheng Chen,Yudong Zhu,Zhenshan Tan,Qingrong Cheng,Xin Jiang,Qun Liu,Xiaodong Gu
title: UTC: A Unified Transformer with Inter-Task Contrastive Learning for Visual Dialog
title_zh: UTC：具有视觉对话任务间对比学习的统一变压器
abstract: Visual Dialog aims to answer multi-round, interactive questions based on the dialog history and image content. Existing methods either consider answer ranking and generating individually or only weakly capture the relation across the two tasks implicitly by two separate models. The research on a universal framework that jointly learns to rank and generate answers in a single model is seldom explored. In this paper, we propose a contrastive learning-based framework UTC to unify and facilitate both discriminative and generative tasks in visual dialog with a single model. Specifically, considering the inherent limitation of the previous learning paradigm, we devise two inter-task contrastive losses i.e., context contrastive loss and answer contrastive loss to make the discriminative and generative tasks mutually reinforce each other. These two complementary contrastive losses exploit dialog context and target answer as anchor points to provide representation learning signals from different perspectives. We evaluate our proposed UTC on the VisDial v1.0 dataset, where our method outperforms the state-of-the-art on both discriminative and generative tasks and surpasses previous state-of-the-art generative methods by more than 2 absolute points on Recall@1.
summary: Visual Dialog aims to answer multi-round, interactive questions based on the dialog history and image content. Existing methods either consider answer ranking and generating individually or only weakly capture the relation across the two tasks implicitly by two separate models. The research on a universal framework that jointly learns to rank and generate answers in a single model is seldom explored. In this paper, we propose a contrastive learning-based framework UTC to unify and facilitate both discriminative and generative tasks in visual dialog with a single model. Specifically, considering the inherent limitation of the previous learning paradigm, we devise two inter-task contrastive losses i.e., context contrastive loss and answer contrastive loss to make the discriminative and generative tasks mutually reinforce each other. These two complementary contrastive losses exploit dialog context and target answer as anchor points to provide representation learning signals from different perspectives. We evaluate our proposed UTC on the VisDial v1.0 dataset, where our method outperforms the state-of-the-art on both discriminative and generative tasks and surpasses previous state-of-the-art generative methods by more than 2 absolute points on Recall@1.
abstract_zh: 视觉对话旨在根据对话历史和图像内容回答多轮交互式问题。现有方法要么考虑答案排名并单独生成，要么仅通过两个单独的模型隐式地微弱地捕获两个任务之间的关系。关于在单个模型中共同学习排名和生成答案的通用框架的研究很少被探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的框架 UTC，以通过单个模型统一和促进视觉对话中的判别性任务和生成性任务。具体来说，考虑到先前学习范式的固有局限性，我们设计了两种任务间对比损失，即上下文对比损失和答案对比损失，使判别任务和生成任务相互加强。这两种互补的对比损失利用对话上下文和目标答案作为锚点，从不同的角度提供表示学习信号。我们在 VisDial v1.0 数据集上评估了我们提出的 UTC，我们的方法在判别和生成任务上都优于最先进的方法，并且在 Recall@1 上超过了之前最先进的生成方法超过 2 个绝对点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的统一Transformer框架UTC，用于同时解决视觉对话中的答案排序和生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么独立处理答案排序与生成，要么通过分离模型弱关联两者，难以有效捕捉跨任务关系。
AI.method: 设计两种跨任务对比损失（上下文对比损失与答案对比损失），利用对话上下文和目标答案作为锚点，通过对比学习实现排序与生成任务的相互促进。
AI.result: 在VisDial v1.0数据集上，UTC在判别任务和生成任务均优于现有最优方法，生成任务Recall@1指标提升超2个百分点。
AI.conclusion: UTC框架通过跨任务对比学习有效统一了视觉对话的排序与生成任务，验证了对比学习在联合优化多任务中的优势。

Specifically, considering the inherent limitation of the previous learning paradigm, we devise two inter-task contrastive losses i.e., context contrastive loss and answer contrastive loss to make the discriminative and generative tasks mutually reinforce each other. These two complementary contrastive losses exploit dialog context and target answer as anchor points to provide representation learning signals from different perspectives. We evaluate our proposed UTC on the VisDial v1.0 dataset, where our method outperforms the state-of-the-art on both discriminative and generative tasks and surpasses previous state-of-the-art generative methods by more than 2 absolute points on Recall@1. 视觉对话旨在根据对话历史和图像内容回答多轮交互式问题。现有方法要么考虑答案排名并单独生成，要么仅通过两个单独的模型隐式地微弱地捕获两个任务之间的关系。关于在单个模型中共同学习排名和生成答案的通用框架的研究很少被探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的框架 UTC，以通过单个模型统一和促进视觉对话中的判别性任务和生成性任务。具体来说，考虑到先前学习范式的固有局限性，我们设计了两种任务间对比损失，即上下文对比损失和答案对比损失，使判别任务和生成任务相互加强。这两种互补的对比损失利用对话上下文和目标答案作为锚点，从不同的角度提供表示学习信号。我们在 VisDial v1.0 数据集上评估了我们提出的 UTC，我们的方法在判别和生成任务上都优于最先进的方法，并且在 Recall@1 上超过了之前最先进的生成方法超过 2 个绝对点。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的统一Transformer框架UTC，用于同时解决视觉对话中的答案排序和生成任务。 Cheng Chen,Yudong Zhu,Zhenshan Tan,Qingrong Cheng,Xin Jiang,Qun Liu,Xiaodong Gu cs.CV

title: Don't Blame the Annotator: Bias Already Starts in the Annotation Instructions
title_zh: 不要责怪注释者：偏见已经从注释说明中开始
abstract: In recent years, progress in NLU has been driven by benchmarks. These benchmarks are typically collected by crowdsourcing, where annotators write examples based on annotation instructions crafted by dataset creators. In this work, we hypothesize that annotators pick up on patterns in the crowdsourcing instructions, which bias them to write many similar examples that are then over-represented in the collected data. We study this form of bias, termed instruction bias, in 14 recent NLU benchmarks, showing that instruction examples often exhibit concrete patterns, which are propagated by crowdworkers to the collected data. This extends previous work (Geva et al., 2019) and raises a new concern of whether we are modeling the dataset creator's instructions, rather than the task. Through a series of experiments, we show that, indeed, instruction bias can lead to overestimation of model performance, and that models struggle to generalize beyond biases originating in the crowdsourcing instructions. We further analyze the influence of instruction bias in terms of pattern frequency and model size, and derive concrete recommendations for creating future NLU benchmarks.
summary: In recent years, progress in NLU has been driven by benchmarks. These benchmarks are typically collected by crowdsourcing, where annotators write examples based on annotation instructions crafted by dataset creators. In this work, we hypothesize that annotators pick up on patterns in the crowdsourcing instructions, which bias them to write many similar examples that are then over-represented in the collected data. We study this form of bias, termed instruction bias, in 14 recent NLU benchmarks, showing that instruction examples often exhibit concrete patterns, which are propagated by crowdworkers to the collected data. This extends previous work (Geva et al., 2019) and raises a new concern of whether we are modeling the dataset creator's instructions, rather than the task. Through a series of experiments, we show that, indeed, instruction bias can lead to overestimation of model performance, and that models struggle to generalize beyond biases originating in the crowdsourcing instructions. We further analyze the influence of instruction bias in terms of pattern frequency and model size, and derive concrete recommendations for creating future NLU benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，NLU 的进步是由基准驱动的。这些基准通常是通过众包收集的，其中注释者根据数据集创建者制作的注释指令编写示例。在这项工作中，我们假设注释者会发现众包指令中的模式，这使得他们倾向于编写许多类似的示例，然后这些示例在收集的数据中被过度代表。我们在最近的 14 个 NLU 基准测试中研究了这种形式的偏差（称为指令偏差），结果表明指令示例通常表现出具体的模式，这些模式由众包工作者传播到收集的数据中。这扩展了之前的工作（Geva 等人，2019），并引发了一个新的担忧：我们是否正在对数据集创建者的指令而不是任务进行建模。通过一系列实验，我们表明，指令偏差确实会导致对模型性能的高估，并且模型很难概括出源自众包指令的偏差。我们进一步分析指令偏差在模式频率和模型大小方面的影响，并为创建未来 NLU 基准得出具体建议。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了自然语言理解（NLU）基准数据中的注释偏差问题，指出偏差源于数据集创建者的注释指令，而非注释者本身，并验证了这种偏差对模型性能评估的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前NLU研究依赖众包标注的基准数据，但注释指令中的隐含模式可能导致数据偏差，进而影响模型评估的准确性。需明确偏差来源以改进基准设计。
AI.method: 通过分析14个NLU基准的注释指令，识别其中的模式并验证其在数据中的传播情况；设计实验对比模型在存在/不存在指令偏差时的性能差异，结合模式频率与模型规模进行分析。
AI.result: 发现注释指令中的具体模式被众包工作者复制到数据中，导致模型性能被高估，且模型难以泛化到无偏差场景。模式频率越高、模型规模越大，偏差影响越显著。
AI.conclusion: 注释指令设计是NLU基准偏差的关键源头，需优化指令以减少模式引导，未来基准应避免过度依赖可能引入偏差的标注流程。

title: Accurate Fruit Localisation for Robotic Harvesting using High Resolution LiDAR-Camera Fusion
title_zh: 使用高分辨率激光雷达相机融合进行机器人采摘的精确水果定位
abstract: Accurate depth-sensing plays a crucial role in securing a high success rate of robotic harvesting in natural orchard environments. Solid-state LiDAR (SSL), a recently introduced LiDAR technique, can perceive high-resolution geometric information of the scenes, which can be potential utilised to receive accurate depth information. Meanwhile, the fusion of the sensory information from LiDAR and camera can significantly enhance the sensing ability of the harvesting robots. This work introduces a LiDAR-camera fusion-based visual sensing and perception strategy to perform accurate fruit localisation for a harvesting robot in the apple orchards. Two SOTA extrinsic calibration methods, target-based and targetless-based, are applied and evaluated to obtain the accurate extrinsic matrix between the LiDAR and camera. With the extrinsic calibration, the point clouds and color images are fused to perform fruit localisation using a one-stage instance segmentation network. Experimental shows that LiDAR-camera achieves better quality on visual sensing in the natural environments. Meanwhile, introducing the LiDAR-camera fusion largely improves the accuracy and robustness of the fruit localisation. Specifically, the standard deviations of fruit localisation by using LiDAR-camera at 0.5 m, 1.2 m, and 1.8 m are 0.245, 0.227, and 0.275 cm respectively. These measurement error is only one one fifth of that from Realsense D455. Lastly, we have attached our visualised point cloud to demonstrate the highly accurate sensing method.
summary: Accurate depth-sensing plays a crucial role in securing a high success rate of robotic harvesting in natural orchard environments. Solid-state LiDAR (SSL), a recently introduced LiDAR technique, can perceive high-resolution geometric information of the scenes, which can be potential utilised to receive accurate depth information. Meanwhile, the fusion of the sensory information from LiDAR and camera can significantly enhance the sensing ability of the harvesting robots. This work introduces a LiDAR-camera fusion-based visual sensing and perception strategy to perform accurate fruit localisation for a harvesting robot in the apple orchards. Two SOTA extrinsic calibration methods, target-based and targetless-based, are applied and evaluated to obtain the accurate extrinsic matrix between the LiDAR and camera. With the extrinsic calibration, the point clouds and color images are fused to perform fruit localisation using a one-stage instance segmentation network. Experimental shows that LiDAR-camera achieves better quality on visual sensing in the natural environments. Meanwhile, introducing the LiDAR-camera fusion largely improves the accuracy and robustness of the fruit localisation. Specifically, the standard deviations of fruit localisation by using LiDAR-camera at 0.5 m, 1.2 m, and 1.8 m are 0.245, 0.227, and 0.275 cm respectively. These measurement error is only one one fifth of that from Realsense D455. Lastly, we have attached our visualised point cloud to demonstrate the highly accurate sensing method.
abstract_zh: 准确的深度传感对于确保机器人在自然果园环境中采摘的高成功率起着至关重要的作用。固态激光雷达（SSL）是最近推出的一种激光雷达技术，可以感知场景的高分辨率几何信息，可用于接收准确的深度信息。同时，激光雷达和摄像头传感信息的融合可以显着增强收割机器人的传感能力。这项工作介绍了一种基于激光雷达相机融合的视觉传感和感知策略，为苹果园中的采摘机器人进行准确的水果定位。应用和评估基于目标和无目标两种SOTA外在校准方法，以获得激光雷达和相机之间的准确外在矩阵。通过外部校准，点云和彩色图像被融合，使用一级实例分割网络执行水果定位。实验表明，激光雷达相机在自然环境中实现了更好的视觉传感质量。同时，激光雷达与相机融合的引入大大提高了水果定位的准确性和鲁棒性。具体来说，利用激光雷达相机在0.5 m、1.2 m和1.8 m处进行水果定位的标准偏差分别为0.245、0.227和0.275 cm。这些测量误差仅为 Realsense D455 的五分之一。最后，我们附加了可视化点云来演示高精度的传感方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高分辨率LiDAR-相机融合的视觉感知策略，用于实现苹果园采摘机器人中的精确果实定位。
AI.motivation: 自然果园环境中的精确深度感知对提高采摘机器人成功率至关重要，而LiDAR与相机信息融合可显著增强感知能力。
AI.method: 采用目标基和无目标基两种最新外参标定方法获取传感器配准矩阵，融合点云与彩色图像并通过单阶段实例分割网络实现果实定位。
AI.result: 在0.5m/1.2m/1.8m距离下果实定位标准差分别为0.245/0.227/0.275cm，仅为Realsense D455的五分之一，可视化点云验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: LiDAR-相机融合显著提升了果实定位精度与鲁棒性，为复杂自然环境下的机器人采摘提供了可靠解决方案。

Specifically, the standard deviations of fruit localisation by using LiDAR-camera at 0.5 m, 1.2 m, and 1.8 m are 0.245, 0.227, and 0.275 cm respectively. Lastly, we have attached our visualised point cloud to demonstrate the highly accurate sensing method. 准确的深度传感对于确保机器人在自然果园环境中采摘的高成功率起着至关重要的作用。固态激光雷达（SSL）是最近推出的一种激光雷达技术，可以感知场景的高分辨率几何信息，可用于接收准确的深度信息。同时，激光雷达和摄像头传感信息的融合可以显着增强收割机器人的传感能力。这项工作介绍了一种基于激光雷达相机融合的视觉传感和感知策略，为苹果园中的采摘机器人进行准确的水果定位。应用和评估基于目标和无目标两种SOTA外在校准方法，以获得激光雷达和相机之间的准确外在矩阵。通过外部校准，点云和彩色图像被融合，使用一级实例分割网络执行水果定位。实验表明，激光雷达相机在自然环境中实现了更好的视觉传感质量。同时，激光雷达与相机融合的引入大大提高了水果定位的准确性和鲁棒性。具体来说，利用激光雷达相机在0.5 m、1.2 m和1.8 m处进行水果定位的标准偏差分别为0.245、0.227和0.275 cm。这些测量误差仅为 Realsense D455 的五分之一。最后，我们附加了可视化点云来演示高精度的传感方法。 本文提出一种基于高分辨率LiDAR-相机融合的视觉感知策略，用于实现苹果园采摘机器人中的精确果实定位。 Hanwen Kang,Xing Wang,Chao Chen cs.RO

title: Convex Combination Consistency between Neighbors for Weakly-supervised Action Localization
title_zh: 弱监督动作定位的邻居之间的凸组合一致性
abstract: Weakly-supervised temporal action localization (WTAL) intends to detect action instances with only weak supervision, e.g., video-level labels. The current~\textit{de facto} pipeline locates action instances by thresholding and grouping continuous high-score regions on temporal class activation sequences. In this route, the capacity of the model to recognize the relationships between adjacent snippets is of vital importance which determines the quality of the action boundaries. However, it is error-prone since the variations between adjacent snippets are typically subtle, and unfortunately this is overlooked in the literature. To tackle the issue, we propose a novel WTAL approach named Convex Combination Consistency between Neighbors (C$^3$BN). C$^3$BN consists of two key ingredients: a micro data augmentation strategy that increases the diversity in-between adjacent snippets by convex combination of adjacent snippets, and a macro-micro consistency regularization that enforces the model to be invariant to the transformations~\textit{w.r.t.} video semantics, snippet predictions, and snippet representations. Consequently, fine-grained patterns in-between adjacent snippets are enforced to be explored, thereby resulting in a more robust action boundary localization. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of C$^3$BN on top of various baselines for WTAL with video-level and point-level supervisions. Code is at https://github.com/Qinying-Liu/C3BN.
summary: Weakly-supervised temporal action localization (WTAL) intends to detect action instances with only weak supervision, e.g., video-level labels. The current~\textit{de facto} pipeline locates action instances by thresholding and grouping continuous high-score regions on temporal class activation sequences. In this route, the capacity of the model to recognize the relationships between adjacent snippets is of vital importance which determines the quality of the action boundaries. However, it is error-prone since the variations between adjacent snippets are typically subtle, and unfortunately this is overlooked in the literature. To tackle the issue, we propose a novel WTAL approach named Convex Combination Consistency between Neighbors (C$^3$BN). C$^3$BN consists of two key ingredients: a micro data augmentation strategy that increases the diversity in-between adjacent snippets by convex combination of adjacent snippets, and a macro-micro consistency regularization that enforces the model to be invariant to the transformations~\textit{w.r.t.} video semantics, snippet predictions, and snippet representations. Consequently, fine-grained patterns in-between adjacent snippets are enforced to be explored, thereby resulting in a more robust action boundary localization. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of C$^3$BN on top of various baselines for WTAL with video-level and point-level supervisions. Code is at https://github.com/Qinying-Liu/C3BN.
abstract_zh: 弱监督时间动作定位（WTAL）旨在检测仅具有弱监督的动作实例，例如视频级标签。当前的~\textit{事实上}管道通过对时间类激活序列上的连续高分区域进行阈值化和分组来定位动作实例。在这条路线中，模型识别相邻片段之间关系的能力至关重要，它决定了动作边界的质量。然而，它很容易出错，因为相邻片段之间的差异通常很微妙，不幸的是，这一点在文献中被忽视了。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 WTAL 方法，称为邻居之间的凸组合一致性（C$^3$BN）。 C$^3$BN 由两个关键要素组成：微观数据增强策略，通过相邻片段的凸组合来增加相邻片段之间的多样性；宏观-微观一致性正则化，强制模型对转换~\textit{w.r.t.} 视频语义、片段预测和片段表示保持不变。因此，强制探索相邻片段之间的细粒度模式，从而产生更稳健的动作边界定位。实验结果证明了 C$^3$BN 在视频级和点级监督的 WTAL 各种基线之上的有效性。代码位于 https://github.com/Qinying-Liu/C3BN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督动作定位方法C³BN，通过增强相邻视频片段间的关系识别能力，提升动作边界检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在定位动作实例时忽视了相邻片段间细微变化，导致边界检测误差较大，需通过邻域一致性约束改进模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计凸组合数据增强策略提升相邻片段多样性，并引入宏-微一致性正则化，强制模型对语义、预测和表示的变换保持不变性。
AI.result: 在多种基线模型上验证了C³BN的有效性，代码已开源，显著提升了视频级和点级监督下的动作定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘相邻片段的细粒度模式，C³BN有效增强了动作边界定位能力，为弱监督动作定位提供了新思路。

title: Learning user-defined sub-goals using memory editing in reinforcement learning
title_zh: 在强化学习中使用内存编辑来学习用户定义的子目标
abstract: The aim of reinforcement learning (RL) is to allow the agent to achieve the final goal. Most RL studies have focused on improving the efficiency of learning to achieve the final goal faster. However, the RL model is very difficult to modify an intermediate route in the process of reaching the final goal. That is, the agent cannot be under control to achieve other sub-goals in the existing studies. If the agent can go through the sub-goals on the way to the destination, the RL can be applied and studied in various fields. In this study, I propose a methodology to achieve the user-defined sub-goals as well as the final goal using memory editing. The memory editing is performed to generate various sub-goals and give an additional reward to the agent. In addition, the sub-goals are separately learned from the final goal. I set two simple environments and various scenarios in the test environments. As a result, the agent almost successfully passed the sub-goals as well as the final goal under control. Moreover, the agent was able to be induced to visit the novel state indirectly in the environments. I expect that this methodology can be used in the fields that need to control the agent in a variety of scenarios.
summary: The aim of reinforcement learning (RL) is to allow the agent to achieve the final goal. Most RL studies have focused on improving the efficiency of learning to achieve the final goal faster. However, the RL model is very difficult to modify an intermediate route in the process of reaching the final goal. That is, the agent cannot be under control to achieve other sub-goals in the existing studies. If the agent can go through the sub-goals on the way to the destination, the RL can be applied and studied in various fields. In this study, I propose a methodology to achieve the user-defined sub-goals as well as the final goal using memory editing. The memory editing is performed to generate various sub-goals and give an additional reward to the agent. In addition, the sub-goals are separately learned from the final goal. I set two simple environments and various scenarios in the test environments. As a result, the agent almost successfully passed the sub-goals as well as the final goal under control. Moreover, the agent was able to be induced to visit the novel state indirectly in the environments. I expect that this methodology can be used in the fields that need to control the agent in a variety of scenarios.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）的目的是让智能体实现最终目标。大多数强化学习研究都专注于提高学习效率，以更快地实现最终目标。然而，RL模型在达到最终目标的过程中很难修改中间路线。也就是说，现有研究中无法控制智能体实现其他子目标。如果智能体能够在到达目的地的途中完成子目标，那么强化学习就可以在各个领域进行应用和研究。在这项研究中，我提出了一种使用内存编辑来实现用户定义的子目标以及最终目标的方法。执行内存编辑以生成各种子目标并为智能体提供额外的奖励。此外，子目标是与最终目标分开学习的。我在测试环境中设置了两个简单的环境和各种场景。结果，智能体几乎成功地通过了子目标，并且最终目标也得到了控制。此外，能够诱导智能体在环境中间接访问新状态。我期望这种方法可以用于需要在各种场景下控制代理的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于记忆编辑的强化学习方法，使智能体能够同时学习用户定义的子目标和最终目标。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习难以调整智能体在达成最终目标过程中的中间路径，无法实现对子目标的控制，限制了其在复杂场景的应用。
AI.method: 通过记忆编辑技术生成子目标并赋予额外奖励，使智能体在学习最终目标的同时独立学习子目标。
AI.result: 实验表明智能体能成功通过预设子目标和最终目标，并可被引导访问新状态，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为需要精确控制智能体路径的场景（如机器人导航、游戏AI等）提供了新的技术方案。

authors_text: Jinsheng Wei,Wei Peng,Guanming Lu,Yante Li,Jingjie Yan,Guoying Zhao
title: Geometric Graph Representation with Learnable Graph Structure and Adaptive AU Constraint for Micro-Expression Recognition
title_zh: 用于微表情识别的具有可学习图结构和自适应AU约束的几何图表示
abstract: Micro-expression recognition (MER) is valuable because micro-expressions (MEs) can reveal genuine emotions. Most works take image sequences as input and cannot effectively explore ME information because subtle ME-related motions are easily submerged in unrelated information. Instead, the facial landmark is a low-dimensional and compact modality, which achieves lower computational cost and potentially concentrates on ME-related movement features. However, the discriminability of facial landmarks for MER is unclear. Thus, this paper explores the contribution of facial landmarks and proposes a novel framework to efficiently recognize MEs. Firstly, a geometric two-stream graph network is constructed to aggregate the low-order and high-order geometric movement information from facial landmarks to obtain discriminative ME representation. Secondly, a self-learning fashion is introduced to automatically model the dynamic relationship between nodes even long-distance nodes. Furthermore, an adaptive action unit loss is proposed to reasonably build the strong correlation between landmarks, facial action units and MEs. Notably, this work provides a novel idea with much higher efficiency to promote MER, only utilizing graph-based geometric features. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive performance with a significantly reduced computational cost. Furthermore, facial landmarks significantly contribute to MER and are worth further study for high-efficient ME analysis.
summary: Micro-expression recognition (MER) is valuable because micro-expressions (MEs) can reveal genuine emotions. Most works take image sequences as input and cannot effectively explore ME information because subtle ME-related motions are easily submerged in unrelated information. Instead, the facial landmark is a low-dimensional and compact modality, which achieves lower computational cost and potentially concentrates on ME-related movement features. However, the discriminability of facial landmarks for MER is unclear. Thus, this paper explores the contribution of facial landmarks and proposes a novel framework to efficiently recognize MEs. Firstly, a geometric two-stream graph network is constructed to aggregate the low-order and high-order geometric movement information from facial landmarks to obtain discriminative ME representation. Secondly, a self-learning fashion is introduced to automatically model the dynamic relationship between nodes even long-distance nodes. Furthermore, an adaptive action unit loss is proposed to reasonably build the strong correlation between landmarks, facial action units and MEs. Notably, this work provides a novel idea with much higher efficiency to promote MER, only utilizing graph-based geometric features. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive performance with a significantly reduced computational cost. Furthermore, facial landmarks significantly contribute to MER and are worth further study for high-efficient ME analysis.
abstract_zh: 微表情识别（MER）很有价值，因为微表情（ME）可以揭示真实的情绪。大多数作品以图像序列作为输入，无法有效地探索ME信息，因为与ME相关的微妙运动很容易淹没在不相关的信息中。相反，面部标志是一种低维且紧凑的模态，它实现了较低的计算成本，并可能集中于与 ME 相关的运动特征。然而，MER 面部标志的辨别能力尚不清楚。因此，本文探讨了面部标志的贡献，并提出了一种有效识别 ME 的新颖框架。首先，构建几何双流图网络来聚合来自面部标志的低阶和高阶几何运动信息，以获得有区别的 ME 表示。其次，引入自学习方式来自动建模节点之间甚至远距离节点之间的动态关系。此外，提出了自适应动作单元损失来合理地建立地标、面部动作单元和 ME 之间的强相关性。值得注意的是，这项工作为推广 MER 提供了一种效率更高的新颖思路，仅利用基于图的几何特征。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在显着降低计算成本的情况下实现了有竞争力的性能。此外，面部标志对 MER 贡献显着，值得进一步研究以进行高效的 ME 分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何图表示和自适应动作单元约束的微表情识别框架，利用面部关键点高效捕捉微表情特征。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖图像序列难以有效提取微表情信息，而面部关键点作为低维模态可能更聚焦微表情运动特征，但其判别能力尚未明确。
AI.method: 构建双流几何图网络聚合面部关键点的低阶/高阶运动信息，引入自学习机制建模节点动态关系，并设计自适应动作单元损失函数关联关键点、面部动作单元与微表情。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持竞争力的同时显著降低计算成本，验证了面部关键点对微表情识别的重要贡献。
AI.conclusion: 本文为微表情分析提供了高效图特征框架，证明面部关键点在该领域的研究价值，为后续高效微表情分析奠定基础。

search_text: Geometric Graph Representation with Learnable Graph Structure and Adaptive AU Constraint for Micro-Expression Recognition 用于微表情识别的具有可学习图结构和自适应AU约束的几何图表示 Micro-expression recognition (MER) is valuable because micro-expressions (MEs) can reveal genuine emotions. Most works take image sequences as input and cannot effectively explore ME information because subtle ME-related motions are easily submerged in unrelated information. Instead, the facial landmark is a low-dimensional and compact modality, which achieves lower computational cost and potentially concentrates on ME-related movement features. However, the discriminability of facial landmarks for MER is unclear. Thus, this paper explores the contribution of facial landmarks and proposes a novel framework to efficiently recognize MEs. Firstly, a geometric two-stream graph network is constructed to aggregate the low-order and high-order geometric movement information from facial landmarks to obtain discriminative ME representation. Secondly, a self-learning fashion is introduced to automatically model the dynamic relationship between nodes even long-distance nodes. Furthermore, an adaptive action unit loss is proposed to reasonably build the strong correlation between landmarks, facial action units and MEs. Notably, this work provides a novel idea with much higher efficiency to promote MER, only utilizing graph-based geometric features. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive performance with a significantly reduced computational cost. Furthermore, facial landmarks significantly contribute to MER and are worth further study for high-efficient ME analysis. 微表情识别（MER）很有价值，因为微表情（ME）可以揭示真实的情绪。大多数作品以图像序列作为输入，无法有效地探索ME信息，因为与ME相关的微妙运动很容易淹没在不相关的信息中。相反，面部标志是一种低维且紧凑的模态，它实现了较低的计算成本，并可能集中于与 ME 相关的运动特征。然而，MER 面部标志的辨别能力尚不清楚。因此，本文探讨了面部标志的贡献，并提出了一种有效识别 ME 的新颖框架。首先，构建几何双流图网络来聚合来自面部标志的低阶和高阶几何运动信息，以获得有区别的 ME 表示。其次，引入自学习方式来自动建模节点之间甚至远距离节点之间的动态关系。此外，提出了自适应动作单元损失来合理地建立地标、面部动作单元和 ME 之间的强相关性。值得注意的是，这项工作为推广 MER 提供了一种效率更高的新颖思路，仅利用基于图的几何特征。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在显着降低计算成本的情况下实现了有竞争力的性能。此外，面部标志对 MER 贡献显着，值得进一步研究以进行高效的 ME 分析。 本文提出一种基于几何图表示和自适应动作单元约束的微表情识别框架，利用面部关键点高效捕捉微表情特征。 Jinsheng Wei,Wei Peng,Guanming Lu,Yante Li,Jingjie Yan,Guoying Zhao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Naifan Li,Fan Song,Ying Zhang,Pengpeng Liang,Erkang Cheng
title: Traffic Context Aware Data Augmentation for Rare Object Detection in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶中稀有物体检测的交通情境感知数据增强
comment: The IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation, ICRA 2022
comments: The IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation, ICRA 2022
abstract: Detection of rare objects (e.g., traffic cones, traffic barrels and traffic warning triangles) is an important perception task to improve the safety of autonomous driving. Training of such models typically requires a large number of annotated data which is expensive and time consuming to obtain. To address the above problem, an emerging approach is to apply data augmentation to automatically generate cost-free training samples. In this work, we propose a systematic study on simple Copy-Paste data augmentation for rare object detection in autonomous driving. Specifically, local adaptive instance-level image transformation is introduced to generate realistic rare object masks from source domain to the target domain. Moreover, traffic scene context is utilized to guide the placement of masks of rare objects. To this end, our data augmentation generates training data with high quality and realistic characteristics by leveraging both local and global consistency. In addition, we build a new dataset, Rare Object Dataset (ROD), consisting 10k training images, 4k validation images and the corresponding labels with a diverse range of scenarios in autonomous driving. Experiments on ROD show that our method achieves promising results on rare object detection. We also present a thorough study to illustrate the effectiveness of our local-adaptive and global constraints based Copy-Paste data augmentation for rare object detection. The data, development kit and more information of ROD are available online at: \url{https://nullmax-vision.github.io}.
summary: Detection of rare objects (e.g., traffic cones, traffic barrels and traffic warning triangles) is an important perception task to improve the safety of autonomous driving. Training of such models typically requires a large number of annotated data which is expensive and time consuming to obtain. To address the above problem, an emerging approach is to apply data augmentation to automatically generate cost-free training samples. In this work, we propose a systematic study on simple Copy-Paste data augmentation for rare object detection in autonomous driving. Specifically, local adaptive instance-level image transformation is introduced to generate realistic rare object masks from source domain to the target domain. Moreover, traffic scene context is utilized to guide the placement of masks of rare objects. To this end, our data augmentation generates training data with high quality and realistic characteristics by leveraging both local and global consistency. In addition, we build a new dataset, Rare Object Dataset (ROD), consisting 10k training images, 4k validation images and the corresponding labels with a diverse range of scenarios in autonomous driving. Experiments on ROD show that our method achieves promising results on rare object detection. We also present a thorough study to illustrate the effectiveness of our local-adaptive and global constraints based Copy-Paste data augmentation for rare object detection. The data, development kit and more information of ROD are available online at: \url{https://nullmax-vision.github.io}.
abstract_zh: 稀有物体（例如交通锥、交通桶和交通警示三角）的检测是提高自动驾驶安全性的重要感知任务。此类模型的训练通常需要大量带注释的数据，而获取这些数据既昂贵又耗时。为了解决上述问题，一种新兴的方法是应用数据增强来自动生成免费的训练样本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项关于简单复制粘贴数据增强的系统研究，用于自动驾驶中的稀有物体检测。具体来说，引入局部自适应实例级图像变换来生成从源域到目标域的真实稀有对象掩模。此外，利用交通场景上下文来指导稀有物体掩模的放置。为此，我们的数据增强通过利用本地和全球一致性来生成具有高质量和现实特征的训练数据。此外，我们构建了一个新的数据集，稀有对象数据集（ROD），由 10k 训练图像、4k 验证图像以及自动驾驶中各种场景的相应标签组成。 ROD 实验表明，我们的方法在稀有物体检测方面取得了有希望的结果。我们还提出了一项彻底的研究，以说明我们基于局部自适应和全局约束的复制粘贴数据增强对于稀有物体检测的有效性。 ROD 的数据、开发套件和更多信息可在线获取：\url{https://nullmax-vision.github.io}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交通场景上下文感知的数据增强方法，用于提升自动驾驶中稀有物体（如交通锥、警示三角等）的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 稀有物体检测对自动驾驶安全性至关重要，但标注数据获取成本高且耗时，传统方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 通过局部自适应实例级图像变换生成真实稀有物体掩码，并结合交通场景上下文指导掩码放置，同时构建包含10k训练图像的稀有物体数据集（ROD）。
AI.result: 在ROD数据集上实验表明，该方法在稀有物体检测任务中取得显著效果，验证了局部自适应与全局约束结合的Copy-Paste数据增强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过融合局部细节与全局场景信息，有效提升了稀有物体检测性能，并为相关研究提供了公开数据集与工具支持。

title: The Johnson-Lindenstrauss Lemma for Clustering and Subspace Approximation: From Coresets to Dimension Reduction
title_zh: 用于聚类和子空间近似的 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 引理：从核心集到降维
abstract: We study the effect of Johnson-Lindenstrauss transforms in various projective clustering problems, generalizing recent results which only applied to center-based clustering [MMR19]. We ask the general question: for a Euclidean optimization problem and an accuracy parameter $ε\in (0, 1)$, what is the smallest target dimension $t \in \mathbb{N}$ such that a Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform $Π\colon \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}^t$ preserves the cost of the optimal solution up to a $(1+ε)$-factor. We give a new technique which uses coreset constructions to analyze the effect of the Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform. Our technique, in addition applying to center-based clustering, improves on (or is the first to address) other Euclidean optimization problems, including: $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-subspace approximation: we show that $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2 / ε^3)$ suffices, whereas the prior best bound, of $O(k/ε^2)$, only applied to the case $z = 2$ [CEMMP15]. $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-flat approximation: we show $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2/ε^3)$ suffices, completely removing the dependence on $n$ from the prior bound $\tilde{O}(zk^2 \log n/ε^3)$ of [KR15]. $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-line approximation: we show $t = O((k \log \log n + z + \log(1/ε)) / ε^3)$ suffices, and ours is the first to give any dimension reduction result.
summary: We study the effect of Johnson-Lindenstrauss transforms in various projective clustering problems, generalizing recent results which only applied to center-based clustering [MMR19]. We ask the general question: for a Euclidean optimization problem and an accuracy parameter $ε\in (0, 1)$, what is the smallest target dimension $t \in \mathbb{N}$ such that a Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform $Π\colon \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}^t$ preserves the cost of the optimal solution up to a $(1+ε)$-factor. We give a new technique which uses coreset constructions to analyze the effect of the Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform. Our technique, in addition applying to center-based clustering, improves on (or is the first to address) other Euclidean optimization problems, including: $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-subspace approximation: we show that $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2 / ε^3)$ suffices, whereas the prior best bound, of $O(k/ε^2)$, only applied to the case $z = 2$ [CEMMP15]. $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-flat approximation: we show $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2/ε^3)$ suffices, completely removing the dependence on $n$ from the prior bound $\tilde{O}(zk^2 \log n/ε^3)$ of [KR15]. $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-line approximation: we show $t = O((k \log \log n + z + \log(1/ε)) / ε^3)$ suffices, and ours is the first to give any dimension reduction result.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换在各种投影聚类问题中的效果，概括了仅适用于基于中心的聚类的最新结果 [MMR19]。我们提出一般性问题：对于欧几里得优化问题和精度参数 $ε\in (0, 1)$，最小目标维度 $t \in \mathbb{N}$ 是多少，以便 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换 $Π\colon \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}^t$ 将最优解的成本保留到 $(1+ε)$ 因子。我们给出了一种新技术，它使用核心集构造来分析 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换的效果。我们的技术除了应用于基于中心的聚类之外，还改进了（或者是第一个解决）其他欧几里得优化问题，包括： $\bullet$ 对于 $(k,z)$-子空间近似：我们表明 $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2 / ε^3)$ 就足够了，而 $O(k/ε^2)$ 的先验最佳边界仅适用于 $z = 2$ 的情况[CEMMP15]。 $\bullet$ 对于 $(k,z)$ 平坦近似：我们证明 $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2/ε^3)$ 就足够了，完全消除了 [KR15] 的先验边界 $\tilde{O}(zk^2 \log n/ε^3)$ 对 $n$ 的依赖。 $\bullet$ 对于 $(k,z)$ 线近似：我们显示 $t = O((k \log \log n + z + \log(1/ε)) / ε^3)$ 就足够了，并且我们是第一个给出任何降维结果的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究约翰逊-林登斯特劳斯变换在多种投影聚类问题中的效果，旨在确定最小目标维度以保持最优解成本的(1+ε)因子。
AI.motivation: 现有结果仅适用于基于中心的聚类，本文希望推广至更广泛的欧几里得优化问题，并改进现有维度降低的界限。
AI.method: 提出一种新方法，利用核心集构造分析约翰逊-林登斯特劳斯变换对聚类问题的影响。
AI.result: 针对(k,z)-子空间、(k,z)-平面和(k,z)-线近似问题，分别给出更优的维度上界，如去除对n的依赖并首次提供某些问题的维度降低结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在多种欧几里得优化问题中取得更优或首次的维度降低结果，展示了核心集技术的广泛适用性。

search_text: The Johnson-Lindenstrauss Lemma for Clustering and Subspace Approximation: From Coresets to Dimension Reduction 用于聚类和子空间近似的 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 引理：从核心集到降维 We study the effect of Johnson-Lindenstrauss transforms in various projective clustering problems, generalizing recent results which only applied to center-based clustering [MMR19]. We ask the general question: for a Euclidean optimization problem and an accuracy parameter $ε\in (0, 1)$, what is the smallest target dimension $t \in \mathbb{N}$ such that a Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform $Π\colon \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}^t$ preserves the cost of the optimal solution up to a $(1+ε)$-factor. We give a new technique which uses coreset constructions to analyze the effect of the Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform. Our technique, in addition applying to center-based clustering, improves on (or is the first to address) other Euclidean optimization problems, including: $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-subspace approximation: we show that $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2 / ε^3)$ suffices, whereas the prior best bound, of $O(k/ε^2)$, only applied to the case $z = 2$ [CEMMP15]. $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-flat approximation: we show $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2/ε^3)$ suffices, completely removing the dependence on $n$ from the prior bound $\tilde{O}(zk^2 \log n/ε^3)$ of [KR15]. $\bullet$ For $(k,z)$-line approximation: we show $t = O((k \log \log n + z + \log(1/ε)) / ε^3)$ suffices, and ours is the first to give any dimension reduction result. 我们研究了 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换在各种投影聚类问题中的效果，概括了仅适用于基于中心的聚类的最新结果 [MMR19]。我们提出一般性问题：对于欧几里得优化问题和精度参数 $ε\in (0, 1)$，最小目标维度 $t \in \mathbb{N}$ 是多少，以便 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换 $Π\colon \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}^t$ 将最优解的成本保留到 $(1+ε)$ 因子。我们给出了一种新技术，它使用核心集构造来分析 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换的效果。我们的技术除了应用于基于中心的聚类之外，还改进了（或者是第一个解决）其他欧几里得优化问题，包括： $\bullet$ 对于 $(k,z)$-子空间近似：我们表明 $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2 / ε^3)$ 就足够了，而 $O(k/ε^2)$ 的先验最佳边界仅适用于 $z = 2$ 的情况[CEMMP15]。 $\bullet$ 对于 $(k,z)$ 平坦近似：我们证明 $t = \tilde{O}(zk^2/ε^3)$ 就足够了，完全消除了 [KR15] 的先验边界 $\tilde{O}(zk^2 \log n/ε^3)$ 对 $n$ 的依赖。 $\bullet$ 对于 $(k,z)$ 线近似：我们显示 $t = O((k \log \log n + z + \log(1/ε)) / ε^3)$ 就足够了，并且我们是第一个给出任何降维结果的。 本文研究约翰逊-林登斯特劳斯变换在多种投影聚类问题中的效果，旨在确定最小目标维度以保持最优解成本的(1+ε)因子。 Moses Charikar,Erik Waingarten cs.DS

title: Optimizing an Adaptive Fuzzy Logic Controller of a 3-DOF Helicopter with a Modified PSO Algorithm
title_zh: 用改进的 PSO 算法优化三自由度直升机的自适应模糊逻辑控制器
abstract: This paper investigates the controller optimization for a helicopter system with three degrees of freedom (3-DOF). To control the system, we combined fuzzy logic with adaptive control theory. The system is extensively nonlinear and highly sensitive to the controller's parameters, making it a real challenge to study these parameters' effect on the controller's performance. Using metaheuristic algorithms for determining these parameters is a promising solution. This paper proposes using a modified particle swarm optimization (MPSO) algorithm to optimize the controller. The algorithm shows a high ability to perform the global search and find a reasonable search space. The algorithm modifies the search space of each particle based on its fitness function value and substitutes weak particles for new ones. These modifications have led to better accuracy and convergence rate. We prove the efficiency of the MPSO algorithm by comparing it with the standard PSO and six other well-known metaheuristic algorithms when optimizing the adaptive fuzzy logic controller of the 3-DOF helicopter. The proposed method's effectiveness is shown through computer simulations while the system is subject to uncertainties and disturbance. We demonstrate the method's superiority by comparing the results when the MPSO and the standard PSO optimize the controller.
summary: This paper investigates the controller optimization for a helicopter system with three degrees of freedom (3-DOF). To control the system, we combined fuzzy logic with adaptive control theory. The system is extensively nonlinear and highly sensitive to the controller's parameters, making it a real challenge to study these parameters' effect on the controller's performance. Using metaheuristic algorithms for determining these parameters is a promising solution. This paper proposes using a modified particle swarm optimization (MPSO) algorithm to optimize the controller. The algorithm shows a high ability to perform the global search and find a reasonable search space. The algorithm modifies the search space of each particle based on its fitness function value and substitutes weak particles for new ones. These modifications have led to better accuracy and convergence rate. We prove the efficiency of the MPSO algorithm by comparing it with the standard PSO and six other well-known metaheuristic algorithms when optimizing the adaptive fuzzy logic controller of the 3-DOF helicopter. The proposed method's effectiveness is shown through computer simulations while the system is subject to uncertainties and disturbance. We demonstrate the method's superiority by comparing the results when the MPSO and the standard PSO optimize the controller.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了三自由度 (3-DOF) 直升机系统的控制器优化。为了控制系统，我们将模糊逻辑与自适应控制理论相结合。该系统具有广泛的非线性，并且对控制器的参数高度敏感，这使得研究这些参数对控制器性能的影响成为一个真正的挑战。使用元启发式算法来确定这些参数是一个有前途的解决方案。本文提出使用改进的粒子群优化（MPSO）算法来优化控制器。该算法表现出较高的执行全局搜索和找到合理搜索空间的能力。该算法根据每个粒子的适应度函数值修改其搜索空间，并用新粒子替换弱粒子。这些修改带来了更好的准确性和收敛速度。在优化三自由度直升机的自适应模糊逻辑控制器时，我们通过将 MPSO 算法与标准 PSO 和其他六种著名的元启发式算法进行比较，证明了 MPSO 算法的效率。在系统受到不确定性和干扰的情况下，通过计算机模拟显示了所提出方法的有效性。我们通过比较 MPSO 和标准 PSO 优化控制器时的结果来证明该方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的粒子群优化算法（MPSO），用于优化三自由度直升机的自适应模糊逻辑控制器参数，以提升控制性能。
AI.motivation: 三自由度直升机系统高度非线性且对控制器参数敏感，传统方法难以有效优化参数，需探索更高效的元启发式算法以提高精度和收敛速度。
AI.method: 设计改进的粒子群优化算法，根据适应度值动态调整粒子搜索空间，并用新粒子替换弱粒子，通过仿真对比验证其有效性。
AI.result: MPSO在不确定性和干扰条件下优于标准PSO及其他六种元启发式算法，显著提升控制器精度和收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 改进的PSO算法有效优化了自适应模糊控制器参数，验证了其在复杂系统控制中的优越性。

authors_text: Venkat Margapuri,Trevor Rife,Chaney Courtney,Brandon Schlautman,Kai Zhao,Mitchell Neilsen
title: Fractional Vegetation Cover Estimation using Hough Lines and Linear Iterative Clustering
title_zh: 使用霍夫线和线性迭代聚类进行部分植被覆盖估计
abstract: A common requirement of plant breeding programs across the country is companion planting -- growing different species of plants in close proximity so they can mutually benefit each other. However, the determination of companion plants requires meticulous monitoring of plant growth. The technique of ocular monitoring is often laborious and error prone. The availability of image processing techniques can be used to address the challenge of plant growth monitoring and provide robust solutions that assist plant scientists to identify companion plants. This paper presents a new image processing algorithm to determine the amount of vegetation cover present in a given area, called fractional vegetation cover. The proposed technique draws inspiration from the trusted Daubenmire method for vegetation cover estimation and expands upon it. Briefly, the idea is to estimate vegetation cover from images containing multiple rows of plant species growing in close proximity separated by a multi-segment PVC frame of known size. The proposed algorithm applies a Hough Transform and Simple Linear Iterative Clustering (SLIC) to estimate the amount of vegetation cover within each segment of the PVC frame. The analysis when repeated over images captured at regular intervals of time provides crucial insights into plant growth. As a means of comparison, the proposed algorithm is compared with SamplePoint and Canopeo, two trusted applications used for vegetation cover estimation. The comparison shows a 99% similarity with both SamplePoint and Canopeo demonstrating the accuracy and feasibility of the algorithm for fractional vegetation cover estimation.

As a means of comparison, the proposed algorithm is compared with SamplePoint and Canopeo, two trusted applications used for vegetation cover estimation. The comparison shows a 99% similarity with both SamplePoint and Canopeo demonstrating the accuracy and feasibility of the algorithm for fractional vegetation cover estimation.
abstract_zh: 全国植物育种计划的一个共同要求是同伴种植，即在附近种植不同种类的植物，以便它们能够互惠互利。然而，确定伴生植物需要对植物生长进行细致的监测。目视监测技术通常很费力且容易出错。图像处理技术的可用性可用于解决植物生长监测的挑战，并提供强大的解决方案，帮助植物科学家识别伴生植物。本文提出了一种新的图像处理算法来确定给定区域中存在的植被覆盖量，称为植被覆盖率。所提出的技术从可信的植被覆盖估计 Daubenmire 方法中汲取灵感，并对其进行了扩展。简而言之，这个想法是从包含多行植物物种的图像中估计植被覆盖度，这些植物物种紧密地生长，并由已知尺寸的多段 PVC 框架分隔开。所提出的算法应用霍夫变换和简单线性迭代聚类 (SLIC) 来估计 PVC 帧每个段内的植被覆盖量。对定期捕获的图像进行重复分析可以提供对植物生长的重要见解。作为一种比较手段，我们将所提出的算法与 SamplePoint 和 Canopeo 这两个用于植被覆盖估计的可信应用程序进行了比较。比较显示与 SamplePoint 和 Canopeo 的相似度为 99%，证明了植被覆盖率估计算法的准确性和可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于霍夫变换和线性迭代聚类（SLIC）的图像处理算法，用于估算特定区域内植被覆盖度（Fractional Vegetation Cover）。
AI.motivation: 伴生种植需要精确监测植物生长状态，传统人工观察方法耗时且易出错，亟需自动化图像处理技术提供可靠解决方案。
AI.method: 结合改进的Daubenmire方法，利用霍夫变换提取PVC框架分割线，通过SLIC算法对图像进行超像素聚类，计算各分割段内的植被覆盖度。
AI.result: 该算法与SamplePoint和Canopeo两种主流工具对比，植被覆盖度估算结果相似度达99%，验证了算法的准确性与可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的图像处理算法能高效、精准估算植被覆盖度，为伴生植物生长监测提供自动化技术支持。

search_text: Fractional Vegetation Cover Estimation using Hough Lines and Linear Iterative Clustering 使用霍夫线和线性迭代聚类进行部分植被覆盖估计 A common requirement of plant breeding programs across the country is companion planting -- growing different species of plants in close proximity so they can mutually benefit each other. However, the determination of companion plants requires meticulous monitoring of plant growth. The technique of ocular monitoring is often laborious and error prone. The availability of image processing techniques can be used to address the challenge of plant growth monitoring and provide robust solutions that assist plant scientists to identify companion plants. This paper presents a new image processing algorithm to determine the amount of vegetation cover present in a given area, called fractional vegetation cover. The proposed technique draws inspiration from the trusted Daubenmire method for vegetation cover estimation and expands upon it. Briefly, the idea is to estimate vegetation cover from images containing multiple rows of plant species growing in close proximity separated by a multi-segment PVC frame of known size. The proposed algorithm applies a Hough Transform and Simple Linear Iterative Clustering (SLIC) to estimate the amount of vegetation cover within each segment of the PVC frame. The analysis when repeated over images captured at regular intervals of time provides crucial insights into plant growth. As a means of comparison, the proposed algorithm is compared with SamplePoint and Canopeo, two trusted applications used for vegetation cover estimation. The comparison shows a 99% similarity with both SamplePoint and Canopeo demonstrating the accuracy and feasibility of the algorithm for fractional vegetation cover estimation. 全国植物育种计划的一个共同要求是同伴种植，即在附近种植不同种类的植物，以便它们能够互惠互利。然而，确定伴生植物需要对植物生长进行细致的监测。目视监测技术通常很费力且容易出错。图像处理技术的可用性可用于解决植物生长监测的挑战，并提供强大的解决方案，帮助植物科学家识别伴生植物。本文提出了一种新的图像处理算法来确定给定区域中存在的植被覆盖量，称为植被覆盖率。所提出的技术从可信的植被覆盖估计 Daubenmire 方法中汲取灵感，并对其进行了扩展。简而言之，这个想法是从包含多行植物物种的图像中估计植被覆盖度，这些植物物种紧密地生长，并由已知尺寸的多段 PVC 框架分隔开。所提出的算法应用霍夫变换和简单线性迭代聚类 (SLIC) 来估计 PVC 帧每个段内的植被覆盖量。对定期捕获的图像进行重复分析可以提供对植物生长的重要见解。作为一种比较手段，我们将所提出的算法与 SamplePoint 和 Canopeo 这两个用于植被覆盖估计的可信应用程序进行了比较。比较显示与 SamplePoint 和 Canopeo 的相似度为 99%，证明了植被覆盖率估计算法的准确性和可行性。 本文提出一种基于霍夫变换和线性迭代聚类（SLIC）的图像处理算法，用于估算特定区域内植被覆盖度（Fractional Vegetation Cover）。 Venkat Margapuri,Trevor Rife,Chaney Courtney,Brandon Schlautman,Kai Zhao,Mitchell Neilsen cs.CV

authors_text: Burhan A. Mudassar,Sho Ko,Maojingjing Li,Priyabrata Saha,Saibal Mukhopadhyay
title: RADNet: A Deep Neural Network Model for Robust Perception in Moving Autonomous Systems
title_zh: RADNet：用于移动自主系统中鲁棒感知的深度神经网络模型
abstract: Interactive autonomous applications require robustness of the perception engine to artifacts in unconstrained videos. In this paper, we examine the effect of camera motion on the task of action detection. We develop a novel ranking method to rank videos based on the degree of global camera motion. For the high ranking camera videos we show that the accuracy of action detection is decreased. We propose an action detection pipeline that is robust to the camera motion effect and verify it empirically. Specifically, we do actor feature alignment across frames and couple global scene features with local actor-specific features. We do feature alignment using a novel formulation of the Spatio-temporal Sampling Network (STSN) but with multi-scale offset prediction and refinement using a pyramid structure. We also propose a novel input dependent weighted averaging strategy for fusing local and global features. We show the applicability of our network on our dataset of moving camera videos with high camera motion (MOVE dataset) with a 4.1% increase in frame mAP and 17% increase in video mAP.
summary: Interactive autonomous applications require robustness of the perception engine to artifacts in unconstrained videos. In this paper, we examine the effect of camera motion on the task of action detection. We develop a novel ranking method to rank videos based on the degree of global camera motion. For the high ranking camera videos we show that the accuracy of action detection is decreased. We propose an action detection pipeline that is robust to the camera motion effect and verify it empirically. Specifically, we do actor feature alignment across frames and couple global scene features with local actor-specific features. We do feature alignment using a novel formulation of the Spatio-temporal Sampling Network (STSN) but with multi-scale offset prediction and refinement using a pyramid structure. We also propose a novel input dependent weighted averaging strategy for fusing local and global features. We show the applicability of our network on our dataset of moving camera videos with high camera motion (MOVE dataset) with a 4.1% increase in frame mAP and 17% increase in video mAP.
abstract_zh: 交互式自主应用程序需要感知引擎对不受约束的视频中的伪影具有鲁棒性。在本文中，我们研究了相机运动对动作检测任务的影响。我们开发了一种新颖的排名方法，根据全局摄像机运动的程度对视频进行排名。对于高排名的摄像头视频，我们发现动作检测的准确性有所下降。我们提出了一种对相机运动效果具有鲁棒性的动作检测管道，并进行了实证验证。具体来说，我们跨帧进行演员特征对齐，并将全局场景特征与局部演员特定特征结合起来。我们使用时空采样网络（STSN）的新颖公式进行特征对齐，但使用金字塔结构进行多尺度偏移预测和细化。我们还提出了一种新颖的依赖于输入的加权平均策略来融合局部和全局特征。我们展示了我们的网络在具有高摄像机运动的移动摄像机视频数据集（MOVE 数据集）上的适用性，帧 mAP 增加了 4.1%，视频 mAP 增加了 17%。

AI.tldr: 开发鲁棒的动作检测模型以应对移动相机带来的挑战
AI.motivation: 现有模型在剧烈相机运动下动作检测准确性下降，需提升鲁棒性
AI.method: 提出基于STSN的多尺度特征对齐与加权融合方法，结合全局与局部特征
AI.result: 在MOVE数据集上frame mAP提升4.1%，video mAP提升17%
AI.conclusion: RADNet有效提升移动相机场景下动作检测的鲁棒性与准确性

title: Visual Spatial Reasoning
title_zh: 视觉空间推理
comment: TACL camera-ready version; code and data available at https://github.com/cambridgeltl/visual-spatial-reasoning
comments: TACL camera-ready version; code and data available at https://github.com/cambridgeltl/visual-spatial-reasoning
abstract: Spatial relations are a basic part of human cognition. However, they are expressed in natural language in a variety of ways, and previous work has suggested that current vision-and-language models (VLMs) struggle to capture relational information. In this paper, we present Visual Spatial Reasoning (VSR), a dataset containing more than 10k natural text-image pairs with 66 types of spatial relations in English (such as: under, in front of, and facing). While using a seemingly simple annotation format, we show how the dataset includes challenging linguistic phenomena, such as varying reference frames. We demonstrate a large gap between human and model performance: the human ceiling is above 95%, while state-of-the-art models only achieve around 70%. We observe that VLMs' by-relation performances have little correlation with the number of training examples and the tested models are in general incapable of recognising relations concerning the orientations of objects.
summary: Spatial relations are a basic part of human cognition. However, they are expressed in natural language in a variety of ways, and previous work has suggested that current vision-and-language models (VLMs) struggle to capture relational information. In this paper, we present Visual Spatial Reasoning (VSR), a dataset containing more than 10k natural text-image pairs with 66 types of spatial relations in English (such as: under, in front of, and facing). While using a seemingly simple annotation format, we show how the dataset includes challenging linguistic phenomena, such as varying reference frames. We demonstrate a large gap between human and model performance: the human ceiling is above 95%, while state-of-the-art models only achieve around 70%. We observe that VLMs' by-relation performances have little correlation with the number of training examples and the tested models are in general incapable of recognising relations concerning the orientations of objects.
abstract_zh: 空间关系是人类认知的基本组成部分。然而，它们以多种方式用自然语言表达，并且之前的工作表明当前的视觉和语言模型（VLM）难以捕获关系信息。在本文中，我们提出了视觉空间推理（VSR），这是一个包含超过 10k 个自然文本图像对的数据集，具有 66 种英语空间关系（例如：下面、前面和面向）。在使用看似简单的注释格式时，我们展示了数据集如何包含具有挑战性的语言现象，例如变化的参考系。我们证明了人类和模型性能之间存在巨大差距：人类的上限高于 95%，而最先进的模型只能达到 70% 左右。我们观察到 VLM 的关系性能与训练样本的数量几乎没有相关性，并且测试的模型通常无法识别有关对象方向的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为VSR的数据集，用于评估视觉语言模型在空间关系理解方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在处理自然语言中复杂多样的空间关系时表现不佳，缺乏专门针对空间推理能力的评测基准。
AI.method: 构建包含10k+英文文本-图像对的数据集，涵盖66种空间关系类型，采用简单标注格式但包含多参考系等挑战性语言现象。
AI.result: 人类在数据集上的表现上限超过95%，而最佳模型仅达70%；模型性能与训练样本数量关联弱，且难以识别涉及物体方向的空间关系。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型在空间推理能力上存在显著差距，需进一步研究以提升其对空间语义的理解能力。

conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型在空间推理能力上存在显著差距，需进一步研究以提升其对空间语义的理解能力。
search_text: Visual Spatial Reasoning 视觉空间推理 Spatial relations are a basic part of human cognition. However, they are expressed in natural language in a variety of ways, and previous work has suggested that current vision-and-language models (VLMs) struggle to capture relational information. In this paper, we present Visual Spatial Reasoning (VSR), a dataset containing more than 10k natural text-image pairs with 66 types of spatial relations in English (such as: under, in front of, and facing). While using a seemingly simple annotation format, we show how the dataset includes challenging linguistic phenomena, such as varying reference frames. We demonstrate a large gap between human and model performance: the human ceiling is above 95%, while state-of-the-art models only achieve around 70%. We observe that VLMs' by-relation performances have little correlation with the number of training examples and the tested models are in general incapable of recognising relations concerning the orientations of objects. 空间关系是人类认知的基本组成部分。然而，它们以多种方式用自然语言表达，并且之前的工作表明当前的视觉和语言模型（VLM）难以捕获关系信息。在本文中，我们提出了视觉空间推理（VSR），这是一个包含超过 10k 个自然文本图像对的数据集，具有 66 种英语空间关系（例如：下面、前面和面向）。在使用看似简单的注释格式时，我们展示了数据集如何包含具有挑战性的语言现象，例如变化的参考系。我们证明了人类和模型性能之间存在巨大差距：人类的上限高于 95%，而最先进的模型只能达到 70% 左右。我们观察到 VLM 的关系性能与训练样本的数量几乎没有相关性，并且测试的模型通常无法识别有关对象方向的关系。 本文提出一个名为VSR的数据集，用于评估视觉语言模型在空间关系理解方面的能力。 Fangyu Liu,Guy Emerson,Nigel Collier cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Aline R. Ioste,Alan M. Durham,Marcelo Finger
title: Combined Learning of Neural Network Weights for Privacy in Collaborative Tasks
title_zh: 协作任务中隐私神经网络权重的组合学习
abstract: We introduce CoLN, Combined Learning of Neural network weights, a novel method to securely combine Machine Learning models over sensitive data with no sharing of data. With CoLN, local hosts use the same Neural Network architecture and base parameters to train a model using only locally available data. Locally trained models are then submitted to a combining agent, which produces a combined model. The new model's parameters can be sent back to hosts, and can then be used as initial parameters for a new training iteration. CoLN is capable of combining several distributed neural networks of the same kind but is not restricted to any single neural architecture. In this paper we detail the combination algorithm and present experiments with feed-forward, convolutional, and recurrent Neural Network architectures, showing that the CoLN combined model approximates the performance of a hypothetical ideal centralized model, trained using the combination of the local datasets. CoLN can contribute to secure collaborative research, as required in the medical area, where privacy issues preclude data sharing, but where the limitations of local data demand information derived from larger datasets.
summary: We introduce CoLN, Combined Learning of Neural network weights, a novel method to securely combine Machine Learning models over sensitive data with no sharing of data. With CoLN, local hosts use the same Neural Network architecture and base parameters to train a model using only locally available data. Locally trained models are then submitted to a combining agent, which produces a combined model. The new model's parameters can be sent back to hosts, and can then be used as initial parameters for a new training iteration. CoLN is capable of combining several distributed neural networks of the same kind but is not restricted to any single neural architecture. In this paper we detail the combination algorithm and present experiments with feed-forward, convolutional, and recurrent Neural Network architectures, showing that the CoLN combined model approximates the performance of a hypothetical ideal centralized model, trained using the combination of the local datasets. CoLN can contribute to secure collaborative research, as required in the medical area, where privacy issues preclude data sharing, but where the limitations of local data demand information derived from larger datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 CoLN（神经网络权重组合学习），这是一种在敏感数据上安全地组合机器学习模型且不共享数据的新颖方法。通过 CoLN，本地主机使用相同的神经网络架构和基本参数来仅使用本地可用数据来训练模型。然后将本地训练的模型提交给组合代理，该代理生成组合模型。新模型的参数可以发送回主机，然后可以用作新训练迭代的初始参数。 CoLN 能够组合多个同类的分布式神经网络，但不限于任何单一的神经架构。在本文中，我们详细介绍了组合算法，并介绍了前馈、卷积和循环神经网络架构的实验，表明 CoLN 组合模型近似于假设的理想集中式模型的性能，并使用本地数据集的组合进行训练。 CoLN 可以根据医疗领域的要求，为安全的协作研究做出贡献，在该领域，隐私问题阻碍了数据共享，但本地数据的局限性需要从更大的数据集中获取信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoLN方法，在保障隐私的前提下实现协作任务中的神经网络模型联合学习，无需共享原始数据。
AI.motivation: 医疗等隐私敏感领域因数据共享限制难以获得足够数据，需在保护隐私的同时整合多方数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过本地独立训练模型后提交参数至组合代理，生成全局模型并反馈参数作为新训练起点，支持多种神经网络架构的参数组合。
AI.result: 实验表明CoLN组合模型性能接近理想集中训练模型，验证了方法在隐私保护下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CoLN为隐私敏感领域的协作研究提供可行方案，可在不共享数据的情况下实现跨机构模型训练与优化。

title: Towards Process-Oriented, Modular, and Versatile Question Generation that Meets Educational Needs
title_zh: 面向过程、模块化和多功能的问题生成，满足教育需求
abstract: NLP-powered automatic question generation (QG) techniques carry great pedagogical potential of saving educators' time and benefiting student learning. Yet, QG systems have not been widely adopted in classrooms to date. In this work, we aim to pinpoint key impediments and investigate how to improve the usability of automatic QG techniques for educational purposes by understanding how instructors construct questions and identifying touch points to enhance the underlying NLP models. We perform an in-depth need finding study with 11 instructors across 7 different universities, and summarize their thought processes and needs when creating questions. While instructors show great interests in using NLP systems to support question design, none of them has used such tools in practice. They resort to multiple sources of information, ranging from domain knowledge to students' misconceptions, all of which missing from today's QG systems. We argue that building effective human-NLP collaborative QG systems that emphasize instructor control and explainability is imperative for real-world adoption. We call for QG systems to provide process-oriented support, use modular design, and handle diverse sources of input.
summary: NLP-powered automatic question generation (QG) techniques carry great pedagogical potential of saving educators' time and benefiting student learning. Yet, QG systems have not been widely adopted in classrooms to date. In this work, we aim to pinpoint key impediments and investigate how to improve the usability of automatic QG techniques for educational purposes by understanding how instructors construct questions and identifying touch points to enhance the underlying NLP models. We perform an in-depth need finding study with 11 instructors across 7 different universities, and summarize their thought processes and needs when creating questions. While instructors show great interests in using NLP systems to support question design, none of them has used such tools in practice. They resort to multiple sources of information, ranging from domain knowledge to students' misconceptions, all of which missing from today's QG systems. We argue that building effective human-NLP collaborative QG systems that emphasize instructor control and explainability is imperative for real-world adoption. We call for QG systems to provide process-oriented support, use modular design, and handle diverse sources of input.
abstract_zh: NLP 支持的自动问题生成 (QG) 技术具有巨大的教学潜力，可以节省教育工作者的时间并有利于学生的学习。然而，迄今为止，QG 系统尚未在课堂上广泛采用。在这项工作中，我们的目标是查明关键障碍，并研究如何通过了解教师如何构建问题和识别接触点来增强基础 NLP 模型，从而提高自动 QG 技术在教育方面的可用性。我们与 7 所不同大学的 11 名讲师进行了深入的需求发现研究，并总结了他们在提出问题时的思维过程和需求。虽然教师对使用 NLP 系统支持问题设计表现出极大的兴趣，但他们都没有在实践中使用过此类工具。他们求助于多种信息来源，从领域知识到学生的误解，所有这些都是当今的 QG 系统所缺失的。我们认为，构建有效的人类 NLP 协作 QG 系统，强调教师控制和可解释性，对于现实世界的采用至关重要。我们呼吁QG系统提供面向流程的支持，采用模块化设计，并处理多样化的输入源。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发面向教育需求的流程导向、模块化且多功能的自动问题生成系统。
AI.motivation: 尽管自然语言处理（NLP）驱动的自动问题生成（QG）技术具有节省教师时间、促进学生学习的潜力，但尚未被广泛应用于课堂。现有系统未能满足教师的实际需求。
AI.method: 通过与11位来自7所大学的教师进行深入需求调研，分析其问题设计思路与需求，识别当前QG系统与教学实践之间的差距。
AI.result: 教师对NLP工具兴趣浓厚但未实际使用，其问题设计依赖领域知识、学生误解等多源信息，而现有QG系统缺乏对这些信息的支持。
AI.conclusion: 需构建强调教师控制与可解释性的协作式QG系统，系统应提供流程化支持、模块化设计，并兼容多样化输入来源以实现实际应用。
