title: LayoutBERT: Masked Language Layout Model for Object Insertion
title_zh: LayoutBERT：用于对象插入的屏蔽语言布局模型
comment: 8 pages main paper, 6 pages supplemental material. Accepted to AI4CC Workshop @CVPR 2022
comments: 8 pages main paper, 6 pages supplemental material. Accepted to AI4CC Workshop @CVPR 2022
abstract: Image compositing is one of the most fundamental steps in creative workflows. It involves taking objects/parts of several images to create a new image, called a composite. Currently, this process is done manually by creating accurate masks of objects to be inserted and carefully blending them with the target scene or images, usually with the help of tools such as Photoshop or GIMP. While there have been several works on automatic selection of objects for creating masks, the problem of object placement within an image with the correct position, scale, and harmony remains a difficult problem with limited exploration. Automatic object insertion in images or designs is a difficult problem as it requires understanding of the scene geometry and the color harmony between objects. We propose LayoutBERT for the object insertion task. It uses a novel self-supervised masked language model objective and bidirectional multi-head self-attention. It outperforms previous layout-based likelihood models and shows favorable properties in terms of model capacity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for object insertion in the image compositing setting and other settings like documents and design templates. We further demonstrate the usefulness of the learned representations for layout-based retrieval tasks. We provide both qualitative and quantitative evaluations on datasets from diverse domains like COCO, PublayNet, and two new datasets which we call Image Layouts and Template Layouts. Image Layouts which consists of 5.8 million images with layout annotations is the largest image layout dataset to our knowledge. We also share ablation study results on the effect of dataset size, model size and class sample size for this task.
summary: Image compositing is one of the most fundamental steps in creative workflows. It involves taking objects/parts of several images to create a new image, called a composite. Currently, this process is done manually by creating accurate masks of objects to be inserted and carefully blending them with the target scene or images, usually with the help of tools such as Photoshop or GIMP. While there have been several works on automatic selection of objects for creating masks, the problem of object placement within an image with the correct position, scale, and harmony remains a difficult problem with limited exploration. Automatic object insertion in images or designs is a difficult problem as it requires understanding of the scene geometry and the color harmony between objects. We propose LayoutBERT for the object insertion task. It uses a novel self-supervised masked language model objective and bidirectional multi-head self-attention. It outperforms previous layout-based likelihood models and shows favorable properties in terms of model capacity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for object insertion in the image compositing setting and other settings like documents and design templates. We further demonstrate the usefulness of the learned representations for layout-based retrieval tasks. We provide both qualitative and quantitative evaluations on datasets from diverse domains like COCO, PublayNet, and two new datasets which we call Image Layouts and Template Layouts. Image Layouts which consists of 5.8 million images with layout annotations is the largest image layout dataset to our knowledge. We also share ablation study results on the effect of dataset size, model size and class sample size for this task.
abstract_zh: 图像合成是创意工作流程中最基本的步骤之一。它涉及使用多个图像的对象/部分来创建新图像，称为合成图像。目前，此过程是手动完成的，通常借助 Photoshop 或 GIMP 等工具，创建要插入的对象的精确蒙版，并将其与目标场景或图像仔细混合。虽然已经有一些关于自动选择对象来创建蒙版的工作，但在图像中以正确的位置、比例和和谐放置对象的问题仍然是一个探索有限的难题。在图像或设计中自动插入对象是一个难题，因为它需要了解场景几何形状和对象之间的颜色和谐。我们提出 LayoutBERT 用于对象插入任务。它使用新颖的自监督掩码语言模型客观和双向多头自注意力。它优于以前基于布局的似然模型，并在模型容量方面显示出良好的特性。我们展示了我们的对象插入方法在图像合成设置和其他设置（如文档和设计模板）中的有效性。我们进一步证明了学习到的表示对于基于布局的检索任务的有用性。我们对来自不同领域的数据集（如 COCO、PublayNet）以及两个新数据集（我们称之为图像布局和模板布局）提供定性和定量评估。 Image Layouts 由 580 万张带有布局注释的图像组成，是据我们所知最大的图像布局数据集。我们还分享了关于数据集大小、模型大小和类样本大小对该任务的影响的消融研究结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LayoutBERT模型，通过自监督的掩码语言模型和双向多头自注意力机制，解决图像合成中对象插入的布局问题。
AI.motivation: 当前图像合成依赖手动操作，对象放置的准确性和和谐性难以自动化实现，需探索基于场景几何和色彩协调的自动插入方法。
AI.method: 设计LayoutBERT模型，结合掩码语言模型目标与双向多头自注意力机制，利用布局信息进行对象插入，并在多个数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 在COCO、PublayNet等数据集及新构建的Image Layouts和Template Layouts数据集上，模型在定性和定量评估中优于现有方法，且展示出良好的模型容量和适应性。
AI.conclusion: LayoutBERT有效解决了图像合成中的对象插入问题，其布局表示对检索任务也有帮助，同时新数据集为未来研究提供了支持。

search_text: LayoutBERT: Masked Language Layout Model for Object Insertion LayoutBERT：用于对象插入的屏蔽语言布局模型 Image compositing is one of the most fundamental steps in creative workflows. It involves taking objects/parts of several images to create a new image, called a composite. Currently, this process is done manually by creating accurate masks of objects to be inserted and carefully blending them with the target scene or images, usually with the help of tools such as Photoshop or GIMP. While there have been several works on automatic selection of objects for creating masks, the problem of object placement within an image with the correct position, scale, and harmony remains a difficult problem with limited exploration. Automatic object insertion in images or designs is a difficult problem as it requires understanding of the scene geometry and the color harmony between objects. We propose LayoutBERT for the object insertion task. It uses a novel self-supervised masked language model objective and bidirectional multi-head self-attention. It outperforms previous layout-based likelihood models and shows favorable properties in terms of model capacity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for object insertion in the image compositing setting and other settings like documents and design templates. We further demonstrate the usefulness of the learned representations for layout-based retrieval tasks. We provide both qualitative and quantitative evaluations on datasets from diverse domains like COCO, PublayNet, and two new datasets which we call Image Layouts and Template Layouts. Image Layouts which consists of 5.8 million images with layout annotations is the largest image layout dataset to our knowledge. We also share ablation study results on the effect of dataset size, model size and class sample size for this task. 图像合成是创意工作流程中最基本的步骤之一。它涉及使用多个图像的对象/部分来创建新图像，称为合成图像。目前，此过程是手动完成的，通常借助 Photoshop 或 GIMP 等工具，创建要插入的对象的精确蒙版，并将其与目标场景或图像仔细混合。虽然已经有一些关于自动选择对象来创建蒙版的工作，但在图像中以正确的位置、比例和和谐放置对象的问题仍然是一个探索有限的难题。在图像或设计中自动插入对象是一个难题，因为它需要了解场景几何形状和对象之间的颜色和谐。我们提出 LayoutBERT 用于对象插入任务。它使用新颖的自监督掩码语言模型客观和双向多头自注意力。它优于以前基于布局的似然模型，并在模型容量方面显示出良好的特性。我们展示了我们的对象插入方法在图像合成设置和其他设置（如文档和设计模板）中的有效性。我们进一步证明了学习到的表示对于基于布局的检索任务的有用性。我们对来自不同领域的数据集（如 COCO、PublayNet）以及两个新数据集（我们称之为图像布局和模板布局）提供定性和定量评估。 Image Layouts 由 580 万张带有布局注释的图像组成，是据我们所知最大的图像布局数据集。我们还分享了关于数据集大小、模型大小和类样本大小对该任务的影响的消融研究结果。 本文提出LayoutBERT模型，通过自监督的掩码语言模型和双向多头自注意力机制，解决图像合成中对象插入的布局问题。 Kerem Turgutlu,Sanat Sharma,Jayant Kumar cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Kushal Chawla,Gale M. Lucas,Jonathan May,Jonathan Gratch
title: Opponent Modeling in Negotiation Dialogues by Related Data Adaptation
title_zh: 通过相关数据适应进行谈判对话中的对手建模
abstract: Opponent modeling is the task of inferring another party's mental state within the context of social interactions. In a multi-issue negotiation, it involves inferring the relative importance that the opponent assigns to each issue under discussion, which is crucial for finding high-value deals. A practical model for this task needs to infer these priorities of the opponent on the fly based on partial dialogues as input, without needing additional annotations for training. In this work, we propose a ranker for identifying these priorities from negotiation dialogues. The model takes in a partial dialogue as input and predicts the priority order of the opponent. We further devise ways to adapt related data sources for this task to provide more explicit supervision for incorporating the opponent's preferences and offers, as a proxy to relying on granular utterance-level annotations. We show the utility of our proposed approach through extensive experiments based on two dialogue datasets. We find that the proposed data adaptations lead to strong performance in zero-shot and few-shot scenarios. Moreover, they allow the model to perform better than baselines while accessing fewer utterances from the opponent. We release our code to support future work in this direction.
summary: Opponent modeling is the task of inferring another party's mental state within the context of social interactions. In a multi-issue negotiation, it involves inferring the relative importance that the opponent assigns to each issue under discussion, which is crucial for finding high-value deals. A practical model for this task needs to infer these priorities of the opponent on the fly based on partial dialogues as input, without needing additional annotations for training. In this work, we propose a ranker for identifying these priorities from negotiation dialogues. The model takes in a partial dialogue as input and predicts the priority order of the opponent. We further devise ways to adapt related data sources for this task to provide more explicit supervision for incorporating the opponent's preferences and offers, as a proxy to relying on granular utterance-level annotations. We show the utility of our proposed approach through extensive experiments based on two dialogue datasets. We find that the proposed data adaptations lead to strong performance in zero-shot and few-shot scenarios. Moreover, they allow the model to perform better than baselines while accessing fewer utterances from the opponent. We release our code to support future work in this direction.
abstract_zh: 对手建模是在社交互动的背景下推断另一方心理状态的任务。在多问题谈判中，它涉及推断对手对所讨论的每个问题的相对重要性，这对于寻找高价值交易至关重要。这项任务的实用模型需要根据部分对话作为输入来动态推断对手的优先级，而不需要额外的注释进行训练。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个排序器，用于从谈判对话中识别这些优先事项。该模型将部分对话作为输入并预测对手的优先顺序。我们进一步设计了一些方法来适应此任务的相关数据源，以便为合并对手的偏好和报价提供更明确的监督，作为依赖细粒度话语级注释的代理。我们通过基于两个对话数据集的广泛实验展示了我们提出的方法的实用性。我们发现所提出的数据调整在零样本和少样本场景中带来了强大的性能。此外，它们使模型的性能优于基线，同时访问对手的话语更少。我们发布代码以支持未来在这个方向上的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外标注即可从谈判对话中实时推断对手优先级的模型，通过相关数据适配提供显式监督。
AI.motivation: 传统对手建模依赖详尽的标注数据，但实际谈判场景中往往缺乏此类标注，需开发能利用部分对话和相关数据的高效方法。
AI.method: 设计一个排名器从部分对话中预测对手优先级，并通过适配相关数据源（如偏好和报价）提供显式监督，减少对细粒度对话标注的依赖。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在零样本和少样本场景下表现优异，且在使用更少对手发言时优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 相关数据适配有效提升了模型性能，为无标注或少标注场景下的谈判对手建模提供了实用解决方案。

Lucas,Jonathan May,Jonathan Gratch cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Vishwas Bhargava,Sumanta Ghosh,Zeyu Guo,Mrinal Kumar,Chris Umans
title: Fast Multivariate Multipoint Evaluation Over All Finite Fields
title_zh: 所有有限域的快速多元多点评估
abstract: Multivariate multipoint evaluation is the problem of evaluating a multivariate polynomial, given as a coefficient vector, simultaneously at multiple evaluation points. In this work, we show that there exists a deterministic algorithm for multivariate multipoint evaluation over any finite field $\mathbb{F}$ that outputs the evaluations of an $m$-variate polynomial of degree less than $d$ in each variable at $N$ points in time \[ (d^m+N)^{1+o(1)}\cdot\poly(m,d,\log|\mathbb{F}|) \] for all $m\in\N$ and all sufficiently large $d\in\mathbb{N}$. A previous work of Kedlaya and Umans (FOCS 2008, SICOMP 2011) achieved the same time complexity when the number of variables $m$ is at most $d^{o(1)}$ and had left the problem of removing this condition as an open problem. A recent work of Bhargava, Ghosh, Kumar and Mohapatra (STOC 2022) answered this question when the underlying field is not \emph{too} large and has characteristic less than $d^{o(1)}$. In this work, we remove this constraint on the number of variables over all finite fields, thereby answering the question of Kedlaya and Umans over all finite fields. Our algorithm relies on a non-trivial combination of ideas from three seemingly different previously known algorithms for multivariate multipoint evaluation, namely the algorithms of Kedlaya and Umans, that of Björklund, Kaski and Williams (IPEC 2017, Algorithmica 2019), and that of Bhargava, Ghosh, Kumar and Mohapatra, together with a result of Bombieri and Vinogradov from analytic number theory about the distribution of primes in an arithmetic progression. We also present a second algorithm for multivariate multipoint evaluation that is completely elementary and in particular, avoids the use of the Bombieri--Vinogradov Theorem. However, it requires a mild assumption that the field size is bounded by an exponential-tower in $d$ of bounded \textit{height}.
summary: Multivariate multipoint evaluation is the problem of evaluating a multivariate polynomial, given as a coefficient vector, simultaneously at multiple evaluation points. In this work, we show that there exists a deterministic algorithm for multivariate multipoint evaluation over any finite field $\mathbb{F}$ that outputs the evaluations of an $m$-variate polynomial of degree less than $d$ in each variable at $N$ points in time \[ (d^m+N)^{1+o(1)}\cdot\poly(m,d,\log|\mathbb{F}|) \] for all $m\in\N$ and all sufficiently large $d\in\mathbb{N}$. A previous work of Kedlaya and Umans (FOCS 2008, SICOMP 2011) achieved the same time complexity when the number of variables $m$ is at most $d^{o(1)}$ and had left the problem of removing this condition as an open problem. A recent work of Bhargava, Ghosh, Kumar and Mohapatra (STOC 2022) answered this question when the underlying field is not \emph{too} large and has characteristic less than $d^{o(1)}$. In this work, we remove this constraint on the number of variables over all finite fields, thereby answering the question of Kedlaya and Umans over all finite fields. Our algorithm relies on a non-trivial combination of ideas from three seemingly different previously known algorithms for multivariate multipoint evaluation, namely the algorithms of Kedlaya and Umans, that of Björklund, Kaski and Williams (IPEC 2017, Algorithmica 2019), and that of Bhargava, Ghosh, Kumar and Mohapatra, together with a result of Bombieri and Vinogradov from analytic number theory about the distribution of primes in an arithmetic progression. We also present a second algorithm for multivariate multipoint evaluation that is completely elementary and in particular, avoids the use of the Bombieri--Vinogradov Theorem. However, it requires a mild assumption that the field size is bounded by an exponential-tower in $d$ of bounded \textit{height}.
abstract_zh: 多元多点评估是在多个评估点同时评估作为系数向量给出的多元多项式的问题。在这项工作中，我们证明存在一种在任何有限域 $\mathbb{F}$ 上进行多元多点评估的确定性算法，该算法输出每个变量在 $N$ 个时间点 \[ (d^m+N)^{1+o(1)}\cdot\poly(m,d,\log|\mathbb{F}|) \] 对所有变量的次数小于 $d$ 的 $m$ 变量多项式的评估$m\in\N$ 和所有足够大的 $d\in\mathbb{N}$。 Kedlaya 和 Umans 之前的工作（FOCS 2008，SICOMP 2011）在变量数量 $m$ 最多为 $d^{o(1)}$ 时实现了相同的时间复杂度，并将消除此条件的问题作为一个开放问题。 Bhargava、Ghosh、Kumar 和 Mohapatra 最近的一项工作（STOC 2022）在底层场不是 \emph{too} 大且特征小于 $d^{o(1)}$ 时回答了这个问题。在这项工作中，我们消除了所有有限域上变量数量的限制，从而回答了所有有限域上的 Kedlaya 和 Umans 问题。我们的算法依赖于三种看似不同的先前已知的多元多点评估算法的思想的重要组合，即 Kedlaya 和 Umans 的算法，Björklund、Kaski 和 Williams 的算法（IPEC 2017，Algorithmica 2019），以及 Bhargava、Ghosh、Kumar 和 Mohapatra 的算法，以及 Bombieri 和 Vinogradov 从解析数论得出的结果算术级数中素数的分布。我们还提出了第二种用于多元多点评估的算法，该算法是完全基本的，特别是避免使用 Bombieri - Vinogradov 定理。然而，它需要一个温和的假设，即字段大小受到有界 \textit{height} 的 $d$ 中的指数塔的限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在所有有限域上高效执行多变量多项式多点求值的确定性算法。
AI.motivation: 此前算法对变量数量或域大小存在限制，需去除这些约束以实现更普适的多点求值方法。
AI.method: 结合三种不同算法思想，并引入解析数论中的素数分布结果，同时提出一种无需该数论结果的初等方法。
AI.result: 在所有有限域上实现了时间复杂度为$(d^m+N)^{1+o(1)}\\cdot\\poly(m,d,\\log|\\mathbb{F}|)$的多变量多点求值算法。
AI.conclusion: 解决了Kedlaya与Umans提出的开放问题，消除了变量数量限制，适用于所有有限域。

search_text: Fast Multivariate Multipoint Evaluation Over All Finite Fields 所有有限域的快速多元多点评估 Multivariate multipoint evaluation is the problem of evaluating a multivariate polynomial, given as a coefficient vector, simultaneously at multiple evaluation points. In this work, we show that there exists a deterministic algorithm for multivariate multipoint evaluation over any finite field $\mathbb{F}$ that outputs the evaluations of an $m$-variate polynomial of degree less than $d$ in each variable at $N$ points in time \[ (d^m+N)^{1+o(1)}\cdot\poly(m,d,\log|\mathbb{F}|) \] for all $m\in\N$ and all sufficiently large $d\in\mathbb{N}$. A previous work of Kedlaya and Umans (FOCS 2008, SICOMP 2011) achieved the same time complexity when the number of variables $m$ is at most $d^{o(1)}$ and had left the problem of removing this condition as an open problem. A recent work of Bhargava, Ghosh, Kumar and Mohapatra (STOC 2022) answered this question when the underlying field is not \emph{too} large and has characteristic less than $d^{o(1)}$. In this work, we remove this constraint on the number of variables over all finite fields, thereby answering the question of Kedlaya and Umans over all finite fields. Our algorithm relies on a non-trivial combination of ideas from three seemingly different previously known algorithms for multivariate multipoint evaluation, namely the algorithms of Kedlaya and Umans, that of Björklund, Kaski and Williams (IPEC 2017, Algorithmica 2019), and that of Bhargava, Ghosh, Kumar and Mohapatra, together with a result of Bombieri and Vinogradov from analytic number theory about the distribution of primes in an arithmetic progression. We also present a second algorithm for multivariate multipoint evaluation that is completely elementary and in particular, avoids the use of the Bombieri--Vinogradov Theorem. However, it requires a mild assumption that the field size is bounded by an exponential-tower in $d$ of bounded \textit{height}. 多元多点评估是在多个评估点同时评估作为系数向量给出的多元多项式的问题。在这项工作中，我们证明存在一种在任何有限域 $\mathbb{F}$ 上进行多元多点评估的确定性算法，该算法输出每个变量在 $N$ 个时间点 \[ (d^m+N)^{1+o(1)}\cdot\poly(m,d,\log|\mathbb{F}|) \] 对所有变量的次数小于 $d$ 的 $m$ 变量多项式的评估$m\in\N$ 和所有足够大的 $d\in\mathbb{N}$。 Kedlaya 和 Umans 之前的工作（FOCS 2008，SICOMP 2011）在变量数量 $m$ 最多为 $d^{o(1)}$ 时实现了相同的时间复杂度，并将消除此条件的问题作为一个开放问题。 Bhargava、Ghosh、Kumar 和 Mohapatra 最近的一项工作（STOC 2022）在底层场不是 \emph{too} 大且特征小于 $d^{o(1)}$ 时回答了这个问题。在这项工作中，我们消除了所有有限域上变量数量的限制，从而回答了所有有限域上的 Kedlaya 和 Umans 问题。我们的算法依赖于三种看似不同的先前已知的多元多点评估算法的思想的重要组合，即 Kedlaya 和 Umans 的算法，Björklund、Kaski 和 Williams 的算法（IPEC 2017，Algorithmica 2019），以及 Bhargava、Ghosh、Kumar 和 Mohapatra 的算法，以及 Bombieri 和 Vinogradov 从解析数论得出的结果算术级数中素数的分布。我们还提出了第二种用于多元多点评估的算法，该算法是完全基本的，特别是避免使用 Bombieri - Vinogradov 定理。然而，它需要一个温和的假设，即字段大小受到有界 \textit{height} 的 $d$ 中的指数塔的限制。 本文提出了一种在所有有限域上高效执行多变量多项式多点求值的确定性算法。 Vishwas Bhargava,Sumanta Ghosh,Zeyu Guo,Mrinal Kumar,Chris Umans cs.DS

authors_text: Guruprasad Raghavan,Bahey Tharwat,Surya Narayanan Hari,Dhruvil Satani,Matt Thomson
title: Engineering flexible machine learning systems by traversing functionally-invariant paths
title_zh: 通过遍历功能不变的路径来设计灵活的机器学习系统
abstract: Transformers have emerged as the state of the art neural network architecture for natural language processing and computer vision. In the foundation model paradigm, large transformer models (BERT, GPT3/4, Bloom, ViT) are pre-trained on self-supervised tasks such as word or image masking, and then, adapted through fine-tuning for downstream user applications including instruction following and Question Answering. While many approaches have been developed for model fine-tuning including low-rank weight update strategies (eg. LoRA), underlying mathematical principles that enable network adaptation without knowledge loss remain poorly understood. Here, we introduce a differential geometry framework, functionally invariant paths (FIP), that provides flexible and continuous adaptation of neural networks for a range of machine learning goals and network sparsification objectives. We conceptualize the weight space of a neural network as a curved Riemannian manifold equipped with a metric tensor whose spectrum defines low rank subspaces in weight space that accommodate network adaptation without loss of prior knowledge. We formalize adaptation as movement along a geodesic path in weight space while searching for networks that accommodate secondary objectives. With modest computational resources, the FIP algorithm achieves comparable to state of the art performance on continual learning and sparsification tasks for language models (BERT), vision transformers (ViT, DeIT), and the CNNs. Broadly, we conceptualize a neural network as a mathematical object that can be iteratively transformed into distinct configurations by the path-sampling algorithm to define a sub-manifold of weight space that can be harnessed to achieve user goals.

Here, we introduce a differential geometry framework, functionally invariant paths (FIP), that provides flexible and continuous adaptation of neural networks for a range of machine learning goals and network sparsification objectives. We conceptualize the weight space of a neural network as a curved Riemannian manifold equipped with a metric tensor whose spectrum defines low rank subspaces in weight space that accommodate network adaptation without loss of prior knowledge. We formalize adaptation as movement along a geodesic path in weight space while searching for networks that accommodate secondary objectives. With modest computational resources, the FIP algorithm achieves comparable to state of the art performance on continual learning and sparsification tasks for language models (BERT), vision transformers (ViT, DeIT), and the CNNs. Broadly, we conceptualize a neural network as a mathematical object that can be iteratively transformed into distinct configurations by the path-sampling algorithm to define a sub-manifold of weight space that can be harnessed to achieve user goals.
abstract_zh: Transformer 已成为自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域最先进的神经网络架构。在基础模型范式中，大型 Transformer 模型（BERT、GPT3/4、Bloom、ViT）针对单词或图像屏蔽等自监督任务进行预训练，然后通过针对下游用户应用程序（包括指令跟踪和问答）的微调进行调整。尽管已经开发了许多用于模型微调的方法，包括低秩权重更新策略（例如 LoRA），但在不损失知识的情况下实现网络适应的基本数学原理仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们引入了一个微分几何框架，即功能不变路径（FIP），它为神经网络提供灵活且连续的适应，以实现一系列机器学习目标和网络稀疏化目标。我们将神经网络的权重空间概念化为配备有度量张量的弯曲黎曼流形，其频谱定义了权重空间中的低秩子空间，这些子空间在不损失先验知识的情况下适应网络自适应。我们将适应形式化为沿着权重空间中的测地线路径移动，同时搜索适应次要目标的网络。利用适度的计算资源，FIP 算法在语言模型 (BERT)、视觉变换器（ViT、DeIT）和 CNN 的持续学习和稀疏化任务上实现了与最先进的性能相当的性能。从广义上讲，我们将神经网络概念化为一个数学对象，可以通过路径采样算法迭代地将其转换为不同的配置，以定义可用于实现用户目标的权重空间的子流形。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于微分几何的功能不变路径（FIP）框架，实现神经网络的灵活连续适应，同时保持原有知识，适用于多种机器学习任务和模型结构。
AI.motivation: 现有微调方法（如LoRA）缺乏数学原理支持，导致适应过程中可能损失原有知识，需寻找数学严谨的框架实现无损适应。
AI.method: 将神经网络权重空间建模为黎曼流形，利用度量张量的谱定义低秩子空间，通过沿测地线路径的权重空间移动实现连续适应，同时满足次级目标。
AI.result: FIP算法在语言模型（BERT）、视觉Transformer（ViT、DeIT）和CNN的持续学习与稀疏化任务中，性能接近当前最优，且计算资源需求较低。
AI.conclusion: 将神经网络视为可迭代变换的数学对象，通过路径采样算法生成权重子流形，为实现灵活的机器学习系统提供了新思路，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Oleksiy Ostapenko,Timothee Lesort,Pau Rodríguez,Md Rifat Arefin,Arthur Douillard,Irina Rish,Laurent Charlin
title: Continual Learning with Foundation Models: An Empirical Study of Latent Replay
title_zh: 使用基础模型的持续学习：潜在重放的实证研究
abstract: Rapid development of large-scale pre-training has resulted in foundation models that can act as effective feature extractors on a variety of downstream tasks and domains. Motivated by this, we study the efficacy of pre-trained vision models as a foundation for downstream continual learning (CL) scenarios. Our goal is twofold. First, we want to understand the compute-accuracy trade-off between CL in the raw-data space and in the latent space of pre-trained encoders. Second, we investigate how the characteristics of the encoder, the pre-training algorithm and data, as well as of the resulting latent space affect CL performance. For this, we compare the efficacy of various pre-trained models in large-scale benchmarking scenarios with a vanilla replay setting applied in the latent and in the raw-data space. Notably, this study shows how transfer, forgetting, task similarity and learning are dependent on the input data characteristics and not necessarily on the CL algorithms. First, we show that under some circumstances reasonable CL performance can readily be achieved with a non-parametric classifier at negligible compute. We then show how models pre-trained on broader data result in better performance for various replay sizes. We explain this with representational similarity and transfer properties of these representations. Finally, we show the effectiveness of self-supervised pre-training for downstream domains that are out-of-distribution as compared to the pre-training domain. We point out and validate several research directions that can further increase the efficacy of latent CL including representation ensembling. The diverse set of datasets used in this study can serve as a compute-efficient playground for further CL research. The codebase is available under https://github.com/oleksost/latent_CL.

We point out and validate several research directions that can further increase the efficacy of latent CL including representation ensembling. The diverse set of datasets used in this study can serve as a compute-efficient playground for further CL research. The codebase is available under https://github.com/oleksost/latent_CL.
abstract_zh: 大规模预训练的快速发展催生了基础模型，可以作为各种下游任务和领域的有效特征提取器。受此启发，我们研究了预训练视觉模型的功效，作为下游持续学习（CL）场景的基础。我们的目标是双重的。首先，我们想要了解原始数据空间中的 CL 和预训练编码器的潜在空间中的 CL 之间的计算精度权衡。其次，我们研究编码器、预训练算法和数据以及由此产生的潜在空间的特性如何影响 CL 性能。为此，我们将大规模基准测试场景中各种预训练模型的功效与应用于潜在数据和原始数据空间的普通重放设置进行比较。值得注意的是，这项研究表明迁移、遗忘、任务相似性和学习如何依赖于输入数据特征，而不一定依赖于 CL 算法。首先，我们表明，在某些情况下，使用非参数分类器以可忽略的计算量可以轻松实现合理的 CL 性能。然后，我们展示了在更广泛的数据上预训练的模型如何在各种重放大小下获得更好的性能。我们用这些表示的表示相似性和传输属性来解释这一点。最后，我们展示了自监督预训练对于与预训练域相比处于分布外的下游域的有效性。我们指出并验证了几个可以进一步提高潜在 CL 功效的研究方向，包括表示集成。本研究中使用的不同数据集可以作为进一步 CL 研究的计算效率游乐场。该代码库可在 https://github.com/oleksost/latent_CL 下获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预训练视觉模型在持续学习（CL）场景中的有效性，比较了原始数据空间与预训练编码器潜在空间的计算-准确率权衡，并探讨了编码器特性、预训练算法及数据对CL性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着大规模预训练模型的发展，其作为下游任务的有效特征提取器的潜力促使研究者探索其在持续学习中的应用，旨在理解计算资源与准确率的权衡及影响CL性能的关键因素。
AI.method: 通过在大规模基准场景中比较不同预训练模型的效能，采用普通回放策略分别在潜在空间和原始数据空间进行实验，分析表示相似性、迁移特性及预训练数据分布对CL的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，非参数分类器在部分情况下可实现低计算量的合理CL性能；预训练数据范围更广的模型在不同回放规模下表现更优；自监督预训练对分布外领域更有效，且表示集成可作为提升CL效能的方向。
AI.conclusion: CL性能依赖于输入数据特性而非算法本身，预训练模型的表示能力和数据分布是关键因素，研究为高效CL提供了计算友好的实验框架与未来研究方向。

search_text: Continual Learning with Foundation Models: An Empirical Study of Latent Replay 使用基础模型的持续学习：潜在重放的实证研究 Rapid development of large-scale pre-training has resulted in foundation models that can act as effective feature extractors on a variety of downstream tasks and domains. Motivated by this, we study the efficacy of pre-trained vision models as a foundation for downstream continual learning (CL) scenarios. Our goal is twofold. First, we want to understand the compute-accuracy trade-off between CL in the raw-data space and in the latent space of pre-trained encoders. Second, we investigate how the characteristics of the encoder, the pre-training algorithm and data, as well as of the resulting latent space affect CL performance. For this, we compare the efficacy of various pre-trained models in large-scale benchmarking scenarios with a vanilla replay setting applied in the latent and in the raw-data space. Notably, this study shows how transfer, forgetting, task similarity and learning are dependent on the input data characteristics and not necessarily on the CL algorithms. First, we show that under some circumstances reasonable CL performance can readily be achieved with a non-parametric classifier at negligible compute. We then show how models pre-trained on broader data result in better performance for various replay sizes. We explain this with representational similarity and transfer properties of these representations. Finally, we show the effectiveness of self-supervised pre-training for downstream domains that are out-of-distribution as compared to the pre-training domain. We point out and validate several research directions that can further increase the efficacy of latent CL including representation ensembling. The diverse set of datasets used in this study can serve as a compute-efficient playground for further CL research. The codebase is available under https://github.com/oleksost/latent_CL. 大规模预训练的快速发展催生了基础模型，可以作为各种下游任务和领域的有效特征提取器。受此启发，我们研究了预训练视觉模型的功效，作为下游持续学习（CL）场景的基础。我们的目标是双重的。首先，我们想要了解原始数据空间中的 CL 和预训练编码器的潜在空间中的 CL 之间的计算精度权衡。其次，我们研究编码器、预训练算法和数据以及由此产生的潜在空间的特性如何影响 CL 性能。为此，我们将大规模基准测试场景中各种预训练模型的功效与应用于潜在数据和原始数据空间的普通重放设置进行比较。值得注意的是，这项研究表明迁移、遗忘、任务相似性和学习如何依赖于输入数据特征，而不一定依赖于 CL 算法。首先，我们表明，在某些情况下，使用非参数分类器以可忽略的计算量可以轻松实现合理的 CL 性能。然后，我们展示了在更广泛的数据上预训练的模型如何在各种重放大小下获得更好的性能。我们用这些表示的表示相似性和传输属性来解释这一点。最后，我们展示了自监督预训练对于与预训练域相比处于分布外的下游域的有效性。我们指出并验证了几个可以进一步提高潜在 CL 功效的研究方向，包括表示集成。本研究中使用的不同数据集可以作为进一步 CL 研究的计算效率游乐场。该代码库可在 https://github.com/oleksost/latent_CL 下获取。 本文研究了预训练视觉模型在持续学习（CL）场景中的有效性，比较了原始数据空间与预训练编码器潜在空间的计算-准确率权衡，并探讨了编码器特性、预训练算法及数据对CL性能的影响。 Oleksiy Ostapenko,Timothee Lesort,Pau Rodríguez,Md Rifat Arefin,Arthur Douillard,Irina Rish,Laurent Charlin cs.LG,cs.AI

title: p5.fab: Direct Control of Digital Fabrication Machines from a Creative Coding Environment
title_zh: p5.fab：从创意编码环境直接控制数字制造机器
comment: Submitted to DIS 2022, 12 pages plus references
comments: Submitted to DIS 2022, 12 pages plus references
abstract: Machine settings and tuning are critical for digital fabrication outcomes. However, exploring these parameters is non-trivial. We seek to enable exploration of the full design space of digital fabrication. To identify where we might intervene, we studied how practitioners approach 3D printing. We found that beyond using CAD/CAM, they create bespoke routines and workflows to explore interdependent material and machine settings. We seek to provide a system that supports this workflow development. We identified design goals around material exploration, fine-tuned control, and iteration. Based on these, we present p5.fab, a system for controlling digital fabrication machines from the creative coding environment p5.js. We demonstrate p5.fab with examples of 3D prints that cannot be made with traditional 3D printing software. We evaluate p5.fab in workshops and find that it encourages novel printing workflows and artifacts. Finally, we discuss implications for future digital fabrication systems.
summary: Machine settings and tuning are critical for digital fabrication outcomes. However, exploring these parameters is non-trivial. We seek to enable exploration of the full design space of digital fabrication. To identify where we might intervene, we studied how practitioners approach 3D printing. We found that beyond using CAD/CAM, they create bespoke routines and workflows to explore interdependent material and machine settings. We seek to provide a system that supports this workflow development. We identified design goals around material exploration, fine-tuned control, and iteration. Based on these, we present p5.fab, a system for controlling digital fabrication machines from the creative coding environment p5.js. We demonstrate p5.fab with examples of 3D prints that cannot be made with traditional 3D printing software. We evaluate p5.fab in workshops and find that it encourages novel printing workflows and artifacts. Finally, we discuss implications for future digital fabrication systems.
abstract_zh: 机器设置和调整对于数字制造结果至关重要。然而，探索这些参数并非易事。我们寻求探索数字制造的完整设计空间。为了确定我们可以在哪些方面进行干预，我们研究了从业者如何进行 3D 打印。我们发现，除了使用 CAD/CAM 之外，他们还创建定制例程和工作流程来探索相互依赖的材料和机器设置。我们寻求提供一个支持此工作流程开发的系统。我们围绕材料探索、微调控制和迭代确定了设计目标。基于这些，我们提出了 p5.fab，一个用于从创意编码环境 p5.js 控制数字制造机器的系统。我们通过无法使用传统 3D 打印软件制作的 3D 打印示例来演示 p5.fab。我们在研讨会上评估了 p5.fab，发现它鼓励新颖的打印工作流程和工件。最后，我们讨论对未来数字制造系统的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出p5.fab系统，通过创意编码环境p5.js直接控制数字制造设备，以探索更广泛的设计空间。
AI.motivation: 传统数字制造软件限制了参数探索，而从业者需要更灵活的工具来调整材料和机器设置以实现创新设计。
AI.method: 基于对3D打印工作流程的研究，设计支持材料探索与精细控制的p5.fab系统，集成至p5.js环境实现代码级控制。
AI.result: 工作坊验证显示p5.fab能生成传统软件无法实现的3D打印作品，并促进新型工作流程与创作成果的产生。
AI.conclusion: p5.fab为数字制造系统提供了新的交互范式，强调代码驱动的灵活性对创意实践与技术迭代的推动作用。

title: Artificial Intelligence and Medicine: A literature review
title_zh: 人工智能与医学：文献综述
abstract: In practically every industry today, artificial intelligence is one of the most effective ways for machines to assist humans. Since its inception, a large number of researchers throughout the globe have been pioneering the application of artificial intelligence in medicine. Although artificial intelligence may seem to be a 21st-century concept, Alan Turing pioneered the first foundation concept in the 1940s. Artificial intelligence in medicine has a huge variety of applications that researchers are continually exploring. The tremendous increase in computer and human resources has hastened progress in the 21st century, and it will continue to do so for many years to come. This review of the literature will highlight the emerging field of artificial intelligence in medicine and its current level of development.
summary: In practically every industry today, artificial intelligence is one of the most effective ways for machines to assist humans. Since its inception, a large number of researchers throughout the globe have been pioneering the application of artificial intelligence in medicine. Although artificial intelligence may seem to be a 21st-century concept, Alan Turing pioneered the first foundation concept in the 1940s. Artificial intelligence in medicine has a huge variety of applications that researchers are continually exploring. The tremendous increase in computer and human resources has hastened progress in the 21st century, and it will continue to do so for many years to come. This review of the literature will highlight the emerging field of artificial intelligence in medicine and its current level of development.
abstract_zh: 在当今的几乎每个行业中，人工智能都是机器协助人类的最有效方式之一。自成立以来，全球大量研究人员一直在探索人工智能在医学中的应用。尽管人工智能似乎是一个 21 世纪的概念，但艾伦·图灵在 20 世纪 40 年代率先提出了第一个基础概念。人工智能在医学领域有着广泛的应用，研究人员正在不断探索。计算机和人力资源的巨大增长加速了 21 世纪的进步，并将在未来许多年继续如此。本文献综述将重点介绍医学人工智能的新兴领域及其当前的发展水平。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能在医学领域的研究现状及其发展水平。
AI.motivation: 人工智能在医学中展现出巨大潜力，但其应用范围和研究进展需要系统梳理以明确发展方向。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾方法，总结全球范围内人工智能在医学领域的研究历史、应用场景及技术进展。
AI.result: 揭示了人工智能在医学中的多样化应用，以及计算资源和人力资源增长对21世纪技术发展的推动作用。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能医学是新兴且快速发展的领域，未来需持续探索以深化其临床应用价值。

search_text: Artificial Intelligence and Medicine: A literature review 人工智能与医学：文献综述 In practically every industry today, artificial intelligence is one of the most effective ways for machines to assist humans. Since its inception, a large number of researchers throughout the globe have been pioneering the application of artificial intelligence in medicine. Although artificial intelligence may seem to be a 21st-century concept, Alan Turing pioneered the first foundation concept in the 1940s. Artificial intelligence in medicine has a huge variety of applications that researchers are continually exploring. The tremendous increase in computer and human resources has hastened progress in the 21st century, and it will continue to do so for many years to come. This review of the literature will highlight the emerging field of artificial intelligence in medicine and its current level of development. 在当今的几乎每个行业中，人工智能都是机器协助人类的最有效方式之一。自成立以来，全球大量研究人员一直在探索人工智能在医学中的应用。尽管人工智能似乎是一个 21 世纪的概念，但艾伦·图灵在 20 世纪 40 年代率先提出了第一个基础概念。人工智能在医学领域有着广泛的应用，研究人员正在不断探索。计算机和人力资源的巨大增长加速了 21 世纪的进步，并将在未来许多年继续如此。本文献综述将重点介绍医学人工智能的新兴领域及其当前的发展水平。 本文综述了人工智能在医学领域的研究现状及其发展水平。 Chottiwatt Jittprasong q-bio.QM,cs.AI

title: Source Domain Subset Sampling for Semi-Supervised Domain Adaptation in Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割中半监督域适应的源域子集采样
abstract: In this paper, we introduce source domain subset sampling (SDSS) as a new perspective of semi-supervised domain adaptation. We propose domain adaptation by sampling and exploiting only a meaningful subset from source data for training. Our key assumption is that the entire source domain data may contain samples that are unhelpful for the adaptation. Therefore, the domain adaptation can benefit from a subset of source data composed solely of helpful and relevant samples. The proposed method effectively subsamples full source data to generate a small-scale meaningful subset. Therefore, training time is reduced, and performance is improved with our subsampled source data. To further verify the scalability of our method, we construct a new dataset called Ocean Ship, which comprises 500 real and 200K synthetic sample images with ground-truth labels. The SDSS achieved a state-of-the-art performance when applied on GTA5 to Cityscapes and SYNTHIA to Cityscapes public benchmark datasets and a 9.13 mIoU improvement on our Ocean Ship dataset over a baseline model.
summary: In this paper, we introduce source domain subset sampling (SDSS) as a new perspective of semi-supervised domain adaptation. We propose domain adaptation by sampling and exploiting only a meaningful subset from source data for training. Our key assumption is that the entire source domain data may contain samples that are unhelpful for the adaptation. Therefore, the domain adaptation can benefit from a subset of source data composed solely of helpful and relevant samples. The proposed method effectively subsamples full source data to generate a small-scale meaningful subset. Therefore, training time is reduced, and performance is improved with our subsampled source data. To further verify the scalability of our method, we construct a new dataset called Ocean Ship, which comprises 500 real and 200K synthetic sample images with ground-truth labels. The SDSS achieved a state-of-the-art performance when applied on GTA5 to Cityscapes and SYNTHIA to Cityscapes public benchmark datasets and a 9.13 mIoU improvement on our Ocean Ship dataset over a baseline model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们引入源域子集采样（SDSS）作为半监督域适应的新视角。我们通过仅采样和利用源数据中有意义的子集来进行域适应来进行训练。我们的关键假设是整个源域数据可能包含对适应无益的样本。因此，域适应可以受益于仅由有用且相关的样本组成的源数据子集。所提出的方法有效地对完整源数据进行子采样以生成小规模有意义的子集。因此，我们的子采样源数据减少了训练时间，并提高了性能。为了进一步验证我们方法的可扩展性，我们构建了一个名为 Ocean Ship 的新数据集，其中包含 500 个真实样本图像和 200K 个带有真实标签的合成样本图像。当应用于 GTA5 to Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA to Cityscapes 公共基准数据集时，SDSS 实现了最先进的性能，并且在我们的 Ocean Ship 数据集上比基准模型提高了 9.13 mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为源域子集采样（SDSS）的新方法，通过从源域数据中选取有意义的子集进行训练，以提升半监督域适应在语义分割中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法使用全部源域数据可能包含对域适应无用的样本，导致训练效率低下且效果不佳。本文认为仅需利用源域中相关且有益的子集即可提升性能。
AI.method: 提出SDSS方法，通过子采样源域数据生成小规模有意义的子集，并构建包含500张真实图像和20万合成图像的Ocean Ship数据集验证方法可扩展性。
AI.result: 在GTA5到Cityscapes和SYNTHIA到Cityscapes基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，在Ocean Ship数据集上较基线模型提升9.13 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: SDSS通过聚焦源域中相关样本有效提升了域适应性能，同时减少了训练时间，新数据集验证了方法的可扩展性。

authors_text: Tianxin Tao,Matthew Wilson,Ruiyu Gou,Michiel van de Panne
title: Learning to Get Up
title_zh: 学习起床
abstract: Getting up from an arbitrary fallen state is a basic human skill. Existing methods for learning this skill often generate highly dynamic and erratic get-up motions, which do not resemble human get-up strategies, or are based on tracking recorded human get-up motions. In this paper, we present a staged approach using reinforcement learning, without recourse to motion capture data. The method first takes advantage of a strong character model, which facilitates the discovery of solution modes. A second stage then learns to adapt the control policy to work with progressively weaker versions of the character. Finally, a third stage learns control policies that can reproduce the weaker get-up motions at much slower speeds. We show that across multiple runs, the method can discover a diverse variety of get-up strategies, and execute them at a variety of speeds. The results usually produce policies that use a final stand-up strategy that is common to the recovery motions seen from all initial states. However, we also find policies for which different strategies are seen for prone and supine initial fallen states. The learned get-up control strategies often have significant static stability, i.e., they can be paused at a variety of points during the get-up motion. We further test our method on novel constrained scenarios, such as having a leg and an arm in a cast.
summary: Getting up from an arbitrary fallen state is a basic human skill. Existing methods for learning this skill often generate highly dynamic and erratic get-up motions, which do not resemble human get-up strategies, or are based on tracking recorded human get-up motions. In this paper, we present a staged approach using reinforcement learning, without recourse to motion capture data. The method first takes advantage of a strong character model, which facilitates the discovery of solution modes. A second stage then learns to adapt the control policy to work with progressively weaker versions of the character. Finally, a third stage learns control policies that can reproduce the weaker get-up motions at much slower speeds. We show that across multiple runs, the method can discover a diverse variety of get-up strategies, and execute them at a variety of speeds. The results usually produce policies that use a final stand-up strategy that is common to the recovery motions seen from all initial states. However, we also find policies for which different strategies are seen for prone and supine initial fallen states. The learned get-up control strategies often have significant static stability, i.e., they can be paused at a variety of points during the get-up motion. We further test our method on novel constrained scenarios, such as having a leg and an arm in a cast.
abstract_zh: 从任意跌倒的状态中爬起来是人类的一项基本技能。现有的学习该技能的方法通常会生成高度动态且不稳定的起身动作，这些动作与人类起身策略不同，或者基于跟踪记录的人类起身动作。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用强化学习的分阶段方法，而不依赖于动作捕捉数据。该方法首先利用强大的特征模型，这有助于发现解决方案模式。然后，第二阶段学习调整控制策略以适应逐渐变弱的角色版本。最后，第三阶段学习控制策略，可以以慢得多的速度重现较弱的起身动作。我们证明，在多次运行中，该方法可以发现多种起身策略，并以不同的速度执行它们。结果通常会产生使用最终站立策略的政策，该策略对于所有初始状态的恢复动作都是通用的。然而，我们还发现对于俯卧和仰卧初始跌倒状态采取不同策略的政策。学习到的起身控制策略通常具有显着的静态稳定性，即它们可以在起身运动期间的多个点处暂停。我们进一步在新颖的受限场景中测试我们的方法，例如腿和手臂都打着石膏。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需依赖动作捕捉数据的强化学习方法，使虚拟角色能够从任意跌倒状态学习多样化的起身策略。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的起身动作过于动态或依赖人类动作数据，缺乏自然性和泛化能力，需开发自主学习的稳定策略。
AI.method: 采用三阶段强化学习框架：1) 利用强角色模型探索解决方案；2) 适应弱化角色模型的控制策略；3) 学习慢速重现弱化动作。
AI.result: 成功生成多种稳定起身策略，不同初始姿态（俯卧/仰卧）呈现差异化策略，动作具备静态稳定性，并适用于肢体受限等新场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了分阶段强化学习在生成自然、稳定且泛化性强的运动策略中的有效性，为复杂运动学习提供新思路。

However, we also find policies for which different strategies are seen for prone and supine initial fallen states. The learned get-up control strategies often have significant static stability, i.e., they can be paused at a variety of points during the get-up motion. We further test our method on novel constrained scenarios, such as having a leg and an arm in a cast. 从任意跌倒的状态中爬起来是人类的一项基本技能。现有的学习该技能的方法通常会生成高度动态且不稳定的起身动作，这些动作与人类起身策略不同，或者基于跟踪记录的人类起身动作。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用强化学习的分阶段方法，而不依赖于动作捕捉数据。该方法首先利用强大的特征模型，这有助于发现解决方案模式。然后，第二阶段学习调整控制策略以适应逐渐变弱的角色版本。最后，第三阶段学习控制策略，可以以慢得多的速度重现较弱的起身动作。我们证明，在多次运行中，该方法可以发现多种起身策略，并以不同的速度执行它们。结果通常会产生使用最终站立策略的政策，该策略对于所有初始状态的恢复动作都是通用的。然而，我们还发现对于俯卧和仰卧初始跌倒状态采取不同策略的政策。学习到的起身控制策略通常具有显着的静态稳定性，即它们可以在起身运动期间的多个点处暂停。我们进一步在新颖的受限场景中测试我们的方法，例如腿和手臂都打着石膏。 本文提出一种无需依赖动作捕捉数据的强化学习方法，使虚拟角色能够从任意跌倒状态学习多样化的起身策略。 Tianxin Tao,Matthew Wilson,Ruiyu Gou,Michiel van de Panne cs.GR,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Min Zhou,Chenchen Xu,Ye Ma,Tiezheng Ge,Yuning Jiang,Weiwei Xu
title: Composition-aware Graphic Layout GAN for Visual-textual Presentation Designs
title_zh: 用于视觉文本呈现设计的组合感知图形布局 GAN
comment: Accepted by IJCAI 2022 (AI, THE ARTS AND CREATIVITY TRACK)
comments: Accepted by IJCAI 2022 (AI, THE ARTS AND CREATIVITY TRACK)
abstract: In this paper, we study the graphic layout generation problem of producing high-quality visual-textual presentation designs for given images. We note that image compositions, which contain not only global semantics but also spatial information, would largely affect layout results. Hence, we propose a deep generative model, dubbed as composition-aware graphic layout GAN (CGL-GAN), to synthesize layouts based on the global and spatial visual contents of input images. To obtain training images from images that already contain manually designed graphic layout data, previous work suggests masking design elements (e.g., texts and embellishments) as model inputs, which inevitably leaves hint of the ground truth. We study the misalignment between the training inputs (with hint masks) and test inputs (without masks), and design a novel domain alignment module (DAM) to narrow this gap. For training, we built a large-scale layout dataset which consists of 60,548 advertising posters with annotated layout information. To evaluate the generated layouts, we propose three novel metrics according to aesthetic intuitions. Through both quantitative and qualitative evaluations, we demonstrate that the proposed model can synthesize high-quality graphic layouts according to image compositions.
summary: In this paper, we study the graphic layout generation problem of producing high-quality visual-textual presentation designs for given images. We note that image compositions, which contain not only global semantics but also spatial information, would largely affect layout results. Hence, we propose a deep generative model, dubbed as composition-aware graphic layout GAN (CGL-GAN), to synthesize layouts based on the global and spatial visual contents of input images. To obtain training images from images that already contain manually designed graphic layout data, previous work suggests masking design elements (e.g., texts and embellishments) as model inputs, which inevitably leaves hint of the ground truth. We study the misalignment between the training inputs (with hint masks) and test inputs (without masks), and design a novel domain alignment module (DAM) to narrow this gap. For training, we built a large-scale layout dataset which consists of 60,548 advertising posters with annotated layout information. To evaluate the generated layouts, we propose three novel metrics according to aesthetic intuitions. Through both quantitative and qualitative evaluations, we demonstrate that the proposed model can synthesize high-quality graphic layouts according to image compositions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了为给定图像生成高质量视觉文本呈现设计的图形布局生成问题。我们注意到，图像合成不仅包含全局语义，还包含空间信息，会在很大程度上影响布局结果。因此，我们提出了一种深度生成模型，称为合成感知图形布局 GAN（CGL-GAN），用于根据输入图像的全局和空间视觉内容合成布局。为了从已经包含手动设计的图形布局数据的图像中获取训练图像，之前的工作建议将设计元素（例如文本和装饰）屏蔽为模型输入，这不可避免地留下了真实情况的暗示。我们研究训练输入（带提示掩码）和测试输入（不带掩码）之间的不对齐，并设计一种新颖的域对齐模块（DAM）来缩小这种差距。为了进行训练，我们构建了一个大型布局数据集，其中包含 60,548 张带有注释布局信息的广告海报。为了评估生成的布局，我们根据审美直觉提出了三个新颖的指标。通过定量和定性评估，我们证明所提出的模型可以根据图像组成合成高质量的图形布局。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图像组成信息的生成对抗网络（CGL-GAN），用于生成高质量的视觉-文本演示设计布局。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在训练输入（带提示掩码）和测试输入（无掩码）之间存在不匹配，导致布局生成效果不佳，需通过领域对齐模块（DAM）解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出CGL-GAN模型，包含领域对齐模块（DAM），并构建包含60,548张标注广告海报的大规模数据集。
AI.result: 通过定量和定性评估，证明模型能根据图像组成生成高质量布局，并提出三个基于美学直觉的评估指标。
AI.conclusion: CGL-GAN在生成视觉-文本演示布局任务中表现优异，为相关设计提供了新方法。

authors_text: Fan Yan,Ming Nie,Xinyue Cai,Jianhua Han,Hang Xu,Zhen Yang,Chaoqiang Ye,Yanwei Fu,Michael Bi Mi,Li Zhang
title: ONCE-3DLanes: Building Monocular 3D Lane Detection
title_zh: ONCE-3DLanes：构建单目 3D 车道检测
abstract: We present ONCE-3DLanes, a real-world autonomous driving dataset with lane layout annotation in 3D space. Conventional 2D lane detection from a monocular image yields poor performance of following planning and control tasks in autonomous driving due to the case of uneven road. Predicting the 3D lane layout is thus necessary and enables effective and safe driving. However, existing 3D lane detection datasets are either unpublished or synthesized from a simulated environment, severely hampering the development of this field. In this paper, we take steps towards addressing these issues. By exploiting the explicit relationship between point clouds and image pixels, a dataset annotation pipeline is designed to automatically generate high-quality 3D lane locations from 2D lane annotations in 211K road scenes. In addition, we present an extrinsic-free, anchor-free method, called SALAD, regressing the 3D coordinates of lanes in image view without converting the feature map into the bird's-eye view (BEV). To facilitate future research on 3D lane detection, we benchmark the dataset and provide a novel evaluation metric, performing extensive experiments of both existing approaches and our proposed method. The aim of our work is to revive the interest of 3D lane detection in a real-world scenario. We believe our work can lead to the expected and unexpected innovations in both academia and industry.
summary: We present ONCE-3DLanes, a real-world autonomous driving dataset with lane layout annotation in 3D space. Conventional 2D lane detection from a monocular image yields poor performance of following planning and control tasks in autonomous driving due to the case of uneven road. Predicting the 3D lane layout is thus necessary and enables effective and safe driving. However, existing 3D lane detection datasets are either unpublished or synthesized from a simulated environment, severely hampering the development of this field. In this paper, we take steps towards addressing these issues. By exploiting the explicit relationship between point clouds and image pixels, a dataset annotation pipeline is designed to automatically generate high-quality 3D lane locations from 2D lane annotations in 211K road scenes. In addition, we present an extrinsic-free, anchor-free method, called SALAD, regressing the 3D coordinates of lanes in image view without converting the feature map into the bird's-eye view (BEV). To facilitate future research on 3D lane detection, we benchmark the dataset and provide a novel evaluation metric, performing extensive experiments of both existing approaches and our proposed method. The aim of our work is to revive the interest of 3D lane detection in a real-world scenario. We believe our work can lead to the expected and unexpected innovations in both academia and industry.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ONCE-3DLanes，这是一个真实世界的自动驾驶数据集，在 3D 空间中具有车道布局注释。由于道路不平坦的情况，传统的单目图像二维车道检测在自动驾驶中的跟随规划和控制任务中性能较差。因此，预测 3D 车道布局是必要的，可以实现有效且安全的驾驶。然而，现有的3D车道检测数据集要么未发布，要么是从模拟环境合成的，严重阻碍了该领域的发展。在本文中，我们采取措施解决这些问题。通过利用点云和图像像素之间的显式关系，数据集注释管道旨在根据 211K 道路场景中的 2D 车道注释自动生成高质量的 3D 车道位置。此外，我们提出了一种无外部、无锚点的方法，称为 SALAD，在图像视图中回归车道的 3D 坐标，而无需将特征图转换为鸟瞰图 (BEV)。为了促进未来 3D 车道检测的研究，我们对数据集进行了基准测试并提供了一种新颖的评估指标，对现有方法和我们提出的方法进行了广泛的实验。我们工作的目的是在现实场景中重振 3D 车道检测的兴趣。我们相信我们的工作可以为学术界和工业界带来预期和意想不到的创新。

AI.tldr: 构建单目3D车道检测数据集及方法，提升自动驾驶在复杂路况下的规划与控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统2D车道检测在不平整路面表现不佳，现有3D数据集依赖模拟或未公开，阻碍技术发展。
AI.method: 设计基于点云与图像像素关系的自动标注流程，生成211K场景的3D车道数据；提出无需外参和锚框的SALAD方法，直接回归图像视图中的3D坐标。
AI.result: 构建真实世界3D车道数据集，提出新评估指标，验证方法有效性并推动领域研究。
AI.conclusion: 通过真实数据集与创新方法，重燃3D车道检测研究兴趣，促进学术与产业创新。

authors_text: Yisi Sang,Xiangyang Mou,Jing Li,Jeffrey Stanton,Mo Yu
title: A Survey of Machine Narrative Reading Comprehension Assessments
title_zh: 机器叙事阅读理解评估调查
comment: accepted for the IJCAI-ECAI2022 Survey Track
comments: accepted for the IJCAI-ECAI2022 Survey Track
abstract: As the body of research on machine narrative comprehension grows, there is a critical need for consideration of performance assessment strategies as well as the depth and scope of different benchmark tasks. Based on narrative theories, reading comprehension theories, as well as existing machine narrative reading comprehension tasks and datasets, we propose a typology that captures the main similarities and differences among assessment tasks; and discuss the implications of our typology for new task design and the challenges of narrative reading comprehension.
summary: As the body of research on machine narrative comprehension grows, there is a critical need for consideration of performance assessment strategies as well as the depth and scope of different benchmark tasks. Based on narrative theories, reading comprehension theories, as well as existing machine narrative reading comprehension tasks and datasets, we propose a typology that captures the main similarities and differences among assessment tasks; and discuss the implications of our typology for new task design and the challenges of narrative reading comprehension.
abstract_zh: 随着机器叙事理解研究的不断增长，迫切需要考虑绩效评估策略以及不同基准任务的深度和范围。基于叙事理论、阅读理解理论以及现有的机器叙事阅读理解任务和数据集，我们提出了一种类型学，可以捕捉评估任务之间的主要异同；并讨论我们的类型学对新任务设计的影响以及叙事阅读理解的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种机器叙事阅读理解评估任务的分类法，分析不同任务的异同并探讨其对新任务设计的启示。
AI.motivation: 随着机器叙事理解研究增多，现有评估策略和基准任务的深度与范围缺乏系统性分析，需建立分类框架以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 基于叙事理论、阅读理解理论及现有任务数据集，构建评估任务分类法，分析其相似性与差异性。
AI.result: 提出分类框架，明确不同评估任务的核心特征，讨论其对新任务设计的影响及当前研究的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 分类法为理解评估任务提供系统视角，未来需进一步优化任务设计并解决叙事理解中的核心挑战。

search_text: A Survey of Machine Narrative Reading Comprehension Assessments 机器叙事阅读理解评估调查 As the body of research on machine narrative comprehension grows, there is a critical need for consideration of performance assessment strategies as well as the depth and scope of different benchmark tasks. Based on narrative theories, reading comprehension theories, as well as existing machine narrative reading comprehension tasks and datasets, we propose a typology that captures the main similarities and differences among assessment tasks; and discuss the implications of our typology for new task design and the challenges of narrative reading comprehension. 随着机器叙事理解研究的不断增长，迫切需要考虑绩效评估策略以及不同基准任务的深度和范围。基于叙事理论、阅读理解理论以及现有的机器叙事阅读理解任务和数据集，我们提出了一种类型学，可以捕捉评估任务之间的主要异同；并讨论我们的类型学对新任务设计的影响以及叙事阅读理解的挑战。 本文提出一种机器叙事阅读理解评估任务的分类法，分析不同任务的异同并探讨其对新任务设计的启示。 Yisi Sang,Xiangyang Mou,Jing Li,Jeffrey Stanton,Mo Yu cs.AI

authors_text: Kevin Hyekang Joo,Shiyuan Duan,Shawna L. Weimer,Mohammad Nayeem Teli
title: Birds' Eye View: Measuring Behavior and Posture of Chickens as a Metric for Their Well-Being
title_zh: 鸟瞰图：测量鸡的行为和姿势作为其健康状况的指标
abstract: Chicken well-being is important for ensuring food security and better nutrition for a growing global human population. In this research, we represent behavior and posture as a metric to measure chicken well-being. With the objective of detecting chicken posture and behavior in a pen, we employ two algorithms: Mask R-CNN for instance segmentation and YOLOv4 in combination with ResNet50 for classification. Our results indicate a weighted F1 score of 88.46% for posture and behavior detection using Mask R-CNN and an average of 91% accuracy in behavior detection and 86.5% average accuracy in posture detection using YOLOv4. These experiments are conducted under uncontrolled scenarios for both posture and behavior measurements. These metrics establish a strong foundation to obtain a decent indication of individual and group behaviors and postures. Such outcomes would help improve the overall well-being of the chickens. The dataset used in this research is collected in-house and will be made public after the publication as it would serve as a very useful resource for future research. To the best of our knowledge no other research work has been conducted in this specific setup used for this work involving multiple behaviors and postures simultaneously.
summary: Chicken well-being is important for ensuring food security and better nutrition for a growing global human population. In this research, we represent behavior and posture as a metric to measure chicken well-being. With the objective of detecting chicken posture and behavior in a pen, we employ two algorithms: Mask R-CNN for instance segmentation and YOLOv4 in combination with ResNet50 for classification. Our results indicate a weighted F1 score of 88.46% for posture and behavior detection using Mask R-CNN and an average of 91% accuracy in behavior detection and 86.5% average accuracy in posture detection using YOLOv4. These experiments are conducted under uncontrolled scenarios for both posture and behavior measurements. These metrics establish a strong foundation to obtain a decent indication of individual and group behaviors and postures. Such outcomes would help improve the overall well-being of the chickens. The dataset used in this research is collected in-house and will be made public after the publication as it would serve as a very useful resource for future research. To the best of our knowledge no other research work has been conducted in this specific setup used for this work involving multiple behaviors and postures simultaneously.
abstract_zh: 鸡的健康对于确保全球不断增长的人口的粮食安全和更好的营养非常重要。在这项研究中，我们将行为和姿势作为衡量鸡健康状况的指标。为了检测鸡栏内鸡的姿势和行为，我们采用了两种算法：Mask R-CNN 用于实例分割，YOLOv4 与 ResNet50 结合用于分类。我们的结果表明，使用 Mask R-CNN 的姿势和行为检测的加权 F1 得分为 88.46%，使用 YOLOv4 的行为检测的平均准确度为 91%，姿势检测的平均准确度为 86.5%。这些实验是在不受控制的情况下进行的，用于姿势和行为测量。这些指标为获得个人和群体行为和姿势的良好指示奠定了坚实的基础。这样的结果将有助于改善鸡的整体健康状况。本研究中使用的数据集是内部收集的，并将在出版后公开，因为它将作为未来研究的非常有用的资源。据我们所知，在用于这项同时涉及多种行为和姿势的工作的特定设置中，还没有进行其他研究工作。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析鸡的行为和姿势来衡量其福祉，使用Mask R-CNN和YOLOv4-ResNet50算法进行检测。
AI.motivation: 确保鸡的福祉对全球粮食安全和营养改善至关重要，需开发有效指标进行评估。
AI.method: 采用Mask R-CNN进行实例分割，结合YOLOv4与ResNet50进行行为与姿势分类，实验在非控制环境下进行。
AI.result: Mask R-CNN实现88.46%加权F1分数，YOLOv4行为检测准确率达91%，姿势检测86.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为个体及群体行为姿势分析奠定基础，公开数据集将促进未来研究，此为首次多行为姿势同步研究。

Weimer,Mohammad Nayeem Teli cs.CV

authors_text: Haolun Wu,Bhaskar Mitra,Chen Ma,Fernando Diaz,Xue Liu
title: Joint Multisided Exposure Fairness for Recommendation
title_zh: 联合多边曝光公平性推荐
abstract: Prior research on exposure fairness in the context of recommender systems has focused mostly on disparities in the exposure of individual or groups of items to individual users of the system. The problem of how individual or groups of items may be systemically under or over exposed to groups of users, or even all users, has received relatively less attention. However, such systemic disparities in information exposure can result in observable social harms, such as withholding economic opportunities from historically marginalized groups (allocative harm) or amplifying gendered and racialized stereotypes (representational harm). Previously, Diaz et al. developed the expected exposure metric -- that incorporates existing user browsing models that have previously been developed for information retrieval -- to study fairness of content exposure to individual users. We extend their proposed framework to formalize a family of exposure fairness metrics that model the problem jointly from the perspective of both the consumers and producers. Specifically, we consider group attributes for both types of stakeholders to identify and mitigate fairness concerns that go beyond individual users and items towards more systemic biases in recommendation. Furthermore, we study and discuss the relationships between the different exposure fairness dimensions proposed in this paper, as well as demonstrate how stochastic ranking policies can be optimized towards said fairness goals.
summary: Prior research on exposure fairness in the context of recommender systems has focused mostly on disparities in the exposure of individual or groups of items to individual users of the system. The problem of how individual or groups of items may be systemically under or over exposed to groups of users, or even all users, has received relatively less attention. However, such systemic disparities in information exposure can result in observable social harms, such as withholding economic opportunities from historically marginalized groups (allocative harm) or amplifying gendered and racialized stereotypes (representational harm). Previously, Diaz et al. developed the expected exposure metric -- that incorporates existing user browsing models that have previously been developed for information retrieval -- to study fairness of content exposure to individual users. We extend their proposed framework to formalize a family of exposure fairness metrics that model the problem jointly from the perspective of both the consumers and producers. Specifically, we consider group attributes for both types of stakeholders to identify and mitigate fairness concerns that go beyond individual users and items towards more systemic biases in recommendation. Furthermore, we study and discuss the relationships between the different exposure fairness dimensions proposed in this paper, as well as demonstrate how stochastic ranking policies can be optimized towards said fairness goals.
abstract_zh: 先前对推荐系统背景下的曝光公平性的研究主要集中在单个或一组项目向系统的各个用户的曝光差异上。单个或一组项目如何系统性地暴露于用户组甚至所有用户的不足或过度的问题受到的关注相对较少。然而，信息暴露的这种系统性差异可能会导致明显的社会危害，例如剥夺历史上边缘化群体的经济机会（分配性危害）或放大性别和种族刻板印象（代表性危害）。此前，迪亚兹等人。开发了预期曝光指标——它结合了先前为信息检索而开发的现有用户浏览模型——以研究内容曝光对个人用户的公平性。我们扩展了他们提出的框架，以形式化一系列曝光公平性指标，从消费者和生产者的角度共同对问题进行建模。具体来说，我们考虑两类利益相关者的群体属性，以识别和减轻超出个人用户和项目的公平性担忧，从而导致推荐中出现更系统性的偏见。此外，我们研究和讨论了本文提出的不同暴露公平性维度之间的关系，并演示了如何针对所述公平性目标优化随机排名策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合多方面暴露公平性框架，通过同时考虑用户和项目的群体属性，解决推荐系统中系统性暴露偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注个体用户与项目的暴露公平性，忽视了系统性偏见可能引发的分配性伤害和代表性伤害，需从用户与生产者双视角建模以应对更广泛的社会影响。
AI.method: 扩展预期暴露度量框架，构建联合公平性度量体系，结合用户与项目的群体属性分析多维度公平性关系，并优化随机排序策略以实现公平目标。
AI.result: 提出多维度暴露公平性指标家族，揭示不同公平性维度间关系，验证了基于随机排序策略的优化方法在缓解系统性偏见中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联合多视角分析能更全面识别推荐系统的系统性偏见，为构建公平性推荐框架提供理论支持与实践路径。

Furthermore, we study and discuss the relationships between the different exposure fairness dimensions proposed in this paper, as well as demonstrate how stochastic ranking policies can be optimized towards said fairness goals. 先前对推荐系统背景下的曝光公平性的研究主要集中在单个或一组项目向系统的各个用户的曝光差异上。单个或一组项目如何系统性地暴露于用户组甚至所有用户的不足或过度的问题受到的关注相对较少。然而，信息暴露的这种系统性差异可能会导致明显的社会危害，例如剥夺历史上边缘化群体的经济机会（分配性危害）或放大性别和种族刻板印象（代表性危害）。此前，迪亚兹等人。开发了预期曝光指标——它结合了先前为信息检索而开发的现有用户浏览模型——以研究内容曝光对个人用户的公平性。我们扩展了他们提出的框架，以形式化一系列曝光公平性指标，从消费者和生产者的角度共同对问题进行建模。具体来说，我们考虑两类利益相关者的群体属性，以识别和减轻超出个人用户和项目的公平性担忧，从而导致推荐中出现更系统性的偏见。此外，我们研究和讨论了本文提出的不同暴露公平性维度之间的关系，并演示了如何针对所述公平性目标优化随机排名策略。 本文提出一种联合多方面暴露公平性框架，通过同时考虑用户和项目的群体属性，解决推荐系统中系统性暴露偏见问题。 Haolun Wu,Bhaskar Mitra,Chen Ma,Fernando Diaz,Xue Liu cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: What do we Really Know about State of the Art NER?
title_zh: 我们对最先进的 NER 到底了解多少？
abstract: Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a well researched NLP task and is widely used in real world NLP scenarios. NER research typically focuses on the creation of new ways of training NER, with relatively less emphasis on resources and evaluation. Further, state of the art (SOTA) NER models, trained on standard datasets, typically report only a single performance measure (F-score) and we don't really know how well they do for different entity types and genres of text, or how robust are they to new, unseen entities. In this paper, we perform a broad evaluation of NER using a popular dataset, that takes into consideration various text genres and sources constituting the dataset at hand. Additionally, we generate six new adversarial test sets through small perturbations in the original test set, replacing select entities while retaining the context. We also train and test our models on randomly generated train/dev/test splits followed by an experiment where the models are trained on a select set of genres but tested genres not seen in training. These comprehensive evaluation strategies were performed using three SOTA NER models. Based on our results, we recommend some useful reporting practices for NER researchers, that could help in providing a better understanding of a SOTA model's performance in future.
summary: Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a well researched NLP task and is widely used in real world NLP scenarios. NER research typically focuses on the creation of new ways of training NER, with relatively less emphasis on resources and evaluation. Further, state of the art (SOTA) NER models, trained on standard datasets, typically report only a single performance measure (F-score) and we don't really know how well they do for different entity types and genres of text, or how robust are they to new, unseen entities. In this paper, we perform a broad evaluation of NER using a popular dataset, that takes into consideration various text genres and sources constituting the dataset at hand. Additionally, we generate six new adversarial test sets through small perturbations in the original test set, replacing select entities while retaining the context. We also train and test our models on randomly generated train/dev/test splits followed by an experiment where the models are trained on a select set of genres but tested genres not seen in training. These comprehensive evaluation strategies were performed using three SOTA NER models. Based on our results, we recommend some useful reporting practices for NER researchers, that could help in providing a better understanding of a SOTA model's performance in future.
abstract_zh: 命名实体识别（NER）是一项经过充分研究的 NLP 任务，广泛应用于现实世界的 NLP 场景。 NER 研究通常侧重于创建训练 NER 的新方法，相对较少强调资源和评估。此外，在标准数据集上训练的最先进的 (SOTA) NER 模型通常仅报告单个性能指标（F 分数），我们并不真正知道它们对于不同实体类型和文本类型的表现如何，或者它们对于新的、看不见的实体的鲁棒性如何。在本文中，我们使用流行的数据集对 NER 进行了广泛的评估，其中考虑了构成手头数据集的各种文本类型和来源。此外，我们通过原始测试集中的小扰动生成了六个新的对抗性测试集，在保留上下文的同时替换了选定的实体。我们还在随机生成的训练/开发/测试分组上训练和测试我们的模型，然后进行实验，其中模型在一组选定的流派上进行训练，但在训练中未看到测试的流派。这些综合评估策略是使用三个 SOTA NER 模型来执行的。根据我们的结果，我们为 NER 研究人员推荐了一些有用的报告实践，这有助于更好地了解 SOTA 模型未来的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文对当前最先进的命名实体识别（NER）模型进行了全面评估，探讨其在不同实体类型、文本类型及对抗性测试中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过于依赖单一性能指标（如F分数），忽视了模型在不同实体类型、文本类型及新实体上的鲁棒性，缺乏对资源和评估方法的深入分析。
AI.method: 使用主流数据集进行多体裁评估，生成六种对抗性测试集，通过随机划分训练/测试集及跨体裁测试，对比三种SOTA模型的表现。
AI.result: 模型在不同实体类型和文本体裁间表现差异显著，对抗性测试和跨体裁测试中性能下降明显，现有报告方式无法全面反映模型能力。
AI.conclusion: 建议NER研究者采用更细致的报告方式，包括分类型、分体裁的性能分析及对抗性测试结果，以全面评估模型效果。

title: A Human-Centric Perspective on Fairness and Transparency in Algorithmic Decision-Making
title_zh: 以人为本的算法决策公平性和透明度的视角
comment: CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems Extended Abstracts (CHI '22 Extended Abstracts), April 29--May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA
comments: CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems Extended Abstracts (CHI '22 Extended Abstracts), April 29--May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA
abstract: Automated decision systems (ADS) are increasingly used for consequential decision-making. These systems often rely on sophisticated yet opaque machine learning models, which do not allow for understanding how a given decision was arrived at. This is not only problematic from a legal perspective, but non-transparent systems are also prone to yield unfair outcomes because their sanity is challenging to assess and calibrate in the first place -- which is particularly worrisome for human decision-subjects. Based on this observation and building upon existing work, I aim to make the following three main contributions through my doctoral thesis: (a) understand how (potential) decision-subjects perceive algorithmic decisions (with varying degrees of transparency of the underlying ADS), as compared to similar decisions made by humans; (b) evaluate different tools for transparent decision-making with respect to their effectiveness in enabling people to appropriately assess the quality and fairness of ADS; and (c) develop human-understandable technical artifacts for fair automated decision-making. Over the course of the first half of my PhD program, I have already addressed substantial pieces of (a) and (c), whereas (b) will be the major focus of the second half.
summary: Automated decision systems (ADS) are increasingly used for consequential decision-making. These systems often rely on sophisticated yet opaque machine learning models, which do not allow for understanding how a given decision was arrived at. This is not only problematic from a legal perspective, but non-transparent systems are also prone to yield unfair outcomes because their sanity is challenging to assess and calibrate in the first place -- which is particularly worrisome for human decision-subjects. Based on this observation and building upon existing work, I aim to make the following three main contributions through my doctoral thesis: (a) understand how (potential) decision-subjects perceive algorithmic decisions (with varying degrees of transparency of the underlying ADS), as compared to similar decisions made by humans; (b) evaluate different tools for transparent decision-making with respect to their effectiveness in enabling people to appropriately assess the quality and fairness of ADS; and (c) develop human-understandable technical artifacts for fair automated decision-making. Over the course of the first half of my PhD program, I have already addressed substantial pieces of (a) and (c), whereas (b) will be the major focus of the second half.
abstract_zh: 自动决策系统 (ADS) 越来越多地用于后续决策。这些系统通常依赖于复杂但不透明的机器学习模型，这些模型无法理解给定决策是如何得出的。这不仅从法律角度来看是有问题的，而且不透明的系统也容易产生不公平的结果，因为它们的理智首先很难评估和校准——这对于人类决策主体来说尤其令人担忧。基于这一观察并在现有工作的基础上，我的目标是通过我的博士论文做出以下三个主要贡献：(a) 与人类做出的类似决策相比，了解（潜在的）决策主体如何感知算法决策（具有不同程度的底层 ADS 透明度）； (b) 评估不同的透明决策工具在使人们能够适当评估 ADS 的质量和公平性方面的有效性； (c) 开发人类可理解的技术工件以实现公平的自动化决策。在我的博士课程的前半部分中，我已经解决了（a）和（c）的大部分内容，而（b）将是后半部分的主要焦点。

AI.tldr: 本文从人类中心视角探讨算法决策中的公平性与透明性问题，旨在理解人类对算法决策的感知差异，评估透明工具有效性，并开发可解释的公平决策技术。
AI.motivation: 自动化决策系统因模型复杂性导致透明度不足，可能引发法律争议和不公平结果，需通过提升透明度和可解释性保障人类决策主体的权益。
AI.method: 结合实证研究（如用户实验）分析人类对算法与人工决策的感知差异，评估现有透明工具的效果，并设计可解释的公平性技术框架。
AI.result: 已完成对决策感知差异的部分研究及公平性技术原型开发，后续将重点验证透明工具的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 算法决策需兼顾透明性与公平性，通过人类可理解的技术设计可缓解算法黑箱问题，未来研究应聚焦工具有效性验证与实际应用落地。

authors_text: Pragaash Ponnusamy,Clint Solomon Mathialagan,Gustavo Aguilar,Chengyuan Ma,Chenlei Guo
title: Self-Aware Feedback-Based Self-Learning in Large-Scale Conversational AI
title_zh: 大规模会话人工智能中基于自我意识反馈的自学习
abstract: Self-learning paradigms in large-scale conversational AI agents tend to leverage user feedback in bridging between what they say and what they mean. However, such learning, particularly in Markov-based query rewriting systems have far from addressed the impact of these models on future training where successive feedback is inevitably contingent on the rewrite itself, especially in a continually updating environment. In this paper, we explore the consequences of this inherent lack of self-awareness towards impairing the model performance, ultimately resulting in both Type I and II errors over time. To that end, we propose augmenting the Markov Graph construction with a superposition-based adjacency matrix. Here, our method leverages an induced stochasticity to reactively learn a locally-adaptive decision boundary based on the performance of the individual rewrites in a bi-variate beta setting. We also surface a data augmentation strategy that leverages template-based generation in abridging complex conversation hierarchies of dialogs so as to simplify the learning process. All in all, we demonstrate that our self-aware model improves the overall PR-AUC by 27.45%, achieves a relative defect reduction of up to 31.22%, and is able to adapt quicker to changes in global preferences across a large number of customers.

abstract_zh: 大规模对话式人工智能代理中的自学习范式倾向于利用用户反馈来连接他们所说的和他们的意思。然而，这种学习，特别是在基于马尔可夫的查询重写系统中，还远远没有解决这些模型对未来训练的影响，其中连续的反馈不可避免地取决于重写本身，特别是在不断更新的环境中。在本文中，我们探讨了这种固有的自我意识缺乏对模型性能的影响，最终导致随着时间的推移出现 I 类和 II 类错误。为此，我们建议使用基于叠加的邻接矩阵来增强马尔可夫图构造。在这里，我们的方法利用诱导随机性，根据双变量 beta 设置中个体重写的性能，反应性地学习局部自适应决策边界。我们还提出了一种数据增强策略，该策略利用基于模板的生成来简化对话的复杂对话层次结构，从而简化学习过程。总而言之，我们证明我们的自我意识模型将整体 PR-AUC 提高了 27.45%，相对缺陷减少高达 31.22%，并且能够更快地适应大量客户的全球偏好变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自感知反馈的自学习方法，旨在提升大规模对话AI在动态环境中的性能和适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于马尔可夫的查询重写系统缺乏对反馈机制自身影响的感知，导致模型在持续更新环境中出现性能下降和错误累积。
AI.method: 通过引入超位置邻接矩阵增强马尔可夫图结构，并结合双变量贝塔分布动态调整决策边界；同时采用模板生成策略简化对话层次结构以辅助学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法使PR-AUC提升27.45%，缺陷率降低31.22%，并显著加速了对用户偏好变化的适应速度。
AI.conclusion: 自感知反馈机制有效缓解了传统模型在动态环境中的性能衰减问题，为持续学习的对话系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Christoph von der Malsburg,Thilo Stadelmann,Benjamin F. Grewe
title: A Theory of Natural Intelligence
title_zh: 自然智力理论
abstract: Introduction: In contrast to current AI technology, natural intelligence -- the kind of autonomous intelligence that is realized in the brains of animals and humans to attain in their natural environment goals defined by a repertoire of innate behavioral schemata -- is far superior in terms of learning speed, generalization capabilities, autonomy and creativity. How are these strengths, by what means are ideas and imagination produced in natural neural networks? Methods: Reviewing the literature, we put forward the argument that both our natural environment and the brain are of low complexity, that is, require for their generation very little information and are consequently both highly structured. We further argue that the structures of brain and natural environment are closely related. Results: We propose that the structural regularity of the brain takes the form of net fragments (self-organized network patterns) and that these serve as the powerful inductive bias that enables the brain to learn quickly, generalize from few examples and bridge the gap between abstractly defined general goals and concrete situations. Conclusions: Our results have important bearings on open problems in artificial neural network research.
summary: Introduction: In contrast to current AI technology, natural intelligence -- the kind of autonomous intelligence that is realized in the brains of animals and humans to attain in their natural environment goals defined by a repertoire of innate behavioral schemata -- is far superior in terms of learning speed, generalization capabilities, autonomy and creativity. How are these strengths, by what means are ideas and imagination produced in natural neural networks? Methods: Reviewing the literature, we put forward the argument that both our natural environment and the brain are of low complexity, that is, require for their generation very little information and are consequently both highly structured. We further argue that the structures of brain and natural environment are closely related. Results: We propose that the structural regularity of the brain takes the form of net fragments (self-organized network patterns) and that these serve as the powerful inductive bias that enables the brain to learn quickly, generalize from few examples and bridge the gap between abstractly defined general goals and concrete situations. Conclusions: Our results have important bearings on open problems in artificial neural network research.
abstract_zh: 简介：与当前的人工智能技术相比，自然智能——一种在动物和人类的大脑中实现的自主智能，以在自然环境中实现由先天行为图式定义的目标——在学习速度、泛化能力、自主性和创造力方面要优越得多。这些优势是如何产生的？自然神经网络通过什么方式产生想法和想象力？方法：回顾文献，我们提出这样的论点：我们的自然环境和大脑都是低复杂性的，也就是说，它们生成的信息非常少，因此都是高度结构化的。我们进一步认为大脑的结构与自然环境密切相关。结果：我们提出，大脑的结构规律性采用网络片段（自组织网络模式）的形式，这些作为强大的归纳偏差，使大脑能够快速学习，从少数例子中进行概括，并弥合抽象定义的总体目标和具体情况之间的差距。结论：我们的结果对人工神经网络研究中的开放问题具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨自然智能（如人类和动物大脑中的自主智能）相较于当前人工智能在学习速度、泛化能力、自主性和创造力方面的优势，并试图解释这些能力在自然神经网络中的实现机制。
AI.motivation: 当前人工智能技术在学习效率和创造力等方面远逊于自然智能，因此需要研究自然智能的内在机制以改进人工智能。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，提出自然环境与大脑均具有低复杂性结构，且两者结构密切相关，并以此为基础分析大脑的学习机制。
AI.result: 发现大脑的结构规律表现为自组织网络模式（net fragments），这些模式作为强归纳偏置，使大脑能快速学习、从少量样本中泛化，并连接抽象目标与具体情境。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果对解决人工神经网络领域的开放性问题具有重要意义，提示需关注结构化规律以提升AI性能。

title: Brainish: Formalizing A Multimodal Language for Intelligence and Consciousness
title_zh: Brainish：形式化智力和意识的多模态语言
comment: Annual Meeting of the Association for the Scientific Study of Consciousness 2022
comments: Annual Meeting of the Association for the Scientific Study of Consciousness 2022
abstract: Having a rich multimodal inner language is an important component of human intelligence that enables several necessary core cognitive functions such as multimodal prediction, translation, and generation. Building upon the Conscious Turing Machine (CTM), a machine model for consciousness proposed by Blum and Blum (2021), we describe the desiderata of a multimodal language called Brainish, comprising words, images, audio, and sensations combined in representations that the CTM's processors use to communicate with each other. We define the syntax and semantics of Brainish before operationalizing this language through the lens of multimodal artificial intelligence, a vibrant research area studying the computational tools necessary for processing and relating information from heterogeneous signals. Our general framework for learning Brainish involves designing (1) unimodal encoders to segment and represent unimodal data, (2) a coordinated representation space that relates and composes unimodal features to derive holistic meaning across multimodal inputs, and (3) decoders to map multimodal representations into predictions (for fusion) or raw data (for translation or generation). Through discussing how Brainish is crucial for communication and coordination in order to achieve consciousness in the CTM, and by implementing a simple version of Brainish and evaluating its capability of demonstrating intelligence on multimodal prediction and retrieval tasks on several real-world image, text, and audio datasets, we argue that such an inner language will be important for advances in machine models of intelligence and consciousness.

Our general framework for learning Brainish involves designing (1) unimodal encoders to segment and represent unimodal data, (2) a coordinated representation space that relates and composes unimodal features to derive holistic meaning across multimodal inputs, and (3) decoders to map multimodal representations into predictions (for fusion) or raw data (for translation or generation). Through discussing how Brainish is crucial for communication and coordination in order to achieve consciousness in the CTM, and by implementing a simple version of Brainish and evaluating its capability of demonstrating intelligence on multimodal prediction and retrieval tasks on several real-world image, text, and audio datasets, we argue that such an inner language will be important for advances in machine models of intelligence and consciousness.
abstract_zh: 拥有丰富的多模态内部语言是人类智能的重要组成部分，它能够实现多种必要的核心认知功能，例如多模态预测、翻译和生成。基于 Blum 和 Blum (2021) 提出的意识机器模型 Conscious Turing Machine (CTM)，我们描述了一种名为 Brainish 的多模态语言的需求，其中包括单词、图像、音频和感觉，这些语言以 CTM 处理器用于相互通信的表示方式组合在一起。我们先定义 Brainish 的语法和语义，然后通过多模态人工智能的视角来操作这种语言，多模态人工智能是一个充满活力的研究领域，研究处理和关联来自异构信号的信息所需的计算工具。我们学习 Brainish 的总体框架包括设计（1）单模态编码器来分割和表示单模态数据，（2）一个协调表示空间，关联和组合单模态特征以导出多模态输入的整体含义，以及（3）解码器将多模态表示映射到预测（用于融合）或原始数据（用于翻译或生成）。通过讨论 Brainish 对于在 CTM 中实现意识的沟通和协调至关重要，并通过实现 Brainish 的简单版本并评估其在多个现实世界图像、文本和音频数据集上的多模态预测和检索任务上展示智能的能力，我们认为这种内部语言对于智能和意识机器模型的进步非常重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Brainish的多模态语言框架，旨在为基于意识图灵机（CTM）的机器意识模型提供通信与协调机制，并通过多模态AI技术实现其语法与语义的定义及应用。
AI.motivation: 人类智能依赖多模态内部语言实现预测、翻译等核心认知功能，而现有CTM模型缺乏类似机制。为使机器具备意识，需构建一种能整合文本、图像、音频等异构信息的多模态语言体系。
AI.method: 设计三阶段框架：1）单模态编码器提取各模态特征；2）构建协调表示空间实现跨模态特征融合；3）解码器生成预测结果或原始数据。通过多模态AI技术实现Brainish的语法语义定义与实际应用验证。
AI.result: 在现实图像、文本和音频数据集上验证了Brainish的多模态预测与检索能力，证明该框架能有效支持机器智能与意识模型的通信协调。
AI.conclusion: Brainish作为多模态内部语言框架，为机器意识研究提供了新方向，未来需进一步优化其表示能力与实际应用效果。

search_text: Brainish: Formalizing A Multimodal Language for Intelligence and Consciousness Brainish：形式化智力和意识的多模态语言 Having a rich multimodal inner language is an important component of human intelligence that enables several necessary core cognitive functions such as multimodal prediction, translation, and generation. Building upon the Conscious Turing Machine (CTM), a machine model for consciousness proposed by Blum and Blum (2021), we describe the desiderata of a multimodal language called Brainish, comprising words, images, audio, and sensations combined in representations that the CTM's processors use to communicate with each other. We define the syntax and semantics of Brainish before operationalizing this language through the lens of multimodal artificial intelligence, a vibrant research area studying the computational tools necessary for processing and relating information from heterogeneous signals. Our general framework for learning Brainish involves designing (1) unimodal encoders to segment and represent unimodal data, (2) a coordinated representation space that relates and composes unimodal features to derive holistic meaning across multimodal inputs, and (3) decoders to map multimodal representations into predictions (for fusion) or raw data (for translation or generation). Through discussing how Brainish is crucial for communication and coordination in order to achieve consciousness in the CTM, and by implementing a simple version of Brainish and evaluating its capability of demonstrating intelligence on multimodal prediction and retrieval tasks on several real-world image, text, and audio datasets, we argue that such an inner language will be important for advances in machine models of intelligence and consciousness. 拥有丰富的多模态内部语言是人类智能的重要组成部分，它能够实现多种必要的核心认知功能，例如多模态预测、翻译和生成。基于 Blum 和 Blum (2021) 提出的意识机器模型 Conscious Turing Machine (CTM)，我们描述了一种名为 Brainish 的多模态语言的需求，其中包括单词、图像、音频和感觉，这些语言以 CTM 处理器用于相互通信的表示方式组合在一起。我们先定义 Brainish 的语法和语义，然后通过多模态人工智能的视角来操作这种语言，多模态人工智能是一个充满活力的研究领域，研究处理和关联来自异构信号的信息所需的计算工具。我们学习 Brainish 的总体框架包括设计（1）单模态编码器来分割和表示单模态数据，（2）一个协调表示空间，关联和组合单模态特征以导出多模态输入的整体含义，以及（3）解码器将多模态表示映射到预测（用于融合）或原始数据（用于翻译或生成）。通过讨论 Brainish 对于在 CTM 中实现意识的沟通和协调至关重要，并通过实现 Brainish 的简单版本并评估其在多个现实世界图像、文本和音频数据集上的多模态预测和检索任务上展示智能的能力，我们认为这种内部语言对于智能和意识机器模型的进步非常重要。 本文提出一种名为Brainish的多模态语言框架，旨在为基于意识图灵机（CTM）的机器意识模型提供通信与协调机制，并通过多模态AI技术实现其语法与语义的定义及应用。 Paul Pu Liang cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG
